Name: British Film Institute (BFI)
Description:
We are a cultural charity, a National Lottery distributor, and the UK's lead organisation for film and the moving image. Funded by the UK Government.

Our mission is:

• To support creativity and actively seek out the next generation of UK storytellers

• To grow and care for the BFI National Archive, the world’s largest film and television archive

• To offer the widest range of UK and international moving image culture through our programmes and festivals—delivered online and in venue

• To use our knowledge to educate and deepen public appreciation and understanding of film and the moving image

• To work with Government and industry to ensure the continued growth of the UK’s screen industries

Founded in 1933, the BFI is a registered charity governed by Royal Charter.

The BFI Board of Governors is chaired by Jay Hunt.

Name: Method Studios
Description:
Method Studios is a global content creation studio known for photorealistic product development and seamless VFX. Method works alongside creatives and teams on brand work, advertising, live-event films and real-time productions. 

With offices in Los Angeles and New York, team members based around the world, and a dedicated real-time and gaming team in Vancouver, Method offers a range of services that allows us to streamline the entire post-production process, and bring our clients’ creative vision to life.

Our Creative Services organization, which includes renowned brands such as Company 3, Powerhouse VFX, and SDFX Studios, boasts the largest fully-integrated suite of services in the industry.  With the most consistently sought-after creative directors, technologists and artists, we are uniquely positioned to be a valuable partner for projects of all scopes and sizes.

Name: Red Chillies Entertainment
Description: Red Chillies Entertainment was founded in 2002 founded by Shah Rukh Khan and Gauri Khan, has ever since, the company has been on a steady growth curve in the sphere of motion picture production and distribution. Red Chillies Entertainments has branched itself into other domains of production as well, and currently parents Film Production, VFX - special effects, and a film distribution company.

Name: Rodeo FX
Description:
We create moving work that has the power to resonate with all of us. We bring our passion for craft and technological creativity to all our projects.

Full-service, award-winning creative company with teams in Montreal, Quebec City, Toronto, Los Angeles, and Paris.

Name: Qube Cinema
Description:
Qube Cinema is a provider of end-to-end movie technology and solutions. The company draws on decades of experience in cinema and provides a seamless environment for exhibitors, filmmakers and post-production companies with products and services that are flexible, reliable and cost-effective.

Qube’s products and services are well established globally, with thousands of installations serving 136 countries across the world.

Qube Cinema has been a leading provider of technology in the film, video and audio domains and has pioneered several technology revolutions over the last four decades. The company was instrumental in bringing computer-based digital non-linear editing to India with Avid Technology, transforming the industry and forever changing the way Indian film and television programs were edited. The company subsequently brought digital cinema sound to India with DTS and helped Indian cinema leapfrog a generation, form mono sound directly to digital.

In 2005, Qube Cinema became one of the pioneers of the digital cinema transformation worldwide with its Qube digital cinema server and QubeMaster Pro digital cinema mastering products.

Qube continues to innovate with Qube Wire, a truly unique self-service digital cinema content delivery and key management service that has quickly become the market leader.

The company is also setting up virtual production facilities and has multiple other pathbreaking services under development — all with the aim of bringing to life the passion of every storyteller, to engage, entertain and enlighten the world.

Name: Toronto International Film Festival
Description:
TIFF is dedicated to presenting the best of international and Canadian cinema to film lovers. What began as a ten-day film festival has grown to embrace programming 365 days a year. TIFF offers screenings, lectures, discussions, festivals, workshops, industry support and the chance to meet filmmakers from Canada and around the world.

In September 2010, the opening of our new home, TIFF Lightbox, enabled TIFF to expand to truly become a creative, community and global leader, and one of the world’s premier organizations in the discovery and understanding of film.

Our Mission: Transform the way people see the world through film

Our Vision: A more engaged, informed, connected world

Our Values: Courageous, Collaborative, Purposeful, Inclusive and Celebratory

For current career opportunities visit tiff.net/careers

Name: NEON
Description:
In only eight years, NEON has garnered 39 Academy Award nominations (7 this year), 11 total wins (5 this year), including two Best Picture wins, and has grossed over $400M at the box office. The company continues to push boundaries and take creative risks on bold cinema such as Sean Baker’s Anora, which recently took home five Academy Awards including Best Picture, and was released in theaters to the highest per-screen average of 2024; as well as Bong Joon Ho’s Parasite, which made history winning four Academy Awards, becoming the first non-English-language film to claim Best Picture, and grossed over $54M at the domestic box office. 

NEON has built an impressive streak winning the coveted Palme d’Or at the Cannes Film Festival, with six consecutive wins, including this most recent year’s winner It Was Just an Accident from Iranian filmmaker Jafar Panahi, as well as Anora, Parasite, Anatomy of a Fall, Titane, and Triangle of Sadness. In 2024, NEON was named The Hollywood Reporter’s Independent Studio of the Year and received the Clio Award for Studio of the Year.

Recent NEON releases include Mike Flanagan’s The Life of Chuck and Osgood Perkins’ horror film The Monkey, both of which are based on the short stories by Stephen King. The Monkey marked NEON’s second biggest opening weekend at the box office following Perkins’ Longlegs, which is the highest grossing independent film of the year at $75 million domestically. 

As a burgeoning leader in the production space, NEON’s recent and upcoming in-house productions include: David Robert Mitchell’s They Follow starring Maika Monroe; Michael Covino’s Splitsville starring Dakota Johnson and Adria Arjona; the highly anticipated Boots Riley feature I Love Boosters starring Keke Palmer, Naomi Ackie, LaKeith Stanfield, Demi Moore, and Eiza González; The Wrong Girls starring Kristen Stewart and Alia Shawkat; Tilman Singer’s Cuckoo starring Hunter Schafer; and Brandon Cronenberg’s Infinity Pool.

Name: STUDIOCANAL
Description:
STUDIOCANAL, CANAL+’s in-house studio, is Europe’s leading film and television studio, with worldwide production and distribution capabilities. It operates directly in nine major European markets including Austria, Benelux, Denmark, France, Germany, Ireland, Poland, Spain and the United Kingdom, as well as in Australia and New Zealand, and offices in the United States and China. STUDIOCANAL finances, produces, and distributes 200 films per year. It owns one of the most prestigious catalogues in the world and the largest catalogue of European titles, boasting more than 9 400 titles from 60 countries. With a catalogue spanning 100 years of film history, STUDIOCANAL has invested close to 25 million euros into the 4K restoration of nearly 1 000 classic feature films over the past 7 years. 
 
STUDIOCANAL also produces over 15 series each year, including local creations and premium international co-productions, and distributes its scripted productions and CANAL+ Originals globally (2,000 hours of current and library content in distribution). Projects are produced in-house by STUDIOCANAL or through its worldwide network of production companies, including 2e Bureau, Flab, Kissman, Pernel, Upside and Grands Ducs Films in France; Birdie Pictures, Urban Myth Films, Strong Film & Television, Sunny March TV and Brock Media in the UK; Bambú Producciones and Te Espero en Marte in Spain; Lailaps Films and STUDIOCANAL Series in Germany; Opus TV in Poland; Sam Productions in Denmark; Dingie in Belgium; and The Picture Company in the United States.

Name: The SPA Studios (Sergio Pablos Animation)
Description:
Animagic S.L. was born on 2004 as a small Animation service company, and then changed its name to THE SPA Studios (standing for Sergio Pablos Animation) on 2010. Since the beginning, our focus has been on producing high quality work in all things Animation, providing Production and Pre-Production services for such clients as Universal, Blue Sky, Warner and Disney to name a few.

At the same time, we've made a great effort in developing original content for Feature Animation Films. We successfully created and developed the original Story and materials on which Universal's "Despicable Me" is based, and are currently in negotiations in regards to several other Feature Film properties.

Name: Marché du Film - Festival de Cannes
Description:
The Marché du Film, the business wing of the Festival de Cannes, is the industry’s largest international gathering of film professionals, bringing together an impressive network of 14,000 film professionals spanning more than 140 countries. This includes buyers, sales agents, producers, distributors, festival representatives, financiers and more. 

Each year, the film market hosts over 1,200 market screenings and introduces 4,000 new film projects from the industry’s most vibrant talents. Additionally, it shines a spotlight on film institutions and commissions from nearly 90 countries, represented across 60 pavilions. 

With a variety of tailored programs and over 200 industry events & conferences, the Marché du Film is dedicated to strengthening the global film community by fostering strategic partnerships, facilitating project financing, showcasing the latest innovations and providing insights into the industry’s latest challenges and trends — all within the illustrious and iconic setting of Cannes.

Name: Screen Australia
Description: Screen Australia is the Federal Government’s funding body for the Australian screen and games industry.

Name: National Film & Television School
Description: Educating the best creative talent to the highest professional standard for tomorrow's screen industries.The NFTS is the only film school in the UK which boasts its own film and television studios, and post-production facilities rivalling those of professional companies. Its talented community of students makes around a hundred films a year on courses that are still over 90% practical and unlike anything offered at any other UK film school.

Name: Visual Effects Society
Description: The Visual Effects Society is the entertainment industry's only organization representing the full breadth of visual effects practitioners including artists, technologists, model makers, animators, educators, studio leaders, supervisors, PR/marketing specialists and producers in all areas of entertainment from film, television and commercials to music videos and games.

Name: Rai Cinema
Description: Rai Cinema è una Società del Gruppo Rai nata con il preciso obiettivo di rafforzare l'industria cinematografica italiana; l'obbligo di investire nella produzione di cinema italiano, previsto dalla legge, è stato trasformato nel tempo in un'opportunità per lo sviluppo dell'industria culturale del paese.

Name: The Criterion Collection
Description:
OUR MISSION

Since 1984, the Criterion Collection, a continuing series of important classic and contemporary films, has been dedicated to gathering the greatest films from around the world and publishing them in editions that offer the highest technical quality and award-winning, original supplements. Over the years, as we moved from laserdisc to DVD, Blu-ray disc, and online streaming, we’ve seen a lot of things change, but one thing has remained constant: our commitment to publishing the defining moments of cinema for a wider and wider audience. The foundation of the collection is the work of such masters of cinema as Renoir, Godard, Kurosawa, Cocteau, Fellini, Bergman, Tarkovsky, Hitchcock, Fuller, Lean, Kubrick, Lang, Sturges, Dreyer, Eisenstein, Ozu, Sirk, Buñuel, Powell and Pressburger. Each film is presented uncut, in its original aspect ratio, as its maker intended it to be seen. Every time we start work on a film, we track down the best available film elements in the world, use state-of-the-art telecine equipment and a select few colorists capable of meeting our rigorous standards, then take time during the film-to-video digital transfer to create the most pristine possible image and sound. Whenever possible, we work with directors and cinematographers to ensure that the look of our releases does justice to their intentions. Our supplements enable viewers to appreciate Criterion films in context, through audio commentaries by filmmakers and scholars, restored director’s cuts, deleted scenes, documentaries, shooting scripts, early shorts, and storyboards. To date, more than 150 filmmakers have made our library of Director Approved DVDs, Blu-ray discs, and laserdiscs the most significant archive of contemporary filmmaking available to the home viewer.

Name: mk2
Description: Avec 23 cinémas à Paris et en Espagne, mk2 est le premier circuit art-et-essai en France et Cine/Sur le premier réseau d’Andalousie. Pensées comme des lieux de vie, ses salles en France intègrent depuis plus de 40 ans des espaces de rencontre et de consommation : restaurants, cafés, stores. Depuis 2014, mk2 développe en Espagne son savoir-faire de programmateur, qui mêle cinéma d’auteur, films grand public et évènements culturels. Ensemble, les deux réseaux de mk2 cinémas accueillent chaque année plus de 9 millions de spectateurs. En France, c’est 10 cinémas, 68 écrans, 4.6 millions de spectateurs, 20% de parts de marché à Paris, 550 évènements par an, 1 stores et 5 restaurants/cafés gérés par des partenaires externes.

Name: Anibrain
Description:
From death defying stunts, to CG creatures, to a space adventurer teaming up with mutants, to saving the universe, to creating period environments, Anibrain has given wings to the vision of the best filmmakers internationally.

With nearly a 100 films to our credits including The Fast and The Furious 7, Guardians of the Galaxy, The Mortal Instruments, Pompeii, Ghost Rider: Spirit of Vengeance and The Resident Evil Series, we are sought after by the best storytellers, filmmakers and facilities world over for our expertise, experience, talent and complete commitment to create stunning imagery for Films, TV, Apps and Mobiles.

Founded in 2006, today we are an award-winning visual effects and creative studio that is a leading destination for high-end global VFX in India. We are passionate about crafting your story through breathtaking visuals by blending cutting-edge technology and top of the line creativity. Dedication, excellence, communication and world class delivery are deeply etched in our DNA. Our State of the facility is a secure fortress that is Marvel and Disney certified. One of the toughest tests in the business.

Whether it be complex creature work such as full CGI tigers, crocodiles, snakes, or it be set extensions, particle effects and matte painting, roto, prep or matchmove, Anibrain provides high-end work on the biggest blockbusters in production through partnering with the best VFX facilities globally.

Contact us for more Details: +91 9168478637 +91 9168601436 & +91 9168653041

Name: National Film Board of Canada
Description: The NFB is Canada’s public producer of award-winning creative documentaries, auteur animation, interactive stories and participatory experiences. NFB producers are embedded in communities across the country, from St. John’s to Vancouver, working with talented creators on innovative and socially relevant projects. The NFB is a leader in gender equity in film and digital media production, and is working to strengthen Indigenous-led production, guided by the recommendations of Canada’s Truth and Reconciliation Commission. NFB productions have won over 7,000 awards, including 27 Canadian Screen Awards, 21 Webbys, 12 Oscars and more than 100 Genies. To access this award-winning content and discover the work of NFB creators you can visit the NFB website or download its apps for mobile devices.

Name: Motion Picture Association
Description:
We are the leading advocate of the film, television, and streaming industry around the world.

The MPA works in every corner of the globe to advance the creative industry, protect our members’ content across all screens, defend the creative and artistic freedoms of storytellers, and support innovative distribution models that bring an expansion of viewing choices to audiences around the world.

Our member studios are: Netflix Studios, LLC; Paramount Pictures Corporation; Prime Video and Amazon MGM Studios; Sony Pictures Entertainment Inc.; Universal City Studios LLC; Walt Disney Studios Motion Pictures; and Warner Bros. Entertainment Inc.

Name: Aiwan Entertainment 爱玩大业
Description:
International award winning AIWAN ENTERTAINMENT (AE)爱玩大业 is a cutting edge Beijing-based, China-wide and Hollywood connected global motion pictures entertainment company, well positioned within the Chinese film and live event industry. Ms.Ai Wan爱万 is the founder/ CEO . Mr.Steve Chicorel齐克-COO of AE. ,Mr.Zhao Xun赵寻 -VP in LiveEvents, Mr. Zhang Zhang张樟-VP in Motion Pictures. Import films&music -Mr.Sean Han 

When it comes to film development, production and distribution, our core team has more than 25 Feature film credits in the past and has won the Best documentary with the Humanitarian Award at H.K International Film Festival; official selected in competetion at prestiage Sundance Film Festival , Toronto , Cannes , Berlin and winning at Beijing Int'l Film Festivals etc.

For distribution, we have imported the China rights for Oscar winning film "HER". "The Invisible Guest"-achieved 25M USD at China Box office in 2017.(key management in contract negotiation, import quota, theatre scheduling)

Films In development: "California Sunshine","Dreamcatcher".“SCI Fi Co-Pro slate with Das Films. Pre sale China imports "The Medusa" starring Jesse Eisenberg, directing by Peter Webber. " The Matter of Honor " written by Jeffrey Archer,directing by Jon Cassar.

Our live events division is specializes in promotion, management, planning, sponsorships, marketing, sales and ticketing. Team’s credits : The David Copperfield Magic Show; concert promotions for Celine Dion ,Jose Carreras, Hanson, Faye Wang, Ricky Martin, Backstreet Boys, Rolling Stones, Eric Clapton, Beyonce, Avril Lavigne, Linkin Park, and sporting event shows for the China OpenTennis,F1 Racing…totaling more than 300 live events and stage Shows in China.

Name: Zoic Studios
Description:
"Visual Evolution" is our mission-to evolve the story, art, and technology of the moving image, and through this evolution, broaden the audience for moving images.

Partnership, integrity, and enthusiasm are the key founding principles at Zoic. Our projects are born in think tanks, where every idea has value and potential. Good ideas are fleshed out, and a plan for achieving a visual representation of the idea is set early in the creative process. During production we remain accountable to our word and, as changes occur, we change together. We believe that partnerships that remain intact finish with integrity. Most importantly, we love what we do.

Zoic is a company of accomplished artists and producers who understand story, process, and relationships. Our team has a proven record of success. They are masters in their fields of 3D, Compositing, and Production Management. Their reputations, in turn, attract additional talent and encourage a strong work ethic.

We have built a digital infrastructure, which is flexible and strong to support the staff. It is a "liquid" pipeline, designed by our team for rapid expansion and contraction. It is resolution- independent and changeable based on project needs. Leading visual technology firms provide additional support and insight to the latest methods. We work with these partners as we do with our creative partners: by promoting visual evolution as fast as technology allows.

What we do can seem complex and foreign--even incomprehensible. It is our intention to educate and encourage others to embrace this change and together create something new.

Name: Image Engine Design Inc.
Description: World-class visual effects for feature films and television since 1995. Based in Vancouver BC, Image Engine is a world-class visual effects studio led by a team of creative and passionate individuals who are committed to furthering the art of visual storytelling. We offer a full range of visual effects services from concept designs and pre-visualization to computer-generated animation, compositing, and explosive volumetric digital effects.

Name: NY VFXWAALA ( a division of Ajay Devgn Films )
Description:
NY VFXWAALA, a division of Ajay Devgn Films ,aims to set the standard for visual effects and is currently in the process of creating some of the most stunning images in the history of film .

We were born in the summer of '15, and started our journey with a multi-skilled team of people, delivering startling visuals leaving the audiences awestruck till date. We ‘The VFX people’ is fore fronted by Ajay Devgn collaborating with Naveen Paul ,carrying along a fruitful of 20+ years of experience in the field of Visual effects, summing up of 500+ feature films.

We are overwhelmed of winning numerous accolades including “National Film Award” . We are the only Indian visual effects studio to have won 32 prestigious awards in the first 7 years of inception,and being the only Indian Studio to have won “The Asian Award”.

Name: FutureWorks Media Limited
Description: Leading global content creators, studios and OTT’s rely on FutureWorks expert artists and technologists to deliver world class services. FutureWorks is a leader in end to end film production, from visual effects and picture-sound post production, to the supply of high precision cameras and lenses. With a dedicated team of over 300 talented artists, spread across multiple integrated facilities in India, FutureWorks is recognised as a trusted partner by platforms worldwide.

Name: American Film Market
Description:
The American Film Market will welcome the global industry back to Los Angeles  November 11 - 16, 2025.

AFM is the most efficient film acquisition, development and networking event in the world. Unlike a festival, AFM is a marketplace where production and distribution deals are closed. More than US$1 billion in deals are sealed every year — on both completed films and those in every stage of development and production.
 
Thousands of industry professionals from more than 80 countries converge at AFM every November. They include acquisition and development executives, agents, attorneys, directors, distributors, festival directors, financiers, film commissioners, producers, writers, the world’s press and all those who provide services to the motion picture industry.
 
At AFM, participants discover the entire global catalogue of available films and projects, attend world class conferences, and connect with the independent film community’s decision makers, all in one convenient location without the distraction of a film festival.
 
The American Film Market is comprised of:
 
The Market — Over 400 production/distribution/sales companies have offices where they meet with buyers. Many also meet with producers who are seeking representation or production partners.
 
Screenings — AFM screens more than 300 films — the majority world or U.S. premieres. 
 
LocationEXPO — Film Commissions, facilities and government agencies participate at LocationEXPO held inside the AFM.
 
The AFM Sessions — offer attendees knowledge, insight and a rare opportunity to hear from the industry’s global thought leaders, decision makers and experts. Conferences may include finance, production, distribution, television and pitching.

Name: Telefilm Canada
Description:
Téléfilm Canada est une société d’État vouée à la réussite de l’industrie audiovisuelle canadienne, qui favorise l’accès et l’excellence en offrant des programmes qui appuient la résonance culturelle et l’engagement du public. Téléfilm soutient les entreprises dynamiques et les talents créatifs au pays et dans le monde, en considérant toujours ses objectifs d’équité, d’inclusion et de durabilité. De plus, elle formule des recommandations auprès du ministère du Patrimoine canadien concernant la certification des coproductions audiovisuelles régies par des traités, et elle administre les programmes du Fonds des médias du Canada. Lancé en 2012, le Fonds des talents accepte des dons privés qui servent principalement à soutenir les talents émergents. Visiteztelefilm.caet suivez-nous surFacebook,surInstagramet surLetterboxd. 
-
Telefilm Canada is a Crown corporation dedicated to the success of Canada’s audiovisual industry, fostering access and excellence by delivering programs that support cultural resonance and audience engagement. With a lens of equity, inclusivity and sustainability, Telefilm bolsters dynamic companies and a range of creative talent at home and around the world. Telefilm also makes recommendations regarding the certification of audiovisual coproduction treaties to the Minister of Canadian Heritage, and administers the programs of the Canada Media Fund. Launched in 2012, the Talent Fund raises private donations which principally support emerging talent. Visit telefilm.caand follow us on Facebook, Instagramand Letterboxd.

Name: Wētā Workshop Ltd
Description:
Wētā Workshop brings imaginary worlds to life by delivering concept design, physical effects, collectibles, and immersive experiences to the world’s entertainment and creative industries. 

Established by Richard Taylor and Tania Rodger in 1987, we are best known for our work on films includingThe Lord of the Ringstrilogy,Avatar, andDune, and immersive visitor experiences such asGallipoli: The Scale of our War,Expo 2020 Dubai’s Mobility PavilionandWētā Workshop Unleashed. 

Based in Wellington, New Zealand, our ground-breaking work has been recognised with five Academy Awards, four BAFTA Awards, three Thea Awards and over 30 other national and international accolades.

Name: Rhythm & Hues
Description:
One of the world's leading producers of visual effects and animation for motion pictures, advertising and themed entertainment venues, Rhythm & Hues Studios is a dynamic creative resource with a vast array of technology and talent. 

Headquartered in Los Angeles, California, with additional facilities in India and Canada - R&H has produced animation and visual effects for more than 140 Hollywood feature films including "Life of Pi", "The Golden Compass" and "Babe," which all earned Academy Awards for Achievement in Visual Effects, (in 2013, 2008 and 1995 respectively). Hundreds of commercials and dozens of themed entertainment attractions have also been produced at the studio. 

R&H is the recipient of four Scientific and Technical Awards from the Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences (AMPAS). For a complete list of projects in production go to: www.rhythm.com  

Like us on Facebook:  on.fb.me/wMtI1l  
Twitter:  @RhythmAndHues
Instagram: @rhythmandhuesstudios
Facebook: www.facebook.com/RhythmAndHues/

Name: Filmin
Description:
Filmin es una marca registrada de Comunidad Filmin SL. 
La compañía se fundó en el año 2007, en Barcelona. Es una OTT que ofrece películas i series de televisión en TVOD y SVOD en España y Portugal. 

La misión de FILMIN es convertirse en la plataforma para los amantes de las películas y series, complementando los principales servicios generalistas con contenidos independientes, clásicos y otros de gran calidad.

En un mercado dominado por grandes plataformas generalistas que ofrecen contenidos masivos y relativamente homogéneos, surge la necesidad por una parte de los espectadores que buscan algo diferente, cine de calidad, moderno y clásico o series que los sorprendan. La necesidad de alguien que les haga recomendaciones y ofrezca una experiencia de usuario diferente. Un mercado en el que los nichos tienen un espacio importante que FILMIN puede cubrir.

La mayor diferencia de FILMIN radica en el hecho de que nuestra empresa fue creada y es administrada por profesionales de la industria del cine. Los valores se resumen en el amor por el cine y el respeto por los creadores y los espectadores.

Name: City of Madrid Film Office / Ciudad de Madrid Film Office
Description:
Located in the Casa de la Panadería in the Plaza Mayor in the centre of the city, the City of Madrid Film Office is a public service of the City Council that has been set up to promote the city as a destination for film shoots and to provide advice for any company or professional in the audiovisual sector interested in working there.

The City of Madrid Film Office works to promote audiovisual production in Madrid by actively promoting the possibilities its different spaces offer, the strength of its industry and the experience of its professionals. Supporting and fostering the audiovisual sector, the rest of the city's creative industries and the wide variety of services that derive from them, the City of Madrid Film Office seeks to boost the economic development and international image of Madrid, thus enhancing the attractiveness of the city for its inhabitants, workers and visitors.

The City of Madrid Film Office offers the following services:
- Assistance in the search for filming locations.
- Guidance and support in how to process filming permits.
- Mediation with the different public administrations.
- Information on companies and professionals in the audiovisual sector.
- Advice on production and post-production logistics.

Name: Unifrance
Description:
Founded in 1949 and strengthened thanks to its merger with TV France International in 2021, Unifrance is the organisation responsible for promoting French cinema and TV content worldwide.

Located in Paris, Unifrance employs over 50 staff members, as well as representatives based in the U.S., in China and in Japan. The organisation currently brings together more than 1,000 French cinema and TV content professionals (producers, filmmaking talents, agents, sales companies, etc.) working together to promote French films and TV programmes among foreign audiences, industry executives and media.
 
Unifrance is supported by the French government, the CNC, the PROCIREP and by many public and private partners.

Name: Rocket Science VFX
Description:
Established in 2003, Rocket Science is an Emmy nominated boutique visual effects studio collaborating with filmmakers to create stunning visual imagery utilizing artistry, science and technology. Located in Toronto, Canada, television credits include Tim Burton’s celebrated WEDNESDAY (Netflix), Eric Kripke’s superhero series THE BOYS (Amazon), Rian Johnson’s POKER FACE (Peacock), and the global hit sensation from Mike Flanagan, THE FALL OF THE HOUSE OF USHER (Netflix). Feature titles include David Cronenberg’s Canadian Screen Award Winner, CRIMES OF THE FUTURE, Jeremy Garelick’s MURDER MYSTERY 2 (Netflix), Marvel alum, Anna Boden and Ryan Fleck’s FREAKY TALES (Lionsgate) and the upcoming Dustin Hoffman starring, TUNER.

Visit us @ rsvfx.com

Name: Fandango S.p.A.
Description:
FANDANGO NASCE NEL 1989

La Fandango è un progetto culturale, una casa di produzione e distribuzione cinematografica e televisiva, una casa editrice, un’etichetta musicale, una factory di talenti. Un modo di vedere e raccontare la realtà.

Fandango si pronuncia allo stesso modo in tutto il mondo.

Domenico Procacci si ispirò alla poetica del celebre film di Kevin Reynolds, Fandango, per dare il nome alla casa di produzione cinematografica.

Fandango è il simbolo fatto parola di un sogno e un’ambizione: allargare gli orizzonti dalla produzione italiana a quella internazionale.

Name: Locarno Film Festival
Description: Throughout its 80 year history, the Locarno Film Festival has occupied a unique position in the landscape of the major film festivals. Every August, around 165,000 cinema-goers, 1,000 journalists, and 3,000 professionals converge on the small Swiss-Italian town of Locarno, right in the heart of Europe.

Name: Skywalker Sound
Description:
The pulsating hum of a lightsaber. The thunderous footsteps of a stalking Tyrannosaurus Rex. The awesome roar of Star-Lord’s Milano. For more than a generation, Skywalker Sound has created soundscapes that have redefined aural immersion.

With origins based in Ben Burtt’s landmark work on 1977’s Star Wars, Skywalker Sound specializes in sound design, mixing, and audio post-production across multiple mediums. From the gathering of real-life, organic sounds to developing new techniques in sound presentation, Skywalker Sound remains one of the world’s most innovative facilities — eager to explore, create, and venture into the unknown.

Name: SDFX Studios
Description:
Welcome to SDFX Studios where our global team of world-class creative supervisors, artists, and production staff are constantly at your fingertips. We strive to provide our clients with unparalleled customer service, dynamic solutions to your visual effects needs, and transparent and timely communication.

We are a creative studio and here to work with filmmakers and content creators to produce state-of-the-art visual effects to satisfy your needs. Whether you're looking for an outsource partner for prep work or a vendor who can take on feature volume 2D and CG work, we can be that home for you. And yes, we still do stereo conversions!

Our mission is to continue producing award-winning visual effects for our amazing creative content partners.

Name: Mac Guff
Description:
Mac Guff is one of the main digital visual effects design studios in Europe. Its activity spans the film industry, advertising, television programs and music videos
Its ambition is not only to push the limits of animation and photorealism, but also to inject a narrative as well as artistic values into these new fields, that will “bring magic” to the singular vision of a director, and then to the public.

Mac Guff’s mastery and development of “proprietary” software tools in constant communication with graphic artists make it possible to meet and structure the most demanding and innovative of visual requirements. And sometimes, to initiate them.

The creative approach lies at the heart of all of our projects: Each film requires a concept, an idea or a story to be developed and transcribed into concrete imagery, be it subtle or oneiric. And each time, this birth requires the combination of an artistic intention and its technical and logical dimension.

Our tools and know-how are there to empower the imagination and maintain a constant energy, a creative potential that enable the desire for innovation to express itself and create novel visual experiences today

Name: Film4 Productions
Description:
Film4 is Channel 4 Television’s feature film division, dedicated to championing bold, distinctive storytelling.

We develop and co-finance a diverse slate of films, collaborating with both breakthrough voices and established visionaries in UK and international cinema. For over four decades, our productions have pushed creative boundaries, shaped cultural conversations, and connected audiences worldwide.

Name: Constantin Film
Description:
Constantin Film ist das mit Abstand erfolgreichste unabhängige Produktions- und Verleihunternehmen in der deutschen Medienlandschaft.

Impressum: https://constantin-film.de/impressum
Datenschutz: https://constantin-film.de/datenschutz

Name: Home Harmony Tech
Description:
Home Harmony Tech — bringing smart solutions and convenience to every corner of your home! 
From automated lighting and climate control to smart appliances, technology makes life easier, efficient, and comfortable. 
Experience the perfect blend of innovation and daily living, where every device works in harmony.

Name: SUPAMONKS
Description:
SUPAMONKS is a French creative studio : we produce fun !

We specialise in 2D/3D Animation for various formats (commercials, games trailers, TV series, feature films...), as well as Art & Game development services ! 

Facebook : www.facebook.com/supamonks
Vimeo : https://vimeo.com/supamonks/
Twitter : https://twitter.com/SUPAMONKSSTUDIO
Youtube : https://www.youtube.com/user/theSupamonks

-- 

We're also proud of our SupaResidence program. 
It allows motivated people with a personal project to produce and direct their film in a professional setting, free of charge.
http://www.supamonks.com/supa-residence/

Name: CGV* Cinemas
Description:
CJ CGV Indonesia formerly known as Blitzmegaplex (2006)/CGV Cinemas (2017) is a leading nationwide cinema chain with 68 locations and 395 screens all over Indonesia. CJ CGV Indonesia is proud to be a member of CJ CGV, the top 5 biggest cinema chain in the world.

Having financial support from big investors, CJ CGV Indonesia aims to double its locations and add variety of services. Our tagline: "Evolving beyond movies, global No.1 Cultureplex" means CJ CGV Indonesia is going to be more than just a movie viewing place, but also a place where people can have a communal social-cultural experience.

CJ CGV Indonesia provides wide range of movie selection from international and local production houses, independent movie makers and anime studios. customers will experience these movies from our latest high quality audiovisual technology including IMAX, STARIUM, 4DX and Dolby Atmos. We also provide distinct F&B experience to our customers.

The company continually to innovate to increase its competitiveness and positioning. In 2019 we gain three awards from Indonesia World Records Museum for the record such as “The Most Cinema’s Screens”, “Cinema with the Most Seating Capacity”, “Biggest Cinema Building” and other enormous achievements.

We are hiring talented individuals to join us. Kindly contact our recruiters or find our career page on job portals for more information about available positions.

Name: Electric Theatre Collective
Description:
Electric Theatre Collective is a multi-award-winning, world-renowned visual effects, colour grading and creative studio.

We’re home to some of the industry’s most formidable artists, and collaborators of legendary directors, agencies and brands worldwide.

Our passion for craft has seen us bring ambitious projects to life across film, commercials and music videos. And, we don’t like to brag, but… we’re pretty good at it. We’re proud claimants of numerous accolades, recently adding an elusive D&AD black pencil, two VES honours, and several ‘VFX Company of the Year’ awards to our collection.

Electric is widely regarded as one of the best post-production outfits in the world, and continues to be at the forefront of innovative creativity.

E: info@electrictheatre.tv
T: 020 7636 5317

Name: Cineworld Cinemas Ltd
Description:
As part of the Regal Cineworld Group, the second-largest cinema operator in the world, we're driven by a passion for innovation, bringing you the latest in cutting-edge cinema technology to create unforgettable experiences for stars of all ages.

Our customers are at the heart of everything we do, and our people are our greatest strength. Their dedication makes every moment special, from the warm welcome at the door, to the freshly popped popcorn served with a sprinkle of joy.

Every cinema, screen, and seat is a gateway to the extraordinary—powered by our people. At Cineworld, we share joy through extraordinary experiences. Come, join us, and experience more. 

Feel more at Cineworld.

--
WE CREATE
We are passionate about creating magical experiences that open up a world of more for our customers. From the family taking their child on their first cinematic adventure, to the Unlimited member who calls Cineworld their second home. 

WE PERFORM
At Cineworld, we offer our customers a choice in how they experience films, with a range of cutting-edge formats that transform your cinema experience. From the breathtaking clarity in our state-of-the-art IMAX auditoriums, to extreme cinema 4DX with motion seats and multisensory effects like wind, water, fog, lightening, bubbles and snow, to our 270 degrees immersive experience ScreenX, and our huge Superscreen with Dolby Atmos that turn every movie into a masterpiece.

WE INSPIRE
Cineworld is proudly partnered with four charities across the UK, each dedicated to improving the lives of those who need it most. To date, we have raised millions of pounds, made possible by the boundless generosity of our community and the unwavering commitment of our cinema teams. We approach everything we do with empathy and care, and we are committed to creating a diverse and accessible environment for all.

Name: Cattleya Srl
Description:
Headed by Riccardo Tozzi, Giovanni Stabilini and Francesca Longardi, Cattleya for over twenty years has proved to be one of the most successful production companies in the Italian audiovisual industry.
Creative factors such as collaboration with major talents and production partners in Italy and abroad, experimentation, and diversification of genres have always distinguished Cattleya's output, winning it recognition as one of the most outstanding leaders in the Europewide industry. 
The company produced more than 70 films and numerous tv series, including Romanzo Criminale and Gomorrah which are considered among forerunners of a new narrative style and have earned cult status.
Cattleya is part of the ITV group, the largest production and distribution company in the United Kingdom.

Name: BIG KAHUNA FILMS
Description:
BIG KAHUNA FILMS, launched in 2007, is today one of the leading and most reputable commercial production houses working both regionally and internationally.

The offices are located in Dubai and Beirut, each being run by a full-time production and post-production team. Whilst the two offices complement each other, they both work independently, catering to different markets, depending on the nature of the projects and what each country has to offer. An important pillar and a pioneer in the production industry, BKF has played a major part in developing and nurturing talents across the region. 

Over the years, BKF produced many memorable campaigns and received numerous awards with the most prominent ones being: Production House of the Year 2019, Dubai Lynx Golden Palm award, Best Production House and Executive Producer in the 2019 B&W Report. BFK has also ranked 3rd best production house and 2nd best producer in Middle East & Africa at the Loeries awards in 2015 and 2nd Best Production House at the Dubai Lynx Festival in 2014.

Name: Filmax
Description:
En Filmax creemos que la industria del cine es de valientes. Desde los primeros cineastas que cruzaban los continentes para llegar a Hollywood hasta hoy, cuando hacer cine es más difícil que nunca. Valientes todos los que forman parte de una película y se exponen continuamente a los ojos de los demás.

Y en Filmax lo sabemos porque llevamos más de 60 años en el mundo cinematográfico. Apostamos por el cine en España cuando pocos lo hacían y hoy Filmax es una de las principales empresas audiovisuales españolas. Con sede en Barcelona, la compañía se organiza en cuatro grandes áreas – producción, ventas internacionales, distribución y exhibición –, lo que la convierte en el único estudio independiente de cine y televisión en el país. 

Desde su fundación en 1953, la compañía ha producido casi 100 largometrajes. Películas premiadas, aclamadas y proyectadas internacionalmente como 'El maquinista', 'El perfume', la saga de terror '[REC]', 'Transsiberian', 'The Way' y 'Mientras Duermes'. Recientemente ha llevado a la gran pantalla sus producciones '100 metros', 'Musa' y 'No Matarás'.

En el campo televisivo, Filmax ha producido las series 'Polseres vermelles', primera serie española Ganadora del Emmy Kids, 'Cites', 'Sé quién eres' y la más reciente,'Benvinguts a la familia', todas ellas de Pau Freixas. 

La empresa destaca también por ser una de las compañías que más ha invertido en producción de animación, ganadora de 5 premios Goya a la Mejor Película de Animación. 'Copito de Nieve','Nocturna', 'El Cid: la leyenda', 'Pérez, el ratoncito de tus sueños' y 'La Gallina Turuleca' son algunas de las películas producidas por Filmax.

Más allá de su experiencia como productora, Filmax cuenta con una amplia trayectoria como distribuidora de películas nacionales e internacionales. Algunos títulos de gran éxito de público y crítica son las ganadoras de 8 Oscar, 'Slumdog Millionaire', y 4 Oscar, 'Million Dollar Baby', 'La mejor oferta', 'Truman' y 'Loving Pablo'.

Name: STUDIOCANAL UK
Description:
Established in May 1999, STUDIOCANAL theatrical UK has established a reputation for an innovative approach to distribution. A passion for film and commitment to creativity is central to STUDIOCANAL's activity in the UK market together with the desire to work collaboratively with our filmmakers to achieve the best possible results.

STUDIOCANAL is a subsidiary of the CANAL+ Group. It is one of Europe’s leading companies in the market for co-production, acquisition, distribution and sale of international feature films. STUDIOCANAL is the only studio operating simultaneously in three main territories across Europe: France, the United Kingdom and Germany. The company distributes a total of more than 50 films a year throughout Europe. Additionally, STUDIOCANAL owns one of the most important libraries in the world, with more than 5,000 international titles.

Name: Famous Studios
Description:
A dream is all it takes to go the distance. The story of Famous Studios, standing tall as a landmark of Mumbai’s dream industry was born from a similar dream.

Set up in 1946, in pre-Independence India, it was a bold foray into the world of Indian cinema and television. Over the years, it evolved into a canvas for hundreds of artists for creating masterpieces with state-of-the-art equipment and expert technicians: a turnkey content solutions provider for anything that a business or film needs. Today the studios have spread into a sprawling 110,000 sq ft, to several locations across Mumbai to boost flexibility, and also to the hearts of industry folk. 

Famous Studios has been honoured with Dadasaheb Phalke and the Indian Motion Picture Association’s recognition for its outstanding contribution to Indian Cinema, in addition to dozens of other accolades and awards. Yet our greatest reward remains the joy and fulfilment of those who weave a million dreams every day.

Our Services:

1) Creative 
2) Pre-Production 
3) Production and specialised production 
4) Audio and Video Post Production 
5) Visual Effects and CGI
6) Equipment and Studio rentals

Our Areas of Work:

1) TV Commercials
2) Feature Films
3) Web Series
4) Digital Content

Our Clients: 

1) Advertising Agencies
2) Film Studios
3) Production Houses
4) Broadcasters
5) Music publishing houses/Record Labels

Name: MELS
Description:
Basé à quelques minutes du centre-ville de Montréal, le campus de MELS, qui a été conçu spécifiquement pour la production cinématographique, comprend 20 studios insonorisés de superficie variant de 10 000 à 37 000 pieds carrés, totalisant plus de 225 000 pieds carrés.  L'entreprise offre également de la location d'équipement sur place, comprenant des caméras Panavision, de l'éclairage, divers matériel spécialisé et un plateau de production virtuelle permanent comprenant un mur LED de 20 pieds de hauteur par 65 pieds de diamètre (95 pieds linéair), des services de postproduction son et image, des mobiles de production ainsi que des services de distribution et de diffusion cinématographique, télévisuelle, Web et sur appareils intelligents. MELS fait partie de Québecor Inc., un leader canadien dans le domaine des télécommunications, des médias et du divertissement.

***

Minutes from downtown Montreal, the MELS campus was designed specifically for film production. It comprises 20 soundproof studios ranging from 10 000 to 37 000 square feet in size, for a total of 225 000 square feet.  MELS also offers on-site rentals of Panavision cameras, lighting, various speciialized equipment and a permanent virtual production stage comprising an LED wall 20 feet high by 65 feet in diameter (95 linear feet), sound and image postproduction services, production trucks and trailers, and services for distribution and broadcasting on film, television, the web and smart devices.  MELS is part of Quebecor Inc., a Canadian leader in telecommunications, media and entertainment.

Name: Digital Frontier Inc.
Description:
Digital Frontier: Crafting Unforgettable Visuals for Global Storytelling

Digital Frontier Inc. is a premier Japanese CG and VFX studio with a legacy spanning over two decades. We specialize in delivering high-end CG animation and breathtaking visual effects for feature films, episodic series, and video games.

Our robust production capabilities are significantly bolstered by OPAKIS, one of Asia's largest and most advanced motion capture studios in Tokyo. This state-of-the-art facility enables us to provide seamless, end-to-end animation solutions and handle large-scale productions with exceptional efficiency and quality. We are committed to uncompromising artistic excellence, transforming complex concepts into stunning realities for globally recognized productions.

We excel in adapting our artistry and technical expertise to any visual style and aesthetic, from hyper-realistic live-action VFX to nuanced, stylized animation. Our extensive experience includes significant contributions to blockbuster Netflix Original Series like Alice in Borderland Season 2, Yu Yu Hakusho, and the film City Hunter, demonstrating our prowess in creating immersive live-action worlds. Furthermore, our long-standing collaboration on the CG animation for Mamoru Hosoda's acclaimed films, such as BELLE, The Boy and The Beast, and Summer Wars, showcases our unique ability to craft captivating and diverse visual narratives.

In the gaming sector, we are known for our dynamic contributions to major titles, including cinematics for the Like a Dragon (龍が如く) and Tekken series, alongside impactful character reveal movies for Super Smash Bros. (大乱闘スマッシュブラザーズ), bringing beloved characters to life with unparalleled detail and action.

Group Company:
Digital Frontier Taiwan Inc.

Name: Star Media
Description: Film production

Name: Mago Production
Description:
Meet Mago Production, your animation and storytelling powerhouse in Barcelona. For over 20 years, we’ve been creating captivating animated series, documentaries, and films, driven by our passion for multiculturalism, creativity, and originality. Our creative journey doesn’t stop in Barcelona. With teams in Perpignan, Düsseldorf, Mexico City, and Tokyo, we bring global perspectives to our work, crafting experiences that connect across cultures.

At the heart of what we do, we advocate for equality, striving to dismantle the barriers of discrimination across gender, ethnicity, and sexual orientation. Our commitment is not just to create, but to cultivate a world where rights are not just equal but celebrated.

We are so happy with what we do that we’d love to do it for your project. We specialize in providing exceptional and creative 2D and 3D animation services, ensuring outstanding visual results for our clients. Additionally, we boast a sound recording booth for high-quality dubbing and sound design. We also offer equipment rental, including a wide range of options such as inflatable screens, generators, and technical gear, ensuring a comprehensive and satisfactory experience for our clients on every project.

Got a fresh idea or a unique story? We’re eager to collaborate with new talents. Join us at Mago Production and let’s create something extraordinary together!

Name: Under The Milky Way
Description:
Under The Milky Way is one of the leading international digital film distributor.  

Under The Milky Way works with an important number of VoD Platforms and was awarded the global Apple preferred aggregator status in 2011.  Fully operational on more than 100 territories, it serves all kinds of rights-holders (producers, distributors, sales agents) out of 13 regional offices in Europe, North America and Asia.

Under The Milky Way’s main activities consist of online film distribution and marketing, the development of software solutions, and provides one of the leading "library intelligence" service to optimise back-catalogue revenues across all kinds of VoD platforms and models.

Name: Galalite Projection Screens
Description:
Galalite, the flagship brand of GTC industries which manufactures the widest range of innovative Projection Screen surfaces, ensures better movie viewing experiences with the assurance of high performance efficiency, absolute value-for-money and time bound delivery.

A family owned business since inception in 1959, and head-quartered in Mumbai, the Commercial Capital and Heartland of the Movie Industry in India, Galalite has emerged as one of the largest suppliers of screens to Exhibitors worldwide.

Galalite’s specialized screen surfaces range from Gain Screens for digital compliant cinema systems to the latest 3D technology Silver Screens, from large format screens for Cinema Theatres / Large Events to Home Theatre Screens. We also manufacture custom screens to suit specific requirements. Our screen surfaces follow exacting standards laid down by BSI and SMPTE. And our service culture is one of the best in the industry.

Galalite has been supplying projection screens to major digital cinema service providers around the world who are well aware of the latest global trends and expect consistent performance, by constantly enhancing technology and reach, and catering to the increasing demand for high grade digital cinema experience.

Come, see the difference!

Name: LOQO AI
Description:
We’re an AI content company built by a team of AI data scientists and researchers from IIT Madras and driven by astute creative talent.

Using our proprietary Cinematography AI, we deliver long format shows within days - from ideation to final video output — perfect for daily, weekly, and festival-based programming on Digital, OTT & TV platforms.

We’re already producing 30+ mins of content daily across 10+ shows and 7+ languages, crafting both in-house and on-demand series for partners.

Name: Buggin Media
Description:
Buggin Media's two core areas:

1) Creativity Services
- Film Making
- Script Writing 
- 360º Storytelling (video and audio ambisonics facilities)
- Stop motion, 2D and 3D animation
- Sound Design (stereo, 5.1 and ambisonic)

2) Localization Services
- Dubbing (various languages)
- Voice Over (various languages)
- Translation and Subtitling (various languages)
- Access (audio description & sign language)

Buggin Media has its own studios and in-house team!

Name: Inter Medya
Description: Inter Medya is an international powerhouse based in Istanbul, backed by 33 years of experience and committed to transforming the Turkish TV industry landscape through the distribution of over 15,000 hours of high-quality content to more than 160 countries. Collaborating closely with Turkey's leading producers, we offer a diverse array of TV series, mini-series, feature films, and unscripted formats that captivate audiences worldwide. Our dynamic team stays ahead of industry trends while innovating new ones, continually enhancing our offerings and expanding our global reach. Each year, Inter Medya actively participates in numerous industry gatherings, reflecting our commitment to networking and diversifying our extensive catalog. Beyond distribution, we have evolved into formidable business developers and problem solvers. Guided by strong ethical values, we strive to deliver exceptional service to our partners. As we enhance the position of Turkish content on the global stage, we remain dedicated to expanding our footprint and growing our team, ensuring we lead the way in the entertainment industry and shape the future of storytelling.

Name: ALIBI Music
Description:
ALIBI's exclusive music and sound design catalog, which is produced by our internal team with a roster of over 400 composers and artists in 21 countries, can be heard on every major film marketing campaign in the last decade, thousands of commercials, thousands of promos, countless scripted and unscripted television shows, video games and video game trailers, and more.

ALIBI has worked with every major film studio, television network, streaming service, and advertising agency in the US and many throughout the world.

In addition to working with household name productions, ALIBI offers pricing for independent content creators, small business, and custom solutions for projects of any size and scope.

Name: Paradise City Sales
Description: Memento Films International is a select sales company that tracks and represents high-profile, director driven independent films. We commit to only 8 projects a year and offer tailor–made synergies and business expertise through production, financing and International Sales. We have recently worked with renowned and award-winning filmmakers such as Asghar Farhadi, Laurent Cantet, Jim Mickle, Cate Shortland, Nuri Bilge Ceylan, Kelly Reichardt, Jia Zhang-ke, Ramin Bahrani, Gilles Marchand, Julie Bertuccelli, Aditya Assarat, Pawel Pawlikowski and Olivier Assayas. Memento's dynamic team is devoted to promoting the projects with a maximum level of commitment, rather than merely selling. Whether it is high-end arthouse fare with a medium-sized budget or cutting-edge low-budget projects from emerging talents, we value originality, whether in more traditional narrative forms or from the cinematographic vision of the director.

Name: EFD Studios ES
Description:
Empresa prestadora de servicio a la industria audiovisual, fundada en 1999 por la productora Georgina Terán Gilmore, actual CEO y Presidenta, se ha consolidado como la empresa de renta de equipos más grande de Latinoamérica y se coloca entre las 10 más grandes del mundo. 

Somos una One Stop Shop, un espacio en donde cámara, iluminación, grip y platós convergen de manera integral.  

Con más de 20 años de experiencia. Estamos llegando a España para contribuir a la evolución del sector audiovisual.
Location: Pozuelo de Alarcón, Community of Madrid

Name: Zola Filmes
Description:
Zola Filmes is an independent Brazilian film production company that combines storytelling excellence with high production value. Each project is crafted with meticulous attention to detail, resulting in compelling narratives that engage audiences.

Since its founding in 2012, Zola Filmes has distinguished itself within the Latin American film industry with notable productions. Among them are three seasons of "Good Morning, Verônica" (Netflix), which ranked in the top 3 global non-English language series on Netflix across all seasons. The series also won the APCA Award for Best Drama (2020) and the Brazilian Cinema Grand Prix for Best Fiction Series (2021). Other acclaimed productions include "Mandrake" (HBO), twice nominated for the International Emmy Award for Best Drama Series, "Valentins" (Gloob), "Lúcia McCartney" (GNT), "Espinosa" (GNT), and the feature film "Heleno", which premiered at the Toronto International Film Festival.

Name: SIRAP
Description:
SIRAP is an agile content led creative production studio working closely with a global portfolio of clients to develop fully integrated content-first campaigns.

We strive to create visual experiences that change how people think, feel, act and talk about brands, through the power of film and visual content.

Our full-service approach to content creation extends from creative direction, scripting, pre-production, film direction, cinematography, sound and post-production.

We drive our productions from ideation through to final delivery with our full-time team of Producers, Directors, Cinematographers and Editors - but we’re agile enough to know how to harness the power of a one-man band where required.

Our vision is to create content that triggers new perspectives and emotional embrace; locally and the world over.

SIRAP was founded in 2013 by Paris Thomson. With a background in the creative and media industries, Paris and her team injects experience from the journalism, television production and filmmaking worlds into the SIRAP aether.

Our philosophy is to distill our ideas into moving images that have a substantial, meaningful impact on the world and its audience.

In 2021 SIRAP won the B&T 'Best of the Best' Award in the Film Director category and the Australian Marketing Institute Award in the Creativity in Brand, Product or Service Marketing category.

Name: A Contraluz Films
Description:
A Contraluz Films is an audiovisual production company focused on feature films and unit documentaries, and based in Barcelona (Spain). Its main filmography includes:

"LA ESTRELLA", a feature film completed in September 2012, not yet released. Directed by Alberto Aranda, starring Ingrid Rubio, Carmen Machi, Marc Clotet and Fele Martínez, it has been produced by A Contraluz Films.

"THE SARK CASE", a feature-length documentary not yet released. Directed by Gonzalo Escuder, it has been produced by A Contraluz Films.

"CARMO Hit The Road", a Spain-Brazil feature film that premiered at Sundance IFF 09 and won the Audience Award to Best Brazilian Film at Sao Paulo IFF 09. Directed and written by Murilo Pasta, starring Fele Martínez, Mariana Loureiro, Seu Jorge, Marcio Garcia and Paca Gabaldón. Coproduced by A Contraluz Films with Magia Filmes Produçoes and Gremi Film Production.

"SAVAGE GRACE", a USA-Spain-France feature film that premiered at Cannes IFF 07 Quinzaine des Realisateurs and Sundance IFF 08 Premieres and was nominee to Best Script in the Independent Spirit Awards. Directed by Tom Kalin, written by Howard A. Rodman, starring Julianne Moore, Stephen Dillane, Eddie Redmayne, Elena Anaya, Unax Ugalde and Belén Rueda.

"NO MOSQUE!", a short documentary that won 6 Best Documentary Awards, including the Migrations Award to Best Documentary by Junta de Andalucía. Directed and written by Alberto Aranda and Guillermo Cruz.

Name: Institute of creative excellence
Description:
ICE aim of providing world-class quality education to the aspirants for the entire gamut of Media & Entertainment industry-related courses, covering all major specializations like Acting, Modeling, Cinematography, Direction, Editing, Production, Scriptwriting, Sound, and VFX.

Courses available in:

Mumbai | Delhi | Noida | Lucknow | Chandigarh | Kolkata | Ahmedabad | Patna | Jaipur

Website : www.theiceinstitute.com
Facebook : https://www.facebook.com/theiceinstitute/
Youtube : https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCedEHJ-ViJ4-t1vC5kzFpKQ
Twitter : https://twitter.com/ice_balaji
Linkedin : https://www.linkedin.com/in/ice-balaji-institute-of-creative-excellence-7b59b714a/
Pinterest : https://in.pinterest.com/paritosh2590/pins/

Name: Ethics Filmservice
Description: Wij zijn ervan overtuigd dat je middels het bekijken en bespreken van goede documentairefilms meer inzicht kunt krijgen in maatschappelijke en ethische vraagstukken. Dat het bijdraagt aan je ontwikkeling op professioneel en persoonlijk vlak. We bieden een kritische selectie van films en ondersteunend materiaal voor training en deskundigheidsbevordering. Bovendien is het mogelijk om via ons platform online besprekingen te faciliteren in een eigen omgeving. Zelfs de filmmakers kun je hierin betrekken. We zijn een sociale onderneming op het snijvlak van cultuur, maatschappij en educatie.

Name: Muse Storytelling
Description:
Noise is up, trust is down, and attention is dwindling. Remarkable storytelling is the way to break through. 

We are experts in the science of storytelling. No, really. We study concepts like Narrative Transportation and have been published in academic journals. 

We've taken our decade plus of in the field filmmaking experience for some of the worlds most legendary brands and paired that with a deep understanding of the academic literature. 

Think Aristotle plus Joseph Campbell, toss in a little Freytag, then make it all a heck of a lot more approachable for a filmmaker who needs insights that work now and can be remembered later. 

We care more, craft with intention, and try to spread our relentless love of story.

Name: Light N Light
Description:
Light N Light is the invention of Nasir Hussain Shaikh who spent years on set as a gaffer and realized that filmmakers required technical equipment support in order to bring their vision to life.

Since its inception in the early 2000s, the company has grown into a remarkable trademark brand with a global reach—all thanks to our directors’ leadership, dedicated team, and splendid partners.

Our company boasts inventories of the best media equipment sourced directly from manufacturers across the globe. From lights and cameras to grips, Light N Light has a diverse range of cinematic gear that cinematographers may find indispensable. In addition to that, our trusted gaffers and crew members are always available to assist cinematographers and their teams.  

Headquartered in the home of Bollywood—Mumbai, we’ve also set foot in other Indian cities like New Delhi, Hyderabad, Kolkata, and Lucknow with an international presence in the UAE, London, and Mauritius.

Teamwork is one of our core values as we believe that our employees don’t work for us, they work with us. Our motto ‘Unparalleled Service’ goes beyond just providing excellent customer service, we diligently work towards establishing quality connections with filmmakers, production agencies, and crew members we come across. 

We also follow the same protocol to foster connections with our employees wherein we root for their success and support them to unleash their creative potential. Frequent workshops, tea breaks, and a solid camaraderie are the norms here. 

Light N Light is always open to collaborating with creative professionals in the film and media space. So, if you’re looking for a top-notch cine equipment rental service that will stick with you through the ever-changing media landscape, you can find us at https://lightnlight.com/.

Name: ACHT
Description:
ACHT was founded by Ralf Drechsler, Ralf and Frank Ott in 2003.
In those 10 years ACHT developed from a small boutique shop to a multi-service, multi-skill facility.

We create high-end digital visual effects and computer animation for the advertising, television, exhibition and feature film industry with emphasis on creatively and technically high quality output.

Though we invest regularly and substantially in infrastructure and software, we think our biggest assets are our own talents and the talents we have the pleasure to cooperate with.
Eventually it is the clients ideas that inspire us and lets us create new imagery with every job.

IMPRINT

ACHT FRANKFURT GmbH

Name: PAYANA arte y producción audiovisual
Description:
Guión (Guionistas, Correctores).

Producción (Jefe de Producción, Asistente de Producción, Productores).
