Gráfica en comunicación visual y audiovisual.

Fotografía artística y publicitaria.

Sonido (Director de sonido, Ayudante de Sonido).

Edición (Compaginador).

Name: PLS VFX
Description:
Established in 1976, PLS VFX is one the most respected visual effects (VFX) companies, known for its pioneering role in the industry. With over 40 years of experience, PLS has consistently pushed the boundaries of creativity and technology, making it a trusted partner for some of the biggest names in film and television.

PLS VFX prides itself on its artist-led approach, where creativity is paramount. Under the leadership of VFX Supervisor Kent Houston and Head of Production Andrew Brassington, PLS offers a comprehensive suite of VFX services. These range from initial concept design to on-set supervision and final shot execution, ensuring that every project not only meets but exceeds the creative vision of their clients.

With a legacy that combines technical expertise and artistic excellence, PLS continues to be at the forefront of the VFX industry, shaping the future of visual effects with every frame they create.

Name: Mac Guff Belgium
Description:
Post-production cinéma / documentaires / publicité
Compositing / 3D / tracking / modeling / renderfarm

Name: Head Hunters Casting
Description: Casting for Film, TV Commercials TV Series, Internet, Theatre, Special Events and Music.  Looking for real people with no experience or experience, Actors non union and union to stand by for future opportunities to audition for these genres. Always need submissions of interesting character looks and specialties whether you’re a real welder, nurse, doctor, buskers, gymnasts. Basketball players, sports, pro or not, scuba divers to dog sled people, snake handlers, dog and cat people, Martial arts, musician, singers, dancers from tap to exotic. Bad boy bad girl looks, people who drive transports, racecars, motocross, ATV’s skateboarders to roller bladders, Motorcycle riders with their own bikes or choppers of all sort. Cowboys that can ride horses. People all shapes big and tall .and all shape.  Military and police experience. Bad ass looks from mob types to priestly looks.  If you have tattoos, piercings, colored hair or vampire teeth  All different races religions from East India down to the Australian aboriginals. Special needs people. If you’re missing a limb or using a wheel chair we’ll file you until we need you.  If you have a look or a specialty we need to know so we can find you and audition you.  Moneys made can be as little at $200.00 to booking a US national that could buy you a new home with.  All submissions are welcome.

Name: CineBistro
Description:
Prepare to be pampered at the most luxurious in-theatre dining experience. All designed to ensure your visit to CinéBistro is the ultimate in comfort and enjoyment. Every CinéBistro is unique, but luxury is standard.
Come see why CinéBistro is the ultimate dinner and a movie experience. Bringing the best of both worlds together in one luxurious package…all delivered right to your seat. Created in 2007, by Cobb Theatres.

Name: Oscilloscope Laboratories
Description: OSCILLOSCOPE PICTURES is an NYC-based feature film distribution company. We distribute unique, independently produced films in theaters, on TV, DVD, internationally, and via osmosis. We are currently building a time machine.

Name: Move Summit
Description:
Move Summit is Scotland’s animation gathering. Our conference in Edinburgh brings together creatives from film, television, advertising, games, and visual arts to celebrate the joy of making things move. 

This flagship event showcases the best work from throughout the industry, and offers a place for industry leaders, support agencies, practitioners, educators and students to gather and get inspired.

Name: AQPM
Description: L'AQPM est l'Association québécoise de la production médiatique (était l'APFTQ) et elle regroupe la majorité des entreprises québécoises de production indépendante en audiovisuel. L'AQPM les représente auprès des gouvernements et des intervenants de l'industrie culturelle. De plus, l'AQPM a le mandat de négocier des ententes collectives avec les différents syndicats qui représentent des artistes, techniciens ou artisans de l'industrie.

Name: London ACM SIGGRAPH
Description:
INFORM, SUPPORT AND CONNECT THE CG COMMUNITY
London ACM SIGGRAPH is a local non-profit, volunteer organization run and made up of local professionals. We host events for the Computer Graphics community in London, reach out to other communities and aim to promote contact and information exchange.

Name: Filmmore - Visual Effects & Post Production
Description:
Filmmore is one of the leading Post Production and Visual Effects facilities in The Benelux, providing services exclusively for feature film, documentary and TV drama. We inject every aspect of the post production process with the highest standard of creative and technical skills.

Our Baselight color managed grading environment is perfectly suitable for all sorts of outputs. Even for HDR we are eligible for both monitor and cinema, being the first independent post facility which is a certified partner of EclairColor. 

Our highly skilled Visual Effects department is experienced in any kind of digital imagery. Our portfolio contains (international) films from renowned director's such as Brian de Palma, Jasmila Žbanić and Lucretia Martel and countless of series.

We are specialized in making a large range of international deliverables, such as DCP and IMF, the standard requirement to streamers as Netflix and Disney+.

Name: Rebellion Film Studios
Description:
Rebellion Film Studios is  bringing together cutting-edge film and TV production and stages, 30 years of games production and two decades at the forefront in Performance Capture technology. Rebellion Film Studios is forging new ways to tell new stories.

Rebellion Film Studios offers brand new facilities, virtual production opportunities, an in-house VFX team, and industry-leading experience in motion capture and game production. It is one of the first studios to incorporate games, TV, and film production to offer innovative and unlimited opportunities for storytelling across genres and mediums.

Name: Evolve Studios
Description:
Independent full-service production company, Evolve Studios produces a diverse range content from original feature films, episodic series, documentaries, branded & commercial content, promos, music videos, digital films and immersive VR content.

Evolve’s work has been recognized with numerous awards including 6 National Television Emmy’s, 48 Emmy nominations & many other top industry accolades.

Empowered by incredible young talent, team culture and blue collar creative work ethic, Evolve has built a multifaceted company that develops, produces & provides production services in three industry verticals all from the content frontier in Nashville, Tennessee.

View our content portfolio and learn more about us at:
http://evolve.studio

Name: Festival de Málaga
Description: Festival de Málaga nació en 1998 y en cada una de sus ediciones ha pretendido alcanzar una serie de objetivos, entre ellos, favorecer la difusión y promoción de la cinematografía española, convertirnos en un referente a nivel nacional e internacional en el ámbito de las manifestaciones cinematográficas y contribuir al desarrollo de Málaga como una ciudad abierta y cultural.

Name: HanWay Films
Description:
HanWay Films was named after 24 Hanway Street in London’s Soho. There in 1998, producer Jeremy Thomas founded an international sales company centred on filmmakers.

Today, HanWay continues to offer the full package, arranging financing, sales, marketing and distribution. HanWay works with visionary filmmakers and exciting new voices to launch commercial and critical success stories, globally. Above all, our team is passionate about movies.

Our HanWay Select division represents a library of more than 550 films available to license across the world, a vast collection of beloved classics, award winners, critically acclaimed and commercial hits.

HanWay’s library represents the very best in filmmaking talent, including films by Bernardo Bertolucci, David Cronenberg, Stephen Frears, Jean Luc Godard, Derek Jarman, Takeshi Kitano, Steve McQueen, Takashi Miike, Philip Noyce, Sarah Polley, Sally Potter, Lone Scherfig, Julien Temple and Wim Wenders.

Name: Belas Artes Grupo
Description: Formado em 2020, o Belas Artes Grupo reúne três empresas de destaque no mercado audiovisual brasileiro: o REAG Belas Artes, um dos mais tradicionais cinemas de rua da cidade São Paulo, inaugurado em 1967; a Pandora Filmes,distribuidora de filmes independentes mais antiga do Brasil, responsável por lançamentos como Que horas ela volta? e Parasita; e o  À LA CARTE, streaming de filmes lançado em abril de 2020, que conta com uma curadoria pensada  para quem ama cinema de verdade e que leva para seus assinantes filmes de todos os cantos do mundo e de todas as épocas. O Belas Artes Grupo é 100% nacional e é comandado por André Sturm.

Name: Refuge Visual Effects
Description: Founded in 2013, Refuge is a powerhouse visual effects studio known for delivering indelible photoreal characters and creatures and imaginative worlds for film and television. The Refuge team puts a premium on close-knit collaboration, determination, and discerning visual artistry that cinematic storytelling demands. Headquartered in Portland, Oregon, Refuge has additional locations in Vancouver, BC, and Los Angeles.

Name: Blue Monkeys Productions
Description:
Blue Monkeys is a production company producing cutting edge promotional videos and commercials. We are a group of young filmmakers having a blast crafting our art. We work with some of the leading brands worldwide and in Israel, such as Microsoft, IBM, Unilever, Bank of Israel, Tel Aviv Medical Center, Netafim, Amisragas and many more. 
You are welcomed to have a glance at our site:
Blue-Monkeys.com

PEACE:)

Name: Klara Färdiga Film
Description:
Tired of expensive Hollywood productions for social media?

We help you with everything from idea, film shoot and editing your video to social media for a fixed price every month.

Name: Pittsburgh Film Office
Description:
The mission of the Pittsburgh Film Office is to attract film production projects to the greater southwestern Pennsylvania region; provide information on the region, locations, vendors and crew; and to coordinate government and business offices in support of production.  In addition, the film office is a conduit for information, providing assistance to local filmmakers and the local film industry throughout Allegheny County and the designated 10-county region.

The Pittsburgh Film Office is a 501(c)3 nonprofit corporation and is registered with the Bureau of Charitable Organizations in the Commonwealth of Pennsylvania.

Name: Apple Cinemas
Description:
Apple Cinemas, headquartered in Walpole, MA and incorporated in 2010, opened its first theater in 2013 and currently operates 14 locations with 161 screens across seven  states (MA, CT, RI, NH, ME, NY, CA). 

We are opening two new locations with 20 screens: one location in Greece NY and one location in Danville, CA. Additional sites and leases are pending.

From the beginning Apple Cinemas has been committed to providing quality state-of-the-art family entertainment, offering varied and dynamic programs features blockbusters, art films, and foreign films in several languages.

Name: Chicago Filmmakers
Description: Founded in 1973, Chicago Filmmakers is a media arts organization that fosters the creation, appreciation and understanding of film and video as media for artistic and personal expression, as well as media of important social and community impact. Our mission is to provide an opportunity for artists to make films outside the mainstream marketplace, to distribute and exhibit this work, as well as to build audiences and to increase media attention for it. Recognizing the impact of mass media in contemporary society, it is additionally our goal to provide culturally diverse audiences with alternative images to those reflected in mainstream media and to broaden access to media education to include those typically left out of the process.

Name: Cleveland International Film Festival
Description:
The Cleveland International Film Festival (CIFF) promotes artistically and culturally significant film arts through education and exhibition to enrich the life of the community. In other words, we present the newest and best films from around the world, and we do everything in our power to make sure that our audience learns something along the way - about other cultures, about the topic at hand, about the experience from the filmmakers themselves.

The Cleveland International Film Festival's vision is to be a leader in helping the world discover the power of the film arts to educate, entertain, and celebrate an inclusive human experience.

Name: Parapix
Description:
Parapix is a creative production partner designed for this strange world . We produce films and stills worldwide in collaboration with attractive brands and talented agencies.
We approach our projects with a tailor-made talent selection, ensuring a high commitment to quality and culture.

Name: D-Facto Motion GmbH
Description: D-Facto Motion GmbH ist ein Postproduktionshaus für Visual Effects, Colorgrading und Animation. Wir stellen erstklassige Effekte für Produktionsfirmen, Agenturen und Fernsehsender her. Wir geben jedem Bild einen eigenen, unverkennbaren Look. Wir setzen jede Dimension in Bewegung, ob 2D oder 3D.

Name: Blackstone Studio VFX
Description: Blackstone Studio VFX è uno studio specializzato in visual effects e post-produzione per cinema e produzioni audiovisive. Fondato da Daniele e Fabio Tomassetti, lo studio realizza VFX e compositing con un forte focus sulla qualità visiva e sul supporto alla narrazione. Il team è stato Candidato per i Migliori Effetti Visivi ai David Di Donatello per Denti da squalo (2024) e Limonov (2025).

Name: Incarceration Nation
Description:
Incarceration Nation connects the relentless government intervention since colonisation to the trauma and disadvantage experienced by Indigenous Australians - the two key drivers of incarceration.
Contact helen@allstorypictures.com

Name: Samuel Goldwyn Films
Description: Samuel Goldwyn Films is an American film company that licenses, releases and distributes art-house, independent and foreign films.

Name: The Orphanage
Description:
Founded in 1999, The Orphanage, Inc., a Los Angeles, San Francisco and Vancouver based vfx production company, has steadily grown from boutique shop to a facility capable of handling studio tentpoles. The Orphanage's staff of more than 160 artists, has created visual effects for more than two dozen major films including such blockbusters as Ironman (Paramount), Live Free or Die Hard (Fox), Fantastic Four: Rise of the Silver Surfer (Fox), Superman Returns (Warner Bros.), Pirates of the Caribbean: Dead Man's Chest and   At World's End   (Disney), Harry Potter and the Goblet of Fire (Warner Bros), Sin City (Dimension) and The Day After Tomorrow (Fox) as well as dozens of commercials for the top agencies worldwide. Recent clients include: Disney, Nicoderm, Lexus, Microsoft, BMW, Comcast, Toshiba, Dolby and IBM/Lenovo, to name a few.

In its brief history, The Orphanage has established a reputation for delivering inspiring creative work, technical innovation and the highest quality service available.

Name: Sherman Grinberg Film Library
Description:
The Grinberg collection, located in Chatsworth, CA., is the world's oldest and largest privately held film archive, with over 50 moving image libraries. The library has over 20 million feet of film with content that ranges from 1895 to 1957. The collection includes the famous Paramount newsreels "Eyes of the World" (1927 - 1929 the silent newsreels) and "Eyes and Ears of the World" newsreels (1930 -1957 the "talkies"). The Grinberg collection includes the entire American Pathe' newsreel library which is the oldest American newsreel collection starting in 1895 to 1956.  

We have over 20 million feet of 35 mm film.

Follow the link to view  small subset of our collection, available on Getty Images.
http://goo.gl/zXufSA

Name: Filmakers Monkeys
Description:
Productora especializada en la creación de contenido audiovisual, desde la idea y el guion, hasta la producción y el acabado final. Nuestra especialidad es transformar tu idea en una campaña audiovisual que llegue al público que deseas, fidelizándolo y aumentando de forma exponencial el alcance de la marca. Siempre tenemos las soluciones a tu proyecto.

Más de 300 campañas y proyectos audiovisuales en solo 3 años de vida demuestran la capacidad de trabajo y la visión de nuestros valores e ideas. Todos los clientes han repetido, teniendo una tasa de fidelización del 100%. Algunas de nuestras producciones han podido verse en Movistar +, National Geographic o Filmin, entre otras.

Además donamos el 10% de nuestros beneficios a causas benéficas. Creemos en la humanidad de las marcas.

Name: Only Postproduction
Description: Real Talent. A creative universe by only postproduction.

Name: Slick Films
Description:
Slick films is an Academy Award winning production company. Our highly experienced roster of writers, directors and producers are constantly pushing the boundaries of filmmaking in pursuit of creating unique content. We understand each project requires its own set of solutions to both the creative and the financial tasks we face. 

We always push for the best quality of work and we hope to work with clients that do the same.

Name: Tandem
Description: Tandem est un studio de distribution et de production de cinéma.

Name: DocsBarcelona
Description:
DocsBarcelona is an international documentary film festival that celebrates the power of non-fiction storytelling. Continuously evolving, the festival brings together audiences and creators to discover bold, thought-provoking documentaries from around the world. Through its screenings, activities, and professional events, DocsBarcelona fosters dialogue, reflection, and engagement, offering a meeting point for both film lovers and the global documentary community.

DocsBarcelona Industry provides a dynamic platform for non-fiction professionals. Evolving continuously to broaden its influence, DocsBarcelona Industry nurtures, every year, daring and pioneering non-fiction media across various formats, including feature films, series, and new media productions.

Name: Jackson Wild
Description: Jackson Wild is a catalyst for accelerating and elevating impactful storytelling at the nexus of nature, science and conservation. Through innovative and collaborative community gatherings, skill-building initiatives and mentorship programs, Jackson Wild creates an inclusive forum for storytellers to more deeply illuminate connections to the natural world and our collective responsibility to the wild.

Name: Disnosc
Description:
A STEP BACK FROM REALITY
Disnosc is a film studio located in Biarritz, in the Nouvelle-Aquitaine region, France. It is situated between the extraordinary rich hinterland and the invigorating coastline of the Basque Country.
We are specialized in realistic hand-drawn pictural animation for young adults and adults. We believe in an ethical approach to the work’s organization.

Name: Pukeko Pictures LP
Description: Pukeko Pictures is an independent entertainment production company, focused on the development and production of excellent quality, multi-platform entertainment for a global audience. Pukeko Pictures was founded in 2008 by Sir Richard Taylor, Tania Rodger and Martin Baynton, and is located in Wellington, New Zealand. With a connection to the world-famous Weta Workshop (Avatar, King Kong, The Lord of the Rings), Pukeko Pictures is uniquely positioned in the creation of world-leading entertainment, harnessing the best in global talent and world-class production processes.

Name: AUSTIN Studio
Description:
Welcome to AUSTIN - Providing a Better View!

We are an advertising agency dedicated to propelling brands, businesses and ideas to the next level. With an unwavering passion for creativity and a strategic approach, we are committed to providing cutting-edge advertising solutions that not only attract attention, but also generate tangible results.

What sets us apart is:

Boundless Creativity:  We believe that creativity has no boundaries. Our team of brilliant minds is always ready to create innovative campaigns that stand out from the crowd and resonate with the target audience.

Partnership and Collaboration: When you choose AUSTIN, you are choosing a partner committed to the success of your business. We work side by side with our clients, understanding their needs, values and goals to deliver customized solutions that really make a difference.

Multidisciplinary Approach: Our expertise covers a variety of areas, from branding and digital marketing to traditional advertising. This multidisciplinary approach allows us to create integrated campaigns that reach audiences wherever they are.

Name: Argon
Description: Argon Effects is a leading previs and postvis company helping filmmakers develop and deliver complex, visually-driven stories. With credits including The Martian, Bohemian Rhapsody, Venom, and the upcoming The Running Man, our team brings cinematic clarity to ambitious productions. Our proprietary pipeline connects Maya and Unreal Engine in real time, powered by in-house tools like MuPit, our artist-friendly plugin for seamless data transfer between DCC and game engine. This allows for rapid iteration, efficient feedback, and greater creative control. Whether starting from loose concepts or detailed storyboards, we help directors and studios visualise their vision — before the cameras roll, throughout production, and into post.

Name: Jether Production / جذر للانتاج الاعلامي
Description:
Jether is a production house based in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia. We are a local team, working with international experience. We enjoy our work, and we always look to go beyond your expectations. With great diversity in talent and style, method and technique, from humor to storytelling, it’s all here.

شركة انتاج سعودية بمواصفات عالمية مقرها الرياض، بفريق عمل سعودي بخبرات عالمية نعمل بشغف لتلامس اعمالنا القلوب.


Twitter:
https://twitter.com/jethertv

Instagram:
https://www.instagram.com/jethertv/

Vimeo:
https://vimeo.com/jether

Name: Realise Studio
Description: Post production

Name: OLDMONK STUDIO
Description:
At Oldmonk Studio, we are passionate about creating stunning visual effects that bring stories to life. Our team of experienced VFX artists has worked on a wide range of projects, including feature films, web series, and ad commercials.

Specializing in pre-production, visual effects design, and post-production, we work closely with our clients to ensure that their vision is brought to life with the highest level of quality and attention to detail.

Take a look at our portfolio to see some of our past projects, and don't hesitate to contact us to discuss your next project. We'd love to bring your vision to life with stunning VFX magic.

Name: Diversion
Description: Diversion is a key player in the immersive industry. Technical partner of the most prestigious festivals (Cannes, Venice, Red Sea, etc.), we create immersive spaces and distribute immersive experiences. From concept and curation to technical installation, scenography, and on-site mediation, Diversion takes care of all the aspect of your immersive event.

Name: Saraguina Filmes
Description:
Saraguina Filmes is a Brazil-based film & TV production company founded in 2008. Our Production Services ensure our partners’ highest standards for international projects. We offer great insights and a Latin American network of experienced professionals and tailor-made film crews. 

In our Originals, we develop films and cultural projects, aiming to leverage new talents and creative storytelling. By transforming culturally engaged projects into innovative cases of success, we offer an empowerment platform within the creative industry.

Name: Sevilla Festival de Cine Europeo
Description: El Festival de Cine Europeo de Sevilla tiene como objetivo promover y difundir la cinematografía europea, estableciéndose  como un lugar de encuentro anual para los talentos europeos de cine, periodistas especializados y profesionales del sector. Nueve días donde industria, público y crítica conviven alrededor de una selección del mejor cine europeo.  Estrenos en España de las grandes películas del cine de autor contemporáneo, la presencia de buen número de  talentos emergentes,  la defensa decidida por el más joven cine español, el apoyo al cine andaluz y sobre todo la plena seguridad de que hoy, más que nunca, un festival de cine puede ser útil al público, a las películas y  a los cineastas.

Name: Refuge Visual Effects
Description: Refuge is an animation and visual effects studio that specializes in building characters, creatures, and environments of all kinds. We use tools of science to make works of art.  At Refuge, we believe that if we're not showing the world something new, we haven't done our job. Come work with our talented team of sculptors and animators to bring your creative vision to life.

Name: TrueFuture TV
Description: In a groundbreaking documentary series, TrueFuture exposes cutting edge medical technology and the inspirations of the creators. Small startups to major players in the industry. Host, Joe Mullings immerses the viewer in cities around the globe and their cultures, and the stories of the people developing life-saving technologies.

Name: Red Parrot Studios
Description:
RED PARROT STUDIOS is a post-production studio based in Cologne and Hamburg.

Since its formation in 2014, RED PARROT STUDIOS is developing and producing animations and visual effects for cinema and television.

With lots of passion, we use all our know-how as (co-)production partner or as service provider for high-quality productions. We aspire to always explore new ways when it comes to realizing concepts and striking animations with visual effects and computer-generated images (CGI). Our strength is the application of innovative animation techniques as well as the combination of animation and real action – as presented in current feature film productions like TEHRAN TABOO and exceptional documentary/animation hybrids like LITTLE ARYANS. 

We are currently working on PETERCHENS MONDFAHRT, a modern version of the classic by Gerdt von Bassewitz.

One of our characteristics is our value system that defines us and our work – we recognize work time as life time so we aspire to make it as successful and fulfilling for everyone as possible. Our values inlcude honesty and sincerity, the pursuit of excellence, self-reflection, working as equals as well as self-committed to grow not only individually but together as one to reach goals that would have been impossible to reach alone.

Name: Cinéma CGR Saint Quentin
Description:
Service btob de CGR Cinémas au service des entreprises.
-Location d'espace Salles de cinémas, Hall, Parvis.
-Matériel de pointe à disposition et un accompagnement technique
-Organisation d'évènement : Séminaire, soirée d'entreprise, arbre de Noël, projection privée etc...
-Pour aller plus loin : Exposition, communication
Découvrez toutes nos offres sur www.cgrcinémas.fr

Name: IATSE Local 479
Description: Local 479 is an Atlanta-based union local of the International Alliance of Theatrical Stage Employees. Visitors please be aware that some people have marked themselves as 'employees' of the local when they are in fact merely members.

Name: XYZ FILMS
Description: XYZ FILMS is a motion pictures and film company based out of 3103 S LA CIENEGA, Los Angeles, California, United States.

Name: Believe Media
Description:
Believe is an international company of directors, photographers and artists devoted to visual innovation and creative storytelling.

We have created influential and award winning commercials, music videos, content, promos, documentaries and films since our founding in 2000 by partners Luke Thornton & Liz Silver.

With offices in Los Angeles, New York, London & Prague, we’ve maintained a global reach with partnerships worldwide. Our directors hail from around the globe and have worked with the world’s biggest brands and agencies collecting numerous awards along the way. We strive to cultivate the most imaginative talent and offer the highest level of production.

Name: Liquorice Productions
Description: At Liquorice Productions we are a team of forward thinking creatives with one common goal, to elevate brands and tell stories. From day one, we’ve always strived to provide nothing but the best for our customers, it’s helped us make the right decisions, win awards for our service, and build a business that’s better for everyone. When we launched in 2016, we set out to make creative content production more accessible and higher in quality. We brought great service, clear information, and honesty to a misunderstood industry. These days our sights are set higher, we don’t just want to be your typical production partner, we want to be an extension of your team and someone you can rely on. We differ because we’re constantly pushing the boundaries, looking for new ideas, methods, and techniques to help build a better, more useful solution for our customers.

Name: Ovide
Description:
Since 1994, Ovide has been a leading name in the 𝗿𝗲𝗻𝘁𝗮𝗹 𝗼𝗳 𝗵𝗶𝗴𝗵-𝗾𝘂𝗮𝗹𝗶𝘁𝘆 𝗮𝘂𝗱𝗶𝗼𝘃𝗶𝘀𝘂𝗮𝗹 𝗲𝗾𝘂𝗶𝗽𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁 for digital cinema and television. 
We provide cutting-edge cameras, lenses, and equipment, supported by a team that understands production and goes the extra mile to bring every project to life. 
From our offices in Barcelona and Madrid, along with agents in the Basque Country, Canary Islands, Seville, and Valencia, we offer comprehensive solutions across Spain and internationally. 
Our motto, “It’s not just about the rental, it’s everything else,” reflects our commitment to delivering expertise, technical support, and added value.

𝗘𝘅𝗽𝗲𝗿𝘁𝗶𝘀𝗲 𝗶𝗻 𝗗𝗶𝗴𝗶𝘁𝗮𝗹 𝗖𝗶𝗻𝗲𝗺𝗮 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗕𝗿𝗼𝗮𝗱𝗰𝗮𝘀𝘁
Starting in broadcast, we now boast extensive experience in feature film shoots, TV series, commercials, and television entertainment. 
We equip productions with cameras from leading brands such as Arri, Sony, Red, and Canon, alongside modern and vintage lenses from brands like Arri, Zeiss, Cooke, Leica, and Angenieux, suitable for Super35, Full Frame, and 65mm sensors.

𝗢𝘃𝗶𝗱𝗲 𝗦𝗺𝗮𝗿𝘁: 𝗜𝗻𝗻𝗼𝘃𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗶𝗻 𝗩𝗶𝗱𝗲𝗼 𝗔𝘀𝘀𝗶𝘀𝘁
Since 2014, Ovide Smart has led the industry with video assist systems:
• 𝗢𝘃𝗶𝗱𝗲 𝗦𝗺𝗮𝗿𝘁 𝗔𝘀𝘀𝗶𝘀𝘁: The most complete and advanced video assist system with QTAKE
• 𝗢𝘃𝗶𝗱𝗲 𝗞𝗼𝗸𝗼: 10” monitor-recorder with integrated proprietary software
• 𝗢𝘃𝗶𝗱𝗲 𝗗𝗼𝗰𝗸: Transforms a MacBook into a video assistance hub
• 𝗢𝘃𝗶𝗱𝗲 𝗔𝗻𝘁𝗲𝗻𝗻𝗮: Self-configuring Wi-Fi antenna

𝗢𝘃𝗶𝗱𝗲 𝟯𝟲𝟬º 𝗦𝗲𝗿𝘃𝗶𝗰𝗲𝘀
We offer 24/7 technical support, with specialised technicians assisting from pre-production to the end of the shoot, catering to both national and international projects.

𝗝𝗼𝗶𝗻 𝗼𝘂𝗿 𝗰𝗼𝗺𝗺𝘂𝗻𝗶𝘁𝘆
Follow us on Instagram (@ovidebs), Facebook (@ovidebs), and LinkedIn (Ovide).

#equiposovide #traslascamaras #BehindTheScenes #CineDigital #cinematographer #filmmaking #lens

Name: Lumme
Description:
A Lumme é uma criadora de conteúdo audiovisual, e acredita que o controle remoto e o botão de pular não perdoam conteúdo chato.
Nosso propósito é colocar no mundo mais vídeos que valem o play: narrativas relevantes, estética impecável e conexão real com o público.
Mais que produzir, somos parceiros estratégicos. Da ideia à finalização, cuidamos de cada etapa, garantindo clareza, consistência e potência na mensagem.
Nossa inquietude criativa nos leva a olhar para cada projeto de um novo ângulo, explorando possibilidades que unem emoção, propósito e resultado.
Já criamos para marcas em segmentos como Agro, Beauty, Educação, Entretenimento, Eventos, Imobiliário, Tecnologia e Varejo.

Seja institucional, storytelling, publicidade, cobertura de eventos, para TV ou digital, acreditamos que cada play é uma conquista.

A próxima pode ser a da sua marca.

Name: FIAF - Fédération internationale des archives du film/International Federation of Film Archives
Description:
FIAF, the International Federation of Film Archives, has been dedicated to the preservation of, and access to, the world’s film heritage since 1938. It brings together the world's leading non-profit institutions in this field.

Its affiliates are committed to the rescue, collection, preservation, screening, and promotion of films, which are valued both as works of art and culture and as historical documents. When FIAF was founded in June 1938, it had four members. As of May 2018, it comprises 166 institutions in 75 countries – a reflection of the extent to which film heritage has become a world-wide concern. After nearly 80 years of experience in this field, FIAF has grown to be the most important global network of cinematheques and film archives.

Name: LA FACTORIE
Description:
La Factorie est un studio d'animation et de post-production, lancé en 2016 au coeur de Ménilmontant, avec la société de production Watch Next Media et sa série Oscar et Malika, toujours en retard.

En juin 2020, avec déjà 3 séries à son actif (Boy,Girl, etc., et Moi, Elvis) La Factorie s'installe à Lille et ouvre un nouveau studio sur le quai du Wault, toujours en partenariat avec Watch Next Media, mais également avec Je Suis Bien Content.

La Factorie c'est plus d'une centaine de postes de travail (60 à Paris, 50 à Lille), une salle de montage, une salle de montage avec cabine d'enregistrement et ... un baby-foot !

Name: Carlo Mameli Video Agency
Description:
For over 30 years, we’ve been creating videos that resonate and inspire, driven by a passion for storytelling and a deep commitment to our clients. From technology to defense, aerospace, environmental sustainability, fishing, food, marble, and energy, our work spans a wide range of industries, always adapting to unique needs and challenges.

Our team combines experience, creativity, and cutting-edge tools — Sony FX cameras, certified drones, advanced gimbals, and modern LED lighting—to transform ideas into powerful visual narratives. It’s our human touch, teamwork, and dedication that truly set us apart, allowing us to navigate complexities and deliver results that exceed expectations.

 Discover more at www.carlomameli.it

Name: Ventana Sur
Description:
Ventana Sur is the premier market for audiovisual content in Latin America and a must-attend event for distributors, buyers and industry professionals worldwide.

Organized by the National Institute of Cinema and Audiovisual Arts (INCAA), Marché du Film – Festival de Cannes and Uruguayan Film & Audiovisual Agency (ACAU), Ventana Sur brings together all the different players from the audiovisual industry to foster international co-production, financing and distribution of Latin American content.

Every year, the event welcomes 3,000 accredited participants, including 250+ buyers and sellers from all five continents, as well as representatives from the most important networks and international platforms. Attendees actively engage with content producers through business conferences, pitching sessions, and one-on-one meetings. Additionally, the event offers access to tailor-made initiatives for producers with projects in development, workshops, roundtables and conferences that explore current trends with an eye on the future.

Ventana Sur, through its diverse sections — including Primer Corte, Copia Final, Blood Window, Animation!, Proyecta, Punto Género, SoloSeries, El Principio del Film, Maquinitas and DocSur —and its varied activities and services, such as conferences, screenings, and the Video Library, plays a proactive role in promoting Latin American content across all genres (fiction, docs, animation, fantasy, Latin American queer) and formats. This comprehensive approach creates a platform for a wide range of business opportunities and promotion, solidifying Ventana Sur as a unique and unparalleled force in the region.
Location: Puerto Madero, Ciudad Autónoma de Buenos Aires

Name: CUBE Studio
Description: A #virtualproduction studio empowering you to #CreateBeyond.

Name: Ramesh Sippy Academy of Cinema and Entertainment, Mumbai
Description:
Degree Courses Awarded by The University of Mumbai
B.A. Multimedia-Film Art (Direction)
 Screenwriting
 Production & Management
Animation
VFX

The key elements of the RSACE offering that could help you in making a decision about your academic future are:

The courses have been curated under the guidance of Mr. Ramesh Sippy.

The training will be led by industry professionals.

70 – 75% of the training will be on-set.

Students will have the opportunity of internship projects during the course of 3 years.

The Mumbai University graduate degrees are internationally recognized.

Privilege to study in the expansive Kalina campus of University of Mumbai situated in the heart of the city.

100% assistance for placement is assured.

Loan assistance can be provided.

Hostel facility on a first cum first serve basis.

Having shared the above, our primary efforts will be to WORK ON YOU, WORK WITH YOU & WORK FOR YOU.

Name: Coficiné
Description:
Coficiné, affiliate of Natixis, is a credit institution specialised in film, audiovisual, multimedia and cultural industries financing. The company  was established in 1949 after the acquisition of the Credit Cinematographique, created in 1928 and has been a member of Natixis group since 2000.

Coficiné finances all aspects of image and sound: production and distribution of cinematographic films, television fictions, documentaries, animation series, video games, music and theaters. It also finances the technical industries associated with the production of these works (laboratories, auditoriums, studios, etc.), their projection or distribution venues (cinemas, theaters, etc.) and cultural industries at large .

Originally oriented towards a French clientele, Coficiné has been expanding since 2000 to all markets in the European Union as well as in Canada and the United States.

Thanks to its experience team of professionals and technicians from the financial, film and audiovisual sectors, Coficiné is the French and European leader in its industry. The institution has an annual credit production of over 900 million euros, 80% of which is used to fund works, with over 150 films and a 1000 hours of fiction and animation series per year.

Name: BoldBrush VFX
Description: At BoldBrush we offer Art Direction and visual development services for the VFX industry. From concept art to matte painting, we deliver high quality artwork for film, tv and games. We are here to make your stories visually unique by focusing on narration and design.

Name: SCAN ENGINE
Description: We are a cutting-edge 3D scan studio specialized in the film, advertisement and video game industry, operated by 3D and VFX experts in the heart of Paris, France.

Name: Modeling Association of America International, Inc.
Description:
Celebrating 50 Years of Convention Successes.

The Modeling Association of America International, Inc., known as M.A.A.I., is a global not-for-profit membership organization established in 1960.  M.A.A.I. is the founder of the concept of the modeling and talent convention.  

The primary goal of the Organization is to advance professionalism by producing a convention which is a dynamic and ethical forum for members to bring their students, graduates, models and talent to be seen individually, interviewed by experts and have the opportunity to demonstrate their skills in a competitive format. These competitions are career enhancing as they are monitored by industry professional agents, scouts, managers, producers and casting directors.

M.AA.I. is governed by an Executive Board of Directors elected by the membership and an Advisory Council to guide the Board and Association activities.  The Board, Advisory Council and others of the membership lend their time, expertise and devotion to the support of M.A.A.I. on a volunteer basis.  

MAAI is a private membership organization governed by New York law.  MAAI reserves the right to exercise its discretion in extending a limited number of invitations to business and or social invitees of its choice to certain business, social, competitive or other sponsored events.  Admission of any uninvited person or entity may be refused.

Annual Convention = April 21-25, 2011 at the Deauville Beach Resort, Miami Beach.

Name: MARS Volume
Description:
MARS Volume is London's Premier Virtual Production Facility dedicated to technical precision, designed and run by experienced workflow specialists Bild Studios. 

MARS is backed by decades of experience with proven workflows for real-time VFX pipelines and advanced video systems for some of the largest video installations in the world.

Name: HOST VFX
Description: Postviz, Techviz & Inhouse for the Film & Television Industry

Name: Chatrone
Description:
We are an audiovisual production company with offices in Los Angeles and São Paulo. Founded in 2007 in the United States and in 2011 in Brazil. Since our establishment we have created, developed and produced content for different windows and formats for the global market. With expertise in content development and financing, the company has produced over 200 hours of content for TV and Film, as well as competing for and winning several awards such as the Golden Globe, International Emmy, BAFTA, among others.

Our motto is to nurture the best talent around the world and generate exciting, quality projects, while acting as a bridge between the Americas and the rest of the world. We have the skills, experience and competence to co-produce with the most diverse countries and promote creative solutions to get projects off the ground.

Join us as we create stories that touch the hearts of audiences of all ages.

Name: Movietime / Compass Film srl
Description:
Movietime and Compass film are independent companies established in 1984 by Stefano Libassi with the main aim to make people all over the world love the Italian Cinema of the golden years. Time after time Movietime has enriched its film library with feature films produced in the ‘50s,’60s and ‘70s, offering its clients a wide choice of titles among Classics, Spaghetti Western, Comedies, Dramas, Historical, War, Thriller, Horror and Documentary…. available in many different languages.

Movietime and Compass film catalogue is unique, its titles present names like: “Ludwig” and “Bellissima” directed by Luchino Visconti, Pier Paolo Pasolini with “Il Vangelo Secondo Matteo”, “La Notte” and “La Signora senza Camelie” directed by Michelangelo Antonioni, Sophia Loren, Marcello Mastroianni, Vittorio De Sica, Alberto Sordi, Totò and many others.

The companies pay much attention to the material of its feature films; its technical staff personally supervises every step in the production of new HD, 2K and 4K masters, realized straight from the original feature elements, that have always met the appreciation of TV networks and Home Video distributors.

The Team is well prepared and willing to answer its client’s requests about any kind of distribution from the traditional Theatrical and Television, to Home Video and the more modern Digital media. The main purpose of the Team is to satisfy clients and ensure that our feature films are much appreciated and well evaluated everywhere in the world.

Name: Activa Films
Description:
Empresa dedicada a la producción técnica  audiovisual, especializada en: Largometrajes, Documentales, Spots Publicitarios, Videos Musicales y Organización de Eventos.

Contamos con el equipo técnico más avanzado del Mercado, necesario para rodar sus proyectos con la máxima calidad:Cámaras (incluida Red One), dollies, travellings, grúas y ópticas de cine.

Activa films organiza el Musiclip Festival Internacional del Videoclip, evento inédito en la ciudad de Barcelona, Catalunya que pretende ampliar la oferta cultural y de ocio durante los meses de invierno.

Musiclip es un proyecto que nace con un objetivo primordial: incentivar el arte del video clip musical ya que éste esta llamado a adquirir importancia en un porvenir muy próximo, donde la música no podrá prescindir de la imagen.

Con la unión de la imagen y la música, Musiclip atrae a un público dinámico y con inquietudes artísticas. Además, la presencia de figuras relevantes del sector musical y audiovisual convierte a Musiclip en un escaparate de tendencias, plataforma de nuevos artistas, punto de referencia y encuentro de profesionales. Es la ocasión ideal para dar a conocer los grupos y trabajos de su discográfica

TODA LA INFORMACIÓN EN: www.musiclipfestival.com

Name: la maison
Description:
La maison is a French company specializing in the creation of Digital Visual Effects for the motion picture industry: commercials, feature films, documentaries, clips...
The team at La maison shares the goal to create an atmosphere where directors and producers feel encouraged to develop their projects within the environment of artistic talent and technical expertise.
La maison considers itself as a sort of modern-day digital «Villa Medicis». The company philosophy is to embrace their clients, local and international, by working together with the directors to create some of the most ambitious visual effects possible to imagine.

Name: XR Stage
Description: XR Stage is the leader in immersive VFX environments. We provide purpose built LED volumes designed for film, commercials, and live events.

Name: Pretzel Logic Productions
Description: We’re a hands-on production team that helps bring ambitious ideas to life with clarity, creativity, and care. From concept to final delivery, we partner closely with clients to shape stories that hit the mark and look great doing it. Whether it’s a big campaign or a small shoot, we focus on what really matters: strong ideas, thoughtful collaboration, and production that works.

Name: Eagle Films ME
Description: Eagle Films, a Hollywood movies distributor, comes onto the scene. By understanding the tastes of a diverse audience of all ages, we identify the best ways to market the movies we distribute. This is how we get things rolling and keep the action going.

Name: Monkey Talkie
Description: We create, design and produce impactful video ads for your digital campaigns. Keep your eyes open, expect the unexpected.

Name: Music Supervision Mastercourse
Description:
Learn more & enroll today in the Music Supervision Mastercourse at www.MusicSuper.net 

Turn your Love of Music, Film, TV and Gaming into the best job in the world - a Music Supervisor.
"It's always been a mystery how to become a music supervisor but I'll share with you everything I know from my 20+ years experience.  A music supervisor chooses the songs and background music for film, television,  games and other media and works with the creative team of directors, producers, and editors to come up with the style, tone and musical vision. It's also budgeting, collaborating with songwriters and musicians, on camera musical performances, working with composers, record labels, music publishers, music clearance, music cue sheets as well as how to organize your day to day work flow.  Come join me to learn the ins and outs of music supervision."

- Jennifer Pyken

Name: CST - Commission supérieure technique de l'image et du son
Description:
Founded in 1944, the CST is an association of cinema, audiovisual and multimedia professionals. Today, its 700 members include technicians and technical artists.

In the film and audiovisual industries, from production to broadcasting, it defends the quality of images and sound, as well as creativity and technological and artistic innovation.

On behalf of the CNC (Centre National du Cinéma et de l'image animée) and cinema and audiovisual professionals, from production to distribution, its main missions are to provide technological watch, control, testing, expertise, technical assistance and training. Within AFNOR, EDCF, ISO and SMPTE, it participates in the implementation of standards and recommendations. It is also technical director of numerous film festivals (Cannes, Biarritz, Richmond, etc.).

Name: Gaveta Filmes
Description: Produtora de vídeos especializada em criação de conteúdo para Internet. Atende grandes nomes da web brasileira como Porta dos Fundos, Jovem Nerd, Globo, Zoom e Nostalgia. Além de produzir programas autorais como o popular Gaveta Show (http://youtube.com/andersongaveta).
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: London Film School
Description:
London Film School (LFS) is the oldest film school in the UK. For nearly 70 years, LFS has been the place for emerging creative talent to hone their craft, find their voice and engage directly with the vibrant UK screen industries. The School offers five full-time MA programmes including Filmmaking, Screenwriting, International Film, Business, Film Producing, & Film Marketing and a full calendar of short courses. 

LFS is a world leading conservatoire for filmmakers from around the world. Based in London’s Covent Garden, the School’s alumni include veterans (Mike Leigh, Michael Mann, Tak Fujimoto, Ann Hui) and famous younger filmmakers including Daina Pusic, Oliver Hermanus, Babak Jalali, and the creator of End of the F**king World, Jonathan Entwistle. 

The School is celebrated for its commitment to film, innovation and creative freedom, and its reputation for teaching excellence and practical learning - the School makes over 180films every year. In 2022 London Film School was awarded World-Leading Specialist Provider status by the Office for Students and in 2024 was named by The Hollywood Reporter as one of the top global film schools. LFS welcomes a student cohort from every corner of the globe, LFS has always been a cultural hub where fresh voices, experiences and perspectives rub shoulders with tradition and history. A global network, once built, lasts a professional lifetime.

London Film School is a non-profit educational charity with Greg Dyke as its Chairman of the Board and Chris Auty as Director and CEO.

Name: TorinoFilmLab
Description:
TorinoFilmLab is based in Turin (Italy) and has been active since 2008. 
TFL supports international talents and audiovisual professionals through training for scriptwriters, directors, producers and many other profiles, development of feature films and TV series, support to international co-production and distribution, and networking opportunities thanks to the co-production market, the TFL Meeting Event, and many other occasions. 
All of that until the film is ready to fly solo.
TorinoFilmLab is organised by Museo Nazionale del Cinema, supported by Creative Europe – MEDIA sub-programme of the European Union and it’s linked to the main film institutions established in Turin and Piedmont.

Name: Les Films du Losange
Description:
Les Films du Losange est une société de production, de distribution et de ventes internationales cinématographiques française, créée par Barbet Schroeder et Éric Rohmer en 1962, et qui contribua à l'essor de la Nouvelle Vague en intervenant dans le financement de nombreux films à partir de cette date.
Elle possède un catalogue de plus de 100 films, comprenant Éric Rohmer (dont elle a produit la quasi totalité des films), Barbet Schroeder, Roger Planchon, Jacques Rivette, et plus récemment des réalisateurs tels que Michael Haneke, Jacques Doillon, Romain Goupil et Jean-Marc Moutout.

Name: Pôle PIXEL
Description:
Le Pôle PIXEL est dédié aux entreprises du cinéma, de l’image en mouvement et des industries créatives

Etendu sur près de 30 000 m2, le Pôle PIXEL accueille des entreprises du secteur des industries culturelles et créatives : cinéma, audiovisuel, jeu vidéo, web, communication, nouveaux médias, arts numériques, etc.
Plus de 500 professionnels développent leurs activités sur le pôle : des producteurs, des prestataires techniques et de services audiovisuels, des développeurs de jeux vidéo, d’applications mobiles, de logiciels et de contenus web, des graphistes… Bienvenue dans la dynamique !

Name: WeFX
Description:
We bring your extraordinary ideas to life, using our imagination, artistry and technology.
Wefx is home to a collective of visionaries working across film and television. 
Our globally acclaimed artist pool has created some remarkable images and scenes for some of Hollywood's biggest pictures and most excellent tv series. We create scenes, not just shots, with a direct line to the director's creative vision.

Name: Grøenlandia Film
Description:
Groenlandia was founded after the meeting between director/producer Matteo Rovere, producer at Ascent Film, and Sydney Sibilia with the desire to operate in the Italian mainstream and the clear intent to innovate without losing the narrative structure that should always be the bedrock of an audiovisual product. Authors, as traditionally considered, take a step back at Groenlandia and are helped in their goal by creative directors, screenwriters and financial backers, each with their own objectives and evaluated and approved by the producers, in order to produce films and series reaching out both to the audience and the market.

Groenlandia’s objective is to produce quality audiovisual products, pursuing principles and practices based on the stories, and placing the values of the individual characteristics of each product before those of the authors.

Groenlandia productions are centered on writing, narrative dynamics and dramatic composition, in the absolute certainty that the audiovisual, film and similar entertainment industries are in need of a return to the narrative. What makes our production company stand out are a streamlined, young and dynamic structure that includes collaborations with up and coming writers and screenwriters in Italian cinema.

Name: Worldwide FX
Description:
Same team, new wave!  The talented professionals behind WorldWideFX are now Nova Wave FX—bringing the same expertise, passion, and dedication to every project.
 Check out our new home: https://novawavefx.com/ 
***

Name: Cinépolis Cinemas Indonesia
Description: Cinema company owned by PT Lippo Karawaci, Tbk.

Name: EGEDA
Description: Sociedad de servicios para los productores audiovisuales. EGEDA tiene presencia en Argentina, Chile, Colombia, Republica Dominicana, Ecuador, España, Perú, Uruguay y EEUU

Name: Umbrella
Description:
An independent distributor of local and international film in Australia and New Zealand for over 20 years. 

Established in 2001 by Managing Director Jeff Harrison, Umbrella Entertainment handles a vibrant range of content from theatrical exhibition right through to home entertainment, public broadcast and ancillary performances. 

Umbrella Entertainment has a back catalogue of over 1,500 titles across cinema releases and television programmes. The library boasts the largest collection of celebrated Australian films & TV shows in the country – one of the most dynamic selections of genre, foreign language, art house films, and TV shows produced.

Name: One Pixel Brush
Description: More important than our client list is what we can do for you. In addition to technically exceptional concept art, we’ll bring you articulate and thoughtful design ideas. We regularly consult experts in every field, including, geologists, botanists, architects and ex-military to help us understand WHY things look or work a certain way. Many of our staff regularly take painting trips around the US and the world. We want to know the STORY behind the places and characters we create and we think it shows in our work. Ask about our rates for new customers as we can work with any budget!

Name: Riff Raff Films
Description:
Riff Raff is a multi-award winning London based production company started by Matthew Fone, one of the industries leading production figures. 

At it’s core, Riff Raff is an ideas-led company - each director on the roster has been hand picked for their approach and talent for conceptualising good ideas. Hosting a roster of 11 directors, some are among the finest directorial talent in the world including Megaforce, Francois Rousselet, The Sacred Egg, Finn Keenan to name but a few..

Riff Raff is now 14 years and counting and can boast awards such as Gold and Silver Lions at Cannes, Gold and Silver Arrows at the British Crafts awards, along with D&AD yellow pencils, Shots awards and various Music Video accolades in its cabinet. We could go on. 

Riff Raff also has a creative relationship with The Directors Bureau in America. A company set up by Roman Coppola in the same vain......Ideas. 

You can count Wes Anderson, Sofia Coppola, Melodie McDaniel and Roman among the directors which Riff Raff represents on their behalf in the UK marketplace.

Name: Post Super
Description:
Post Super is THE destination platform for thousands of Post Production Managers of all types working in our global Film & TV industry. It is a place designed to help anyone who is MANAGING Post… 

Post Super Members are an extremely specialized number of individuals working on the front lines of Film and TV Post Production. They control all Post Production decisions inc. budget, schedule and helping to decide which facilities/crew work on each production!

Post Super provides FOUR elements to any member who joins the community! 

Community
Events, mentoring support & raising the 
profile of Post management in the industry 
(by sponsoring NEW awards for our 
underserved & deserving members!)

Information
A free curated online knowledge base of 
information about Post Production Management

Training
We design & run courses on both the hard & soft skills needed to succeed in our corner of the industry!

Tools
A Worldwide Post Production Directory & Crew Directory

Name: Europa Cinemas
Description:
Founded in 1992 with funding from the MEDIA programme (Creative Europe) and from the Centre national du cinéma et de l'image animée (CNC), Europa Cinemas is the first film theatre network focusing on European films.
Its objective is to provide operational and financial support to cinemas that commit themselves to screen a significant number of European non-national films, to offer events and initiatives as well as promotional activities targeted at Young Audiences.
Thanks to the support of Eurimages and the French Ministry of Foreign Affairs, the influence of Europa Cinemas extends to Eastern European countries, to the Balkans, to Russia and to Turkey. In addition, 42 screens (44 screens) in 42 cities in 31 countries in Europe and worldwide are also associated with the Europa Cinemas network under the partnership with the Institut Français.

Open to all types of cinemas, from the municipal ones to the multiplexes, the network has also expanded well beyond Europe according to the support programmes implemented: yesterday in Asia and Latin America through the Mundus programme, tomorrow in Canada via the Eurimages programme. Europa Cinemas thus contributes to making Europe and its cultural diversity a shared idea around the world.

Name: Instituto Criar de Tv, Cinema e Novas Mídias
Description: Fundado em 2003 pelo apresentador de TV Luciano Huck, o Instituto Criar de TV, Cinema e Novas Mídias tem como missão promover o desenvolvimento profissional, sociocultural e pessoal de jovens por meio do audiovisual. Anualmente, 125 jovens, com idade entre 17 a 20 anos e em situação de vulnerabilidade social e econômica, têm formação técnica e sociocultural.

Name: HOPSCOTCH Cinéma
Description:
HOPSCOTCH Cinéma s’engage avec passion et organise son savoir-faire autour de ses trois métiers principaux :

- CRÉATION ET ORGANISATION DE FESTIVALS
- RELATIONS PRESSE
- RELATIONS PUBLIQUES ET CONSEIL EN CINÉMA

Name: Dumiah Studio
Description:
Dumiah is the native Arabic word for “doll”. 
The company’s name simply reflects our belief that dreams often started with the very first doll that was gifted to us during childhood. Few kept those childish dreams alive and, from this idea, Dumiah was brought to life.

Dumiah was established in 2016 for the sole purpose of producing 3D animated, We love tell stories, create our original content and we also provide full 3D animation services from storyboards and animatics to final production for TV & commercials.
The spirit of being a dreamer is passed on to each and every individual on our team. We seek to become one of the top 3D animation studios in the Middle East.
We aim to leave our mark in the animation industry with a unique blend of imagination, expertise, visuals and humor.

For business inquiries : contact@dumiah.com

Name: Aquí y Allí Films
Description:
Hi! We are Aquí y Allí Films. We have been crafting movies for the last 13 years .

We are the producers behind “Here and There” (Grand Prix Semaine de la Critique de Cannes, 2012), “Magical Girl” (Golden and Silver Shell, SSIFF, 2014), “Talk” (Audience Award, Málaga Film Festival, 2015), “The Furies” (Opening Film, Seminci, 2016). “Life & Nothing More” (John Cassavetes Award, Film Independent Spirit Awards,2018),”Boi” (Opening Film
,Singapore Spanish Film Festival, 2020), “Courtroom 3H” (Official Section, SSIFF, 2020) and “The Lizard Queen” (Festival Europeo de Cine de Sevilla, D’A Film Festival).

In 2022, we premiere “Counting Sheep” debut film by José Corral Llorente, the short film “Eternal Happiness” by Isa Luengo and Sofia Esteve (Best Short Film LesGaiCineMad 2022), and “Manticore” by Carlos Vermut present at Toronto International Film Festival, Sitges Film Festival and nominated for 4 Goya Awards. 

In 2023, we will release “The fantastic case of the Golem” by Burnin’ Percebes, “Something is
about to happen” by Antonio Méndez Esparza and “American Star” by Gonzalo López-Gallego. We also shot “Birth” by Pau Texidor, “As Neves” by Sonia Méndez, “Goat Girl” by Ana Asensio, “The Debt” by Daniel Guzmán and “Norbert” by José Corral Llorente.

And we are working on exciting new projects!

Name: Como Actuar en Cine
Description:
Academia de Actuación para Cine.

Ayudamos a ACTORES y ACTRICES de +2 años de experiencia a conseguir su próximo papel remunerado. 

Formación - Mentorías - Coaching - Producción de Videobook - Dirección Actoral - Dirección de Casting.

Name: New York Women in Film & Television (NYWIFT)
Description:
New York Women in Film & Television (NYWIFT) is a nonprofit membership organization for professional women in film, television and digital media. A champion of women's rights, achievements and points of view in the entertainment industry, NYWIFT is an educational forum for media professionals, and a network for the exchange of information and resources.

NYWIFT was founded in 1977 and brings together over 2,500 professionals, including Emmy and Academy Award winners, who work in all areas of the entertainment industry — above and below the line. It is part of a network of 50 international Women in Film chapters, representing more than 15,000 members worldwide.

NYWIFT...

- produces over 50 innovative programs and special events annually;
- advocates for women in the industry; and,
- recognizes and encourages the contributions of women in the field.

Name: Video Symphony
Description:
Video Symphony is the premier professional institute for those who want to learn film editing, music editing, new media, and motion graphics for the film and television industries. Our teachers are masters from major industries and music schools, and you can’t beat the experience imparted by an instructor who holds an Academy Award. Our professional network for students is unparalleled, and the quality of education is unbeatable.

Whether you want to attend a superior AVID program to become an editor, need to learn the tools to compete with new media, or can’t wait to help on the graphics team of the next summer blockbuster, our certified programs are the best way to get started and land a job in the business.

We have the combination of facilities, curriculum, teachers, and professional networks to put you ahead of the curve. Between accredited degree certification authorized by the most important brands in the industry, professional-quality studios with cutting-edge equipment, instructors who are acclaimed leaders in their industry, and a Career Counseling and Job Placement Center with a stellar track record, our resources are unmatched.

Our alumni go on to work on high-profile projects that reach the public every day. An education at Video Symphony provides the training, credentials, and connections to start a career in film, television, or media production now. From film editing pros to composers sought by the best music schools, we have the professional staff and the equipment to help students get their career moving now.

Video Symphony is where the industry goes to train.

Name: Notorious Pictures
Description:
COMPANY PROFILE

Notorious Pictures, società indipendente costituita nel luglio 2012, con sede a Roma, opera nell'acquisizione di Diritti di Opere Cinematografiche (full rights) e nella commercializzazione degli stessi attraverso tutti i canali di distribuzione (cinema, home video, pay tv e free tv, new media). 
Nel 2013 la Società, sulla base dei dati finanziari esposti in conformità ai principi contabili IAS/IFRS, ha registrato ricavi pari a Euro 9 milioni.
La Società è un "content provider" che acquisisce opere filmiche al fine di sfruttarne i diritti in tutti i canali di distribuzione.

La Società sviluppa la propria offerta lungo quattro direttrici:

• Distribuzione Theatrical
Notorious Pictures presidia in modo diretto il canale della distribuzione cinematografica dei diritti delle opere filmiche acquisite. I circuiti cinematografici di rilievo livello nazionale (The Space, UCI Cinemas) sono tra i principali clienti della società.

• Distribuzione Home Video
La società ha affidato la commercializzazione dei DVD e Blu- ray a RAI Cinema, primario operatore nel settore della distribuzione home video.

• Vendita Diritti TV
Notorious Pictures si occupa autonomamente della cessione alle emittenti televisive dei diritti TV relativi ai film acquisiti. I principali acquirenti sono le emittenti televisive attive nel settore della trasmissione via etere, via cavo e via satellite, sia free che pay-tv ( SKY, RAI e RTI Mediaset).

• Distribuzione New Media
Notorious Pictures distribuisce i propri prodotti anche tramite nuove piattaforme di fruizione dei contenuti audiovisivi, quali mobile TV, web TV e mobile devices.

Name: Teleimage
Description:
Teleimage is one of the most renowned post production companies in the world.

It maintains massive investments on the updating of softwares and hardwares, as well as promoting the trainning and the development of professionals.

It has complete audiovisual production facilities to offer high quality services with on and off line editing suites for content, and high definition effects, as well as mobile units equiped with last generation digital cameras.

It has a strong  commitment on the development and innovation of production technology and image finalization.

TELEIMAGE structured its operations on five special areas: Post-production, Image capture, Film restoration, DVD/Blu-ray authoring and Film distribution.
NOW WORKING IN S3D.

Name: El Deseo
Description: Empresa de producción cinematográfica establecida en Madrid en 1985, orientada en principio a la producción, de manera absolutamente independiente, de todos los proyectos escritos por el cineasta Pedro Almodóvar. No obstante, debido sobretodo al reconocimiento internacional del cineasta manchego, la productora ha diversificado a lo largo de los años su actividad produciendo no sólo los guiones escritos por Almodóvar, sino también otros proyectos audiovisuales de interés cultural y social. Desde su creación la productora ha atesorado un considerable número de galardones internacionales entre los que cabe destacar un oscar, dos globos de oro y  un Bafta, entre otros.

Name: Insight Productions Ltd.
Description: Innovation. Inspiration. Insight. When television networks seek out production partners, they seek out Insight first. From comedy and variety, to factual, drama, music, documentaries and sports, for decades Insight Productions has demonstrated the acute ability to read the zeitgeist of the timeand respond with television programs that capture the current cultural climate.  Even during difficult times in the industry, Insight continued on solid ground, firmly established as one of Canada’s foremost production companies at the forefront of international television programming.  Recognized for working with some of the most talented personalities in the world, Insight’s most recent accolades include smash-hit Canadian versions of such successful formats as The Amazing Race, Big Brother, Never Ever Do This at Home, Top Chef, Got Talent, Idol, Project Runway, Deal or No Deal, Intervention, How To Look Good Naked, and Are You Smarter Than a 5th Grader? and original formats including Battle of the Blades & Canada Sings.

Name: Cinéart
Description:
Cinéart is a leading Benelux film distribution company. Our mission is to bring great stories to our audiences. Stories that touch, unite, and give meaning.
 
We pride ourselves on supporting quality cinema – small, medium, large. Over the years, we have selected and released countless Oscar & Golden Palm award-winning films. Our library spans from titles such as Slumdog Millionaire, Drive, Dolor & Gloria, Portrait of a lady on fire, The Artist and The Specials, created by esteemed directors such as the Dardenne brothers, Ken Loach, Michael Haneke, Alex van Warmedam, Agnès Varda, Pedro Almodóvar, Céline Sciamma and many more. 
 
See our line-up on www.cineart.be or www.cineart.nl
 
We have offices in Brussels and Amsterdam with local teams in each country. We are one of the few independent distributors being fully integrated across all our geographies and windows.  
 
The company was founded by Eliane Dubois in 1975. Over the years, she established an institution. Since her passing in 2013, her spirit lives on within a team adamant to perpetuate the passion for outstanding film with Marc Smit and Stephan DePotter (co-owners - respectively in Amsterdam and in Brussels).
 
Cinéart Benelux has just about 25 employees across all windows. We are committed to building our online audience (100k friends and growing daily), and have the ambition to cultivate the most loyal quality cinema audience in Belgium and the Netherlands.  

In 2020, with Curzon (UK) and Madman Entertainment (AUS), Cinéart launched the development fund 'Curzon CM'. This fund was created to offer talented filmmakers the opportunity to develop projects, finance and release them. 

Cinéart - Eyes wide open - since 1975

Name: Dazzle Pictures
Description: Dazzle Pictures is a leading VFX studio collaborating with the world’s premier content creators. Our mission is to craft outstanding visual effects for film, TV, advertising, and everything beyond. Our team comprises a melange of multicultural artists and technical wizards, who weave their magic across all stages of the VFX pipeline.

Name: Film Paris Region
Description:
The Paris Region Film Commission supports content producers with their projects in one of the world premier cinématographic and audiovisual media destinations.

We bring our industry expertise and extensive network to provide a privileged access to extensive financing solution, services production companies, exclusive and inspiring locations, experienced service providers, multilingual crews and talents, international VFX and post-production companies.

Name: The Gotham Film & Media Institute
Description:
The Gotham Film & Media Institute is a not-for-profit dedicated to finding, developing and celebrating the people and projects that shape the future of story.

Founded in 1979 as the Independent Filmmaker Project (IFP), The Gotham is the largest and long-running not-for-profit of its kind. The Gotham continues to champion the future of storytelling by connecting artists across various media disciplines with essential resources at all stages of their career and projects’ development. The Gotham fosters a vibrant and sustainable independent creative community, represents a growing network of storytellers around the world, and plays a key role in developing 350 fiction and nonfiction works each year. During its more than 40-year history, The Gotham has supported over 10,000 projects and offered resources to more than 30,000 filmmakers, including Barry Jenkins, Dee Rees, Laura Poitras, Richard Linklater and Ava Duvernay.

The Gotham offers support to creators in varying stages of their project: funding, development, pre-production, production and distribution. We host narrative and documentary labs, Gotham Week’s Project Forum conference, as well as fiscal sponsorship initiatives. Year-round public programming also offers creative insight as well as technological and business guidance, which includes Filmmaker Magazine, Gotham Week, the Gotham Awards, and the Gotham Labs. The Gotham’s latest initiative, Gotham EDU, is a new virtual internship program working in conjunction with leading colleges and universities.

Across all our activities and programming, The Gotham creates exciting and inclusive opportunities for new and established voices from a diverse range of racial, ethnic, religious, ideological, and sexual perspectives.

Name: Alchemy 24
Description: Alchemy24, A Rodeo FX Company,  is a visual effects boutique built around a core group of polygon crafters, pixel alchemists and visual effects architects. WHO WE ARE...

Name: Planet X
Description:

In addition to our VFX work, Planet X is co-founder of ReadySet Studios, a state-of-the-art virtual production facility, allowing it to bridge real-time workflows with traditional post-production.

Name: Festival du court métrage de Clermont-Ferrand
Description:
Le festival du court métrage de Clermont-Ferrand est aujourd'hui la plus importante manifestation cinématographique mondiale consacrée au court métrage. En terme d'audience et de présence professionnelle, c'est le deuxième festival de cinéma en France après Cannes. Il est au cœur de nombreuses activités et missions menées toute l’année depuis La jetée par le collectif Sauve qui peut le court métrage. L’association à but non lucratif loi 1901 emploie 18 permanent·e·s, tou·te·s basé·e·s en Auvergne, où toute une dynamique s’est créée autour de l’image.

L’édition 2024 a enregistré près de 166 000 entrées et accueilli plus de 3 900 professionnel·le·s.

La 47e édition se déroulera du vendredi 31 janvier au samedi 8 février 2025.

At Dø, we believe in the future and technological advances. That is why we invest in R+D, developing our customized tools and specific equipment for our processes.

Name: Clear Angle Studios
Description:
At Clear Angle Studios we offer you the best industry standard for 3D scanning and processing along with a flexible and accommodating global team.

With over 10 years experience in the world of visual effects, we know our stuff when it comes to scanning. And when we say scanning, we mean anything that you may need in a 3D format. This includes the following services:

Cyberscanning through the use of photogrammetry - 16 x 360° mobile, cross-polarized rigs with over 200+ DSLR cameras on each. These rigs offer multiple lighting sequences to provide all reference and look-development data needed.
High resolution head and facial scanning – what we call ‘Dorothy’ - a dedicated high-end capture rig for exceptionally detailed facial capture – one of our latest additions.
LiDAR, environment and aerial capture – through an array of tech we can capture anything from mountain ranges and jungles, to movie sets, vehicles and buildings.
Prop Scanning – through the use of laser based technology as well as photo-scanning.
Full processing of all services – we have a dedicated team and tightly managed in-house pipeline to ensure accurate and timely delivery of all your data.

Our reputation of delivering some of the best quality, high-end data in the industry makes us the recommended choice of many post-production houses.

We are also passionate about keeping our finger on the pulse of what’s new in the tech and equipment spheres - ensuring that what we capture is done so with the best tools available.

We’ve been fortunate enough to deliver projects all over the world and now have registered offices with full teams at the ready in London (UK), Atlanta (US), Vancouver (Canada), Cape Town (South Africa), Budapest (Hungary) and Athens (Greece). We pride ourselves on being adaptable, sympathetic, accurate and affordable. And we love to meet new people – so please do get in touch so we can work alongside you on your next project.
