Name: *Civica Scuola di Cinema Luchino Visconti
Description:
La Civica Scuola di Cinema Luchino Visconti è una delle scuole storiche di Milano e tra le più note in Italia nel settore dell’audiovisivo. Fa parte di Fondazione Milano Scuole Civiche, Ente fondato e sostenuto dal Comune di Milano che opera nel campo dell’Alta Formazione. 
Soddisfa la domanda di formazione artistica e professionale di tutti i principali ruoli autorali e tecnici del settore a livello nazionale e internazionale e al contempo porta avanti la funzione di scuola civica per la quale è nata, offrendo corsi base e di formazione permanente come servizio al territorio e alla comunità nella fascia serale.

La Scuola, che da maggio 2018 rilascia per il corso diurno un Diploma equipollente alla Laurea Triennale in Arte e Tecnologia del Cinema e dell’Audiovisivo (Classe di Laurea L-03), prevede un’attenta preparazione culturale ed un’approfondita attività di ricerca laboratoriale al passo con l’evoluzione del sistema e dei linguaggi. Gli studenti, nel loro percorso, sperimentano differenti media e tipologie di prodotti e si avvalgono della supervisione di tutor eccellenti. Favorisce inoltre, attraverso un programma di placement, l’inserimento nel mercato del lavoro con aziende del settore e realtà produttive nazionali.

A testimonianza dell’importanza formativa assunta negli anni a livello nazionale e internazionale, la Scuola è stata intitolata a Luchino Visconti il 17 marzo 2016. 

È membro attivo del CILECT, l’associazione mondiale delle scuole e università di cinema e televisione, e partecipa e promuove attività che favoriscono la mobilità e lo scambio internazionale e nazionale di docenti e studenti.

La Scuola è diretta da Minnie Ferrara.

Name: Whiskytree | The Whiskytree Southern Corporation
Description:
Whiskytree is a visual effects and content creation company that is equal parts agency & production company, as well as a computer graphics powerhouse.

Our work spans industries and generations, and you are just as likely to find it on the silver screen as you are on television, the internet, in an app, a game, VR or AR, or on the cover of a book.

If you have a creative challenge and want to engage with a world-class team of artists, designers, and technicians, look no further.

Welcome to Whiskytree!


Follow us on Vimeo at https://vimeo.com/whiskytree, on Facebook at facebook.com/whiskytree, and on Twitter at twitter.com/whiskytree.

Name: Shade VFX
Description: Shade Visual Effects is the Industry’s Leading “Supporting Visual Effects” facility.Shade’s bi-coastal offices in Santa Monica and New York City take a boutique approach leveraging proprietary technology, small teams of experts and state based tax incentives to provide the industry’s most seamless and invisible digital effects at competitive pricing. With over six years in business, more than 50 completed projects and 70 employees between our facilities, shade tackles over a thousand shots a year in each location respectively. Shade’s goal is to create seamless, invisible digital effects to support the creative vision behind exceptional storytelling.

Name: Avaloncine
Description:
AVALON es una productora y distribuidora independiente fundada en 1996 por Stefan Schmitz. En 2007, tras años de colaboración, María Zamora y Enrique Costa se convirtieron en socios de la compañía y ahora dirigen los departamentos de producción y distribución respectivamente. 
Hoy en día AVALON posee un catálogo de más de 200 largometrajes y documentales. AVALON estrena en salas entre 10 y 15 películas cada año y tiene su propio sello de DVD. En 2005, AVALON comenzó una colaboración con la FNAC de la que nació lo que ahora es la mejor colección de cine clásico independiente en DVD en España. Filmoteca Fnac contiene más de 100 largometrajes de directores como Cassavetes, Jarmusch, Malle, Herzog, Fellini, Antonioni o Lang.
A parte de su catálogo propio, AVALON distribuye miles de horas de contenido para televisión de catálogos como TELEPOOL, RTL o PARTHENON. Series, miniseries, TV movies, animación o documentales de estos catálogos se muestran en casi todos los canales de televisión en España.
Como productora AVALON ha producido hasta la fecha dos largometrajes españoles: “La vergüenza” de David Planell y “La mujer sin piano” de Javier Rebollo, 17 cortometrajes de reconocidos directores españoles, así como varías coproducciones con países latinoamericanos. 
En estos momentos tiene dos proyectos en producción: “Bunker” dirigida por Andi Baiz, en coproducción con Colombia, y “Mapa” largometraje documental de León Siminiani.

Name: FilmFernsehFonds Bayern
Description:
Since 1996, FilmFernsehFonds Bayern is responsible for film funding in Bavaria. The Free State of Bavaria, the BLM (Bavarian regulatory authority for commercial broadcasting), the public television broadcasters Bayerischer Rundfunk and ZDF, and the private broadcasters RTL and ProSiebenSat1 are all shareholders.
The FFF Bayern has the goal of developing the film funding system, both in terms of quality as well as quantity. Through this funding instrument, the production location of Bavaria can consolidate and further develop its outstanding position. In the FilmFernsehFonds Bayern the film industry has gained a partner who can give them comprehensive advice, monitoring and funding. Applications can be made with the FFF in the following areas:

- Screenplay
- Project development/ Slate Funding
- Movie Production/ International Co-Productions
- Series Production
- TV film Production
- VR film Production
- Webseries Production
- Sales and Distribution
- Up and coming Filmmakers (First Films, Graduation Project Films, Other)
- Film Theaters
- Games/ AR/ VR

For the production funding of films for the cinema and television, the “Bavaria effect” applies, according to which the applicant must spend at least 1.5 times the granted loan amount in Bavaria. In addition, Bavarian Bank Funds (BBF), founded in the year 2000, finances films for cinema in production and distribution.

In addition to its funding activities, the FFF Bayern provides extensive consulting and information for the film and television branches. The Film Commission Bayern supports local and foreign production companies while filming in Bavaria. FFF Bayern rounds its service and information with the industry publication Film News Bayern, a continuously updated website and numerous events, as well as participation at important festivals and staging of Bavarian Film Weeks abroad.

Data Privacy: https://www.fff-bayern.de/footer-navigation/datenschutz.html

Name: ARwall
Description:
Introducing ARFX Home Studio, simple & smart in-camera virtual backdrops
for creators at home. Pre-orders for Wave 1 of ARFX Home Studio will open summer 2020: http://store.arwall.co

ARwall is an AR/XR technology company. We have created a virtual display that requires no headset, no goggles, no smart device. We have 2 patents issued and 4 more pending for our spatial imaging software. Our first product, ARFX, is a film/TV production tool designed as an alternative to green screen VFX, instead using LED/projection screens. For ARFX, we won the SXSW Accelerator Prize for Best AR/VR Technology. Our second product, ARwall Interactive, is revolutionizing retail and LBE with touch-free immersive smart kiosks. For ARwall Interactive, we won the DreamlandXR CES 2020 prize for Best AR Experience.

Name: The Post Lounge
Description: The Post Lounge has been recognised both internationally and in Australia for its exceptional post production capabilities and technical excellence for over 45 years. As an independently-owned, full service post production company with facilities in Brisbane, Melbourne and a stunning flagship studio in Sydney’s Redfern, TPL has the in-depth understanding of film and video editing processes and systems, DI workflows, visual effects, design and sound post production, that is required for even the most complex productions

Name: Freelance Film/Video Editor
Description: Specializing in film and video editing and motion graphics. Films edited have been screened at the Sundance, Tribecca, and Rotterdam Film Festivals, as well as hundreds of others. I also film/shoot and compose music. Please contact me for your next project in any of these capacities.

Name: Le Lab Femmes De Cinéma
Description:
Le Lab Femmes de Cinéma est un lieu unique de réflexion et d’action pour un cinéma plus paritaire et inclusif. 

Le Lab repose sur 3 piliers : 

• Des ateliers en intelligence collective réunissant +500 professionnel·le·s du secteur audiovisuel européen, pour faire émerger des solutions et des actions concrètes.

• Un podcast et des masterclass pour mettre en lumière des femmes de cinéma emblématiques et leur métier, des professionnelles inspirantes, de véritables « role models ».

• Une étude sur l’ensemble des politiques inclusives menées dans le secteur cinématographique à travers l'Europe, actualisée et complétée chaque année. Il s’agit à la fois d’un état des lieux, et d’un recueil de bonnes pratiques.

Name: Cinépolis Brasil
Description: A Cinépolis é uma rede multinacional de cinemas de origem mexicana. Presente no Brasil desde 2010, seu parque exibidor é o segundo maior, com 56 complexos e 410 salas de cinemas, espalhadas em mais de 40 cidades em todas as regiões do país.

Name: Sunny Side of the Doc
Description:
International marketplace for documentary & factual content. The event takes place every year in June in the city of La Rochelle, which is a seaside resort on the West coast of France. 

For 27 years, Sunny Side of the Doc has become a major international marketplace for documentary and specialist factual across all platforms. 

Four days of pitching, debating, learning and successful meetings, all in a large exhibition and conference venue, Espace Encan, on the harbor side of La Rochelle.

Name: Calabaza FILMS
Description:
What do we do? 
We help you with the script to create your messages, we design and organize the preproduction of your videos or movies, we shoot them, we edit them with all kinds of special effects and we deliver them to you in the format you need.

Name: Proxima Milano
Description:
WELCOME TO PROXIMA MILANO,
one of the leading Visual Effects & GenAI studios in Italy.

Founded in 2003 in Milan, a city renowned for craftsmanship and design, we have grown as a creative and VFX lab where artistry meets technology, and where ideas and production boundaries are constantly challenged, pushing beyond imagination.

Our team blends Creative and GenAI Directors, VFX Supervisors, Visual Designers, and hybrid Artists shaping visuals through VFX, CG and GenAI craftsmanship.

With a long-standing practice in crafting high-end visual content, our identity is shaped by a tailor-made approach, driven by precision, curiosity and emotional clarity.
We’ve always put vision before execution, style before trend, meaning before tools.
Ideas first. Always.

Now, with Generative AI expanding the space of creation, our process evolves, not by substitution, but by amplification.
We embrace AI as an expressive tool, one that enhances our intuition and unlocks new forms of authorship.

In this landscape, our role naturally extends,
towards becoming a creative partner for high-end visual content.

This is Proxima Milano.
HUMAN PROPELLED // GenAI ENHANCED

>>>
Proxima Milano assumes no responsibility for the clearance of music, talent likeness, locations, stock assets or any third-party material displayed on this website. All images and videos — including those partially or fully generated with Generative AI — are shown solely to illustrate our post-production, VFX and creative capabilities and must be regarded as demonstrative/promotional examples. Final rights, licences and legal compliance for any commercial use remain the sole responsibility of the commissioning client.

Name: FILM.UA Group
Description:
FILM.UA Group is a creative power house and one of the largest Eastern European media groups, operating in global markets and covering full production cycle: development, production, adaptation and distribution of audiovisual content through the vertical business structure.

FILM.UA Group consists of over 20 companies, providing expertise, equipment and support for content production of any complexity. 

Official YouTube Channel http://goo.gl/64YO6u

Name: Dogzilla Studio
Description:
We love what we do: Telling stories through animation and illustration! 

From a short movie, comic book or children's book, to tv animation series and feature movies, we know what we're doing!


Founded in 2008 by Antonio Eder and Walkir Fernandes, Dogzilla Studio is an animation and illustration studio based in Brazil. For over 13 years, Dogzilla has specialized in 2D animation, bringing one-of-a-kind worlds and characters to life for Film, TV, Advertising, Children's Books, and Comics.

Our mission is to create outstanding and completely unique content for young audiences that truly connects with them. we tell stories that evoke emotions, emotions that impact the way we see the world around us and inspire to a change for better. We developed one of the first Brazilian animated TV series called Duckticks and Catapults that which was broadcasted at Cartoon Network, Latin America. Our animated shorts have won recognition and prestige at several international animation and film festivals including Animamundi, Festival de Cinema de Gramado, Green Nation Fest and Eko Film Festival.

In addition, we co-produced a pilot series for Sesame Workshop’s YouTube Channel called Hip Hop Howls, featuring SNL alums and The Lonely Island’s stars, Jorma Taccone and Akiva Schaffer. As the official studio in charge of the original content for Playkids, we developed and produced some preschool series such as “Junior on the Job”  and "I Love to Learn". We are currently in charge of the art direction of the Netflix animation series The Nutty Boy (O Menino Maluquinho), scheduled to premiere in October 2022.

Name: GERMAN FILMS
Description:
German Films Service + Marketing GmbH is the national information and advisory center for the promotion of German films worldwide and the official external representation for German films appointed by the federal government of Germany. The work of German Films focuses on increasing the level of awareness of German films abroad by providing information services as well as initiating PR and marketing measures in order to grant the highest possible visibility in international media. German Films was established in 1954 under the name Export-Union of German Cinema as the umbrella association for the Association of German Feature Film Producers, the Association of New German Feature Film Producers and the Association of German Film Exporters, and operates today in the legal form of a limited company. In 2004, the company was reorganized and now operates under the name: German Films Service + Marketing GmbH.

German Film’s range of activities includes:
•	Close cooperation with all major international film festivals, e.g. Berlin, Cannes, Venice, San Sebastian, Locarno, Sundance, Karlovy Vary, Toronto, New York, Shanghai
•	Organization of umbrella stands for German sales companies and producers at international television and film markets 
•	Staging of Festivals of German Films in selected international territories
•	Staging of industry screenings in key international territories
•	Providing advice and information for representatives of the international press and buyers from the fields of cinema, home entertainment, and television
•	Providing advice and information for German filmmakers and press on international festivals, conditions of participation, and German films being shown
•	Publication of informational literature and market analyses about current German films and the German film industry
•	Organization of the selection procedure for the German entry for the Oscar for Best International Feature Film
•	Selective financial Distribution Support for foreign releases

Name: PICTURESTART
Description:
PICTURESTART is a media company focused on creating, co-financing, and producing “Discovery of Voice” content for film, television, audio, publishing and digital. 

“Discovery of Voice” is a central theme in our content and storytelling. The phrase is meant to speak not just to youth culture but to a broader sense and purpose of establishing identity and telling stories about people finding themselves, defining themselves, finding their purpose, their truth and coming of age - at any age.

Name: Golaem
Description:
Golaem develops artist-friendly tools to animate digital characters. 

Integrated in Autodesk Maya, Golaem Crowd makes it easy and affordable  to populate worlds with directable digital characters, from a few to thousands. Artists from all over the globe use Golaem Crowd to bring life to commercials, episodic productions,  feature films and games.

Name: Firefly Creative Studio Pvt Ltd
Description:
CG Characters? Check. Environments? Check. FX? Check. 
Creative energy? Cinematic sensibility? Technical ingenuity?
Check, underline and highlight!
Hello! We are a feature-grade creative agency and visual effects production house based in Hyderabad, India. Since 2002, our multiple award-winning work has been the mainstay of all the visual effects-driven blockbusters in Telugu cinema.
We like delivering CGI that blends into the narrative style of your show; pre-visualizing it beforehand to de-risk your investment; and being on shoots to bridge pre & post. Whatever you hire us for, you will find our grounding in digital filmmaking an asset.
Do bring your ideas to us. The more impossible they sound to you, the more we will enjoy pouring life into them!

Name: Kuwait National Cinema Company (KNCC)
Description:
Kuwait National Cinema Company (Cinescape) was founded on October 5th, 1954 since then it has been the sole exhibitor in the country. Cinescape has pioneered the distribution and exhibition ( Arabic, English, and Indian movies) in the Middle East region making it the leading Entertainment provider for 55 years. 

Online Bookings 
As history has witnessed, Cinescape technological evolution never ceased to this day. Our Movie goers are constantly provided with the latest technology in accessing a variety of services. Evident of this, in 2001 Cinescape became the first in the Middle East to introduce online bookings with the option of choosing their desired seats prior to film.

Cinema Technology 

A. Digital Cinema 
Cinescape determination to validate its international standards in cinema technology invested in DIGITAL projectors (D-Cinema.) In 2007 “Taimour and Shafika” became the first Arabic Film to be released in Digital technology at Cinescape theatres. Currently Cinescape owns 12 digital and 3D screens. 

B. IMAX 
The first and only digital IMAX theatre to feature commercial films and documentaries in the region was launched with the opening of Cinescape 360. 

Distribution 
Cinescape plays a major role in distribution of Major Independent films in the Middle East through its associates, Front Row Filmed Entertainment. In 2005, The Kuwait National Cinema Company joined alliance with Front Row Filmed Entertainment distributing major Independent films from studios like New Line Cinema, Paramount Vantage, HanWay Films, Lakeshore Entertainment, Studio Canal, TF1 International, Celluloid Dreams, Peace Arch Films, Wild Bunch, Studio Ghibli, National Lampoon's and many more. Since then, more than 6oo titles have been distributed and some of the biggest movies have been released under the Kuwait National Cinema Company umbrella.

Name: Cinéma du réel - International Documentary Film Festival
Description: International Documentary Film Festival

Name: M Cube Studios
Description:
M CUBE STUDIOS PVT LTD is a TPN+ (Gold Shield) licensed VFX Studio Provides exclusive Visual Effects Services like Comp,Roto, Paint, Cleanup, Camera Tracking, and Rotomation. With over 15+ years of industry expertise, we guarantee the best quality VFX Prep services. Email your project details to mangesh@mcube-studios.com to receive a bid.
High Quality Work
Our mission is to provide facilities of high quality. The works are as special as you, leaving no information unattended, so you can be confident of your brand commitment and focus on what’s important, i.e., taking your business up to the next level.
Cost Effective Rates
Myths can be broken; yes you heard correctly, we are cost-effective! Best competitive costs inside your budget restrain, Beyond any doubt you’ll feel this.

Name: Les Studios de la Victorine
Description:
Since 1919, the Studios de la Victorine have seen the biggest stars film. 

Nestled in a 7-hectare setting between sea and mountains, a stone's throw from the international airport, the Studios de la Victorine have unique assets: an exceptional setting, an ideal location, infrastructure and skills meeting the needs of all productions in the best conditions.

#ICVFX #Camera #Lighting #VFX #MotionControl #BlueScreen #Cyclorama #DIT #Workshops

Name: Gener8 Digital Media Corp
Description:
Gener8 is a stereoscopic 3D conversion company. We are one of the few studios in the world capable of delivering stereo conversion for an entire feature-length film. When we opened our doors, we had a single vision: to make it easy for our clients to convert 2D films to 3D with unmatched levels of quality.
Gener8 is driving the 3D revolution with advanced design, exceptional technology, and intelligent process control. Our system gives clients the flexibility and creative freedom to deliver 3D content faster and more cost-effectively to an exploding consumer market.
Our G83D process is proven with customers such as Sony Pictures, Warner Entertainment, Disney, and Columbia Pictures on numerous high-profile films.

If you're looking for a reliable stereo conversion partner that can deliver the highest quality, Gener8 is your solution. 3D changed the game. Gener8 is changing it again.

Name: SFFILM
Description: Presenter of the San Francisco International Film Festival, SFFILM is a year-round nonprofit organization delivering screenings and events to more than 100,000 film lovers and media education programs to more than 10,000 students and teachers annually. In addition to its public programs, SFFILM supports the careers of hundreds of independent filmmakers from the Bay Area and beyond with grants, residencies, and other creative development services.

Name: ESTUDIOS CHURUBUSCO AZTECA SA
Description: ESTUDIOS CHURUBUSCO AZTECA SA is a motion pictures and film company based in Mexico City.

Name: Cineville
Description:
Cineville is the go-to film club for everyone who loves film. Go to the movies as often as you like with the Cineville card, which can be used in over 70 film theatres and cinemas in 40+ Dutch cities. And discover all there is to see in our online calendar, app, podcast and news letters. 

Cineville NL now has over 90.000 members. The past couple of years, other European countries have joined the club. Film fans in Belgium, Germany and Austria (nonstop Kino) can  also enjoy unlimited film in their favourite theatres. And there’s more to come

Name: Festival de San Sebastián - Donostia Zinemaldia
Description: El Festival Internacional de Cine de San Sebastián, comúnmente llamado de forma más corta como Festival de San Sebastián (en euskera: Donostiako Zinemaldia, en inglés: San Sebastian International Film Festival), es un certamen cinematográfico de la máxima categoría (A) acreditada por la Federación Internacional de Asociaciones de Productores Cinematográficos (FIAPF). Se celebra anualmente a finales del mes de septiembre, en la ciudad vasca de San Sebastián (España). Su primera edición arrancó el 21 de septiembre de 1953.

Name: 1000 Volt Post Production
Description:
1000 Volt, one of the biggest post production and VFX studiobased in İstanbul, start doing business in 2005. It was established to do Post-Production and VFX works on feature films, Tv commercials,TV series. 1000 Volt provides Turkey's most advanced post production and VFX services to lots of local and global brands, film production companies and agencies.

1000 Volt offers Post production services to the largest box office films, TVC’s and TV series with the largest and experienced creative team in Turkey. Its experienced and creative team has been providing a high quality and continuous workflow in both local and international projects for a long time.

Name: THUNDER STUDIOS
Description:
Founded in 2011, THUNDER STUDIOS was conceived as a post-production company offering high-end Visual-Effects services to Films, TV commercials, Corporate Ads and other media platforms. Started with just 2 members, now the company has grown to about 50+. 

Producing award-winning Visual-Effects is the heart and soul of our culture. Using the right technology and bright talent we deliver stunning Visual-Effects. Over the period we also evolved as a go-to resource for few major VFX studios.

Name: Qubit
Description:
En Qubit ofrecemos un catálogo de películas para los amantes del cine de todos los tiempos, cine independiente, de festivales, asiático, europeo y latinoamericano. Las películas son curadas y seleccionadas por nuestro equipo de expertos.  

Estamos disponible en Android, iOS, Smart TV, Chromecast y navegadores de PC y Mac.

Name: EFD International
Description:
Company providing services to the audiovisual industry, founded in 1999 by producer Georgina Terán Gilmore, current CEO and President, has established itself as the largest equipment rental company in Latin America and is among the 10 largest in the world. Based in Mexico City with offices in Colombia, United States, Spain and Germany. It has also provided services in Panama, Peru, Costa Rica, Chile and Ecuador.

Over the years EFD has been expanding the scope of its operations, in order to meet the needs of the different stages of a production and the different segments within the market, with the aim of contributing to the development of the film, television and streaming industry, with cutting-edge technology and the provision of comprehensive services that bring quality to each audiovisual project. Standing out as an inclusive company, with social responsibility and gender perspective.

Name: ZED
Description:
An independent producer and distributor founded by Manuel Catteau almost 30 years ago, ZED is a key player in French documentary production, with a raft of international broadcasters among its clients: France Télévisions, Canal+, ARTE, BBC, National Geographic, Discovery, PBS, ZDF, NHK, SBS or CuriosityStream.

Thanks to a strong team of 8 producers frequently involved in ambitious international co-productions, ZED produces around 40 films a year, covering all genres in non-fiction: history, science, wildlife, investigation, current affairs, art and culture, social issues… Over the years, ZED has built its reputation by crafting high-end and acclaimed films, recognized in the most famous international festivals.

With a catalogue of nearly 4,000 hours, ZED has established itself as a leading sales company, contributing to the worldwide reputation of French documentaries. The company also runs in-house-developed YouTube channels (SLICE), which reach millions of followers and viewers and expand distribution possibilities.
 
Recently, ZED has begun exploring and developing XR content production and distribution, working on innovative immersive projects (such as VR and dome cinema), in collaboration with pioneering partners like SMALL CREATIVE and D&D. We are thrilled to explore this emerging field, expanding viewing experiences and pushing documentary storytelling forward.
 
Nominated 5 times among the 10 best French Producers of the Year, ZED has also won three times the French Export Award, rewarding the most well distributed programs abroad. In 2024, for the sixth consecutive year, ZED was nominated by REALSCREEN as part of the Global 100, the annual snapshot of the best production companies in the non-fiction industry.

Name: sferastudios (now part of Deluxe Entertainment Services)
Description: Sferastudios (“Sfera”) is a cloud-based technology and service firm specialized in enhancing the digital media supply chain. Sfera utilizes a worldwide distributed workforce along with proprietary systems and web-based tools to efficiently deliver specialized media services on demand and in large scale.

Name: Keep Alberta Rolling
Description: Keep Alberta Rolling Ltd. is an Alberta Registered Non-Profit Organization created with the goal of public advocacy for the Alberta screen industry. Our immediate goal is to increase awareness of positive stories relating to the screen industry and portraying its benefits to the general public so that they are supportive of the industry growing & thriving in Alberta. We aim to achieve this support by painting the picture of jobs, economic development, foreign investment & opportunity in digital vignette interviews focused on the individual occupations and businesses that Albertans will identify/connect with.

Name: Lectrosonics
Description:
Lectrosonics is a U.S. company located in the city of Rio Rancho in the heart of New Mexico. With a continued focus on quality and innovation since 1971, Lectrosonics is well respected within the film, broadcast, music, and theater technical communities. We have a strong history of delivering products that satisfy your needs for quality wireless technology with excellent customer support and service.

Lectrosonics wireless microphone systems and audio processing products are used daily in mission-critical applications by audio engineers familiar with the company's dedication to quality, customer service, and innovation.

Name: Les Arcs Film Festival
Description: Les Arcs European Film Festival takes place the week before Christmas in December each year in the ski resort of Les Arcs in Savoie, France. 120 films are screened to the public, the Industry Village host a coproduction market, works in progress and the Talent Village. During the second part of the week, takes place the Sommet Distributeurs Exploitants.

Name: STUDIO TF1 AMERICA
Description: We are one of the most prolific independent distributors of scripted programming for the US and international markets. Our current slate of TV movies includes top-rated Christmas movies, crime thrillers, and romance movies.

Name: FatBelly VFX
Description:
FatBelly VFX lives and breathes the core principles of INTEGRITY, ENRICHMENT, EMPOWERMENT, ENGAGEMENT and RESPECT. 

We’re all about working together to deliver greatness.
We seek out interesting projects, foster strong partnerships, empower our people and give back to the community. That’s how our industry will thrive, that’s what we live by, and that’s how we all create quality content.

We are unapologetically outspoken about the lack of female representation in creative and technical positions in VFX, and we make it a priority to create space and opportunities for women.

Name: Horseman FX India
Description: Horseman FX is a rapidly growing Visual Effects facility founded in 2018 in India and we are a team of 100+ artists utilizing the latest technology to create stunning, realistic and enchanting visual effects. We are a TPN (Trusted Partner Network) & Disney Tier-1 audited VFX facility. We fulfill our client's VFX needs and we constantly push our boundaries of what is possible to bring our clients' vision to life. We offer a variety of services for films, televisions and advertisements such as VFX Rotoscopy, Keying, VFX Paint/Clean-up, Camera tracking / Matchmove, Rotomation, De-aging & 2D Compositing services to our esteemed clients. As the name implies, we "Horseman FX" always run ahead of technology changes. We transform ordinary ideas into extraordinary images and scenes with excellent International quality.

Name: Front Row Filmed Entertainment
Description:
Front Row Filmed Entertainment was launched in March 2003 by Gianluca Chakra, under the aegis of his father Michel Chakra.  

In less than three years, it established itself as a leading independent film distribution company which is now acquiring between 90 to 120 titles a year and boasting a library of 1800 titles. now acquiring over 95 titles a year boasting library of over 1800 titles making it one of the largest in the MENA. 

Over the years the company has released a myriad of blockbusters as well as high end Art-House films, and has developed an internal culture that is inclusive, vibrant, innovative and inspiring. 

In January 2020 Front Row forms Front Row Productions and launches its first local language production “Perfect Strangers” which becomes Netflix’s first Arabic “Original”. 

Front Row Filmed Entertainment’s catalogue is updated regularly also on IMDb:

http://www.imdb.com/company/co0283563/?ref_=fn_al_co_1 or IMDB Pro’s link which will include also titles “in-development” https://pro-labs.imdb.com/company/co0283563/?ref_=sch_int

Name: 13PRODS
Description:
13 Productions est née du rapprochement de deux sociétés de productions 13 production et 13 au sud. Deux sociétés aux profils différents mais complémentaires et compatibles en terme de ligne éditoriale. Fusionnant l’expérience et la modernité, 13 Productions explore et enrichit le cinéma documentaire, tout en assumant sa présence singulière dans le domaine de la fiction.

Questionner le monde, enquêter sur ses rouages, souligner les points de fracture et les lignes d’utopie en partageant la vie d’hommes et de femmes engagés, voilà ce qui dynamise l’enthousiasme de 13 productions.

Name: Arrow Films
Description: Arrow Films is an all rights multi-platform distributor of feature films and TV series. We specialise in releasing some of the best content from around the world to UK customers and beyond. Since 1991, through Arrow’s diverse and rich product mix, one of the most energetic and cutting edge labels in British distribution has been forged. Recent accolades include being named Label of the Year by prestigious publications as the Guardian and Home Cinema Choice and over the years having multiple finalists in Sight and Sound’s best DVDs of the year as well as winning the British Video Association’s Marketing Initiative of the Year. Arrow’s global reputation as one of the finest labels in the world has come about through consistent high quality product and a focus on fan-based products always at its core. This includes a major investment on restoring original material through modern techniques as well as pioneering packaging solutions and newly commissioned artwork for each release.

Name: Location Collective & OMA Studio Group
Description:
Location Collective is a leading, London-based provider of space to the film and TV industry, with extensive experience in bringing together filming and property.

The company's Agency business focuses on sourcing buildings with high film and TV industry usage potential, working alongside the owners of those buildings to open their doors to filming. The Location Collective Agency portfolio provides a wide range of options for both front of camera filming and behind the camera use, including alternative set build space, workshops, ancillary space, production offices, prop and costume stores and exterior set build sites.

The company's Studio business, OMA Studio Group, encompasses 480,000 sq ft of production facilities (including 13 sound stages ranging in size from 41,000 sq ft to 16,500 sq ft) across three film studio sites; OMA One Film Studios, OMA X Film Studios and OMA V Film Studios.

Recent credits include: Wicked, Slow Horses, Silo, Gladiator II, Black Doves, Sweetpea, Joy, The Diplomat, Baby Reindeer, Disclaimer, The Gentlemen, Bridget Jones: Mad About The Boy & Miss Austen.

www.location-collective.co.uk
www.omastudiogroup.com

Name: NL Film
Description:
NL Film is een toonaangevende en creatieve productiemaatschappij, gespecialiseerd in speelfilms en televisiedrama. Sinds de oprichting in 2001 heeft NL Film een veelzijdig portfolio opgebouwd en heeft het bedrijf zich ontwikkeld als expert op het gebied van televisie, film, online en on demand. Door een grote variëteit aan producties af te leveren wordt sterk ingespeeld op de diverse wensen van verschillende doelgroepen die de content op verschillende manieren bekijken.

Het portfolio van televisiedrama reikt van NPO series Penoza, De Zaak Menten en jeugdseries als SpangaS en De regels van Floor tot dramaseries Bluf en Aaf voor commerciële zenders. Ook produceren we content voor YouTube (Vakkenvullers, Bad Influencer) en on demand  (Zwarte Tulp). Dankzij uiteenlopende speelfilms, waaronder Bankier van het Verzet, Tonio, Mannenharten 1&2, Weg van Jou en Penoza: The Final Chapter behoort NL Film tevens tot de meest actieve en spraakmakende Nederlandse filmproducenten van dit moment.

Het in Amsterdam gevestigde productiehuis wordt geleid door Alex Doff en Dennis Cornelisse. NL Film kent het Nederlandse drama- en filmlandschap als geen ander en heeft de beste en meest gepassioneerde makers en jonge talenten in huis.  Het is onze passie om opdrachtgever, project en makers bij elkaar te brengen. Wanneer die mix  klopt, komt daar iets bijzonders uit. Een groot aantal producties is bekroond met een prijs, zoals Bankier van het Verzet (vijf Gouden Kalveren, Oscar inzending 2018) en De Zaak Menten (Gouden Kalf Beste TV-drama, Banff Rockie Award) maar ook onze jeugdprogramma’s zijn veel geroemd. Telefilm Rabarber en serie Kasper en de Kerstengelen ontvingen een International Emmy Kids Award en De regels van Floor wordt naast Nederland ook uitgezonden in Frankrijk, Franssprekende landen in Afrika, België, Denemarken, Duitsland, Oostenrijk en Zwitserland.

Name: Film Distributors' Association Ltd.
Description:
FDA is the trade body that champions the interests of UK film distributors – the companies that launch films in cinemas and promote them to audiences. 

Our mission is to give our member companies and other contacts all the generic support they need to make the most of their individual business opportunities. To fulfil this mission we pursue five work programmes: training & development; safeguarding content; media services; audience development; and policy initiatives. 

Our online hub, launchingfilms.com, includes a comprehensive schedule of UK film release dates, a guide to film distribution and more about FDA and our projects. We welcome any approach where UK film distributors’ generic interests are concerned. 

Please email info@fda.uk.net.

Name: TPO VFX
Description:
TPO VFX is a boutique artist-led visual effects company based in London.

We provide post-vis and polished finals for feature film, working directly in-house for production and overall vfx supervisors.

Founded by Matt Tinsley and Jack Hughes with over 10 years of in-house credits including Quantum of Solace, Prince of Persia, Sherlock Holmes 2, In the Heart of the Sea, Skyfall, Edge of Tomorrow, Paddington, Spectre, Jason Bourne, Mary Poppins Returns, Jurassic World - Fallen Kingdom and No Time To Die.

We provide highly experienced artists whom have a strong history of working fast, efficiently and closely with directors, producers, editors, and vfx supervisors to deliver the work to the cutting room on time and under budget.

Name: Drone by Nature
Description:
Drone By Nature is the first marketplace built exclusively for drone pilots and aerial content creators. We put creative control back in your hands, so you can sell your footage, set your own prices, and keep 70% of your earnings.

Whether you fly drones for business, film, travel, or passion, we give you the tools to turn your skies into income.

 Upload & sell your drone footage online
 Start with 3GB free storage for stock footage
 Flexible upgrades at just US$0.05 per GB/month
 You control your pricing & licensing terms

We’re building a global community of pilots who value ownership, fair pay, and creative freedom. If you know a drone pilot, invite them to join!

 Built for drone pilots. Powered by creators. Ready to fly.

 Sign up & start earning: www.dronebynature.com

Name: Oblique FX
Description:
Oblique offre une gamme de services diversifiés. Notre équipe d'artistes expérimentés excelle dans la création d'effets visuels photo-réalistes. Chaque projet, petit ou grand, est toujours abordé avec le même standard de professionnalisme. Nous nous donnons comme mission de surpasser vos attentes en vous livrant des images de grande qualité, à temps et à l’intérieur de votre budget. Nous excellons dans les services suivants: l’animation 3D, la composition d’image et la supervision de plateau.
-----------
Oblique offers a wide variety of digital visual effects services. Our experienced team of artists excels at creating photoreal visual effects that integrate seamlessly into live action plates and environments. Every project, big or small, is always tackled with the same professionalism. Our mission is to surpass your expectations every time by delivering you stunning image quality, on time and within your budget. We offer top quality 3D animation, compositing and on-set supervision.

Name: Wiedemann & Berg Film
Description:
Die Wiedemann & Berg Film wurde 2003 von Quirin Berg und Max Wiedemann gegründet, gefolgt von der Gründung der W&B Television 2010. Beide Firmen sind seit Januar 2020 Teil von LEONINE.
Zu den über 120 Produktionen zählen der Oscar-prämierte Kinofilm „Das Leben der Anderen“, der zweifach Oscar-nominierte „Werk ohne Autor“ sowie zahlreiche Nummer-1-Hits wie „Männerherzen“, „Who am I“, „Vaterfreuden“ oder „Willkommen bei den Hartmanns“ sowie eine Vielzahl an Fernsehprojekten wie die Kultserie „4 Blocks“ (TNT Serie), „Der Pass“ (Sky) oder das erste deutsche Netflix Original „Dark“, das von der führenden US-Bewertungsplattform „Rotten Tomatoes“ zur beliebtesten Netflix Original Serie der Welt gewählt wurde. 
Pioniergeist, die Bandbreite von großem Kino, linearem Fernsehen und High-End-Drama für Streaming-Partner, kontinuierlich große Besucher- und Zuschauerzahlen, der Focus auf Qualität, die Zusammenarbeit mit herausragenden Kreativen und ein großartiges Team haben Wiedemann & Berg zu einem der erfolgreichsten Produktionshäuser in Deutschland gemacht – nominiert und ausgezeichnet u.a. mit Bambi, Bayerischer Fernsehpreis, Bayerischer Filmpreis, Deutscher Fernsehpreis, Deutscher Filmpreis, Goldene Kamera, Goldene Nymphe, Grimme-Preis, GQ Award, Europäischer Filmpreis, Hollywood Reporter Award, LA Critics Award, Magnolia Award, Rockie Award, Academy Award, BAFTA, César, Romy und Golden Globe.

Name: DOK Leipzig
Description:
We connect people to outstanding documentaries, animated films and XR works for an entire week every autumn. Next up: 26 Oct – 1 Nov 2026.

DOK Leipzig is the oldest festival for documentary and animation film in the world and unique in offering this combination. It is guided by the values of diversity, human dignity, inclusion and peace. The festival presents about 200 artistically outstanding, socially relevant films, XR experiences and provides space for dialogue and debate. 

The extended reality exhibition DOK Neuland enriches the film programme with a range of immersive works. Each year this creates a world where visitors can experience profound stories in unexpected virtual spaces.

Our film branch networking programme DOK Industry is tailor-made for accredited trade visitors (filmmakers, XR creatives, producers, editors, decision makers and distributors). The platform welcomes some 1,900 guests every year and offers them a meeting place in an environment conducive to productivity.

Submission info www.dok-leipzig.de/en/calls-entries
Impressum: www.dok-leipzig.de/en/legal-notice-disclaimer

Name: Jugaad Motion Pictures
Description:
Jugaad, in theory, is a media and production company.  But that description doesn’t do justice to what it’s grown to become. Jugaad is a home for creatives, a battlefield.

At the Jugaad HQ, we have a Lab of Emotions. Where we cry, laugh, shout to explore every side of our sentiments in order to create the most touching, relatable, powerful films for our clients and audiences. 
 
We work with creatives, brands, studios, musicians, agencies and if we’re being completely honest, anyone who’s dying to tell the story.

We create films, web series, documentaries, music, videos, ads, reels and talk shows. If you think about it- everything with a beating, tender, humane emotional core. 

We’re 8 years old
(so yes, we’re in our rebellious tween stage).

Name: Studio Babelsberg AG
Description:
Studio Babelsberg ist mit der Gründung im Jahr 1912 das älteste Großatelier-Filmstudio der Welt und die Wiege des deutschen Films. Mit umfassenden Services für deutsche und internationale Filmemacher zählt Studio Babelsberg heute zu den führenden Standorten für die Herstellung von Kinofilmen, TV-Serien und Werbeproduktionen in Europa.

Seit 2022 ist Studio Babelsberg Teil von Cinespace Studios, einer erstklassigen globalen Plattform von Produktionseinrichtungen mit Hauptsitz in Chicago, die Content-Produzenten und Kreative unterstützt. 

Studio Babelsberg sieht sich als professioneller Produktionspartner, Produktionsdienstleister und One-Stop-Shop für deutsche und internationale Filmemacher. Mit einem einzigartigen Angebot in Deutschland deckt das Studio alle Phasen und Bereiche der Filmproduktion an einem Standort ab und engagiert sich bei vielen Projekten zunehmend als (Ko-)Produzent sowie als Filmfinanzierer.

21 hochmoderne Ateliers und Studios, diverse Backlots und Außenkulissen auf über 173.000 m² und attraktive Drehorte auf kurzen Wegen vor den Toren Berlins mit all seinen Angeboten und Verbindungen bieten optimale Bedingungen. Die international erfahrenen Crews von Studio Babelsberg Motion Pictures, die Requisiteure von Europas größtem Requisitenfundus und die erstklassigen Kulissenbauer und Produktionsdesigner des Art Departments zählen zu den besten der Welt.

Name: Anica Academy
Description:
Anica Academy ETS è una fondazione senza scopo di lucro che offre formazione di base e alta specializzazione per cinema e media audiovisivi. Dal grande schermo alle nuove piattaforme interattive, proponiamo un percorso formativo completo a cura dei più grandi esperti dell’intrattenimento mondiale.

Siamo nati a ottobre 2020 per rispondere alla crescente richiesta del mercato di figure competenti e specializzate. Abbiamo una grande ambizione: dare a questa industria una nuova visione, ampia, contemporanea e consapevole.

I nostri corsi si rivolgono ai professionisti che vogliono aggiornare le proprie competenze e ai giovani di talento che puntano a intraprendere una carriera nell’industria dell’audiovisivo.

Crediamo nei talenti e vogliamo valorizzarli.

Name: ROOM 4 / QU4RTO STUDIO
Description:
ROOM 4 is the new Los Angeles-based studio from the award-winning Brazilian production company, Qu4rto Studio.

Our philosophy is simple: Cinematic Storytelling. We believe commercials deserve the same artistry as films, and films deserve the same strategic precision as commercials.

For over 14 years, Qu4rto Studio has been a creative force in Brazil, building campaigns for global brands like Nike and Coca-Cola, and producing internationally acclaimed films. Our author-driven work has been showcased at the Marché du Film (Cannes) and awarded at top genre festivals like Fantasia and Fantaspoa.

Now, Room 4 brings this unique blend of commercial expertise and cinematic vision to the US market. Led by our founders, Evandro Caixeta and João Gilberto Lara, our LA operation serves as a creative bridge for brands and agencies seeking a global, sophisticated, and author-driven approach to production.

Name: Lonelyleap
Description:
The best stories aren’t created, they’re discovered.
Lonelyleap is a collaborative, transatlantic team of strategists, directors, cinematographers, designers and producers.

Our films are based on human truths. They communicate at a deep level: stimulating intelligence, feeding curiosity and inspiring action.

Clients include: BBC, Uber, Channel 4, Google, Bentley, CNBC, Intel, Kew Gardens, KPMG, Levis, Rio Tinto, Save the Children, Alcatel-Lucent, Nokia.

Name: Production House Media
Description: Production House Media is a full service audio post production company located in Seattle, WA. With a broad range of services, we cater to the growing demand for superior quality audio for numerous industries including advertising, television, film and internet media.

We have thousands of talented and experienced models in every major US market. Our scouts are always on the look out for new talent. Our projects range from video commercials, print, hair shows, trades hows and everything in between.

Description:
ONSIGHT is a pioneering facilities company for film and television.  With over 30 years' experience, our award-winning team of creatives and technical people is renowned for 4K, HD, 3D, and VR services.  We help design, execute and ultimately, deliver stunning content for any screen.

Our objective is to develop a long-lasting relationship by providing comprehensive services to support the production team. We offer an attentive and personal service with a flexible approach, which will fit both the creative and financial objectives of you and your team. Utilising our committed team of specialist technical and creative staff we can provide exceptional support in using groundbreaking technology and extend our commitment and accountability for the digital delivery of any project.

Name: Luv Films LLP
Description:
LUV RANJAN & ANKUR GARG founded LUV FILMS in 2012 with a vision to tell relatable stories in the Indian Cinema. 

The company produces and distributes commercial as well as feature films. Within a short span of time the production house established itself as one of the prominent production houses in the Indian film industry while giving blockbusters like Tu Jhoothi Main Makkaar (starring Ranbir Kapoor and Shraddha Kapoor), Sonu Ki Titu Ki Sweety (starring Kartin Aryan, Nushrratt Bharuccha, Sunny Singh), Malang- Unleash The Madness (starring Anil Kapoor, Aditya Roy Kapur, Disha Patni), De De Pyaar De (starring Ajay Devgan, Tabu, Rakul Preet Singh). Chhalaang was Luv Film’s first OTT collaboration with Amazon Prime Video. The production house has also produced two critically acclaimed films like Kuttey and Vadh.

Description: A national nonprofit media arts organization, American Documentary (AmDoc) strives to make essential documentaries accessible as a catalyst for public discourse. We collaborate with passionate filmmakers to amplify their voices, and to nurture the nonfiction community.

Name: Jarowskij
Description:
In 1986 Swedens oldest production company Jarowskij was born. From the very beginning our productions all have sprung from a strong passion for what we do.
Our passion for storytelling unites and engages people – regardless of topic or platform.

In 30 years time that very passion have established us as one of Swedens most successful production companies with over 2000 hours of produced content for customers as The public broadcaster SVT, Volvo, NBC, H&M, TV4, Channel 5, Vitamin Well, TV3, Vattenfall and Viaplay.

Our work has not only resulted in happy customers – it has also won us an Emmy and several national awards for work well done and out of the ordinary.

Today Jarowskij produces over 100 hours of moving images a year in genres as:
Feature film, drama, current affairs, reality, entertainment and comedy.

We are a part of Zodiak Media. Zodiak Media is the leading independent in entertainment, factual, drama and kids, with over 45 local brands operating in 15 countries.

Name: LUX VFX
Description:
LUX VFX: Crafting Visual Stories, One Frame at a Time.

Since 2005, LUX VFX has been a reliable studio dedicated to bringing the extraordinary to life, mastering traditional visual effects while seamlessly blending them with cutting-edge innovation. Whether it's the subtle artistry of cosmetic fixes, the delicate transformation of aging or de-aging, or the complex craft of face replacement, our proprietary technology, Maskerade, sets new standards in digital artistry—all while offering significant cost savings.

LUX VFX is rooted in the timeless craft of traditional VFX, but we're not just about keeping up. We're about leading the charge, evolving visual storytelling with a human touch. Let's push the boundaries of possibility, together.

Name: True Film Production
Description:
True Film Production is a world-class full-service creative video content studio, with a focus on marketing and branding for corporate clients across various industries, both domestic and international. 

True Film Production offers a wide range of services from creative conception, scripting, production, and post-production. Producing high-caliber video content including branded promotional content, live event coverage, sizzle reels, corporate style interviews, live streams, FB Live, and product videos.

With extensive marketing and branding expertise, we've been helping brands like Colgate, UPS, Nestle, Pfizer, Wilson, HILTI, Harper's BAZAAR,  NYRA, and PerkinElmer produce video content that elevates brand initiatives and increases ROI.     

http://truefilmproduction.com/

Name: CUBICA
Description:
Cúbica, digital film post-production and advertising company, was founded with the idea of creating an independent group within the field of visual effects.
Created in 2004 by Ruben Algarra, Cesc  Biénzobas  and Joan Amer achieved in a few years working on projects as important as "Mortadelo y Filemón, misión salvar la tierra" (goya award for best visual effects 2009) or "rec2" (gaudí best visual effects awards 2009) as well as other films like "Transsiberian", "Paintball" ... and countless advertising spots and television shows as "Pelotas" (tve1) or "Los Algos" through motion graphics for television channels as "canal hollywood".

Both in our offices in Madrid and Barcelona we have professionals with 30 years of experience and young people with fresh ideas involved in each project with the idea of advising and responding to the needs of our customers.

Name: Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales INCAA
Description:
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales.
INCAA ARGENTINA
El Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales (INCAA) es un ente público del ámbito del Ministerio de Cultura de la Nación que, de acuerdo a las disposiciones de la Ley de Cine y otras normativas vigentes, tiene a su cargo el fomento, la promoción, la difusión y la regulación de la actividad cinematográfica en todo el territorio de Argentina y en el exterior, en cuanto a lo que se refiere a la cinematografía nacional.
El primer Instituto de cine, antecesor del actual INCAA, fue el Instituto Nacional de Cinematografía (INC), creado en 1968 por la Ley de Cine, modificada posteriormente por la
Ley Nacional 17.741 (y sus Decretos reglamentarios). Su Presidencia está actualmente a cargo de Nicolás Batlle, docente y productor cinematográfico.

Name: Nu Boyana Portugal
Description:
Nu Boyana Portugal is a production company part of the historic group Nu Boyana Films, with expertise in shooting support and vfx services. 

With a proven record of VFX projects such as The Protege, The Hitman's Wife Bodyguard, Jolt, Rambo V - Last Blood or Hellboy, our goal is to create synergies by promoting unique landscapes and post-production under the same roof.

As part of Nu Boyana Film Studios, we were able to help you scouting and shooting in Portugal, as well as in other countries thanks to our partners.

Description: Hook Up Animation is one of the most prestigious Animation and Visual Effects Studios of Latin America. Located in Buenos Aires, Argentina, with a long international career, offers traditional animation , 2D digital, 3D and visual effects services and original content since 2001. Hook Up has developed a lot of animated pieces ranging from TV series to feature films, commercials, series pilots, interstitials, IDs and spots. Its clients are Cartoon Network, Disney, Fox, MTV, Nat Geo, Universal Channel, among others.

Name: Milwaukee Film
Description: Milwaukee Film is a nonprofit arts organization dedicated to entertaining, educating, and engaging our community through cinematic experiences, with a vision to make Milwaukee a center for film culture. Milwaukee Film operates the magnificent Oriental Theatre, a historic cinema palace committed to high-quality and accessible film and education programming.

Name: Memesys Studios
Description: Memesys Culture Lab is a cinema and new media studio at the intersection of science, philosophy, and culture. The studio will actively participate in cinema, literature, pedagogy, technology, art, scientific and philosophical research, and actions of significant social impact.

Name: Santa Barbara International Film Festival
Description:
SBIFF is a 501(c)(3) non-profit arts and education organization dedicated to making a positive impact utilizing the power of film. SBIFF is a year-round organization that is best known for its main film festival that takes place each year in February. Over the past 39 years the Santa Barbara International Film Festival has become one of the leading film festivals in the United States – attracting 100,000 attendees and offering 11days of 200+ films, tributes and symposiums. We bring the best of independent and international cinema to Santa Barbara, and we continue to expand our year-round operation to include a wide range of educational programming, fulfilling our mission to engage, enrich and inspire our community through film.

In June 2016, SBIFF entered a new era with the acquisition of the historic and beloved Riviera Theatre. The theatre is SBIFF’s new home and is the catalyst for our program expansion. This marks the first time that Santa Barbara has had a 24/7 community center focused on the art of film and is an incredible opportunity to expand our mission of educational outreach. Particularly important to SBIFF is making available high quality learning opportunities for underserved and vulnerable populations. Our programs and reach are more robust than ever before.

Name: Daydreamer
Description:
Daydreamer is an award winning creative studio with a wealth of talent and industry experience.

Our team provide high-end VFX and creative craftsmanship. We offer a boutique approach, providing the right talent to meet each project's requirements, and ensuring each one receives the love and attention it deserves from concept through to delivery.

We are passionate artists, creative collaborators and dreamers at heart.

Name: and action | animation studio
Description:
We're a team of storytelling wizards with our in-house video production and animation studio. 

For over nine years, we've been whipping up the most eye-catching, awe-inspiring content you've ever seen. And we're fearless in working with the big dogs - we've teamed up with UNDP, TedEd, and 7Eleven to bring their visions to life. 

We know that visuals are everything, and we're here to ensure your story is told in the most engaging way possible.

Name: Park Circus Group Limited
Description:
Established in 2003, Park Circus is a global film distributor with offices in Glasgow, London, Los Angeles and Paris and sales presence in Australia, Germany and Japan.

We are proud to bring you over 25,000 back catalogue titles from libraries of the biggest Hollywood and British film studios as well as independent rights holders. We also distribute a growing number of contemporary films on behalf of studio and independent partners.

We help make amazing things happen in over 100 countries around the world each year. From single screen community cinemas to international multiplex chains, from rooftops to pop-ups and for festivals big and small, we license retrospectives, reissues, restorations, one-off repertory screenings, special events and cinematic celebrations. We have an ever increasing number of classics available on DCP and look after an extensive library of 35mm and 70mm prints.

Park Circus also provides worldwide television, home media, digital and ancillary sales for thousands of classic and new films. We work with DVD and Blu-ray publishers worldwide, as well as making a number of independent collections available for all-rights sales.

We love adventurous programmers, dedicated cinephiles, festival directors who delve into the forgotten corners of the catalogue, people obsessed with the history of movies and film fans of every kind. But, most of all, we love the movies.

Name: Wonderland Film Marketing & Creative
Description: Wonderland is a film advertising agency based in London and Berlin. Since 2006, we’ve been creating award-winning campaigns across AV, Print, Digital and Social Media for the Hollywood majors and Independents worldwide. To find out more visit our website - madeinwonderland.com

Name: Bankside Films
Description:
Based in London, Bankside is a leading international sales and film finance company for independent films.  Founded in 2007 by Phil Hunt, Hilary Davis, Stephen Kelliher, Greg Cruttwell and Compton Ross, the company offers a bespoke sales and executive producer service to production companies, representing between eight and ten films a year.  Bankside’s principals have built up strong relationships with international distributors and offer a consistent approach to the market with a wide range of genres and budgets.  Since its inception, Bankside cash-flows pre-sales, tax credits and finances gap using its knowledge and extensive relationships with international financiers and distributors.
 
Based in London, Bankside is a leading international sales and film finance company for 8-10 independent films per year.  The company offers a bespoke sales and executive producer service to production companies.

Name: CineLenses
Description:
CineLenses is the largest database of Cinema Lenses in the World.
CineLenses is much more than a Web Platform or a mobile Application, is the Cinema Lens Ecosystem. Never before, something so simple could encompass so much information and make shooting life easier.

CineLenses, like the filming, never rests, somewhere in the world there is always a filming. For that reason, more than 28.000 users have already downloaded our mobile application, which they can enjoy at any time, even with airplane mode activated and from anywhere in the world.

The Magic of Cinema is in CineLenses...

Data and technical specifications of more than 3.300 lenses
All the necessary information to buy or rent a set of lenses anywhere in the world
You can make lists of lenses and send them via Mail or WhatsApp
You can also benefit from ...

CineLenses Forum where all our users can express their opinions, doubts, queries, comments or work links
Our Credits section, where you can see and include which lens or lenses have been used in the more than 400 movies that we have registered

Do you want to be part of the CineLenses ecosystem?  Follow us on our social media! More than 150.000 users are already enjoying our community; manufacturers, distributors, rental houses ...

Name: Kartemquin Films
Description:
Sparking democracy through documentary since 1966, Kartemquin is a collaborative community that empowers documentary makers who create stories that foster a more engaged and just society.

Kartemquin's films have received four Academy Award nominations, and won six Emmys and three Peabody Awards, among several more major prizes. In 2019, Kartemquin was recognized with an Institutional Peabody Award for "its commitment to unflinching documentary filmmaking and telling an American history rooted in social justice and the stories of the marginalized." Recognized as a leading advocate for independent public media, Kartemquin has helped hundreds of artists via its filmmaker development programs and championing of documentary.

Kartemquin is a 501(c)3 not-for-profit organization based in Chicago.

Name: 1091 Pictures
Description: 1091 Pictures is a modern distribution partner for independent film and series owners based in New York and Los Angeles, offering content licensing and delivery to over 100 destinations in over 100 countries. The company represents over 500 filmmakers and distributors and has amassed over 150 award nominations, including two Academy Award nominations, an Emmy nomination and over a dozen Spirit Awards nominations. Leading the way in digital distribution, 1091 Pictures helps its clients navigate the streaming landscape, providing marketing resources and valuable insights through partnering with its parent company's new technology platform in development, Streamwise. 1091 Pictures’ diverse slate of releases include recent NYT Critic’s Picks such as The Ghost of Peter Sellers and Linda Ronstadt: The Sound of My Voice, riveting sports stories such as A Kid From Coney Island executive produced by Kevin Durant and featuring Stephon Marbury and Red Bull’s The Dawn Wall, groundbreaking documentaries such as Unacknowledged and Close Encounters of The Fifth Kind, which reveal the latest intelligence on UFOs, and indie film hits such as Academy Award Winner Taika Waititi’s Hunt for the Wilderpeople, Spirit Awards-winner Christine, and the knockout comedy The Overnight starring Adam Scott, Taylor Schilling and Jason Schwartzman.

Name: Film Development Council of the Philippines
Description:
The Film Development Council of the Philippines (FDCP) is the National Film Agency responsible for film policies and programs to ensure the economic, cultural, and educational development of the Philippine film industry. It aims to encourage the production of quality films and to conduct film-related events that enhance the skills of the Filipino talents. 

The Agency also leads the film industry’s participation in domestic and foreign film markets, and local and international film festivals, and is tasked to preserve and protect films as part of the country’s national cultural heritage.

Name: 3.0 STUDIO
Description:
Based in Angoulême, 3.0 Studio is an animation studio dedicated to short, feature films, TV films and various artists creations.
Specialized in high standard 2D it offers all services related to animation from graphic creation or development to full line production, image and sound included, as well as any specific animation work.

Name: CinemaCon
Description:
CinemaCon is the largest and most important gathering of movie theater owners from around the world.

From exclusive Hollywood product presentations debuting a slate of upcoming films, to must-see premiere feature screenings, to the biggest stars, producers and directors, CinemaCon jumpstarts the excitement and buzz that surrounds the summer season at the box office.

The CinemaCon schedule is broad, diverse, educational, fun, and features the largest cinema trade show in the world. It appeals to and attracts all facets of the international motion picture theater industry—exhibition, distribution, marketing, publicity and advertising, internet and social media and of course, the theater equipment and concessions manufacturers and dealers who showcase the latest technological advances and innovative concession offerings at the trade show, which is run in association with our partners at NAC and ICTA. The CinemaCon schedule is also packed with sponsored events; seminars; a trade show; screenings; product presentations; a gala award show honoring the very best in the movie industry; and a special day of programming geared toward the international marketplace.

CinemaCon is delighted to call Caesars Palace its home. As one of Las Vegas leading resort hotel destinations, the upscale surroundings of Caesars Palace will offer CinemaCon delegates the very best with a beautiful new conference center; the finest hotel accommodations; world-class restaurants; and a magnificent state-of-the-art theater, The Colosseum, which accommodates all CinemaCon delegates.

When it comes to Celebrating the Moviegoing Experience, it all starts at CinemaCon, the official convention of Cinema United.

Name: Fantástica Filmes
Description:
Como contar a história de quem conta todo dia histórias diferentes?

Fantástica é a produtora de filmes e VFX que há 20 anos combina conteúdo cinematográfico e linguagem criativa subversiva em peças audiovisuais. Com estética impactante e processos sem cerimônias, virou referência com o já clássico comercial Ponêis Malditos (Nissan Motors) e tantos outros roteiros imprevisíveis. 
A produtora de espírito rock n' roll e ideias alucinógenas foi fundada no inconformismo jovem e na rebeldia de criar mensagens além do single comercial. 

Tanto tempo depois os tempos já são outros, e são exatamente os tempos que sempre quisemos. Então sejam todos bem-vindos à segunda era Fantástica. Uma era que contrapõe o melhor do que existe em nós: inspiração desformatada e teimosia criativa. 
Estamos sempre na busca pela sétima arte em porções concentradas de entretenimento.
Seguimos sem cerimônias, mas comprometidos com os momentos de descobertas, surpresas e experimentações. E seguimos os mesmos, só mais convictos e mais subversivos que antes.

Name: Silvercup Studios
Description:
3 NYC locations - Sound Stages - Equipment Rental - Production Offices - Location Lighting

Since opening the first studio in what was the former flour silo of the landmark Silvercup Bakery in 1983 Silvercup Studios quickly established itself as the largest, independent, full-service film and television production facility in northeastern United States.

Located at 42-22 22nd Street in Long Island City the main lot comprises of a total of 13 shooting stages with both roof and loft space available. The stages range in size from 3,000 to 18,000 sq ft with grid heights up to 36’. East Lot which is located at 34-02 Starr Avenue, Long Island City holds five 16,000 sq ft studios and one 9,400 sq ft studio with grid heights of 28'. Established in the Summer of 2016 the newest lot Silvercup North located at 295 Locust avenue in the South Bronx holds 4 stages which range from 8,800 sq ft to 17,500 sq ft with the highest grid heights of all three lots at 50’. 

All facilities offer on-site production office space with extensive set, prop and wardrobe storage. Both main and east lots are conveniently located minutes away from Midtown Manhattan near the Queens Midtown Tunnel and the Queensboro 59th Street Bridge.  In addition to providing production facilities, Silvercup Studios has a fully-equipped on-site lighting and grip department as well as a lumber yard with paint, hardware and other set-building supplies available to clients. Silvercup Studios affiliated location lighting company Silvertrucks also provides a full complement of lighting/grip equipment and generators.

Name: Delta Kappa Alpha
Description:
Established March 16, 1936, Delta Kappa Alpha (ΔKA) is a National Professional Cinema Society for cinematic arts students of character. The purpose and mission of Delta Kappa Alpha is to foster lifelong character, collaborative and creative storytelling, ethical and productive business practices, philanthropic action, and bonds by and between students of the cinematic arts.  Our Professional Cinema Society is grounded in timeless personal values and principles, and as an organization, we challenge our members to set the standard in the field of cinematic arts, their communities, and their campuses by being cinematic artists of excellent character.  DKA welcomes those who are dedicated to professional development, lifelong fellowship, and personal growth.

Name: Imovision
Description:
A Imovison, distribuidora presente no Brasil há mais de21 anos, a Imovision vem se consolidando como uma das maiores incentivadoras do melhor cinema. A empresa trabalha com produções independentes nacionais e internacionais, que alcançaram consagração no Brasil e no exterior. Os filmes da Imovision são amplamente reconhecidos no mercado pelo público e pela crítica, recebendo premiações nos mais prestigiados festivais de cinema: Veneza, Cannes, Berlim, Moscou, San Sebastián, Toronto etc. Introduziu no país o celebrado Cinema Iraniano, diversas obras do Movimento Dogma 95 e do premiado cineasta e ator japonês Takeshi Kitano; À partir de 2003 passou também a levar às telas grandes filmes do cinema brasileiro.

Imovison, a distributor in Brazil for over 21 years, is consolidating itself as one of the biggest boosters of the best cinema. The company works with independent national and international productions, which reached consecration in Brazil and abroad. The films of Imovision are widely recognized in the market by audiences and critics, receiving awards in the most prestigious film festivals: Venice, Cannes, Berlin, Moscow, San Sebastian, Toronto etc. Introduced in the country the celebrated the Iranian Cinema, various works of Dogma 95 movement and the award-winning filmmaker and actor Takeshi Kitano Japan, and since 2003 it has also lead to big screen movies of Brazilian cinema.

Onirikal Studio is a high-end VFX & 3D Animation company based in Barcelona (Spain). Also digital VFX compositor of “INTERSTELLAR” (Christopher Nolan), Best Visual Effects OSCAR Award Winner Film, and others VFX Hollywood blockbusters as “HERCULES: THRACIAN WARS” (Brett Ratner). 

Onirikal Studio has worked with production companies and others post production facilities around the world: UK, Canada, United States, France, Russia, China, Colombia, Italy, Belgium, etc… on more than 30 feature films, about 25 shortfilms, TV series, TV movies, music clips, TV advertising, etc… always delivering in time and budget. 

We have worked with important companies like Free Scott (Ridley Scoot), Molinare (London), FOX International (Los Angeles), Filmax Entertainment, Mediaset (Telecinco), Atresmedia (Antena 3), Apaches, Arcadia, Participant Media, Dynamo, Nestle, Fontvella, Lidl, Skrillex, F.C. Name: Muse Entertainment Enterprises
Description:
Founded in 1998 by Michael Prupas, Muse Entertainment is an EmmyAward winning production company. Muse is an internationally known producer of scripted and unscripted series and movies whose storytelling and high-quality production values have won broad audience recognition and critical acclaim. Muse’s vast network of clients and suppliers have helped it become one of the most prolific independent production houses in North America. 

Muse most recently wrapped on the Australian mystery drama The Family Next Door (The ABC) starring Teresa Palmer, based off the novel by bestselling author Sally Hepworth. Muse produced the Emmy-winning kids and family series Best Foot Forward (AppleTV+). The company is known for its police procedurals Coroner (CW), The Murders (CityTV) andthe crime thrillers Bellevue (CBC) and Durham County (Crave). It produced Being Human (SyFy), the high-end drama Bomb Girls (Global), and historical mini-series The Kennedys(Reelz) and Tut(Paramount+). 

For features, Muse is known for producing popular romantic comedies including Hot Frosty (Netflix), Single All the Way(Netflix) and A Tourist’s Guide to Love (Netflix). It produced the internationally selling movie mystery franchise Aurora Teagarden(Hallmark), as well as widely celebrated movieslike Cyberbully (Disney+), Good Sam(Netflix) and Christmas Jars. In its wheelhouse are the true-crime thrillers Swindler Seduction and Amish Affair (Lifetime). 

Unscripted original projects include Gangland Chronicles (History), The Unsolved Murder of Beverly Lynn Smith (Amazon),For Heaven’s Sake(Paramount+), The Real Hunt for Red October (Reelz) and the “provocative and controversial” investigative film: JFK: The Smoking Gun(Reelz).   

Headquartered in Montreal, Quebec, Muse Entertainment has development and production operations in Toronto, Vancouver and Los Angeles. Visit:www.muse.ca

Name: Haddock Films
Description:
Compañía argentina de producción y realización cinematográfica y audiovisual, ganadora del Óscar a la Mejor Película Extranjera en 2010 con el  film “El secreto de sus ojos”.
Desde el año 2006 y con la dirección de Vanessa Ragone, desarrollamos y producimos contenidos audiovisuales de alto impacto local e internacional.
Largometrajes de ficción, documentales, series de televisión, contenidos web y transmedia,  y contenidos para plataformas de streaming. Contato: info@haddockfilms.com

Name: Denver Film
Description:
Denver Film's mission is to develop opportunities for diverse audiences to discover film through creative, thought-provoking experiences. The cinema's potential to transform as well as reflect society in all its diversity is what the Denver Film aims to recognize and realize. Since 1978, DFS has worked to promote the medium as both an art form and a civic forum, developing a program that includes year-round screenings, community outreach projects and renowned special events.

Denver Film's permanent home, the Sie FilmCenter, opened in November 2010 and has helped expand our original programming and community partnerships. In addition to screening more than 600 titles annually, Denver Film hosts an array of programs and events to connect and educate filmgoers-including Film on the Rocks, the Denver Film Festival, the Young Filmmaker Workshop, mini-festivals such as Cinema Q and J'adore: Focus on French Cinema, and partnership programming throughout the year.

Name: Manhattan Edit Workshop
Description:
Manhattan Edit Workshop offers a full range of courses, from the Avid, Blackmagic, Autodesk, Assimilate and Apple products to the complete suite of Adobe applications.

Our signature Six-Week Intensive is a jump-start for anyone looking for a career in editing. Learn Avid, Premiere Pro, and After Effects, work with top editors, and create a professional reel to let your talent speak for itself.

Weekend and one-week classes introduce and solidify the core concepts, while our custom one-on-ones let you set your goals at your own pace.

Corporate and group training customizes a curriculum, either in-house or on-site, for professionals eager to learn a new skill or to build on an existing one.

Our instructors are working editors, web designers, sound engineers and designers, cinematographers, producers, directors, colorists, motion graphics artists, as well as certified Avid, Apple, Autodesk, Assimilate and Adobe trainers. A maximum teacher to student ratio of 1:6* ensures individualized attention and allows students to work at their own pace.

All classes are split between lecture and hands-on exercise-so you'll be cutting on your own edit system from day one.

* Teacher to student ratio does not apply to some of our specialty workshops
