Name: STUDIOCANAL Germany
Description:
STUDIOCANAL, das firmeneigene Studio von Canal+, ist das führende Studio für Filme und Serien in Europa mit weltweiten Produktions- und Vertriebskanälen und tätig in neun europäischen Märkten – Benelux, Dänemark, Deutschland, Frankreich, Irland, Österreich, Polen, Spanien und UK – sowie in Australien und Neuseeland mit Büros in den USA und China.

STUDIOCANAL finanziert, produziert und vertreibt 200 Filme pro Jahr und besitzt mit über 9.400 Titeln aus über 60 Ländern und 100 Jahren Filmgeschichte einen der größten Filmkataloge Europas. In den letzten sieben Jahren hat das Unternehmen fast 25 Millionen Euro in die 4K-Restaurierung von etwa 1.000 Filmklassikern investiert.

STUDIOCANAL produziert zudem jedes Jahr über 15 Serien – einschließlich lokaler Produktionen sowie internationaler Koproduktionen – und vertreibt seine Produktionen und CANAL+ Originals weltweit (insgesamt 2.000 Stunden aktuelle Serien- und Kataloginhalte). Alle Projekte werden direkt von STUDIOCANAL oder über das weltweite Produktionsnetzwerk in Europa und den USA umgesetzt, unter anderem 2e Bureau, Flab, Kissman, Pernel, Upside und Grands Ducs Films in Frankreich; Birdie Pictures, Urban Myth Films, Strong Film & Television, Sunny March TV und Brock Media in UK; Bambú Producciones und Te Espero en Marte in Spanien; Lailaps Films und STUDIOCANAL Series in Deutschland; Opus TV in Polen; Sam Productions in Dänemark; Dingie in Belgien und The Picture Company in den USA.

Providing creative conceptual designs and pre-visualization at initial stage, supportive On Set directors in the production. While our R&D team creating effective pipeline and technical solutions for the talented artists over bio simulations , fluid mechanics , dynamics effects and compositions. Our works has been awarded and nominated Best Visual Effect in HK Film Awards and T.W Golden Horse Awards . 

The company is now located both in Beijing and Chengdu. Attracting a number of world class supervisors, experts and artists. Targeting to reach a scale of thousands of employees within the next five years. We are always looking for new talent who is passionate on creating superb visual effects for their career.




MORE VFX 成立于2007 年，是目前中国人自己的体量最大的视觉特效公司。公司以制作世界级的视觉特效为使命，一直以来，无论是在技术开发、视觉创作、制片流程，还是在视觉特效公司管理流程等方面，均引领着中国视觉特效的发展方向。 

信誉和品质是MORE VFX 坚守的核心，由公司主导或参与制作的影片曾多次获得香港金像奖、台湾金马奖最佳视觉效果提名及获奖；多年来，公司与国内众多顶级电影出品公司、制作公司、制片人及知名导演保持着良好稳定的合作关系。为客户提供高效优质的概念设计、动态预演、生物角色动画、流体及动力学特效等领域的制作服务。
 
公司现有北京、成都两个制作基地，聚集了大量国际级的视效总监、技术专家和艺术家，为制作高质量的视觉特效作品提供了最坚实的基础。“一往无前的唯一力量就是热爱你所做的一切”是MORE VFX 的企业宗旨，在视觉特效这条艰苦的道路上，我们还将不断前行！

Name: Scarab Digital
Description:
Scarab Digital is a pioneer in digital production. With over 25 years of expertise, we seamlessly merge technological innovation with the ever-evolving dynamics of film and TV production. 

With each project, we aim to be more than just a digital production service provider. We envision ourselves as partners in the storytelling process, adding layers of depth and detail that would make narratives resonate deeply with audiences. Over the years, the Scarab team has been a part of countless tales, ensuring every scene on screen perfectly mirrored the director's vision.

Our legacy isn’t just built on our state-of-the-art tools or cutting-edge techniques, but on an understanding of the industry's heartbeat. We've seen its evolution, anticipated its needs, and crafted solutions that placed us ahead of the curve. From dynamic motion graphics to virtual production suites, our offerings cater to the nuanced demands of modern cinematic experiences.

What truly sets us apart is our commitment to our clients. We're not just fulfilling a brief; we're co-authors in a story, working to ensure every frame, every effect, and every digital touchpoint adds value.

Name: LaserFilm

ABOUT US

Passion, dedication, quality, and competitiveness are the criteria that have driven Laser S. Film in the cinema market and have made the company a solid point of reference for national and international majors since 2001.

“Ours is a dynamic and expanding company”, says Managing Director Andrea Di Nardo, “that keeps its finger on the pulse of new technologies in order to provide our clients with the best audio and video post-production services. We’re the only European facility with two screening rooms with Meyer Sound EXP Dolby Atmos sound systems and 4K and 3D projectors.”

Creativity, precision, and promptness are the characteristics that define Laser Film, multi-award winning professionals with proven experience worldwide. The perfect mix between technology and know-how make Laser Film the place where your television and cinema projects can become unparalleled, top-notch creations.

So sit back and enjoy the show!


CHI SIAMO

Passione, dedizione, qualità del servizio e competitività sono i criteri che dal 2001 guidano la Laser S. Film nel mercato cinematografico e che fanno dell’azienda un solido punto di riferimento per le più grandi Major nazionali e internazionali.

“Siamo un’azienda dinamica e in espansione” dice il Managing Director Andrea Di Nardo “curiosi e attenti alle nuove tecnologie che ci aiutano a fornire ai nostri clienti i migliori servizi di post-produzione audio e video. Unici in Europa ad avere 2 sale con impianto Meyer Sound Exp Dolby Atmos e proiettori 4K 3D”.

Creatività, precisione e velocità di esecuzione sono le caratteristiche di chi la Laser Film la vive quotidianamente, professionisti pluripremiati con comprovata esperienza a livello internazionale. Il perfetto “mix” tra tecnologia e know how fanno della Laser Film il mezzo per rendere unico e speciale il Vostro prodotto televisivo e cinematografico.

Non ci resta che augurarvi buona visione.

Name: Dulac Cinémas
Description:
DULAC CINÉMAS
La société Dulac Cinémas (Ex-Les Ecrans de Paris) représente un circuit de cinq cinémas indépendants de 13 écrans et 2300 fauteuils sur Paris : l'Arlequin, le Reflet Médicis, l'Escurial Panorama, le Majestic Bastille et le Majestic Passy. Les quatre  premières  salles sont classées Art et Essai et proposent des films d'auteurs, le tout dans des salles de grand confort et bénéficiant d’une prestation technique performante ainsi que d'un personnel de cinéphiles pouvant apporter leurs connaissances du cinéma au public. Le  Majestic Passy, seul cinéma du 16ème arrondissement, propose une programmation plus élargie mais tout aussi exigeante dans ses choix. L'objectif de Dulac Cinémas est de diffuser et de faire découvrir une cinématographie pour tous.

 

NOS MÉTIERS, NOS VALEURS
À travers son réseau qui regroupe 5 salles parisiennes historiques: l’Arlequin (1934), le Reflet Médicis (1957), L’Escurial (1911), le Majestic Passy (1930) et le Majestic Bastille (1933), DULAC CINÉMAS propose aux spectateurs une programmation de qualité et joue un rôle clé pour l’intégration culturelle dans le tissu urbain parisien. Salles de quartiers par excellence, le réseau joue un rôle primordial sur le territoire dans la création de liens sociaux et dans l’accès à la culture.

Le réseau est construit autour de 3 mots clés :

- Exigeant

- Singulier

- Chaleureux

 

Notre vision du réseau

En 2001, Sophie Dulac a pris la direction du réseau de salles parisiennes Dulac Cinémas (ex-Les Ecrans de Paris) avec pour volonté de diffuser des films d’auteurs et des films d’Art et d’Essai, appuyée par l’aide efficace de toute son équipe, tant au siège social que dans les salles de cinéma. Elle a développé, soutenu et participé à un ensemble de manifestations culturelles autour du cinéma. Certaines de ces manifestations sont récurrentes comme les nombreuses rétrospectives pour faire découvrir ou redécouvrir au public des chefs-d’œuvre de l’Histoire du Cinéma, les différents festivals

Name: Cinema Akil
Description:
Cinema Akil is the Gulf’s first and only independent cinema platform that brings quality films from across the world to the audiences in the Gulf. 

Showcasing directors and filmmakers across decades, Cinema Akil aims to create awareness and interest in film and the cinematic arts while amplifying the exposure of international films to a regional audience. 

Launched in Dubai in 2014 as a nomadic cinema, Cinema Akil has held over 75 pop-up cinemas attracting over 85,000 attendees in Dubai, Abu Dhabi and Sharjah.     In 2022, Cinema Akil held its first-ever regional pop-up in Doha during the World Cup followed by a popup in Al Ula, Kingdom of Saudi Arabia in 2023. 

In September 2018, Cinema Akil opened its first permanent location in Al Quoz, Dubai making its flagship home the GCC’s first arthouse cinema which has been brought to you  Launched in 2014 as a nomadic cinema, Cinema Akil has held over 75 pop-up cinemas attracting over 85,000 attendees in Dubai, Abu Dhabi and Sharjah  In 2022, Cinema Akil also held its first-ever regional pop-up in Doha during the World Cup followed by a popup in Al Ula, Kingdom of Saudi Arabia in 2023. In September 2018, Cinema Akil opened its first permanent location in Al Quoz, Dubai making its flagship home the GCC’s first arthouse cinema which has been brought to you in partnership with Alserkal. In November 2023, Cinema Akil in 25hours Hotel Dubai opened its purpose-built space as a seasonal outdoor outpost acting as a public cinema and multipurpose venue in Dubai One Central.

The independent cinema has grown to launch the UAE’s first-ever Arab Cinema Week in 2022 to celebrate Arab Cinema and has also hosted global film festivals to bring innovative cinematic artworks from the lands of Hong Kong and Italy here in the GCC region. Cinema Akil is a member of the Network of Arab Alternative Screens (NAAS) which includes members from the MENA region such as Metropolis in Beirut, Zawya in Cairo and Cinematheque du Tangier in Morocco.

Una plataforma que nuclea servicios y talentos de todas las áreas de la producción al integrar, de forma temporal o permanente, empresas, técnicos y artistas con el fin de impulsar y potenciar el desarrollo de la industria.

En Reducto se podrá encontrar una solución integral, con estándares internacionales, para la realización de proyectos de cine, publicidad, videoclips, televisión y las más diversas ideas de contenido audiovisual que se puedan proyectar.

Reducto se propone incidir en la formación y actualización de los profesionales y técnicos de nuestro país, generando sinergias con el medio y las instituciones educativas con el fin de potenciar la creación de contenidos con perfil exportador.

Name: XTR

With a focus on audience appeal and a commitment to artistry, the award-winning studio uses a data-driven strategy to inform all phases of the filmmaking process. Since its inception in 2019, XTR has produced and financed over 80 documentary features and series including the highly-anticipated Magic Johnson docuseries for Apple TV+; Emmy and Peabody award-winning 76 Days; Tribeca’s Best Documentary Feature Ascension; and Butterfly in the Sky, based on the iconic 80’s TV series, Reading Rainbow. In 2021, XTR films have received more awards nominations than any other studio working in nonfiction. XTR’s award-winning executive team is also behind DOCUMENTARY+, the preeminent global streaming platform for documentary films and series, available in nearly all American households and almost every country globally. XTR - based on a true story.

Dal muto al digitale senza soluzione di continuità e sotto un’unica bandiera: quella dell’indipendenza.

Name: Phosphene
Description: Phosphene is an independent design and visual effects house led by founders/co-owners John Bair and Vivian Connolly. Bair and Connolly, who have collaborated on projects since 2005, both love the process of delving into a project during pre-production and helping the director bring his/her vision to life.

Name: SWISS
Description:
SWISS is an award-winning VFX studio based in Stockholm. Founded in 2002 Swiss quickly became one of the leading suppliers of VFX in Scandinavia, as well as for international campaigns. 

We provide a full range of services including concept design, on-set 
supervision, compositing, CG effects, animation, color grading and online.

We offer our solutions for both commercials, film, and tv.

Name: The Post Bangkok Co., Ltd.
Description: Founded in 2000, The Post Bangkok has become one of Asia's top post production houses. Over the years, we have earned reputation and trust from the industry's professionals worldwide. We have maintained our predominant position at the very leading edge of the industry by continuously expanding, investing in the latest post production technologies, and top-notch talents from all over the world.

Name: FlixOlé
Description:
FlixOlé es una primera plataforma de vídeo bajo demanda con un catálogo de cerca de 4.500 películas, sobre todo, de cine español, aunque también contamos con películas europeas y americanas. 

Comedia, drama, musical, terror… en FlixOlé tienen cabida todos los géneros cinematográficos existentes. Y todas nuestras películas están en HD!

Pero sobre todo, lo que más nos enorgullece es contar en nuestro catálogo tanto con películas que han hecho historia en nuestras salas de cine como con aquellas joyas que pasaron desapercibidas. En definitiva FlixOlé pretende ser una herramienta para la visibilización y conservación del patrimonio cinematográfico español. Por ello, en FlixOlé encontrarás todo un siglo de historia de nuestro cine, restaurado y digitalizado para que puedas disfrutarlo desde la comodidad de tu casa o desde donde estés. Y es que además de página web, disponemos de aplicaciones en Android, iOS y televisores Samsung. También somos compatibles con Chromecast y Apple TV.

Queremos que todo el mundo disfrute de todo el cine español dónde y cuándo quiera, por un precio asequible.

Bienvenido a  FlixOlé! Gracias por confiar en nosotros

Name: Todd-AO
Description:
Todd-AO is a leading provider of creative post production sound services for the film and television industries, operating from three state-of-the-art facilities located in Hollywood, Burbank and Santa Monica. 

Todd-AO is a division of Todd-Soundelux..

Name: AKITA FILM
Description:
We produce tv commercials - documentaries - corporate films and more
We always find solutions to your needing
Any image in motion is our job

Name: Silverspot Cinema
Description:
Silverspot Cinema is a customer-centric company specializing in sophisticated cinemas offering an enhanced, hassle-free entertainment experience in a boutique environment. In addition to traditional Hollywood fare, Silverspot offers independent films, award-winning foreign films and a cultural arts program featuring operas, ballets, live theatre, and concerts.  
We offer an enhanced entertainment experience with superior staff to make your visit perfect. Delight yourself before, during, and after the projection with our chef inspired TRILOGY menu of freshly made foods. And to top it all off, you can choose from an assortment of craft beers, signature cocktails and wines to pair with your movie.

Name: ACID
Description: Organization of filmmakers which supports the distribution of independent films in movie theatres.

Name: visualnoobs
Description:
We believe VFX can be made for fun, too.

Not everyone wants to make a living from it or work on Hollywood productions — many people just enjoy it as a hobby.

But when you’re doing it alone, it’s easy to get lost: you don’t know where to start, how to approach the effects, or how to achieve a cinematic look… and you end up abandoning your projects halfway through.

That’s why we created a space where you can build VFX with guidance, grow as an artist, and enjoy the process alongside other creators.

Name: BIGPIC Studios
Description:
BIGPIC Studios is a dynamic and creative film production company specializing in the full spectrum of visual media and storytelling. With expertise in movie making, BIGPIC Studios produces a diverse range of content, including short films, feature films, and commercial photography. The studio is dedicated to delivering high-quality cinematic experiences, from concept development to post-production.


In addition to film production, BIGPIC Studios offers professional services in movie promotions, poster design, and business advertising, helping brands and filmmakers alike amplify their reach. Whether crafting compelling advertisements, creating promotional materials, or developing visually stunning films, BIGPIC Studios is a go-to destination for innovative, impactful media production.

Name: Sastreria Cornejo, S.A
Description:
Sastrería Cornejo; Fundada en 1920 por Humberto Cornejo es en la actualidad una de las casas de alquiler de vestuario más importantes del mundo, manteniendo el carácter familiar que ha tenido desde sus inicios.
 
Desde su fundación los más importantes figurinistas y diseñadores de vestuario españoles y extranjeros han acudido a Cornejo para alquilar y confeccionar trajes para sus producciones.
 
En el edificio principal de 3.000 m2 se encuentran oficinas y talleres de confección donde se cuidan los detalles del proceso creativo del traje, desde la toma de medidas y elección de telas hasta los últimos adornos y retoques.
 
Cornejo cuenta además con 8 almacenes donde guarda su vestuario y calzado. A este almacén se van añadiendo constantemente nuevas prendas que permiten aumentar la cantidad y calidad de nuestro extenso stock.
 
A lo largo de su dilatada trayectoria Cornejo ha participado en varias películas galardonadas con premios al mejor vestuario, premios Oscar, Goya, Cesar y Bafta

Name: International Ocean Film Foundation
Description: Launched in 2004, the International Ocean Film Foundation the is a year-round ocean conservation non-profit organization that uses the power of film to educate, entertain and engage audiences about the importance of our oceans. The annual film festival is the leading, annual Bay Area Ocean destination event, and the largest ocean centric global film festival in the world. Now celebrating its 22nd Anniversary on April 11-13, 2025, the three-day film festival features more than 40 independent films from around the world, visiting filmmakers, special guests, panel discussions and opportunities for patrons to engage with Ocean Hero Community Partners. The film festival ‘s mission of education engages the next generation of ocean leaders by offering a Free Student Education Program and an International Student Film Competition for middle school and high school students around the world. In addition, the IOFF has a robust Traveling Program that hosts special screenings throughout the year and around the world.  At IOFF, we are united by a passion to protect our oceans, and we believe that the power of film is one of the best ways to bring people together and create change.

Name: FOCAL International
Description:
The Federation of Commercial Audiovisual Libraries International is a professional not-for-profit trade association formed in 1985. It is fully established as one of the leading voices in the industry, with a membership of over 300 international companies and individuals.
Its purpose is to facilitate the use of library footage, images, stills and audio in all forms of media production; promote its members - libraries selling content plus those whose serve the industry; provide a platform for members to promote themselves and their interests; encourage good practise in the research, licensing, copyright clearance and use of footage; support, promote and educate on the need to preserve and restore footage and content; act as an information resource for the footage and content industry; offer training in key skills and in the broader appreciation of the footage and content industry.

Name: Pixel Magic
Description:
Pixel Magic offers a wide range of services for the motion picture and television industries.    Key personnel include Visual Effects Supervisor Ray McIntyre Jr and General Manager Ray Scalice.  

RAY MCINTYRE Jr. is a Visual Effects Society (VES) award winning Supervisor that brings 20+ years of experience in the film industry and oversees all creative operations at Pixel Magic.

Ray has frequently served as the primary Visual Effects Supervisor for feature film productions. In that capacity, he provides on-set supervision, plate/element photography as well as 2nd / VFX unit direction.

Ray has been recognized for his achievements as Visual Effects Supervisor. Recently, Ray shared a 2004 Visual Effects Society Award in Outstanding Supporting Visual Effects for his role in Warner Bros. “THE LAST SAMURAI”. He also earned an Emmy nomination in 1996 for HBO’s acclaimed “TUSKEEGE AIRMEN” and won an International Monitor Award in 1998 for his work in “CASPER MEETS WENDY”.

Ray Scalice, Vice President and General Manager for Pixel Magic, has over 20 years of experience in the entertainment industry. He previously served as VP & General Manager for Pacific Title Digital Studios where he oversaw all aspects of business and production operations. From 1990 to 1995, Ray Scalice was in charge of Walt Disney’s film restoration and visual effects division. Prior to Disney, he held increasingly responsible business and management positions during his 10 year association with Lucas Film and Industrial Light & Magic.

Ray is an active founding member of the Visual Effects Society. In 1986, he earned an MBA degree from Golden Gate University in San Francisco, CA.

Name: Grain Media
Description:
Two time Academy Award, BAFTA, Emmy, and Peabody winning film production company co-founded by film director Orlando von Einsiedel. We make films, broadcast television and commercials.

Grain is not defined by the type of film we make, but by the way we approach storytelling and the kinds of stories we tell. We focus on inspiring narratives of humble heroism from around the world following extraordinary characters whose intimate stories speak to macro issues. A cinematic vision and unprecedented access underpins much of our work, as does rigorous journalism and relationships of trust with the protagonists on the screen.

Since our inception in 2006, Grain has gone on to win over 100 international film, television and advertising awards across multiple genres including two Academy Awards, a BAFTA, an EMMY, a Peabody, a Grierson, IDA Awards, a BIFA and a duPont-Columbia Award for outstanding journalism.

Recent films include EVELYN, winner of the 2018 British Independent Film Award (BIFA) for Best Documentary, Academy Award winning THE WHITE HELMETS for Netflix, EMMY-winning and Academy Award nominated VIRUNGA, BIFA nominated SEAHORSE for BBC Storyville, EMMY nominated LOST AND FOUND for National Geographic Documentary Films and The Nobel Prize and Academy Award and BAFTA winning observational documentary LEARNING TO SKATEBOARD IN A WARZONE (IF YOU’RE A GIRL) for A+E Networks.

TV projects include International EMMY nominated documentary INDIA’S FORBIDDEN LOVE for Witness, TIGERS: HUNTING THE TRAFFICKERS for BBC TWO, acclaimed and award-winning factual series THE CURE and EARTHRISE for Al Jazeera English.

Recent brand focused campaigns and commercials include; MOON SHOT from executive producer JJ Abrams and Google, TV and cinema commercial DO THEIR BUSINESS for WaterAid, global TV commercial WE ARE FIRE for Al Jazeera English and projects for clients such as the United Nations, UNHCR, Nike, New Balance, Samsung, Sony, Diesel and Amnesty International.

Name: MindsEye
Description:
MindsEye is an award-winning multi-discipline production company based in London, with creative and production excellence at our heart. We produce commercials, music videos and short films, and have a fast-growing Film & TV development arm. We are dedicated to high-end visual storytelling, creating unique, entertaining and beautifully-crafted films for many of the world’s largest brands. Our advertising work for the likes of Google, Facebook, Sky, McDonald’s and Audi has been recognised at the British Arrows, Cannes Lions and D&AD. In 2023 we received Gold and Silver British arrows for our work.

We take pride in being the best possible home for comedy and performance directing talent and for being synonymous with original, surprising, unique and beautifully crafted films.

What started as two brothers, Hughie and Charlie Phillips, and surrogate brother Max Yeoman, huddled around a desk, has grown into a full production team of like-minded and creative individuals, and a roster of directors who are experts in cinematic visual storytelling. We are boutique, but heavyweight, with a true passion for filmmaking.

Name: Bazley Films
Description: Richard Bazley is an Emmy Nominated Director and Ex Disney Animator Directing both Live Action and Animation.

Name: Narratologia │ Escola de Roteiro
Description: Escola de Roteiro Audiovisual focada em transformar nossos alunos em profissionais capacitados e habilitados para desenvolver filmes e séries para um mercado cada vez mais exigente e técnico.

Name: Digital Film Academy
Description:
Digital Film Academy, also known in the industry as DFA, is a school with locations in New York City and Atlanta, Georgia, that specializes in Digital Filmmaking and Media education. 

By offering hands-on filmmaking instructions taught by experienced industry professionals in a progressive, challenging and supportive small class environment, with unlimited lab time and a Membership to the facility upon graduation, DFA provides the students with the creative learning environment needed to become a truly experienced filmmaker.

Name: Creamsource
Description:
From the very beginning we set our sights on designing gear that not only solved film and television industry problems, but also advanced the cause. In other words, gear that could do more and be better than what already existed.

That was back in 2004, and today nothing has changed.

We continue to pioneer new solutions for the industry and our rapid design and build capabilities, coupled with exacting quality standards, have brought us into contact with some of the most progressive companies in the content production world.

Our product range includes:
SpaceX
Sky
Micro Colour
Micro
Mini+
Doppio

Name: Lifestyle Production Group
Description: Lifestyle Production Group is one of the world's leading real estate production companies dedicated to serving the high end luxury market. As a company, we have been chasing the cutting edge of videography in the real estate market for a decade.

Name: AUDI'ART DUB
Description:
AUDI'ART DUB, AUDI'ART SOUND and AUDI'ART LAB are subisidiary companies of GROUPE AUDITIORIUM ARTISTIQUE
Our services : Dubbing & automated dialogue replacement, Sound & Video Post-production facilities, sub-titling for cinema, TV fiction, animation, documentaries & advertising. Contact us via http://fr.linkedin.com/pub/satchi-van-neyenhoff/10/b/47a/

Mission
Located in the heart of Paris, our team’s professionalism is expressed not only through our technical skills and commitment to excellence, but also, and equally important, in terms of human relationship skills. This is what sets us apart as a flexible, responsive and efficient team. All of our expertise in this domain and our technological equipment technology infrastructures are at the service of our clients.

Description
Providing services to cinema, TV fiction, animation, documentaries and advertising, our professional activities focus on three areas:
- AUDI'ART DUB for dubbing and automated dialogue replacement
- AUDI'ART SOUND : sound design, sound editing, traditional sound effects, recording, sound mixing and audio restoration.
- AUDI'ART LAB for video post-production, sub-titling, and mutlimedia services.

Name: Directors Guild of Canada - National
Description: The Directors Guild of Canada - a labour organization representing over 7,000 key creative & logistical personnel in the screen-based industry.

Name: ALIA-Alianza de la Industria Audiovisual
Description:
Asociación de empresas técnicas y de servicios del sector audiovisual. 
A iniciativa de numerosas y prestigiosas empresas (relacionadas con los sectores de platós, iluminación, sonido, cámaras, dit, dailies, etalonaje, E-Motion, postproducción de sonido y VFX, salas de mezclas, subtitulado, almacenamiento archivos, autorías, restauración, distribución de deliveries, quality control, etc), ALIA pretende dar respuesta a la demanda del sector audiovisual de contar con un interlocutor válido que interprete, exponga y defienda la realidad de una de las industrias nacionales ejemplo de inversión, desarrollo e innovación empresarial.
ALIA nace así como asociación sin ánimo de lucro cuyo objetivo fundamental reside en la representación objetiva y leal de los intereses del sector industrial audiovisual ante instituciones y entidades tanto públicas como privadas, en el contexto de incertidumbre que afecta a la industria audiovisual, y en un periodo en el que creadores, productores, distribuidores y público reivindican el papel del audiovisual como motor de transmisión de la comunicación, la cultura y el entretenimiento.
Location: Pozuelo de Alarcón, Comunidad de Madrid

Name: IMAGE FACTORY Maroc
Description:
Image Factory réalise tous types de projets en production et en post-production.
Que ce soit en 4K, 8K, HD ou UHD, en 35 mm ou en animation 3D, nous impliquons nos clients et nos partenaires dans toutes les étapes du processus de production.
Pour chaque projet, quelle que soit sa taille ou sa destination, nous mettons tout en œuvre pour obtenir un résultat et un rendu parfaits, car chez Image Factory, seule la satisfaction de nos clients compte et peut nous permettre d’apprécier le sentiment du devoir accompli.
Image Factory est également une plateforme donnant sur tous les nouveaux territoires médiatiques à explorer.
De ce fait, Image Factory est un outil de production ouvert à tous les artistes, acteurs, réalisateurs, scénaristes ou concepteurs, ainsi qu’à tous les techniciens, journalistes, reporters, chefs-opérateurs, ingénieurs du sons, monteurs, graphistes, web designers, etc.
Publicité : 
Pour chaque projet publicitaire, Image Factory est présent à chaque étape du processus de production, de la réalisation à la diffusion, en passant par le traitement de l’image et du son.
Ainsi, Image Factory identifie vos besoins et traduit vos idées en images tout en respectant vos messages et en contribuant à les rendre encore plus percutants.
Image Factory travaille en étroite collaboration avec les plus grandes agences de publicité et de communication, au Maroc et à l’étranger, toujours réactif et très attentif à leurs demandes et à celles de leurs clients.

Name: Grupo Globo Media
Description:
Grupo Globomedia es uno de los mayores grupos de la industria audiovisual en España y América  Latina. Su actividad se centra en el diseño, producción, explotación y distribución de productos audiovisuales. En la actualidad es líder de la producción independiente de  programas de TV, con más de una treintena de espacios que se emiten en cadenas españolas, europeas y americanas. 

Es un grupo constituido en 1997 a partir de un número de compañías especializadas, que desde principios de la década operaban en el sector de la comunicación audiovisual y el entretenimiento. Sus orígenes se remontan a 1993, con la creación de la productora Globomedia. Desde 2006 forma parte, junto a Mediapro, de Imagina Media Audiovisual. 

Grupo Globomedia agrupa a la productora Globomedia, la consultora audiovisual GECA, el sello discográfico Globomedia Música, la productora Hostoil, Promofilm, marca con la que opera en el mercado americano, con oficinas en Argentina, Venezuela y Estados Unidos, y la productora de publicidad Estudios Hackenbush. Entre las compañías participadas se encuentran la agencia de publicidad televisiva Supernovelty, la oficina de representación Isac y la consultora de deportes televisados Geca Sport.

En el ámbito de los contenidos, Grupo Globomedia ocupa una posición de liderazgo en la creación de series de ficción de periodicidad semanal (“El internado”, “Aída”) y de programas de humor basados en la actualidad (“Sé lo que hicisteis”, “El intermedio”). 

Las series de Grupo Globomedia han traspasado fronteras y han llegado a más de 50 países. El talento de sus creativos y su capacidad de producción han hecho que sus contenidos sean ya los preferidos de más de cien millones de espectadores de Europa y América. Producciones como “Los Serrano” o “Un paso adelante” han ocupado con éxito en los últimos años el “prime time” de cadenas de Italia, Francia, Portugal, los países del Este y los nórdicos.

Name: CINEMA FOR CHANGE
Description:
Le Festival Cinema for Change, c’est une semaine de cinéma au printemps, au cœur de Paris. Une projection, un débat… douze long-métrages documentaires et fictions, et une quinzaine de court-métrages en compétition. Une semaine, finalement, de rencontres et de partages, le tout animé par une aspiration : éveiller les consciences par la force de l’émotion, grâce au cinéma !

L’origine du festival est le film « 8 », long-métrage constitué de 8 séquences réalisées par 8 grands réalisateurs internationaux : Jane Campion, Wim Wenders, Gus Van Sant, Gael Garcia Bernal, Abderrahmane Sissako, Mira Nair, Gaspar Noé et Jan Kounen.  Chacun traite d’un Objectif du Millénaire pour le Développement (OMD).

La campagne des OMD fut initiée par Kofi Annan aux Nations Unies en septembre 2000.

Suite à la diffusion du film sur internet le 5 février 2010, plus de 2 500 000 vues ont été enregistrées en moins de deux mois. Au vu de l’impact obtenu, nous avions décidé de poursuivre l’aventure en créant le festival Le Temps Presse.  Les réalisateurs de « 8 » sont devenus jurys et ont invité le public à leur donner le vision du monde.
En sont ressortis un concept, celui de passer le témoin, représenté par le trophée du Festival.

Aujourd'hui c’est autour de la campagne des Objectifs de Développement durable (ODD) de l’ONU que le festival s’articule. 17 Objectifs ont été adoptés par les états membres de l’ONU dans le but d’ « éradiquer la pauvreté, protéger la planète et garantir la prospérité pour tous ».
Nos objectifs : Sensibiliser un large public et notamment les jeunes, dont les enfants, co les étudiants, aux ODD.
-Mettre en valeur de jeunes réalisateurs engagés dans un cinéma ayant une portée citoyenne et un engagement social, environnemental et humain.
Depuis 2011, Le Festival, renommé Cinema for Change en 2021, s’inscrit dans une démarche engagée pour un cinéma citoyen. 

Plus de 60 000 élèves ont participé aux Prix Jeunesse du Festival en tant que Jury, depuis sa création !

Name: CELOFAN - Production Company
Description:
Hey there! We are CELOFAN. We craft films and sophisticated audiovisual content with an impeccable execution.

We connect brands with their target audiences by a dynamic storytelling specially designed for every advertiser and based on a smart-cost production format.

Let’s make art together! Do you want us to tell your story? Contact us and join our rides.

Name: Elite Edge Productions
Description:
At Elite Edge Productions, we conceive and create visually stunning content that exceeds expectations for the most iconic brands across the country.

We have been honored with 34 Emmy awards and 7 Telly awards for video editing, motion graphics, and commercial spot campaigns; and in 2017, 2018, 2019 we were recognized with a Golden Matrix Award for Best Show Open in all of sports.

Name: The Traveling Palate
Description: The Traveling Palate is the new YouTube Channel that provides viewers with short, informative content that encompasses the exciting realms of food and travel. From tantalizing culinary adventures to breathtaking destinations, this platform aims to captivate audiences with its engaging and educational videos. Whether you're a food enthusiast looking for mouthwatering recipes or an avid traveler seeking inspiration for your next adventure, this channel has something for everyone. Join us as we embark on a journey filled with delicious flavors and captivating destinations.

Name: Shilo
Description: Shilo is an Emmy Award-winning creative production company representing a group of filmmakers led by director Jose Gomez. Internationally known for creating original and commissioned work that is powerful, provocative and visually extraordinary, Shilo's deeply held passions for design-infused storytelling and innovative application of live-action, design, and animation techniques deliver breakthrough experiences for screens large and small. From its studio in New York, where recent projects have spanned short films, commercials and music videos, Shilo has the capacity and experience to originate ideas and handle all aspects of production.

Name: Epost - Postproducción
Description: EPost has an extensive experience in the film industry. Founded in 2011 in Mexico City by Carlos Morales and Vanessa Hernández, EPost has worked with national and international film production houses.

Name: Astria
Description: We are creating Personalised AI Models for Unique Images and Video generations. We train personalised models that generate unique pictures and videos when given text instructions - a new kind of AI brush! We teach the AI new ideas like a particular person, style, or product and use these models to make special, one-of-a-kind pieces of art.

Name: Unloop Filmes
Description:
RÉVOLUTIONNEZ VOS PRÉSENTATIONS DE PROJETS

Avez-vous déjà relevé le défi de vendre un projet devant une audience réticente? Présenter un film innovant digne du cinéma ou de la pub mais avec un simple budget de film institutionnel? Avec Unloop, vous avez la solution approuvée par des dizaines d'organismes privés et publiques au Brésil et dans le monde. En harmonisant didactique, esthétique et la magie des effets spéciaux, nos films propulsent le marketing des plus grands projets d'infrastructure vers une nouvelle dimension!

Unloop est une société de production audiovisuelle franco-brésilienne créée en 2010 à Rio de Janeiro qui totalise déjà plus de 200 films institutionnels réalisés pour des entreprises de construction civile, aménagement urbain, mobilité urbaine, concession routière, architecture, immobilier, assainissement, logistique, énergie, etc.

Expliquez-nous votre projet et nous mettons en œuvre notre savoir-faire: concept, scénario, réalisation, image, son, design, synthèse 3D, effets spéciaux... Nos points forts: intégrer nos infographies et simulations 3D dans leur environnement réel capturé en prises de vues terrestres et aériennes. Et surtout: raconter une histoire.

Laissez-vous surprendre par l’expérience Unloop!

--
Produzimos filmes institucionais desde concepção, roteiro, direção, filmagens até computação gráfica e finalização, integrando as funções de agência de criação, produtora de filmes e estúdio de animação e design numa estrutura só, sem terceirização, otimizando custos e viabilizando a produção de filmes institucionais mais arrojados.

A equipe de computação gráfica, composta por profissionais formados nos mercados de animação e efeitos visuais para cinema/TV/publicidade, desenvolve simulações 3D integradas em filmagens aéreas (helicóptero e drone), maquetes eletrônicas e motion graphics (infográficos/cartográficos) para filmes institucionais atendendo principalmente governos, construtoras, incorporadoras, concessionárias e projetistas

Name: Ammo Content, LLC
Description: Distribution Simplified.

Name: Maestro Filmworks
Description:
Maestro Filmworks is a minority owned, Emmy award winning video production company based in Philadelphia. 

OUR MISSION is to be the trusted storytellers that shine a light on stories that need to be told, doing so with the brightest and most creative talent, for the world’s top brands and companies. 

OUR VISION is to be the leading advocates for sustainable careers and lifestyles in the film industry in order to enable our people to make an impact in their communities. 

OUR ETHOS is to approach our work with a focus on diversity and inclusion, ensuring that we are intentional in empowering and employing members of marginalized communities in our industry.

Name: hazen
Description: We harness the power of unseen stories that move, matter and make change.

Name: Moonday
Description: Your Free access social media for #cinema, #tv and #audiovisual professionals. Prospect, Manage your films, Follow news and a worldwide database >> moondayapp.com

Name: Rocket Science Industries Limited
Description:
Established in London in 2016 by industry veteran Thorsten Schumacher, ROCKET SCIENCE has rapidly established itself as one of Europe’s preeminent film & tv brands. In a short time, ROCKET SCIENCE has developed, financed, packaged, produced and distributed over three dozen critically acclaimed and commercially successful projects worth in excess of $1BN.

Through its extensive output and its talent and producer relationships, ROCKET SCIENCE consistently delivers exceptional film and television packages to the marketplace for modern audiences, currently including Michael Gracey’s Robbie Williams biopic BETTER MAN, Michael Mann’s FERRARI, Guy Ritchie’s THE GENTLEMEN, Aaron Sorkin’s THE TRIAL OF THE CHICAGO 7, Ellen Kuras’ & Kate Winslet’s LEE, Julian Schnabel’s AT ETERNITY’S GATE, Todd Haynes’ MAY DECEMBER, David Cronenberg’s CRIMES OF THE FUTURE and Ana Lily Amirpour’s CLIFFHANGER.

Proven taste and a progressive approach ensure that ROCKET SCIENCE’s diverse range of compelling content remains best in class. ROCKET SCIENCE’S reputation, comprehensive market knowledge and strong focus on corporate and project branding has propelled its rapid expansion within the entertainment and content landscape.

The company’s deep and unique relationships with the creative community and talent agencies on one side and financial institutions & private investors as well as platforms, studios, independent distributors, and broadcasters on the other side make ROCKET SCIENCE one of the key players in the industry. On the back of consistent growth, ROCKET SCIENCE continues to flourish by increasing its production footprint along with expansion into local language content creation and adding non-scripted and documentary entertainment.

Thorsten Schumacher is the founder and CEO of Rocket Science. Previously, as Managing Director of Hanway Films, Schumacher represented titles which earned a total of 15 BAFTA, 10 Academy Award and 5 Golden Globe nominations. Rocket Science is a global team

Name: Hill Valley
Description:
Hill Valley is a leading firm specialised in the entertainment industry.

Created in 2012 by Eric Nebot the company has three offices based in Paris, Los Angeles and New York.

Our teams bring together skills in marketing and entertainment.

Our expertise in Product Placement, Events, Partnerships and brand content lies in the movies, tv series and music industry.

Our passion is to build 360° partnerships that create meaningful stories between the artistic vision of a film and the marketing strategy of a brand.

With our tailor-made approach, we bring together productions and brands in a new, revolutionary way.

References :
- Emily in Paris
- Once Upon a time in Hollywood 
- James Bond 
- The White Lotus
- Succession 
.../...

Name: Punto Rec Studios
Description:
Punto Rec Studios è una Factory Multimediale, uno studio di progettazione, di sviluppo creativo e di produzione video, del suono, della musica e della comunicazione, che fa della narrazione il suo metodo di lavoro. È un team di giovani creativi e senior esperti nel campo della comunicazione: storyteller, art director, registi, sceneggiatori, compositori, sound designer, musicisti.
Punto Rec Studios è una struttura integrata unica nel suo genere, che affianca a un polo della creatività, studi di produzione e post-produzione audio e video. In particolare: due studi di registrazione tecnicamente all’avanguardia, predisposti per accogliere dallo strumento solista sino alle orchestre; studi di doppiaggio; tre studi di post-produzione video; un teatro di posa.

Dopamine Content es un estudio audiovisual especializado en la creación, desarrollo y producción de contenido original para plataformas globales. Estamos abiertos a desarrollar, co-desarrollar, producir, coproducir o invertir en proyectos para cualquier plataforma.

Somos garantía de calidad en la curación y desarrollo de historias, así como en la selección de losequipos que trabajen en ellas. Con oficinas en Méxicoy España.

Name: Crisp Film
Description:
Since 2010, we have been producing films, TV format, moving content and commercials for a Scandinavian audience. Choosing us means choosing experience and flexibility. We adapt each production to your idea and budget. We lead and take responsibility for the entire process of the film production. From the initial idea, script and planning, to filming and post production.

Having complete control enables us to maximize the value of your investment - "more bang for the buck", resulting in stronger storytelling. In short, we are a full-service film production company located in Stockholm. Choose Crisp Film for your next project!

Name: FGreat Studio
Description:
Fgreat Studio is a production house that excels in crafting highly visual films, commercials and promos combining live action, design, VFX and animation.

We deliver a personal service, working clever to get the very best out of your budget and deliver brilliant films.

We work with clients, agencies and production companies in many different ways.

Whether we’re creating breathtaking visuals for your post production, or working with you from the initial concepts, right through production to finished film, we put our hearts and minds into every part of the process and everything we do.

We are a young, fresh and bold team of storytellers, artists and film-makers brought together into highly productive and effective structure by a passion for producing truly memorable films.

Name: Red Earth VFX Studios
Description: Red Earth VFX Studios, Inc. (REVFX), a member of the New Mexico Post Alliance, is a privately held corporation located at the heart of the Land of Enchantment in Albuquerque, New Mexico providing visual effects for Television, Commercials, Games, and Feature Films. Our award winning team specializes in the Virtual World Stage: 2D and 3D set extensions, digital environments and replacements. compositing, hard and soft body modeling, animation, and dynamics, fluid simulations. The REVFX executive, operational and management teams work together with an open virtualized pipeline and environment empowering the company as a whole to provide visual solutions to productions and studios around the world ahead of schedule of on time and under or on budget.

Name: Bayard Jeunesse Production
Description:
Bayard Jeunesse Production is a branch of Bayard Jeunesse dedicated to the production of audiovisual contents and videos for children and families. Bayard Jeunesse is the leading publisher of juvenile magazines in France, as well a world-renowned publisher of comics and graphic novels for young readers.

With a catalog of iconic characters including Little Brown Bear, SamSam, Tom and Lili, Zouk, Bayard Jeunesse Production has been developing audiovisual series for over 20 years. Its animated productions are broadcast on TV and on SVOD platforms worldwide.

Bayard Jeunesse Production’s productions provide a unique balance of humor, discovery, positive values, and fine storytelling. Offering meaningful entertainment that appeals to children and their families is the key to Bayard Jeunesse’s success.

--

Bayard Jeunesse Production est la filiale de Bayard Jeunesse dédiée à la création et à la production de contenus audiovisuels et vidéo pour les enfants et la famille. Bayard Jeunesse est le leader de la presse pour la jeunesse et le premier éditeur de BD jeunesse en France.

S’appuyant sur un catalogue de personnages iconiques : Petit Ours Brun, SamSam, Tom-Tom et Nana, Zouk… Bayard Jeunesse Production développe des séries audiovisuelles depuis plus de 20 ans. Les programmes de Bayard Jeunesse Production sont diffusés à la télévision et sur les plateformes SVod en France et dans le monde entier.

Acteur singulier et innovant, Bayard Jeunesse Production associe découverte du monde, quête de sens et comédie afin de proposer des divertissements originaux pour petits et grands, à l'image des valeurs que Bayard Jeunesse défend depuis plusieurs générations auprès de ses lecteurs.

Name: Moonage Pictures
Description: Moonage Pictures was founded by Will Gould, Matthew Read and Frith Tiplady in 2018 with the aim to create and produce original, unconventional and inventive television and film for both the UK and international markets. We work with the very best talent, both established and emerging, and have a passion for storytelling in whatever form it comes.

Name: Ideal Production
Description: A Production Company For All Your Video Content Needs. We create and spread valuable, relevant, and harmonious content to interest and engage the target audience.

Name: Gold Valley Films
Description: Gold Valley Films Inc. (GVF) is an animation film company with both strong creative and production capablities to create 3D animated feature films. With the ability to integrate multinational resources, Gold Valley aims to establish cooperation in the animation industry to create memorable characters and extrordinary stories that appeal to audience of all ages. Recently, GVF has expanded its scope and branched into derivative products licensing.

Name: Mammal Studios
Description:
Based in Hollywood and focusing on film and television, with an emphasis in creating CG environments and realistic set extensions, the studio is headed up by Visual Effects Supervisors Gregory Oehler and Gregory Liegey, with Michele Vallillo serving as Executive Producer.  

Mammal Studios is our response to the needs of the shifting visual effects landscape. Quality visual effects are in demand now more than ever. Yet delivering these effects on time and on budget is more essential than ever. Free to design a new template, we're using our extensive production experience to adapt to the necessities of an evolving world.

www.mammalstudios.com

Name: UniKo
Description:
Productora audiovisual ubicada en Bilbao desde 2009, especializada en animación y publicidad.

UniKo ha desarrollado más de 500 proyectos publicitarios, y sus producciones han cosechado más de 1.500 selecciones y 220 premios internacionales en prestigiosos festivales como Berlín, Cannes, Toronto, Clermont-Ferrand, Annecy, Chicago, Foyle...

Entre sus proyectos destacan cortometrajes de animación como Birdboy (Alberto Vázquez y Pedro Rivero, Premio Goya 2012), Sangre de Unicornio (Alberto Vázquez), Viaje a Pies (Khris Cembe), Contact (Alessandro Novelli) y Decorado (Alberto Vázquez – Premio Goya 2017), La Noche (Martín Romero), Soy una tumba (Khris Cembe) y Homeless Home (Alberto Vázquez), Nacer (Roberto Valle) y Loop (Pablo Polledri).

Además participó en la producción del largometraje de Psiconautas, los niños olvidados, de Alberto Vázquez y Pedro Rivero, ganador del premio Goya por Mejor Largometraje de Animación en 2017, además de estar nominado en los European Film Awards en la misma categoría.

Tres de sus últimos proyectos han sido seleccionados en el recopilatorio del ICAA “Shorts from Spain” como uno de los 10 mejores cortometrajes del estado español.

Estrenará su nuevo largometraje de animación Unicorn Wars el 21 de octubre en salas.

Name: Motion Picture Capital Limited
Description:
Motion Picture Capital finance feature films & TV series, including SENSE8, COME & FIND ME, HAMPSTEAD, THE CRUCIFIXION and THE TITAN. We are a Reliance Entertainment Company.

Other Reliance companies include IM Global and Dreamworks Studios.

Motion Picture Capital’s aim is to arrange, raise and structure finance solutions for Reliance Group companies and other pre-approved production and distribution partners in the entertainment industry. Located initially in the UK, Motion Picture Capital’s primary remit is to facilitate tax efficient investment into film productions, with an initial focus on films in the $15 - $60m budget ranges. 

Other activities include the structuring of efficient fund vehicles for the producers and distributors of top quality filmed entertainment.

Name: Jobvfx
Description:
Hello and welcome to JobVFX.com! We're thrilled you've stopped by. You see, we're a little different from your average job search website. Launched in 2022, we've made it our mission to be a dedicated platform for talent in the animation and visual effects industry - a field that's as unique as it is exciting.

We're not just a job board; we're a community. We believe in the power of creativity and the magic that skilled individuals like you bring to the table. We understand the importance of staying in the loop in an industry that's always on the move, so we strive to bring you the latest news, trends, and opportunities.

But more than anything, we're about connections. We're committed to helping talented professionals like you find exciting roles where you can truly shine. We're always looking for ways to improve and provide the best platform possible for both job seekers and employers. We'd love to hear your thoughts and suggestions!

So, whether you're just starting out in the industry or have been in the game for years, JobVFX.com is here for you. Let's explore, create, and make waves in the animation and visual effects industry together!

Name: Downtown Filmes
Description: Downtown Filmes is a film distribution company that focuses exclusively on Brazilian cinema. The company is involved in the distribution of movies, videos, and sound. With a team size of 11-50 employees, Downtown Filmes is dedicated to bringing Brazilian cinema to a wider audience. The company's operations encompass various aspects of film distribution, including the acquisition of distribution rights, marketing of films, and coordination of film releases. Downtown Filmes has a strong online presence, with active profiles on various social media platforms including Facebook, Twitter, Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube.
Location: Rio De Janeiro, Rio De Janeiro

Name: Penrose
Description: Penrose is focused on augmented and virtual reality storytelling. Through the process of creation with world class storytellers and technologists, Penrose is inventing and defining the language of real-time cinema for AR and VR.

Name: D LOG STUDIOS
Description:
Step right into our world, a place where culture meets creativity and technology serves as the canvas upon which we paint our wildest imaginations. We are an exhilarating community of multicultural and multitalented individuals, brought together by a fiery passion for harnessing technology to bring our dreams to life.

Nestled in the heart of Mumbai, our creative powerhouse boasts a vibrant team of visual artists and technology savants hailing from all corners of the world. We are united by a common ambition - to transform aspirations into realities, infusing them with our trademark blend of pixel-perfect precision and unwavering ardor.

Our playground of creativity and innovation has positioned us at the forefront of the Indian VFX and Animation industry. Our illustrious team comprises some of the most talented and celebrated visual artists in the nation, each bringing a unique perspective and skill set to the table.

Embark on a thrilling journey with us as we break down barriers and redefine the art of storytelling through pioneering technology and unparalleled creativity. Let us join forces and carve out a new era of endless possibility. Welcome to our world!

Heart-pounding, reality-shifting, barrier-breaking, phone-tilting good. A 10/10 film shows you something in a way you've never seen before. Making that kind of film is not science. It's personal. A matter of taste and never-ending curation.

It is about nailing every single detail while never losing sight of the big picture. So we always aim for a 10/10 when we write, film, direct, design, grade or create something that moves culture. We work for brands, agencies, artists. Anyone who believes that film is the perfect way to share their story.

We know that craft is key when you're creating culture-defining work. That's why we work with people who care as much about every detail of your story as you do. We curate Europe's finest talent: creative minds with extraordinary vision from Amsterdam, Berlin, Barcelona and beyond.

Because no creative boundary should ever stand in the way of your film, our European network consists of award-winning DOPs, directors, editors, production designers, colourists and creatives who share the love for film.

Scoring a 10/10 doesn't come easy. It takes talent, chemistry, and the courage to fight for bold ideas. We craft like artists, execute like athletes, and make every collaboration as memorable as the films we create.

Because in a world where everyone can make content, only obsessive craft and uncompromising vision can create the rare work that makes people stop scrolling and start talking.

Name: Ocean Film Company
Description: Ocean Film Company is a 360 degree storytelling studio based in Mumbai.

Name: Las Espigadoras
Description: Diseño, programación, comunicación y producción de proyectos culturales. Impulsamos soluciones innovadoras de divulgación y difusión cultural y buscamos la sostenibilidad de cada iniciativa promoviendo la colaboración entre entidades públicas y privadas, entre grandes y pequeñas organizaciones. Acompañamos al gestor y promotor cultural tanto en la fase de conceptualización, como en la producción de su proyecto.

Name: Brown Girls Doc Mafia (BGDM)
Description:
Brown Girls Doc Mafia (BGDM) is a nonprofit organization advocating for over 5,000 women and non-binary professionals of color working in the documentary film industry around the world. Our mission is to nurture, amplify, and invest in the creative capacity and professional success of BIPOC women and nonbinary people working in the documentary industry. 
Since our founding in 2015, Brown Girls Doc Mafia has created a vibrant online community, launched the BGDM Member Directory for discovering BIPOC women and nonbinary talent, provided over $200K in grants and mentorship, and implemented numerous development programs advocating for members' access, visibility, creativity, growth, sustainability, and power in the documentary film industry.

Name: Produtora Tigre Films
Description:
Tigre Films is an innovative audiovisual production company dedicated to producing high quality content for a wide variety of clients. With a team of highly trained and experienced professionals, the company is committed to providing creative and customized solutions that meet the unique needs of each project.

Since its founding in 2018, Tigre Films has been working with large and medium-sized companies, offering video production services for commercial, advertising, entertainment and events such as weddings.

Our team is made up of professionals who are passionate about what they do, including directors, producers, screenwriters, directors of photography, videographers and editors. Everyone works together to ensure that each project meets the highest quality standards, while maintaining a personalized and creative approach. A company that can help you tell your story creatively.

Our mission is to tell impactful stories through the production of high quality audiovisual content. We want to convey emotions, messages and inspire people through the universal language of cinema.

Our vision is to be recognized as a reference audiovisual producer in the national and international market. We always want to be up to date with trends to offer the best service to our customers and bring our films to an ever-growing audience.

Our values are for creativity in stimulating all stages of production, always seeking innovative solutions to the challenges we face and with quality in pursuit of excellence in the production of our films, maintaining high quality standards in all aspects.

Discover our work on our website.

www.tigrefims.com.br

Name: GA.TA progetti audiovisivi

GA.TA progetti audiovisivi nasce nel 2003 come piccola realtà nel panorama della produzione audiovisiva torinese, e in cui confluiscono alcune individualità che arrivano da precedenti realtà produttive.
Nel 2007 GA.TA progetti audiovisivi è cresciuta molto rispetto agli inizi. Lascia gli uffici di corso Marconi a Torino, per spostarsi nei più ampi locali di via Di Nanni a Nichelino.

Negli anni GA.TA progetti audiovisivi, attraverso i propri collaboratori e professionisti e grazie a una fitta rete di contatti, ha portato avanti la propria attività principale di fornire mezzi e conoscenze tecniche per la realizzazione di prodotti audiovisivi e multimediali e di eventi culturali, a cui ha affiancato nel tempo l’organizzazione di corsi di didattica degli audiovisivi.

Accanto all'esecuzione professionale di lavori su commissione, GA.TA progetti audiovisivi si occupa anche dell'elaborazione, produzione e attuazione di progetti creativi.

Collabora inoltre con AIACE Nazionale, AIACE Torino, FAI Cinema e Museo Nazionale del Cinema.

Name: Film House
Description:
Film House is the largest film production company in Tennessee producing hundreds of projects annually. The reason for our success is simple - Film House is a customer-focused company that delivers world class quality at a remarkably reasonable price.

The Film House Real Estate division is pioneering a worldwide revolution in marketing luxury homes by using mini-movies - complete with story lines, actors, musical scores and even aerial photography - that are set in the homes to create an emotional connection with potential buyers. Our mini-movies have even been featured in a major article in The Wall Street Journal. http://www.filmhouse.com/wsj_cover_story_filmhouse.pdf
 
Film House holds the largest US government contract for film production. Each year we create and produce hundreds of TV and radio spot announcements for the American Forces Radio & Television Service.
 
Transcendent, a wholly-owned subsidiary, produces independent features and partners with The Panda Fund to release them theatrically. Our current project "Deadline", which stars Steve Talley and Eric Roberts, was released in theaters nationwide. 

Transcendent's first film, “No Regrets” starring Janine Turner and Kate Jackson, has been a worldwide success, with repeated airings on HBO, Lifetime Television and in dozens of countries around the world. Next Transcendent co-produced "Two Weeks" starring two time Academy Award winner Sally Field. "Two Weeks" was released worldwide by MGM.

Name: ReadySet Studios
Description:
The Future of Filmmaking is Here!

 
At ReadySet Studios, we don’t just offer Virtual Production—we transform the way stories are told.
 
Based in Amsterdam, we combine advanced LED technology, real-time 3D environments, and world-class expertise to deliver seamless feature films, episodic productions, and commercial content.
 
From blockbuster-scale productions to high-end commercials, our state-of-the-art studio enables filmmakers, showrunners, and brands to create visually stunning content with full creative control, reduced logistical challenges, and ultimate production flexibility.
 
 Why Virtual Production?
 Endless Creativity – Bring any location, era, or world to life, all in a controlled studio environment.
 Time & Cost Efficiency – No need for extensive travel or unpredictable outdoor shoots.
 Sustainable & Scalable – Reduce the carbon footprint while unlocking unlimited creative potential.
 
Let’s create the future of storytelling together.
 
 Get in touch to explore what’s possible.
 
#VirtualProduction #ICVFX #Filmmaking #Innovation #CreativeTechnology

Name: The Directors Bureau, LLC
Description:
The Directors Bureau is a destination for filmmakers to explore, invent, realize, and promote creative endeavors. Founded by Roman Coppola in 1996, the award-winning company has since captivated audiences with visually arresting commercials, music videos, and experimental content for advertising agencies and brands around the world. With Hillary Rogers serving as Managing Director, it continues building on its legacy as a genuine collective of multidisciplinary artists with expertise in still photography, graphic design, animation, fine art, feature films, fashion, and beyond.

Expanding the production company’s creative consultancy beyond traditional visual realms, The Directors Bureau: Special Projects imagines, designs, and produces events, projects, spaces, and products for clients. Led by Duffy Culligan, the specialized division unites filmmakers, writers, technicians, and designers to solve brand challenges.

Name: LUMBRE
Description:
Lumbre is a concept-driven, multi-technical creative studio that makes motion graphics for brandings, sports, and more. We specialize in telling brief stories with non-traditional characters. It doesn’t matter if it is a ball, a logo, or a simple triangle. 

But what we really do is think and create. We can be a creative studio, creative consultancy, brand counsel, production unit, creative talent management, or another label. We can think about and create things to watch, things to hold, or things to experience. 

Satisfied clients include such names as National Geographic Channels International, Fox International Channels (LatAm, Europe and US), Fox Sports (LatAm and US), ESPN (US), Sportsnet (Canada), TyC Sports (LatAm), Tastemade, Cartoon Network (Europe), TRT (Turkey), Whirlpool (US), Ménage à Trois Wines (US), Ferragamo (Italy), Pfizer (US), Maker DAO and Mercedes-Benz Stadium (Atlanta).

Name: Popcorn Video
Description:
We’re Popcorn Video. An award-winning production company that blends storytelling with purpose, specialising in learning, marketing, and documentary content.

Whether we're crafting a standout brand film, capturing real stories on the ground, or designing learning videos that actually teach something, we bring purpose to every frame.

From early ideas and scripting, to filming, animation, voiceover, and final polish, we handle the lot. And we do it with heart, humour, and a whole lot of know-how.

Our work spans industries and audiences, with clients ranging from global brands to grassroots organisations. Whatever the brief, we make sure your message sticks; beautifully, meaningfully, and measurably.

Looking for a video partner that’s easy to work with and delivers the goods?
Email glyn.chapman@popcornvideo.co.uk and let’s make something brilliant together.

Name: Norwegian Film Commission
Description:
The Norwegian Film Commission is the national agency with the remit to attract, support and maximise international feature film and television production in Norway.

Emerging as a premier location, Norway has hosted some of the largest releases of the past few years, including No Time to Die, Black Widow, Succession, Dune, Mission: Impossible - Fallout, and Mission:Impossible - Dead Reckoning Part One.

The commission provides support and assistance to international producers through all stages of production, fostering connections from international to Norwegian producers, as well as guidance to financing options including the 25% film production incentive.

The commission collaborates with national and regional entities, expanding capacity and competency within the screen industry, encouraging tourism and business development all across Norway.

Heralded regularly as the world’s most beautiful country, Norway offers a wide-range of diverse and dramatic locations in close proximity. Productions will find an eclectic mix of architecture styles from Hanseatic, to neo-classic, brutalist to art nouveau. The new national opera featuring in Christopher Nolan’s Tenet, and newcomers The Twist and Under primed and ready for a chance to feature in a film. Extensive and impressive infrastructure projects make nature both accessible, but in themselves also offer stunning backdrops. Serpentine bends up jagged, alpine mountains, and several of the world’s tallest waterfalls. Unique geological formations like Stadt region in Dune, Trolltunga, Preikestolen (unforgettably portrayed in Mission Impossible : Fallout).

Norway is a long country bespeckled with fjords, giving it one of the longest coastlines in the world. While Norway has hosted many large productions of late, there are so many virgin locations that have yet to be captured on film and there is a huge amount of untapped potential.

The Norwegian Film Commission is a member of AFCI and EUFCN, and part of the network of Nor

Name: MTI Film
Description: MTI Film is a full service post production facility providing high quality post finishing, critically acclaimed digital film restoration services, world class software applications, and an MTI Remote Center that supports editors and assistants working from home and other locations. We pride ourselves on delivering pristine quality work for episodic television, feature films, and remastering projects in HD and 4K to studios and libraries that need to stay on time and on budget. In addition, MTI Film produces software applications, CORTEX and DRSNOVA, that are used worldwide for production, post production, film restoration and remastering.

Name: Cinemagic Film Festival
Description:
Cinemagic International Film and Television Festival for Young People is an award-winning charity that has been educating, inspiring and motivating young people across the world for the last three decades.

Cinemagic is an organisation with international networks and a worldwide reputation for excellence in children’s programming. 

As the largest film and television festival designed for and by young people in the UK and Ireland around 40,000 young people (Under 25) participate in Cinemagic events in Belfast, Dublin, London, New York and Los Angeles each year. 

Since it was established Cinemagic has engaged with over 500,000 young people, screened over 3,000 films, and hosted over 500 masterclasses, industry workshops, Q&As and special events. Our film production projects have received international acclaim for their ambition, quality and reach.

Cinemagic embraces the magic of film, television and digital technologies and offers young people the chance to develop real skills, explore opportunities, and reaffirm their belief in what they want to do and their own ability to achieve it.

Cinemagic has recently  produced two feature films, A CHRISTMAS STAR and GRACE AND GOLIATH; secured worldwide distribution for both films; developed award-winning “behind the scene” documentaries; produced over 100 short films; and supported hundreds of young trainees to secure work in the film and television industry.

Cinemagic has incredible patrons that share in its ethos such as, Liam Neeson, Pierce Brosnan, Saoirse Ronan, Colin Farrell, Suranne Jones, Paula Malcomson and Julian Fellowes, to name but a few. Their support is vital and they are extremely generous with their time.

Business: We have investment, charitable contribution, sponsorship opportunities that are tailored to the resources and goals of those individuals and companies who want to get involved. We welcome a connection request from those interested.

Social Responsibility: Currently, we run three programs during the production of our films: The Mentor Program, The Women’s Director Program and The Young Producer’s Program. If you would like more information on any of these programs, we welcome a connection request.

The highlight of VisualCraft Honors is delivering the award where the top talents get recognized. Instead of judges deciding, the winners are chosen based on the big support and love they get from the audience on social media.
VisualCraft Honors is not just an initiative; it's a movement highlighting the magic behind the movies.

Join us in turning appreciation into celebration for these unsung heroes.

Name: New Horizons Association
Description: Od kameralnego festiwalu w Sanoku do jednego z najważniejszych wydarzeń filmowych w Polsce i Europie – oto droga MFF Nowe Horyzonty, który zainicjował rozwój Stowarzyszenia. Dziś SNH to znacznie więcej niż sam festiwal. Jednym z naszych największych sukcesów jest umieszczenie na mapie polskiej kultury wartościowego, artystycznego kina; wyciągnięcie go z niszy i uczynienie popularnym tematem. Świadczy o tym choćby liczba widzów uczestniczących w festiwalach lub oglądających filmy w prowadzonym przez Stowarzyszenie Kinie Nowe Horyzonty. Wierzymy, że kinematografia ma siłę, aby zmieniać świat. Naszym największym sukcesem jest zbudowanie wspólnoty miłośników kina, którzy nieustannie zaskakują swoim zaangażowaniem, wiedzą i otwartością na poznawanie nowych rodzajów sztuki filmowej. W SNH udowadniamy, że kinofilia przybiera różne formy i oblicza. Kino to dla nas uniwersalny język dialogu – pomiędzy różnymi pokoleniami, światopoglądami i kulturami. Dialog zaczynamy możliwie wcześnie – od działań edukacyjnych dla najmłodszych, później kontynuujemy rozmowę podczas festiwali (Nowe Horyzonty czy American Film Festival) i zapraszamy, aby zostać z nami na stałe (dołączając do wspólnoty widzów Kina Nowe Horyzonty i oglądając dystrybuowane przez nas filmy). Tworzymy alternatywną ofertę kulturalną i kinową – względem tego, co proponują multipleksy. Organizowany od 2001 roku MFF Nowe Horyzonty to festiwal wizjonerów kina. W ramach Festiwalu Kino Dzieci (pierwsza edycja w 2014 roku) prezentujemy filmy dla młodego widza, które nie są tworzone przez wielkie wytwórnie według starannie wykalkulowanych biznesplanów. American Film Festival od dekady udowadnia, że amerykańskie kino jest o wiele ciekawsze niż to, co sugeruje Hollywood. Z kolei w Kinie Nowe Horyzonty  (od 2012 roku) stwarzamy przestrzeń dla licznych dyskusji i spotkań – nie tylko z filmowcami; jesteśmy też otwarci na dialog z samymi widzami, którzy mogą stać się współautorami organizowanych przez nas wydarzeń.

Name: Augusto Custodio
Description:
As the elements that compose a work of art, sound and image unite in a unique sensory experience. We present a new way of experiencing the petrified art, with narratives based on the technical understanding of poetry found in forms.

"To capture the essence, the concept, and translate them into images, sounds and movement when words can no longer." - Augusto Custodio.

The video as exponent of this scenario is not a coincidence - Art and narrative blend with each take, elevating the work made by brands and architects, reaching an immeasurable number of people.

To preserve the poeticity of content, while maintaining the high potential for involvement, visibility and circulation is the greatest challenge. Projects, trends and products represented by image and sound come to life through the lens of a sensitive and accurate look.

Name: Mitteldeutsche Medienförderung (MDM)
Description:
Mitteldeutsche Medienförderung GmbH (#MDM) awards funding to promising film and media projects realised in the German federal states of Saxony, Saxony-Anhalt and Thuringia. MDM has supported numerous international co-productions. In 2021, it expanded its activities with #MEDIAstart: a program supporting media #startups that were founded within the last three years and have their permanent head office in the region of #Mitteldeutschland. Each year up to 10 companies are selected for #MEDIAstart. They receive financial support, tailor-made education and mentoring in order to successfully establish themselves on the market. The program aims at companies that are working in the field of traditional audiovisual media or in the new media sector (VR, AR, video games, apps, web series) as well as companies that supply services for audiovisual media or new media.

Name: The Story Tribe.
Description:
We are outside-the-box filmmakers and purpose-driven storytellers in L.A. and beyond. We make people feel, think, and connect.

I am Oscar. I grew up in Paris with cinemas and DVDs, studied film and business, and worked for festivals in Canada and South Korea, before settling in LA, where I assist film and TV executives. I'm grateful to have met passionate and insightful people along the way. Besides work and talent, people and information are crucial to succeed in the entertainment industry. But continually networking and keeping abreast of the business can prove laborious. The Story Tribe is a participative community where people share, learn, and interact in a more instructive and efficient way. 

There are countless routes to make and distribute a film or a series in this continually evolving industry. At Story Tribe, we creatively experiment with LA’s vibrant cultural scene and tech opportunities. Industry leaders with diverse experiences share their prime insights in short videos, concise articles, events, and Clubhouse conversations. Learnings spark discussion, collaboration, and life-changing bonding.

We believe everything starts with the script and, at its essence, the story. Across all genres in the independent and studio spaces, we strive to bring impactful stories to life. Join the tribe!

Oscar Gervet
