Name: Cinematic Restoration Center
Description:
𝐏𝐫𝐞𝐬𝐞𝐫𝐯𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐂𝐢𝐧𝐞𝐦𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐜 𝐇𝐞𝐫𝐢𝐭𝐚𝐠𝐞 𝐚𝐭 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐂𝐢𝐧𝐞𝐦𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐜 𝐑𝐞𝐬𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐂𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐫 (𝐂𝐑𝐂)

At CRC, we are dedicated to preserving the timeless charm of classic cinema. With over 25 years of expertise in converting cinematic reels into various video formats—and building on an industry legacy in Egypt that spans over 100 years—we take pride in restoring iconic films to ensure they remain cultural treasures for generations to come.

𝐎𝐮𝐫 𝐄𝐱𝐩𝐞𝐫𝐭𝐢𝐬𝐞:

𝐏𝐫𝐞𝐜𝐢𝐬𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐒𝐜𝐚𝐧𝐧𝐢𝐧𝐠:
Using ARRI’s digitizing system, we capture every frame in 6K quality, preserving the original cinematic experience with exceptional detail. Our advanced wet gate technology further enhances the footage by eliminating scratches and imperfections, ensuring a flawless result.

𝐃𝐢𝐠𝐢𝐭𝐚𝐥 𝐑𝐞𝐬𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧:
Our specialists employ the latest tools and technology to eliminate imperfections, correcting time and depreciation factors to restore films to their original brilliance while respecting the filmmaker’s vision.

𝐂𝐨𝐥𝐨𝐫 𝐆𝐫𝐚𝐝𝐢𝐧𝐠:
We rejuvenate faded colors to their full vibrancy, rekindling the visual allure that once captivated audiences.

𝐀𝐮𝐝𝐢𝐨 𝐄𝐧𝐡𝐚𝐧𝐜𝐞𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭:
We refine and restore dialog and soundtracks with precision, allowing films to be experienced as they were originally intended.

𝐉𝐨𝐢𝐧 𝐔𝐬: Whether you’re a film enthusiast, industry professional, or advocate for preserving history, your support is vital. Follow us for updates, share our work, and let’s keep the magic of classic cinema alive together!

Name: The VFX Cloud
Description:
The VFX Cloud is a virtual visual effects studio that has been delivering exceptional work for the world's leading entertainment companies for over 15 years. Based in Vancouver, we operate globally, assembling custom teams of elite artists for each unique project.
Our innovative approach combines the flexibility of remote collaboration with the expertise of industry veterans. We don't maintain a traditional office or permanent staff – instead, we curate the perfect team for every project, ensuring our clients receive specialized talent that matches their specific needs. This model has allowed us to complete hundreds of projects for Netflix, Apple, Amazon, and other major studios while maintaining the highest standards of quality and creativity.

Name: 3Cycle
Description:
Although founded at the end of 2013, 3Cycle is a postproduction and dubbing company with forty years of experience.
CEO, Marco Guadagno, has been working in the field since 1970 as actor, director, writer, voice actor, dubbing director and adapter.
Over the years, he has managed several dubbing companies, working with important Italian and foreign majors and TV broadcasters, many of which are still our customers today.
Our goal is to provide the most efficient customer service, fulfilling customer requests, monitoring every stage of the process, respecting timelines and offering competitive rates.

We strive to be a cultural medium through the use of advanced technology, innovation and outstanding artistic quality. 
We are a values-driven company guaranteeing full support to our customers and products of the highest quality. 
We adhere to the utmost professional standards, observe high ethical and legal standards to safeguard our customers, preserve client confidentiality and manage client and company resources cost-effectively.
Words are the pivot of our line of work and we take extreme care in translating and acting them out in order to maintain high cultural and technological levels.

Our services:
- Translations and Adaptations
- Dubbing
- Subtitling
- Audio Description
- Editing Rooms
- Video Editing
- Materials Delivery

Name: 203 Edit&Post
Description: Somos um Hub criativo de profissionais focados em todas as etapas da pós-produção e finalização dos mais variados formatos audiovisuais. Nos conectamos pela paixão de transformar frames em histórias e, desde janeiro de 2016, atendemos demandas das maiores produtoras e agências do país em filmes para grandes marcas nacionais e multinacionais.

Name: Le Vision Pictures, Ltd.
Description:
Le Vision Pictures is one of the largest and most successful film companies in China. Founded in 2011 and affiliated to China’s tech giant LeTV (SHE 300104), it has positioned itself as a “film studio in the digital age”, and is global in scope with offices in Beijing, Hong Kong and Los Angeles.

In merely 2 years, Le Vision has built its unique ‘O2O Marketing System’, which connects with consumers across new and established online/offline platforms, and provides them with whole new movie going experience. It is also known for the biggest field marketing/distribution network in China - covering 108 cities, 1200 theaters, which equals 85% of the market share.

In 2012, Le Vision produced and distributed 6 films, including "The Expendables 2". The film grossed over $56M in China, which equals 18.5% of its total global box office. 

2013 saw the release of 9 films with an overall gross of $170M. This includes the box office sensation "Tiny Times 1&2". As a result, Le Vision joined the ranks of the top 3 Chinese private film companies.

2014 saw the release of 13 films. The total gross was $390M - a 130% jump from previous year. Several box office records were also set by such hits as "Tiny Times 3", "Coming Home", "Boonie Bears" and "The Expendables 3". 

As part of its global strategy, Le Vision has begun collaboration with Hollywood studios. In July 2014, it launched a $200M fund geared towards making tentpole films for the global marketplace. 

The first is the $135M “Great Wall” starring Matt Damon. Helmed by the acclaimed Chinese director Zhang Yimou and co-invested/produced by Le Vision, Legendary and Universal. The film is currently in production and will be released worldwide in November 2016.

Besides Zhang Yimou, Le Vision has signed first look deals with other top-tier directors such as Tsui Hark, Lu Chuan and Guo Jingming. It is rumored that some top Hollywood talent might soon join Le Vision as well.

Name: GMAC
Description:
GMAC Film is an active member of the Glasgow Youth Arts Hub, Film Access network Scotland (FANS) and Screen Training Scotland (STS), linking opportunities while identifying gaps and collaborating on new work.

We’re a charity and social enterprise; all income goes towards our work with young people and the independent filmmaking community.

GMAC FILM: SINCE 1982

GMAC Film began as Glasgow Film and Video Workshop to open access to independent filmmakers outside the Southern and London areas. Offering low cost access to facilities and equipment, we aimed to enable a greater diversity of people to make films and this, despite changing patterns of funding and outreach, remains our core purpose today.

In 2010 GMAC Film moved from humble premises in Albion Street to purpose-built studios at Trongate 103 where we hire out (production) office space, a training suite, editing facilities and a screening room. With most of our community projects run in the same space, the 5thfloor is a vibrant and inspiring hub for anyone creative.

GMAC Film is run by a dedicated team of staff members, Board of Directors and informed by our Youth Team.

Der Verband bündelt und artikuliert die film- und marktpolitischen Interessen seiner Mitglieder und ist deren Sprachrohr und Vermittler gegenüber Förderern, Sendern, der Politik und nationalen sowie internationalen Branchenverbänden. Name: Festival Czech-In
Description:
Created in 2009, we are the first and only Czech and Slovak film festival in Paris.
Our team of experienced mediators focuses on strengthening the cultural dialogue between France and Central Europe. We offer a range of services, including :
- Expertise in production, distribution, exhibition, promotion of Czech and Slovak cinemas on audiovisual markets, digital marketing, audience development and image education
- Artistic programming and cultural mediation
- Script translation and film subtitling
- Advice and assistance with film shoots and the organisation of cultural projects
- Master classes with leading figures in Czech and Slovak culture
- Integration of the professional sphere into the cultural milieu, sponsorship and promotion, fund-raising
- Customised offers and events for sponsors and patrons

In its 10 years of existence, the festival has organised over 100 screenings and welcomed over 50 guests. Our programming is demanding, offering a mix of popular hits, auteur films, established and emerging directors, as well as the rediscovery of the great classics of Czech and Slovak cinema. We also organise satellite events with our partners throughout France and in Prague.

A large network built over the years with filmmakers and supporters by the founder and director of the festival, Marketa Hodouskova..

Name: TRÉSOR FILMS
Description:

Name: DIAMOND FILMS BR
Description:
A Diamond Films é uma distribuidora de cinema fundada em 2010, que se se destaca por ser responsável pela distribuição dos melhores filmes independentes da indústria cinematográfica.

Atualmente, conta com uma rede de distribuição em sete países da América Latina: Argentina, Bolívia, Brasil, Chile, Colômbia, Peru e México. E, em 2016 entrou no mercado europeu, através de sua nova filial na Espanha.

No Brasil, desde 2013, a Diamond distribuiu filmes como Antes da Meia-Noite, Bling Ring, Dragon Ball Z  A Batalha dos Deuses, O Mordomo da Casa Branca, Hércules 3D, O Jogo da Imitação, Para Sempre Alice, A Incrível História de Adaline, A Dama Dourada, Os Oito Odiados, Macbeth, Invasão a Londres e Memórias Secretas.

Name: Fotolanthropy
Description:
Fotolanthropy is a 501(c)(3) organization that creates powerful films that share true stories of strength and hope. Creators of the award-winning documentaries: 7 Yards: The Chris Norton Story, Travis: A Soldier's Story, and The Luckiest Man, Fotolanthropy documents the experiences of remarkable people who have modeled extreme resilience. 

Fotolanthropy's current film project will chronicle the incredible true story of suicide prevention advocates, Kevin Berthia and Kevin Briggs. In 2005, Kevin Berthia was battling depression and went to the Golden Gate Bridge with the intention to jump. This is where he met Sergeant Kevin Briggs, who was on patrol. Deemed the “Guardian of the Golden Gate” due to his efforts that have kept more than 200 people from jumping off the bridge, Briggs listened to Berthia for 92 minutes. Ultimately, Berthia made the decision to come back over the rail, choosing hope. This moment was captured by a nearby photographer and the resulting image has been shared globally. Their story of human connection shares just how powerful being there for one another can be. In producing this film, we seek to serve hope to those who feel alone and share a message that recovery is possible.  

For partnership or press inquiries, email us at films@fotolanthropy.com

To become an official sponsor or donor, learn more: bit.ly/FotolanthropyFilm

Name: Plano a Plano
Description:
Plano a Plano es una productora de cine y televisión independiente. Fundada por César Benítez en 2011, desde entonces hemos producido series para todas las cadenas del país. 

Lo nuestro es contar historias y lo hemos hecho en Ceuta con EL PRÍNCIPE, en Sevilla con ALLÍ ABAJO y en Santander con LA VERDAD. Hemos ido atrás en el tiempo con EL CASO. CRÓNICA DE SUCESOS y hemos convertido a un perro en detective en SABUESOS. 

Disfrutamos las series diarias, como en SERVIR Y PROTEGER y nos fascinan los thrillers y la investigación, como los que hemos desarrollado en TOY BOY y DESAPARECIDOS.

Sin olvidar el entretenimiento, nos hemos movido en la educación vial con ARRANCA EN VERDE, las relaciones sentimentales con MEJOR LLAMA A PILAR y el entretenimiento más puro con PLAN RENOVE.

Con la previsión de la evidente evolución del sector, además en Plano a Plano apostamos por el mundo digital. Con PASIONARIA MILLENNIAL estrenamos nuestra primera serie diseñada y producida exclusivamente para la plataforma Instagram. 

Y como lo que nos gusta es contar historias, nos encontramos en la preparación de nuestro primer largometraje. Una película inspirada en la novela “En la oscuridad” de Antonio Pampliega.

Name: Cinema for Peace Foundation Berlin
Description:
Since 2002 Cinema for Peace has been a worldwide initiative, promoting humanity through film while inviting members
of the international film community to attend the Cinema for Peace Awards Gala Night, annually staged within the period
of the Berlin International Film Festival. Showcasing cinematic work which highlights the human condition and human
values, we have created a platform for peace and tolerance. During the evening’s proceedings at the Konzerthaus, while
excerpts from exemplary works are screened, directors and producers are celebrated with the Cinema for Peace Award for commendable works. Cinema for Peace brings together international star guests and global personalities from the world of film, media, politics, business and society, while celebrating the power of the moving image and its ability to unite
cultures. This prestigious event is a symbol of peace, freedom and tolerance, a symbol with a lasting effect on the world of film and media, initiating important projects and the free exchange of ideas.

Glassworks
Description:
For more than 25 years, we have developed visual content for all platforms through creative services such as concept development, live-action production, visual effects, CGI, compositing, design, 2D and 3D animation, colour grading, premium finishing, and emerging technologies including VR, AR, and live experiences.

We believe in craftsmanship, imagination and passion. Working with agility and calm determination, we offer the right talent, pioneer innovation, and collaborate with our clients to create work that takes the breath away.

Name: Medusa Film s.p.a.
Description:
Nata nel 1995, Medusa film si è posta stabilmente al vertice del mercato cinematografico italiano: i risultati ottenuti in tutte le stagioni dal 2001 ad oggi ne hanno consolidato il primato e la leadership.
La linea editoriale di Medusa si focalizza su produzioni italiane che comprendono vari generi, dalle commedie ai film romantici, dai film comici a quelli di azione e, sempre più spesso, ad opere di autori affermati si affiancano proposte di giovani registi, cui Medusa riserva una particolare attenzione.
Medusa Film è una società con unico socio soggetta all’attività di direzione coordinamento di Mediaset SPA.

Name: Hybride VFX
Description:
Hybride VFX specializes in visual effects for film and television. Hybride VFX is also a member of the large technocreative family of Ubisoft, a world leader in the video game and entertainment industry.

Pioneer of its industry in Quebec, the studio was founded in 1991 and has since developed an enviable international reputation. Thanks to its expertise, acknowledged throughout the industry, Hybride VFX has been instrumental in the creation of many renowned Hollywood productions, including Avatar, Jurassic World, Arrival, the last six installments of the Star Wars franchise and the high-end TV series The Mandalorian, The Book of Boba Fett and Andor broadcast by Disney+. With a team of dedicated and talented experts, Hybride VFX is today renowned for its innovation and creativity. The quality of its work and its renowned ethics have ensured the company a loyal clientele for over three decades.

Name: Soho VFX
Description:
Soho VFX is a world-class visual effects studio, producing high quality photo realistic effects for feature film and television projects.

Founded in 2002 by partners Allan Magled, Berj Bannayan, Soho VFX began as a boutique studio employing only a handful of people. From the beginning, the studio's specialty was the production of high-quality photo-realistic visual effects. In 2005, Soho VFX landed itself a leading visual effects role: the creation of the elastic "Mr. Fantastic" in Marvel's The Fantastic Four. For this project, the studio expanded to include more than 40 artists. Since then, Soho VFX has helped superheroes come to life in several other Marvel productions.

In 2007, Soho VFX expanded its facilities again in order to take on almost 200 shots for The Incredible Hulk. The studio's success on this blockbuster project propelled it to become a world-renowned visual effects house. To this day, a life-sized model of the Hulk towers over the studio's reception area, commemorating the determination and drive of the entire Soho VFX team.

Since then, Soho VFX has continued to produce top-quality visual effects, contributing to many box office hits, including: X-Men Origins: Wolverine, The A-Team, Battle: Los Angeles, and Rise of the Planet of the Apes.

Name: Bavaria Film Gruppe
Description:
Die Bavaria Film GmbH bildet zusammen mit ihren Tochtergesellschaften eine moderne und breit aufgestellte Unternehmensgruppe in der deutschsprachigen Film-, TV- und Streaming-Branche. Sie blickt auf eine mehr als hundertjährige Geschichte zurück.

Heute gehören zum Kerngeschäft die Entwicklung, Produktion und Verwertung von Bewegtbildinhalten fiktionaler und non-fiktionaler Genres über alle Verbreitungswege. Als weiteren Schwerpunkt betreibt das Unternehmen am Medienstandort Geiselgasteig südlich von München eine bedeutende Mischimmobilie für Studio- und Bürozwecke. Mit einem jährlichen Umsatz in Höhe von 311,4 Millionen Euro (Geschäftsjahr 2023/24) ist die Bavaria Film ein mittelständisches Unternehmen, das über alle Beteiligungen hinweg rund 1.500 feste und freie Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeiter beschäftigt. Die Gesellschafter des Unternehmens sind über privatwirtschaftliche Tochtergesellschaften der WDR, der SWR, der BR und der MDR sowie der Freistaat Bayern über die LfA Förderbank Bayern.

Die Bavaria Film ist als Management-Holding organisiert und in vier Geschäftsbereiche strukturiert: "Content", "Rights & Distribution", "Studios & Services" sowie "Immobilien".

Link zum Impressum: https://www.bavaria-film.de/impressum

Name: Base FX
Description:
Driven by arts and creativity in filmmaking, Base FX, award-winning and dedicated visual effects and animation studio, specialises in producing high-end special effects that include creature and character animation, fluid and dynamic effects and compositing to realistic matte painting for feature films and television. With the mission to inspire and provide world-class stunning and captivating visual effects to clients and worldwide audience alongside with our skilled artists, we work closely with clients and world’s leading studios to achieve and deliver breath-taking and outstanding results. 

With over 10 years of dedication in the visual effects industry, the company has a portfolio of over 130 films, including recent blockbuster films such as Aquaman and Bumblebee, and has won three Emmy Awards namely, The Pacific (HBO), Broadwalk Empire (HBO), Black Sails (STARZ) and Star Wars: The Mandalorian in 2010, 2011, 2014 and 2020 respectively. This includes an Oscar nomination in 2015 for the Marvel blockbuster, Captain America: The Winter Soldier and Oscar-nomination for Star Wars: The Force Awakens in 2016 as well, making Base FX the first Asian visual effects studio to have won these prestigious awards. 
Headquartered in Beijing, China, Base FX has studios located in Wuxi, Xiamen and Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia.

Name: Universal Studios Florida Production Group
Description:
Universal Studios Florida Production Group's Pledge to You

We provide world-class sound stages, state of the art production support facilities, access to unique backlot locations, and exemplary production management and administrative services to television, film and print production companies, and our in-house colleagues. Our staff is professional and focused on a great client experience, striving to exceed everyone's expectation.

Name: Labodigital
Description:
FROM RECORD TO PLAY
Es mucho más que un flujo de trabajo, es nuestra filosofía. Nuestro trabajo inicia con el primer claquetazo en set, hasta llegar al estreno de tu proyecto en cualquier plataforma audiovisual, e incluso preservarlo para su uso en el futuro. Estamos comprometidos a tener siempre el mejor talento y lo último en tecnología para que cualquier proyecto pueda concretarse con el más alto nivel de calidad.

Name: Barnstorm VFX
Description: Emmy-nominated studio embodying the pioneering ingenuity, daring creativity, & freewheeling spirit of the first aviators

Name: MIA | Mercato Internazionale Audiovisivo
Description:
MIA | Mercato Internazionale Audiovisivo, is the biggest and most important industry event and content market in the Italian territory and has become one of the must-attend events in Europe and internationally for the global players of the Film and TV industry. MIA brings together the representatives of some of the most prestigious production and distribution companies, networks, digital platforms, independent studios and major groups, to discuss and define together the future paradigms of the global ANIMATION, DOC& FACTUAL, DRAMA and FILM ecosystem.

For more info visit: www.miamarket.it

Name: Film at Lincoln Center
Description:
Film at Lincoln Center (FLC) is a nonprofit organization that celebrates cinema as an essential art form and fosters a vibrant home for film culture to thrive. FLC presents premier film festivals, retrospectives, new releases, and restorations year-round in state-of-the-art theaters at New York’s Lincoln Center for the Performing Arts. FLC offers audiences the opportunity to discover works from established and emerging directors from around the world with a passionate community of film lovers at marquee events including the New York Film Festival and New Directors/New Films.  

Founded in 1969, FLC is committed to preserving the excitement of the theatrical experience for all audiences, advancing high-quality film journalism through the publication of Film Comment, cultivating the next generation of film industry professionals through our FLC Academies, and enriching the lives of all who engage with our programs. 

Become a Member or Patron today and support the mission of Film at Lincoln Center.

Name: Tapes To Digital
Description:
Tapes to digital is an Australian company that offers a quick and professional service that converts VHS tapes to USB at an affordable price 
Our VHS to digital conversion service is 100% secure and available across Australia, so you're sure to find a local Tapes to Digital service near you.

 We convert camcorder tapes, home movies, mini DV tapes to USB and also repair broken or damage tapes so you can watch those precious memories once again. 
Our VHS to DVD conversion service includes copying tapes to your preferred media e.g. to DVD or USB. We can also transfer your precious home videos to DVD for countless hours of family fun.

Name: Ntropic
Description:
We produce beautiful visual content for every medium — but that’s not what makes us unique. What makes us unique is our intuition:  knowing how to generate ideas that can penetrate an oversaturated market and knowing how to take you to the finish line, thinking creatively to solve challenges at every stage. Most of all, we care about getting it right.

Our creative process begins with an open door:  whether you come to us with a fully fleshed-out campaign or that sort-of-cool idea your intern thought up, our artists and engineers will help you take it to the next level in concept and in execution. We believe the best concepts emerge from a fluid exchange of ideas. Together, we can find powerful ways to bring your stories to life. 

We’ve been doing this long enough to know that the path from concept to completion isn’t always linear. That’s why we work with concepts in motion, shaping and distilling along the way to produce work that people want to see. Lots of companies create content, and everyone has similar tools, but we know how to reach people on a visceral level and have fun doing it. From our start making skateboard videos to working on National TV campaigns we are passionate about what we do and that’s why we got into this business in the first place.

Name: Jim Henson's Creature Shop
Description:
Jim Henson’s Creature Shop provides digital puppetry, animatronic creatures, animation, and soft puppets to the international film, television, theater, live event and advertising industries. Recent credits include Fraggle Rock: Back to the Rock (Apple TV+), Duff’s Happy Fun Bake Time (discovery+), The Dark Crystal: Age of Resistance (Netflix), Word Party (Netflix), and Earth to Ned (Disney+). Based in Los Angeles and New York with satellite shop capabilities internationally, the Shop is known for designing and building some of the world’s best-known characters including the Sesame Street puppets and the classic Muppets, as well as the iconic characters from Dinosaurs, Farscape, The Dark Crystal, Labyrinth, and many more. Other feature film credits include Where the Wild Things Are, Forgetting Sarah Marshall, Hitchhiker’s Guide to the Galaxy, and Five Children and It.

The shop is also known for its live performance work with artists like Coldplay, Cee Lo Green, Kanye West, Lady Gaga and Deadmau5.  A recipient of more than 9 Emmy Awards for its outstanding work building puppets for Sesame Street, the Shop also received an Academy Award for its visual effects work on the film Babe. Other awards include a Scientific and Engineering Academy Award for the Henson Performance Control System, a powerful custom-based interface for puppeteers, and an Emmy Award for its work in developing the Henson Digital Performance Studio, a patented control system technology that enables puppeteers to perform computer-generated characters in real time.

Name: Absolute
Description:
We bring world-class visual effects to the advertising, TV, film and music industries, through careful craft and state-of-the-art technology.

We're a team of storytellers and visionaries, who thrive on exceptional client collaborations. Quality, exceeded expectations and a little magic are everyday events - and have been since our inception in 2004.

From our home in London's Soho, we offer end-to-end editorial, colour, visual effects, CG and audio solutions, creating stunning visuals across all media platforms. We're lucky enough to collaborate with some of the industry's legendary talent, delivering work for some of the top brands.

What's more, our sister company, Blind Pig, offer 'nose-to-tail' animation. Be it creative direction, illustration or motion design you are after, Blind Pig can help turn your vision into reality.

"Absolute was never about me going it alone. I realised that with the right people, I could build a company around the industry's core principles: creativity, people, talent and great work." - Absolute's Founder and CEO, David Smith

Name: FilmLA
Description: Film office for the City and County of Los Angeles and other local municipalities. Our services support efforts to expand film production in Greater L.A.

Name: UFX Studios
Description:
As an international award-winning VFX studio based in Bruxelles, Wallonia and Flanders, UFX Studios works on circa 40 films & series a year and can accomodate up to 150 artists.

With a team of internationaly acclaimed talents, Umedia VFX brings directors solutions to their artistic needs, while respecting production constraints.
Specialized in visual effects, we offer complete services from budgeting, previz, design, to set supervision and 2D & 3D effects while also financing up to 55% of the VFX costs.

Name: Dynamo
Description: Founded in 2006, Dynamo is an independent Colombian entertainment company based in Bogota with offices in Mexico City, Madrid, and New York. It is one of the most important audiovisual production companies in Ibero-America. To date, Dynamo has produced more than 42 feature films, 23 television formatted series. Dynamo has supported talent like the team behind the series like Wild District (Netflix), Crime Diaries (Netflix), Green Frontier (Netflix), and films such as The Hidden Face, Monos and recently Tarumama (HBO Max). Beyond developing original content, Dynamo also offers top-notch production services to foreign producers that wish to shoot in Colombia. It has provided local production services to many ambitious projects. Including television shows like Narcos (Netflix), El Chapo (Netflix/Univision), and Falco (Amazon) and films like Los 33 with Antonio Banderas, American Made with Tom Cruise, Mile 22 with Mark Wahlberg, Gemini Man with Will Smith, among others.

Name: DUBBING BROTHERS
Description:
Crée en 1989, le groupe Dubbing Brothers est aujourd’hui leader sur le marché du doublage. Dubbing Brothers met à disposition ses infrastructures implantées à l’échelle internationale et propose une large gamme de services à valeur ajoutée (techniques et créatifs).

Dubbing Brothers offre une gamme de services audio, vidéo, techniques et créatifs la plus complète qui soit, notamment en matière de doublage multilingue, de mixage centralisé (FILM, TV, HV), de sous-titrage, mais également des prestations de laboratoire audio/vidéo VOD, Mastering 4K Ultra HD et de stockage hautement sécurisé pour tous types de données.

Dubbing Brothers s’attache à constamment innover et enrichir son offre de prestations à valeur ajoutée pour offrir la meilleure qualité de service à ses clients.

Name: Storm Studios VFX
Description: Storm Studios is an award winning visual effects studio based in Oslo, Norway. We've delivered VFX for The Last of Us, Black Panther: Wakanda Forever, Shadow and Bone S2, Star Trek: Strange New Worlds, Fate of the Furious, Pixels and countless other features, TV shows and commercials. Please follow us on LinkedIn to get the latest studio updates or feel free to contact us with inquiries by visiting our website at www.stormstudios.no

Name: Danish Film Institute (DFI)
Description:
The Danish Film Institute (DFI) is Denmark's national agency for film and cinema culture, operating under the Ministry of Culture. 

We allocate subsidies for the development, production and distribution of Danish films as well as international co-productions. Support programmes also extend to film education and international promotion at film festivals. The DFI includes a library, a stills and posters archive and a film archive. The DFI Film House is open to the public and houses the national Cinematheque.

Name: Austin Film Festival
Description: Austin Film Festival furthers the art and craft of filmmaking by inspiring and championing the work of screenwriters, filmmakers, and all artists who use the language of film to tell a story. AFF provides amazing year-round film/event programming, opportunities for young filmmakers (9 -18 year old) and the internationally celebrated annual Film Festival & Conference held each October.

Name: Gunpowder & Sky
Description:
Gunpowder & Sky is a fast growing independent global entertainment company, creating premium content unrestricted by format, as well as genre-specific destinations for the streaming generation.

Since its inception in 2016, Gunpowder & Sky has released more than  30 feature films and series, as well as hundreds of short films theatrically, on TVOD as well as in partnership with leading platforms such as  HBO, Netflix, MTV, Hulu, Sky, Showtime, DirecTV, Amazon, Facebook, YouTube, and soon Quibi and HBO Max.

With in-house development, production, marketing and distribution capabilities, the company operates as a full 360-studio and oversees a library of more than 1500 titles. Notable films and series include The Little Hours, Cam, Hearts Beat Loud, Lords of Chaos, Her Smell, Tragedy Girls, Summer of 84, Villains, Hounds of Love, “50 States of Terror” and “Drawn and Recorded”.

With an audience of more than 50M monthly unique visitors, Gunpowder & Sky’s current streaming networks include DUST, a sci-fi brand that presents thought-provoking visions of the future; ALTER, a new horror brand that explores the human condition through warped perspectives; and CUT, an unscripted comedy brand that is home to “Truth or Drink” and “Grandmas Smoking Weed”. DUST, ALTER and CUT are presently distributed on HBO, Vizio TV, Comcast FLEX, Roku, YouTube, Facebook, AT&T, DirecTV, Sinclair, Samsung TV Plus and Instagram.

Headquartered in Los Angeles with offices in New York and London, Gunpowder & Sky was founded by Van Toffler and Floris Bauer, in partnership with The Chernin Group and AT&T.

Name: Cine Yelmo
Description:
Pensando en el confort de los clientes, las salas de Yelmo Cines ofrecen una visibilidad total, ya que todas están dispuestas en grada, para que nada ni nadie se interponga entre el espectador y la película. Los más avanzados sistemas de proyección y sonido hacen que en todas las salas Yelmo Cines se ofrezca una gran espectacularidad y una experiencia de ocio de primer orden.

Síguenos en:
www.yelmocines.es
www.facebook.com/yelmocines
www.twitter.com/yelmocines

Name: Doha Film Institute
Description:
Doha Film Institute is an independent, not-for-profit cultural organisation. It supports the growth of the local film community through cultivating film appreciation, enhancing industry knowledge and contributing to the development of sustainable creative industries in Qatar. The Institute’s platforms include funding and production of local, regional and international films; skills-sharing and mentorship programmes; film screenings; the Ajyal Youth Film Festival; and Qumra.With culture, community, learning and entertainment at its foundation, the Institute is committed to supporting Qatar’s 2030 vision for the development of a knowledge-based economy.

We are dedicated to the development of a sustainable film industry, generating film appreciation, and nurturing a vibrant film culture in Qatar. 
  
One of our main aims is to provide Qataris and local and regional talent with opportunities to tell their stories through the medium of film, as well as opportunities to develop skills and professional careers in the film industry.

Name: VFXwire
Description:
Here and on vfxwire.com, we present you with the best ways to find talent for your company, post jobs, and promote your company. Artists get a look behind the scenes of top-notch VFX companies and also have a home where they can promote their own skills.

Check out the latest News, Jobs, and behind the scenes from the Visual Effects and Film Industry.

Name: UFX Studios
Description:
As an international award-winning VFX studio based in Bruxelles, Paris, Wallonia and Flanders, UFX Studios works on circa 40 films & series a year and can accomodate up to 150 artists.

With a team of internationaly acclaimed talents, Umedia VFX brings directors solutions to their artistic needs, while respecting production constraints.
Specialized in visual effects, we offer complete services from budgeting, previz, design, to set supervision and 2D & 3D effects while also financing up to 55% of the VFX costs.

Name: FilmNation Entertainment
Description:
FilmNation Entertainment is a leading distributor, financier and producer of independent films and is a destination for many of the world's most renowned filmmakers.

Since being founded in 2008 by veteran film executive Glen Basner, FilmNation has established itself as a home for specialty filmmaking with global appeal by focusing on a highly selective group of filmmakers and projects that emphasize both creative integrity and commercial potential.

http://www.filmnation.com
http://www.facebook/com/filmnation
http://www.twitter.com/filmnation

Name: Tu Propio Negocio
Description: m

Name: icflix
Description:
Headquartered in Dubai, UAE, icflix is the Middle East and North Africa’s (MENA) first unlimited streaming platform that provides Jazwood (Arabic content), Bollywood and Hollywood movies, TV series, cartoons and documentaries, all of which can be watched on any internet connected device. icflix’s mission is to deliver the best online entertainment value, selection and experience to a worldwide subscriber base. By providing Jazwood, Bollywood and Hollywood content in one place, icflix serves as a unique video on demand platform that can be enjoyed by both MENA subscribers and global audiences alike*.

icflix is the ultimate digital experience that empowers internet users to have the freedom to choose where, when and how they watch their favorite movies and TV shows. icflix streams entertainment from a wide range of leading content providers around the world and offers various material in English, Arabic and French. The icflix service offers a selection of both first-run and exclusive content, current TV series, and classic movies and TV shows. icflix also provides new releases on a pay-per-view basis so that users stay up to date with all the biggest blockbusters. Additionally, icflix is equipped with social media features that allow users to comment, rate and share what they’re watching.

* While all three genres are accessible by MENA users, only Bollywood and Jazwood content are accessible outside of the MENA region.

Name: Working Title
Description: Film and television production company.

Name: Filmarket Hub
Description: The online marketplace for curated films and series in development. We match talent and unproduced projects with leading companies in the industry!

Name: EDI Effetti Digitali Italiani
Description:
EDI Effetti Digitali Italiani is specialized in advisory, supervision and production of digital visual effects.
EDI was founded in Milan, Italy, in February 2001. EDI was soon focused exclusively on advertising and producing visual effects for major production companies and for the most well-known film directors. Since 2002, the company has opened to the movie market and has developed at the same time a department designed for post-production services.

Name: United International Pictures
Description: United International Pictures (UIP) was formed in 1981 and is jointly owned by its Partners, Paramount Pictures and Universal Pictures. Since its formation UIP has distributed over 1,000 films including more than 100 Academy Award winners. UIP continues to bring many of the most exciting films made today to international cinema audiences. With distribution offices in 16 countries and licensees in a further 47, UIP distributes Paramount and Universal films to cinemas in Europe, Latin America and the Far East.

Name: Twickenham Film Studios
Description:
Twickenham Film Studios is a historic production facility in South West London. Home to multi-purpose film stages, Oscar-winning sound studios, state of the art post-production facilities, and the UK’s only LED Virtual Production studio of its kind.

Combining pioneering technology with a world-class creative team, we bring stories to life with innovation and passion for this incredible industry. 

Est. 1913

Name: Film Production Services
Description:
Film Budget and Schedules since 1985

All Genres

Studio:
    Independant, Freelance for Time Warner, Columbia Tri-Star, Paramount Home Video, 20th Century Fox/Searchlight Pictures.

Features include production deals with Paramount Video (Sci-Fi, Horror, Comedy, Action/Adventure)
to Series Episodics.

with a focus on superior production value.

Name: Kinoplex
Description: O Kinoplex é o maior exibidor nacional com mais de 100 anos de história. A empresa tem 271 salas distribuídas em 19 cidades brasileiras, equipadas com o máximo de segurança, tecnologia e conforto para levar toda a magia e emoção do cinema aos seus espectadores. Por ano, o Kinoplex lança, em média, 250 filmes, que atraem mais de 20 milhões de pessoas.
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: Hoop VFX
Description: We are a fully scalable and reliable outsourcing studio providing 2d and 3d support services such as roto, paint, camera tracking, rotomation, keying and 2d compositing services for various vfx studios and post-production houses around the world.

Name: Birdo
Description: We are a multi-awarded independent animation studio and creators of the Mascots for the Olympic and Paralympic Games Rio2016

Name: Lee Films
Description:
We are an advertising production company founded in 1990. 
 
Focused on the quality and creativity of all of our projects, we are proud to say that we have produced more than 1.000 audiovisual projects, both nacional and international, having shot in places as diverse as Germany, Argentina, Bulgaria, Canada, Chile, China, Cuba, USA, France, Hungary, India, Italy, Kenya, Morocco, Portugal, United Kingdom, Czech Republic, South Africa, Ukraine, Latvia ... 
 
We have also provided production services to Argentina, USA, France, Italy, South Korea, Sweden, Brazil and Taiwan.
 
During all this time we have developed a solid network that allows us to adapt to every project and every budget, no matter which the chosen location is. 

Although we move around the world, our headquarters are in Madrid and our capital is 100% national. 
 
Vimeo:
https://vimeo.com/leefilms/

Facebook: 
https://www.facebook.com/LeeFilmsSpain/

Instagram:
https://www.instagram.com/lee_films/

Name: Cutting Edge
Description:
Creatively led. Technically bred. For over 30 years Cutting Edge have been crafting inventive content, and celebrating the creative idea. We create compelling content and clever backend solutions for the advertising and film and television industries.

Our key services include Reality Television Technical Services, Digital, Design, Animation, Sound & Picture Post-Production, VFX, and Branded Communications. We have offices in Brisbane, Sydney, the Gold Coast & Tokyo.

Name: See-Saw Films
Description:
See-Saw Films is an Academy Award, Emmy and BAFTA-winning television and film production house, founded in 2008 by Joint CEOs Emile Sherman and Iain Canning. The innovative production company is made up of an industry-leading team across offices in London and Sydney, with Helen Gregory and Simon Gillis as Joint Managing Directors, and Liz Watts as Head of Television and Film, Australia.

See-Saw’s films and television shows have been nominated for 30 Academy Awards and won 5, nominated for 54 BAFTAs and won 14, nominated for 37 Emmys and won 12 and nominated for 98 AACTAs and won 27.

See-Saw has an in-house sales arm Cross City Films, which handles international sales of its titles in select territories.

See-Saw has two joint venture production companies: 'I Am That' – with creator/director Garth Davis (Lion), and 'Picking Scabs' – with writer/showrunner Samantha Strauss (The End). And a new in-house label 'fanboy' run by Heartstopper EP Patrick Walters.

See-Saw has also invested in Tom Winchester’s TV company, Pure Fiction alongside talent agency Hamilton Hodell.

Name: Corridor Digital
Description:
Corridor Digital is an independent entertainment company with over 2 billion worldwide video views, 15 million YouTube subscribers, and average monthly viewership of around 30 million.

We create content for CorridorDigital.com, YouTube, Netflix, Amazon, Hulu and Commercial Advertising. 

Founded by Sam Gorski and Niko Pueringer in 2009, what began as two friends creating internet videos in an apartment has developed over 11 years into one of the most novel and influential digital production companies in the modern content era. 

www.corridordigital.com
www.youtube.com/corridorcrew
contact@corridordigital.com

Name: CINESA
Description:
CINESA es la empresa líder en exhibición cinematográfica en España, gracias a los 11 millones de espectadores que cada año visitan una de las casi 450 salas, repartidas en los 37 cines que tiene en las mejores localizaciones de las principales ciudades españolas. Destacan los 14 cines de Madrid y 7 en Barcelona.

Cinesa forma parte de ODEON Cinemas Group, el mayor exhibidor de Europa, que cuenta con presencia en 9 países a través de más de 290 cines, 2.500 pantallas y más de 9.000 empleados. En 2016, el Grupo fue adquirido por AMC Theatres dando lugar a la mayor compañía de exhibición cinematográfica del mundo.

Name: Atomic Fiction
Description:
Atomic Fiction is a fast-growing visual effects studio that provides state of the art imagery for industry leaders in streaming and theatrical content.  Our team is comprised of artists, designers, and technologists on a mission to create content that evokes emotion, inspires discussion, and becomes rooted in popular culture.  We craft striking visuals for some of the biggest properties in film and episodic. 

On September 14th, 2018 we officially joined @Deluxe1915 Entertainment Group and became a part of the Award-Winning @Method_Studios

We’re so honored to have joined such an amazing group of talented artists and individuals, and can’t wait to show you what we’ve got in-store for our next chapter! 

Follow us @Method_Studios, and keep an eye out for posts with #MethodMTL and #MethodSF for some of your favorite familiar faces! 

See you there

Name: Amblin Entertainment
Description:
Amblin Entertainment is a film and television production company, led by Steven Spielberg, that develops and produces films using the Amblin Entertainment and DreamWorks Pictures banners and includes Amblin Television, a longtime leader in quality programming. 

Amblin’s recent releases include Steven Spielberg’s The Fabelmans, which won the Golden Globe for Best Picture Drama; 1917, which won three Academy Awards and earned $385m at the global box office; and Green Book, which won three Academy Awards, including Best Picture, and grossed more than $320m worldwide.

Name: Edinburgh International Film Festival
Description:
79th edition: 13 - 19 August 2026.

Edinburgh International Film Festival (EIFF) is the world’s oldest continually running film festival and, in 2024, relaunched as a brand new entity with a new board of industry leaders. Honouring 70+ years of festival history, EIFF showcases the very best filmmaking talent in a re-energised format that is rooted in a local Scottish context whilst embracing the international diversity of creative expression.

EIFF is poised to accelerate the discovery of new talent through its two centrepiece competitions; The Sean Connery Prize for Feature Filmmaking Excellence, which carries a cash prize of £50K, and The Thelma Schoonmaker Prize for Short Filmmaking Excellence, which carries a cash prize of £15K, both decided by audience vote.

EIFF’s August fixture runs in parallel to a host of creative festivals taking place in Edinburgh, including The Fringe, Edinburgh International Festival, Edinburgh International Book Festival, Edinburgh International Art Festival, Edinburgh International TV Festival, and many more, which sell millions of tickets to cultural connoisseurs from around the world.

The EIFF Board includes Chair Andrew Macdonald of DNA Films (TRAINSPOTTING, THE BEACH, 28 DAYS LATER, SUNSHINE ON LEITH, CIVIL WAR), Vice Chair Amy Jackson of Unified Theory (THE NEST, AFTERSUN, THE END WE START FROM), Peter Rice (former Chairman of General Entertainment at Disney and President of 21st Century Fox), Teresa Moneo (Director of UK Film at Netflix), Isla Macgillivray (Saffrey) and Romana Ramzan (Screenburn Interactive).

Helmed by CEO & Festival Director Paul Ridd and Festival Producer Emma Boa, the team works to create a world-class showcase for independent film and filmmaking talent.

A global player celebrating the very best that cinema has to offer in a modern, energised context, the core strategy of the revitalised Festival is to embed within the wider cultural offering taking place in Edinburgh in August.

Name: Rotomaker Studio
Description:
Rotomaker is a complete solution for all your visual effects outsourcing needs. You can consider us as your back-end / off-shore production facility partner for your visual effects below labor intensive sourcing requirements.

 At Rotomaker Studio's we believe the highest quality work is created with an environment where people enjoy working and where every one is treated fairly, honestly and with respect. Ever since we started, We've been committed to these benefits and have built our company with the two primary goals of creating high quality, creatively inspiring entertainment and taking great care of our employees. With some of the world's top creative talents and best technologies, Rotomaker always delivers outstanding work to all their clients.
 We’re one of the largest and most creative Post Production companies in the India. Established in Hyderabad. We have the capacity and creativity to produce all manner of digital effects for feature films and TV shows of all scales. Our highly talented artists take filmmaker's ideas and turn them into spectacular cinematic reality.

We tailor our production pipelines to each specific job. For our clients, this means a custom-built solution – on budget and on time, every time.

Our Hyderabad facility is among the largest and most advanced in India. So whatever the scale or complexity of the project, we have the resources and know-how to deliver something truly memorable.

Name: Hiventy
Description:
We are now TransPerfect Media France! Follow us over here: https://www.linkedin.com/showcase/transperfectmedia/ 

Hiventy has been providing high-end, technical solutions to the entertainment industry for over 35 years and is a trusted partner of many producers, distributors, broadcasters, and media companies worldwide. 
Covering the full range of services required to create, conform, and deliver audiovisual content: image and sound post-production, secure storage and media asset management, image and sound restoration, subtitling, dubbing, and deliveries to cinemas, TV, or digital platforms on any file format. Our services are provided in the best security conditions. Paris-based, with Hiventy branches all across the world. We rely on experienced project managers, skilled technicians, innovative equipment, and our strong IT department offering technical solutions to any specific requests. 

Since being acquired by TransPerfect in 2022, we have expanded our capabilities through this global brand's international network of media studios, innovative technology solutions and resources. As your trusted creative partner, we guarantee top-quality services in the best possible timeframe!

More information: http://www.hiventy.com/
 Facebook: http://bit.ly/facebook_hiventy
 Twitter : http://bit.ly/twitter_Hiventy
 Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/hiventy.official/
  Localisation : France (Paris, Malakoff, Joinville-Le-Pont), Poland (Warsaw), Vietnam (Hô Chi Minh Ville)

Name: TITRAFILM
Description: Since 1933, TITRAFILM is a provider of sound post-production, localization and delivery solutions to customers in the Media Entertainement industry.

Name: Biscuit Filmworks
Description:
Biscuit Filmworks is a Los Angeles and London-based production company founded in 2000. The company is known for cultivating some of the industry’s top talent and producing much of its most memorable work specialising in Commercials, Music Videos and Experiential Activations.

Biscuit has been one of the most prolific and award-winning companies in commercial production, most recently being named as the top Production Company 2024 by Televisual, as well as first in the Peer Reviewed list and three directors being ranked in the top 5 in the Televisual Top 30 Lists of 2024. Biscuit Filmworks also ranked 3rd in Ad Age Production Company A-List 2024 and 3rd in the Palme d’Or Production Company list in 2023. was also ranked 3rd on the Palme d’Or Production Company list in 2023. Additional Cannes Lions wins included Andreas Nilsson winning the Grand Prix for his film for Apple ‘R.I.P Leon’; films helmed by Biscuit directors won a total of four golds, four silvers and four bronzes, putting Biscuit in the top 5 production companies in the world. Biscuit Filmworks also won Production Company of the year at the British Arrows 2022 and 2023, with Jeff Low and Steve Rogers topping the Best Directors lists in 2022 and 2023 respectively. In 2023 Biscuit won production company of the year at Kinsale and Creative Circle Awards, plus two DGA wins for Outstanding Directorial Achievement in Commercials for Noam Murro and one win for Andreas Nilsson, and countless AICP, D&AD, Clio, British Arrows, Cannes Lions, and One Show awards for all directors on the Biscuit roster.

The company is regularly included in Ad Age’s top production company list, and Noam Murro has been named in Creativity’s Top 50 list of creative professionals In 2018 Biscuit was named one of the top three production companies in the world at Cannes Lions and since 2018 has been in the top six production companies in the UK in Campaign Magazine, taking the top spot in 2022 and 2023.

Name: Film Movement
Description:
Founded in 2002, Film Movement is a North American distributor of award-winning independent and foreign films based in New York City. We have released more than 250 feature films and dozens of shorts culled from prestigious film festivals worldwide, including the Oscar-nominated films Theeb (2016) and Corpus Christi (2020).

Film Movement’s theatrical releases include American independent films, documentaries, and foreign art house titles. Our catalog includes titles by directors such as Hirokazu Kore-eda, Maren Ade, Jessica Hausner, Andrei Konchalovsky, Andrzej Wajda, Diane Kurys, Ciro Guerra and Melanie Laurent.

In 2015, Film Movement launched the reissue label Film Movement Classics, featuring new restorations released theatrically as well as on Blu-ray and DVD, including films by such noted directors as Eric Rohmer, Peter Greenaway, Bille August, Marleen Gorris, Takeshi Kitano, King Hu, Arturo Ripstein, Sergio Corbucci, Ettore Scola and Luchino Visconti.

Our Omnibus Entertainment label was launched in 2014 to provide a home for a wider variety of films as well as TV and other types of programming.

With the addition of the Bond 360 catalog of superb documentaries in 2017, Film Movement has further expanded its reach into the educational and library markets.

In late 2018 we launched Film Movement Plus, a new subscription streaming service, available at FilmMovementPlus.com as well as on Apple TV, Amazon Fire, Roku and mobile devices.

Name: PROIMAGENES COLOMBIA
Description: Dedicated to the development of the Colombian film industry, Proimágenes Colombia was founded in 1998 under the Culture Law as a non for profit organization supported by the private and public sectors.Proimágenes administers the Film Development Fund, which supplies resources to the national film productions and coproductions, promotes the Colombian cinema internationally.Proimágenes acts also as the National Film Commission promoting the country as a location for making films and other audiovisual creations ,granting economic incentives as cash rebate or Tax credits for the international projects.

Name: SSVFX
Description:
Established in 2010, SSVFX is an internationally acclaimed visual effects house based in Dublin, Ireland. SSVFX caters for big budget feature film work, independent feature films and high-end TV series.
SSVFX is an award-winning, internationally acclaimed Visual Effects Company based in Dublin, London and LA. 
We have been part of many blockbuster feature films and TV series over years and pride ourselves on quality work crafted by happy, talented and creative people. Some recent credits are Spiderman NWH, The Book of Boba Fett, Wandavision, Cruella, Black Widow and The Irishman.
The diverse and flexible nature of SSVFX allows the company to creatively satisfy all the visual effects needs clients may have. 

From local projects with down to earth roots to international box office smash hits, the SSVFX team continues to strive to bring you joy through the big (and small) screen. 

SSVFX are proud to boast an array of awards that include BAFTA and multiple VES HPA, RTS, AEAF & IFTA nominations & wins.

Name: EuropaCorp
Description: EuropaCorp est au premier rang des studios de cinéma européens. Créé en 1999, EuropaCorp réunit les activités de production, distribution salle, vidéo/VOD, ventes de droits TV pour la France et désormais exploitation de salle de cinéma depuis la création en octobre 2013, d’EuropaCorp CINEMAS créée à l’occasion de l’ouverture de son premier multiplexe à Aéroville. EuropaCorp exerce également les activités de vente des droits internationaux, partenariats et licences, production et édition de bandes originales. Depuis 2010, le Groupe est présent dans la production de fictions TV. Le modèle économique intégré d’EuropaCorp lui permet ainsi de bénéficier de sources de revenus diversifiées. Fort d’un line-up de films de genres variés, et particulièrement présent sur les marchés internationaux, le Groupe a notamment produit ces dernières années les plus gros succès français à l’étranger. Il détient un catalogue de 500 films, et compte 150 collaborateurs permanents.

Name: Fix Studio VFX
Description:
Fix Studio is a post-production company specialising in visual effects, 2D and 3D, colour correction and video mapping. Fix Studio developed its skills through commercials and feature films but it now operates in various other specific fields: architecture, events, digital arts, video arts, experimental films...

Fix Studio was founded in 1999 and handled the post-production of the films produced by Quad. Since then, it has opened to external clients and now also produces content through Fix prod - its dedicated production entity.

Fix Studio offers global solutions and creates VFX for the most prestigious advertising campaigns thanks to a skilled experienced creative team, the right technical decisions made and to the cutting edge technology and equipment available.

Name: Deluxe Spain
Description:
CREATIVE: Services from shooting to final delivery. Features, TV/OTT, and commercials. Dailies in facility, picture postproduction, sound postproduction, VFX, DFX, and mastering.

DISTRIBUTION: Versioning, mastering, transcoding and delivery services for cinemas, platforms and broadcasters. Content localization (dubbing, accessibility, versioning and subtitling).

Name: 01Distribution SRL
Description:
[azienda non più attiva - Visita la pagina di Rai Cinema per conoscere tutte le attività di 01 Distribution]

Dal 2001 al 2011, l'azienda 01 Distribution srl ha operato nel mercato della distribuzione cinematografica come società indipendete (SRL). L'azienda, fondata da Rai Cinema e dai francesi di Studio Canal in una joint venture paritaria al 50%, prese l’avvio proprio a fine giugno 2001. 
Nel 2011 l'azienda viene interamente acquisita dal gruppo Rai come divisione di Rai Cinema e dal 2015 come direzione. 

Per conoscere tutte le attività di 01 Distribution visita e segui la pagina di Rai Cinema e la pagina vetrina di 01 Distribution.

Name: Shree Venkatesh Films
Description:
Shree Venkatesh Films (SVF) is a distinguished Production House in Eastern India with four National Award Winning films to its credit.
 
A humble beginning with Regional Film Production, SVF has matured and gained prominence in Eastern India as a complete Media and Entertainment House with Film & Television Production, Film Distribution & Exhibition, Digital Cinema, Music and AV Equipment Rental.
 
SVF has carved a niche for itself by being known for its Mega Blockbusters in the same breath as its projects in Alternative Cinema. “Chokherbali” being one of its most ambitious attempts is noted for the overwhelming acclaim it received both in the National as well as International Films arena! It went on to be the most popular crossover film of its times!
 
Having ruled over the masses for over a decade with a series of super hit films like Challenge, Chirodini Tumi Je Amar, Sathi etc to name a few, SVF continues to surprise its audiences with its more recent Autograph and Iti Mrinalini.
 
SVF has distributed over 250 Hindi and English Films (put together) including films like Robot; My Name is Khan, Ghajini, Black, Slumdog Millionaire, Dabangg, Taare Zameen Par, Don 2, Tere Naam, Devdas, Bombay etc in addition to its Regional Home Productions.

An illustrious 325+ Digital Cinema Installations under the SVF umbrella makes it one of the largest Digital Cinema rollouts in the country!

Name: Bac Films
Description:
Bac Films est une société de distribution, ventes internationales et production de films qui se positionne comme l’un des studios indépendants majeurs en Europe depuis sa création en 1986. Nous avons assuré la sortie de plus de 550 films, dont 9 Palmes d’Or.

Nous plaçons une importance et une fierté toutes particulières dans l’accompagnement de cinéastes prometteurs tels que Ruben Östlund, Kirill Serebrennikov, Maïmouna Doucouré, Park Chan-Wook et Kaouther Ben Hania, avec lesquels nous jouissons d’une collaboration privilégiée. 

À leurs côtés, de nombreux réalisateurs qui ont forgé le cinéma moderne, tels que Jim Jarmusch, Quentin Tarantino et Wim Wenders.

Name: AbelCine
Description:
AbelCine is a cinematic integrator with over three decades of experience in the cinema and broadcast spaces. With locations in Los Angeles and New York, we have three areas of focus: equipment supply, system integration and production services.

As a systems integrator, AbelCine is unique because we can tap into the full range of knowledge and services we offer in house. Our Sales and Rental teams have expertise supplying production equipment for content creators, media organizations, corporations, houses of worship, and educational institutions. Our technicians offer authorized, factory-level service on cinema equipment from partners such as Angenieux, ARRI, Canon, Cooke, MultiDyne, Sony, ZEISS, and more. Production Services leverages the latest tools, methods and technology to provide crew, tech talent and associated services to pre-produced and live productions.

Learn more about our locations and services:
https://www.abelcine.com/locations

Visit our technical blog:
https://www.abelcine.com/learn

Name: SP Televisão
Description:
Fundada em 2007, a SP Televisão é composta por uma equipa de profissionais com uma vasta experiência na área do audiovisual português e é, atualmente, uma referência entre as produtoras independentes em Portugal, com provas dadas também a nível internacional.
São quatro os pilares em que a SP Televisão baseia a sua linha de conduta, a qual lhe tem permitido conquistar o mercado nacional, por forma a manter relações sólidas e de confiança com os seus clientes, levando aos telespetadores produções de excelência que se distinguem pela sua qualidade e talento, quer ao nível das histórias que contamos, bem como na escolha dos nossos atores, meios técnicos e humanos.
Inovação, Talento, Motivação e Profissionalismo. É assente nestes quatro pilares que temos o poder de criar sonhos, idealizar enredos, personagens, sejam elas boas ou más. De cena em cena, atrevemo-nos a criar emoções e a surpreender todos aqueles que de nós esperam o melhor e a quem nós damos as melhores histórias.

Founded in 2007, SP Televisão is made up of a team of professionals with extensive experience in the portuguese audiovisual area and is currently a reference among independent producers in Portugal, with evidence also given internationally. 
There are four pillars on which SP Televisão bases its line of conduct, which has allowed it to conquer the national market, in order to maintain solid and trusting relationships with its customers, providing viewers with excellent productions that are distinguished by their quality and talent, both in terms of the stories we tell, as well as the choice of our actors, technical and human resources.
Innovation, Talent, Motivation and Professionalism. It is based on these four pillars that we have the power to create dreams, idealize plots, characters, whether good or bad. From scene to scene, we dare to create emotions and surprise all those who expect the best from us and to whom we give the best stories.

Name: Kapow Producciones
Description: Kapow se consolida a nivel global como productora de contenidos de alta calidad, generando formatos de ficción, non fiction y game show.

Name: CJ CGV Vietnam
Description:
CJ CGV, an entertainment platform operator under CJ Group, is the largest film distributor and cinema operator in Vietnam and one of top 5 cinema chains in the world.

Our mission is becoming a role model company for continuous development of the film industry in Vietnam.

CJ CGV has created a unique concept of transforming former multiplexes into “Cultureplex”, where customers not only enjoy the movie itself, but also have access to diverse entertainment experiences provided with the latest technology including IMAX, STARIUM, 4DX, Dolby Atmos as well as completely new and different F&B offerings, while enjoying the highest quality service provided by CGV Cinema's staff.

Through our efforts such as Toto’s Film Making Class, CGV ArtHouse and sponsoring major film events such as HANIFF, Vietnam Film Festival, CJ CGV Vietnam aims at building and enhancing platform where talented filmmakers can be identified.

We are also paying attention to providing movie going experiences for audiences who currently have limited access to quality cinema environment, through CSV programs such as Smile Moon and Movie for Everyone.

In addition, CJ CGV Vietnam provides transparent and professional system which ensures fair conditions for all the business partners.

CJ CGV Vietnam will continue our journey towards the prosperous future of the Vietnam’s movie industry, together with our valued audiences, film makers, business partners and society.
Location: Ho Chi Minh City, Ho Chi Minh City

Name: Dupe VFX | Certified B Corp
Description:
We are Dupe VFX, a world class visual effects company creating outstanding VFX for high-end episodic TV and feature films. With studios in London and Stockholm, we deliver gorgeous work with care for our clients, our team and our environment. 

Since opening our doors in 2018, our approach has been to work in close collaboration with our clients, helping them to solve visual challenges in the most creatively impactful and effective way possible. 

And, as the world's first visual effects company to become a B. Corporation, we’re proud to inspire change in the industry we love. Proving it’s possible to deliver stunning work sustainably, we track and improve our environmental performance and offer our clients CO2 Emission Reports for every project we work on. 

The results speak for themselves. Recent projects include the soon to be released Ballad of Renegade Nell/Lookout Point TV & Disney+ and  Havock/Netflix, alongside Liaison; Better; The Good, The School for Good and Evil; Landscapers, Sex Education, Peaky Blinders, Gangs of London and more.

Name: Screen Scotland
Description:
Screen Scotland drives development of all aspects of Scotland’s film and TV industry, through funding and strategic support.

Screen Scotland is part of Creative Scotland and delivers these services and support with funding from Scottish Government and The National Lottery

Find out more about how we are funding, developing and growing Scotland’s screen sector on our website: www.screen.scot/

Name: Black Kite Studios
Description:
Black Kite is an independent creative studio offering world class visual effects and design. We are talent first technology inspired studio. 
Our community is home to a collective of world-class talent. A group of artists, creators, designers, producers and technologists that have come together to make exceptional artistic visual content.

Name: Motion Picture Industry Pension & Health Plans
Description:
The Motion Picture Industry Pension and Health Plans (MPI) are trust funds established by collective bargaining agreements between many of the unions and employers in the motion picture production industry. They are primarily supported by employer contributions as provided by these agreements. 

The Agreement establishing the Motion Picture Industry Health Plan was signed on October 20, 1952 and the Agreement establishing the Motion Picture Industry Pension Plan was signed on October 26, 1953, by various employers in the Motion Picture Industry and over 40 Unions and Guilds representing employees in the Motion Picture Industry.

Contributions are received from employers engaged in the production of motion pictures or engaged primarily in the business of furnishing materials or services for motion picture productions and which have entered into a collective bargaining agreement(s) with one or more participating unions.

MPI has been recognized with the Seal of Distinction by WorldatWork as an Employer of Choice and is certified as a Great Place to Work.

Name: Sydney Film Festival
Description:
Sydney Film Festival (SFF) is one of the longest-running film festivals in the world, screening narrative feature films, documentaries and short films over 12 days and nights. 

The Festival takes place at SFF’s flagship venue the State Theatre, as well as cinemas in the CBD, Newtown, Cremorne and more. In 2019 SFF showcased over 250 films across 500+ sessions.

Twelve films are selected for the Official Competition, which celebrates “courageous, audacious and cutting-edge” cinema with a $60,000 cash prize. Several other cash awards are presented over the course of the Festival. 

SFF also runs the Travelling Film Festival year-round, taking the best of international and Australian cinema to regional centres around the country.

Name: Moonraker VFX
Description: Established in Bristol in 2013, Moonraker has built a strong local and international reputation with producers and broadcasters creating award winning visual effects content for Television, Film, Commercials, Museums and Visitor attractions. Our Studio in central Bristol houses a strong team of the industry's leading artists who innovate, design and digitally craft visual effects for any screen.

Name: Picture Head
Description: Picture Head, part of Streamland Media, has remained at the cutting edge of post production, providing our clients with a robust, technically-advanced facility in a comfortable, boutique environment. With a staff of seasoned artists, technicians and support personnel, we pride ourselves on our personalized client services, expert supervision, and attention to detail. We offer complete post-production services for feature films, episodic television, commercials, and other media. Additionally, we continue to be the leader in motion picture marketing, providing finishing services for trailers and television spots for many of today’s hottest films.

Name: Pix Rock Vfx Pvt Ltd
Description:
Pix Rock Vfx is a prominent visual effects company founded in 2014, with a strong presence across four locations in India: Salem, Chennai, Bangalore, and Bhubaneshwar.
We are highly experienced TPN Gold, Disney/Marvel, Lionsgate/Starz and Warner brothers certified VFX studio that is specialized in Roto, Paint, Compositing and Tracking / Rotomation. We ensure effective solutions for Feature Films, TVCs, OTT Platforms and Commercials etc.

Pix Rock actively collaborates with renowned studios in USA, Canada, UK & the Scandinavian region. Our commitment to deliver high-quality visual effects and the strategic geographical spread have positioned us as a trusted partner in the global VFX industry.

Name: CAUSE AND FX
Description:
Cause and FX is about creating with curiosity. Our team loves the excitement of every new project and exploring new creative possibilities. We bring the energy and passion needed to make sure a job isn’t just done, it’s done well.

We are an independent studio in Auckland, New Zealand. Since our founding in 2011, Cause and FX has been handling local and international projects of all shapes and sizes. Our team prides itself on creating a collaborative atmosphere that helps you tell the stories you want to tell. Right from the start, we aim to be a partner in your process, and to make it easier for you to deliver your creative vision.

Offering a wide range of cutting-edge services.
Pre / Post-visualization, Unreal Engine integration, 2D/3D FX, Hard Surface and Environmental CG, Digital Matte Painting (DMP), Compositing, Set Extension, as well as Creature and Water effects. Our experienced professionals are also available for On Set Supervision to ensure your production runs smoothly from start to finish.

Are you ready to unlock a world of endless creativity?  

Connect with us now and let's bring your creative vision to life!

Name: Bollywood
Description: Bollywood, the heart of India's film industry, is a vibrant world of storytelling, music, and dance that captivates millions globally. Based in Mumbai, it produces a diverse range of films, from lavish musicals to gripping dramas, blending traditional Indian culture with contemporary themes. Known for its larger-than-life characters, colorful visuals, and unforgettable songs, Bollywood is more than just cinema—it's a celebration of emotion, passion, and imagination that unites audiences across borders and languages.

Name: FOCUS VFX
Description: We are a global network of award-winning VFX artists & Creative Technologists with decades of experience across the Advertising and Brand Experience Industries. We are founded on the passionate pursuit of excellence, fearlessly pioneering visual imagination and embracing every evolution of our art with pinnacle craft. Making the impossible not just possible, but utterly believable to create brave new experiences for today’s audiences.

Name: Screen Yorkshire
Description:
Screen Yorkshire champions the film, TV, games and digital industries in Yorkshire and the Humber, UK. Our aim is to secure and support the very best projects, companies and individuals, helping to make the region one of the most sought-after destinations for production in the UK. We deliver this vision by investing financially in productions; developing talent to create a skilled workforce; and fostering Yorkshire’s global reputation as an outstanding location for creatives.

Screen Yorkshire provides the Film Office services for Yorkshire & Humber and has been leading the development of the Yorkshire Screen Hub, a cluster for the screen industries, supported  by the BFI through its Creative Cluster Challenge Fund. 

Screen Yorkshire also works with ScreenSkills, NFTS and the BFI to devise and deliver industry schemes to develop regional and UK wide talent.

Name: Tënk
Description:
Tënk est une plateforme SVOD accessible sur abonnement et disponible en France, Belgique, Suisse et Luxembourg. 
Elle est portée par la coopérative ardéchoise Tënk, basée à Lussas, qui se donne deux missions : aider des films documentaires à exister, et à trouver leur public.

Name: Midas VFX
Description:
Midas VFX is a boutique studio with offices in London and Mumbai specialising in high-end visual effects. We offer a range of VFX services for film and episodic to beauty work and de-aging for fashion and TVC.
At our core, we are dedicated to constantly refining our skills, pushing creative boundaries, and embracing innovation in every project. With this passion, our talented and flexible teams are ready to collaborate with you - whether in-house or as an external vendor—to bring your vision to life.

Name: Janus Films
Description:
Janus Films was founded in 1956, in the historic Brattle Theatre in Cambridge, Massachusetts. It was the first theatrical distribution company dedicated to bringing international art-house films to U.S. audiences, including the work of Michelangelo Antonioni, Sergei Eisenstein, Ingmar Bergman, Federico Fellini, Akira Kurosawa, François Truffaut, and Yasujiro Ozu.

Janus handles rights in all media, and its library has grown to more than 800 films.

Name: Pródigo Filmes
Description: Prodigo Films is a brazilian production company known for it’s work and accomplishments in film, TV and advertising.

Name: Nederlands Filmfonds
Description: Het Nederlands Filmfonds is een van zes cultuurfondsen die de minister van Onderwijs, Cultuur en Wetenschap heeft ingesteld. De missie van het Filmfonds is het stimuleren van een divers en kwalitatief hoogstaand filmaanbod en het bevorderen van een voor de filmkunst ontvankelijk (productie)klimaat in Nederland. Daartoe verstrekt het financiële bijdragen voor de ontwikkeling, realisering en distributie van filmproducties: speelfilms, documentaires, animatiefilms, filmisch experiment en korte films en aan filmactiviteiten zoals festivals, filmbijeenkomsten, training, publicaties en onderzoek.

Name: Melbourne International Film Festival
Description:
MIFF has been continuously running since 1952, making it the leading film festival in Australia and one of the world’s oldest film festivals. Presenting a curated global program of innovative screen experiences and the world’s largest showcase of exceptional Australian filmmaking, MIFF is an accessible, iconic cultural event that provides transformative experiences for audiences and filmmakers alike.

MIFF has had an essential role in putting Melbourne on the national and international cultural map. It has also been a key player in building a sense of community and connectedness in Melbourne. The festival has an innate appreciation of its famously loyal audience, all of whom come to MIFF for bold, entertaining and adventurous programming, the delight of the shared festival experience, and to discover something new about themselves, or the world around them.

The Melbourne International Film Festival’s vision for the future builds on MIFF’s role at the centre of Melbourne’s cultural life and in particular its success in generating both social and economic capital for Melbourne and Victoria. Complementing MIFF’s highly anticipated festival program is MIFF's renowned industry program that includes an investment fund (the Premiere Fund) and the director's development program (Accelerator). MIFF's finance market (37°South) brings the national and international screen industry to Melbourne during the festival and celebrates Melbourne as a centre for screen business. MIFF also supports emerging arts and culture writers through its annual Critics Campus program and takes the film festival experience to regional Victoria through the MIFF Regional program.

Name: PFX
Description: PFX is a full-service post-production studio operating across the Czech Republic, Slovakia, Poland, Germany, Austria and Italy. With over 300 talented artists, we have provided world-class services to film, TV, animation, and commercial creators for over a decade. Alongside creative services, we assist with tax incentives in our countries of operation, enhancing project viability. We collaborate on projects in development or currently in production. Infusing every collaboration with creativity and innovation, to deliver the best possible results.

Name: Black Bear
Description: Black Bear is a global entertainment company representing singular artists, producing original content, and providing finance at each step of the creative process.

Name: Lupus Films
Description:
Lupus Films is one of the UK’s foremost producers of high-quality films and television programmes for children and families, founded by Camilla Deakin and Ruth Fielding in 2002.

Over the last 20 years, Ruth and Camilla have produced many award-winning animated and live-action films, specials and series.  Among these are the BAFTA-nominated specials The Snowman and The Snowdog and We’re Going on a Bear Hunt and International Emmy Award-winning The Tiger Who Came to Tea.  In 2016 they produced an animated feature film, Ethel & Ernest, based on the bestselling graphic novel by Raymond Briggs.
