They have recently delivered an animated adaptation of Michael Morpurgo’s best-selling novel Kensuke’s Kingdom, a pre-school series for a major streaming platform and a Halloween Special for Sky, The Ghastly Ghoul, which is now available on Disney US.

Name: MACARONESIA FILMS
Description:
Macaronesia Films es una iniciativa empresarial nacida de la joint venture entre NOSTROMO PICTURES, el GRUPO MUR, SATOCAN, ASTICAN y CONTACTEL, todas ellas empresas líderes y de reconocido prestigio en sus respectivos ámbitos de negocio, que se unen a través de este proyecto para apoyar y consolidar la industria audiovisual en Canarias.
 
Así, las empresas promotoras de Macaronesia Films cuentan con años de experiencia invirtiendo y promoviendo el desarrollo de producciones audiovisuales en el archipiélago, destacando títulos como Blackwood, No Dormirás, The Kill Team, o Durante la Tormenta, y es precisamente por la experiencia adquirida, por lo que nace esta iniciativa, tras identificar la necesidad de ofrecer, tanto a las productoras nacionales e internacionales, como a los empresarios locales, un socio de referencia que les ayude a aprovechar las ventajas de rodar en Canarias.
 
Así, Macaronesia Films nace con la vocación de ser una empresa líder en el soporte a la producción audiovisual que se desarrolle en Canarias, principalmente en proyectos nacionales e internacionales vinculados al cine y la televisión, dando servicios a producciones que quieran rodar en el archipiélago y que necesiten tanto la estructuración de los incentivos fiscales, como servicios aparejados al desarrollo del rodaje.
 
Del mismo modo, en la base de esta iniciativa está abrir las oportunidades de inversión en las producciones audiovisuales a los empresarios que quieran aprovechar los incentivos fiscales existentes, y para ello, contamos con un equipo altamente cualificado y con experiencia en el sector, que nos permite ofrecer proyectos con seguridad y garantías.

Name: CRM Studios
Description:
For over 25 years, CRM Studios has been helping businesses tell their stories through high-quality, results-driven video production. From national commercials and corporate training videos to immersive 3D/4D attraction content, we specialize in creating content that captures attention, delivers your message, and drives measurable results.

Why CRM Studios?
Full-Service Production: Our award-winning team of directors, producers, writers, and animators handles every step of the process—from script development to final delivery—ensuring your vision comes to life with precision and creativity.

State-of-the-Art Facilities: With offices in Dallas, TX, and Shreveport, LA, our production capabilities include advanced editing suites, an innovative animation and effects department, and premium sound labs. Our primary studio, located at Mercury Studios in Irving, TX, offers a world-class space for any production.

Proven Results: Whether you need to boost sales, train your workforce, or inspire action, we craft video solutions that help you achieve your goals.

A Legacy of Excellence
Our extensive client roster includes Fortune 500 companies, global brands, and industry leaders who trust us to produce impactful content. Over the years, we’ve worked across industries—from technology and healthcare to retail and entertainment—delivering standout video projects that exceed expectations.

Let’s Create Together
Looking for a partner to produce content that makes an impact? Let’s bring your vision to life. Connect with us at CRMStudios.com to get started on your next video project.

Name: Scratches to Curves
Description:
Whether it's the first scratch or the final curve, we’ve got your story covered, frame by frame.

United by our love for cinematic storytelling, we're a team of dedicated artists with experience across Japan, the US, Canada, and India. Our diverse backgrounds infuse every project with a unique global perspective. Whether it's crafting deeply emotional narratives or orchestrating high-octane action scenes. 

Our studio is built on two core strengths: Scratches, where we push the boundaries of previsualization before your cameras roll, and Curves, where we refine those raw ideas into final cinematics.

Name: Blackout Studio
Description:
Blackout es una empresa dedicada, principalmente, al mundo de la postproducción de audio (sonorización de spots televisivos, cuñas de radio, videos corporativos, documentales, etc)..

Fundada en Marzo de 2006, aunando esfuerzo y experiencia de sus componentes, ha llevado una trayectoria impecable dentro del sector hasta nuestros días, trabajando para marcas tan prestigiosas como BMW, MINI, Vodafone, IKEA, Easyjet, Banco Santander o AENA, entre otras, convirtiendose en una de las empresas de referencia dentro de la postproducción de audio en Madrid.

Durante este tiempo, Blackout ha ido ampliando su area de negocio dentro del mundo del audio, ofreciendo sus servicios en rodajes, directos o eventos. Contando con unos excelentes profesionales al servicio del cliente.

Pero la mayor novedad de esta última etapa dentro de la empresa es su diversificación dentro del mundo audiovisual, ofreciendo sevicios de post-produccion de video (motion graphics, 3-D, etc).

Name: Filmgate VFX
Description: Filmgate VFX is a studio with an international reputation and reach. We started in 2006 and within that time we have worked on over 250 projects in 11 different countries. No digital visual effects company in Sweden has ever had such a prolific beginning.

Name: Greater Philadelphia Film Office
Description:
The Greater Philadelphia Film Office (GPFO) is a “film commission” representing southeastern Pennsylvania that officially serves the counties of Bucks, Chester, Delaware, Montgomery, and Philadelphia.

GPFO, first established in 1985 as a part of Philadelphia city government, continues to reside within city offices. In 1992, we became a regional economic development agency, incorporating as the Greater Philadelphia Film Office, a Pennsylvania non profit corporation, in July, 2000.

Our Goals are threefold. First, we serve to grow the local film and video industry in every way possible, recognizing its huge economic impact in job creation and its unparalleled public relations effects for the region. 
Second, we serve to attract film & video production to the region, including everything from feature films to TV commercials to music videos and industrial films. 
Finally, we provide the producer free assistance with parking, permits, labor, and locations, and generally act as the liaison between the production and the local community, cutting red tape as we go. A non-profit economic development agency committed to the growth of the regional film and video production industry, GPFO has been responsible for impacting the local economy with more than $4B since 1992.

Name: Pepito Produzioni s.r.l.
Description:
Pepito Produzioni S.r.l. è una casa di produzione cinematografica e televisiva indipendente italiana fondata da Agostino, Giuseppe e Maria Grazia Saccà. La società si è distinta nel corso dei suoi dieci anni di attività per un attento lavoro nel campo della produzione, compiendo scelte lungimiranti che hanno permesso di scoprire e di forgiare giovani talenti e realizzando film che si sono poi trasformati in grandi successi di critica e di pubblico sul territorio italiano e all’estero. 

Pepito ha al suo attivo 9 film per il cinema, 13 commedie per la tv, due serie televisive e 3 serie di documentari. Attualmente sono in lavorazione 3 film per il cinema, 4 film per la televisione e una serie televisiva.

Name: Pecado Films
Description:
Pecado Films, created by Jose Alba in 2008, is an independent production and distribution company focusing on entertaining and thrilling all audiences by creating high quality universal content for the international market.

As we are excited about our job from the first day , we put all our energy and perseverance to service young and passionate filmmakers, supporting and spreading the talent of Spanish and Andalusian industry all over the world.

Pecado Films has produced "Viaje Alrededor del Cuarto de una Madre" (2017), Celia Rico Clavelino's Opera Prima, starred by Lola Dueñas Anna Castillo; “Gernika” (2016), an epic drama about the infamous bombing directed by Koldo Serra and starred by James D’Arcy, María Valverde and Jack Davenport; “La Presa”, 2013, directed by Jose Alba and “Spleen” (La Noche que Dejó de Llover, 2008), with Luis Tosar and Nora Tschirner.
 
Pecado Films distributed “Crazy Loves” (Amores Locos, 2010) starring Eduard Fernandez and Irene Visedo, “14 Days With Victor”, “The Symmetry of Love”, both shot entirely in England and “MIA” by Javier Van de Couter, International Discovery at 60ª Mannheim-Heidelberg Int. Film Fest. and official selection in LesGayCineMad 2012. 
 
Mr. Ángel Durández and Mr. Carlos Clavijo are strategic partners of the company.
 
Pecado Films is a member of PECAA and EGEDA.

Thanks for your interest in Pecado Films ;)

Name: Pyjama Films
Description: Pyjama Films is a 2D animation studio based in Turku, Finland.

Name: Filmtools
Description: Filmtools supplies the major motion picture studios, corporate and industrial film and video makers, students and hobbyists with expendable supplies, cameras and accessories, grip and lighting equipment, and everything else needed to create films and videos.

Name: Suneeva
Description: Suneeva is a production company that brings ideas to life. We collaborate with directors to make original and creative stories for a wide range of global clients. Our production mindset is focused on outcome. Our work has been recognised by Cannes Lions, DGA Awards, The One Show, and the London International Awards.

Name: Most Wanted Studio, S.L.
Description: We develop and produce our own short films, feature films and TV series; as well as we provide high-end CGI animation, music and sound production services for films and TV.

Name: EVA AUDIOVISUAL
Description:
Produtora audiovisual.

Produzimos:
 	+	Vídeos Corporativos
 	+	Conteúdo para Digital Signage
 	+	Apresentações Multimídia
 	 	 
Quais os nossos diferenciais?
Nossa visão do que um vídeo deve conter. Nos recusamos a fazer vídeos chatos, longos, com conversinha fiada que não convence nem o próprio cliente. A EVA trabalha com arte e entretenimento para convencer o seu cliente antes de tudo. 

Nossa equipe, formada em TV e cinema, mesclando a juventude de alguns e experiência de outros. Desde o diretor até o assistente de produção, todos se envolvem na criação, na produção e na finalização do vídeo. Todos se sentem responsáveis pelo produto final.

Por que contratar a EVA?
Porque você não quer seus clientes dormindo durante a apresentação do seu vídeo.

Name: YANKI MEDYA YAPIM
Description: Yankı Medya Yapım olarak İzmir'de, dizi, film, reklam ve tanıtım projelerinde yaratıcı ve profesyonel hizmetler sunuyoruz. Oyuncu temininden prodüksiyona, yönetmenlikten dijital reklam yönetimine kadar geniş bir yelpazede hizmet vererek projelerinizin her aşamasında yanınızda oluyoruz. Güvenilir ve yenilikçi yaklaşımımızla, her projede kaliteyi ve müşteri memnuniyetini ön planda tutuyoruz.

Name: The Refinery
Description: Your Premier Post-Production Partner in JHB and CT, South Africa. Offering a full range of services from dailies to editorial, colour grading, VFX, and Atmos audio, we are dedicated to transforming your visions into vivid realities. Experience unparalleled craftsmanship in every aspect of post-production, all under one roof.

Name: InFocus Film School
Description:
InFocus Film School is an independent boutique film school located in historic Gastown, Vancouver. We are dedicated to supporting our students as emerging filmmakers and future industry leaders. Through our immersive, fully hands-on, and project-based education, students explore their creative autonomy and build the skills and experience they need to pursue their dream careers.

InFocus offers full-time studies in Film Production, Writing for Film & Television, Compositing for VFX, and 3D Animation & Visual Effects. 

We also provide part-time, industry-oriented training courses for positions in film and television production.

Name: Heehaw
Description: A talent led video production studio, we love working with people who love working with us, people who share the same values, people who are driven to do things differently. We are passionate, playful, and proud of it too.

Name: The Other End
Description:
The Other End is a Toronto-based global creative collective and film production studio converting creative ideas into breathtaking audiovisual content through powerful vehicles of visual storytelling and state-of-the-art production techniques and technology. 

Introducing groundbreaking virtual production workflows and content creation for film and commercial industries, we create unique visual experiences that are imaginative, memorable, and break away from convention.

Name: Kennington Film Studios
Description:
Based in the heart of central London, Kennington Film Studios is the UK’s largest independent, combined studio facility and production company.

Home to three studios, a large in-house team and extensive production facilities, Kennington Film Studios offers highly convenient, cost-effective creative services – all under one roof.

We have a wide range of great value studio filming packages to choose from, as well as a roster of talented content directors.

Kennington Film Studios even has a full-time creative team, post production department and digital marketing specialists, for a true end-to-end production service.

Name: AFDA
Description:
AFDA is one of the leading outcomes-based film schools in the world and is listed by the Council on Higher Education as one of the top six private universities in South Africa.

In the course of a rich entrepreneurial history dating back to 1994, AFDA has earned a reputation as one of the leading institutions of its kind in the world today. Although our track record speaks for itself, we continually renew our commitment to facilitate an environment that develops high-quality human and intellectual property with the relevant skills to deal with the rigors of a fast-expanding and ever-changing entertainment industry.

Name: Celluloid Junkie
Description: Celluloid Junkie is the leading online resource dedicated to the global film and cinema business. Join a growing community of film and cinema industry professionals from around the world who rely on CJ to provide the latest news, insights, analysis, interviews, and research on the motion picture industry.

Name: Fasten Films
Description: Fasten Films es una productora de cine y televisión liderada por el productor Adrià Monés.

Name: Pijama AI | VFX Studio
Description:
10 Years of Pijama Studio: Post-Production Powered by Artificial Intelligence.

On our 10th anniversary, we solidify our trajectory as a young studio committed to the future. Nominated by the APCP and specializing in advertising and fiction, we have made Artificial Intelligence the driving force behind our workflow.

We don't just use cutting-edge software; we apply AI solutions across all our departments. We optimize from the initial project planning to on-set supervision, guaranteeing maximum precision in mastering and Quality Control.

Our Services: AI Consulting | Editing | Motion Graphics | VFX | Color Grading | 3D | On-Set VFX Supervision

Trusted by:
Nike, Coca-Cola, FC Barcelona, Audi, Banc Sabadell, Danone, Nestlé, Estrella Damm, Red Bull, Sony, BBVA, Netflix, among others.

We collaborate with:
Agosto, CANADA, Mamma Team, DAVID, Ogilvy, VML, Primo, Vampire, The Production Club, and many more.

Contact:
T. +34 934 63 67 78 | M. admin@pijama.tv
Editing | Motion Graphics | VFX | Color Grading | 3D | Advertising | Digital Content

Name: STUDIO SOUZA
Description: Studio Souza is an animation studio based in Brussels, Belgium. We develop & create animated feature films, TV series and shorts with a heart for authentic imagery and touching stories.

Name: Location Works
Description:
Location Works is the largest and busiest location resource in the UK. 
We monetise spare capacity in property (& anything else that can be a location) utilising spaces for filming, photographic shoots & events. Location Works has been a part of the sharing economy since 1985, we just didn't know it was called that yet.

Our one-stop service includes the UK's largest on-line locations library combined with a complete location scouting and management service. 

Whatever your production, Location Works can help: 
with thousands of locations on-line and many thousands more in our library here in London, our team of Location Co-ordinators can find and organise your location quickly and with the minimum of fuss. 

If it's not in our library we can find it for you: our location scouts and location managers are highly experienced in film, photography, television and events. 

We offer a complete production service - whatever size your production.

Name: Het Bataljon | Creative Video Agency
Description:
Er is een moment in elk project wanneer je hoort dat de adem van je klant heel even stokt. Soms op de set, soms als ze bij ons op bureau naar de eerste edit komen kijken. Die kleine pauze, plus de vonk in hun ogen, daar doen we het voor. 

Geen enkel medium kan je zo meezuigen, vastpakken, doen dromen en herinneren als film. Daarom staan we elke dag achter de camera. En daarom spreken we van film, en geen video: uit respect voor het ambacht en wat goeie film allemaal kan. 

We zijn estheten met vage Hollywooddromen, maar wel de pragmatische soort. Daarom maken we film voor bedrijven die hetzelfde zoeken als wij — de vonk — en begrijpen dat film een manier is om hun merk uit te bouwen. Een manier die ROI koppelt aan recht-naar-het-hart. De manier waarop wij het liefst spelen.

Name: Octocamvision S.L.
Description:
Leading the drone sector in film and advertising is not an easy task. More than 12 years of experience in the sector and 500 projects guarantee us / back us up. With offices in Barcelona, Madrid, Lisbon and Palma de Mallorca, we offer audiovisual and technological consulting solutions based on the development and application of professional drones.

Our drones are able to fly with most film cameras (Alexa Mini, Red, Sony F55, etc), without giving up the speed and versatility that is required in a professional shooting. However, we do not limit ourselves to this technology, offering too camera car, cablecam, movi, 360º services and virtual reality.

Works carried out in more than 15 countries, technicians with extensive experience in the field and a clear commitment to R+D help us to always be one step ahead in the development and execution of drone technology. We have permits to carry out work in Spain, Portugal, France and Italy.

Name: ÉCU - The European Independent Film Festival
Description:
ÉCU - The European Independent Film Festival is dedicated to the discovery and advancement of the best independent films from around the world.

The next, 14th edition of the festival, will take place in 5th, 6th and 7th of April, 2019 in Paris, France.

ÉCU has forged a path for independent film since 2006 and the scope of its presence has grown to a global scale, and the festival is often referenced as being the European equivalent of Sundance, an honour that we don’t take lightly.

ÉCU – The European Independent Film Festival provides the perfect arena for indie filmmakers to express authentic cinematic storytelling in the most compelling ways possible. As one of the World’s truly stand out independent film festivals, we embrace innovation and creativity and allow directors in competition to showcase their films to audiences who appreciate and love independent cinema. Filmmakers who are selected into ÉCU’s Official Selection join an active community of creatives who continually push the boundaries of indie cinema.

Thanks to our over 50 partner festivals, partner organizations, film centres and film commissions, ÉCU’s goes on an annual world tour called ÉCU-On-The-Road, which gives award-winning films (as well as many of the Official Selection films) the opportunity to have their films screened to a broader, global audience. ÉCU-On-The-Road showcased films in over 77 countries around the globe in 2016 – 2018 at special ÉCU mini-festivals, partner festivals, cultural institutions and film schools, including an amazing seven day special festival in São Paulo, Brazil. The event was made possible through the support of Caixa Cultural, São Paulo and was a huge success. ÉCU also held special events in Berlin, Cannes and was part of festivals in Lebanon, Italy, Russia, USA, Romania, Austria, Denmark and other countries. This gives ÉCU filmmakers great exposure to audiences that they may never have reached.

We are proud to be a filmmakers’ festival!

Name: Goldcrest Post
Description: Post-production house based in New York. Picture finishing, sound mixing, ADR, editorial suites, and dailies.

Name: Roteiraria
Description:
A Roteiraria escola e hub de conteúdos oferece à indústria do audiovisual três habilidades: criação de conteúdo, formação de roteiristas para o mercado audiovisual e análise de projetos. 

O que quer que se queira contar a nossa especialidade é a narrativa audiovisual – na teoria, na prática, na análise.        

As três habilidades:

Formação de alunos e profissionais do mercado audiovisual
além da oferta de cursos regulares, proporcionamos acesso a workshops, salas de desenvolvimento de conteúdos, palestras, pesquisas monitoradas, treinamento de pitches e acervo bibliográfico.

Criação de Conteúdos (roteiros) 
para cinema, TV, internet, publicidade, institucional e novas plataformas, a partir de ideias originais, briefings pré-estabelecidos ou obras já existentes (adaptações).
 
•	Análise de Projetos (script doctoring)
•	análise crítica de obras audiovisuais em fase de desenvolvimento, com o intuito de sugerir melhorias na estrutura narrativa, construção e caracterização de personagens, desenvolvimento de diálogos ou em qualquer outro aspecto dramatúrgico da obra;
•	em caso de séries para TV, streaming, web e outras plataformas, a análise crítica atua sobre a construção da bíblia, piloto, arco(s) da(s) temporada(s) e beat sheet;  
•	imersões in company para roteiristas e demais profissionais do mercado audiovisual: cursos intensivos com periodicidades por demanda, voltados para capacitação e aprimoramento prático e teórico;
•	storytelling para públicos específicos: mercados publicitário e corporativo, aprofundando técnicas de storytelling, a partir de referências narrativas clássicas e contemporâneas.

Name: SKY VISION
Description:
SKY VISION heeft de nodige ervaring, technologieën en flexibiliteit om uw
bedrijf/evenement naar een hoger niveau te tillen. Krachtige beelden zijn dé
manier om mensen te overtuigen en zijn het visitekaartje van uw onderneming.
Met onze uitermate betrouwbare, professionele state of art drones kunnen we
elke omgeving weergeven in een indrukwekkende video.

Name: Creative Europe Desks Deutschland
Description:
Creative Europe ist das Förderprogramm der Europäischen Kommission für die audiovisuelle Branche sowie den Kultur- und Kreativsektor. 
Wir sind die vier Informationsbüros der europäischen Creative Europe MEDIA Förderung in Deutschland mit Sitz in Berlin-Brandenburg, Düsseldorf, Hamburg und München. Wir beraten über die Möglichkeiten der MEDIA und Cross-Sektor Förderung sowie branchenspezifische Weiterbildungsangebote des Creative Europe Programms und organisieren europäische Networking- und Branchenevents. 
Alles rund um MEDIA geförderte Filme und Serien gibt es in unserem Instagram Kanal https://www.instagram.com/media.filme/

Name: Florentine Films
Description: Florentine Films is Ken Burns' Documentary Production Company

Name: Georgia Film Academy
Description:
The Georgia Film Academy is a collaboration of the University System of Georgia and the Technical College System of Georgia created by state leadership to meet education and workforce needs for high demand careers in Georgia’s film and creative industries.

GFA classes are offered for college credit through more than 20 University System of Georgia and Technical College System of Georgia partner institutions. Classes may also be taken through continuing education programs at several partner institutions. The GFA higher education program offers rigorous professional training, and may lead to union-covered film and television production craft internships and placement in creative industry apprenticeships and jobs.

The GFA provides professional training in the form of Post Production education and AVID editing certification. The GFA also offers high school teacher training in production, content creation, and post production, in partnership with the GaDOE. These provide professional film and television experiences and training, as well as curriculum and resources for teachers across the state.

Name: MPAB - Mulheres Profissionais do Audiovisual Brasileiro
Description:
Seja bem-vindo à comunidade MPAB, onde destacamos e promovemos o talento feminino no setor audiovisual brasileiro. Nossa missão é criar um espaço de visibilidade e valorização para mulheres que atuam em diversas áreas da produção audiovisual, incluindo direção, produção executiva, roteirização, edição de som, locução, entre outras.

Aqui você encontrará:

 Destaques Semanais: Celebramos as conquistas e trajetórias inspiradoras de profissionais femininas do audiovisual.
 Histórias Inspiradoras: Compartilhamos experiências de mulheres que superaram desafios e estão transformando a indústria.
 Oportunidades de Aprendizado: Informações sobre palestras, workshops e cursos voltados para o desenvolvimento profissional.
 Networking: Conecte-se com outras profissionais, troque experiências e amplie sua rede de contatos.
 Voz Feminina: Damos voz às mulheres que estão moldando o futuro do audiovisual no Brasil.

Junte-se a nós e faça parte de uma rede que apoia, inspira e transforma. Vamos juntas construir um audiovisual mais inclusivo e igualitário!

#MPAB #MulheresNoAudiovisual #TalentoFeminino #Inspiração #Networking #CrescimentoProfissional

Name: Nebras Films
Description: Nebras Films, member of Alnafees Holding, a local and regional rising star in film production.

Name: Corcoise Films
Description:
At Corcoise Films, we believe that if every film of ours is not intriguing, interesting and different enough from what the audience has already seen, we might as well be doing something else.

With this as a starting point, Corcoise Films was born in 2002 and quickly rose to become India's most sought after production house by consistently delivering path-breaking commercials that have redefined the Indian advertising landscape.

At Corcoise we strive hard to create a truly inspiring home for talent. The band of passionate directors and absolutely top-notch producers is both driven and demented - and that is a lethal concoction.

Name: Film Forum
Description: Film Forum is the only autonomous nonprofit cinema in New York City and one of the few in the U.S. We present two distinct, complementary film programs – NYC theatrical premieres of American independents and foreign art films; and repertory selections including foreign and American classics, genre works, festivals and directors’ retrospectives.

Name: I
Description:
Imagemovers Digital is the production studio responsible for the performance capture films of Robert Zemeckis. 

Located in San Rafael, Carpinteria, Burbank, and Los Angeles, California.

Name: Kino Świat
Description:
KINO ŚWIAT is the leading film distributor in Poland, active at all fields of film exploitation:

Theatrical distribution,
Home Entertainment production and distribution,
Video on Demand sales,
TV sales.

KINO ŚWIAT is also active at the field of film production and co-production, both domestically and internationally. For the last 8 years KINO ŚWIAT has been the biggest independent film distributor in Poland in terms of theatrical market share. Several times including 2014, 2016, 2017 year KINO ŚWIAT has become the ultimate market leader, including all the Hollywood studios operating in Poland.

KINO ŚWIAT has been honoured with many awards as the Best Distributor by Polish Film Institute, Polish Cinemas Association and Polish Filmmakers Association, as well as FORBES Diamonds award as the best yearly value growth company. KINO ŚWIAT has also been nominated as the Best European Distributor of animated films by Cartoon Movie.

KINO ŚWIAT’S film catalogue consists of almost 2,000 titles. The catalogue includes almost 400 movies which were theatrically distributed by KINO ŚWIAT. The catalogue includes over 100 Polish films, many of which were not only distributed but also co-produced by KINO ŚWIAT. The catalogue includes over 30 films from annual Top 20 in the Polish box office including the Polish films with biggest admissions ever: Listy do M 1, 2, 3, Pitbul Niebezpieczne kobiety, Pitbul Ostatni Pies, Botox, Planeta Singli, Kobiety Mafii.

KINO ŚWIAT is operating the most popular YouTube movie channel in Poland (40 million views) and the most popular Facebook movie fanpage in Poland (over half a million users).

Name: The Post Group Production Suites
Description:
Centrally located in the heart of Hollywood, The Post Group Production Suites offers ideal accommodations for any size project. Our smaller suites offer individual privacy, while our larger suites encourage a collaborative work environment.  Our premium edit suites can be outfitted for any system (or multiple systems) and shared storage. Each of our production suites comes equipped with Ethernet, secure swipe-card access, on-site parking and much more. The Post Group’s friendly, knowledgeable staff is available daily to offer assistance with any and all needs that may arise. In addition to great customer service, our clients value our close proximity to a wide array of restaurants and local businesses. We invite you to visit our website, schedule a tour, and find your home away from home at The Post Group Production Suites.

www.postgroup.com

Name: Mad Cow Films
Description: Mad Cow Films is an award-winning production company, creative content agency and service company based in London.

Name: Faliro House
Description:
Your partner of choice for shooting in Greece – an exceptional team of film professionals with 10 years of quality presence in the international circuit.

Faliro House was founded in 2008 by Christos V. Konstantakopoulos, it has since developed, produced and co-produced more than fifty films. Over the years Faliro House has established various strategic partnerships, including a development deal with FilmNation Entertainment, which is entering its seventh year.

Faliro House co-developed and produced Richard Linklater’s Before Midnight, shot entirely in Greece. In 2017 Faliro House serviced Park Chan Wook’s TV series The Little Drummer Girl, a BBC & AMC co-production shot in Athens and surrounding areas. In 2019 the company serviced the thriller Beckett, directed by Ferdinando Cito Filomarino and produced by Luca Guadagnino.

In 2015, Faliro House launched Oxbelly, a community-building non-profit focused on film education. Every summer Oxbelly hosts an international gathering of filmmakers in Costa Navarino, Greece, where emerging film professionals interact with their more experienced colleagues over a week-long program of panels, screenings and masterclasses.

In 2016, Faliro House launched a Mediterranean Screenwriters Workshop in partnership with the Sundance Institute and filmmaker Athina Rachel Tsangari, wanting to benefit the region’s 1st or 2nd time filmmakers. Following the Workshop’s successful 3-year run, the Oxbelly Screenwriters and Directors Lab was launched in 2019, with Tsangari staying on as Artistic Director, joined by high-caliber professionals, such as Paul Thomas Anderson, Lisa Cholodenko, Willem Dafoe, Nick Kroll, Dee Rees, and others.

Name: All Dub Estúdio Criativa
Description: Studio with complete infrastructure for services of dubbing from any language to Brazilian Portuguese for movies, TV Series, Games and any other audiovisual product; Accessibility - Audiodescription, Libras (Brazilian Sign Language), Closed Caption - and Subtitling for any audiovisual product or live event.
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de janeiro

Name: Drone Dudes
Description: Since 2010, Drone Dudes, LLC leads the industry with turnkey services specializing in remotely operated aerial and ground cinematography solutions.

Name: Protagonist Pictures Ltd
Description:
Protagonist Pictures is an international finance, production and sales company which has a proven track record in outstanding films and commercial successes. Based in the UK, the company handles films from around the world, always maintaining a strong focus on filmmakers with exceptional vision and storytelling skills.

Our shareholders include Film4, Vertigo Films and Ingenious Media.

Name: Empire Entertainment
Description:
Bringing you the best movies since 1919, Empire owns exclusive theatrical distribution rights for Sony Pictures and Fox Star Hindi films in the Middle East. 

Founded at the height of the cinema boom in the Arab world, Empire International acts as the foreign arm of Les Fils de Georges Haddad & Co.

Empire's Gulf offices are located in Dubai, under the same Empire International Gulf, and also operate through Allied Film Distributors (AFD) in Egypt. 

Empire International Gulf and AFD run their operations in cooperation with the Beirut head office, supplying films to exhibitors, marketing movies, organizing events and promotions to maximize exposure and elevate releases to blockbuster status.

Name: IRO Pictures
Description: IRO Pictures is a Vfx and Animation company based in Canary Islands.

Name: Clean Slate Filmz
Description:
Led by Karnesh Ssharma, Clean Slate Filmz is an esteemed film production company in Mumbai.

Founded in 2013 with its unforgettable debut film NH10, starring lead actress Anushka Sharma, Clean Slate Filmz has also helmed films like Phillauri, a romantic comedy, and Pari, a supernatural horror film.

The company also produces an unparalleled portfolio of entertainment for Hindi cinema as well as produces films and web series for distribution platforms such as Netflix and Amazon Prime Video. Most recently, the company produced a Netflix original series, MAI, followed by the Netflix film ‘Bulbbul’ and a web series for Amazon Prime Video, ‘Paatal Lok’ which were critically acclaimed. 

With many exciting upcoming projects, Clean Slate Filmz continues to strive to create disruptive and clutter-breaking content, giving audiences a new viewing experience every time. 

Join us on social media: 
Instagram: @officialcsfilms
Facebook: @cleanslatefilmz 
Twitter: @officialCSFilmz 
YouTube: Clean Slate Filmz

Name: SLAM CREATIONS STUDIO
Description: Slam Creations studio

Name: Greater Cleveland Film Commission
Description:
The Greater Cleveland Film Commission (GCFC) is the only nonprofit dedicated to bringing jobs and economic impact to Northeast Ohio by supporting a thriving and adaptive local media industry. The GCFC relies on the support of businesses, community partners, and the generosity of individuals for funding.

Since 2009, the State of Ohio has seen more than $1.1 billion in economic impact and created 6,192  full-time equivalent jobs thanks to our work.

The GCFC was instrumental in securing state funding for Cleveland State University’s School of Film & Media Arts, Ohio’s first standalone film school. GCFC continues to support the school’s faculty, curriculum and student interns since its opening in 2018.

We continue to focus our efforts to increase the Ohio Motion Picture Tax Credit to $100 million and create a sustainable program that instills confidence to the industry. With the support of public and private partners, the GCFC is committed to creating jobs, growing our population and bringing more business to Cleveland.

Vision

The vision of the Greater Cleveland Film Commission (GCFC) is to achieve increased economic development in Northeast Ohio by using the artistic and culturally enriching activities of film and other media production to strengthen the workforce, support the media production industry and attract media production to the region.

Mission

GCFC’s mission is to promote increased media production in Northeast Ohio using effective strategies for attraction and workforce development including building an artistic infrastructure through film.

Name: PIZZEL STUDIOS
Description:
Pizzel Studios es una productora y estudio de animación con sede en Sevilla (España) y presencia internacional, dedicada a la producción de animación 3D, 2D, estereoscopía, motion graphics y realidad aumentada. 

Además de la producción propia de entretenimiento,  películas, documentales y series animadas para TV y cine, desarrolla otras líneas de negocio, como la producción de obras de pequeños formatos y otros géneros como spots publicitatios, recreaciones virtuales o la prestación de servicios de ilustración, producción de animación y producción digital en todas sus fases.

Sus principales partners son productoras audiovisuales, instituciones y agencias de publicidad.

Name: Alpha Dogs Post Production
Description:
Founded in 2002, AlphaDogs is an independently owned full service post-production facility located in the center of Burbank’s media district.  AlphaDogs gifted team brings a combination of both creative talent and technical expertise paying extra attention to detail in delivering projects with a personal touch. State of the art editing bays, color correction, audio mixing, visual effects, production offices and equipment rentals are available. To learn more http://www.alphadogs.tv

Expertise. Dedication. Talent. Service. Craftsmanship. AlphaDogs

Name: Visual Effects Professionals Guild
Description: The Guild’s objective is to foster innovation and excellence in a vibrant domestic community in New Zealand, to enrich creativity, promote education and provide trusted advocacy for a sustainable industry that is pushing the boundaries of visual effects on the world stage.

Name: British Film Editors (BFE)
Description:
British Film Editors is a non-profit association of accomplished editors and assistants working in all genres of the UK Film, TV & Streaming industries.

British Film Editors:
• Celebrate and achieve recognition for the art and craft that editors bring to
storytelling in all its forms.
• Champion the work of its established members and nurture new talent.
• Bring together editing professionals so they can share their experience and
practices.
• Run a mentoring scheme to match less experienced individuals with members who can share their industry insights and wisdom gained over the years.
• Host events including fortnightly interviews with editors from across the globe, members- only screenings, industry discussions, awards-season events and networking sessions

Experienced UK based editors are invited to join as full or associate members. Find out more about the BFE Cut Above Awards at: www.britshfilmeditors.co.uk

Name: Nepal America International Film Festival (NAIFF)
Description:
June 26–29, 2025 | Maryland 

Nepal America International Film Festival (NAIFF) is an annual film event organized by Nepal America Film Society. Every year, it brings together more than 3 thousands film enthusiasts from Maryland and the greater Washington DC region including filmmakers, volunteers, community leaders, film and community organizations, and businesses.

The festival showcases all genres of films including feature lengths, documentaries, animations, experimental and shorts from Nepal, America, and other countries. Films from the Global Peace Film Festival Florida are also screened in the Special Sidebar Section. Additionally, films from Washington DC, Maryland, and Virginia are screened as DMV Close-up Section.
 
We welcome you to join us. See you at the festival.

Name: Breakwater Studios
Description: Breakwater Studios is a two-time Academy Award winning filmmaking company dedicated to championing short documentaries and the works they inspire. Breakwater Studios’ work has been recognized by the Sundance Film Festival, Telluride Film Festival, Tribeca Film Festival, SXSW, Critics Choice Documentary Awards, Emmy Awards, James Beard Foundation Awards, and the Peabody Awards, among many others.

Name: F25 Production
Description: F25 is the production house expirienced in tv, digital film and branded content production. F25 supplies film content for tv advertising, online video, viral, interactive video, branded content and everything which can draw the consumer in. F25 is based in the center of Warsaw on Sienkiewicza street.

Name: Brain Farm
Description: Brain Farm is an award winning full service entertainment and production company that specializes in creating unforgettable film, TV, digital and commercial content. We are dedicated to turning ambitious visions into vivid reality. Using the latest in filmmaking technology to capture awe-inspiring stories and images, we’ve pushed the limits of media possibility time and time again. We live for the challenge of getting the shot others think is unattainable in locations few dare to go. Our family is made up of some of the most talented filmmakers, production experts, musicians, storytellers, athletes and tech ninjas on the planet. We are united by one mission: To use innovative techniques that bring inspiring stories to life.

Name: ProducerBazaar
Description: Producerbazaar streamlines thousands of transactions, from content discovery to deal closure, offering the entertainment community a swift, reliable, and secure marketplace experience while expanding reach across new audiences and markets.

Name: SUMOLIGHT Group
Description:
With a razor sharp focus on innovation, they are now pushing the boundaries for Image Based Lighting. SUMOLIGHT is a German-based manufacturer of lighting systems for film & broadcast-productions. Founded in 2011 by gaffers and photographers, their experience on set is in the DNA of all SUMOLIGHT products.

The company has a short but successful legacy of creating LED lighting fixtures that are in high demand across global productions and used by gaffers and DoP’s in a number of very creative ways. The portfolio includes SUMOSKY, SUMOMAX, SUMOSPACE+, others archive technologies and lighting accessories.

SUMOLIGHT was established in Berlin, Germany, where the HQ is still located. Other subsidiaries are in Los Angeles, US and the UK. 

Their first bicolor light, the compact SUMO100, with its interchangeable innovative and versatile light shaping tools like the foldable Soft Box set a new standard for the industry. It's successor the SUMOSPACE won the Cine Gear Expo Technical Award for best Lighting Technology and is considered by many as the standard in LED space lighting. In 2019 a unique mounting system, the SUMOSNAPᵀᴹ was developed, expanding the SUMOSPACE to a true modular lighting system. As the company designs, SUMOLIGHT products are model, “100% Eco Friendly LED Lighting”. In addition, SUMOLIGHT are working towards becoming a Net Zero Carbon and Carbon Neutral company by 2023.

Name: Gimpville
Description:
Gimpville is an award winning Norwegian VFX and animation studio, with 20 years of contributing to dozens of feature films, broadcast productions, and a vast amount of TV commercials. 
We are passionate artists with a broad set of skills within visual effects,  animation, post production and visual communication.

Name: SHOOTME
Description:
Shootme is a 360 production house and talent management agency. We represent talented photographers whose skills were derived from fine arts but subsequently blossomed in a variety of ways to cover the wide spectrum of our clients expectations. 

The quality and originality of our commercial projects comes from the individual style and constant development of each photographer and director. We use modern technology but the innovative approach and understanding of actual trends is what makes our work exceptional. 

Our statement is that the photographs we take speak for themselves. We bring any particular vision into reality in an unusual way, we put forth our creative and winning proposals considering both our client's intents and requirements. 

Within our production services we cooperate with the best professionals, who create every project with symbiotic inspiration, from concept through creation to project delivery. Both here at home, in Poland and around the globe.

Follow us on Instagram @shootmewarsaw

Name: London Screen Academy
Description:
LSA exists to enable 16-19 year olds to access the screen industries or progress to higher education through high quality learning within a diverse, accepting and supportive community.

Storytelling is at the heart of everything that we do. 

LSA is a state funded sixth form academy founded by the makers of JAMES BOND, HARRY POTTER, TOPBOY, BABY DRIVER and more.

Name: Troll Visual Effects
Description: Troll is a visual effect house based in Finland, known for producing high quality content for feature films, TV series and commercials. We are committed to delivering our clients the best possible quality and coming up with solutions to seemingly impossible tasks.

Name: Alto Piano Studio
Description: Alto Piano is a Creative Studio and a Production Company. We are an ever-evolving laboratory dedicated to developing communication projects and crafting images that engage, influence, reveal, and inspire. We strongly believe in the importance of identity, research, and storytelling. In both the fashion and culture industries, we weave together contemporary refinement and a coherent vision. Our team can handle the entire creative and production process, from conception to execution. We are independent, passionate, and always in search of contemporary topics.

Name: Lowtown Studios
Description: Lowtown is a Fort Worth video and photography studio space where world-class brands create visual stories worth telling. From equipment to facilities, find the flexibility to go from first take to final cut without ever compromising your creative vision.

Name: 4th Row Films
Description:
4th Row Films is an award-winning production company specializing in feature documentaries and brand content. Their 15 feature docs have premiered at top festivals and in theaters around the world including Sundance, Berlin, Tribeca and SXSW as well as on networks and platforms including HBO, Showtime, Netflix, Amazon, A&E and PBS.

4th Row’s branding division has created thousands of short films and content and has produced large-scale events for organizations and fortune 500 companies including American Express, Johnson & Johnson, the NFL, Mercedes Benz, Polaroid and McDonald’s.  

4th Row Films begins with a love for movies and a passion for storytelling.  This finds its way into every aspect of our process and is reflected in what we make and how we make it.

Name: BAM - BOGOTÁ AUDIOVISUAL MARKET
Description:
The Bogota Audiovisual Market (BAM) is Colombia’s most important audiovisual market, organized by the Bogota Chamber of Commerce and Proimagenes Colombia with support from the Film Development Fund (FDC).

BAM has become a can’t-miss event for the Colombian audiovisual industry, striving to publicize Colombia’s wide offering of completed films, films in post-production, projects in development, and audiovisual production services. It’s an opportunity for audiovisual industry players to network and forge new business partnerships. In addition to Colombian participants, BAM hosts well-known international guests with the desire and capability to broker agreements, partnerships, and business deals.

The Market is also a key arena for professional development. Through academic activities and networking spaces, BAM has helped participants improve the quality of their projects, strengthen their negotiating skills, learn about the latest trends in content marketing and distribution, and complete their projects through national and international co-production agreements.

Name: Viridian FX
Description:
Viridian FX is one of the leading visual effects houses based in the North of England. Specialising in both 'invisible effects' for Film as well as in-house experimental creative storytelling projects.

We pride ourselves on extensive artist involvement in the creative process, we focus on what makes Visual Effects inspiring and rewarding to our team.

Recent projects - "Waiting for Anya" (Sky Cinema), "Dark Encounter"(Amazon Prime), G-LOC, "The Intergalactic Adventures of Max Cloud"

Name: clapAction
Description:
ClapAction — Incubateur de projets cinéma & séries  
De l’idée au projet accompagné 

 Notre mission : démocratiser le cinéma, le rendre accessible à tous, et briser les barrières sociales pour faire exister une vraie diversité et une créativité communautaire, authentique, et représentative du public.

ClapAction est la plateforme d’incubation dédiée aux projets cinéma et séries. Depuis à peine 1 an, nous accompagnons des porteurs de projets (auteurs, réalisateurs, producteurs émergents) dans la structuration, le packaging, la stratégie de financement et l’accès aux réseaux professionnels.

 Courts, longs, documentaires et séries.
 Parcours d’incubation et accompagnements personnalisés.
 Publication, retours expert, stratégie, mise en relation.

ClapAction : métamorphosez votre idée de film en projet crédible et accompagné. ClapAction est la plateforme d’incubation dédiée aux projets cinéma et séries.

clapAction, c’est la plateforme collaborative qui redéfinit le cinéma et l’audiovisuel. Elle permet à tous, public et professionnels, de participer activement à la création et à la production des films, du premier clap jusqu’à la sortie en salle.

 Que vous soyez professionnel ou amateur, vous pouvez déposer vos projets sur clapAction en toute sécurité. Vous avez également la possibilité de candidater pour bénéficier d’une aide au développement.

Rejoignez clapAction et participez à construire le cinéma de demain !

Description: Dicentia is one of Europe’s leading cross media companies assisting the film, broadcasting, music and publishing industry and other right holders in maximizing the value of their content. With headquarter in Copenhagen, Denmark we support clients on a worldwide basis and employ the best talents within our services. We are NetflixPreferred Fulfillment Partner (NPFP), Post Partner Program (NP3), and iTunes Movie Encoding House certified.

Name: Bons(ai)
Description:
“THE-Bonsai” is the International multi-award winning awareness based film from Nepal premiered in Kent, England. It has 6 Title Awards and 4 Nominations in its bag till end of 2023.
Through this film we tried to advocate for the perception of ability and beauty existed in the society. Film says “Everybody is beautiful, everyone is abled and everything has their own identity, value and importance in the globe”.

https://filmfreeway.com/TheBonsaiMovie

Here a 15-years old girl struggles with her perplexed state of mind due to the behavior portrayed by the society. This leads her to wonder about the creations of nature and keeps searching for the answer. This creation, as an art and the unique way of storytelling through the precious gift of Nature, depicts the relation between human and natural elements around them, along with their struggle for survival.
Key Achievements:
•	6 Title Awards and 4 Nominations in its bag till end of 2023.
-	Audience Choice Award on Amsterdam Lift-Off Film Festival (2023)
-	Honourable Mention in Rob-Knox London Film Festival (2023)
-	Official Selection on Lift-Off Global Film Festivals  – Austin, Berlin, London,  Los Angeles, Manchester, Melbourne, New York, Paris, Sydney, Tokyo & Toronto (2023)
-	Nominee Director for 2023.Aporia International village film festival – South Korea (2022)
-	Best Message Award on White Deer International Film Festival – UK (2022)
-	Best Editing (Other Language) Award on Milton Keynes International Film Festival – UK(2022)
-	Nominee – Best Story in the film on Art Without Limit International Film Festival – Kosovo (2022)
-	Official Selection on 19th European Film Festival, Integration: You & Me – Poland (2022)
-	Outstanding achievement award on World Film Carnival – Singapore (2022)
-	Nominee – Best Lead Artist on CIFF – France (2022)
-	Special Outreach Award on 6th Ramsgate International Film & TV Festival – England (2022)
•	Budget: - $25,000+

Name: Jarowskij/Yellow Bird
Description:
Yellow Bird has been in the limelight for producing the feature films The Girl With the Dragon Tattoo, The Girl Who Played with Fire and The Girl Who Kicked the Hornet's Nest, based on Stieg Larsson's critically
acclaimed Millennium trilogy. Released in more than 50 countries with a total box office of above 210 million USD, this project is the most successful ever to come out of Scandinavia. The films are also available as a 6x90 TV movie films and won an International Emmy for Best TV mini series.

The company co-produced the David Fincher directed US version of The Girl With the Dragon Tattoo together with Scott Rudin for Columbia Pictures.

In 2012, Yellow Bird's screen adaptation of Jo Nesbø's novel Headhunters became the highest grossing foreign language release at the UK box office. Headhunters won the 2013 Empire Award for Best Thriller. The film has sold to over 35 countries, including the US. Headhunters was nominated in the category of  'Film not in the English Language', at the 2013 BAFTA awards.

Furthermore, Yellow Bird has produced both the Swedish and the UK versions of Henning Mankell's Wallander. The UK series, starring Kenneth Branagh for BBC1, was awarded the 2009 BAFTA for 'Best Drama Series'. The series was also nominated for two EMMY awards in the categories ’Best actor in a film or mini-series’ and ’Best director in a film or mini-series’.

Other recent Scandinavian productions include a series of Swedish films based on Liza Marklund's books about crime reporter Annika Bengtzon, six Irene Huss films based on Helene Tursten’s books, the screen adaptation of Johan Theorin's success novel Echoes from the Dead and a third Swedish Wallander series. Yellow Bird’s feature film ”Tjuvarnas jul” is currently in post-production and will have its theatrical premiere in autumn 2014.

Name: ASSOCIATION DES PRODUCTEURS DE CINEMA - APC
Description:
APC is a major film producers’ guild in France. Established in April 2007 from the original membership of the Chambre Syndicale des Producteurs de Films (an organization dating from 1945 whose founding fathers created the Cannes Film Festival, The Cannes Movie Market, UNIFRANCE…). It brings together 120 of the most dynamic and prestigious producing companies of the French film industry including Mandarin Cinéma, Les Productions du Trésor, La Petite Reine, Fidélité, Galatée Films, Wild Bunch, Pan-Européenne, Alicéléo, Rezo Production, Epithète Films, Produire à Paris…

APC acts as a spokes person for all the others arts (writers, directors, actors, distributors, crew…) as well as the CNC and local & regional funding . It is also an active member of the BLOC (Communication Board of the Cinema Associations) which he chaired in 2009.

APC is governed by a Board of 40 members who meet every 3 weeks. Several committees also meet regularly regarding the main strategic subjects of the film industry.

Name: Stage Fifty
Description:
Hello. We’re Stage Fifty.

We operate, design, and develop film studios and create production-ready sound stages wherever and whenever you need them, providing end-to-end solutions to ensure your next production runs smoothly and efficiently.

Name: Rapi Films
Description: Rapi Films is an Indonesian film production company of mostly exploitation films which was founded in 1968 and was internationally successful mostly in the 1980s. They produced many martial arts films and horror films involving black magic, inspired by old Indonesian legends. Directors who worked for them during this period include Ratno Timoer, H. Tjut Djalil and Sisworo Gautama Putra.

Name: Platino Industria
Description: Platino Industria es el espacio de encuentro del Audiovisual, el Turismo y la Educación, dando oportunidades de negocio para todos los productores, directores, distribuidores, inversionistas, comisiones de filmaciones y proveedores del sector.

Name: RtSE Casting Company
Description:
RtSE Casting works at a high level of professionalism while providing you with our casting expertise.   We have a very diverse pool of talent: ALL ETHNICITIES, ALL SHAPES, ALL SIZES, ALL AGES and several levels of acting development.  

RtSE Casting Company opened its doors in April 2006; this subsidiary company has provided A-List talent for feature, shorts and independent films alike.  RtSE Casting Company has also been very busy casting principals in independent films, extras in major films, theater, and music videos primarily in, but not limited to the Atlanta area.  We have talent and clients in areas such as:  Miami, Alabama, Georgia, New York, Los Angeles and Pennsylvania and the area of reach is steadily expanding.

Name: MAYBE MOVIES
Description:
Former VP New Media at Gaumont, Henri Magalon founded Maybe Movies in 2003 with the goal to structure an independent and creative production company.
Its objective: to develop and produce programs with innovative content and an international reach, with up to date 7 feature films, 3 animated series and several documentaries.

Name: Geronimo Entertainment
Description:
The Geronimo-principles saw the light of day many years ago on a Wednesday, never mind how long ago. Production Assistant intern Jasper Moeyaert en DOP Emanuel Vanderjeugd got talking on set and started making early but ambitious plans. A few years later, they decided to make the big jump, and started up their own company.

No balls, no glory, that’s the motto. Geronimo grew out to be a successful independent television production company, nominated not once, but three times for an International Emmy Award of Television Arts & Sciences. Making exceptional television programs, stylistically cinematic fiction projects and advertising campaigns and commercials that move people is what Geronimo is all about.

Over the years, Geronimo gained a lot of experience abroad on adventurous exploits. Adventure is in our DNA. We aim to make every project as interesting as possible for our audience. We think one step ahead, and go beyond where others give up. You see this in all our work, whether it’s flying a 35-year-old Cessna to Congo or presenting a message from the government about the millennium goals. Rock ’n Roll is part of our philosophy to ensure we never get old nor boring. The Geronimo-adventure has been one hell of a ride since the beginning and we’ve only just begun!

Name: Cornelsen Films
Description: Cornelsen Films is a motion pictures and film company based in Berlin Mitte

Name: AI Video Tools Pro
Description: We are AI Video Tools Pro, we curate high-quality AI video tools for video creation, video editing, video enhancement, video transcription, video translation, video background removal, video analysis, video visual effects, short videos, text to video, subtitles, animation, translation, screen recording and so much more. We understand the challenges people face when searching for high-quality video tools for their video projects. Therefore, we have created a curated platform that simplifies the process and connects you with the best AI video tools.

Name: Sentimental Filme
Description:
SOMOS SENTIMENTAIS. Desde 2002, produzimos com criatividade e afeto para a publicidade, o cinema, a TV, a arte e o entretenimento.

A gente se orgulha de ser uma casa onde o talento é nutrido e valorizado. Aqui o detalhe é levado em conta, e a qualidade é uma obsessão.

Name: ASSIMILATE
Description:
ASSIMILATE is the pioneer of real-time post-production and workflow tools that have proven essential to the successful creation of 2D/3D/VR studio and independent feature films, documentaries, TV episodes, and music videos. 

The SCRATCH product line, running on Windows and OS X, equips directors, DPs, on-set DITs and post-production artists with the state-of-the-art, cost-effective, data-centric solutions they need to meet the challenges of increased creativity and productivity amid ever-shrinking budgets. 

SCRATCH Product Line: Always leading edge!
•	SCRATCH VR: Only professional, real-time, end-to-end VR workflow and tools
•	SCRATCH: Post tools in a streamlined workflow that include dailies, conform, color grading, compositing, and finishing
•	Play Pro:  For real-time playback and review of all camera formats
•	SCRATCH Web:  For real-time, cloud-based collaboration and review anywhere in the world

All SCRATCH products are resolution independent, supporting multiple formats, including ARRI RAW, KineRAW, Sony F5/55/65 and Cyber Shot s700, Phantom, Panasonic Varicam 4K, Canon C300/C500, Canon 3DGoPro, as well as enhanced support for all RED cameras. SCRATCH is the only post-production tool to support native Kinefinity RAW (KRW and DNG) files. SCRATCH enables mixing and matching of any camera format, resolution or color space (including ACES) on the same timeline.

Name: Afcinema
Description: Association Française des directeurs de la photographie Cinématographique

Name: Triple Threat Supervision
Description: We are a full-service music supervision company providing  expertise in creative music supervision, soundtrack production, and music clearance/licensing making us a 'Triple Threat.' We search for and find the ideal songs for your story, negotiate with and hire composers to enhance your vision, and provide full music clearance/licensing services to ensure you’re protected. We work with all media including film, TV, advertisements, video games, podcasts and more. Have a project you need help with? Get in touch with us here.

Name: Perpetual Entertainment
Description: Perpetual Entertainment is one of Australia’s leading screen producers, creating high quality content for both local and international audiences out of their offices in Sydney, Los Angeles, Dallas, Vancouver and Auckland.

Name: Abu Dhabi Film Festival
Description: Abu Dhabi Film Festival has come to a close. Please follow twofour54 abudhabi to find out about future film industry activities & events.

Name: The End
Description:
The End is a creative studio dedicated to editing and post production.

Guided by their passion in telling stories, our talented team of editors, colorists, motion designers, 3D and VFX artists, work side by side with platforms, agencies, production companies, creatives and directors, exceeding expectations of our clients, delivering excellence in visual content for all formats and medias.

We are relentless and believe that the more we craft our films, the more efficient we will be in helping our clients reach their audience.

Name: Film and Digital Times
Description:
Film and Digital Times is the guide to technique and technology, tools and how-tos for Cinematographers, Photographers, Directors, Producers, Studio Executives, Camera Assistants, Camera Operators, Grips, Gaffers, Crews, Rental Houses, and Manufacturers.

It’s written, edited, and published by Jon Fauer, ASC, an award-winning Cinematographer and Director. He is the author of 14 bestselling books—over 120,000 in print—famous for their user-friendly way of explaining things. With inside-the-industry “secrets-of the-pros” information, Film and Digital Times is delivered to you by subscription or invitation, online or on paper. We don’t take ads and are supported by readers and sponsors.

Name: O2 Play
Description:
A O2 Play é dirigida por Igor Kupstas sob a tutela de Paulo Morelli, sócio da O2 Filmes, e faz parte do grupo O2. Em atividade desde 2013, a O2 Play lançou diversos filmes em cinema e nas plataformas digitais. 

A operação da O2 Play tem sinergia com a O2 Pós, setor de pós-produção da O2 Filmes, que atua como uma encoding house - ou seja, passa a adaptar e enviar os filmes de forma digital para plataformas de compra e aluguel de filmes online, como: Netflix, Google, iTunes e Amazon Prime Video.

A O2 Play é um agregador de iTunes, Google Play, Netflix, Now, Youtube Filmes, Amazon Prime Video, Vivo Play e outras plataformas de VOD, e realiza a distribuição digital e encoding para dezenas de títulos e séries, além de vendas para TV e mercado internacional.

A O2 Play teve seis longas escolhidos pelo iTunes como "Os Melhores Filmes do Ano” entre 2014 e 2015. Em abril de 2016, Fernando Meirelles se tornou o primeiro curador do iTunes do mundo, confira em itunes.com/fmeirelles

Você pode conferir estes, e outros filmes distribuídos digitalmente pela O2 Play em https://www.facebook.com/O2Play

Name: Elo Studios
Description:
A ELO STUDIOS acredita que histórias movem o mundo. Produzimos e distribuímos conteúdos que inspiram, provocam, conectam e reinventam perspectivas, levando narrativas impactantes a públicos diversos. Atuamos como ponte entre criadores e audiências globais, entregando entretenimento que desperta emoções, desafia e ressoa.

São mais de 20 produções originais, incluindo Caindo na Real (Telecine, TV Globo), Avenida Beira-Mar (vencedor do Festival de Guadalajara), Divinas (Lifetime), Desafio Impossível (Disney+) e Lupi & Baduki (Max), além de diversos projetos em diferentes estágios de desenvolvimento e produção.

Sempre com foco em inovação, autenticidade e impacto, produzimos branded entertainment, criando histórias envolventes em parceria com marcas, agências e canais. Entre os títulos, estão Mulheres no Comando (formato sobre empreendedorismo feminino apresentado por Fabi Saad) e Contar para Viver (Unesco/Cappuccino).

Desde 2005, a ELO STUDIOS distribuiu mais de 500 títulos de todas as regiões do Brasil, levando histórias brasileiras a mais de 100 países. Entre eles, O Menino e o Mundo, indicado ao Oscar. No cinema, mais de 120 filmes foram lançados, incluindo Medida Provisória, de Lázaro Ramos, o filme nacional mais assistido em 2022. O lineup dos próximos anos inclui grandes produções em parceria com Claro, Globo Filmes, Funcine Investimage, Paramount, Sony, Telecine e Warner.

Liderada por Ruben Feffer, Flavia Feffer e Sabrina Nudeliman Wagon (CEO), a ELO STUDIOS promove a inovação tanto em termos criativos quanto nos modelos de negócio, impulsionando narrativas que transcendem fronteiras e deixam um legado.

Name: Sheffield DocFest
Description:
Sheffield DocFest is the UK’s leading documentary festival and one of the world’s most influential markets for documentary projects. We champion and present the breadth of documentary form – film, television, immersive and art – in the vibrant city of Sheffield each June. We offer makers and audiences a place for inspiration, debate, development, learning and challenge. Our programming represents our core values – creativity, empathy, freedom, inclusivity and internationalism.

The 32nd Edition of the festival will take place in Sheffield from 18-23 June 2025. The MeetMarket, our flagship pitching platform, will take place on Thursday 19 June and Friday 20 June 2025.

Stay up to date with all things DocFest by signing up to our newsletter at: http://bit.ly/SDFNews

Sheffield DocFest is run by International Documentary Festival Sheffield, an independent registered charity (no.1184849), whose purpose is to advance the art of film, education and training in documentary filmmaking. Our core values as a charity centre around empathy, inclusiveness, social engagement, freedom and internationalism.

Name: The Royal Film Commission - Jordan
Description:
THE ROYAL FILM COMMISSION - JORDAN (RFC) was established with a vision to develop an internationally competitive Jordanian film industry.

Founded in accordance with the Royal Film Commission Law No. 27 for the year 2003, approved by Law No. 22 issued by the Parliament in 2008, the RFC is a financially and administratively autonomous Jordanian public organization led by a Board of Commissioners, chaired by HRH Prince Ali Bin Al Hussein. 

The RFC is a member of the Association for Film Commissioners International (AFCI). The (AFCI) is the official professional and educational organization for film commissions. AFCI Members assist feature, television, commercial, industrial and stills production throughout the world. For more information about (AFCI) www.afci.org. 

Mission

Encouraging Jordanians and people from the Middle East to tell their stories, thus contributing to cross-cultural understanding and enhancing freedom of expression.
Creating educational programs for Jordanians working or aspiring to work in the film industry.
Promoting film culture throughout Jordan, thus contributing to educating and fostering a critical mind.
Positioning Jordan as a location for international audio-visual productions, offering great locations, creative resources, as well as technical assistance and ﬁnancial incentives.
Offering management and support services to local and foreign productions.
Providing work opportunities at world-class standards in all areas of cinematic art.
Vision 

To build in Jordan a world-class, cutting-edge film industry where all people of the Middle East can freely make films alongside the world’s most talented artists.

Name: Aamir Khan Productions
Description:
Aamir Khan Productions was set up in 1999 by Hindi film actor Aamir Khan with the purpose of producing the film Lagaan. He decided to produce Lagaan after the script was not purchased by any other studio. B. Shrinivas Rao also joined AKP as the line producer on Lagaan. The movie was released in 2001, with Khan as the lead actor. The film was a critical and commercial success, and was nominated for an Academy Award in the Best Foreign Language Film category along with four other foreign films, eventually losing to No Man's Land. The film won many major awards at several award functions such as Filmfare and IIFA.


B. Shrinivas Rao later served as the executive producer for Khan's directorial debut, Taare Zameen Par, and became the executive producer for the production company, supervising all of its productions. Khan also starred in Taare Zameen Par, sharing the screen with the child actor Darsheel Safary (in his acting debut) and Tisca Chopra. The film was initially conceived of and developed by a husband-and-wife team, Amole Gupte and Deepa Bhatia. It tells the story of a young child who suffers in school until a teacher identifies him as dyslexic. The movie was critically acclaimed,. Taare Zameen Par won the 2008 Filmfare Best Movie Award as well as a number of other Filmfare and Star Screen Awards. Khan's wife, Kiran Rao, also worked as an associate producer for Taare Zameen Par.

The third film produced by the company was Abbas Tyrewala's Jaane Tu Ya Jaane Na, released in July 2008. It marked the debut of Aamir Khan and Mansoor Khan's nephew, Imran Khan, and it was co-produced by Ritesh Sidhwani.


The fourth offering from AKP was Dhobi Ghat (Mumbai Diaries), a low-budget art house film written and directed by Kiran Rao. It focuses on four characters – one of them played by Khan – from different walks of life in the city of Mumbai.

Name: Goldcrest Post London
Description:
Operating from London and New York, GOLDCREST is a fully integrated and renowned international media company providing film financing, production, post production and worldwide sales.  

Goldcrest is a market leading supplier of Academy and BAFTA Award winning picture and sound post production services for film and broadcast projects, based in central London and New York.

Goldcrest’s broad offering now includes three state-of-the-art Dolby licensed dubbing theatres with DCI compliant projection, ADR recording, sounds design and editing suites, offline editorial suites, data extraction, film recording and scanning, online editing, 4K and 2K grading in 2D and 3D for theatrical release as well as Ultra HD and High Dynamic Range for streaming services and broadcast TV. “Theatre 1”,  is Central London’s largest sound mixing theatre, the only theatre in Central London to be Dolby Atmos Premier licensed and the only theatre of its size to be fully sound isolated.

The teams in London and New York have lent their expertise to a broad range of films including Nosferatu, Conclave, A Thousand Blows, The Witcher, Beetlejuice Beetlejuice, Bird, Love Lies Bleeding, True Detective, Slow Horses, Bad Sisters, Wonka, A Haunting in Venice, Wicked Little Letters, Hoard, Asteroid City, Tetris, Empire of Light, Fantastic Beasts, The Northman, The King's Man, No Time To Die, The Dig, Enola Holmes, 1917, Dumbo, Jurassic World: Fallen Kingdom, Isle Of Dogs, Trust, Assassins Creed, Baby Driver, Jason Bourne, My Cousin Rachel, Free Fire, Taboo, London Has Fallen,  High Rise, Bastille Day, The Danish Girl, Eddie The Eagle, Kingsmen: The Secret Service, Paddington, Cinderella.

Award winning productions that have posted at Goldcrest London include Conclave, The Banshees of Inisherin, Belfast, Saint Maud, Judy, Rocketman, The Favourite, 1917, Three Billboards Outside Ebbing Missouri, American Honey, Killing Of A Sacred Deer, Carol, The Danish Girl, Les Misérables and Hollow Crown: Richard II.

Name: Tribeca Film Institute
Description: The Tribeca Film Institute is a 501(c)(3) year-round nonprofit arts organization founded by Robert De Niro, Jane Rosenthal, and Craig Hatkoff in the wake of September 11, 2001. TFI empowers filmmakers through grants and professional development, and is a resource for and supporter of individual artists in the field. The Institute’s educational programming leverages an extensive network of people in the film industry to help underserved New York City students learn filmmaking and gain the media skills necessary to be productive citizens and creative individuals in the 21st century.

Name: Eclair
Description: Founded in 1907 in the early days of cinema, Eclair is a historic, innovative and respected company in the motion picture and television industries. Eclair is the Ymagis Group’s business unit dedicated to content services, a leader in advanced digital technology services for the cinema industry. Through CinemaNext and Eclair, the Group provides innovative solutions to movie exhibitors, distributors (feature films & event cinema), producers, right-holders, cinema/TV advertising networks, rights holders, broadcasters, VOD/S-VOD platform operators and video publishers. Created in 2007, Ymagis Group is headquartered in Paris and has offices in 26 countries with over 770 employees. Our core business is structured around three main units: CinemaNext (exhibitor services: sales and field services, software solutions, customer service/NOC and consulting), Eclair (content services: post-production, theatrical delivery, digital distribution, versioning and accessibility, restoration and preservation) and Ymagis (financial services). For more information, please connect to www.ymagis.com, www.cinemanext.com or www.eclair.digital

Name: Boutique Filmes
Description:
Ten years ago, the producer based in Sao Paulo is dedicated to telling Brazilian stories of impact. With a great presence in the international market, the company is the source of the main talents in independent production and partner of many important market media players such as Netflix, Globoplay, Amazon Prime Video, Discovery+, Disney+ and HBO Max.

The Boutique Filmes has so far three International Emmy Awards nominations and was one of the pioneers in the production of streaming in Brazil, with the international success “3%”. In 2021, Boutique was responsible for producing the first Brazilian true crime for Netflix “Elize Matsunaga: Era uma Vez um Crime”. Furthermore, the producer also produced the fiction series “Temporada de Verao” (Netflix), with Giovanna Lancellotti, Jorge Lopez, Gabz and Andre Luiz Frambach.

Currently, Boutique Filmes has invested in great projects, such as: “Mila no Multiverso” (Disney+), a movie that portrays the story of Mila, a character who receives a gift on her sixteenth birthday: the power of traveling between different parallel universes to look for her mother; “Rota 66” (Globoplay), a series based on the best-seller by Caco Barcellos about the police violence committed against young black skin and poor people in Sao Paulo and “O Negociador” (Amazon Prime Video), a series that portrays the intense work of a police negotiator, Captain Gabriel Menck, member of the Special Tactical Action Group (GATE), and the docuseries “PCC: O Poder Secreto” (HBOMax) as well.
