Name: Brave New Films
Description:
Our mission is to champion social justice issues by using a model of media, education, and grassroots volunteer involvement that inspires, empowers, motivates and teaches civic participation and makes a difference.

Robert Greenwald and Brave New Films are creating a better America, and we want you to join us. Using media, films, volunteers and internet video campaigns, Brave New Films has created a quick-strike capability that informs the public, challenges mainstream media with the truth, and motivates people to take action on social issues nationwide.

From exposing the private prison crisis to helping middle class and poor workers to understanding where your tax dollars are going, our groundbreaking social media campaigns have revolutionized activism. We are reaching millions through YouTube, bloggers, networking sites, and strategic partnerships — and we’re getting results.

Brave New Films is a non-partisan, non-profit, 501(c)(3) organization that carries out the Brave New Films mission by creating and distributing educational films. Brave New Films Action Fund is a 501(c)(4) nonprofit organization that conducts legislative activity necessary to carry out the mission of the Brave New Films family. Neither of the Brave New Films organizations makes contributions to or expressly advocates for the election or defeat of candidates for public office.

http://bravenewfilms.org/

Awards

    2014 Media for a just society award for Our Turn to Dream
    2014 LA Webfest outstanding reality/documentary series for Prison Profiteers
    2014 LA Webfest outstanding writing in reality/documentary series for Prison Profiteers
    2013 Media for a just society award for Law and Disorder
    2009 Bronze Telly for This Brave Nation
    2008 Laurel Awards

Name: Screen Scene Post Production
Description:
A corner stone of the Irish film and television industry for over 30 years, Screen Scene is Ireland's leading Post Production and VFX facility.

Based in the centre of Dublin, with 50 post production rooms spread across 20,000 sq foot of beautiful Georgian buildings, Screen Scene’s multi-award winning post house offers full service High Definition picture, sound, graphics and visual effects to the independent sector and the international market place.

Boasting 15 cutting rooms, Ireland’s most complete sound facility (as well as additional capacity at Ardmore Sound in Bray), a dedicated Visual effects building and sixty five highly skilled members of staff on hand to provide tailored service and ensure faultless delivery, Screen Scene offers an unparalleled post production experience.

Name: ABAI AVGC
Description: ABAI is a non-profit organisation committed to developing the Animation, VFX and Gaming industry in India. We are a connector of the ecosystem – industry, academia, government & the community – and a catalyst for development.

Name: Designing Sound
Description: Website/blog dedicated to the world of sound design for visual media. There you can find the latest information about sound design including articles, tutorials, interviews, and all kind of stuff about the sound of recent films, video games and multimedia projects. Also there’re dedicated categories for learning purposes, interviews, quotes, a featured sound designer each month, and more.

Name: Ealing Studios
Description:
In 1902, Ealing Studios was home to the birth of British cinema and some of the greatest British films have been made here. Under the leadership of Michael Balcon, it was home to the great Ealing Comedies such as The Ladykillers, The Man in the White Suit and Kind Hearts and Coronets.

Ealing Studios is still a home for talent, committed to creativity and ideas. Star Wars Episode 2 – The Attack of the Clones, Bridget Jones, Shaun of the Dead, St Trinian’s, Notting Hill, The Darkest Hour and Back to Black were all shot at Ealing. 

 Now, Ealing Studios is expanding by another 35,000 square feet, creating beautiful new offices, a new sound stage and shared workspaces. Coming 2025.

Name: Kutuko Studio
Description: We are a global studio specializing in creative direction and art, with a focus on 3D art direction and creativity. We offer high-quality, customized brand visualization solutions, creating aspirational content for future-oriented brands. Our team of experts specializes in various disciplines, including 3D modeling, animation, and visual effects. We combine our skills in CGI art direction and motion design to deliver impactful and unique content that captivates and inspires. We work closely with our clients to explore, imagine, and define their future vision using advanced technology and the latest visual trends. We are committed to creating aspirational content that propels brands into the future and celebrates the value of aspirational content, the pure love of art, and beauty.

Name: Open Road Films
Description:
Open Road Films is a film distribution company backed by AMC Entertainment Inc. (AMC) and Regal Entertainment Group (Regal), the two largest theatrical exhibition and entertainment companies in the United States. 

Open Road Films is a dynamic acquisition-based domestic theatrical distribution company that will concentrate on wide-release movies.

Name: IPO
Description:
The IPO Group consists of a technology-focused Record Label, an industry-leading Management Firm, and a creative Entertainment Agency. 

IPO Records (REC): Technology-focused record label built and managed on state-of-the-art music software.

IPO Management (MGMT): The premier management firm home to some of the industry's top artists and talent.

IPO Entertainment (ENT): Creative agency that specializes in Production, Creative Marketing, Activations, etc.

The company style is based off of the process leading up to an entity going from private to public by entering the stock market. IPO. Initial Public Offering.

COMPANY VISION: We believe in artists, talent, or projects, before they get big or go public.

GENRE(S): Hip-Hop/Rap, R&B/Soul, Pop, Reggae/Dancehall/Soca/Afrobeat & EDM/Dance/Electronic, Comedy, Talent, Entertainment + Film/TV

Name: PERIS COSTUMES  - Vestuario escénico
Description:
PERIS COSTUMES is a company specialized in costume rental and manufacturing for film, television, advertising and theatrical productions.  
A broad stock constantly up-to-date, with over 15 M items of all eras and cultures, allows us to provide our clients with a complete wardrobe service.

Quality, commitment to service, experience, flexibility and competitiveness are the values that make us an exclusive costume company.

We combine the latest technologies in manufacturing, organization and management, together with a highly respect for tradition over years of experience, and the heritage of one of the world’s oldest and prestigious companies within the business, allows us to fulfill any professional needs. At Peris Costumes, we offer a complete costume service for film, theater, and events. With a presence in 23 countries, we make sure your vision comes to life anywhere in the world.
We hold an open-door policy and personalized attention, regardless of the project size.

A dynamic and agile structure let us be fully competitive and adapt to today’s economic difficulties, always maintaining the excellence in quality.

We are a mixture of tradition, modernity and, above all, enthusiasm for all we do.

Name: iGene DI and VFX
Description:
Overview:

iGene is an eminent Visual Effects and Colour Grading  Company with 
operations based in London, Singapore, and Chennai.

TPN Certified Partner (Part of the Trusted Partner Network) 

A robust content delivery partner for Amazon, Netflix, Disney, and Apple TV.

Clients include major studios across the globe: US, UK, Canada, Australia & Asia

Recent projects include:
Spiderman, The Crown, Mission Impossible, Godzilla Vs The King, Antman, Call of the Wild, The Boys.

iGene is distinguished for its cutting-edge DI & Visual Effects in Feature Films, Television Series (OTT), Commercials, Location Base Entertainment (LBE) content, and VR projects.

A team of highly qualified, skilled professionals including 190+ multi-talented Creative Artists available 24/7, delivering to all time zones.

We guarantee quick turnaround times, 100% customer satisfaction, Safe & Secure access control environments.

20,000 sq. ft. State of the art Offshore Development Studio in South. India to support your Budget.

Meticulous Quality Control measures to ensure high standards. 

iGene takes great pride in spotting and training the talent of tomorrow, through its production-oriented VFX Training initiative - iGene School of VFX Technology https://igenecourses.com/

Name: Dubai International Film Festival
Description: The Dubai International Film Festival (DIFF) is the leading film festival in the Middle East. Since its inception in 2004, the festival has served as an influential platform for Arab filmmakers and talent at an international level, by spearheading the cinema movement in the region. The 11th edition of DIFF is set to take place between December 10 – 17, 2014.

Name: 48 Hour Film Project
Description:
The 48 Hour Film Project is a wild and sleepless weekend in which you and a team make a movie—write, shoot, edit and score it—in just 48 hours.

On Friday night, you get a character, a prop, a line of dialogue and a genre, all to include in your movie. 48 hours later, the movie must be complete. Then it will show at a local theater, usually in the next week.

Name: 13 Prods
Description:
13 Productions est née du rapprochement de deux sociétés de productions 13 production et 13 au sud. Deux sociétés aux profils différents mais complémentaires et compatibles en terme de ligne éditoriale. Fusionnant l’expérience et la modernité, 13 Productions explore et enrichit le cinéma documentaire, tout en assumant sa présence singulière dans le domaine de la fiction.

Questionner le monde, enquêter sur ses rouages, souligner les points de fracture et les lignes d’utopie en partageant la vie d’hommes et de femmes engagés, voilà ce qui dynamise l’enthousiasme de 13 productions.

Name: Academia de las Artes y las Ciencias Cinematográficas de España
Description:
La Academia de las Artes y las Ciencias Cinematográficas de España, creada el 8 de enero de 1986, es una institución de derecho privado, de talante integrador y democrático. Según sus estatutos se trata de una asociación de carácter no lucrativo de profesionales dedicados a las distintas especialidades de la creación cinematográfica, con personalidad jurídica propia, constituida con carácter indefinido y regida por los principios de democracia, pluralismo, transparencia y participación. 


La intención fundamental de la Academia es impulsar la promoción nacional e internacional del cine español, defender a sus profesionales y analizar la situación de la industria y del propio cine español.

Name: Nu Metro
Description:
Nu Metro Cinemas has been at the forefront of South African entertainment since 1932. As one of the country’s leading cinema chains, we’re proud to offer premium movie experiences through cutting-edge formats like 4DX, Xtreme, VIP, and Kids’ Cinema.
From blockbuster premieres to immersive in-cinema innovations and affordable partner discounts, we’re redefining what it means to go to the movies—one experience at a time.

Name: Tenerife Film Commission
Description:
Since 2000, Tenerife Film Commission has assisted over a thousand productions. An unbeatable 40% tax rebate for foreign productions, its fabulous climate (23ºC average temperature) and its stunning natural scenery make this 2,034 square kilometer island a great option for your next shooting or animation project. 

We have a great range of cinematographic professionals and equipment rental companies that have already worked for Jason Bourne (Universal), Clash Of The Titans (Warner Bros), Fast & Furious 6 (Universal) and much more. 

Here you can find all those locations, weather and experts you have always been looking for. And Tenerife is just a 4-hour flight away from the main European cities. 

We have experience with feature films, drama series, animation projects, documentaries, commercials & photo shootings. 
Contact us. We will be glad to lend you a hand!
Location: Santa Cruz de Tenerife, Santa Cruz de Tenerife

Name: Moonshine Post Production
Description:
Moonshine is a full service post-production house with world class facilities in the Old Fourth Ward neighborhood of Atlanta, Georgia. Surrounded by a solid team of artists, supervisors and technicians the company has many years of experience, and a consistent track record for delivering creative work on time, on budget, and with exceptional service.

When we’re not servicing Commercial Stories, Broadcast Episodics or Big Screen Deliverables, Moonshine is making movies. We have strong roots in the Atlanta film and indie scene and not only do we recognize the importance in cultivating talent, but also in collaborating with new talent – we do this for the sole reason we started our business: better story telling.

Name: Urban Post Production
Description:
Urban Post is an award-winning post-production facility located in the heart of Toronto's film studio district. For more than 15 years, we have provided post-production services for large-budget theatrical features, Episodic shows, MOWs, documentaries, and short film productions.  We offer dailies, offline edit suites with equipment, 2d VFX, sound edit, sound mixing, ADR, foley, picture finishing, and full deliverables for theatrical, festivals, and major streaming platforms.    

Urban Post has an incredible legacy in the world of film & television and can guarantee to get you to the finish line with your production; Our mission is to help filmmakers.  We look forward to hearing from you!

Name: AMOPIX
Description:
Amopix est un studio de création audiovisuelle créé en 2002. Le studio est composé de deux départements :
- Film & Motion
- Cinéma d’animation 

Spécialisés dans le mélange de plans réels et de motion designs nous intervenons dans le domaine de la publicité depuis 2002. En 2011 le studio ajoute l’animation 2D et 3D à ses savoir-faire afin de produire des projets de séries, documentaires, courts et long-métrages de cinéma. 

 Nos équipes sont passionnées et créées sur mesure selon les projets et les besoins. 

Situé en plein centre historique, à l'ombre de la Cathédrale, Amopix a créé un espace singulier qui se veut être un outil idéal pour la création audiovisuelle.

Name: Trimaran
Description:
Trimaran is a Paris's based creative vendor specialized in computer graphics (CGI) & visual effects (VFX) for features, series and documentaries. 
We have a specialty of rebuilding lanscapes, villages and cities for historical or futuristics films or series.
With great innovations on realtime graphics for broadcast and digital.
We are Silver TPN and member of FRANCEVFX, the French Vendors Association.

* Visual Effects for features & series
* Full CGI environnement sequences for historical series

Name: Cinetree
Description:
Cinetree is een filmclub en streamingplatform voor mensen die verder willen kijken. Wij selecteren films en documentaires die raken, inspireren en thema’s als klimaat, mentaal welzijn en vrouwelijk leiderschap belichten. Als member steun je nieuwe producties via de Cinetree Foundation en beleef je samen onze community: filmavonden, gesprekken en acties rondom urgente thema’s.

Geen eindeloos scrollen, maar elke week 2 zorgvuldig gekozen nieuwe titels, zodat je altijd een verhaal vindt dat je raakt.

Cinetree. Kijk verder.

Name: BaconX
Description:
BaconX is a talent-driven award winning creative studio based in Copenhagen. 
Our carefully selected team of international artists has been committed to produce bespoke and well crafted visual effects and color since 2008.

Throughout our career, we have worked with leading ad agencies like: Lego, TRY, Le Truc, DROGA5, Wealthsimple, Biscuit Filmworks and auteur directors like: Martin De Thurah, Andreas Nilsson, Martin Werner, Bart Timmer, Adam Hashemi, and many more. 

In 2021, we won Gold for VFX at Ciclope Festival, an award show dedicated to film craft & creativity, for the project COOP Naturaplan. Some brands we have worked with are the following: Lego, Bosch, Magnum, Volvo, Pfizer, Mercedes, Tubi, Etsy, and Snapchat. Our award winning commercial Sluggish for Wealthsimple brought home many awards including: The One Show’s Film & Video FI 16 Use of Humor, Brand-Side/ In House BS 12- Film & Video, Shots Awards: The Americas 2025 Direction up to 60 seconds, and 3D Animation; as well as The AICP award for Character Design, CGI, and Compositing. 

We collaborate closely with our sister company Bacon Production as well as independently with a variety of clients worldwide across film, advertising, TV and music videos.

Have a great project ? Let’s create something extraordinary together!

Name: Lightcut Film
Description:
Lightcut Film is a digital Production and Post Production Studio based in Rome since 2007. 

From Vfx to MoGraph, from Sound Design to Color Correction, our Professional Artists work in dynamic, interactive, fast and safe creative Workflows, up-to-date with the latest tech trends and always working with certified Softwares. 

Among the other works, we created the 3D Golden Lion for the Venice Film Festival's Commercial and worked on the Spot for the Il Giro D'Italia 2020 through the Head and Face Replacement of some the best Italian Champions of street biking. 

We definitely love to turn Ideas into stunning Project.

Name: Studio Blackbird
Description:
Blackbird is a collaborative team of visual effects artists focused on providing creatively driven responses to every brief, every time. We are an artist owned company with a commitment to producing the highest standard of creative work.

VFX and moving images are our passion whether it be film, commercial, television, music video or otherwise. Free thinking and service focused, we seek partnerships and opportunities that allow us to grow and push us to deliver our best work possible.

Housed in a heritage terrace in the hub of Surry Hills, we have created an inspiring & flexible creative space that includes the latest and greatest equipment on offer to the industry today.

Name: DCM
Description:
DCM was founded in 2008 by Dario Suter, Christoph Daniel and Marc Schmidheiny as a film production company. In 2010, Joel Brandeis joined the partners who gave the company its name. 

Following the production of its first feature film, WAFFENSTILLSTAND, the company got involved in film distribution as well by taking over the Berlin-based film distributor Delphi Filmverleih in 2011. 

In 2013, DCM extended its distribution business to Switzerland where it is managed by Stephanie Candinas. 

DCM’s first success as distributors came in 2012 with the award-winning film THE ARTIST which received five Oscars, three Golden Globes and numerous other awards. In addition to its own productions – such as the beloved children’s film series BIBI & TINA – DCM co-produced hit films like Dustin Hoffman’s directorial debut QUARTET or ASTRID and continues to bring national and international productions such as CAROL, MOONLIGHT or THE OLD MAN AND THE GUN to the cinema screens. 

Since its foundation, DCM has also been active as a seed and early stage investor, providing strategic and operational support to young companies in Berlin.

With the unusual combination of its three business areas – film production, film distribution and startup investments – DCM has made a name for itself in the film world and Berlin startup scene. 

The company currently employs over 40 people with offices in Berlin and Zurich and is always looking for talents who are enthusiastic about film, media and technology.

Name: Linmon Pictures
Description:
Linmon Pictures is a new innovative boutique motion picture company dedicated to content creation with Internet DNA. Founded in 2014 in Shanghai, it operates full industry spectrum from financing, production, marketing, and distribution to derivatives development for drama, movies, as well as other content productions. 
Linmon Pictures upholds its vision of “Super Content Connecting New Audience”, and aims to present “super content” of “super investment, super quality, and superb impact”. So far it has delivered a variety of dramas boasting both public and market appreciation. Masterpieces include Love You, Leave You, renewing the record of audience rating during Chinese New Year; To Be a Better Man, a hot success with 14.2 billion online views and setting a “new production standard for domestic dramas”; A Love for Separation, the hot topic and the representative realistic work of the year; Fighter of the Destiny, over 30 billion online views and more than ten overseas edition, a record-high among Chinese dramas.
A platform-driven entity, Linmon Pictures features a “golden triangle” strategy—content production, technology and talents, and forward-looking, systematic operation supported by its innovative partnership and team collaboration. Linmon has four branches namely Linmon Yuexin, Linmon Kaixin, Linmon Digital and M.Young specialized respectively in production of dramas and films, technology, and artist brokerage. 
In an age of rapid changes, Linmon is committed to present cultural products that could “be kept in mind and go global”. By presenting dramas that applaud our life and the era, it not only witnesses the shifts of time, but also interprets new values and new thoughts emerging from social progresses.

Name: Millennium Media
Description:
Millennium Media is of one of the longest-running independent film companies in the history of Hollywood, with 28 years and more than 325 movies to its credit. The company now finances, produces, and sells worldwide five to eight star-driven films per year, with budgets between $20 and $80 million.
Millennium is best known for the box office hits The Expendables franchise, Olympus Has Fallen and London Has Fallen, The Hitman’s Bodyguard, and Mechanic: Resurrection. Recent films include Angel Has Fallen and the successful reboot of the Rambo franchise, Rambo: Last Blood.


The company was founded in 1992 under the name Nu Image, Inc.

Name: Pixelframes VFX studios
Description:
We are a studio of highly creative and technical people who work for Visual effects for Films. We are based in Bangalore working for south Indian films. Here at Pixelframes we create high end digital environments, effects, wire/rig removal and Motion graphics for variety of films

We also has our own DI setup which makes complete post production studio for any film or TV production.

Name: Deadbeat
Description:
Deadbeat is a multi-award-winning creative production studio. With over a decade of experience producing commercials, music videos and live events, Deadbeat works globally with the biggest and most recognisable brands on the planet.

Deadbeat Films: Commercials, Music Videos, Content.

Deadbeat Live: Festivals, Live Shows, Summits.

Deadbeat Studios Feature Films, TV series, and Documentaries. 

Deadbeat Impact: The human and environmental impact of film production on the contributors involved, as well as the wider community.

Name: Spyglass Entertainment
Description: Spyglass Entertainment is an global entertainment company that develops, produces, finances, and distributes feature length motion pictures for exhibition in the U.S. domestic and foreign theatrical markets and for subsequent worldwide release in all media, including home video, pay and free television.

Name: Premise Entertainment
Description:
Founded by award-winning director and Disney animation veteran, Dominic Carola, Premise Entertainment is a vibrant creative hub located in Central Florida. Our team, made up of former Walt Disney Feature Animation professionals and industry experts, is dedicated to pushing the boundaries of visual storytelling.

Specializing in animation, film, publishing, themed entertainment, and commercial advertising, Premise Entertainment is your go-to source for innovative content and creative services. Whether we're developing original projects or collaborating as a support and co-production studio, our passion for character development and artistic excellence drives everything we do. From initial story concept to final compositing, editorial, and post-production, we deliver content that engages and inspires.

Name: DRONELAB
Description:
Fully insured and AESA approved for commercial drone operations in the controlled traffic region (CTR), night operations, and helicopter operations over congested areas.
Dronelab provides aerial support specialised for film, TV and photo productions.

Based in Barcelona, we provide cutting edge solutions for the most demanding aerial cinematography projects worldwide using the best gyro-stabilized systems for helicopters, drones and cablecam systems.

Dronelab’s team is comprised of pilots, cinematographers, technicians and coordinators of the highest standard with extensive experience in aerial filming. We are fully insured and AESA approved for day and night commercial helicopter operations in congested areas. Our highly skilled helicopter and drone pilots, have extensive flying experience that permit any film set and extreme locations such as Antartica.

The helicopter camera system Shotover F1 is the only 6 axes gyro-stabilized head in the world. It can handle over 200 cameras and lens combinations. It is the definitive tool to mount on helicopters, airplanes, boats and cars.

Our extensive range of drone filming equipment includes the heavy lift options, the Inspire 2 integrated platform, Racing drones, Cinewhoop, Mavic 2 Pro and cablecam system.

Credit list includes films, advertising, television shows, corporates and 3D models.

Name: Praxinos
Description: Praxinos is a cooperative company, founded in 2018, that develops 2D / 3D solutions based on Unreal Engine. The company is owned by experts of the animation industry.

Name: European Film Promotion
Description: EFP (European Film Promotion) is an international network of film promotion institutes from 37 countries from throughout Europe, each representing their national films and talent abroad. Under the EFP flag, these organisations team up to jointly promote the diversity and spirit of European cinema and talent at key film festivals and markets, in particular outside of Europe. EFP is financially supported by the Creative Europe – MEDIA Programme of the European Union and by its member organisations.

Name: Sagicapri Produtora
Description:
PRODUTORA DE VÍDEOS - CONHEÇA NOSSO PORTFÓLIO

Conheça o portfólio da nossa produtora de vídeos e faça do seu vídeo um case de sucesso. Desenvolvemos vídeos institucionais, vídeos em motion graphics, time lapse, vídeos para stories, propagandas de TV, video marketing, filmagem aérea, e-learning, animações 2D e Animação 3D, clipes musicais, treinamentos e muito mais! Um vídeo qualquer não é mais suficiente, se você ainda não é cliente, junte-se a nós, queremos surpreender você.
Location: São Bernardo do Campo  , São Paulo

Name: NBFX
Description:
NBFX is a vfx studio focused on providing a broad range of services in VFX and full CG cinematics for VR application. We are able to respond to the needs of projects of different types, scales, and genres through our experienced technical departments: modeling, texture, rigging, animation, FX, lighting, compositing, video editing and VFX on set supervision. 

At NBFX we like to work in tandem with our clients to find the best solutions, create the desired results, all while making the process of adding VFX to a project as smooth as possible.

Cool Team. Great VFX!

Name: RISE PICTURES
Description:
A subsidiary of RISE | Visual Effects Studios, RISE PICTURES is the film and television production arm under the RISE banner and co-produces, finances and produces in-house a wide-ranging slate of films with storytelling and visual effects demands, creating exciting and immersive new worlds for global audiences.

RISE PICTURES stands for a wide spectrum of commercial cinema and primetime television. We produce German- and English-language feature films and television programs in various genres ranging from elaborate screen adaptations of novels and bestsellers, comedies for every target audience, and engaging family entertainment, to animated feature films and productions by next-generation filmmakers – with one unifying element across our portfolio: a distinctive look & feel with leading state-of-the-art visual appeal implemented by RISE | Visual Effects Studios.

The RISE group of companies offers clients a 360-degree service from concept to screen. As a fully integrated company, we are able to guide a project from script development to concept art, from pitch to financing, from storyboard to animatic, from shoot to post-production. RISE’s main business acumen and value is based on our international expertise, either through RISE PICTURES’ international producing expertise or by RISE | Visual Effects Studios’ state-of-the-art digital effects work on global box-office hits.

Our message is simple, but distinct: RISE creates worlds.

Name: ECG Productions
Description: Entertainment Creative Group Productions, Inc. is a full-service video production, post-production and digital animation house located in Atlanta, GA.  From feature length films to industrials to music videos to commercials, ECG Productions offers turnkey, script-to-screen solutions to a growing list of regional, national and international clients. Our customers include Mercedes Benz, Coca-Cola, UPS, GE, Verizon Wireless, The Travel Channel, Samsung, LG, Kimberly Clark, Saab, Aflac, Anheuser-Busch and The Capital Grille.

Name: LocationHQ
Description:
Location HQ is the result of decades of experience seeking out some of the most iconic Locations in film and events. It's what we do, and what we love.
 
From the biggest movies in the world to the most spectacular events, our location skills have been used for productions of all sizes and all budgets. We always meet our clients needs. 
 
Our film credits include Marvel's 'Age of Ultron', ‘Skyfall’, ‘World War Z’, ‘Les Miserables’, 'The Wolf of Wall Street', ‘Snow White and the Huntsman’, 'Thor', 'Prometheus', 'Captain America', 'X-Men’, 'Avengers: Age of Ultron', 'The BFG' and ‘The King’s Speech’. To mention just a few. We have helped organize some of the largest shots in Londons film history helping close Whitehall, Westminster Bridge and Piccadilly Circus from both Bond Villians, Alien invasions and zombie attacks. We are just as comfortable abroad as we are in our home city London, we have scouted and helped organise shots from the futuristic streets of Tokyo to the arrid untouched Sahara desert. 
 
Our commercials credits include: Nike, Adidas, Land Rover, Mazda, Alfa Romeo, Coca-Cola, Sky, Kelloggs, KFC, McDonald's, Orange and Nokia.
 
Our events credits include events for Suzuki, Orange, Nokia, and various Secret Cinemas over the years. We are very proud of our credits and the part we have played in their success.

Just call us on: 0203 302 0664 or email us: info@locationhq.co.uk

Name: Freelance; Self-employed Filmmaker
Description: Hi, I’m Nick Edgar and I am an independent filmmaker from southern New Hampshire who specializes in making interesting and creative promotional videos. I have been in the field since I graduated college in 2008. Since then I have worked on not only my own freelance projects, but several feature films, a multitude of shorts and a handful of television shows. Take a look at my website and see what I have been up to lately!

Name: EVO Filmes
Description:
EVO Filmes is a complete production company, serving all stages of the audiovisual process, for its own productions, production services for contracted films, co-productions and international productions. 

Headquartered in Brazil and Europe, our portfolio has more than 4.500 films, including documentaries, TV shows and series, short films, features, video clips and cultural products. We operate globally and have already made co-productions with several countries such as: Portugal, France, Africa, Lebanon, Finland, Dubai, Italy, United States, Egypt, and we still have a lot to explore. 

The focus is on producing films that really matter, that have relevance and that bring concrete benefits to society.

Name: Beta Fiction Spain
Description: Beta Fiction Spain (BFS) is the Spanish powerhouse of the German group Beta Film. It was created in May 2022 as a film distributor and producer of series and features. The business is headed by Mercedes Gamero and Pablo Nogueroles, widely recognized executives in the audiovisual industry.

Name: AG Studios Latam
Description:
AG Studios es una casa productora que opera desde 2014 en Bogotá, Colombia, y ha participado en 24 temporadas de series y largometrajes para estudios y clientes internacionales. Entre sus producciones  originales se encuentran la serie Estado de Fuga:1986 para Netflix, y para Amazon Studios los largometrajes Los Iniciados parte 1 y parte 2, así como la serie Los Billis.  Entre los servicios de producción se destacan: Paddington en Perú para StudioCanal, La Reina del Sur  temporadas 2 y 3 para Telemundo/Netflix, Jack Ryan temporada 2 para Paramount Television / Amazon Studios, y The Night Manager temporada 2 para InkFactory / Amazon Studios. 
 

AG Studios is a production house operating in Bogotá, Colombia, since 2014. It has produced 24 seasons of series and feature films for international studios and clients. Its original productions include the Netflix series Estado de Fuga: 1986, the Amazon Studios feature films Los Iniciados, parts 1 and 2, as well as the series Los Billis. Its production services include Paddington in Peru for StudioCanal, La Reina del Sur seasons 2 and 3 for Telemundo/Netflix, Jack Ryan season 2 for Paramount Television/Amazon Studios, and The Night Manager season 2 for InkFactory/Amazon Studios.

Name: National Talent Academies
Description:
The National Talent Academies are a Fís Éireann/Screen Ireland initiative to develop a highly skilled, diverse talent and crew base throughout the country.

The initiative includes;
National Talent Academy for Film and Television led by Ardán
National Talent Academy for Animation led by Animation Ireland
3  Regional Crew Academies managed by The Atlantic Academy, Film in Limerick and Clermont Enterprise Hub.

Name: Moonlighting Film Production Services
Description: Moonlighting was established in 1989 by founder Philip Key and is today recognised to be one of Southern Africa’s foremost production companies. The company comprises Moonlighting Films, Moonlighting Commercials, MoonSport, Grinder Films (tabletop production and studio) and is a partner in Casta Diva South Africa. Working from the Head Office in Cape Town, Moonlighting operates throughout Southern Africa with particular experience in Kenya, Tanzania, Namibia, Mozambique, Nigeria, Botswana, Zimbabwe and Ghana among others.

Name: New Orleans Film Society
Description:
The New Orleans Film Society (NOFS) is a 501(c)3 nonprofit organization committed to promote, nurture, and amplify the diverse voices of filmmakers and to facilitate conversations through film and film-related programming that inspire, educate, challenge and entertain our audiences.

NOFS produces the Oscar-qualifying New Orleans Film Festival annually and invests year-round in building a vibrant film culture in the South and connecting dynamic Southern filmmakers to career-advancing resources. Year-round programming includes free and low-cost screenings for members and the broader community of cinephiles in New Orleans, a 27-year running French Film Festival featuring contemporary and classic French cinema, and filmmaker professional development programs created to nurture diverse and emerging filmmakers and producers in the American South.

Name: ndF: neue deutsche Filmgesellschaft mbH
Description:
Bewegtbild ist unser Geschäft. Die ndF neue deutsche Filmgesellschaft produziert TV-Serien und Movies, Kinofilme und non-fiktionales Programm für den nationalen und internationalen Markt – und das seit über 75 Jahren.


Das Portfolio reicht von „Der Schwarm“, der Verfilmung des Weltbestsellers von Frank Schätzing, die im Frühjahr 2023 als 8-teilige Serie im ZDF zu sehen sein wird, über die französisch-belgisch-deutsche Koproduktion „Sophie Cross“ und deutsch-dänische Koproduktion „Dan Sommerdahl“ bis hin zu den national wie international sehr erfolgreichen Serien „Der Bergdoktor“, „Die Bergretter“ und „Der Alte“. Für den ARD-Vorabend produzieren wir seit 10 Jahren „Morden im Norden“ und unser Tochterunternehmen Securitel ist verantwortlich für das erfolgreiche  True-Crime-Format „Aktenzeichen XY… ungelöst“. Spezialisiert auf Dokumentationen ist die ndF Entertainment, die u.a. die vielbeachtete Doku „Wettlauf um den Impfstoff“ produzierte. Für die Entwicklung junger innovative Serienformate wurde in 2021 die Firma LAX  Entertainment gegründet. 


Mit unserem Netzwerk innerhalb der Gruppe können wir optimale Synergien aus fiktionaler und non-fiktionaler Kompetenz, ein Mix aus großartigen Köpfen + Kreativen und spannenden Themen bieten. 
Zur ndF-Gruppe gehören u.a. ebenfalls die Akzente Film und Fernsehproduktion, die ndF Berlin und die ndF Hamburg, die WunderWerk sowie die Neue Münchner Fernsehproduktion . Beteiligt sind wir zudem an der in Köln ansässigen Spin TV, die für DMAX das Erfolgsformat „Steel Buddies“ produziert.  


Hauptsitz der Unternehmensgruppe ist Unterföhring bei München. 


Aktuelle Stellenausschreibungen: (https://www.ndf.de/karriere/) 
Impressum: https://www.ndf.de/impressum/
Datenschutzerklärung: https://www.ndf.de/datenschutz/ 
ndF gegen Belästigung: https://www.ndf.de/ndf-gegen-belaestigung/

Name: AVisual
Description:
Avisual PRO es una empresa de Barcelona que ofrece sus servicios a profesionales del video y fotografía.

Servicios ofertados en Avisual PRO:

1. Alquiler de equipos audiovisuales. La propuesta de materiales en alquiler es completa y adaptada para cualquier tipo de producción. La empresa realiza inversiones periódicas para mantener un excelente nivel de calidad de sus equipos y oferta también el servicio gratis de entrega y recogida para varias poblaciones como Barcelona, Santa Coloma de Gramenet, Badalona, L'Hospitalet de Llobregat, Cornellà de Llobregat, Cerdanyola del Vallès, Sant Cugat del Vallès, Sant Joan Despí, El Masnou, etc.

2. Alquiler de estudio. Ubicado en el centro de Barcelona, el estudio es disponible para realización de fotografía profesional y grabación video. El estudio incluye una superficie disponible de 100m2, sala de reuniones, área de maquillaje, zona de relax - office, climatización, conexión internet Hi-Speed, kit de iluminación básico, baño con ducha.

3. Servicios audiovisuales. Avisual PRO ofrece también servicios profesionales de grabación y edición de video, creación de proyectos motion graphics y 3D, locución y doblaje, traducción de contenidos multimedia, arreglos de sonido, autoría, duplicación y packaging DVD.

Name: Telluride Film Festival
Description: Each Labor Day weekend, the tiny mountain village of Telluride, Colorado triples in size. Swells of passionate film enthusiasts flood the town for four days of total cinematic immersion, embarking on a viewing odyssey, blissfully spending entire days in flickering dark rooms. With only an appreciation of celluloid to guide them, these devotees flock to the show, year after year. Why? Blind faith. We don’t reveal the program until everyone lands in town. Yet the Telluride family trusts that a unique experience will unfold.

Name: Micromundo Producciones
Description: Micromundo is a film production company that we have created to make documentary films that allow us to deeply explore different realities, and learn stories that we could not access without the excuse of the camera. In each film we share long periods in the lives of our characters, which end up becoming part of our own history. We are a team passionate about sharing life with others. We believe that the limited environments and the intimate stories that we represent allow us to reflect our idiosyncrasies and society. From the portrait of microworlds we agree to represent a complex social environment. Through this approach we want the public to understand reality from other points of view, inviting dialogue and social reflection from an audiovisual work. Our mission is to continue understanding the world from the production of author documentaries in any of its formats, for film, television and online platforms. We have made productions with national and international impact financed by important funds such as ITVS, IDFA Bertha Fund, Sundance, Tribeca, World View, CNC Cinema du Mond, among others. Our work premiered in theaters in different territories and on networks and platforms such as POV, Netflix, YLE, Signal Colombia, EBS, Telefónica España, SRF, among others. In parallel to our productions, we carry out consultancies for documentary projects that we believe are necessary and are in accordance with our objectives. We have been in the market for 10 years now, and we have participated in 140 festivals and received 44 awards in outstanding competitions. We have obtained our achievements thanks to the talent of a team that has immersed itself with us in each microworld. Maite's has directed four feature films: The Lifeguard (2011), Tea Time (2015) and The Grown-Ups (2016). Currently, our film The Mole Agent (2020) is nominated for the Goya Awards 2021, and is the Chilean nominee to the Oscars 2021.

Name: Village Roadshow Pictures
Description:
Village Roadshow Pictures Group is a leading independent producer and financier of major Hollywood motion pictures, having produced and released 78 films since its establishment in 1997. VRPG has a successful joint partnership with Warner Bros. to co-produce a wide range of motion pictures including “The Great Gatsby,” “The Matrix” Trilogy, the “Sherlock Holmes” franchise, “I Am Legend,” the “Ocean’s” series, “Happy Feet,” “Mystic River,” “Charlie and the Chocolate Factory" and “Gran Torino.”

VRPG filmed entertainment is distributed in select territories around the world by affiliates in Australia, New Zealand, Singapore and Greece and in all other territories by Warner Bros.

Name: THANK YOU STUDIOS
Description:
Welcome to Thank You Studios.
We make films, build brands, and venture into the unknown.

Thank You Pictures:
We develop, finance, produce, and distribute premium content globally.

Thank You Creatives:
We craft strategies, build brands, and create experiences that inspire action.

Thank You Ventures:
We fuel ideas, create businesses, and collaborate with entrepreneurs.

Name: Andes Films
Description: Movie distribution company created in 1999, specialized in Theatrical rights, with offices in Chile, Peru and Bolivia. The company represents different major studios in each territory.

Name: MoviePass
Description: MoviePass is a technology-first movie theater subscription service that members with credits to purchase movie tickets at a fraction of the price.

Name: La Compañía de Montaje Cinematográfico
Description: La compañía proporciona diseño de soluciones editoriales adecuadas para cada obra audiovisual, consultoría y acompañamiento en el desarrollo editorial cinematográfico.

Name: NANLUX
Description:
Established in 1992, Guangdong NANGUANG Photo & Video Systems Co., Ltd. is an award-winning company specializing in designing and manufacturing top-tier products and solutions for the photography, filmmaking, and content creation industries.  NANGUANG's primary focus includes professional lighting solutions and equipment protection solutions, featuring brands like NANLUX, NANLITE, NANLINK, and GUTEK. With extensive expertise in design, R&D, and manufacturing, supported by advanced production facility, NANGUANG is committed to delivering products that consistently uphold the highest standards of quality and performance.

The evolution of 21st-century productions have inspired products and methods to provide convenience and time saved on set - simpler and faster setup, intelligentization for storing repeatable scene settings for later use.

NANLUX, as a professional lighting brand, through its parent company - NANGUANG listens to the needs from our active and creative customers to help push the envelope of what is possible. With our nearly 32 years of experience, we have the expertise to make professional clients' requests a reality through our product lines. The future is unknown, but Nanlux will be there on the cutting edge of what is possible!

Name: Self Employed
Description: Self Employed

Name: CHERNIN ENTERTAINMENT, LLC
Description: Chernin Entertainment is a cutting-edge premium Film and TV company based in Los Angeles, CA. The company is behind many successful films, with past credits including the Oscar-nominated films FORD V FERRARI, HIDDEN FIGURES, and THE GREATEST SHOWMAN, along with hits SPY, THE HEAT, and the PLANET OF THE APES franchise. The company also produced the Apple TV+ drama series TRUTH BE TOLD and SEE as well as the Fox hit comedy NEW GIRL. Chernin Entertainment has a first-look deal for feature films and television productions with Netflix, where they’ve produced the FEAR STREET Trilogy, SLUMBERLAND, LUTHER: THE FALLEN SUN, and the upcoming film BACK IN ACTION.

Name: OCINE
Description:
The film exhibition company OCINE is the fourth most important operator in Spain and the first with 100% national capital.

OCINE, with more than 5 million viewers per year and a pioneer in sensory attention to viewers, has positioned itself as one of the reference companies in the country.

Pioneers in the incorporation of new technologies, OCINE inaugurated the first DOLBY ATMOS cinema in Spain in 2011 and currently has 25 DOLBY ATMOS theatres in Spain and 3 in France, becoming the first film exhibition chain with the largest number of DOLBY ATMOS theatres in all of Spain.

The priority to increase the comfort and experience of the spectator places OCINE in the vanguard of the film industry, which today has the largest SCREENX cinema in the world.
    
Today, the third generation of a family business, born in 1943, continues to grow and expand. OCINE, in addition to its 31,000 seats and 209 screens distributed nationwide, is the only Spanish exhibition circuit that has more than 15 theatres in France under the Monciné banner. 

The constant search for technological innovation, the comfort of its theatres with VIP and reclining seats and unbeatable service are the hallmarks of the OCINE company, whose main objective is to achieve the best and most satisfactory cinematographic experience for the spectator.

Name: ARCADIA
Description:
ARCADIA es una Productora Cinematográfica y Proveedora de Servicios Financieros para la estructuración de fondos de Inversión privados e incentivos fiscales. Fue creada en el 2004 por Ibon Cormenzana con el objetivo de producir largometrajes de calidad con potencial internacional, apoyando el cine de autor e impulsando el talento de jóvenes promesas del cine. 

En sus más de 10 años de experiencia en el sector, ARCADIA ha alcanzado los siguientes hitos en sus dos actividades:

- 20 premios Goya y más de 30 nominaciones
- Reconocimiento en los principales Festivales Internacionales de Cine
- Pioneros en la estructuración de Fondos de Inversión Privada e Incentivos Fiscales.
- Gestión acumulada de un capital de más de 30 millones de euros.

Name: Na Laje Filmes
Description: Na Laje Filmes é um produtora brasileira de TV, internet, cinema e new media. Foi fundada em 2006. Na Laje trabalhou para Canal Brasil, Sesc TV, Enkapothado Produções, entre outros. No cinema, produziu três longas-metragens e nove curtas-metragens sendo dois selecionados no Festival de Gramado, Paulínia, Rio de Janeiro e Festivais Internacionais, Valladolid, na Espanha, Beverly Hills Film Festival. Também co-produziu o Festival Popular de Cinema.

Name: Stratword
Description: Stratword is a screenwriting application that makes it fun to write.

Name: EXIT Films
Description:
EXIT Films is an independent production company delivering the very best in storytelling across advertising, entertainment, music and the arts.

Founded in 1995 EXIT was born from the belief that creativity needn’t be compromised in the pursuit of commercial success. With an uncompromising ethos, his vision of creating an independent, inspiring and collaborative environment for artists, photographers and directors alike, endures more than 25 years on.

Today, EXIT is an internationally revered production company - renowned for its excellence in storytelling. Its stable of acclaimed directors displays unrivaled depth across all mediums and platforms. Discovering and fostering creative talent has always been at EXIT’s heart, culminating in the launch of many acclaimed director and cinematographer careers.

With offices in Sydney, Melbourne and Auckland, EXIT’s stable is well known and far-reaching. Through a fearlessly creative approach and adverse reaction to the mediocre, we continue to produce innovative, beautifully crafted and intelligent work with the same belief we started with.

Name: 808 Ltd.
Description:
We are a VFX studio based in Wellington, New Zealand, servicing clients both locally and from all over the world.

With compositing at our core and strong client relationships as a guiding principle, we work across feature films, long-form projects, episodic series, and commercials. Our services include keying, prep, plate augmentation, environment work, 2D and 3D FX, CG integration, enhancements, disaster fixes, and more.

Our CG capabilities are focused on supporting the shot rather than overpowering it. This includes look-development, lighting and rendering, CG set extensions, object replacements, simple simulations, and the seamless integration of CG elements into live-action plates. We work closely with clients to ensure CG is used thoughtfully and efficiently, always in service of story, realism, and schedule.

Since our beginning in 2021, we have collaborated on projects for A24, Netflix, MGM, BBC, ITV, and Disney. With a team that blends emerging talent and seasoned veterans, our collective experience continues to grow, bringing both fresh energy and deep production knowledge to every project.

Name: Snarky Elephant Productions
Description: We produce emotionally rich visual content that explores the under-represented human experience. Through scripted and unscripted content, we champion emerging creators whose identities inspire them to defy societal barriers to educate and shift established standards. Our intention is to change company cultures, the entertainment industry, and larger global sensitivities with darkly amusing, inventive stories that chronicle the complexities of human spirit.

Name: CHROMISTA
Description:
Founded by Darren Aronofsky and Scott Franklin, CHROMISTA is a creative content company focused on melding storytelling with brands to create evocative advertising. We offer solutions for all media platforms including commercial, social, experiential and beyond.

Representing:
Darren Aronofsky
Eddie Alcazar
Gavin Bellour
Marcelo Burgos

The Vortex

Name: W Films
Description: Social Media - Cine - Fotografía Análoga e Instantánea

Name: ONER Vfx
Description:
ONER VFX is a young and innovative boutique company from Buenos Aires, Argentina. specializes in the design and production of visual effects for cinema and television. From invisible to fantastic approaches this studio boutique offer a wide range of creative inputs and production solutions for directors either producers. 
Founded at the end of 2009, the studio inherited the experience of its partners, Rodrigo Tomasso (vfx supervisor) and Marcelo García (vfx producer)  who have previously created, trained and led teams working inside well known production houses achieving important results like the 2010 Academy Awarded Film "The Secret in their Eyes" as vfx heads. Previous that, they have not only participated in the most important films and television productions from Argentina but also for international productions as services providers for production houses as well as vfx studios from Los Ángeles, New York and Madrid. As head of vfx, they have worked for important clients as Disney Channel, Telecinco, ABC, HBO, TCM and the Hollywood industry itself.

ONER Vfx boutique especializada en diseño y producción de efectos visuales. El estudio ofrece servicios de postproduccion del tipo invisible o fantástica permitiendo expandir el potencial creativo de directores y aliviando las decisiones de los productores al economizar recursos y procesos de producción. El estudio heredó el background de sus socios quienes han sido cabezas de equipo de films como  “El Secreto de sus Ojos”.

Name: The StoryBoard Collective
Description:
Founded in 2020, The StoryBoard Collective is a philanthropic organisation based in Geneva with a mission to support media for good. We support documentary impact production and episodic storytelling.

StoryBoard supports engaged narratives through partnerships with cultural organisations, residencies, media experts and festivals to build capacity and provide funding. StoryBoard seeks to broaden, professionalize and hold space for the impact production industry and for episodic storytellers from underrepresented communities.

Through our initiatives, StoryBoard seeks to encourage an inclusive and resolutely independent storytelling community.

Purpose
We believe that authentic independent storytelling broadens minds, builds solidarity and engages the audience meaningfully.

Vision
We support independent, transformative stories to be written, screened and shared in order to shift behaviour and catalyze action.

Mission
We seek to amplify the power of stories by facilitating funding, collaboration and impactful outreach.

The StoryBoard House is located in Geneva, Switzerland, a historical hub for dialogue and multilateralism, with many international organizations (e.g. UN, agencies and NGOs). This live-work space has an ambition to build an ecosystem of storytellers, thinkers and cultural strategists from a wide range of backgrounds and geographies through transformative encounters.

Name: 7video Ltd
Description:
Based in Shropshire, we produce truly exceptional videos using film, animation, drone and timelapse. For more than a decade, we’ve helped customers develop engaging and persuasive content that produces outstanding results every time. We love what we do and, using the latest equipment and techniques, we will help you be part of the conversation and stand out from the crowd.

Winner of Best Small Business 2020-21

Name: EIGHTY4
Description:
EIGHTY4 is a creative studio & full service postproduction founded with a passion for establishing creative partnerships and collaborations with artists all over the world to create quality visuals for the advertising, cinema and music industries. 

As an artist-driven company we love the challenge of going beyond the limit of our imagination and we believe that the world is our oyster so we’ve got the technology and competencies to achieve anything we think of. 

Our facilities in the heart of Barcelona are equipped to provide a full range of services including conceptual design, look development, color grading, on-set supervision, 3D / CGI, matte painting, compositing & finishing. Thanks to that, and to our full capabilities of managing and controlling quality at each stage of the production process, our workflow allows us to provide our clients with the flexibility of working remotely ensuring that all their needs are met while their time is valued. 

EIGHTY4 is more than just an idea, a company or a brand. It’s an energy, a culture, a way of living. And above all it’s humanistic. We are a community with shared passions and values.

Name: Lamb Films
Description:
Lamb Films is an Independent Film Company from Belfast, Northern Ireland. Larry Cowan set up Lamb Films in 2007 to provide a platform for local talent and to create a community of filmmakers. 

After years of working in the Hospitality Industry pretending to be a manager, Larry left to pursue his filmmaking dreams by sweeping up rubbish on film sets. While gaining as much experience as he could in every department from Tim Robbins stand-in, to set security,  

In the Last 16 years Lamb Films have produced all types of films for all types of audiences, this ranges from feature film and documentaries to short films and cross-community film projects. Their films have played at over a hundred film festivals worldwide, won awards, and some are available online. 

Community Arts has always been at the core of Lamb Films with over 30 projects deliveed to community groups all over Ireland and The UK. 
If you would like to work with us please contact us at info@lambfilms.com 

Lamb Films, We are out standing in our field

Name: No Film School
Description: No Film School is the leading website “by filmmakers, for filmmakers.” We publish the latest news, tutorials, interviews, and videos to help our readers become better filmmakers — “no film school” required.

Name: Santa Transmedia
Description:
A small group of talents with different creative output working together in multidisciplinary projects - that's what we believe in. 

Santa is a modern production company with offices in São Paulo, Porto Alegre and New York. 
We are shaping the future of content production alongside cool agencies that believe new advertising is the mix of entertainment, data and branding.

Name: HDF KINO e.V.
Description:
Mit ca. 600 Mitgliedsunternehmen, die an ca. 800 Standorten über 3.000 Leinwände bespielen, ist der HDF KINO e.V. der größte Kinoverband Deutschlands.

Der 1950 in Wiesbaden gegründete HDF KINO e.V. vertritt dabei die Interessen seiner Mitglieder gegenüber Politik und Wirtschaft. Unser Ziel ist es, die Vielfalt und Qualität der deutschen Kinolandschaft zu stärken und Filmen eine optimale Auswertung auf der großen Leinwand zu ermöglichen. 

Unterstützt wird der HDF KINO e.V. dabei von der hdfstudio GmbH. 
Die 100 % Tochtergesellschaft des Verbandes bietet eine Auswahl von Service-Dienstleistungen und Produkten an, welche ausschließlich den HDF-Mitgliedern zur Verfügung stehen. Zudem zeichnet sie sich verantwortlich für Branchenkampagnen und organisiert Deutschlands größten Filmtheaterkongress sowie weitere brancheninterne Veranstaltungen.

Kontaktieren Sie uns – wir freuen uns auf neue Partnerschaften!

Name: Nordisk Film Shortcut
Description:
Nordisk Film Shortcut was founded in 1991 and is today one of the leading production facility houses in Scandinavia offering VFX, post and recently a LED 360 stage.. Our roots extend back to 1906 when our founder, Ole Olsen created Nordisk Film – which is today a modern technology and content focused media company.  

ShortCut is a world-class post production house that has all the technology and know-how to bring your footage to the cinema or a TV station – we bring stories to life!

Shortcut Copenhagen is located in a beautiful old building in the northern part of the city. Nordisk Film Shortcut also has office in Oslo

Name: Fondazione Sardegna Film Commission
Description: La Fondazione Sardegna Film Commission nasce con lo scopo di valorizzare il patrimonio artistico e ambientale della Sardegna, sviluppando la filiera audiovisiva con l’alta specializzazione delle risorse professionali e tecniche, creando le condizioni ottimali per attrarre progetti cinematografici e audiovisivi internazionali, promuovendo l’isola nel mondo.

Name: Mountain River Films
Description:
Mountain River Films is where South Asia meets global cinema. With offices in Mumbai, Kathmandu, Singapore, and China, we champion original storytelling , feature films, documentaries, micro content and branded content with confidence and craft.

What sets us apart:

- End-to-End Services: from script development and production to crew logistics, subtitling, festival campaigns, and distribution.

- Licensing of global content

- Award-Winning Films: including regional indie hits like Taandro and Where Have All The Smiles Gonet.

- Major Platform Partnerships: including Prime Video, Channel 4, Thanthi TV, Disney, Jio, and Kuku TV.

- Massive Digital Reach: Our films and shows have garnered over 200 million views across platforms.

Our mission is simple: to produce and distribute authentic, thought-provoking cinema from South Asia and connect it to audiences around the world.

Name: Singapore International Film Festival
Description:
Founded in 1987, SGIFF is the largest and longest-running film event in Singapore. It has become an iconic event in the local arts calendar that is widely attended by international film critics, and known for its dynamic programming and focus on groundbreaking Asian cinema for Singapore and the region. 

Committed to nurturing and championing local and regional talent, its competition component, the Silver Screen Awards, brings together emerging filmmakers from Asia and Southeast Asia while paying tribute to acclaimed cinema legends. 

With its mentorship programmes, masterclasses and dialogues with attending filmmakers, the Festival also serves as a catalyst for igniting public interest, artistic dialogue, and cultural exchanges in the art of filmmaking.

The SGIFF is organised by the Singapore International Film Festival Ltd, a non-profit organisation with Institution of Public Character (IPC) status. 

For more information, please visit www.sgiff.com.

Name: CannaCribs
Description:
Canna Cribs brings viewers on a VIP tour of the most advanced cannabis operations in the world. From genetics to vegetation to flower to packaging and everything in between, we document the equipment, growing techniques, SOPs, and entire seed-to-sale process that the greatest cultivators in the world use to deliver the finest cannabis products to the market.

Want to have our team help consult on your new or existing cannabis cultivation operation? Reach out to our CannaCribs Horticulture Consulting team: https://cannacribs.org/marijuana-cultivation-consulting/

Consumers and hobbyists watch to see how cannabis products are created. 

Cultivators and dispensary owners watch to learn about the techniques, products, and services being used by the most advanced cultivators in the world.

Venture Capitalists watch to learn about investment opportunities. 

The world of Cannabis is evolving before our eyes. We are the show that’s documenting history.

Name: MOVIE PEOPLE  s.p.a
Description: For over 40 years Movie People has been the point of reference for the rental of cameras, lights and knobs for film, advertising and television productions in Italy and abroad. Constantly searching for the most innovative solutions, we offer the utmost operational competence and an impeccable fleet of machines at the service of all productions.

Name: Congo Films School
Description:
Congo Films School es una escuela para la formación en las artes y los oficios del cine, con programas de educación informal a través de talleres prácticos en guión, dirección, dirección de arte, producción, dirección de fotografía, sonido y post-producción. 

Nuestro objetivo es desarrollar y fortalecer las habilidades de los estudiantes en la industria audiovisual. 

Este propósito se lleva a cabo con el respaldo de Congo Films, casa de renta de equipos de cine y televisión, creada en 1983 y líder en la industria audiovisual en América Latina.

Name: ARC
Description: ARC is a storytelling company working across editorial, VFX, production supervision, post and development partnerships. We serve as a creative and collaborative hub that allows filmmakers to find their best work.

Name: Gneiss Stuff VFX
Description:
WE ARE GNEISS STUFF. A BOUTIQUE VFX STUDIO OFFERING STUNNING VISUALS + WORLD CLASS EXPERIENCE.

WE OFFER:
*VFX
*On-site Supervision
*Look Development
*Animation
*Production Services
*Colour Grading
*New Media

AT GNEISS STUFF WE STRIVE TO BRING WORLD CLASS EXPERIENCE TO ANY PROJECT; LARGE OR SMALL. WE ARE A GLOBAL COHESIVE FULL SERVICE TEAM UNDER ONE "ROOF", BRINGING A CONSISTENT APPROACH AND STAND BY THE QUALITY OF OUR WORK. EXPERIENCED, PROFESSIONAL, CONSISTENT.

WORKING IN PARTNERSHIP WITH SOME OF THE MOST WELL KNOWN AND REPUTABLE NETWORKS, PRODUCTION COMPANIES AND CREATIVE STUDIOS; OUR WORK INCLUDES FILM, EPISODIC TELEVISION, COMMERCIALS, MUSIC VIDEOS, VIRTUAL EVENTS AND MORE.

Name: Toulouse Team Bureau des tournages
Description:
Bienvenue sur la page de Toulouse Team Filming, le Bureau des Tournages de Toulouse Métropole ! 
Nous sommes au service des productions souhaitant poser leurs caméras à Toulouse, quel que soit leur projet : clip, fiction, documentaire, publicité...

Avant votre tournage :
Pré-repérages et repérages de décors
Identification de professionnels locaux (sociétés de  co-production,  studios, supports techniques)
Aide à la recherche d’intermittents

Pendant votre tournage :
Gestion des autorisations de tournage
Gestions des autorisations de stationnement, de circulation, d’éclairage, de mobilier urbain 
Mise à disposition d’une personne du bureau pour suivi

Après votre tournage : 
Communication à la presse locale et nationale
Communication sur tous nos outils marketing (FB, YouTube)

Name: 1st Stage Studio
Description: A pre-lit 23x21 cyc stage with lighting grid and 10 foot overhead door for easy access. A green room for hair, makeup and wardrobe. The stage comes with many amenities like tables & chairs, 8 Shop Bags, 2 sets of Apple Boxes, fully lit stage, 2 Arri LED Visionsmith spot back lights, WiFi, Bluetooth sound system, work bench with tools, rolling ladder for grid access, bathroom, kitchen with table & TV. A GREAT value for just $675 per 8-hour day. We also have equipment rentals from cameras and lighting to Audio and Grip gear, dollies and jib. Just 35 miles northwest of Chicago at half the cost. Audio voice booth on-site for recording if needed. Go to www.1ststagestudio.com for a complete list of equipment rentals.

Name: Deep Filmes
Description: Estúdio e produtora premiada, produzindo imagens e vídeos com profundo envolvimento no craft da sua ideia.

Name: Anthill Studios
Description: Anthill Studios is a state-of-the-art multimedia facility in Lagos Nigeria. Serving both local and international clients, We offer the finest services in visual media production, animations, content production and post-production.

Name: DRONE REVEAL
Description:
LEADER OF AERIAL IMAGERY & DRONES INSPECTIONS

Name: Somerville Media

Creative. Reliable. Global.

With over 15 years of experience, we’ve produced work for sectors including tech, finance, hospitality, healthcare, and government. From interviews and testimonials to event highlights, brand campaigns, and motion graphics—we deliver end-to-end production from concept to final cut.

Based in Singapore.  Working globally.

Name: Plano Secuencia Atrezzo y Escenografía

Nuestro atrezzo abarca el perido Prehistórico, las Edades Clásicas, la Edad Media, el Siglo XV, XVI, XVII, XVIII, XIX, XX y XXI, y ha protagonizado infinidad de películas y series nacionales e internacionales durante los últimos 40 años. Ven a nuestra sede y encuentra lo que necesita tu rodaje!

- Plano Secuencia Props & Scenography is a company specialised in Cinema and TV props hire for set decoration and art direction, also for for theatre, advertising and events. From our head office at Alcalá de Henares, Madrid, Spain, and our large experience within cinema and tv set decoration, we offer all kind of periods rental of props to decorate audiovisual productions sets, from furniture, weapons, tents and camps, paintings... to glassware, ceramics, lighting, cars, specific elements...

Our props belong to Prehistoric Age, Classic Ages, Middle Age, 15th, 16th, 17th, 18th, 19th, 20th and 21st century, and starred plenty of national and international movies and series during last 40 years. Come to our head office and find what your filming needs!

Name: Point Prod
Description:
Point Prod est une société de production qui fournit des contenus et des services audiovisuels aux principaux diffuseurs européens.

Name: EFD Digital
Description:
EFD Digital is a post-production studio with the highest technology. It is part of the EFD Group and its line of businesses integrated to provide the industry with the option of a “one stop” or on-demand service, with a vision of the future.
This Studio, equipped with state-of-the-art technology, has 20 editing rooms, three 4K HDR color rooms, two 7.1.4 A audio rooms, 20 VXF stations, centralized 3PB Quantum storage, offers a specialized image post-production service and sound for various formats, platforms and netwoks, advertising and cinema.

Name: Plug-in Studios
Description:
With over 150 hours of programming dubbed monthly, Plug-in stands as a leader in the global dubbing industry. Our expertise spans across a wide range of content, including telenovelas, soaps, feature films, animations, interactive games, TV shows, documentaries, social media, and training videos, with a specialization in French and Moroccan Arabic dubbing.

Founded in 2006, Plug-in revolutionized the industry by bringing French dubbing to Morocco, significantly cutting production costs. We offer services at prices up to 40% lower than those in France and Belgium, without compromising on quality. Our team consists of top-notch French voice actors and sound engineers, ensuring exceptional quality in every project.

Our state-of-the-art facility boasts 40 advanced dubbing stations, enabling us to handle high volumes with impressive efficiency and quick turnaround times.

We're honored to count prestigious names like NBC Universal, All3 Media, France Television, Canal+, Lagardère Group, M6, Telemundo, Televisa, 4K Media, and 2M among our clients, reflecting our commitment to excellence and global appeal.
----- 
Fondés en 2006, les studios Plug-in se sont imposés comme une référence dans l'offre de services de doublage et d'habillage sonore. Nous répondons aux besoins des productions exigeant une qualité sonore de premier plan, tout en proposant des tarifs très compétitifs. Notre casting international de comédiens maîtrisant le français et l'arabe vous promet une immersion sonore qui répondra à toutes vos attentes, en adéquation avec vos projets et vos budgets.

Chez Plug-in, l'innovation est au cœur de notre démarche. Nous utilisons les technologies de pointe de Digidesign pour garantir une qualité sonore inégalée. Nos services sont diversifiés : doublage, localisation, sound design, bruitage, ainsi que la création et signature musicale. Quelles que soient vos exigences, Plug-In vous offre une solution sur mesure.

Name: PhotoCineRent
Description:

Avec un parc locatif très haut de gamme tels que Zeiss, Arri, Denz, Sachtler... notre vocation est de proposer les meilleurs  produits du secteur et d’accompagner au mieux nos clients lors de leurs projets professionnels : tournages cinéma, publicités,  clips, courts métrages. Nous comptons également dans notre catalogue les poids lourds du marché : Canon, Sony, Blackmagic  Design, Freefly Systems...

Name: Marte VFX
Description:
Martians? Yes, but our feet are firmly planted on earth.
It has been a long time since we landed on this planet, with the intention to stay. We knew what we had to do and how to do it.
At first we spread out to go unnoticed, each of us embarking on our own path, but always staying in touch. We worked hard, settled in and managed to carve out a space in this world’s unforgiving jungle.

We did it . We had been accepted by our planetary neighbours. Now we just had to come full circle and complete our mission: Regroup to become stronger and be able to offer our martian-earthling knowledge, our work ethic, our momentum and most of all our enthusiasm, to all of those who want to enjoy an alien experience.

That´s why we founded Martevfx.

Marte VFX –    Post-production from another planet.

Name: 4th CREATIVE PARTY
Description:
4th Creative Party is a Korean VFX Studio, Animation and New Media Content company. 

We are credited for having the best technology in Korean market by creating CGI, VFX in more than 170 feature films such as <Okja>, <The Merciless>, <The Handmaiden>, <The Tiger>, <Snowpiercer>, <Stoker>, <Thirst>, <The Host>, and <Oldboy>.

We not only have created visual effects for the most successful Korean films, but also we are the creative partner for top-notch Korean directors including Park Chan-wook, Bong Joon-ho, and Choi Dong-hoon.
Our work is critically acclaimed by many renowned international film festivals. Alongside with the recognition, we are also actively broadening our international business territory by participating in international films including the U.S.A, Europe, and China.

In addition to our award-winning visual effects work, we have rich experience as an animation studio. We co-produced TV series animation <ROBOT TRAINS> with CJ Entertainment, and we also produced CG for Japanese 3D Animation <Space Pirate Captain Harlock>(TOEI Animation) by Director Shinji Aramaki. We are currently working on our animation feature film and TV series.

Our innovative New media content production is also the key creative force. We recently produced the first Korean Flying Theater Attraction Film in Lotteworld Adventure. The attraction is similar to the Disney Soarin’ attraction which is a media-based attraction.

Name: Wanted Cinema
Description:
Nata nel 2014, la casa di distribuzione milanese Just Wanted (aka Wanted Cinema) riesce nel giro di pochi anni a diventare un punto di riferimento nel mercato cinematografico italiano, proponendosi con una linea editoriale molto chiara: un cinema di ricerca e "ricercato"; per un pubblico che si aspetta non soltanto divertimento, ma anche pensiero, stimolo, dibattito, sorpresa, approfondimento. Tra gli oltre 130 titoli distribuiti sono presenti film e documentari, vincitori dei principali festival nazionali e internazionali, premiati dal pubblico, dalla critica e con ottimi riscontri anche al Box Office. Tra questi i candidati all' Oscar Alla mia piccola Sama, Estate 1993, Corpus Christi, RBG, e il premio Oscar come miglior film d’animazione Parvana, prodotto da Angelina Jolie.  Wanted Cinema vanta all’interno del suo catalogo anche alcuni tra gli autori più acclamati e premiati come Werner Herzog (Nomad-In cammino con Bruce Chatwin), Raoul Peck (I am not your negro, Il giovane Karl Marx), Ladj Ly (A voce alta), Chloe Zhao (The Rider). Questi ultimi due grandi autori sono stati portati in Italia per la prima volta proprio da Wanted. 

Nell’aprile 2020 Wanted inaugura la piattaforma digitale “Wanted Zone” per cercare un’alternativa alla chiusura delle sale cinematografiche dovuta alla pandemia. La piattaforma è andata incontro a varie trasformazioni nel corso dei mesi finché è riuscita a imporsi come valida alternativa alle tante piattaforme di cinema di qualità sorte nello stesso periodo. Su Wanted Zone sono visibili tanti dei film di catalogo ma anche nuove proposte ed eventi organizzati in live streaming con ospiti speciali e i cast dei film.

Name: SEDIF
Description:
SEDIF is one of the major dubbing and post-production companies in Italy and one of the few to vaunt a 40-year long track record. It was founded in 1974 by Renato Turi, one of the most representative figures of the Italian dubbing. It has consistently been a leading company in the market thanks to having relied on the most prestigious dubbing actors in the Country. In all these years, SEDIF has dubbed over 45,000 hours of successful TV and cinematographic products, assuring artistic, organizational and technical quality.  
Today SEDIF collaborates with the largest TV and film-making groups, whom we consider not merely clients but partners. We assure them all a high-quality organization and timely responsiveness throughout all the production phases.

SEDIF - Società Edizioni Italiane Film - è una tra le principali società di doppiaggio italiane.
È stata fondata nel 1974 da celebri attori e doppiatori quali Renato Turi, Carlo Giuffrè, Oreste Lionello, Mario Maldesi. È specializzata nel settore audio-video e multimediale con una vasta gamma di servizi che vantano creatività e affidabilità. Oltre 40 anni di esperienza nel cinema e nella televisione ne fanno una Società Leader nel doppiaggio di film, sceneggiati, serie televisive, documentari, cartoni animati.
Sedif abbina qualità e professionalità in tutte le prestazioni offerte a costi vantaggiosi e assolutamente competitivi ed è una realtà che grazie alla capitalizzazione del know how acquisito, rappresenta il punto di riferimento del doppiaggio italiano da oltre 40 anni.

Description:
This is where companies are supposed to talk about their history, their mission statement, their desire to make a difference… that’s not us. We just want to make really cool gear for people who get excited about creating content. Breaking down walls and doing tech disruption by creating system integration for powerful mobile platform delivery is definitely not who we are. We make microphones; damn-good microphones.

As for our company history, our shotgun microphone has been around for a while but under a different name. We felt it was time to spread our wings, get out from under our parent company and get a place we can call our own. A place where we can do more development and expand our microphone offerings. Deity Microphones is that place and we are excited to share our gear with the world.

Name: The Alpes-Maritimes Côte d’Azur Film Commission
