President of the association : David LISNARD, Mayor of Cannes
Vice-President of the association : Jean-Pierre SAVARINO, President of the Chamber of Commerce Nice Côte d’Azur
Treasurer of the association : Thérèse DARTOIS, deputy mayor of Villeneuve-Loubet

Discover the 28 members

Name: New Horizons Association
Description:
From a small-scale festival in Sanok to one of the most important film events in Poland and Europe – this is the journey of the New Horizons International Film Festival, which initiated the development of the New Horizon Association.
Today, NHA is much more than just a festival. One of our greatest successes is placing valuable artistic cinema on the map of Polish culture; bringing it out of its niche and making it a popular topic. This is evidenced by the number of viewers participating in our festivals or watching films at the New Horizons Cinema, in Wrocław run by NHA.
We truly believe that cinematography has the power to change the world. Our greatest success is building a community of cinema aficionados who constantly surprise us with their commitment, knowledge, and openness to explore new forms of film art. At NHA, we prove that cinephilia takes on different forms and faces. For us, cinema is a universal language of dialogue – between different generations, worldviews and cultures.
We start the dialogue as early as possible – with educational activities for the youngest, then we continue the conversation during festivals (New Horizons or American Film Festival), and invite people to stay with us permanently (by joining the community of viewers at the New Horizons Cinema and by watching films distributed by us).
We create an alternative cultural and cinematic offer – in relation to what multiplexes propose.
The NH IFF, organized since 2001, is a festival of cinema visionaries. As part of the Young Horizons Festival (first edition in 2014), we present films for young viewers which aren't created by large studios according to carefully calculated business plans. The AFF has been proving for a decade that US cinema is much more interesting than what mainstream Hollywood suggests. In turn, at the New Horizons Cinema (since 2012), we create a space for numerous discussions and meetings – not only with filmmakers; we are also open to dialogue with our audience.

Name: DEPO
Description:

We are based in Istanbul, one of the most attractive places for international productions. We provide a world class production infrastructure and logistic support in a friendly and professional environment. With our highly experienced foreign and local directors and crew, we are committed to provide excellence in film production support for domestic and international productions.

Some of them are famous Formula 1 driver Heiki Kovalainen, Karolina Kurkova, the worldwide known goalkeepers Stipe Pletikosa and Lee Won Jae, and also Adriana Lima and Penelope Cruz. Name: MindsEye
Description:
MindsEye is an award-winning multi-discipline production company based in London, with creative and production excellence at our heart. We produce commercials, music videos and short films, and have a fast-growing Film & TV development arm. We are dedicated to high-end visual storytelling, creating unique, entertaining and beautifully-crafted films for many of the world’s largest brands. Our advertising work for the likes of Google, Facebook, Sky, McDonald’s and Audi has been recognised at the British Arrows, Cannes Lions and D&AD. In 2023 we received Gold and Silver British arrows for our work.

We take pride in being the best possible home for comedy and performance directing talent and for being synonymous with original, surprising, unique and beautifully crafted films.

What started as two brothers, Hughie and Charlie Phillips, and surrogate brother Max Yeoman, huddled around a desk, has grown into a full production team of like-minded and creative individuals, and a roster of directors who are experts in cinematic visual storytelling. We are boutique, but heavyweight, with a true passion for filmmaking.

Name: Heartland Film
Description:
Heartland Film is a nonprofit arts organization that runs the 11-day Heartland International Film Festival in October, the Academy Award-Qualifying Indy Shorts International Film Festival in July, the Truly Moving Picture Award and other year-round programs. 

Based in Indianapolis, Indiana, Heartland Film was founded in 1991 with the mission to curate, promote and celebrate thoughtful and engaging films. The films we select and exhibit – whether they inspire conversation, ignite imagination, or shift perspectives – all have one thing in common: they are entertaining films that do more than just entertain.

Over the years, we have presented $3.5 million in cash prizes – the largest total amount awarded by any film festival in North America – presented 200+ studio films with the Truly Moving Picture Award, and showcased more than 2,000 films, including nine Oscar-winning short films. 

Heartland Film is the preeminent destination for connecting audiences and filmmakers to experience transformative film.

Name: Double Dice Group
Description:
Double Dice Films is a creative content studio, based in London, with shoot capabilities up and down the country and across the globe. We offer fast, affordable, high-quality films - whatever your budget.

At Double Dice we work with agencies and directly with brands. At the core of the company is a team of experienced, savvy producers working alongside talented and versatile creative directors. This means we are able to cover all aspects of a production, from creative to final delivery and everything in between.
Whether you have £5k or £500k we'll find a creative solution for you. Our mantra is simple - ‘quality, whatever the budget’.

Name: Black Sheep Film Productions
Description:
Black Sheep was founded in 2010 by Saar Yogev and Naomi Levari out of their love for the art of filmmaking after years of proven experience in the film & TV industry. Black Sheep specializes in character driven feature films, creative documentaries and drama series; productions that direct a spotlight to the unseen corners of society.  Black Sheep stands for close, personal and efficient collaborations with local and international filmmakers and partners in its tailor-made projects.
The Company's works gained the love of both spectators and critics while premiering in Cannes (ONE WEEK AND A DAY), Venice IFF (STRIPPED), TIFF (FIG TREE) Berlinale (CHAINED), Series Mania (MAMA'S ANGEL) and more, winning numerous awards and distributed world-wide.

With a strong belief in reciprocity, the company has formed strong relationships with its international partners
Black Sheep personally approaches each endeavor and its makers based on the belief that each project has a unique life course and specific needs.
With its handpicked projects, the company forges working relationships from the earliest stages of development. 
The importance of this close personal connection with and between the filmmakers is paramount. 
The wide range of content and logistical experience enables the company to find the best pathway to the heart of each project, resulting in excellence on the screen.
Most importantly, Black Sheep believes that the journey should be joyful.

Name: Architecture Film Festival Rotterdam
Description:
The Architecture Film Festival Rotterdam (AFFR) was founded in 2000 as a biennial event dedicated to cities and architecture. In 2017, it transitioned into an annual festival. Over the years, it has evolved into the world's largest festival of its kind, featuring around 100 documentaries and events that delve into various aspects of architecture, landscape, urbanism, and city life. The festival is not just about films; it also includes engaging debates, informative lectures, and exciting excursions.

Our five-day festival consistently draws an increasingly international audience of nearly 10,000 people. Attendees range from architects, planners, designers, filmmakers, and developers to ardent film enthusiasts and a general audience with a keen interest in these subjects.

Name: CinemaLive
Description: CinemaLive si pone l'obiettivo di accelerare la crescita competitiva delle competenze nonché lo sviluppo della consapevolezza e della gestione dei processi imprenditoriali nel settore Cine-Audiovisivo attraverso quattro linee strategiche: Informazione, Formazione, Business Meeting e Networking.

Name: Arts & Sciences
Description:
Our name comes from the organization founded by John Hancock, John Adams, and John Bowdoin in Boston in 1780. The Academy of Arts and Sciences charter statement boasts that the "design of the institution is...to cultivate every art and science which may tend to advance the interest, honour, dignity, and happiness of a free, independent, and virtuous people." The charter was written by men in wigs who ate mutton for lunch. It is more than noble and every bit unachievable.

We do not wear wigs, we do not eat mutton, but we do aim to take up wild, difficult, culturally relevant tasks with their same unmasked enthusiasm.

May we be positive, humble, forthright, and big-hearted in these pursuits.

Name: Climb Films
Description:
Climb Films (a division of Climb Media (India) Pvt. Ltd.) is one of India's leading award-winning Feature and Ad film-production companies. An unprecedented 22 President's National awards & 28 International awards for its feature films, 600+ ad films, 20+ short and a multitude of animation films stand a testimony of our commitment to defining storytelling.

Team CLIMB's founder director - KIREET KHURANA has is the Director and Screenplay Writer for the acclaimed feature film 'T FOR TAJ MAHAL' (2018, imdb rating 8.8, 7 international awards, 25 official selections). Climb has also created and directed India's 1st live-action & 3D animation feature film 'TOONPUR KA SUPERRHERO"', starring AJAY DEVGN and KAJOL (Dec 2010) and garnered great critic and audience praise. Our acclaimed documentaries 'THE INVISIBLE VISIBLE' (3 International awards, based on the 70mn. homeless in India) and  'SAEED MIRZA - The Leftist Sufi' (among top Indian documentaries on NETFLIX) have established us further as a genre, medium and format agnostic film production house.

CLIMB's ad film Director's panel includes highly accomplished Cannes and D&AD award-winning directors from Ogilvy and other agencies. We have produced and executed more than 600 ad films for leading agencies like Lowe, Contract, Grey Worldwide, McCann, M&C SAATCHI, Sideways Consulting, Tilt Brand Solutions, JWT (VML) and others.

We have also produced National award-winning PSAs for UNICEF, NATIONAL FILM BOARD of CANADA, JOHN HOPKINS, SAVE THE CHILDREN INDIA, USAID, CHILDLINE & others.

We are also the pioneers of Indian Animation. Our animation division CLIMB STUDIOS is currently working on an international animation series for a leading Production house and film for Qatar Film Fund. For more visit www.climbstudios.co and/or visit CLIMB STUDIOS page on Linkedin.

Name: Wallonie Bruxelles Images
Digital Film Technology
Description:
DFT has been at the forefront of film scanning technology for decades, providing solutions for film archives, restoration markets and post production facilities with a range of high quality, leading edge products and services. Our film scanners are recognized worldwide as reference products and have been involved in countless projects.

Products such as the Scanity HDR, Spirit 4K or the Spirit DataCine have revolutionized the film industry from the ground up several times. These products have always ensured that workflows could deliver higher quality or processes became significantly more efficient. 

DFT is headquartered in Darmstadt, Germany. Further offices and/or service locations are located in Los Angeles and London.

Name: 100 Day Film
Description:
Filmmaker, business owner and educator Tom Young has set himself the challenge of making a feature film within 100 days, from 15th August to 23rd November 2023. Day one begins with a script and on day 100 the film will premiere worldwide on YouTube for free - subscribe for regular update and to see the film www.youtube.com/@100DayFilm

The entire creative process will be filmed from development to working with actors, planning the film shoot, production design, cinematography, sound and editing. All production documentation will be available for free  including the pitch deck, plot points, script, schedule, call sheets, and more at www.100dayfilm.com

Name: InScience Film Festival
Description: InScience is a unique film festival in The Netherlands that focuses on science film and shows science via film to a broad audience. The competition program consists of the best films of the festival. The films compete for the NTR Audience Award. InScience offers a broad program, with talks, film debates, Q&A’s, meetings, and expositions on the cutting edge of science and art. During InScience, International Science FIlm Festival Nijmegen, is changed into a meeting place for exchanging new insights.

Name: Sudu Connexion
Description:
Société de distribution de films d'Afrique et de la diaspora.
Créée en 2016 par la journaliste et critique de cinéma Claire Diao, Sudu Connexion promeut les cinémas d'Afrique à l'international : inscription des films en festivals panafricains, ventes TV, projections en salles de cinéma. 
La société distribue également le programme itinérant de courts-métrages Quartiers Lointains, fondé en 2013, qui circule chaque année entre la France, les Etats-Unis et plusieurs pays d'Afrique. 
La société édite et publie trois fois par an la revue panafricaine de cinéma AWOTELE. 
La société propose également un service de relations presse (Sudu PR) aux clients souhaitant démarcher des médias et ou professionnels du cinéma d'Afrique et sa diaspora.

Name: FARSA Producciones
Description:
FARSA Producciones es una productora argentina que desarrolla sus actividades en todos los campos de la realización audiovisual, destacándose en el área cinematográfica y televisiva. 

Fue fundada en 1990 y a lo largo de los años ha logrado un estilo diferente y arriesgado.  Veinte años de trabajo ubican a Farsa Producciones como una de las productoras argentinas más consolidadas en el medio audiovisual. 
Cuenta con la colaboración de un grupo de artistas altamente experimentados y ha producido más de cien cortometrajes, tres medios, siete largos y mas de sesenta videoclips para artistas y bandas de todo tipo

En 2009, Luego de cuatro largometrajes, el equipo creativo de Farsa Producciones estuvo detrás de las cámaras, el guión y el arte de  “100% LUCHA: EL AMO DE LOS CLONES”, su primera película infantil, que fue estrenada comercialmente en todo el país. 
Ese mismo año, estrenó el film “KAPANGA TODOTERRENO”, primera película de ficción de una banda de rock argentina, y su tercer largo del año “NUNCA MÁS ASISTAS A ESTE TIPO DE FIESTAS”. 

A su vez, se encuentra en post producción su próximo largometraje “REVOLUCIÓN TÓXICA”, última entrega de la trilogía “PLAGA ZOMBIE”.  

Farsa Producciones se diferencia de otras productoras, porque posee un solo equipo a la vez creativo y de producción. De esta forma abarca desde la idea hasta la realización integral del producto. 
Asimismo, el mismo equipo que realizó el largometraje “PLAGA ZOMBIE” en 1997, considerado el puntapié inicial para el actual movimiento cinematográfico independiente de género fantástico en el país, continúa trabajando para contar historias diferentes a las que el público argentino está acostumbrado a ver.   

La pasión que mantiene unidos a los miembros de Farsa Producciones desde que eran niños, es hoy su profesión. Esa inusual cualidad es el valor agregado con el que logran llevar a cabo productos originales, diferentes y altamente competitivos.

Our original & commissioned works have been recognized and screened worldwide by the Sundance Film Festival, Tribeca Festival, Annecy Int’l Film Festival, The Webby’s, DOCNYC, and The Addy’s, among others.

Name: The Rebel Fleet
Description:
The Rebel Fleet makes every unit a main unit.

The Rebel Fleet’s digital workflows offer top film production companies total image control across multiple shooting units, faster turnarounds and more creative scope.

With color matching across devices and accurate metadata, The Rebel Fleet offers features to on-location teams that they’d struggle to access, even in studio.
 
2018 Shark Thriller, The Meg [Warner Brothers Pictures and Gravity Pictures], relied on The Rebel Fleet to link their studio with the second unit on location at sea. They simultaneously shot – and matched – shots for the same scene. The second unit shot below-water angles, while the studio shot from above the water. Both Directors could view the other unit’s shots, ensuring the action matched perfectly.
 
“Cinematography begins in the imagination and is translated through the ‘eye’ of the camera. The Rebel Fleets precision and commitment enabled me to consistently achieve my vision with confidence.” says Jess Hall, Director of Photography for Ghost in the Shell.
 
It takes just 90 seconds to beam in footage from anywhere in the world, locked down under the Trusted Partner Network (MPAA & CDSA) – approved security.
 
This means Producers, Directors and Directors of Photography (DOP) can see what’s happening on location without leaving the lot. This time saving comes with unprecedented oversight, ensuring Director, Producer and stakeholders know they have the quality shots they needed.
 
“They’re revolutionizing workflow,” says Brad Turner, Exec Producer and Director of The Shannara Chronicles.
 
The system’s flexibility means it can be fully customized to suit a specific shoot. Minimising technological impact, maximising creative freedom. For example, The Rebel Fleet recently deployed an on-location dailies suite, enabling the DOP to color grade the day’s footage before beaming it back to LA for editing.

With The Rebel Fleet you’re across every shot, every location, everywhere in the world.

Description:

Few jolly good folks from various walks of life. Few longtime advertising, films, design and marketing men who now professes film making for the people…of the people…by us. We love this art of communication. We enjoy this process of creation. And that’s how we make our livings too! 

Our point...

That communication is a great craft, that most of the communication is common sense and that our problems arise when we sometimes don't use it.

What's covered: We’re convinced, our clients have too much on their hands to balance. We have sense of that. We are there to help to rescue. 

Fill us with briefs/scripts/information, shut us with deadlines and forget. We’ll deliver with a smile. 

Our Joy, our belief...

Our interests center on creating, editing and producing works that leave our clients with brightened faces. Being tricked and trained enough to face the challenges of communications, our belief is that common sense still rules the day.

Are we know-all? Certainly not…we are learning and will continue to do so for rest of our lives, that give us the all needed edge of innovation, identity and vision. That’s what we are…

Hope you’ll find something here worthwhile.

Name: Celtic Media Centre
Description:
With nearly 150,000 square feet of design-built stage space, almost 100,000 square feet of gated office space, and an additional 50,000 square feet of covered support space, Celtic Studios and Celtic Media Centre have the size and services to meet the demands of most any production. Located on 40 acres in the heart of Baton Rouge, Celtic is Louisiana's flagship studio.

Celtic Studios and Celtic Media Centre are part of the Celtic Group, a Baton Rouge-based company whose origins date back to 1985, when Irish native Brendan O’Connor founded Celtic Marine Corporation. After 25 years in transportation logistics, O’Connor saw the need for a real Louisiana motion picture studio facility in Louisiana, and in 2006 purchased the first piece of property that would become the Celtic Media Centre.

Since its inception, Celtic has hosted some of the largest feature film and television productions to shoot in Louisiana, including Battle: Los Angeles, Battleship, Oblivion, Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Parts 1 and 2, Breakout Kings, Scream, Underground and The Fantastic Four.  Currently the permanent home to more than two dozen companies working with the entertainment industry, Celtic continues to set the stage for long-term growth and successful production in a highly-creative, secure environment.

Name: Theus Productions
Description: Theus Productions is an audiovisual production company based in Geneva and Paris. Our multi-skilled teams work with professionalism and passion to create innovative projects. The value also lies in our sense of relationship and in our remarkable enthusiasm.

Name: NEXUS TV S.R.L.
Description: We are a company with many talents: dubbing, audio and video post production, music supervision, soundtracks production.

Name: Revista Exibidor
Description: A Revista Exibidor é uma publicação trimestral direcionada ao mercado de exibição de cinema. Criada em 2011 pela Tonks, a Revista tem por objetivo divulgar informações e serviços sobre o segmento cinematográfico. Porém, com o crescente desenvolvimento do setor, foi criado, em 2013,o Portal Exibidor para garantir o acesso dos exibidores e dos profissionais do setor à maior variedade possível dessas novidades. Juntos, a Revista e o Portal Exibidor têm a missão de trazer um conteúdo direcionado, ouvir os agentes do mercado e ser um espaço para o exibidor dizer o que pensa. Assim, com portal e revista, a marca Exibidor busca promover o debate de temas relevantes para o mercado de exibição de maneira a contribuir para o crescimento e o desenvolvimento desse setor. Por isso, é possível encontrar nos canais da Exibidor, seja online ou off-line, matérias sobre novos produtos, soluções, inauguração de salas de cinema, reportagens sobre o mercado, dicas para melhorar o negócio, tendências e muito mais.

Name: Filmby Aarhus
Description:
Filmby Aarhus styrker og udvikler film-, tv-, spil- og animationsbranchen i Vestdanmark gennem en lang række projekter og samarbejder.

Filmbyen er beliggende i et større område på Sydhavnen i Aarhus, hvor vi huser over 80 virksomheder og uddannelser i den kreative visuelle industri. Derudover udlejer vi erhvervslokaler og produktionsfaciliteter til branchen.

Name: International Cinema Technology Association - ICTA
Description: The International Cinema Technology Association is a global network of professionals in the motion picture industry. Members of the ICTA are those companies that manufacture, service and create the equipment that goes into movie theatres. Our members are on the cutting edge of new technologies and have been the driving force in digital, 3D, immersive sound systems, high frame rates and lasers. The ICTA promotes technological advancements in the motion picture industry through educational seminars and programs. The ICTA logo stands for excellence and professionalism and when on a member’s letterhead signifies that the company is reliable, competent and committed.

Name: Asymmetric Studios
Description: Studio was started in 2007 by Victor Luckysov. Our basic specialization is creating 3d character animation and high end visual effects for feature films, television commercials and 3d animation series.

Name: Kino Haus Group
Description:
Founded in 2012, Kino Haus Group is a creative studio operating at the intersection of cinema, design, and intelligent innovation.

What began as a boutique film studio has evolved into a collective that unites four verticals under one vision:

1. Kino Haus Films - cinematic video and brand content for organizations, founders, and campaigns.
2. Kino Haus Productions - the fiction division dedicated to short films and feature-length projects.
3. Kino Haus AI Lab - generative video design and AI-powered filmmaking workflows for the next wave of cinematic production.
4. Kino Haus HR - people and culture strategy for creative and growth-driven companies.

At the core of our work lies a single pursuit: to merge filmmaking craft with AI innovation, creating cinematic visuals that combine emotion, precision, and speed. Whether for brands, fiction, or internal storytelling, every project is designed with clarity of intent and executed with creative intelligence.

Over the years, we’ve partnered with leading brands including Hero MotoCorp, JCDecaux, Budweiser, Omron, GE, Alstom, UnitedHealth Group, and AB InBev, among others.

Kino Haus Group continues to explore the evolving language of cinema.

Business inquiries: enquiries@kinohausgroup.com

Creative collaborations: aditya@kinohausgroup.com

Name: 99 Brattle Productions
Description: Development and production of film, live arts & entertainment broadcasts, podcasts, script readings, and documentaries on pop culture, Independent projects in consortium with academic programs and internships.

Name: DossGuavaXR Studio
Description: Founded in 2022, DossGuavaXR Studio emerged as a pioneering XR Virtual Production Company following two years of dedicated technology exploration. Specializing in providing location solutions to the film industry, production houses, and content creators, we employ cutting-edge virtual technology to deliver cinematic excellence within the broader cinematography ecosystem.

Name: LUXX Film GmbH
Description:
LUXX STUDIOS deliver high-end visual effects for best production value on the local and international market. We design visual effects and animation for major Cinema movies, games cinematic, commercials and TV productions from preproduction to final delivery. LUXX STUDIOS offers technical expertise and know-how and supports you with a profound understanding of visual esthetics and well composed images. We enhance direct communication between our customers and us, because we feel that it is essential for achieving best results, ensuring effective cost + delivering best possible Production Value.


LUXX STUDIOS is situated in the hometown of FMX, Stuttgart Germany, famous for its innovation and technical expertise in Engineering. We provide visual effects made in Germany since 2006. 


We are Members of the VES, meet the highly professional State of the Art standards and implement the visions of our customers with creativity, quality and passion for best results. We create solutions with well trained professionals, boost each project with smart VFX and vivid, hand tailored animation share the passion for film and toss it all with lots of pasta. This is the secret to LUXX Studios.


[At helm of Company: Andrea Block, Christian Haas. graduates of Film Academy, Ludwigsburg]

Name: Shooting People
Description:
Shooting People is an online networking organization dedicated to the support and promotion of independent filmmaking.  Founded in 1998 in the United Kingdom by Jess Search and Cath Le Couteur, both filmmakers themselves, it became a massive word-of-mouth success and currently has over 38,000 members in the UK and US.
By partnering with festivals and other industry organisations and developing web and email tools that allow members of the filmmaking community to link up with each other instantly and swap core skills, resources and advice, Shooting People has stimulated debate and facilitated new collaborations, resulting in thousands of productions.

Name: Spectrum Films International
Description:
Spectrum Films has catered to the post production needs of the Australian and International Film and Television industry for over 50 years. The company has expanded to include strategic alliances, investments and a strong international presence.  

This growth adds to Spectrum Films stellar reputation of being the post production facility of choice for countless feature films, television productions, documentaries and TVCs.

Spectrum Films provides state-of-the-art facilities, both nationally and internationally, and boasts services and equipment employing the current leading and developing technologies.

Name: TV ON Producciones
Description:
TV ON Producciones (Valencia, Spain). Founded in 2000, with producer Paloma Mora as CEO and Producer and a professional team in the audiovisual field. We produce content for cinema and TV, coproduced in Spain and internationally and which are being distributed worldwide. We develop and produce our own IPs and offer international production services.

-----

TV ON Producciones (Valencia, España). Fundada en el 2000, con la productora Paloma Mora como CEO y productora y un equipo de profesionales del campo audiovisual. Producimos contenido para cine y televisión, coproducido en España e internacionalmente y distribuido alrededor del mundo. Desarrollamos y producimos nuestras propias IPs y ofrecemos servicios internacionales de producción.

Name: Take It Easy Film
Description: We are an independent production company founded in 2001 with its focus on storytelling and character driven scripts. We are based in Lisbon.

Name: Troma Entertainment, Inc.
Description:
Established in 1974 by Yale friends Lloyd Kaufman and Michael Herz, Troma Entertainment is arguably the longest-running independent movie studio in North America, and it's one of the very few genuine brand names in the industry. 

Troma is world famous for producing and distributing classic films such as Kaufman's "The Toxic Avenger", Trey Parker's "Cannibal, the Musical", "Poultrygeist: Night of the Chicken Dead", "Class of Nuke 'Em High", Charles Kaufman's "Mother's Day" & "Tromeo & Juliet". Early works of many of today's luminaries can be found in Troma's library of 1000 films, cartoons, TV shows and shorts. Jenna Fischer, Robert De Niro, Dustin Hoffman, Kevin Costner, Fergie, Vincent D'Onofrio, Samuel L. Jackson, James Gunn and Eli Roth are just a few notable Troma alumni. Troma's latest in house productions are "Return to Nuke 'Em High: Volumes 1 & 2". Troma's Blu-rays, DVDs, books, t-shirts & Troma-bilia can be purchased at www.tromadirect.com. 

All of Troma's classic features, new additions & exclusive bonus material can be viewed at:
watch.troma.com
www.troma.com
www.lloydkaufman.com
www.twitter.com/lloydkaufman
www.twitter.com/troma_team
www.facebook.com/troma.entertainment 
& www.instagram.com/tromateam.

Name: IRALTA
Description:
Nuestra pasión es crear contenidos con las últimas tecnologías que mejor se adaptan a cada narrativa y formato audiovisual

Somos es un estudio especializado en la creación de experiencias inmersivas y la producción virtual.   
Innovamos en la generación de contenidos de producción virtual en tiempo real y desarrollamos experiencias inmersivas XR, VR y AR.

info@iralta.com

Name: Galloping Entertainment
Description:
Galloping Entertainment is a full-service international sales agency. Our business is the marketing and licensing of feature films, documentaries and TV programs to the Theatrical, TV, DVD and Digital markets throughout the world. 

We represent a catalogue of over 200 handpicked feature films, television series, documentaries and lifestyle programs that are available for broadcast internationally and distribution in all markets, and in all media. 

Since 1994, we participated at more than 89 international film and TV markets, festivals and conferences including Berlinale/EFM (Germany), MIP-ASIA (HK), MIPDoc, MIPTV,  MIPT Junior, MIPCOM, Marche du Film (France), LA Screenings and AFM (United States), Shanghai Int’l Film Market (China), ATF (Singapore), Asia Film Market (Korea), TIFFCOM (Japan), BIFF (Beijing), Ventana Sur (Argentina) and 37 Degrees South and SPAA (Australia).

Name: SpecMine
Description: We are a unique, mentor-driven, writers collective working to bring quality spec scripts to Hollywood.

Name: Washington Filmworks
Description: Washington Filmworks (WF) is the private 501(c)(6) non-profit organization that manages the Motion Picture Competitiveness program as well as a diversity of resources for the creative industries in Washington State. WF mission is to create economic development opportunities by building and enhancing the competitiveness, profile and sustainability of Washington State’s film industry.

Name: Cofiloisirs
Description:
Created in 1973, Cofiloisirs is a specialized lending institution dedicated to the film and TV industry. 

Cofiloisirs is a major partner of its French and international clients and provides cashflow financing for their activity (development, pre-production, production, acquisition, movie theaters) via tailor-made loans adjusted to the specific features of each project (feature films – animated or live action - , fiction, TV series, documentaries, video games,) and each company. 

Empowered by a strong key position on the French market, Cofiloisirs has broaden out and has been supporting international coproductions throughout Europe (United-Kingdom, Ireland, Belgium, Luxembourg, Germany, , Nordic countries, …) and the world (United States, South Africa, Australia, Canada) for more than 20 years. 

Finally, through its subsidiary Cinecapital, Cofiloisirs offers financial advisory solutions and carries out a collection account management activity.

Name: French Production Service
Description: French Production Service is an executive production company that organises the filming of music videos, commercials, documentaries and dramas in the South of France. With over 15 years' experience in the region, we know the area and its customs inside out, so you can shoot in the best possible conditions with a qualified local crew in the setting of your dreams.

Name: PICOMEDIA S.R.L.
Description: PRODUZIONE CINEMATOGRAFICA E TELEVISIVA.

Name: CINE
Description: Founded in 1957, CINE champions professional, emerging and student media creators through the annual CINE Golden Eagle Awards for Professional, Independent and Student Media, Marvin Hamlisch Film Scoring Contest for Emerging Composers, CINE Connects Mentorship Program and CINE PitchFest Presented by A&E.

Name: Everest
Description:
Everest is a creative post-production studio.
We offer a full post-production services with editing, color grading, compositing, beauty touch-ups, VFX, CGI

Name: SPECIAL INTEREST FILMS
Description:
Special Interest Films is a creative studio renowned for branded content & impactful storytelling. Trusted by public & private sector organizations. Our producers include Emmy Award-winning broadcast and film creators pioneering short form documentaries based in our London studio focusing on the development, production and distribution of truth-based premium unscripted and scripted storytelling that inspire action. To raise societal awareness, transform brand perception & inspire stakeholder action worldwide.

Our videos produced are high calibre short form purpose documentary style content to engage public and private sector stakeholders through collaboration with prominent media platforms and knowledge partners, bringing together insightful perspectives from thought leaders worldwide within leading organisations to an international audience. We are a new benchmark brand storytelling niche and the first tri-partnership within the $450B digital media market.

In addition to the many great features and short form documentaries that we produce for influencers, industry and government leaders screenings, we have a wealth of films to from our library to recommend for critical-topics viewing with individual sectors. We offer these films as a resource to stakeholders looking to enhance understanding of sustainability leadership in sector' engagement with specific subject matter. These films are well suited for in-depth discussion, designed to inform, educate, and inspire action.

Special Interest Films is the trading name of Communication Works Publishing Group Ltd. Special Interest Films is a specialised video production & distribution division operating titles including Ocean Titans, Health Heroes, Pharmacy For All & Trade For Prosperity.

Name: Les Films du Cygne
Description: Les Films du Cygne est une société de production basée à Annecy et Paris.

Name: Filmfestival Max Ophüls Preis
Description:
Das Festival für den deutschsprachigen Filmnachwuchs. Seit 1980 steht das Filmfestival in Saarbrücken für die Talentförderung und Entdeckung neuer Regisseurinnen und Regisseure. Wir zeigen in einer Woche in vier Wettbewerbskategorien über 60 neue Talente und ihre aktuellen Werke. 

45. Festivalausgabe in Saarbrücken vom 22.-28.01.2024

Name: Valhalla Entertainment
Description: Executive Producer and Production Company for The Walking Dead, The Terminator Trilogy, Armageddon, Incredible Hulk, The Punisher, Hulk, Aeon Flux, The Abyss, Dante's Peak & Aliens.

Name: Slamdance
Description:
The festival was founded in 1995 by Dan Mirvish, Jon Fitzgerald, Shane Kuhn and Peter Baxter and has since become a year-round organization championing emerging filmmaking talent and their new work.

Programmed by filmmakers for filmmakers, Slamdance adamantly supports self-governance amongst independents, and exists to deliver what filmmakers go to festivals for – a chance to show their work and a launching point for their careers. Slamdance has earned a solid reputation for premiering films by first-time writers and directors working within the creative confines of limited budgets. Festival discoveries have included directors such as Christopher Nolan (Memento), Marc Forster (Monster's Ball) and Jared Hess (Napoleon Dynamite). Slamdance also attracts world renowned alumni including Larry Clark and Steven Soderbergh.

Name: Flat Parioli Digital Post
Description:
Il nome FLAT nasce dall'atipicità di questa orizzontalità e rimanda al concetto di appartamento, di avere su un unico piano alto (un terzo piano) un'intera Facility di post-produzione digitale.

Flat/appartamento rimanda anche al senso di «accoglienza» e di fare sentire a casa chi lavora all'interno della struttura. Infatti grande attenzione è data alle aree in comune, come cucine e spazio ricreativo.

La nostra struttura si trova all'interno della prestigiosa palazzina "Il Girasole" costruita a viale Bruno Buozzi in Roma ad inizio degli anni ’50, uno dei progetti più noti del periodo che è considerato un esempio precoce di architettura postmoderna. «Girasole» è il nome dato dall'architetto Luigi Moretti, che amava attribuire un nome ai propri edifici.

In particolare, i panneggi che increspano le pareti laterali della palazzina, in corrispondenza di quelle che erano le camere da letto, catturano i raggi del sole generando e accentuando variazioni di luce, suggerendo così a Moretti il nome “Girasole”.

Luogo storico del cinema romano, nello stabile di Viale Bruno Buozzi tra gli anni ‘50 e ’60, hanno abitato, Rosellini (in realtà inizialmente la Bergman con i figli) e Totò. L’appartamento in cui sorge la Flat Parioli Digital è appartenuto proprio ad Antonio De Curtis.

Name: Greek Film Centre (GFC)
Description:
The Greek Film Centre (GFC) is an active entity, since its establishment (in 1970 under the name “General Film Investments”, as a subsidiary production company of the Greek Industrial Development Bank).

The GFC aims to protect and develop the production of cinematographic art in Greece, by applying the following practices:

- Increase of investments from the local and foreign market
- Attraction of foreign productions and co-productions
- Increase of extroversion in Greek production
- Reinforcement of new creators
- Development of cinematic education in Greece
- Transparency and efficacy in administration

Name: Rat Pack Filmproduktion GmbH
Description:
Die WESTSIDE FILMPRODUKTION GmbH (Köln/ Krefeld) und die RAT PACK FILMPRODUKTION GmbH (München/ Berlin) sind Filmproduktionsunternehmen, die sowohl die Bereiche Kinofilm als auch TV Movies/ Events, Serien und internationale Event-Produktionen bedienen. 
Seit der Gründung durch Christian Becker und die Constantin Film 2001 entstanden hier unzählige preisgekrönte Produktionen und Publikumserfolge, wie die Kinofilme DIE WELLE von Regisseur Dennis Gansel, Christian Ditters VORSTADTKROKODILE und Michael Bully Herbigs WICKIE UND DIE STARKEN MÄNNER oder auch TV Mega-Events wie DAS JESUS VIDEO von Sebastian Niemann oder die WINNETOU-Trilogie von Philipp Stölzl.
Zu den jüngsten Erfolgen zählen unter anderem der Blockbuster FACK JU GÖHTE von Regisseur Bora Dagtekin oder Peter Thorwarths NICHT MEIN TAG und die teuerste deutschsprachige Produktion aller Zeiten, die Adaption von Michael Endes Weltbestseller JIM KNOPF UND LUKAS DER LOKOMOTIVFÜHRER sowie die Fortsetzung JIM KNOPF UND DIE WILDE 13 unter der Regie von Dennis Gansel. Im vergangenen Jahr sind neben den beiden großen Kindermarken DIE DREI !!! und BENJAMIN BLÜMCHEN zudem der Fernsehklassiker DER LETZTE BULLE ins Kino gekommen und die Serie WIR SIND DIE WELLE ist auf Netflix erschienen. 2020 hat die Rat Pack Wolfgang Hohlbeins DIE WOLF-GÄNG ins Kino gebracht und dreht aktuell die Fortsetzung HUI BUH UND DAS HEXENSCHLOSS sowie den deutschsprachigen Netflix-Film für den internationalen Markt TRANSATLANTIC 473 in Prag.

Name: MEGARAMA Cinemas
Description:
Le Groupe MEGARAMA, fondé et présidé par Monsieur Jean-Pierre lemoine est un acteur majeur du paysage cinématographique avec 260 écrans présents implantés en France, Espagne et Maroc. 
Plus de 7,5 M de visiteurs ont fréquenté les différentes salles du Groupe en 2019.

Name: Asteroide
Description: Awarded creative film production company with 20 Cannes Lions, Gran Ojo, Best of Show and GP at New York Festivals.

Name: VAST by PFX
Description: We are providing high quality Visual Effects for Film, Commercials and Television.

Name: Fundación Audiovisual Pública Andaluza
Description:
Creada en el año 1998, la Fundación Audiovisual de Andalucía es una institución privada sin fin de lucro patrocinada por la Agencia Pública Empresarial de la Radio y Televisión de Andalucía (RTVA) constituida para promover, en todos sus aspectos, el sector audiovisual de Andalucía. Desde sus inicios esta iniciativa se integra en los objetivos de la Junta de Andalucía encaminados a potenciar el desarrollo de un tejido empresarial audiovisual propio.

La Fundación Audiovisual de Andalucía esta presidida por la Dirección General de la Agencia Pública Empresarial de la Radio y Televisión de Andalucía (RTVA) y su Patronato está compuesto por los y las integrantes del Consejo de Administración de la misma. Integrada en la RTVA, la Fundación actúa en su papel de motor del desarrollo de un sector estratégico con un gran potencial de crecimiento y de futuro.

El propósito de la Fundación Audiovisual de Andalucía es el de promover el conocimiento, potenciación y desarrollo de la industria audiovisual en Andalucía facilitando la obtención de los instrumentos de apoyo necesarios a fin de dotar a las empresas y profesionales que lo componen de la competitividad adecuada para su expansión en el ámbito nacional, europeo e internacional.

Name: Trentino Film Commission
Description:
We are the main resource for Italian and foreign filmmakers and productions that wish to film in Trentino.
Through our Film Fund and the services we offer, we support film, television and documentary productions capable of enhancing the value of the cultural and natural resources of our Province, also fostering the development of the local economy.
We also promote the growth of the audiovisual sector and offer educational programs aimed at ensuring an increase in the qualification of local professionals in the industry.
Furthermore, we promote sustainability in the audiovisual sector by proposing the adoption of our "Green Film" rating system.
Trentino Film Commission is a Business Unit of Trentino Sviluppo (a company established by the Autonomous Province of Trento to foster the sustainable growth of the "Trentino system").

Name: GQT Movies
Description: GQT Movies is a chain of 24 movie theaters throughout Michigan, Indiana, Illinois and Missouri. Starting in 1930 with just a single screen in downtown Grand Rapids, MI, GQT has innovated, changed and grown with movie exhibition industry. GQT Movies locations feature multiple experiences, such as IMAX, GDX, Dolby Atmos, and 4K Digital Projection in select theaters.

Name: Uni-versal Extras
Description:
Uni-versal extras is the UK’s leading Casting Agency placing Extras across the whole of the UK and Ireland. 

Based at the iconic Pinewood Studios, Uni-versal Extras lives at the heart of the entertainment industry. Clients range from world leaders such as Disney, Warner Brothers, Marvel, Universal, BBC, ITV, Channel 4 and Sky to the smallest local productions.

With a growing team of 30 dedicated staff working 24 hours a day, 7 days a week to provide you with a service you really can rely on. Speaking to each supporting artist before booking has made Uni-versal Extras an industry leader for turn-out rates. Uni-versal Extras also offers bespoke support in the form of organising Open Casting Events to source local looks, on-set ‘sign in’ service and a new Chitless System to make signing extras ‘In’ and ‘Out’ effortless.

If you need help with your next production, call today.

Name: MBO Cinemas
Description: MBO is coming back. Stay tuned.

Name: Bombay Berlin Film Production
Description:
Bombay Berlin Film Productions [BBFP] is a film production company, with a mission to make films that bridge the East & West. Based in Mumbai our partners hail from India and Europe.

BBFP is a first of its kind one stop shop that has a global presence and a network over major international film festivals and markets. We have an experienced team available with expertise in all fields of filmmaking and in markets including India, Europe and USA.

We at BBFP produce films and documentaries for cinema and television, offer co-production and line production services for feature films/documentaries to be shot in India and Europe and consulting services for distribution and international film festivals including world sales, promotion and distribution.

Name: Filmhuis Den Haag
Description:
Filmhuis Den Haag is een levendige culturele ontmoetingsplek waar het draait om de liefde voor film. Wij geloven dat film je ogen opent naar een andere wereld. Naast het verbreden van je horizon, stimuleert film het vermogen om je in anderen te verplaatsen.

Met vijf filmzalen, vier studio’s, een café en een restaurant is het pand aan het Spui een echte publiekstrekker. Jaarlijks worden zo'n 450 titels vertoond aan ruim 165.000 bezoekers.

Filmhuis Den Haag heeft jarenlange ervaring met film- en media-educatie op alle onderwijsniveaus: van basisonderwijs tot WO. Jaarlijks ontvangen we ca. 16.000 leerlingen. Daarmee is Filmhuis Den Haag het centrum van filmeducatie in Den Haag.

Name: AIRBORNE FILMS
Description:
AIRBORNE FILMS has world-renowned, expert experience in aerial cinematography. Creating high quality, cinematic content is the essence of what we do. Visual story telling, innovative communications and graphic identity solutions are just some of the many services we offer to our clients around the world.

Follow us @airbornefilms

Name: IFC - Italian Film Commissions
Description:
L’Associazione Italian Film Commissions, composta da 19 Film Commission diffuse su tutto il territorio italiano, rappresenta un riferimento per le produzioni nazionali e internazionali, gli autori, gli operatori professionali e le istituzioni del cinema e dell’audiovisivo.

Italian Film Commissions riunisce organismi che provvedono gratuitamente all’erogazione di servizi, tra i quali l’assistenza logistica, l’accesso alle risorse finanziarie locali, la concessione di permessi, la mappatura di maestranze e fornitori di servizi nei territori, la ricerca delle location. Si adopera per incentivare gli investimenti nel segmento cinematografico e audiovisivo nelle singole regioni, offre un’immagine unitaria dell’Italia audiovisiva raccontata nelle sue specificità regionali, promuovendone i territori e le loro peculiarità da un punto di vista culturale, artistico, turistico, paesaggistico, industriale.

A sostegno dello sviluppo territoriale su scala globale, Italian Film Commissions si dedica al consolidamento dei rapporti con enti ed istituzioni nazionali e internazionali, sviluppa iniziative di sistema per la crescita e la promozione dell’Italia audiovisiva. 

Italian Film Commissions favorisce la crescita della coproduzione internazionale e la realizzazione di partnership operative e di sviluppo. La promozione e la tutela della qualità dei servizi per le produzioni audiovisive, sono tra le finalità dell’Associazione, oltre al miglioramento operativo delle strutture associate con la realizzazione di iniziative formative e d’aggiornamento.

Name: Réactive
Description:
Réactive est une agence de communication spécialisée dans la création de contenus vidéo, social, live et immersifs.

Expertises : 
Contenus vidéo | Social média | Emissions live et événementiel | Contenus immersifs et innovants

Philosophie :
Nous observons et analysons les tendances, les changements, les organisations et nous conseillons chaque jour nos clients. Avec et pour eux, nous imaginons et nous produisons du contenu : digital, vidéo, immersif et live. Cela pour expliquer, informer, motiver, faire rire, faire rêver…  Et grâce à l’émotion que les récits, les technologies digitales et l’audiovisuel savent déclencher, nous revitalisons les contenus corporate et faisons rayonner les marques.

Name: Turkish Film Commission
Description:
Turkish Film Commission – International Production Gateway for Filming in Türkiye 

Since 2013, the Turkish Film Commission has been the primary contact and coordination hub for international producers planning film, TV, documentary, unscripted and commercial projects in Türkiye. We are an independent, non-profit film commission that works closely with ministries, local authorities and industry partners to make filming in Türkiye clear, efficient and creatively rewarding.

We support projects from early idea to final shoot: helping you understand permit requirements, advising on where and when to film, connecting you with trusted local producers, fixers, crews and rental houses, and orienting you on incentives, funds and tax matters. Our role is to be a single, reliable point of guidance in a country that offers enormous visual and cultural diversity.

From Istanbul’s global metropolis and Cappadocia’s “otherworldly” valleys to Aegean and Mediterranean coasts, mountain regions, small towns and UNESCO World Heritage sites, Türkiye can double for many different worlds within one production schedule. We translate that potential into realistic schedules, location shortlists and practical solutions on the ground.

We regularly collaborate with studios, streamers, broadcasters and independent producers, as well as documentary and factual teams, branded content units and advertising agencies. Whether you are planning a high-end series, a character-driven documentary, a global TV format or a lean commercial shoot, we help you navigate the same key questions: permits, locations, logistics, crew, equipment, incentives and local expectations.

Our aim is simple: when your production wraps, we want you to feel that filming in Türkiye was not a risk, but a smart creative and business decision. If you are considering Türkiye for your next project, the Turkish Film Commission is ready to act as your independent, experienced and trusted guide.

Name: DHC Films
Description:
The story of DHC Films began in 2016, when it was founded. The first years were based on learning from experienced cinematographers and working on hundreds of different types of projects around the world. Now, after much effort, dedication and incredible people involved, DHC Films has grown, it has the best equipment and the best facilities to develop creativity and fullfill the needs of the client.

From commercials to music videos, DHC Films covers all the needs of a proffessional video. It uses cinema cameras as RED or BLACKMAGIC, combined with incredible aerial shots taken with our DJI Inspire 2. After recording, all the media is retouched by editors and colorists, mixing it with original created soundtracks, composing a perfect final product.

Name: Votary Films
Description:
Votary Films is a lean team of artists and filmmakers with big dreams. Our purpose and passion is to move people through meaningful stories. We believe that film is the most powerful way of crafting a story, as it contains nearly every art form that exists. Whether we’re shooting a brand story or feature film, we always aim to tell each story with integrity, authenticity, and create something beautiful. 

We all want some sort of meaning in our lives, and for as long as we know, stories are how we have derived purpose from existing and understanding our reality. We believe that in today's marketing sphere, it's not about focusing so much on what you do, but telling your story and WHY you do it that really sparks ideas, builds trust and inspires action genuinely. Be real, be yourself, be honest.

People giving a speech in front of a movie screen with the b&b theatres logo on it.
The Beginning
B&B Theatres stands for Bills and Bagby, two families that both launched movie theatres and joined forces-for business and love-in 1980.

The history of B&B stretches back to 1924 when Elmer Bills, Sr., bought the Lyric Theatre in Salisbury, MO, and founded Bills Theatres. It was there that he met his future wife, Johnnie, while she played the piano along with the silent movies. Years later, their son Elmer Bills, Jr., was born into the business.
In 1936, the elder Elmer hired 10-year-old Sterling Bagby as a concession clerk. Sterling grew up, fought in World War II and came home to marry his Higbee, MO ticket seller, Pauline. Together, they started the Bagby Traveling Picture Show and roamed rural Missouri with their films, projection equipment, seats and snack bar. The Bagby Traveling Picture Show screened movies in barns, schools and parks. Eventually, Sterling and Pauline's company evolved into a Kansas circuit of drive-in theatres and "hardtops" (their nickname for indoor theatres).

Meanwhile, young Elmer Bills, Jr. had met his wife-to-be, Amy, when both were 13 (he lovingly refers to her as "the best popcorn girl I ever hired") and gone on to graduate from the University of Missouri in 1959. Elmer and Amy joined his parents Elmer Sr. and Johnnie and continued the expansion of Bills Theatres, Inc.

On January 1, 1980, the Bills and Bagby families cemented decades of friendship by formally joinin

Name: Rooftop Films
Description:
At Rooftop Films, we believe that film is powerful, not only as a creative medium, but as a vehicle for engaging in valuable dialogue with one another about the issues facing our communities. By bringing films directly to audiences, we foster connections between neighbors, artists, activists, youth and the unique spaces we all share.

A growing nonprofit organization, our mission at Rooftop Films is to engage and inspire diverse communities by showcasing the work of emerging filmmakers in outdoor locations, helping filmmakers to produce new films, and renting equipment & supporting film screenings citywide at low-cost to artists, nonprofits and community groups.

Rooftop Films is more than a film festival. We are a community. For over 27 years, Rooftop Films has been championing the work of independent filmmakers and bringing films rooted in compassion, solidarity, learning, togetherness, exploration, and inspiration to tens of thousands of people across all five boroughs of New York City.

Name: Trupe Filmes
Description:
Nascida no Brasil, a Trupe Filmes (TF) é uma produtora independente com mais de 12 anos de história dedicada a criar entretenimento e informação de impacto, através de projetos em ficção e documentário, sendo muito presente em pautas ESG em prol da Educação, Meio-Ambiente, Combate à Fome, Desenvolvimento Sustentável e diversas outras de interesse global.

Acreditamos que uma história bem contada pode realmente fazer a diferença na forma como as pessoas veem o mundo, inspirando mudanças positivas.

Em nosso extenso portfólio destacam-se: o filme longa-metragem “O mundo que eu conheço lá não existe mais” (2023/2024), um triller psicológico com toques de sci-fi e terror; o curta-metragem “Vestigios, el Misterio del Dique La Ciénaga” (2019/2020), gravado em Jujuy na Argentina, selecionado para mais de 15 festivais e ganhador de 2 prêmios de Melhor Fotografia; a série documental “Ciência para Todos” (2018/2019 e 2023, Globoplay & Futura), 1ª e 2ª temporadas (52 e 13 episódios); a série “Educador Nota 10” (2015-2022), 7 temporadas (70 mini-docs); a websérie de ficção “Casa ViraMundo” (2020, Lego Foundation); os mini-docs para o movimento “Pacto Contra à Fome” (2023); a série “REP - Repercutindo Histórias” (2017-2021, Globo); e dezenas de outras produções nas áreas de ficção, documentário, propaganda e audiovisual em geral.

Atualmente desenvolvemos os projetos de ficção “Cipher”, “8” e “Inconscientes”, além de cuidar de toda a operação do Studio Itaú Investment Center (mais de 900 conteúdos produzidos só em 2023) e outros projetos de grandes marcas para quem criamos, desenvolvemos e produzimos narrativas.

Quer saber mais sobre a Trupe?
Visite nosso site https://trupefilmes.com e vamos juntos criar novas histórias.

Name: VANDEPUNT.
Description:
VandePunt vertaalt de boodschap van uw bedrijf of merk in beeld, geluid en emotie. De kijker wordt meegetrokken in uw wereld en krijgt een wonderbaarlijk gevoel. Dit blijft hangen, net als uw product, dienst of herinnering. 
   
U bepaalt de boodschap, VandePunt zorgt voor de rest. Of het nu gaat om een commercial, bedrijfs- of internetfilm, of juist om een persoonlijke gebeurtenis zoals een vakantie of geboorte. Met de juiste beelden, geluiden en effecten creĂŤren we een respresentatieve film of een blijvende herinnering.
 
Passie, creativiteit en innovatie zijn de drijfveren van VandePunt. We bijten ons vast in een opdracht en verplaatsen ons helemaal in uw doelstellingen en doelgroepen. Vervolgens laten we er onze creativiteit op los. Het resultaat? Een effectief middel, verzorgd tot in de puntjes!

Name: STUDIOCANAL Australia & NZ
Description:
Established in 2012, STUDIOCANAL Australia & NZ was formed following the acquisition of Hoyts Distribution and its film library of over 120 titles in Australia, including the successful SAW series and Twilight Saga franchise. STUDIOCANAL Australia is one of the largest independent film distributors in the country. The business distributes independent films in Australia and New Zealand through theatrical, home entertainment, television and digital channels. 

STUDIOCANAL is a subsidiary of the CANAL+ Group. It is one of Europe's leading companies in the market for co-production, acquisition, distribution and sale of international feature films. STUDIOCANAL is the only studio operating simultaneously in three main territories across Europe: France, the United Kingdom and Germany. The company distributes a total of more than 50 films a year throughout Europe. Additionally, STUDIOCANAL owns one of the most important libraries in the world, with more than 5,000 international titles.

Name: Rooftop Film Club
Description:
Here at Rooftop Film Club we believe that all experiences should be memorable, which is why we are on a mission to transform nights at the movies to cinematic events like no other. You bring your friends and loved ones, and we'll bring you city skylines, sunsets, starlit evenings, awesome drinks, delicious food, and great movies on the big screen. Driven by our love of film, our venues promise a handpicked curation of cults, classics, and new releases. We stand for social cinema because we believe it’s the future.

We started in 2011 as a single rooftop in London and expanded globally with 8 venues across the US and UK.

Name: Catapult Film Fund
Description:
Catapult Film Fund provides development funding to documentary filmmakers who have a compelling story to tell, have secured access to their story, and are ready to shoot and edit a piece for production fundraising purposes. Our mission is to enable filmmakers to develop their films to the next level at a moment where funding is hard to find.

Our mission: Catapult Film Fund provides development funding to help story-driven and cinematic documentary films get off the ground.

Catapult gives early support to propel projects forward that hold the promise of a story that should be uniquely told in film. We provide development funding, up to $20,000, to documentary filmmakers who have a strong story to tell, have secured access, and are ready to create a fundraising piece to help unlock critical production funding. We enable filmmakers to develop their projects to the next level, at the early stage when funding is hard to find. We support powerful and moving storytelling, by filmmakers with a strong voice across a broad spectrum of subject matter.

Catapult is not tied to any specific social issue agenda. We support and encourage filmmakers to tell a full range of stories on film in whatever form fits the film and artist. As a result our Catapult supported films can range widely in style and scope.

In addition to the initial development grant, recipients have access to a mentorship program with the Catapult team, in areas including story development, production process, fundraising and distribution strategy. Our involvement with each project is uniquely tailored to the needs of the filmmakers.

There are two additional opportunities for follow-up grants for Catapult grantees. Catapult offers the potential of additional financial support in the form of “momentum grants” and “consulting grants.”

Catapult grantees may apply for a Momentum Grant for up to $20,000 when they reach a point in their filmmaking process when an infusion of funds can propel them to their next step. Examples include hiring an editor, getting transcripts translated, archival research, or music composition. 

Catapult grantees may also apply for a modest but strategic Consulting Grant. This funding supports consultation with a variety of experts such as veteran editors, producers, or First Amendment lawyers.

Name: Final Frame
Description: Final Frame is a boutique post production company that caters to the independent film community.  Known for its role on numerous award winning films, its goal is to bring high-end digital intermediate, sound mixing, and film scanning services to productions of all sizes.  With offices in the heart of Manhattan and London, Final Frame is uniquely positioned to service independent filmmakers on an international scale.

Name: MAMI (Mumbai Academy of Moving Image)
Description:
MAMI Mumbai Film Festival, organised by the Mumbai Academy of Moving Image (MAMI), has brought the best of contemporary world cinema and talent to the city of Mumbai, since 1997. With its new expanded vision to spotlight South Asian and South Asian diaspora filmmakers, MAMI becomes the Hub for South Asia, discovering and connecting emerging talent to the worldwide festival ecosystem. 

Along with celebrating cinematic excellence and bringing joy to our audiences, we aim to facilitate the exchange of ideas and provide easy access to information related to filmmaking, funding, film distribution, business opportunities, and strategic marketing support for films and filmmakers. The festival also conducts a robust Year Round Programme that acts as a hub for creators and cinephiles through screenings, networking opportunities, access to labs and workshops for skill development, masterclasses, and, very importantly, creating a community of cinema lovers.

Name: Frameline
Description:
Frameline's mission is to change the world through the power of queer cinema.  As a media arts nonprofit, Frameline's programs connect filmmakers and audiences in the Bay Area and around the world.

Exhibition

Founded in 1977, the San Francisco International LGBTQ Film Festival is the longest-running, largest and most widely recognized LGBTQ film exhibition event in the world. As a community event with an annual attendance of 60,000+, the Festival is the most prominent and well-attended LGBTQ arts program in the Bay Area. Frameline also presents year-round exhibitions, including Frameline Encore, a free film series highlighting diverse, socially relevant works. Year-round programs also include members-only sneak previews and special events, as well as special screenings and events featuring directors, actors and other queer media icons.

Distribution

Established in 1981, Frameline Distribution is the only nonprofit distributor that solely caters to LGBTQ film. Frameline's collection has over 250 award winning films and we have partnerships with universities, public libraries, film festivals, and community groups. In 2008, Frameline Distribution launched Youth In Motion, a program that provides free LGBT-themed films and curriculum resources to California Gay-Straight Alliances. In 2011, we launched Frameline Voices, a new effort to showcase diverse LGBTQ stories with an emphasis on films by and about people of color, transgender people, youth, and elders. The content featured on Frameline Voices is free and you can now enjoy the best of our distribution collection anytime on your computer, Smartphone, TV, or other device.

Filmmaker Support

Since 1990, more than 143 films and videos have been completed with assistance from the Frameline Completion Fund. Grants are awarded annually and provide much-needed support to filmmakers for their final editing and lab work. Once completed, these films often go on to receive international exposure. Submissions include documentary, educational, narrative, animation, and experimental projects about LGBTQ people and their communities.

Description:

Valérie Delpierre, después de estar muchos años profesionalmente involucrada en la producción audiovisual, crea su empresa con el fin de emprender sus propios proyectos y con una especial atención a las coproducciones internacionales y al desarrollo de nuevos talentos.

Name: IXOR Visual FX
Description:
Founded in 2005, IXOR VFX is a leading CGI and post-production studio with a global footprint, delivering high-end visual effects, 3D animation, and digital artistry across the entertainment, automotive, and advertising industries. With studios strategically located in Athens, London, and Los Angeles, IXOR combines cutting-edge technology with unparalleled creativity to bring imaginative concepts to life.

Our diverse portfolio spans from cinematic visual effects for blockbuster films and immersive VR experiences to hyper-realistic CGI for top automotive brands like Porsche, Nissan, and Tata Motors. We pride ourselves on our meticulous attention to detail and our ability to create visually stunning content that resonates with audiences worldwide.

At IXOR, we believe in pushing the boundaries of visual storytelling. Our team of seasoned VFX supervisors, animators, and digital artists work collaboratively to deliver projects that exceed expectations. Whether it’s crafting a seamless digital environment, bringing a CGI character to life, or developing interactive experiences for the Metaverse, we are committed to transforming creative visions into reality.

Join us on our journey as we continue to explore new frontiers in visual effects and digital content creation. Let’s create something extraordinary together.

IXOR combines the dynamics of a small CG studio with infrastructure and experience to produce even the most technically challenging visual content.

The company’s CG artists are supported by proprietary software, such as Refamo a state-of-the-art network and monitor controller software and additional 3D plugins.

Name: Neuchâtel International Fantastic Film Festival (NIFFF)
Description:
Created in 2000, the Neuchâtel International Fantastic Film Festival (NIFFF) has become, after 24 editions, an unmissable event for film lovers. Its diverse, innovative and prestigious programme has ensured it a national and international presence. This event is mainly dedicated to one genre – that is fantasy, or fantastic films. Asian cinema and digital creation are the two additional topics that complete the picture. Equally acclaimed by audiences, critics and federal institutions, the NIFFF has been growing continuously, showing steady increases in ticket sales and has even reached 66,000 attendees during its last edition.

The first characteristic of the festival is a rich and diversified programming constructed around one central axis: Fantastic cinema and two complementary axes: Asian cinema and digital creation.

Name: Aurum Producciones
Description:
En 1995 se constituye el Grupo AURUM PRODUCCIONES, con el objeto de producir y distribuir producto audiovisual, convirtiéndose en el año 2000 en la mayor empresa distribuidora independiente del mercado español (fuente: ACNielsen EDI), gracias a su acuerdo de distribución del producto de NEW LINE CINEMA y a algunos diferentes contratos de distribución de productos concretos con MIRAMAX, LAKESHORE, UNIVERSAL, ICON, SEVEN ARTS y MUTUAL. 

Desde mayo 2004 se ha iniciado una nueva etapa, con la incorporación de Aurum a la compañía Canadiense más importante en el mercado del entretenimiento Alliance Atlantis, operando en los sectores de Home Vídeo, Exhibición, Producción, Distribución y Televisión. 

Durante los últimos años, AURUM PRODUCCIONES, ha distribuido más de 300 títulos, entre los que destacan: 

• La Trilogía de El Señor de los Anillos (2001-2003)
• Next (2007)
• El fantasma de la ópera (2004) 
• Cazadores de mentes (2004)
• El enviado (2004)

Description:
Spirit Juice Studios is an award-winning, Chicago-based creative production firm specializing in the transformative power of high quality visual media merged with the ever ancient, ever new beauty of Catholicism.
Partner with us to captivate your audience through powerful video storytelling that enlivens the soul and moves the heart toward the true, good, and beautiful.

Over the past 15 years, Spirit Juice has become a leader in producing industry-leading films and visual media with a distinctly Catholic style. We work with parishes, schools, religious orders, and other Catholic organizations of all types in all 50 states and over 25 countries around the world, always ensuring the production process remains easy, streamlined, and affordable for our clients.

The team at Spirit Juice Studio are passionate not only about the standards in which they hold their work, but also in their Catholic faith, ultimately fusing together to form the best representation of Catholic values to advance the mission of the Church today.

We welcome the impossible idea.  When it comes to our clients’ ambitions and aspirations, we believe we can achieve the highest-caliber results on time and within your budget.

To learn more about Spirit Juice Studios’ roots within the Catholic community, company objectives, and overall body of work, visit www.spiritjuicestudios.com

Name: Climate Film Festival
Description:
Where compelling cinema meets critical conversations about our climate—fostering a diverse and innovative community ready to reimagine and reshape our world.

CFF showcases energizing, compelling, and eye-opening motion pictures and new media that encourage deeper engagement with the stakes of living in a changing world. From documentary and narrative features to experimental shorts, we screen film and media that address climate change as embedded in our daily lives, showcasing new voices, lesser-known archival finds, and complex, unexpected stories.

The Festival is dedicated to bringing together a diverse community of filmmakers, artists, experts, and general audiences with the mission of platforming traditional and experimental storytelling to inspire and empower action towards a more sustainable future.

CFF actively organizes its programming with the needs of New York City’s diverse constituents in mind, emphasizing local engagement as a key cornerstone of its larger collective vision.

Name: Luxembourg City Film Festival
Description:
With the record number of 30,500 visitors, 262 international guests, 424 press and professional accreditations, and 192 screenings in 2018, Luxembourg City Film Festival has firmly established itself as the nation’s leading cinema event. Since its inception in 2011 it is one of Europe’s festivals with the most spectacular growth.

Supported by the Ministry of Culture and the City of Luxembourg, it is the country’s official film festival. With this in mind, the Festival is committed to presenting high-quality, exclusive content of undeniable artistic value, featuring a vast panorama of contemporary fiction and documentary films, special screenings, and an extensive young audiences programme in the three partner cinema complexes (Ciné Utopia, Kinepolis Kirchberg, and the Cinémathèque de la Ville de Luxembourg). Besides these cinema screenings, the Festival also dares to venture beyond film theatres, hosting events, workshops, exhibitions and concerts in many of the capital’s cultural institutions, and cooperating with international partners, among others the United Nations, diplomatic representations, and the European Film Academy.

Luxembourg City Film Festival's 14th edition will take place from 29th February >10th March 2024.

Name: Goalpost Pictures
Description:
Goalpost Pictures are among Australia's leading independent producers of feature film and television. Founding partners Rosemary Blight, Kylie du Fresne, Ben Grant and Cass O’Connor have worked together as a team for almost 20 years creating compelling Australian stories for screen.

We firmly believe the key to our success lies in the enduring partnerships we have with distinctive and original creative voices. At Goalpost Pictures, we are committed to fostering a collaborative environment where remarkable writing, directing and producing can flourish.

The company is dedicated to producing the highest quality of work that will engage with audiences worldwide. We have major screen credits which have sold around the world and have screened at key international festivals including Cannes, Berlin, Sundance, Locarno and Toronto and we are proud recipients of Rose d'Or, BAFTA, AFI/ AACTA, Crystal Bear and Logie awards and nominations for our film and television programs.

Nuestra labor editorial se caracteriza por un cuidado trabajo de selección, con un número limitado de títulos estrenados cada temporada. Buscamos películas que despierten sensaciones e ideas nuevas y que después de verlas continúen inquietándonos. Películas que permanecen en el recuerdo con el paso de los años. El cine que se quedará contigo.

Name: I.A.T.S.E. LOCAL 16
Description:
Who We Are

Local 16 is part of the International Alliance of Theatrical Stage Employees, Moving Picture Technicians, Artists and Allied Crafts of the United States and Canada (IATSE). The IATSE represents technicians who serve all parts of the entertainment industry.

Since the birth of our organization over 100 years ago, IATSE stagehands and movie operators have been joined by a great variety of other crafts. Technicians and artists in motion picture and television production, product demonstration and industrial shows, conventions, facility maintenance, audio visual presentation, and motion picture computer graphics, to name a few, have all banded together to achieve the maximum unified strength possible.

Our Goal

Our goal at IATSE Local 16 is to represent workers in the San Francisco Bay Area, wherever they work, and to work to provide them and their families with benefits that can travel with them from employer to employer.

With union representation, you could change jobs without fear of losing your health insurance and with a consistent retirement benefit, two of the basic necessities for achieving and maintaining a quality life.

Name: Ardèche images
Description:
Association implantée à Lussas (07), Ardèche Images œuvre depuis plus de 40 ans au développement, à la transmission et au rayonnement du cinéma documentaire de création. Elle est pôle d’excellence Image en région Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes.

Les États généraux du film documentaire sont l’un des trois grands festivals français du genre. Il réunit en août, des milliers de professionnels et d’amateurs de cinéma autour de 130 films, de séminaires et de rencontres professionnelles.

Les formations initiales et continues de l’École documentaire, partenaire de l’Université Grenoble Alpes et lauréate de l’appel à projet France 2030 La Grande Fabrique de l’Image, jouissent d’une excellente réputation dans le monde professionnel, au niveau national et international. 

Le programme régional Terres de doc et les activités de sensibilisation au cinéma documentaire font d’Ardèche Images un acteur engagé dans la diffusion, l’éducation à l’image et la pratique amateur en territoire rural.

Ardèche Images est partie prenante d’un pôle documentaire qui réunit également une plateforme VOD, un plateau technique de post-production, une coopérative de producteurs émergents, une société de ventes internationales de films, des formations et rencontres de coproduction à l’international et une plateforme francophone de référencement des films.

If you’re ready to stop playing it safe and start building something unforgettable—let’s make yours.

Name: Impact Social Club
Description:
L'IMPACT SOCIAL CLUB développe, fédère et représente la filière de la production d'impact des films en France et dans les pays francophones. 

La production d’impact, c’est être convaincu que les films peuvent faire une différence et déclencher des changements concrets dans nos sociétés. Pour y arriver, il faut une stratégie, un savoir-faire et des moyens !

Fondé par cinq producteurs d’impact actifs sur les circuits internationaux, l’Impact Social Club a vocation à rassembler des individus et structures issus des différentes professions du secteur : producteurs d’impact, réalisateurs, distributeurs, producteurs, exploitants, diffuseurs et programmateurs de festivals, pour valoriser et défendre la production d’impact social au plus près des réalités des films produits et coproduits en France et dans les territoires francophones.

Né dans le champ du documentaire, l’Impact Social Club tient à élargir le champ de la réflexion à l'animation, à la VR, aux nouveaux médias et à la fiction.
