Name: Hong Kong International Film Festival Society Ltd. (HKIFFS)
Description:
The Hong Kong International Film Festival Society (HKIFFS) is a charitable, non-profit and non-governmental organisation dedicated to the discovery and promotion of creativity in the art and culture of film.

The Society is committed to making world cinema accessible and affordable to the public. It organises the annual flagship the Hong Kong International Film Festival (HKIFF) and the Hong Kong – Asia Film Financing Forum (HAF) in March and April. Another annual highlight is the Summer International Film Festival (SummerIFF) held every August. The repertory HKIFF Cine Fan Programme was launched in April 2013 with the aim to enrich and deepen the experience of Hong Kong moviegoers through a monthly programme of contemporary, retrospective and thematic showcases.

Through its annual programmes, the Society promotes international appreciation of Asian, Hong Kong and Chinese film culture; introduces world cinema to Hong Kong audiences; and continues to underline Hong Kong’s key position in the international film community.  

HKIFFS’ dedication to quality and intelligent programming, its devotion to the discovery of new areas of filmmaking in Asia and China, its exceptional work for Hong Kong cinema, seminars and acclaimed publications, gives it a unique and respected international reputation that helps promote Hong Kong cinema at home and abroad.

香港國際電影節協會 (HKIFFS) 是一個非牟利及非官方的慈善團體，致力發揚電影文化，推廣光影藝術。

為發展香港及亞洲的電影文化，協會於每年三、四月期間均舉辦兩項旗艦活動，包括 香港國際電影節 (HKIFF) 及 香港亞洲電影投資會 (HAF) 八月份舉辦以年輕觀眾口味為主的 Cine Fan 夏日國際電影節 (SummerIFF) 另外協會於2013年4月創辦 電影節發燒友 (Cine Fan) 節目旨於推廣豐富多元的電影文化，每月為香港觀眾帶來主流電影以外的精選佳作。
透過全年活動，協會期望加強世界各地對亞洲、香港及中國電影文化的欣賞，並把各地具啟發性的電影帶到香港，豐富本地精神文化生活。

香港國際電影節協會致力呈獻高質的電影節目、發掘亞洲及中國電影的新領域、為香港電影舉辦各種講座並出版有口皆碑的書刊，皆為協會帶來獨特崇高的國際聲望，有助於本地及國際上推廣香港電影。

Hong Kong International Film Festival (HKIFF43: 18 Mar - 1 Apr 2019)
Hong Kong–Asia Film Financing Forum (HAF17: 18-20 Mar 2019)
Cine Fan (Year-round Programme)

Sponsor Us: marketing@hkiff.org.hk

Description:
Kino Produzioni is a young and vibrant work environment developing and producing films that focus on today’s social changes. Our mission is to help new talents arise in the film industry of tomorrow, providing support and know how to stories worth telling.
Locally established in Rome, its horizon reaches out towards international partners and filmmakers, seeking projects that are based upon a common ground of intentions.
We are a European rooted international player with a sensibility towards global issues. The stories we pay attention to are those that expand our knowledge of what it means to be humane.

--------------------------------------------

Kino Produzioni è una realtà giovane e dinamica che mira a sviluppare e produrre opere cinematografiche che approfondiscano i cambiamenti in atto nella società contemporanea. Il nostro scopo è quello di aiutare nuovi talenti ad emergere nell’industria cinematografica di domani, offrendo supporto ed esperienza alle storie che meritano di essere raccontate.
Con sede a Roma, l’orizzonte di Kino si espande fuori confine verso partner ed autori internazionali che condividono i nostri stessi principi di base.
Siamo una piccola realtà con solide radici in Europa e con una sensibilità che si estende verso le problematiche di tutto il mondo. Le storie che ci colpiscono maggiormente, sono quelle che fanno espandere la nostra consapevolezza di che cosa significhi essere umani.

Name: Universal Creations Ltd
Description:
Universal Creations is an innovative creative company that specialise in making replications and creating bespoke products for film, television & arts, events & exhibitions and interior design & shop windows.

We love getting to know you and take time to understand your requirements. Through our expert knowledge and experience,  we define the best approach to ensure a high quality product, delivered through a reliable and friendly service. We care and take pride in everything that we do.

The company was founded in 2013 by Adriaan Englebrecht and Nicola Parke.  Adriaan has over 12 years experience in the industry since learning his craft as a primary mould maker and foam wizard.  He now leads the innovation and production teams at Universal Creations and continues to push boundaries.

Name: TORNASOL PRODUCCIONES SL
Description: PRODUCTORA AUDIOVISUAL. Producción de spots publicitarios, videos corporativos, institucionales y comerciales. Producción asociada en Cine. Producción en Teatro Musical, Programas de Televisión, Audiovisuales para Museos e instituciones públicas, proyectos expositivos, etc.

Name: Kplusfilm
Description:
We are inspired by original ideas and good vibes. We love to explore, test and face new challenges, , producing films with passion and participation, while always bringing our ‘Plus’.
We produce independent films, looking at a classic cinema, made up of various different genres, where depth and lightness, territory and dreams prevail. A quality entertainment cinema that knows how to tell a story in surprising and innovative ways. No matter how real or grotesque, how palpable or ineffable, how concrete or ambiguous, the result will be a world apart, in a word: unique.

Name: Ermonia
Description:
Ermonia est une association loi 1901, créée en juin 2021 et reconnue d'intérêt général. Elle soutient un projet cinématographique à dimension historique et cherche à faire vivre une émotion au spectateur. Ermonia construit son contenu à travers une reconstitution de l’Histoire personnalisée par la sensibilité artistique de ses membres.  

Ermonia est constitué de 60 jeunes de 18 à 26 ans, unis par une même passion pour la musique, le cinéma et les lettres. 

Pour beaucoup, Ermonia n’est qu’une nouvelle expérience parmi d’autres, parfois de plus grande envergure. Mais la force d’Ermonia réside dans cette opportunité donnée à chacun de réunir ses talents et d’exacerber sa créativité par la force du collectif. De fait, l’équipe d’Ermonia vit d’une profonde cohésion entre ses membres, ce qui de jour en jour rend le projet plus extraordinaire. 

Ermonia opère principalement (mais pas exclusivement) en Vendée, terre recélant un véritable potentiel historique. Fort de son ancrage vendéen, le projet met en valeur le patrimoine du bocage en y menant divers tournages.

To showcase beautiful and photoreal renders, we guarantee to provide the highest quality result for all of our clients. No matter what type of product you’re looking to integrate, we’re here to make it reality.

Name: The Projector
Description: A dynamic alternative to the common cineplex, The Projector revived a historic movie theatre in Golden Mile Tower as an independent creative platform that brings together the best of films, one-of-a-kind events, versatile spaces, and delectable fare. Beyond just being a venue, The Projector is a community space where differences are embraced and minds are open. It is the answer to anyone claiming Singapore is boring – a hidden gem that offers an alternative to the sameness and usual humdrum of the city. With its blend of quirky spaces, creative personalities, and diverse programming, it offers an experience unlike any other. The Projector houses the most unique range of film, arts, and cultural programming in Singapore, while also serving as a platform for cross-cultural exchange and social awareness.

Name: CHIARI VFX
Description: Based in the beautiful south of France, we work for companies and productions from all around the globe. Founded in 2000, we have been providing exceptional visual effects services for over two decades. With a specialization in VFX simulations, we have developed a reputation for delivering high-quality work that is both realistic and visually stunning.

Name: Forest Creations
Description: Over a decade working as an agency and production company, Forest understands the challenges Non-Governmental Organizations face in their communication to different audiences. We specialize in assisting Third Sector clients and promoting the public debate on sustainability with appealing and innovative solutions.

Name: TROUBLEMAKERS
Description:
Founded in 2008 by James Hagger, TROUBLEMAKERS is an animation studio and production company based in the heart of Paris. Our producers and directors are united by a common desire to challenge assumptions. To question each preconceived idea, to challenge the status quo, to question creative briefs again and again. We need to push boundaries if we want to find the best concepts and the best ideas, for our mission is to help companies expand and develop their brand identities and to connect with global audiences as well as to create bold visuals which will be remembered in time. We’re the Troublemakers, the challengers, which means that rules need to be broken if we want to get things moving.
TROUBLEMAKERS has been behind many award-winning advertising campaigns (Van Cleef & Arpels, Orange, WWF, CCTV and Amnesty International). Our Challenging Assumption signature translates into a desire for excellence that drives us to always want to surpass ourselves in the projects we produce and to tell beautiful stories that will profoundly move our audiences. In the span of a few years, TROUBLEMAKERS’ artistic approach has convinced and given us financial stability conductive to a thriving advertising business, but also investment in the development of new creative formats (Feature Films, Documentaries and TV series).
Our studio is equipped for live action shoots, 2D & 3D animation, compositing, SFX and colour grading. TROUBLEMAKERS is a member of the CJD and a board member of the UPC & the CFPe.

Name: Entity FX
Description:
Entity FX is a leading visual effects studio creating digital imagery for feature films, 3D stereoscopic features, high-definition television and commercials.

Based in Santa Monica, California, and Vancouver, Canada, Entity FX has recently made an impact with visual effects for such motion pictures as Riddick, Yogi Bear: 3D, I Am Number Four, Michael Jackson's This Is It, and The Final Destination: 3D. See credits for a more comprehensive list.

In addition to its ongoing film work, Entity FX handles end-to-end visual effects supervision and production for
the hit CW shows The Vampire Diaries and The Originals as well as FOX's The Following. Entity has
also recently provided VFX work on FX's Fargo, and HBO's Game of Thrones.

Commercial work includes spots for Nissan, NHL, Avon, Prilosec, Goodyear, Heiwa, Century 21 and the "Dream On" lottery campaign featuring Aerosmith.

Entity FX has received multiple Emmy Award nominations — winning two Emmys, as well as multiple Visual Effects Society Award nominations — winning three times.

Name: RS Productions
Description:
RS Productions, founded in Milan in 2019 by an entrepreneurial group with a broad experience in the media and publishing sectors, is an independent movie production and distribution company. Together with Portobello SpA, the Company owns Web Magazine Makers, a publishing house that holds the license for the iconic magazine “Rolling Stone” in Italy.

È Natale!”, featuring Academy Award winner Richard Dreyfuss in the cast. Additionally, the Company has distributed several international productions in Italy, such as “The Book of Vision,” “Fabian – Going to the Dogs,” and “Muti,” starring the award-winning Morgan Freeman. 

Attentive to the constantly evolving market, emerging trends, and new entertainment technologies, the Company launched IMMEDIATE in 2020, the first vertical business accelerator in the media and entertainment industry in Europe; a creative and technological hub that supports the development of startups and innovative projects.

Join us on a journey where imagination meets innovation, and discover why audiences react with a “WOOAH” when they watch our work. Connect with us on LinkedIn to stay updated on our latest projects!

Name: L'ARP - Société civile des Auteurs-Réalisateurs-Producteurs
Description:
L’ARP (Société Civile des Auteurs Réalisateurs Producteurs) a été fondée en 1987 à l’initiative de Claude Berri et de 33 cinéastes-producteurs parmi lesquels Agnès Varda, Patrice Chéreau, Gérard Oury, Costa Gavras et Henri Verneuil... Elle réunit aujourd'hui plus de 200 cinéastes de toutes les générations, hommes et femmes aux cinématographies variées, représentants de la diversité et de la richesse du cinéma français et européen, ardents défenseurs de la liberté et de l’indépendance de la création.

Depuis près de 40 ans, L’ARP participe quotidiennement sur le plan national et européen aux grandes négociations sur l’avenir du cinéma et sa régulation (intégration des nouveaux usages, obligations des chaînes de télévision et plateformes, chronologie des médias, transparence, exposition et exploitation des films en salles…).

L’ARP est un Organisme de Gestion Collective qui a également pour missions de gérer et répartir les droits de copie-privée et de retransmission par câble en France et à l’étranger, d’organiser tout au long de l’année de nombreuses actions culturelles (comme par exemple les Rencontres Cinématographiques de L’ARP, la Journée de la Création, ou encore des événements au Cinéma des Cinéastes) et d’apporter son soutien à différents événements culturels, festivals ou organismes partenaires.

The Bicycle Film Festival has been a major catalyst for the bike movement, one of the most powerful and culturally relevant forces of the past decade.  Cities around the world have been transformed by the growth of cycling.

The BFF has held events in 90 cities worldwide to an accumulated audience of over 1 million people.

The Bicycle Film Festival has an incredible history of working with the most important artists, filmmakers, venues, and brands around the world.

Description: Our main goal – it is to create a new, developed, and independent system of the world film industry, in which every film will pay off, and every second will bring profit to its creators and investors! To achieve this goal has been developed - PLATFORM FOR FINANCING, PRODUCTION AND DISTRIBUTION OF CINEMA PROJECTS - BASED ON BLOCKCHAIN TECHNOLOGY. More and more enterprises are opening or reorganizing their business using blockchain technology. In recent years, this process is not an accident - it is the economy of the near future. All enterprises operating on the blockchain technology will occupy leading positions and oust enterprises based on the classical economic market model. Cinema is no exception and occupies a significant part of the modern culture of many countries. Therefore, cinema tokenization is also necessary and justified. In many countries, the film industry is a significant sector of the economy. The production of a film is a costly and laborious process, and only a spectator with his money can appreciate this colossal work of many people. The collected money from the distribution of the picture is always an accurate indicator of the success of the film. The more money the picture collects, the more interesting and more importantly the movie story is closer to the viewer. In the movie business, the viewer votes with money, and in our case a crypto with a LUMIERE coin. Investing in a movie project at an early stage preprodaknsh - always more profitable. In this case, the investor receives a significant discount of 10-20%. The more pictures and serials will be shot, the better the film production will be, which will constantly be focused on the viewer, on his emotional needs and such a movie will collect the necessary funds and pay back the production of bringing profit to the authors of the film and its investors. THE INTERNATIONAL BLOCKCHAIN NETWORK OF INDEPENDENT CINEMATOGRAPHERS IS AN EVOLUTION IN WORLD CINEMA!

Name: Continuum Motion Pictures
Description:
Continuum Motion Pictures is a motion picture production and distribution company based in Los Angeles, CA. Continuum has produced numerous feature films, short films, web series, and music videos and has distributed over one hundred titles for film and television.

Originally founded in the San Francisco Bay Area, the Continuum team relocated to Los Angeles after successfully producing their first three feature films. Since then, the Continuum team has worked with a wide variety of writers, actors, and directors, making films in a range of genres, including horror, romance, comedies, dramas, action, and LGBTQ themed films. Continuum has given many up-and-coming filmmakers their first films, guiding them through the entire production process.

As a production company, Continuum strives to make the highest quality films for the right budget. Our creativity is driven by the desire to tell interesting original stories with unique characters showing the full spectrum of the human experience.

As a distributor, Continuum, in partnership with Matriarch Multimedia, Inc., continues to help filmmakers from throughout the world get their films, no matter its size or budget, find an audience here in North America through any available platform.

Name: Escuela Nacional de Experimentación y Realización Cinematográfica
Description:
La Escuela Nacional de Experimentación y Realización Cinematográfica (ENERC) nació con la Ley de Cinematografía que creó el Instituto Nacional de Cine en 1957. Además del organismo que se fundaba, se estipulaba en el Art. 17, inciso F, la creación y participación en el sostenimiento de un Centro Experimental destinado a la formación de cineastas, que se puso en marcha en el año 1965, cuando la Dirección del Instituto Nacional de Cinematografía era ejercida por el Lic. Alfredo J. Grassi. 
Actualmente la normativa legal vigente (Ley 17.711 t.o. 2001 y Decreto 1536/2002) prevé su mantenimiento.

En 1999, el Decreto Nro. 201 modificaba el nombre de Centro por el de Escuela, reconociéndose en la denominación de esta entidad la esencial característica de su actividad, la de ser “una unidad de enseñanza”.

Durante el transcurso de 40 años la ENERC, en su carácter de única Escuela Nacional dependiente del INCAA, ha continuado adquiriendo jerarquía y relevancia a nivel nacional e internacional, a través de los innumerables premios obtenidos por la participación en Festivales Nacionales e Internacionales en los que han concursado trabajos fílmicos de sus alumnos.
Location: Ciudad Autónoma de Buenos Aires, Provincia de Buenos Aires

Name: Viacom International Studios UK
Description:
Viacom International Studios UK is the Bafta winning TV production arm of Viacom in the UK
Our mission is to create great programmes in a variety of genres. We have already made programmes for Channel 5, MTV, Spike, 5Star and Comedy Central.
We develop and produce a wide range of shows, mainly in the genres of Factual, Comedy, Entertainment and Reality.  
We're a friendly company based in the heart of Camden.  We're always on the look out for great production talent, from Runners to Executive Producers, if that's you then please email your CV to recruitmentviacomstudiosuk@viacomstudiosuk.com

Name: Night VFX Studios
Description:
Night VFX Studios is not all about work, but it is all about teamwork which delivers results and rises beyond expectations. Starting in 2021, we are in the nascent stage of our journey, but that does not mean we are short of experience. Our team comprises 50+ team members with more than 15+ years of experience in the disposal.

Night VFX Studios have supported visual effects and CGI work for clients and other VFX companies worldwide. Within our short journey, we had completed around 30+ projects, and this number is rising spontaneously.

Name: Directors Guild of Canada, British Columbia
Description:
The Directors Guild of Canada, British Columbia District Council (DGC BC) represents the key creative and logistical personnel in the film and television industry in British Columbia. The DGC BC Collective Agreement covers the categories of Director, 2nd Unit Director, Production and Unit Manager, First, Second and Third Assistant Director, Additional Assistant Director - Background Coordinator, Location Manager, Assistant Location Manager, Location Scout and Production Assistant who also work as Trainees in the Location and Assistant Directing Departments.

The DGC BC signs productions to secure work opportunities for its Members, representing their interests through the negotiation and administration of DGC BC Collective Agreement and engages in extensive industry advocacy and lobbying activities at the provincial and municipal levels.

Name: Groene Stad Achter De Duinen
Description:
Steun ons en wordt donateur of zelfs partner in het maken van een sprookjesachtig mooie natuurdocumentaire over de biodiversiteit van de natuur met de stad Den Haag en omstreken als middelpunt daarvan zowel boven als onder water die o.a. deel uitmaakt van het “Nationaal Park Hollandse Duinen”. Wij maken deze documentaire niet uit winst bejag, maar voor ons algemeen nut.

Wil jij ons steunen en helpen? ... Wordt dan donateur of zelfs partner! -GA EN KIJK DAN OP ONZE WEBSITE-

Wij makers willen de kijker op een ongedwongen manier verleiden oog te krijgen voor de natuur, nieuwsgierigheid opwekken en zo betrokkenheid vergroten. In beeld wordt gebracht: De Noordzee met haar unieke kuststrook waar het strand niet mag ontbreken, ons schitterend duingebied, fantastische bossen, heerlijke parken en waterpartijen met een fascinerend onderwaterleven waar onze Hofvijver en stukjes groen in de stad ook deel van uitmaken.

Name: Mukta Arts
Description: Mukta Arts Limited engages in the production, distribution, and exhibition of films in India. It operates through Software Division, Equipment Division, Education, Theatrical Exhibition Division, and Others segments. The Software Division segment is involved in film/TV production and distribution operations. This segment produces/co-produces movies and television content, as well as offers related services; and acquires movie rights for overseas and Indian distribution. The Equipment Division segment provides production equipment to other production houses and independent producers on hire. The Education segment operates an education, research, and training institute that offer training in various skills related to films, television, and the media industry. The Theatrical Exhibition Division segment comprises various services offered at theatres, including the sale of tickets, catering of food and beverages, and providing advertising services at theatres, as well as related services. The Others segment engages in the facility rental business. Mukta Arts Limited was founded in 1978 and is based in Mumbai, India.

Name: FESTIVAL SCOPE
Description:
Festival Scope Pro (pro.festivalscope.com) is the B2B platform for film professionals only, allowing programming of festivals to be viewed online.
Festival Scope (www.festivalscope.com) is the new platform open to film lovers worldwide. As in a virtual theater, films are available for a limited audience and during a limited period of time.

Description: Filaments Visual Effects is your one stop solution for Visual Effects, 3D Conversion, Rotoscoping, Digital Paint, Matchmoving and Compositing. Our creative leads were awarded Academy Certificates for outstanding VFX work in 'The Triangle' in the year 2005. In 2008, our work claimed an Emmy award for HBO mini series 'John Adams'. In the coming years, we are committed to serve our clients with the uncompromised quality of our award winning work.

La compañía está formada por algunas de las empresas más importantes del sector audiovisual: Alta Films, El Deseo, Golem, Wanda Visión y Tornasol Films.

Name: Palm Springs International Film Society
Description:
Palm Springs International Film Society strives for a world in which enlightenment, knowledge and tolerance prevail. We believe film as an art form has the power to bridge cultures and illuminate the universality of the human experience.

The Palm Springs International Film Society is a 501(c)(3) charitable non-profit organization whose mission is to cultivate and promote the art and science of film through education and cross-cultural awareness.

The Palm Springs International Festival of Short Films and the Palm Springs International Film Festival are presented under the auspices of the Film Society and are dedicated to nurturing and encouraging new filmmaking talent, honoring the great masters of world cinema and providing audiences with a unique opportunity to engage in an appreciation of and a conversation about the art of cinema as it is represented around the world.

Name: Treinta&Seis.
Description: Audiovisual production company that stands out for its innovative and passionate approach to creating impactful videos and commercials. Its Grammy-winning track record demonstrates excellence in high-quality content production, especially in music videos. With a vision that merges the global and the local, they create compelling narratives that capture the essence of diverse cultures.

Name: LADYBIRD
Description:
Nossa potência nasce da diferença e da criatividade sob múltiplas perspectivas. Somos um espaço de conexão entre diferentes backgrounds interessados nas transformações do mundo. Transformamos identidade em narrativa audiovisual.
Prazer somos A LADYBIRD 

_

Our power is born from difference and creativity from multiple perspectives. We are a space of connection between different backgrounds interested in the transformations of the world. We transform identity into film narrative.
Nice to meet, we are LADYBIRD

Name: UPTERNAL
Description:
Upternal is a hub of resources and services that assist you in achieving your business and professional goals. As a dynamic e-commerce platform, we provide a variety of products and services to support your success.

From in-depth online courses to inspiring ebooks, we offer high-quality resources that will expand your knowledge and skills. Additionally, our services will undoubtedly provide the support you need to enhance your business or improve your professionalism in the workplace.

We believe that investing in self-development and business growth is the key to long-term success. Therefore, Upternal is here to provide beneficial and inspirational solutions for your journey towards growth and success.

Name: CineMan Productions Limited
Description:
CineMan – A name adjacent to the revival of Gujarati Films, started in 2010 with an intention to provide film making solutions with its creativity, quality and advertising insights. What started with ad films has evolved into setting milestones with super hit Gujarati feature films – ‘Kevi Rite Jaish’, ‘Bey Yaar’ and 'Wrong Side Raju'.

CineMan has not only catered entertainment to the masses but has also been pivotal in providing film-making solutions to the corporate world. While we work across various platforms, our core competence lies in TV commercials, Social Media Films & Corporate Films.

CineMan has been serving to brand categories from FMCG to Education, Real estate to Lifestyle, Electronics to Furniture, Cosmetics to Technology. Some of our esteemed clients are N K Proteins, Goyal & Co., Cinepolis, Sintex Plastics, Symphony Coolers, Tradebulls, HOF, Shankar Packaging,  Sharpex, Vimal Oil, Venus Lifespace, Flourish Pure Foods, Endeavor, Nirma University, Gaay Chaap Besan, Shatayu foundation, Marwadi University, Yours Masala, Uber Urban, Korndrop oil, Gulmohar Greens, Angur Toor dal,  Shankar Packaging, Pacifica group and many more.

Name: BIG PIC MEDIA LIMITED
Description: BIG PIC MEDIA LIMITED is a supplier to the Media and Entertainment Industry with offices in London and Los Angeles supplying solutions to companies big and small.

Name: The Guild of Television Camera Professionals
Description:
We are an independent, international organisation that cares about television camerawork and the people who make it their craft. Our members are cameramen and camerawomen who operate video and film cameras professionally in all areas of television.

As well as providing an extensive programme of workshops and seminars which are free to members, we publish a regular glossy magazine full of stories of interest to cameramen, as well as an informative and topical newsletter specifically for our members.

We run an active members' email forum where cameramen from all around the world exchange ideas, advice, experiences and information; we have direct contact with leading camera manufacturers and broadcasting organisations; and we offer an online 'search for a cameraman' facility featuring members' CVs.

Name: ZOE Films
Description:
Hello! We are ZOE Films.

Our DNA is made out of our passion to create. Our goal is to transform great ideas into state-of-the-art film productions that thrive in capturing the spirit and culture of our clients. Speaking of spirit, that's what "ZOE" means! It's a greek word that can be translated to "life energy" "essence" or… "soul". So, over 17 years, we had the pleasure to produce over 2000 films, displaying the unique spirit and values of some of the world's biggest brands.

From this moment on, we will share this passion with you, using this platform to showcase a little bit of this rich universe, bringing inspiration and references to all who seek to understand the method behind our creative process and our professional filmmaking HUB, working tirelessly in Latin America, the United States and Europe.

Here you will learn more about ZOE, our storytelling culture and our determination to be a creator of great stories.

Come learn more about us!

Name: NOMO Films
Description: NOMO creates and shapes emotion through cinematic commercials, documentaries, music videos, and films. We're a sleeves-up studio that defiantly pursues work the world wants to talk about. Our headquarters are based in New York and Toronto and our remote creative team spans the globe, enabling us to produce works in over 50 countries to date.

Name: FabriKHAS
Description:
AB ve Türkiye Cumhuriyeti tarafından finanse edilen FabriKHAS, Rekabetçi Sektörler Programı kapsamında Kadir Has Üniversitesi Yaratıcı Endüstriler Platformu tarafından yürütülmektedir.

Kadir Has Üniversitesi Yaratıcı Endüstriler Platformu çatısı altında yürütülen FabriKHAS; kurumsal bir yenilik ve üretim merkezidir. Filmden televizyona, dijital içerikten VR/AR çözümüne kadar uzanan bir alanda yer almaktadır.

Name: Incognita Studio
Description:
Incognita Studio est un groupe de production audiovisuelle indépendant réunissant six labels créatifs portés par 13 producteurs et productrices. Né du rapprochement entre Incognita et CLPB Media en 2024, le studio développe et produit une grande diversité de formats : fictions, cinéma, documentaire, captation de spectacle vivant ou défilé de mode. 
Fort d’un catalogue éclectique de plus de 1000 heures distribué à l’international, Incognita Studio développe des œuvres exigeantes qui résonnent avec les imaginaires contemporains. Les différents labels du groupes travaillent avec tous les grands diffuseurs - hertziens, payants ou streamers. 

Parmi ses dernières productions marquantes, on retrouve Connemara d’Alex Lutz (Cannes Première), Gucci : Luxe, drame et volupté pour Arte, la collection César Wagner (France 2), Visions (TF1), Gomorra, Anti-mafia Manifesto (Arte) ou encore Ravel en mille éclats avec la Philharmonie de Paris… 

Ses labels : Incognita Film, Incognita TV, Incognita Doc, Hanoï Production, CPB Films, CPB Doc, Camera Lucida et Incognita Distribution.

Mstar is a creative collective, with capacity to undertake projects CGI and postproduction.
Accredited by three Distinction of FXanimation school. Mstar masters the process of creating visual elements used in the current media.
We work with several companies to provide content for 3D mapping, advertising, internet and cinema.

Description: Productora audiovisual constituida con el propósito de lograr producciones independientes y recalar en el panorama audiovisual español, con el fin de ofrecer un nuevo punto de vista donde cada proyecto goce de identidad y vida propia.

Name: Actaeon Films
Description:
Actaeon Films is a London-based production company incorporated in July 2004 by director Daniel Cormack to produce feature-length theatrical motion pictures.

Our focus is on producing British films with international appeal across a range of budgets, that use elements of established cinematic genres in fresh and innovative ways that will entertain and challenge a broad range of audiences.

Our films use striking narratives – which combine contemporary resonance with deeper universal and timeless themes – first-rate screenwriting and a singular cinematic vision to attract the best actors, technicians and production and distribution partners.

Our short form work includes the Tiscali Award-winning 35mm melodrama Amelia and Michael (2007) starring Anthony Head, the UK Film Council-completion funded A Fitting Tribute (2007) and the micro-short comedy Nightwalking (2008).

Name: Cinergy Pictures
Description:
Cinergy Pictures Private Limited (promoted by Mr. Sheetal Talwar and Mr. Madhu Mantena) is a prominent Film Production company(has produced films like Mausam, Rann, Rakhta Charitra, Jhoota Hi Sahi, Dharm).

It has been associated with talent from across the various facets of film entertainment, including top directors such as Ram Gopal Varma, Abbas Tyrewala, Pankaj Kapur, Srijit Mukherji, National award winning Bhavna Talwar and stars such as Amitabh Bachchan, Riteish Deshmukh, Shahid Kapur, Sonam Kapoor, Vivek Oberoi, Suriya Shivakumar, Nandana Sen etc . Cinergy entered Hollywood through a co-production partnership with Echolake Productions to produce Demi Moore starrer “The Joneses”.

Name: Bergs Productions
Description:
Bergs Productions is a professional video production company aimed at creating high quality visual content for social media platforms, promotional content and capturing events with creative flair.

Let us help you grow your business in the digital space.

Name: BLUEARTH PRODUCTION
Description: BLUEARTH PRODUCTION is a motion pictures and film company based out of 51 RUE DE L EVECHE, Marseille, Provencealpescôted’azur, France.

Name: Independent Films Nederland B.V.
Description: Sinds 2000 brengt Independent Films Nederland BV een grote verscheidenheid aan films uit op Nederlandse bodem. Met succesvolle titels als GOOISCHE VROUWEN, ALLES OP TAFEL, PADDINGTON, JOHN WICK, THE HUNGER GAMES, AFTER, BENEDETTA, DE TATTA'S en LA LA LAND is Independent Films een van de grootste onafhankelijke filmdistributeurs in Nederland.

Name: NKFR (No Kidding For Real)
Description:
We represent (film) directors, photographers, storytellers, and creative producers, based in Thailand & France and working worldwide.

We partner with brands, agencies, and production companies to create films, campaigns, and branded content that connect across audiences, platforms, and mindsets.

Our team has worked across every side of the industry: brand, agency, and production. We bring a real-world understanding of what matters to you, your brief, and the people you answer to.

From live-action and photography to 2D/3D animation and virtual production, we bring bold ideas to life with precision, empathy, and craft.

No Kidding For Real is more than a name. 
It’s our promise to keep the passion alive.
To honor the dream that got us into this. 
To create the kind of work we once only imagined.
And to do it with people we believe in.

Name: Alessio Bertotti
Description:
Alessio Bertotti is an independent Visual Effects Supervisor for Feature Films, TV Series, Commercials and Music Videos.

After a decade of working abroad on hi-end projects in international studios, he co-founded Alps Studios in Turin, helping to grow it in one of the most relevant VFX facilities in Italy.

His career started through Print Graphic and Video Editing, moved into 3D Rendering at first, then Motion Graphics Design and Animation. This led into VFX, working for all kinds of shows and covering different roles, from 3D Generalist to Compositor, as part of big and small teams or team leading and supervising.

Nowadays Alessio is mainly working client side with production companies, supervising the VFX from the early stages of script reading and location scouting, through the shooting and during the post-production. The goal is always to find the best solutions to balance time and budget but, most of all, the quality of the final product.

Name: INSIDER TV
Description:
INTV is a publishing and content marketing company focused on travel and lifestyle.

INTV empowers travellers to make the most of their stay in Asia-Pacific’s top cities.


Combining passionate storytelling, first-class video production, and a unique distribution network, we deliver brand exposure to a highly qualified target audience and are proven to influence travellers' decision-making processes.

Every month we create many hours of original travel content for some of the most respected brands in the region.

Name: Arcade Film Factory
Description: The Arcade Film Factory has been around since 2019. It is a young, hungry, and awesome production company that creates anything you can watch on a screen. Created by a group of directors who are not as young but still hungry, and awesome, The Arcade Film Factory cast of characters has created some of the most amazing content you will ever see. Videos, Shows, Ads and Films so magnificent, your heart will explode. Are you ready?

Name: Take The Shot Films
Description:
Incorporated in 2020, Take The Shot Films (TTSF) brings together talent in all spheres of film production - writing, producing, directing, cinematography, editing, music and sound design. Having worked together on multiple projects over the years, the founding team came together to bring some interesting concepts to life. 

While we want to create rich, entertaining and compelling pieces of cinema, we also want to make significant strides towards our work being socially and environmentally conscious. Across all genres of filmmaking, we want to explore themes of freedom, equality and justice, albeit in an entertaining fashion... and with style! 

When we are ready for battle, the camera is our weapon of choice and we are never afraid to Take The Shot!

Name: Twister Film
Description: Twisterfilm è una Casa di Produzione con sede a Roma, Milano e Torino. In attività dal 2000, è oggi tra le più importanti realtà del settore. Commercial, Tv- Branded, Digital Production, ADV | Cinema e Intrattenimento

Name: The Good Media Network
Description:
CONNECT
INSPIRE
TRANSFORM
CONNECT
INSPIRE
TRANSFORM

Creating impactful events, campaigns, and media that amplify your mission and drive meaningful change.

We love good Storytelling!
 
At The Good Media Network, we believe that impactful storytelling is the bridge between awareness and action. By uniting diverse voices and crafting compelling narratives, we strive to inspire meaningful change and foster a more just and sustainable world.
- Vivian Schröder, Impact Director and Co-Founder
 

Transformative Event Experiences

We design and produce immersive events that make a difference. Whether it’s conferences, symposia, or festivals, our expertise lies in creating dynamic formats that seamlessly combine in-person and virtual elements. The result? Greater reach, deeper engagement, and lasting impact. From concept to execution, we collaborate with you to ensure every event tells a compelling story and delivers measurable results.

 
Building Impact Networks

We’re passionate about connecting people who care. By creating intersectional networks, we bridge diverse sectors—storytellers, academics, grassroots organizations, and foundations—so they can collaborate and amplify their collective voice. These networks foster shared learning, innovation, and action, helping to drive meaningful change on a global scale.

 
Impact Campaigns That Inspire

Your vision deserves to inspire transformation. Our strategic consulting services help you design campaigns that resonate deeply with audiences, sparking action toward a more just and sustainable future. From ideation to execution, we help you craft messaging that creates a ripple effect, turning your ideas into movements.

 
Purpose-Driven Media Production

Every mission needs the right tools to shine. We create powerful, sustainable, and purpose-driven media—trailers, educational films, and short videos—that elevate your story and align with your goals.

Name: Post Bail
Description:
Design | Motion | VFX

Post Bail specializes in 3D Design and Animation, as well as 3D visual effects. Post Bail is passionate about creating stunning visuals that bring ideas to life and is currently accepting new projects and collaborations with companies and clients alike.

With over 10 years of experience in the industry, Post Bail’s technical expertise and creative ingenuity help to deliver exceptional outcomes. Whether you need a captivating product animation, simulation or visualization, we can bring your vision to life.

Post Bail works collaboratively with clients to ensure that their ideas are fully realized, and is committed to providing exceptional service throughout the entire project. The studio is equipped with state-of-the-art hardware and software, and is up-to-date with the latest trends and technologies to ensure all clients receive the best possible results.

If you are in search of a dependable and skilled studio to bring your project to fruition, please don't hesitate to reach out. Post Bail is eager to learn about your project and assist you in realizing your vision!

Services include creative, design, motion, post-production for film, TV, advertisement and interactive location based experiences.

Name: The Film Office & FilmHub.co.uk
Description:
Our expertise is in film, event and creative location management.
Our passion: in supporting the UK’s cultural & creative industries.
Our strength: in our network, proven ability & unparalleled track-record.

www.filmoffice.co.uk

and

Name: FilmFinance.App
Description:
FilmFinance.App enables filmmakers and production houses to raise funds for their projects directly from their own network. It provides a structured and professional way to present film projects to potential investors, ensuring transparency and credibility in the fundraising process.

The platform allows users to create customized fundraising pages, manage investor interactions, and track contributions. Transactions records are secured using Algorand, offering transparency and accountability to all stakeholders.

By providing a dedicated fundraising tool tailored to the film industry, FilmFinance.App helps filmmakers take control of their funding efforts while ensuring a seamless and efficient process for investors.

https://allmylinks.com/filmfinanceapp

#FilmFinanceApp #Filmmaking #FilmFunding #FilmProducers #InvestorRelations #FilmTech #SaaSForFilmmakers

Name: Sarasota Film Festival
Description: The Sarasota Film Festival is a 501(c)(3) organization, committed to celebrating the art of filmmaking and the contribution of filmmakers by hosting an international film festival each Spring, and developing year-long programs for the economic, educational, and cultural benefit of our community.

Name: Stunts Spectacular
Description: STUNTS SPECTACULAR for spectacular stunts, features the elite, premiere Stunt Coordinators/Second Unit Directors, Stuntmen and Stuntwomen for all media markets for features and television in domestic and international productions.

Name: Lightbridge – CRLS Precision Reflectors
Description:
Lightbridge is a leading manufacturer in the film and photography industry, specializing in Precision (Cine) Reflectors. With a commitment to delivering high-quality products Lightbridge has become a trusted name among professionals in the field.

The Precision Reflectors are known for their superior light quality making them a popular choice for filmmakers and photographers alike. 

Lightbridge is committed to providing excellent customer service, and their knowledgeable staff is always available to assist customers with any questions or concerns they may have. Whether you're a seasoned professional or just starting out in the industry, Lightbridge has the products and expertise you need to take your work to the next level.

It's important to note that the inventor of the CRLS Cine Reflect Lighting System, was DoP Christian Berger. With his extensive experience in cinematography, Berger recognized the need for a reliable and flexible lighting system that could adapt to the challenges of shooting on location. He developed the CRLS system to provide a versatile and effective solution for lighting setups in a range of settings, from indoor studios to outdoor environments.

Lightbridge is proud to continue building on his legacy by delivering  highest quality products to the film and photography industry.

Name: Jewish Film Institute
Description: The Jewish Film Institute (JFI) is a San Francisco Bay Area-based nonprofit organization that champions bold films and filmmakers that expand and evolve the Jewish story for audiences everywhere. JFI supports the careers of filmmakers from the Bay Area and beyond, from incubation through exhibition, through its grants, residencies, and other creative development services. As the presenter of the annual San Francisco Jewish Film Festival (SFJFF), the first and most renowned festival of its kind, JFI has helped to launch the careers of emerging filmmakers and highlighted previously untold stories from Jewish communities around the world.

Name: UltraStar Cinemas
Description:
UltraStar Cinemas continues to focus on providing great movie-going experiences to all its guests.  Currently operating the Mission Valley Cinemas at the Hazard Center, UltraStar Cinemas prides itself on finding great technology and partner companies to enhance the movie going experience.   As the first Cinema Chain in the nation to complete a Digital Cinema roll out on 100% of its screens UltraStar remains an innovator in the exhibition industry.    Other great industry firsts for UltraStar include Installing life saving AED’s in all its locations.  Rolling out the first commercial installation of D-Box Motion Seats. & installing one of the first commercial deployments of Panavision’s new 3D technology. In 2012 UltraStar rolled out the UltraLuxe, a sit down in seat service as well as a small cafe serving beer and wine.    

UltraStar Cinemas continues to look for new opportunities to build, manage or acquire new locations.  We also remain open to working with and beta testing new emerging technologies that improve the movie going experience for our guests.

Name: Mustfilm
Description: Creative Social Media Agency

Name: TAPE
Description:
TAPE est un studio de création audiovisuelle situé dans le 10ème arrondissement de Paris.

Le studio est spécialisé dans la production, conception et réalisation de films annonces, publicités, programmes courts et vidéos digitales.

visitez notre site !

www.tape-prod.fr

Name: Body Stories Project Inc.
Description: We are Body Stories Project, a nonprofit of artists with a collective vision that started back in 2020 during the covid-19 lockdown in Mumbai, and today we continue to work on by delivering movies with a focus on emotional healing (healing cinema), defined by us as audiovisual expressions intended to bring peacefulness, awareness and self reflection among our audiences.

Name: The Art of Movie Making Film Festival
Description:
The Art of Movie Making Film Festival, affectionately known as the TAMMIES, is not your typical film fest. This Fest focuses on the artists who create the props, sets, costumes, special effects, and other behind-the-scenes elements of film and television production and is a celebration of the creative and technical work that goes into bringing stories to life on screen. These are the unsung heroes of movie magic who are not usually granted categories in Film Fests.

!!NEW IN 2024!!
 Best Game Video and Best Puppet Design Categories added
 All Student fees 5.00 for all deadlines
 New Front-runner deadline with $10/$5 Student/$5 Gold fees - take advantage of extra deep discounts while we solidify our 2024 in person event plans.
Endorsed by Director Mark Polish, known for for Twin Falls Idaho (1999), Murmur (2022) and The Astronaut Farmer (2006), "The Art of Movie Making Film Fest is a tremendous and unique opportunity for behind-the-scenes talent in the film industry. Anyone who is working on special effects, props, costumes, makeup, and other below the line roles and contributing to the arts of film should consider submitting."

That said, our festival provides a unique opportunity for filmmakers, fans, and industry professionals to come together and appreciate the art and craftsmanship that goes into creating memorable and immersive film and television experiences. Our goal is not only to celebrate these talented artists but also give them an opportunity to gain credibility for their portfolio and get connected to studios and production companies that hire these types of artists and makers for their feature length films.

Name: Butterflies In The Stomach
Description: Every day you have the option to do something different. It's your choice ! Todo dia você tem a opção de fazer algo diferente. A escolha é sua !

Name: MAGNIFY
Description:
MAGNIFY (formerly Magnolia Pictures International) is the international sales arm of Magnolia Pictures overseeing a diverse catalog of more than 100 features from Magnolia Pictures and 2929 Productions.

Over the years, MAGNIFY has worked on the international distribution of groundbreaking documentaries including RBG, ASSASSINS, JIRO DREAMS OF SUSHI, HAIL SATAN?, THE WOLFPACK, and IRIS; critically acclaimed narratives such as SWAN SONG, QUEEN OF GLORY, TANGERINE, LISTEN, MARS ONE; and genre films THE EYES OF MY MOTHER, MAYDAY, and THE WIND.

Most recent MAGNIFY acquisitions include Sundance Hit LITTLE RICHARD: I AM EVERYTHING, Sundance & Berlinale winner KOKOMO CITY, SXSW selections CORA BORA and I USED TO BE FUNNY, Cannes Un Certain Regard selection and Argentina's Oscar Submission for the 96th Academy Awards THE DELINQUENTS, Venice Orrizonti selection HESITATION WOUND, Sundance World Competition title VENI VIDI VICI, Taiwanese fencing thriller PIERCE, Cannes Directors’ Fortnight selection CHRISTMAS EVE IN MILLER’S POINT, and Venice Orizzonti selection HAPPYEND.

Name: Kirofilms
Description: Collectif de 18 jeunes passionnés et diplômés d'une école de cinéma, nous avons pour projet de vous faire découvrir un nouveau projet tous les mois (court-métrage, clip, moyen-métrage...) ainsi que des making-of et interviews pour une immersion totale dans notre processus de création.

Name: Castel Film Studio
Description:
Castel Film Studios is the largest full-service private studio and film Production Company in Romania and one of the most important in Central and Eastern Europe.

Our infrastructure includes: 9 Modern Soundstages fully equipped - each stage has separate facilities; one of the largest soundstage in Continental Europe: 3250 square meters, a 37 hectares backlot including 15 hectares of forest available for set construction; direct access to the largest lake with 1000 meters waterfront. We also have one stage located in downtown Bucharest with separate offices, dressing rooms and lunch area.
 
Castel Film Studios  presentes  itself with a complete range of production services, a highly skilled labor force, competitive set construction rates, comprehensive hospitality services that includes catering and craft  for more then 600 people daily.

Involved in the production of over 160 feature films for theatrical, TV, home video releases and docudramas and documentaries. International co-productions with Canada, France, Italy and collaboration with: Paramount, Miramax, Focus Features, Sony Pictures, Beacon,  HBO, Dimension Films, ABC Network, Section Eight, USA Network,  Kushner-Locke, Trimark Pictures, Full Moon Entertainment (USA), Granada Media, BOX TV (UK), Esqwad, JLA Production, Les Productions du Tresor, Raphael Films, Noe Productions.

Name: Filmmaker, Photographer, Visual Artist
Description:
Sherman is an award-winning filmmaker, photographer and visual artist. His practice has always centred on the human condition and our relationships with others within the larger milieu.

Sherman has premiered works in Art Biennales, major Film Festivals and Museums around the world, including the Venice, Singapore and Jakarta Biennales, Mori Art Museum Tokyo, Fukuoka Asian Art Museum, Martin-Gropius-Bau Berlin, Musee du Quai Branly Paris, Centre Pompidou Paris, Institute of Contemporary Arts London, Noorderlicht Photo Festival, Rotterdam International Film Festival, VideoBrasil International Electronic Art Festival, Singapore Art Museum, Centro Cultural Banco do Brasil, Philippines Cultural Centre, South Australia Contemporary Art Centre and Vilnius Contemporary Art Centre, Lithuania. He has held solo exhibitions in Singapore, New York, Amsterdam, Tokyo, Fukuoka and Siem Reap, and artist residencies in Japan, Vietnam and Tanzania.

As an educator, he conducted workshops in Singapore, and in Cambodia together with Antoine d’Agata (Magnum) for Young Asian photographers. He is an Associate Artist of the Substation and the Artistic Manager for the Singapore International Photography Festival, and has served as a jury at various film festivals. In 2009, he was invited to participate in the Singapore Pavilion, Venice Biennale which garnered a Special Mention for Ming Wong/Singapore Pavilion, a major honour for Singapore.

Name: Chapman/Leonard Studio Equipment, Inc.
Description: Chapman Studio Equipment was established in 1945. In later years it teamed up with Leonard Studio Equipment in 1965 thus creating Chapman/Leonard Studio Equipment , Inc. Chapman/Leonard Studio Equipment, Inc. has provided camera support equipment for the film industry for the past 70+ years. Since its beginning, Chapman/Leonard has always manufactured and rented camera support equipment for motion picture and television use. One of the initial producers to use the first of our automatic leveling location cranes was Cecil B. DeMille in his epic film, "The Ten Commandments," proving Chapman's equipment essential for top quality and specialized camera movements. Today Chapman/Leonard Studio Equipment leases and rents camera support equipment worldwide. Chapman's number one goal has always been ultimate creativity with utmost safety.

Name: Trilogy Films
Description:
Trilogy Films is a full service film and television production company. We have a special fondness for social justice documentaries and independent feature films but we love any good story!

We have worked with or for The Walt Disney Company, ABC News, AETN, History, Al Roker Productions, Smithsonian Networks, KETC, St. Louis (PBS), AR7 and Westpark Pictures.

We also have significant business expertise, including experience structuring debt and equity financing transactions, and negotiating commercial contracts. Using this unique combination of industry knowledge and business and legal experience, we are able to develop and produce programming that is not only compelling, but also commercially viable.

Tell us your story.

Name: 59 en Conserva
Description:
Spiritually founded in 1959, 59 en Conserva produces author-driven, arthouse documentary and hybrid films with a strong commitment to the subjects, society and cinema as an art form.

59 en Conserva’s films screened at Berlinale, Edinburgh International Film Festival, Visions du Réel, Hong Kong, Rencontres Internationales du Documentaire de Montréal, IDFA, Sheffield Doc/Fest, États Généraux du Film Documentaire, Doclisboa, DOK Leipzig, Festival dei Popoli, FICUNAM, Málaga and Seville, among other film festivals. They have also been awarded in France, Italy, Portugal, Romania, Argentina, Ukraine, USA and Spain.

Beyond its own non-fiction projects, 59 en Conserva also serves as an executive producer for other production companies and independent filmmakers, providing executive production services in the fields of documentary, fiction and animation cinema and with a proven track record working on film projects up to 3M €.

Name: Lyon & Associates Creative Services, Inc.
Description:
Remarkable stories. Told well.
LYON is an award-winning advertising, design, and film production shop in Solana Beach, California. Founded in 1990, we've worked with a variety of companies and nonprofit organizations, including some of the world's biggest and best-known brands. We're also proud of the work we've done for smaller clients. We're pretty small ourselves, which seems to suit everyone just fine.

Name: Holly Weird Film Festival
Description:
The Holly Weird Film Festival (HWFF), founded by Festival Director Jack Truman, celebrates independent films of all genres that feature a distinct vision, a unique voice, or an avant-garde challenge to what is expected or accepted. HWFF provides a venue for narrative, documentary, experimental and avant-garde film and video. Holly Weird is dedicated to celebrating all types of creativity from the worldwide independent film community.

We make it our mission to showcase the work of filmmakers who defy independent visions.

The Holly Weird Film Festival has become a platform for artists to showcase their creativity through film and about the voices that need to be heard. We are looking for true original, visionary filmmakers with fresh voices to share with an audience hungry for true independent film. We are focused on the unique and innovative. HWFF showcases artists from all walks of life. We seek to screen under-represented emerging filmmakers and artists.

Name: Edko Films Ltd
Description: Edko has distributed for Hong Kong and China mainland over 1500 movie titles including box office successes such as Lust, Caution, Secret, Brokeback Mountain as well as awarded and art-house movies like Pan's Labyrinth, Crash, Lives of the Others, Volver, Dogville, and 3 Idiots.

Name: ExChanges vfx
Description:
Built by a team with over 25 years of collaborative experience, in 2015 ExChanges reached its final structure.

A structure that has been designed to accomplish our customers goals in the most effective way, always giving priority to visual quality.

ExChanges has always believed in an artistic approach to post production, thus allowing to be an optimal choice also in the design and pre production step.

Exchanges will be able to support you for all the production process, from physical effects up to visual effects of last generation.

Name: TRILOGY FILM
Description: Trilogy Film is an EU production company based out of Bucharest, Romania. For over two decades we have been producing TVCs, patiently amassing know-how and resources that we are now also using to initiate, develop and co-produce scripted content.

Name: On Black Media
Description: With audio-visual creativity flowing through our veins, On Black Media strives to produce high-quality content for clients from multiple industries. Our clients include Amazon, Reliance Jio, Bitclass, Tagz, Sizmic and more. We have produced content such as TVC's, Digital Ads, Corporate Documentaries, Music Videos, Product Commercials and Award-winning Short Films.

Name: CINEATLAS
Description:
CINEATLAS est une nouvelle enseigne de cinémas PREMIUMS avec pour ambition de déployer son réseau au Maghreb et en Afrique Francophone.

http://www.cineatlas.com

Name: Paris Images
Description: Depuis onze ans, la marque ombrelle réunit des temps forts complémentaires, destinés à promouvoir l’ensemble de la filière audiovisuelle et cinématographique française. Le Paris Images se déroule sur deux jours, et valorise l'écosystème des productions et des tournages avec le Paris Images Production Forum et les innovations technologiques dans le domaine des images de cinéma avec le Paris Images AFC Events. Dans ce cadre, de nombreuses conférences, ateliers, débats, études de cas, sont proposés aux professionnels, pensés et organisés par le CNC, la CST, la FICAM, l’AFC et Film Paris Region. Le Paris Images est une occasion unique de réfléchir à la place de la France dans le paysage cinématographique et audiovisuel mondial, sous les prismes économiques, techniques et artistiques.

Name: Freelance Digital 3D Artist/Video Editor/Compositor - Self Employeed
Postal pictures
Description:
Dirigida por Norman Christianson,  antes IV1/2, renovada, cuenta con mas de 500 spots publicitarios filmados 

Tambien directores exclusivos son Rodrigo Santos & Fernando Arzate. 

POSTAL PICTURES cuenta con una importante cartera de clientes como, Procter, GNP, Palacio de Hierro,Unilever, Pepsico y un largo etcétera.

Name: YELLOWEYES FILMS
Description:
Qui sommes-nous ?
YELLOWEYES FILMS, c’est une société de production qui vise à donner plus de visibilité aux femmes devant et derrière la caméra pour un regard plus féminin sur le monde par le biais de la fiction. 
Car je souhaite que les actrices, les scénaristes et les réalisatrices, puissent avoir enfin leur place où partager leur vision. 

On sait à quel point un film peut inspirer, influencer, les hommes, les femmes mais aussi la jeunesse dans sa construction, car oui, un film qui nous touche influence notre comportement, alors j’aimerai que l’on puisse voir sur les écrans des femmes non stéréotypés, des femmes valorisées autrement qu’en étant le faire valoir des hommes,  pour faire évoluer les mentalités grâce à une représentation plus équitable et diversifiée.
Les femmes actrices, scénaristes et réalisatrices sont essentielles pour améliorer les perspectives culturelles, la diversité et l'inclusion dans le cinéma. Elles offrent un nouveau point de vue et de nouvelles perspectives sur les questions et les thèmes qui représentent le monde aujourd'hui. 

Une plus grande diversité et inclusivité dans le cinéma signifie des contenus plus riches et plus variés qui peuvent refléter la vie et les expériences authentiques des personnes, et qui peuvent susciter plus d'émotions chez les spectateurs. 

De plus, en soutenant les femmes actrices, scénaristes et réalisatrices, nous nous assurons que les femmes ont les mêmes opportunités de s'exprimer dans l'industrie du cinéma et peuvent contribuer à façonner notre façon de voir et de comprendre le monde.

Au plaisir de vous rencontrer, 

Parce que le cinéma c'est aussi aller à la rencontre des autres, leur raconter des histoires, leur transmettre des émotions...
Que l'on soit dans la vie, derrière la caméra ou sur un siège de cinema, tout est une histoire de rencontre.

A bientôt !

Name: The Box Films
Description: The Box Films nasce nel 2005. Siamo una casa di produzione che opera per la pubblicità tv e stampa, cinema, contenuti digitali e piattaforme social. Siamo anche una "service company" per produzioni straniere. The Box Films si trova a Milano ma produce in tutto il mondo. Passione, Originalità e Creatività sono i caratteri del nostro DNA.

Name: FireCut AI
Description:
FireCut is the leading AI-powered video editing platform built to supercharge workflow of content creators, podcasters, and marketers. We offer automated editing solutions that dramatically cut down time spent on repetitive tasks—like removing silences, adding captions, zooms, layering B-roll and adding music and sound effects —so creators can focus on what matters most: storytelling and growth. Whether you’re editing short-form videos, full-length podcasts, or building a content library, FireCut delivers fast, high-quality results with just a few clicks. KINOWAR – U příležitosti výročí války v Ukrajině Kinovarta, pražská kina a spolky pořádají benefiční přehlídku současné ukrajinské kinematografie v Praze. Veškerý výtěžek ze vstupenek a darů bude směřován na podporu Ukrajiny.

U příležitosti třetího výročí války v Ukrajině za podpory pražských kin a spolků pořádají benefiční přehlídku současné ukrajinské kinematografie v Praze. Veškerý výtěžek ze vstupenek a darů bude směřován na podporu Ukrajiny.

KINOWAR2025 není pouze o unikátních filmech, které běžně divák neuvidí, není pouze o sběru prostředků - je to hlavně o komunitě o vyzdvižení debaty o agresivní invazi na Ukrajinu a neméně agresivních informačních a politických zásazích ruska po celé Evropě. Je to komunikační platforma, je to výzva ke konání, abychom ubránili  svobodu slova, demokracii.

Name: Breeder
Description:
Breeder is a motion design studio, bringing brands, products and content to life.

We take on projects we believe in and work with like-minded people. We collaborate from concept and design through to filming, animation and post-production: from injecting motion into every stage of the digital product lifecycle, through to TVCs, titles and video content directorial. 

If you’d like to see more work, discuss a project or collaborate, get in touch: hello@studiobreeder.com

Name: El Cosmonauta
Description:
Una película de ciencia ficción producida por muchas personas (y tú) desde sólo 2 euros. Es Creative Commons para que la edites, la copies, la remezcles y la compartas, como tú quieras. Gratis.

En 1975, el primer cosmonauta ruso en la Luna no consigue regresar, y se le da por perdido en el espacio. Él, sin embargo, a través de fantasmales mensajes de radio, clama haber vuelto a la Tierra y haberla encontrado vacía, sin un alma. Su irreal presencia y su voz irán destruyendo poco a poco el mundo de sus seres queridos.

Name: Black Sail Pictures GmbH
Description:
Black Sail Pictures is a boutique VFX studio located south of munich.
With an excellent team and over 10 years of experience we offer VFX Supervising, Compositing and CGI services, all tailored to your needs.
No matter if feature film, TV series or commercial we help you to bring your vision to the screen.

Name: Cimbalino Filmes
Description:
We like to present ourselves with what we do best: MOVIES, so here is a link to our portfolio: 
http://vimeo.com/cimbalinofilmes

We've been working to fit our customers' needs and goals, with the best both creative and technical options. We have equipment to fit every project's idiosyncrasy: from DSLR cameras to RED digital cinema camera, as well as LED dimmered and color controlled light panels and grip equipment.

Specialties: movies, virtual scenography, institutional movies, promotional movies, publicity, presentation movies, short movies, features, TV

Name: Strike Anywhere
Description:
Strike Anywhere is a creative studio that concepts and creates with brands, agencies and distributors. We are filmmakers who take pride in executing commercials, brand content, film and television that will inspire and mesmerize.

Strike Anywhere is a California-based company established in 2010 by Justin Barber, Michael Jacobs, Barry Jenkins, Ryan Simon, and Matt Woods.

Name: Wave Films
Description:
Wave Films is an end-to-end production company providing production services and creative productions for clients worldwide. Wave Films was founded in 2012 by acclaimed German producer Jerry Koedding and has worked on numerous local and international productions. Wave Films has honed its skills in delivering high-quality content while being particularly budget-efficient and cost-effective. 

We excel at fiction, non-fiction as well as corporate and commercial filming. Our corporate clients include international heavyweights like Macallan, Finnair, Essilor, Merck, Boston Consulting Group, Sanofi, and Puma. Our broadcast clients include reputable channels such as BBC, RTL, Antena 3, arte, MBC, ARD, and ITV.

Wave Films also actively promotes Singapore as a filming location for foreign producers (through www.filminsingapore.com). We help foreign producers to tell great stories in Singapore about Singapore. Beyond Singapore, we also have teams in Malaysia and the Philippines. We can produce across South East Asia through our network of partner producers in countries like Cambodia, Thailand, or Laos.

Name: Penzing Studios
Description:
A brand new major studio facility in Munich, Germany.

Situated at a former air base, our refurbished airplane hangars allow for productions of any scale in a creative setting and sustainable way.

With a special focus on digital and virtual production,
we are at the forefront of the transformative shifts underway in the way media and content are created.

Name: FACETS
Description:
Founded by Milos Stehlik in 1975, FACETS is a nonprofit that connects people to independent ideas through transformative film experiences.

FACETS is dedicated to creating platforms for thought-provoking films, important conversations, and community-driven education.

A landmark destination for generations of cinephiles, FACETS inspires audiences to actively engage with film, not simply as entertainment, but as a tool to bridge cultural divides, promote digital literacy skills, and expand perspectives through empathy-driven storytelling.

FACETS presents the Chicago International Children's Film Festival, one of only two Oscar-qualifying children's film festival in the world.

Name: ABRAMORAMA
Description:
Abramorama is the preeminent global distribution, marketing, and rights management partner for feature films and episodic programming, centered on music and social impact documentaries. An innovator in focused, niche film distribution, direct-to-consumer engagement, and live, event and digital cinema, Abramorama provides expertise and results to filmmakers and content owners worldwide. 

In its 20 years of operation, Abramorama has been the trusted film partner to many of the most respected global brands in entertainment: The Beatles, Stevie Nicks, Neil Young, Laurie Anderson, Jimi Hendrix, Pearl Jam, Metallica, Green Day, National Geographic, Discovery, AARP, Apple, Amazon, Netflix, HBO, Showtime, Hulu, Universal Music Group, Atlantic Records, Warner Music, Sony, Concord Music Group, and many, many others. 

Through a powerful global network of cinemas, digital media outlets, and affinity marketing partners, Abramorama strategically implements a unified distribution and audience activation plan for each title. Abramorama is expert at maximizing reach, engagement, marketing spends, and the ROI for content created for target audiences.

Name: Bartleby Film
Description:
Bartleby Film è una società di produzione cinematografica e televisiva italiana.

Fondata nel 2002 e guidata da Massimo Di Rocco e Luigi Napoleone, ha l’obiettivo di raccontare grandi storie attraverso lo sguardo dei migliori registi italiani e internazionali.

Tra le produzioni più recenti spiccano: I limoni d'inverno (Caterina Carone, 2023), Con la grazia di un Dio (Alessandro Roia, 2023), L’ultima volta che siamo stati bambini (Claudio Bisio, 2023), Nata per te (Fabio Mollo, 2023), Mimì – Il principe delle tenebre (Brando De Sica, 2023), La lunga corsa (Andrea Magnani, 2023), Tramite Amicizia (Alessandro Siani, 2023), Via Argine 310 (Gianfranco Pannone, 2023), My soul summer (Fabio Mollo, 2022), Quattro Metà (Alessio Maria Federici, 2022), Benvenuti in casa Esposito (Gianluca Ansanelli, 2021), Lei mi parla ancora (Pupi Avati, 2021), La befana vien di notte (Michele Soavi, 2020), Il giorno più bello del mondo (Alessandro Siani, 2019), Io sono Tempesta (Daniele Luchetti, 2018).

La Bartleby Film si è affermata anche a livello internazionale nel panorama delle serie tv, realizzando Suburra, ZeroZeroZero e la detective story Petra.

Di prossima uscita: Shoshana (Michael Winterbottom), Nero (Giovanni Esposito) e il cartone animato Gino & Friends (Marco Storani).

Name: Catraca Filmes
Description:
Vamos falar do que você precisava saber, mas a gente ainda não tinha conseguido te contar. A gente estava muito ocupado REALIZANDO.  

Você sabia que, só no último ano, atendemos empresas como SICREDI, Grupo RBS, Lojas Colombo, SEBRAE, Stihl, Stara, Massey Ferguson e Campari, entre outros?

Você sabia que, nos últimos 2 anos, produzimos OITO aberturas para a Globo, entre séries e novela? Incluindo a abertura de Amor de Mãe, indicada ao Emmy 2021.

Você sabia que, nos últimos 3 anos, ganhamos DOIS prêmios da ABMRA? Um bronze com Husqvarna e uma prata com Massey Ferguson.

Você não sabia. E você não sabia porque a gente não é influencer. A gente não faz média. A gente faz filme. Com dedicação, e seriedade, mas com leveza e inspiração.

E você pode até dizer que é uma daquelas situações de “casa de ferreiro, espeto de pau”. Mas não é nada disso. Casa de produção, de solução de problemas, de viabilização de sonhos e concretização de projetos. Dos nossos clientes. É pra isso que a gente é Catraca.

Porque, para gravar um vídeo, basta uma câmera. Mas, para produzir audiovisual precisa muito mais. Precisa linguagem, precisa bagagem, precisa envolvimento. Precisa a equipe certa, que compartilha da mesma visão e paixão. Precisa respeito com as ideias e responsabilidade com os investimentos.

Se você não sabia tudo o que a gente te contou aqui, agora já sabe. E também já sabe como escolher a produtora certa para realizar o que você espera de uma produção.

Você precisa, a gente entrega.

uzupo is a film & television sound post production studio. In our studio we create sound magic with foley& sound design.

Name: Cape Town TV
Description:
Cape Town TV is a non-profit, free-to-air, community television service operating in the greater Cape Town metropolitan area. CTV was founded by over 100 non-profit organisations in 2006 and launched in September 2008. CTV is committed to providing community access to the powerful medium of television as a tool to promote community development, human rights and social justice. 

The station broadcasts from a central studio based in Observatory, linked by a microwave link to a transmitter located on the Tygerburg Hill. The broadcasting footprint encompasses all those areas that that are in “line-of- sight” of the transmitter for a 100 km radius, including all the areas that lie between Atlantis, Stellenbosch, the City Bowl and Muizenburg with an estimated population for 2.5 million people

Name: Filmweb
Description:
Filmweb er Norges ledende filmportal og film- og kinobransjens kompetansehus innen digitale medier. Bedriften er ansvarlig for utvikling, drift og vedlikehold av filmbransjens internettjenester og binder sammen mer enn 100 organisasjoner under Filmweb-samarbeidet. 

For publikum er Filmweb det naturlige startstedet for å orientere seg om film på kino. Hver måned besøker opptil 2 millioner unike brukere portalen, hvilket gjør den til en stor markedsplass for salg av kinobilletter. Filmweb eies av den norske kinobransjen og Nordisk Film Egmont.

Name: peoplegrapher GmbH
Description:
peoplegrapher is all about being truly dedicated to moving and non-moving images. Whatever it is you and your business needs – a TV commercial, branded creative content, a holistic concept including a suitable execution, a print campaign or everything combined – our team of creative minds goes all in.
 
We develop, create and produce worldwide. In-house or a phone call away. Our selected roster of international directors and fully integrated film- and post-production treat every project individually. No matter the scale or genre.
 
As for ourselves: we keep a strong personal bond with one another. That’s why we will always be a hand-picked group of creators, united by the same vision.
We’re excited to hear yours.
