Name: ARI Pictures
Description:
Nous sommes ARI Pictures. Nous portons une grande attention au monde qui nous entoure. A ses habitants. Tous ses habitants. Nous croyons en une symbiose de l’être humain et de la nature dans un monde vertueux et apaisant. D’une oreille attentive, nous écoutons les histoires que notre planète nous raconte.

Cette attention, cette ouverture à l’émerveillement, nous oeuvrons jour après jour à la traduire dans les films que nous produisons. Partager c’est aimer. Notre plus grand bonheur est de créer des récits que nos amis, parents, collaborateurs et partenaires auront plaisir à répandre autour d’eux.

Notre souhait le plus cher est de pouvoir nous rendre utile au monde qui nous entoure. A ses êtres humains, et à sa nature. Nous souhaitons gommer les frontières latentes entre technologie et environnement, entre l’homme et son berceau, grâce à la bienveillance et la créativité. Nous tentons de ciseler un avenir meilleur pour les générations à venir grâce au rêve, autant qu’à la prise d’action directe.

Nous sommes ARI Pictures, et nous avons hâte de découvrir et révéler votre histoire à notre manière, pour vous, pour votre cause.

Name: Espn Do Brasil Eventos Esportivos
Description: A ESPN no Brasil é reconhecida pela mídia e pelo público devido à qualidade nas transmissões, comentários imparciais e credibilidade de seus profissionais. Contando com 3 canais (ESPN, ESPN Brasil e ESPN+), todos também em HD, a ESPN transmite ao vivo os principais eventos esportivos do mundo, entre eles as Olimpíadas, a Copa do Mundo da FIFA, UEFA Europa League, os Campeonatos Espanhol, Inglês e Alemão, Copa do Brasil, NBA, NFL, Grand Slams de Tênis (US Open e Australian Open) e os X Games.

Name: Brandon Box
Description:
Here in Brandon Box, Milan-based production company, we work with the main editors and agencies for developing story-driven contents that leave a mark. We work across numerous channels and categories, for different media platforms, creating successful branded contents for the world’s most admired brands.
 
Our team of writers, directors, producers, and filmmakers handles projects of nearly every scale and genre, in Italy and worldwide. Brilliant people with different tasks and diverse skills, but a common goal: turning a Great Story into a Great Content.

Because we believe in Great Stories. Stories that make you smile, that make you cry, that make you shiver. Stories that have the power to move, whatever it is the channel through which they are published. 

The feature that distinguishes us is the ability to tell stories with a magical and dreamlike flavor that allows us to glimpse and experience a different reality - an alternative world where everything is possible.

We tell the Magic behind the appearance, the Dream behind reality. We use the metaphor as a key to understanding the most diverse and complex problems. Without forgetting irony and madness, two elements that help make life funnier and lighter.

Name: Voel
Description:
𝐒𝐨𝐦𝐨𝐬 𝐮𝐧𝐚 𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐝𝐮𝐜𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐚 𝐚𝐮𝐝𝐢𝐨𝐯𝐢𝐬𝐮𝐚𝐥 𝐞𝐬𝐩𝐞𝐜𝐢𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐳𝐚𝐝𝐚 𝐞𝐧 𝐩𝐮𝐛𝐥𝐢𝐜𝐢𝐝𝐚𝐝 𝐩𝐚𝐫𝐚 𝐦𝐚𝐫𝐜𝐚𝐬 𝐲 𝐞𝐦𝐩𝐫𝐞𝐬𝐚𝐬, 𝐜𝐨𝐧 𝐬𝐞𝐝𝐞 𝐞𝐧 𝐆𝐫𝐚𝐧𝐚𝐝𝐚, 𝐌á𝐥𝐚𝐠𝐚 𝐲 𝐌𝐚𝐝𝐫𝐢𝐝. 

Nacimos en los ochenta, experimentando con cámaras de video e influenciados por la cultura suburbana y las películas de Spike Jonze, Stanley Kubrick, Martin Scorsese o Steven Spielberg. Es por ello que 𝐞𝐥 𝐢𝐝𝐢𝐨𝐦𝐚 𝐪𝐮𝐞 𝐮𝐭𝐢𝐥𝐢𝐳𝐚𝐦𝐨𝐬 𝐞𝐧 𝐕𝐨𝐞𝐥 𝐞𝐬 𝐞𝐥 𝐥𝐞𝐧𝐠𝐮𝐚𝐣𝐞 𝐝𝐞𝐥 𝐜𝐢𝐧𝐞. 

Buscamos 𝐢𝐧𝐬𝐩𝐢𝐫𝐚𝐫 𝐚 𝐥𝐚𝐬 𝐩𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐨𝐧𝐚𝐬, transmitiéndoles el mensaje de la forma más auténtica y magnética posible. La 𝐩𝐚𝐬𝐢ó𝐧 por lo que hacemos, unida a la 𝐜𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐯𝐢𝐝𝐚𝐝, la ú𝐥𝐭𝐢𝐦𝐚 𝐭𝐞𝐜𝐧𝐨𝐥𝐨𝐠í𝐚 y nuestra 𝐞𝐱𝐩𝐞𝐫𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐜𝐢𝐚 en rodajes para televisión, es lo que nos define.

Como generadores de contenido audiovisual para empresas, desarrollamos todo tipo de 𝐚𝐧𝐮𝐧𝐜𝐢𝐨𝐬, 𝐬𝐩𝐨𝐭𝐬, 𝐚𝐧𝐢𝐦𝐚𝐜𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐞𝐬, 𝐦𝐨𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐠𝐫𝐚𝐩𝐡𝐢𝐜𝐬, 𝐯𝐢𝐝𝐞𝐨𝐬 𝐜𝐨𝐫𝐩𝐨𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐯𝐨𝐬, 𝐯𝐢𝐝𝐞𝐨𝐬 𝐩𝐚𝐫𝐚 𝐞𝐦𝐩𝐫𝐞𝐬𝐚, 𝐯𝐢𝐝𝐞𝐨𝐬 𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐦𝐨𝐜𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐚𝐥𝐞𝐬, 𝐯𝐢𝐝𝐞𝐨𝐬 𝐝𝐞 𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐝𝐮𝐜𝐭𝐨 𝐨 𝐫𝐞𝐭𝐫𝐚𝐧𝐬𝐦𝐢𝐬𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐞𝐬 𝐞𝐧 𝐬𝐭𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐦𝐢𝐧𝐠. Además, colaboramos con agencias de publicidad y comunicación y, por supuesto, brindamos apoyo a otras productoras nacionales o extranjeras cuando así nos lo solicitan.

Nuestro trabajo abarca desde la creatividad de la pieza hasta la producción, el montaje y la postproducción. 𝐒𝐢𝐦𝐩𝐥𝐞𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐞 𝐞𝐬𝐜𝐨𝐠𝐞𝐬 𝐞𝐥 𝐨𝐛𝐣𝐞𝐭𝐢𝐯𝐨 𝐲 𝐧𝐨𝐬𝐨𝐭𝐫𝐨𝐬 𝐥𝐞 𝐝𝐚𝐦𝐨𝐬 𝐟𝐨𝐫𝐦𝐚.

Trabajamos con clientes de distintos sectores y para marcas y empresas de todos los tamaños. 𝐏𝐚𝐫𝐚 𝐧𝐨𝐬𝐨𝐭𝐫𝐨𝐬 𝐧𝐨 𝐞𝐱𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐞𝐧 𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐲𝐞𝐜𝐭𝐨𝐬 𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐨𝐫𝐞𝐬. 𝐒𝐨𝐦𝐨𝐬 𝐕𝐨𝐞𝐥.

Name: International Screen Institute
Description:
The International Screen Institute provides first-class training for European and international film, TV, and media professionals. Our compact, hands-on programmes (4–5 days), held in Vienna and conducted in English, are led by experienced industry experts who bring real-world insight and up-to-date knowledge.

All our programmes are guided by five key values:

•	Quality of teaching by industry experts
•	Collaboration between industry sectors and across borders
•	Digital innovation affecting the industry
•	Inclusion of all participants - regardless of ethnicity, gender, socio-economic background, or sexual orientation
•	Sustainability through greener, ethical practices at every stage

We foster a dynamic, diverse, and international learning environment that encourages innovation, peer exchange, and cross-cultural networking. Each course is designed to reflect current trends and address skills gaps in the evolving screen industries.

Applications are welcome from professionals around the world.

We thrive on embracing new challenges and opportunities, constantly seeking streamlined and cost-effective solutions for our clients.

Our team is a dynamic blend of innovative engineers, skilled editors, adept managers, and localization experts who are not only forward-thinking but also deeply passionate. We tirelessly explore the best-suited solutions for every project.

We value and encourage creativity, maintain strong client engagement, and strive to be authentic and relatable in all our endeavors.

Name: Film Streams
Description:
Film Streams is a 501(c)3 nonprofit organization in Omaha, Nebraska. Our mission is to enhance the cultural environment of the Omaha-Council Bluffs metropolitan area through the presentation and discussion of film as an art form.

Our organization oversees two wonderful and distinct cinemas: (1) the Ruth Sokolof Theater, the two-screen venue we opened in 2007 within the Saddle Creek Records complex in North Downtown Omaha, and (2) the historic Dundee Theater, Omaha’s last surviving single-screen neighborhood cinema, which we reopened in December 2017.

Name: Netherlands Audiovisual Producers Alliance (NAPA)
Description:
The Netherlands Audiovisual Producers Alliance (NAPA) offers a joint voice to independent professional producers. The approx. 80 members are active in various disciplines, including feature film, drama series, documentary, animation, interactive productions and games. The aim of the professional association is to promote the common interests of its members and to strengthen the production climate.

NAPA stems from the merger of Film Producers Netherlands (FPN), Documentary Producers Netherlands (DPN), Animation Producers Netherlands (ApN) and Interactive Producers Netherlands (IPN). In recent years, these associations have collaborated increasingly. In order to be able to represent the shared interests even more effectively, it was decided to join forces into one strong producers' alliance. NAPA was officially launched in the spring of 2020.

Name: Giornate degli Autori
Description:
Promoted by the filmmakers and screenwriters’ associations ANAC and 100autori, chaired by Andrea Purgatori and directed by Gaia Furrer (Artistic Director) with Giorgio Gosetti (General Delegate and founder), Giornate degli Autori was created in 2004 as a film showcase and independent sidebar of the Venice Film Festival, modeled on the prestigious Directors’ Fortnight at Cannes. 

The aim of the showcase is to turn the spotlight on quality films while placing no restrictions whatsoever, with an emphasis on innovation, experimentation, originality, and independence, from concept to production: a festival-in-a-festival that reignites the thrill of discovery for audiences, critics, and the industry alike. 

Giornate degli Autori is an all-around cultural endeavor, what with its attention to Italy’s film heritage (100+1: one hundred films and a country, Italy), women’s creativity (Miu Miu Women’s Tales), the repeat screenings from its program arranged in Italy and abroad, its encouragement of Italy’s rising film talent, and its long-standing collaboration with the European Parliament (the 27 Times Cinema project).

Tous nos films ont été sélectionnés et primés dans de nombreux festivals internationaux avec une Palme d’Or du festival de Cannes pour Titane de Julia Ducournau. Nous travaillons actuellement sur plusieurs longs-métrages de fiction ainsi que des séries de fiction et d’animation et des webséries.

Diamond Films Perú es una distribuidora de cine que surge en diciembre del 2012 a través de Sun Distribution, empresa dedicada a la adquisición de películas con más de 50 años de experiencia en la industria cinematográfica independiente, comprando títulos para países en América Latina. Diamond films se ha posicionado como líder en el mercado latinoamericano por la distribución de películas producidas en Hollywood.

 Además ha destacado por la calidad de sus títulos y volumen de cintas que llegan a la pantalla grande. Actualmente presenta más de 40 títulos por año, muchos de éstos producidos por estudios de renombre alrededor del mundo; trayendo cintas de primera línea y galardonadas con reconocimientos de la industria del Cine, como: Luz de Luna, Hasta el Último Hombre, Jackie, Justicia Implacable, El Lobo de Wall Street, El Implacable, Código Enigma, El Artista, El Discurso del Rey, entre otras.

Diamond Films cuenta con distribuidoras propias en Argentina, Chile, Brasil, México, Colombia y Bolivia en Latinoamérica. En el 2016, Diamond Films ha embarcado rumbo a Europa en donde actualmente cuenta con su primera filial en Madrid, España.

Name: TLViDS
Description:
הצוות שלנו הוא מכלול של אנשי צילום, הפקה, עריכה ושיווק – כך אנחנו מצליחים ליצר תוכן איכותי שנראה מעולה.

בעלי יכולת מוכחת בעבודה עם חברות ענק כמו גוגל, חברות בינוניות וסטרטאפים, אנחנו יודעים לתת מענה איכותי ושירות מעולה לצורכי וידאו לכל סוגי הלקוחות.

הצוות של TLViDS הוא משפחה של אנשים שאוהבים את מה שהם עושים ורואים את זה! אנחנו מביאים את החשיבה היצירתית שלנו לכל עבודה, יחד עם היכולת לזקק את החזון של הלקוח לתוצר וידאו ממשי אשר ״מדבר״ אל קהל היעד.

מה זה TLViDS ? חברת הפקות היודעת בדיוק מה הם הצרכים של הצרכנים היום ואיך ליצר להם את התוכן שהם רוצים צריכים.

Name: Screen Education Edinburgh
Description:
Screen Education Edinburgh is dedicated to filmmaking for all, delivering high quality learning, training and production programmes that develop skills, knowledge and opportunities for young people, adult learners, schools, communities and film talent.

Through a progressive pathway of increased development of learners of all ages, our programmes increase confidence, wellbeing, attainment, film knowledge and skills, and enable progression towards further and higher education study, and into the film, tv and media workplace. 

Scotland's oldest filmmaking organisation, over the past four decades we have specialised in developing people from areas of deprivation and low-income backgrounds, those living with a disability, and those from diverse backgrounds, giving access to the artform, and nurturing new and undiscovered talent. 

Year round we support those passionate about filmmaking in Edinburgh and surrounding areas through low-cost equipment hire, meeting, rehearsal, screening and small studio space at our multi-purpose learning and production base in North Edinburgh, with our learning, training and production programmes delivered at our base, and through outreach activity across the City and beyond, or through virtual learning.

We have a rich history of producing inclusive drama and documentary films focused on the lives of those from underrepresented communities, with our films screening on TV, online and at film festivals globally, winning numerous BAFTA and festival awards. 

We deliver film productions for public, voluntary and social enterprise sector clients, including event, corporate, training and information films, with our unique approach involving learners from underrepresented backgrounds being integrated into each production team, further developing their skills, knowledge and employability.

Patron - Irvine Welsh

Name: Kamea Meah Films - La Théorie du Boxeur
Description:
L’association Kamea Meah a été créée en 2011 pour porter le film documentaire « En Quête de Sens » de Nathanaël Coste et Marc de la Ménardière. Sorti en 2015, ce road trip initiatique a touché 150 000 spectateur·ices au cinéma en Europe lors de 3000 ciné-échanges. http://enquetedesens-lefilm.com/

De l’autoproduction à la distribution à impact, l’expérience collective autour de ce documentaire a été riche. L’équipe de Kamea Meah a par la suite mutualisé ses compétences et connaissances en devenant une plateforme au service de la création et de la diffusion documentaire «Hors Circuit » sur des thématiques liées aux transitions personnelles et sociétales. 

Elle réalise également des films de commandes et des captations pour des collectivités, ONG, centres de recherches, musées , associations … http://kameameahfilms.org

En mars 2024, « La Théorie du boxeur » sort au cinéma. Ce film-enquête de Nathanaël Coste tourné en Drôme propose une réflexion sur l’avenir de nos systèmes agricoles et alimentaires dans le contexte du changement climatique. Sa diffusion à impact a touché 50 000 spectateur·ices lors de projections animées par notre réseau d’animateur·ices. Elles visent à créer du dialogue entre habitant·es, agriculteur·ices, élu·es, et favoriser une compréhension systémique de ces enjeux. Des animations spéciales se déploient dans les lycées agricoles (pass culture) , et pour les élu·es (formation Solagro). Des projections hors cinéma sont possibles sur un modèle innovant de « prix fléché ». Le film est disponible en VOD et sur Clé USB. https://www.latheorieduboxeur.fr/

La web-série « Sortir du Ring » se poursuit pour décortiquer les enjeux agricoles et alimentaires de notre époque, et montrer des initiatives qui repensent le système. https://bit.ly/Sortir-du-Ring

Name: Network Movie
Description:
Die Network Movie Film- und Fernsehproduktion GmbH hat sich seit Firmengründung im Jahr 1998 mit attraktiven und qualitätsvollen Fernsehfilmen, populären Reihen und Serien sowie internationalen Koproduktionen und Kinofilmen einen Namen gemacht. Die Filmproduktion arbeitet an vier Standorten: im Kölner Mediapark, im Hamburger Slomanhaus am Baumwall, in München, und mit Studio Zentral in Berlin. Die Firma wird gemeinsam geleitet von Bernadette Schugg,. Wolfgang Cimera sowie Lasse Scharpen, der seit April 2020 am Berliner Standort mit „Studio Zentral“ die Entwicklung zeitgenössischer Serien vorantreibt. Network Movie ist eine 100-prozentige Tochter von ZDF Studios, produziert für ZDF, ZDFneo, Das Erste (Degeto) und weitere, beteiligt sich an deutschen wie internationalen Kino-Koproduktionen und internationalen TV-Eventproduktionen.

Network Movie erzählt Geschichten – spannende, dramatische, humorvolle, bewegende Geschichten. Dafür bringt Network Movie exzellente Autoren mit renommierten, preisgekrönten und erfolgversprechenden Regisseuren zusammen und versteht es, herausragende und prominente Schauspielerensembles zu gewinnen. Nur so können gute Filme entstehen, die sowohl Kritiker wie auch Publikum überzeugen. Für den Mut zu neuen Formaten und den Anspruch, ein qualitativ hochwertiges und zugleich unterhaltsames Programm zu produzieren, wird Network Movie von Kritikern und Publikum gleichermaßen immer wieder gelobt und mit zahlreichen TV-Preisen ausgezeichnet. Ein guter Produzent vergisst nie, wem er seine Erfolge zu verdanken hat. Er ist nichts ohne seine Kreativen, denn er lebt von der Kraft und Arbeit dieser Menschen.

Name: Peninsula Pictures
Description:
Peninsula Pictures is an Indian Production Company which produces Television Series and Entertainment Content. The company was founded in the year 2015 by Alind Srivastava and Nissar Parvej and the head office is located in Andheri West, Mumbai.
The company has produced shows for General Entertainment Channels (GECs) like Aladdin – Naam Toh Suna Hoga (Sony SAB), Paramavatar Shri Krishna (& TV), Vikram Betaal Ki Rahasya Gatha (&TV), Mayavi Maling (STAR Bharat), Dev (Colors), Dev Season 2 (Colors), Vishkanya (Zee TV).
The company is known for creating different genre shows in the likes of fantasy, mythological, drama, thriller, crime, mystery and romance.  
In September 2017, Peninsula Pictures started a new division solely dedicated to specialized VFX and Computer Graphics under ‘Peninsula Studio’. The Studio was founded by Alind Srivastava and Nissar Parvej and is now being spearheaded by Lipika Shetty.

Name: Duplitech
Description:
Duplitech Corp is a Media Services Lab located at 20000 Mariner Avenue in Torrance, CA and a new office in Burbank CA.

Duplitech delivers digital content solutions for Home Entertainment platforms, streamers, FAST channels, and content owners. Our state-of-the-art solutions for remastering, repurposing, and re-imagining television and film libraries demonstrate our commitment to excellence and understanding of today’s consumer marketplace and content ecosystem. The team at Duplitech is never satisfied with anything less than excellence and knows what it takes to deliver best-in-class service and quality. As a critical partner in the content supply chain, Duplitech can help you do the same.

Name: Capricci
Description: Créée en 1999, Capricci est une société de production, de distribution et d'édition de cinéma. Label cinéphile indépendant implanté à Bordeaux, Nantes et Paris, Capricci produit plusieurs œuvres cinématographiques de courts et longs métrages par an. La société édite également plusieurs collections d'ouvrage sur le cinéma et distribue en salle environ 6 à 8 films par an, nouveaux films comme films de patrimoine restaurés.

Name: Officine UBU srl
Description:
Officine UBU è l’evoluzione di UBU Film, casa di produzione fondata nel 2001 a Milano da Franco Zuliani. Da sempre attenta alla promozione di nuovi talenti ed alla realizzazione di opere innovative e di qualità, ha realizzato tra il 2002 e il 2003 i lungometraggi La spettatrice di Paolo Franchi, con Barbora Bobulova, Andrea Renzi e Brigitte Catillon, e Fame chimica, con Valeria Solarino, Marco Foschi e Teco Celio. Per la produzione di questi film Franco Zuliani ha ricevuto nel 2004 il Premio F.I.C.E. (Federazione Italiana Cinema d’Essai) come miglior produttore di film di qualità.
Nel 2006 Officine UBU ha esordito nella Distribuzione mantenendo sempre lo stesso filo conduttore: la ricerca dell’originalità, della qualità e dell’innovazione. Perseguendo questo obiettivo Officine UBU ha distribuito nelle sale italiane le opere di importanti registi internazionali come Wim Wenders, Olivier Assayas, Terry Gilliam, Francois Ozon, Nicolas Winding Refn, Anne Fontaine, Patrice Leconte, Takashi Miike, Cédric Klapish, Jia Zhangke, Emmanuelle Bercot, Michael Winterbottom, Julie Delpy, Marjane Satrapi, Tony Kaye, Alex De la Iglesia, Shane Meadows, Nicolas Philibert e ha portato all’attenzione del pubblico il talento di autori italiani quali Gianfranco Rosi, Paolo Franchi, Francesco Patierno, Valerio Jalongo.
Sono molti i film Officine UBU che hanno ricevuto premi nei festival di tutto il mondo: Nomination all’Oscar come miglior documentario e Premio Speciale a Cannes per Il sale della terra di Wim Wenders, Leone D’oro al Festival di Venezia per Sacro GRA di Gianfranco Rosi, Miglior Regia al Sundance Film Festival per Lontano da qui di Sara Colangelo, Coppa Volpi a Valeria Golino per la Miglior interpretazione femminile al festival di Venezia in Per amor vostro di Giuseppe Gaudino, Premio Miglior Sceneggiatura al Festival di Cannes per Il tocco del peccato di Jia Zhangke, Premio Miglior Sceneggiatura al festival di Venezia per Qualcosa nell’aria di Olivier Assayas.

Name: ODEON MULTICINES S.L.
Description:
Odeon nació de una ilusión, la de Luis Millán, fundador de Odeon Multicines, por convertir el hecho social de ir al cine en toda una experiencia sensorial y emocional con la tecnología más avanzada. Esa ilusión, es ahora una realidad. El cine es espectáculo y con Odeon Multicines vivirás el cine de una forma especial. Comparte con nosotros nuestro afán por la excelencia.

Ven a experimentar el Mundo Odeon Multicines.
----------------------
Tecnología a tu alcance
Odeon Multicines es la cadena de cines más avanzada tecnológicamente. En todos nuestros complejos hemos apostado por estar a la vanguardia en exhibición, nuestro objetivo es claro, acercar la mejor tecnología del mercado a nuestros clientes. Butacas vips, sonido envolvente Dolby Atmos, proyección 4k y láser, y como novedad, contamos con la primera y única sala en España con pantalla LED, el cine del futuro, de la mano de Samsung Onyx, está instalada en Odeon Sambil Dolby Atmos, considerado el cine más avanzado de Europa.

Ponemos la tecnología a tu alcance.
----------------------
Pasión por el Cine
La pasión que pone todo el personal de Odeon Multicines por el cine y por cada uno de sus clientes, hace que abramos los brazos para crear la GRAN FAMILIA Odeon Multicines. Queremos ser parte de ti ofreciéndote una experiencia cinematográfica única en cada visita.

Únete a nuestra familia, únete a Odeon Multicines.

Name: BFD
Description:
Benelux Film Distributors (BFD) is een onafhankelijke filmdistributeur, die sinds  2006 een leidende positie heeft opgebouwd in zowel de Bioscoop- als HomeEntertainment-markt. Met de juiste mix van Nederlandse producties en internationale kwaliteitsfilms heeft BFD een sterke positie in de Benelux verworven. Lokale titels als Komt een vrouw bij de dokter, Nova Zembla 3D, New Kids Turbo & Nitro en Rabat worden afgewisseld met titels als The American, Haar naam was Sarah en One Day. In 2012 worden hier, naast diverse andere titels, nog  Moonrise Kingdom, Koning van Katoren en Cloud Atlas aan toegevoegd.
BFD werkt nauw samen met Inspire Pictures, die als (co) producent en rechtenhouder al haar distributie-activiteiten heeft ondergebracht bij BFD en BFD Home Entertainment.
 
Benelux Film Distributors (BFD) is an independent film distributor, which has built up a leading  position in the theatrical and home entertainment market as from 2006. As a result of the right mix of both national as well as international titles in combination with a strong marketing support BFD has grown to a structural Independent Top 3 player. Local titles as Stricken, Nova Zembla 3d, New Kids Turbo & Nitro and Rabat, together with titles like The American, Sarah’s Key and One Day brought us an eclectic port folio. In 2012 , amongst other titles, Moonrise Kingdom, Cloud Atlas and the Dutch Family film To be King will be added.
BFD is co-operating with Inspire Pictures as the exclusive distribution partner in the Benelux.

Name: Winnipeg Film Group
Description:
The Winnipeg Film Group was founded in 1974 and is a charitable, artist-run organization dedicated to promoting the art of cinema. We have served as a resource for Manitoba filmmakers and video artists for 36 years, providing access to affordable training, mentorship, production funding, experimentation opportunities, production and post production equipment and facilities, and local, national and international programming and distribution. 

We have also operated the Winnipeg Cinematheque for 30 years. Cinematheque is an intimate movie theatre devoted to screening the very best in Canadian and world cinema. More than just screening films, we also provide artist talks, panel discussions and special events to feed the minds of cinema fans.

Name: ArteSettima
Description:
ArteSettima è una realtà culturale attiva sia digitalmente che fisicamente. Un magazine online con più di 1 Milione di pagine viste nel 2020, progetti di formazione con le scuole, eventi in tutta Italia e format video innovativi. 
È una realtà diffusa in tutta Italia, in particolare Roma, Milano, Bologna, Bari , Torino, Napoli e Palermo, composta da più di 90 giovani under 35. 
L'obiettivo è quello di utilizzare il linguaggio filmico e audiovisivo in senso lato per riportare dialogo e interesse nell'indagine culturale soprattutto tra i giovani. Studiare questo nuovo linguaggio creando contenuti, editoriali e video, che possano riavvicinare alla cultura usando i nuovi strumenti della comunicazione. Contaminazioni filosofiche, letterarie, artistiche e tecniche delineano un team capace di creazione di contenuti innovativi, articoli e video, così come capacità di produzione di prodotti audiovisivi.
Siamo una generazione e un'epoca ancora da studiare e da capire: parlare e comprendere i nuovi linguaggi, fare del cinema/serie tv uno strumento trasversale può essere un modo per rilanciare la dimensione artistico-culturale di questo periodo storico.

Offriamo progetti di riavvicinamento alla didattica attraverso il cinema per scuole secondarie; content creating e produzione video per aziende, sale cinematografiche e artisti; mediapartnership per festival e qualsivoglia realtà affine al mondo artistico-audiovisivo; cura e creazione di rassegne cinematografiche con modalità inedite di interazione con il pubblico.

Name: Filmic Inc.
Description:
Filmic Inc. designs and develops advanced mobile video imaging software for iOS and Android.  Our flagship product, Filmic Pro, is the preferred choice of mobile filmmakers, journalists, and videographers the world over.  

The breakthrough 2015 hit movie TANGERINE was shot using the app and is the first full-length feature film shot on smartphones to be purchased by a major distribution house (Magnolia Pictures) and released globally.

Name: Lipstick
Description:
LIPSTICK is an All-In-One Studio, a first of its kind model, that combines groundbreaking AI technology and award-winning VFX, with the expertise and creativity of the best directors and Ai-artist.
Unlike traditional production setups that rely on multiple companies and subcontracts, Lipstick is built as a single, unified system — from concept to final pixel.

Name: Be Electric Studios
Description: Be Electric excels at supporting the creation of compelling media while facilitating the needs of production companies, producers, directors, agencies and brands for studio space, lighting, grip and electric, camera rentals, production supplies and live streaming services. Be Electric has been home to countless productions for films, commercials, webisodes, music videos, product, advertising and editorial photo shoots and more. We are committed to assisting every production large or small reach the highest levels of success.

Name: movemotions productions
Description:
Awakening feelings, showing emotions, generating interest in the product, and strengthening your brand – we aim for all this in your video and photo productions. Passion, creativity, and dedication are always with us as we work towards the final result.

movemotions productions have long-lasting experience in the amusement park industry and has been an expert in video productions for ride suppliers, theme parks, and water parks since 2001.

Clients of movemotions productions are the leading suppliers and theme parks worldwide.

Name: Grumixama Filmes
Description:
Produção de Filmes e Séries. 
Entrevistas, Institucionais, Vídeos de Treinamentos e Videoaulas.

Name: Revolver Entertainment
Description:
With the future of distribution ever evolving, Revolver's North American arm continues to lead the way in innovative independent digital film delivery and marketing.

With a strong team supporting every release, Revolver USA approach each title creatively, utilising cutting edge digital technologies while also proving specialists in guerrilla below-the-line marketing.

Revolver's lineup is available through a multitude of platforms aside from traditional home entertainment media, with digital deals in place with Apple's iTunes, Amazon Video On Demand, Cinema Now, NetFlix, Sony PlayStation, Nintendo Wii, Microsoft Xbox and Vudu to name but a few.

Digital platforms are becoming ever more prevalent in the entertainment world, with 100 million homes in North America now tuning in to Video On Demand services. VOD has experienced double digit growth over the last six years and will continue to benefit audiences into the future. Capitalising on this growth, Revolver have established relationships with key North American cable providers, including AT&T, Cable Vision, Charter, Comcast and Time Warner Cable.

VOD is also influencing distribution practices, with day-and-date DVD and VOD releases now becoming the norm. Embracing the changing market, Revolver have streamlined their marketing efforts to get the most out of every release, bringing their films directly to audiences who prefer on demand viewing.

Name: Digital Post
Description:
Digipost is New Zealand’s most experienced Post Production and VFX company, delivering the highest quality services to the feature film, advertising and episodic television industries.
We are a client focused business that brings creative and technical excellence to every project. As well, we pride ourselves on the important things that clients expect – attention to the finest detail, delivery on time, and on budget.

Name: Independent Film Channel, New York, NY
Description: Check out company's website.

Name: Match and Spark
Description:
Match and Spark is a talent management, production and packaging company based in Warsaw established by Anna Rozalska and Tarik Hachoud.

Representing the new generation of European filmmaking Talent, Match and Spark is actively involved in projects from the stages of early development focusing to promote its Clients internationally, bringing their boundless creativity to media across the world.

Among over 50 filmmakers that Match and Spark represents are: Oscar nominated DP Lucas Zal ("Cold War", "Ida"), Sundance-awarded director Michał Marczak ("All These Sleepless Nights"), Greek director Sofia Exarchou, who won the New Directors’ Award at San Sebastian for "Park", DP Monika Lenczewska, who was selected as 2016 Top Ten Cinematographers to Watch by Variety.

Match and Spark co-produced a feature length documentary "In the Name of Honor" alongside RatPac and the feature length documentary "Who Will Write Our History", directed by Roberta Grossman and produced alongside Executive Producer Nancy Spielberg. Match and Spark also provides expertise and consulting services on feature projects, TV series and documentary productions (e.g. "Struggle: The Life and Lost Art of Szukalski", dir. Ireneusz Dobrowolski, prod. Anna Dobrowolska, George DiCaprio, Leonardo DiCaprio).

At the moment what Match and Spark is mainly involved in is the production of a feature films: "The Great Match" by Filip Syczyński and "Kosmos" by Michał Marczak. Match and Spark develops "Imperial Spy" – international period drama series produced by Fremantle International and StarMedia.

Name: Marché International du Film Classique - Festival Lumière
Description:
Structurer et valoriser la filière internationale du cinéma de patrimoine, fédérer et renseigner ses acteurs, partager et questionner les pratiques, générer des achats et des ventes de droits cinématographiques et de prestations diverses, les objectifs du Marché International du Film Classique sont multiples. Depuis sa création en 2013, porté par le succès du festival Lumière qui célèbre le cinéma classique, le MIFC, le seul et unique marché mondial dédié au cinéma classique, est fier de contribuer au dynamisme, aux combats et à l'engagement de la filière !

Structuring and promoting the international heritage film industry, federating and informing its players, sharing and questioning practices, generating purchases and sales of film rights and various services, the International Classic Film Market's objectives are multiple. Since its creation in 2013, driven by the success of the Lumière festiva which celebrates classic cinema, the MIFC, the one and only classic film market, is proud to contribue to the dynamism, struggles and commitment of the industry !

Name: Bucareste Ateliê de Cinema - BAC
Description:
Bucareste Ateliê de Cinema (BAC) is a brazilian film school, located in São Paulo, dedicated to cinematography and other areas of cinema. With a hand's on approach, students will find a space where they can actually exercise the concepts learned during classes. With this in mind, we choose to offer classes with a small number of people (12 to14), which provide greater contact between students and teachers, and also with the tools (cameras and accessories). 

Through various partnerships with film industry companies such as manufacturers, equipment rental companies and post production houses, Bucareste always offers highest quality equipment in its workshops. The students have access to the same tools used in current high-end Brazilian productions.

Bucareste believes that schools should be part of the film industry. To bring students closer to the job market is to understand it, to know its needs and to bring them into the classroom, in order to prepare these people for the professional field.

Name: Dream Team Alliance, LLC
Description: DTA is a full-scale film production company.  We write, produce, and act.

Name: TETRA MEDIA FICTION
Description: TETRA MEDIA FICTION rassemble des producteurs de fiction depuis 2010 : Paris Police 1905 et 1900 (2 saisons), Sentinelles, Platonique, Une belle Histoire, Irresponsable (3 saisons), Vampire, Vernon Subutex, Les Hommes de l'Ombre (3 saisons), Un Village Français (7 saisons)...

Name: LE GROUPE OUEST
Description: A unique place in France dedicated to #writers, #filmmakers and #script development, and an Applied Research Platform for Storytelling.

Name: Cacique Argentina
Description: CACIQUE Argentina es una Productora creativa. Cuenta con una vasta experiencia de mas de 12 años en cine, publicidad, contenidos audiovisuales, institucionales, desarrollos de Marketing, BTL, comunicación integral.

Name: Playfiction Video
Description:
PlayFiction Vídeo es una productora audiovisual de Barcelona.
Especialistas en vídeos corporativos, grabaciones de cursos online, eventos, motion graphics y mucho más! 
Nos encargamos de todo el proceso de producción, grabación y postproducción. De principio a fin.
El crecimiento del consumo de vídeo es imparable y es uno de los principales motores de la publicidad online.
Hacer un vídeo se ha convertido en algo imprescindible para explicar o promocionar tu negocio. La forma más eficaz de dar a conocer tu empresa y ser un valor diferencial frente a tu competidores. Porque los vídeos gustan, atraen y venden.  Potencia la imagen de tu empresa y consigue el máximo impacto entre tus clientes. Solo tienes que asegurarte de hacer un vídeo de calidad. Y nosotros podemos ayudarte a conseguirlo. Sabemos que una imagen vale más que mil palabras.
Destacamos sobretodo por nuestra polivalencia, ya que ofrecemos un servicio integral, nos adaptamos a las necesidades del cliente y realizamos todo tipo de proyectos audiovisuales. También ofrecemos servicios técnicos como operador de cámara, montador de vídeo o colorista.

Nos gusta tener una relación cercana con el cliente para escuchar sus ideas y hacerlas crecer juntos. Creemos que es la base para conseguir un buen trabajo y atractivo para todos.

Name: TECH-VA Automated Solutions
Description: We are a team of artists and engineers who firmly believes it's time to minimize routine and make more time for creative challenges. We converted more than 20 years of VFX and Software Development experience to ML algorithms & tools that will provide you with stable results.

Name: Accademia di Cinema e Televisione Griffith
Description:
Iniziativa della casa di produzione Hiram s.r.l., la Griffith è una scuola di cinema tra le più accreditate nel panorama formativo del settore, soprattutto grazie a una didattica aggiornata, interdisciplinare e collaudata nei minimi dettagli da un corpo docenti costituito da personalità operanti nel settore e da professionisti altamente qualificati. 

La Griffith si distingue anche per una sede moderna, attrezzata e polifunzionale, che ospita un materiale didattico avanzato, sia per le riprese (telecamere digitali professionali) che per il montaggio (tre postazioni AVID). 

L'Accademia avvicina gli allievi più meritevoli al mondo del lavoro, attraverso una vasta rete di contatti e collaborazioni (molti di loro collaborano con case di produzione, post-produzione, effettuano stage sui set, ecc…). Prevede, inoltre, incontri con personalità del cinema e dello spettacolo nonché visite di set e laboratori. 

La Griffith ha lo scopo di individuare e promuovere, tra i propri allievi, nuovi talenti che possano offrire il proprio contributo al cinema italiano: a tal fine spinge i propri allievi a scrivere sceneggiature e a realizzare cortometraggi meritevoli di un'accurata promozione attraverso la partecipazione ai Festival e i Concorsi più prestigiosi e attraverso proiezioni pubbliche all'interno di numerose rassegne e manifestazioni.

Name: Terminal Loudpictures
Description:
Terminal was born as an ambitious project : creating a production company with a dynamic and flexible structure, able to combine a great creative capability with high-profile services.

Our aim is to combine the highest level of creative work with the best production value for each single project we undertake. To achieve this goal we always implement the creative idea with the best technical solutions and, last but not least, we carry out every job as a challenge, with personal commitment and enthusiasm.

The continuous search and recruitment of new talent gives us the chance to offer a slate of directors with unique style and personality.

Over the years we have developed a network of companies around the world enabling us to act as a service partner. We can offer a great variety of interesting and important locations and setting for every project. No matter where we shoot, expertise and enthusiasm always characterise our team.

The commitment to a constant evolution gave life to the our facility in Buenos Aires – Terminal Argentina.

In 2007 Terminal evolved into a production platform with a division in several units : Terminal C the commercial Unit, Terminal B the business Unit, Terminal M the music Unit, Terminal P the photography Unit, and Terminal S which stands for the service Unit.

Terminal realized over the years more than 150 productions, for such prestigious clients and agencies as : Rolex, Mercedes, Diesel, Haworth, Geo-Spirit, Yoga, Grey, J.W. Thompson, BBDO, DDB, Pirella Goettsche Lowe, FCL. Terminal also produced music videos for some of Italy’s most interesting pop-rock acts, such as Subsonica, Bluvertigo, 99 Posse, Carmen Consoli, Gigi D’Agostino, Lisa Frazier, La Sintesi, Cristiano De André, Bacon Popper and worked with labels such as : Sony, BMG, Edel, Mescal, Universal, WEA.

We want to help our clients to translate their visions in Loud Pictures, pictures that can speak by themselves.

Description:
Founded in 2015, Bling ping an entertainment, media, production and communications company, is at an enviable leadership position today with providing solutions for over 650+ live entertainment experiences in verticals of Corporate, Ad films, nightlife, sports, fashion and more!

Bling ping constructs tailor-made content, assets and visual media solutions that deliver in both local and international markets and services millions of consumers and clients across the globe.

In essence, bling ping is an end to end solution for creative freedom in films.

Name: Tremolo Productions
Description:
Over 15 years, Tremolo Productions has established itself as one of the top documentary companies in the U.S., receiving the 2013 Academy Award for Best Documentary for "20 Feet From Stardom" as well as numerous other awards.

Tremolo Productions was founded by Morgan Neville, an award-winning documentary filmmaker who specializes in cultural subjects. Through a series of films on important musical topics (including The Brill Building, Sun Records, Nat King Cole, Brian Wilson, Leiber & Stoller, James Brown and Burt Bacharach), Neville has documented the stories of songwriters and producers who helped shape 20th century music. Neville has been nominated for three Grammys for his musical films: Respect Yourself: The Stax Records Story, Muddy Waters Can’t Be Satisfied, and Johnny Cash’s America, and won an Emmy for Hank Williams: Honky Tonk Blues. His 2011 film Troubadours (about Carole King and James Taylor) premiered at The Sundance Film Festival. Pearl Jam Twenty, produced by Neville and directed by Cameron Crowe, was released theatrically in 2011. Recent films include the HBO documentary, Crossfire Hurricane chronicling the rise of The Rolling Stones,  and 20 Feet from Stardom, the Oscar winning film and the top grossing documentary of 2013.

Name: Temata
Description: Temata is a full-service narrative production company driven by a passion to create bold, original, high-end audio-visual content including feature films, series, and commercials. Therein lies in our works the spirit of Indonesia.

Name: MORTARHEADD
Description:
Mortarheadd is a VFX studio where creativity meets technology to craft compelling visual scenes.
From Styleframes to Final Composites, we oversee the entire production pipeline, delivering immersive visual experiences through precision and creative direction.
Mortarheadd interprets the essence of stories embedded in text through visual language, crafting imagery that narrates on its own.
From styleframes to previs and lookdev, we visually realize the purpose and emotions of key sequences across the entire visualization process.
In high-level areas such as creature design and simulation, we’ve proven our expertise by combining both artistic vision and technical excellence.
Mortarheadd operates an internally integrated system that connects every stage — from planning and supervision to CG — in a seamless, horizontal workflow.
We maintain precise control tools and consistent quality across the entire production process through a well-structured system.
Our team of 120 experts collaborates organically within this framework, enabling us to sustain the highest level of perfection — the core strength of Mortarheadd.
Mortarheadd has pursued both artistry and technical expertise in realizing life and nature.
Through creature design and simulation, we have meticulously depicted the emotional and physical realism of living beings.
We have successfully completed projects such as the creatures in the Sweet Home series and the sea battle sequence in Hansan: Rising Dragon, and we are expanding our scope to global projects, including co-productions with China.

Name: Regent Street Cinema
Description:
The Regent Street Cinema was re-opened by the University of Westminster in May 2015, reinstating one of the most historic cinemas in Britain to its former grandeur. 

Built in 1848 and housed within the Polytechnic Institution on London’s Regent Street, the cinema was the first in the country to show moving pictures. In 1896, the cinema showcased the Lumière brothers’ Cinématographe to a paying audience, and, as the curtain fell, British cinema was born.

After being used as a student lecture hall by the university since 1980, it was restored into a working cinema featuring a state-of-the-art auditorium as well as an inclusive space for learning, cultural exchange and exhibitions. It is a truly landmark venue for the British film industry in the heart of London’s West End.

The cinema is one of the few in the country to show 16mm and 35mm film, as well as the latest in 4K digital film. It offers exclusive premieres, repertory screenings, retrospectives, documentaries, animation and experimental cinema. You can also experience double bills, showcasing the best of home-grown British talent, world cinema and classic movies in a classic environment.

The cinema will also play a key role at the centre of our community: school programmes, hands-on learning, debate and discussion will connect what we do with those around us.

The cinema has been brought back to life with generous support from the Quintin Hogg Trust, the Heritage Lottery Fund and the Garfield Weston Foundation and our many other supporters.

The University of Westminster has always been at the centre of innovation in film production and cinematography. Many of the university’s alumni occupy prominent roles within the industry. The Regent Street Cinema will provide a platform for film students and professionals to come together and showcase their outstanding work.

Name: BigTime Production
Description:
A creative representation agency directed mainly at the production of TV commercials bringing a range of resources to your door worldwide. We specialize in representing "select" Directors internationally. 

BigTime Production is a new service being offered internationally to production houses, advertising agencies, or clients looking for audiovisual solutions for your next project.

Name: Een van de jongens
Description:
We are Een van de jongens (Dutch for ‘one of the guys’), the production company of producer Hasse van Nunen and director-producer Renko Douze. Together with filmmakers with a strong vision, we produce creative documentaries about the issues that matter. Or should matter. In the past decade we’ve produced more than 20 films, that were screened and broadcast all over the world, and got awarded at Berlinale, IDFA, Full Frame a.o.

But making films is about more than just making films. We're determined to unleash the full societal potential of our films. By placing important stories in unexpected contexts, we reach unusual audiences and improve their impact.

Name: Abhijit Gajwani
Description:
Abhijit Gajwani is an award-winning filmmaker renowned for his exceptional storytelling skills. His narratives, ranging from the comedic to the poignant, consistently delve into the depths of human experience, marked by heartfelt sincerity.  

He has worked with Fortune 50 brands and beloved consumer icons to community-based non-profits, innovative startups and beyond.

Name: One More

One More is a full-service visual effects and augmented reality studio specialized in the commercials and music videos industry.

We can handle every creative and technical aspects of your VFX projects. including CONCEPT DESIGN, PREVIS, SHOOT SUPERVISION, 3D EFFECTS, ANIMATION, 2D COMPOSITING AND COLOR GRADING.

We can also create high quality AR experiences on different AR platforms (Snapchat, Instagram, Zappar) FROM CONCEPT TO PUBLISHING.

Name: Maven Pictures
Description: Maven Pictures, co-founded by partners Celine Rattray and Trudie Styler, is a transatlantic development, production, and financing company. Styler, a BAFTA-nominated and BIFA-winning producer (Lock Stock and Two Smoking Barrels, Moon) and Oscar-nominated filmmaker Rattray (who won a Golden Globe for The Kids Are All Right) focus on innovative storytelling with premiere talent. Together, they work to produce high quality independent films while taking advantage of cultural resources in New York and London and working with top tier filmmakers.

Name: Rocket Reels
Description:
Rocket Reels is a next-gen video streaming app designed for today’s fast-paced, content-hungry audience.

We bring dynamic, short-form entertainment to your fingertips—allowing users to play, pause, and resume anytime, anywhere. With a curated lineup of high-impact stories across genres, Rocket Reels offers a flexible viewing experience without compromising on depth or quality.

Whether you're commuting, taking a break, or binge-watching on the go, Rocket Reels keeps you connected to powerful narratives fast.

Key Highlights:

- Bite-sized, high-quality storytelling: Curated content that fits your time and mood
- Always accessible: Watch on your schedule, across devices

Name: I.A.T.S.E. Local 44
Description:
Affiliated Property Craftspersons Local 44 is a professional association of craft persons having specialized skills and talents within the entertainment industry. 

Local 44 is affiliated with the International Alliance of Theatrical Stage Employees, Moving Picture Technicians, Artists and Allied Crafts of the United States, its Territories and Canada (I.A.T.S.E.). 

Our Local was chartered by the I.A.T.S.E. in May of 1939. Like all unions, we are a democratically run organization. 

Local 44 has numerous collective bargaining agreements, employing over 5,000 members in more than fifty companies in Los Angeles and throughout the world. We represent a diverse group of crafts that are the best in their field. Local 44 represents members working in many diverse, but related fields of the entertainment industry, such as: Motion Picture, Television, Commercials, and Independent Shops. 

The various Crafts we represent are: Coordinator, Draperer, Floorcover, Greens, Propmaster, Propmaker, Property, Sewers, Set Decorator, Special Effects, Upholsterer, Commercial Master, Commercial Propmaker, Commercial Property, and Commercial Set Decorator.

Description:
Full-service post production and visual effects studio

EDIT | COLOR | MOTION | VFX | CGI

Cora represents a fresh approach to post-production, built on the pillars of innovation and collaborative synergy.  We collaborate with advertising agencies, production companies, brands, and artists worldwide, turning big ideas into visual reality. We are Cora. Blending expertise and talent with newer, better ways of doing things.

Description: Global production of visualization, animation and post for feature film, television, music videos, live events, theatre and architecture

Name: Les films du Worso
Description:
La société Les films du Worso a été créée en 2003 par Sylvie Pialat, après 21 ans de vie commune avec Maurice Pialat qu’elle a accompagné sur ses 5 derniers films. Elle est notamment créditée au scénario de Police et de Van Gogh et a signé l’adaptation du roman de Georges Bernanos Sous le soleil de Satan (Palme d’Or à Cannes en 1987). Elle a aussi travaillé main dans la main avec Daniel Toscan du Plantier sur la production des films de son mari.

A l’approche d’une vingtaine d’années d’exercice, Les films du Worso compte à son actif la production d’une cinquantaine de longs métrages pour le cinéma et a accompagné des réalisateurs du monde entier, tels que Nicolas Boukhrief, Alain Guiraudie, Guillaume Nicloux, Julie Gavras, Joachim Lafosse, Abderrahmane Sissako, Cédric Kahn, Xavier Beauvois, Gustave Kervern et Benoît Delépine ou encore Amos Gitaï et Corneliu Porumboiu.

Une quinzaine de films figurent dans les sélections du Festival de Cannes et le catalogue cumule une trentaine de nominations aux César (dont 10 récompenses) et une nomination pour l’Oscar du Meilleur film international en 2015 avec Timbuktu. La filmographie compte également quelques fictions et documentaires pour la télévision et une trentaine de courts métrages.

Name: Lieberman Productions
Description:
Lieberman Productions builds brands through the power of long-form direct-response TV infomercials and short form TV spots.

Its award winning video productions combines compelling story telling, high production values, top tier celebrity spokespersons and inspiring testimonials by real consumers.

Name: MacGuffin Films
Description: MacGuffin Films is a leading commercial production company specializing in tabletop advertising content for the casual dining sector, working with national and global brands and top advertising agencies. Created in 1988, MacGuffin’s roster of award-winning directors, strong creative culture and meticulous executional techniques consistently result in high-end content for television and digital platforms.

Film Editor / Second Unit Director
Original Photography on Movie Poster and Promo Items.
Director of Photography, Editor, Colorist, Compositor of Teaser.

Name: CAMERIMAGE International Film Festival
Description:
The International Film Festival of the Art of Cinematography EnergaCAMERIMAGE is the greatest and most recognized festival dedicated to the art of cinematography and its creators – cinematographers. EnergaCAMERIMAGE contributes to the growth of cinematographers’ prestige. The unconventional format of the Festival, which awards films according to their visual, aesthetic and technical values, has turned out to be an alternative for traditional film festivals. As all our guests emphasize – EnergaCAMERIMAGE is unique. The Festival proves to be a great forum not only for presentation but also for further development of international moviemaking. EnergaCAMERIMAGE helps young filmmakers and integrates the community of those already recognized, allowing them to explore new artistic areas.

Besides the Main Competition, the Festival also contains other events such as Student Etudes Competition, Documentary Films Competition, Music Videos Competition, Feature Debutes Competition, TV Pilots Competition, Polish Films Competition, EnergaCAMERIMAGE Market, EnergaCAMERIMAGE Forum, special screenings and premieres, various reviews, retrospectives, meetings and also accompanying events such as art exhibitions and music performances. Many professional filmmakers and film school students from around the world are attracted to the festival by the numerous seminars and workshops organized during the Festival, led by the greatest modern cinematographers, directors and other filmmakers. Various presentations of modern film equipment and of the latest production and postproduction technologies (both, traditional and digital) are also an inherent and a very attractive aspect of the Festival. 

All this provides an opportunity for global forum where cinematographers can discuss issues and share their knowledge, experience and ideas. EnergaCAMERIMAGE is an extraordinary event where art and technology meet creating a unique and unforgettable atmosphere. 
Feel more than welcome to join us!

Name: COLOSSALE
Description:
Colossale was established in a generation of digital natives whose defining moment was becoming lost in a world of film, television, and videos.   

Instead of remaining a complacent consumer, Colossale emerged with the objective of ushering in a new age of ambitious visual projects.  

At Colossale we deliver defiant truth in an industry of fake smiles and soft handshakes.
We are devoted to upholding the best and most visually refined products with the goal of resonating indefinitely.

Name: Camisa Preta Filmes
Description:
Da escuta à conexão: nós vestimos a sua história.

Somos uma produtora audiovisual carioca fundada por quatro sócios com trajetórias complementares no cinema, na publicidade e na televisão. Com foco em branded content e narrativas de impacto, atuamos em parceria com agências, marcas e canais de TV, criando conteúdos autênticos e relevantes para diferentes plataformas.

Paralelamente, investimos no desenvolvimento de projetos originais, colaborando com roteiristas e realizadores para fortalecer vozes e histórias potentes. Em 2024, filmamos nosso primeiro longa-metragem de ficção, Herança de Narcisa, em coprodução com a Urca Filmes e Telecine e distribuição da Olhar Filmes. O filme teve sua estreia no Festival do Rio em 2025 onde recebeu o prêmio de Melhor Filme - Júri Popular, na categoria Premiere Brasil - Novos Rumos.

Name: SP CINECORP CINEMATIC VENTURE LTD.
Description:
As a premier National Award winning filmmaking venture, SP Cinecorp synergizes creativity and commercial viability to produce the best of entertainment projects nationally and internationally. It is an associating partner to the organizations that ally with it and builds trustworthy relations which matter on a long-term basis. With an eye for creative talent & remarkable stories, SP Cinecorp endeavors to place itself amongst the league of unique & artistic ventures whose potential will continue to be realized in an ever-changing and evolving film industry. SP Cinecorp continues to invest in artistic talent & opportunities wherever found. Nurturing creativity is second nature to us and we continue to look out for the next great story that matters to audiences and has a transformative role. Managing the Film Business: In an industry involving high risks, establishing reliability and financial discipline in the film investment business has been a major achievement of SP Cinecorp. 

The film venture’s accurate mechanism scrutinizes the projects before investing the funds, consequently reducing risks. With such worthy cinematic projects, creating credibility for all the associates is a much easier process. Unlike other businesses, SP Cinecorp functions with the motto of not just to have a long list of movies on the portfolio, but to be a major entertainment conglomerate that enriches its audience with great cinematic projects. 

SP Cinecorp’s own unique approach towards the art of storytelling involves crafting great stories with stunning visuals and gripping dialogues, nurturing indelible characters and continuing to push the boundaries of filmmaking with creative approaches. Creating moments that enter the collective imagination is built with a deep & lasting desire to entertain and move people. SP Cinecorp has begun to set a benchmark of uniqueness in the film industry.

Name: Clube Filmes
Description: A Clube Filmes é uma produtora disruptiva que produz conteúdos de ficção e não ficção para diferentes mídias. Nós contamos histórias.

Name: Carmarthen Bay Film Festival
Description:
The Carmarthen Bay Film Festival (CBFF) is a prominent independent film festival based in Carmarthenshire, Wales. Established in 2012, it has grown into a significant event in the Welsh and international film scene. The festival is known for its inclusive and supportive environment for filmmakers of all levels, from emerging talents to established professionals.

Key Highlights of the Festival:
	•BAFTA British Short Film Competition Qualifying festival , CBFF  is  also officially recognized as a qualifying festival for BAFTA Cymru and BAFTA Scotland , allowing films screened at the event to be eligible for BAFTA consideration.
	•Diverse Film Categories: The festival accepts entries across various genres and formats, including feature films, short films, documentaries, animation, and Welsh-language films.
	•International Participation: It attracts filmmakers and audiences from around the world, providing a global platform for independent cinema.
	•Networking Opportunities: CBFF offers workshops, Q&A sessions, and industry networking events to help filmmakers connect and collaborate.
	•Awards Ceremony: Films are recognized in multiple categories, celebrating achievements in storytelling, cinematography, directing, and acting.

Name: BLAZE TALENT
Description:
Blaze is a model and talent agency in Randburg, Johannesburg. We represent fashion/runway models, commercial models, actors and children. Anyone between 2 years to 80 years can apply to join the Blaze family.

We work with advertising agencies, casting directors, production companies, producers, directors and photographers for print, TV commercials and runway.

Blaze is an executive member of the National Association of Model Agencies (NAMA).

Definition of Blaze: “To burn brightly and strongly”.

Name: Flatbush Pictures
Description: Flatbush Pictures is an award-winning studio based in Brooklyn, founded by filmmaker Judd Ehrlich and the late cinematographer Ryo Murakami. Renowned for bold, cinematic storytelling, its projects have earned Critics Choice and NAACP Image Award nominations, as well as Emmy, Grand Clio, and Cannes Lion wins.

Name: Soraya Intercine Films
Description:
oraya Intercine Films (SIF) adalah sebuah rumah produksi sekaligus distributor film di Indonesia. Didirikan oleh Ram Soraya pada 1 Juni 1982, adalah perusahaan film terbesar di Indonesia.

Soraya Films juga membuat divisi sinetron Soraya Television Entertainment yang memproduksi Putri Duyung Reborn yang berjalan mulai Tahun 2017 ini.

Sudah ratusan film produksi Soraya Intercine Films yang mempunyai prestasi yang membanggakan. Di bawah Vice President Sunil Soraya, banyak prestasi dan penghargaan yang dicapainya. Dan karya pertama layar lebar dari Ram Soraya yaitu : Fatima : Budak Nafsu - 1982, meraih prestasi gemilang di FFI dan FFB. Dilanjutkan dengan Film produksinya bersama Suzanna hingga saat ini masih menarik minat. Hingga karya layar lebar Ram Soraya bersama Warkop DKI, yang begitu berkesan, selalu menjadi box office

Name: Orawa FILMS
Description:
Orawa est une entreprise de production audiovisuelle

Fondée par Damien Boyer en 2007, elle travaille depuis pour raconter les destins extraordinaires de personnes à travers le monde

Name: PLUTO FILM
Description:
Pluto Film is a world sales and festival distribution company committed to engaging global cinema. We are devoted to bringing quality feature films to the international market and audiences. Our focus is on arthouse and cross-over films, especially those by emerging talents. But we also have a passion for family films and elevated genres.

With a boutique approach, we add around eight titles to our lineup each year, allowing us to give each film the attention and care it deserves. We then navigate the world beyond the window system by finding the right place and time for our films at festivals, in theaters, on TV, and online. Our objective is to circulate our films globally and make them available across all possible distribution channels.

Name: Evolving Sound
Description:
Evolving Sound delivers high-end bespoke music and sound-design to trailer houses, movie studios, streamers and TV networks, for use in theatrical promotion and entertainment marketing.

Working with a hand-picked roster of exceptional trailer composers, along with world-class orchestras, musicians, producers and engineers, we build forward-looking content around meticulously researched creative concepts.   Our music seeks to constantly stay ahead of trends, blending live musicianship with the highest and edgiest production values, to deliver exceptional and enduring material.

Recent placements include much of the Mission Impossible: Dead Reckoning Pt 1 campaign, A Haunting in Venice, The Meg 2: The Trench, Oppenheimer, Black Adam, House of the Dragon, Lord of the Rings: The Rings of Power and Jurassic World: Dominion.

Name: Comadran Studios
Description:
At COMADRAN STUDIOS, we have passion for games and movies that fuels everything we do, we are focused on getting the best entertainment experience for our users.

Our mission is to amaze the world so that everyone can enjoy a moment of happiness in the entertainment industry.

Name: New York City International Film Festival
Description: The beauty of NYCIFF is that it’s not just a place to see films. This film festival has created daily cultural events and special days to honor and celebrate the talent of film making around the world. The truth of these special events is the unity of diverse societies and ethnicities, a place where the up and coming filmmakers can connect and discuss the methods of their craft. The New York City International Film Festival goes through incredible effors with small resources to create red carpet galas and press events in order to give these films a regal environment where they can be celebrated and appreciated. Every day of our Film Festival is a FESTIVITY!

Name: somos5
Description:
somos5 is an audiovisual production company based in Madrid made up of directors, producers and good people in continuous search for new ways to connect brands with their target audience through branded content, TV and digital ads, documentaries and music videos.

Our creative and focused way of optimising resources and gathering talented people has always been our key ingredients and has enabled us to steadily grow and get strong industry recognition.

We are flexible and we always bet on new challenges, always with the closeness and transparency that characterises us.

Name: Sauce
Description: Sauce is one of New Zealand's top production & post production companies, delivering high end services for Film, Television, Corporate and Advertising Industries. Client service is our focus while executing creativity, technical craftsmanship on time and on budget.

Name: KLCK | A Film Agency
Description:
It’s not what you see.

Creative understanding makes the difference. Short, long, single or serial, we understand both the commercial world and the artistic one. Pushing brands and agencies. And this demands more than meets the eye.

Let our curious minds delve deep into your story. Then watch through our perspective. Capturing your essence by combining imagination with timeless technique. To improve the understanding of all you want to tell.

Our team consists of highly skilled, exceptional people. They get what you need. Then they’ll guide and assist you to a premium product.

Find us for anything that catches the eye but demands a bigger thought. Because it’s not what you see. It’s how it makes you feel.

Name: Oil Factory Inc.
Description:
Oil Factory is an industry-leading production company that creates forward-thinking content for integrated & traditional broadcast production in advertising, branded entertainment, television, feature film, and music video programming.  

With over twenty five years experience in production, Oil Factory has been on the cutting edge of brand integration working with such ad agencies as Wieden + Kennedy, BBDO, Grey, Crispin Porter, Mullen, Deutsch, mono, DDB, Chiat Day, GSD&M, 72 and Sunny, and David & Goliath, and with clients such as Nike, ESPN, AT&T, L'Oreal, Gillette, Porsche, Mercedes, Samsung, and Google.  

Oil Factory has also produced iconic music videos for such artists as Radiohead, Madonna, Gwen Stefani & No Doubt, Coldplay, Sade, Maroon 5, Annie Lennox & Eurythmics, Metallica, Marilyn Manson, Smashing Pumpkins, and The Chemical Brothers, to name just a few.

Oil Factory has also won numerous industry accolades including: Emmys, Grammys, Clios, Cannes Lions, MTV Awards, CMT Awards, Much Music Awards, MVPA Awards, AICP Awards, AD&Ds, and Brit Awards, to name a few.

Oil Factory represents many of it's industry's most respected and award winning filmmakers, such as Sophie Muller, Doug Pray, Robert Boocheck, Pedro Romhanyi, Jamie Thraves, Daniela Federici, and Mark Polish.

"We will continue to be a pioneer in producing consistently fresh & exciting work while adapting and evolving to the rapidly changing world we call production."

Name: La Bibi.it
Description:
Having turned twentyfive in 2014, laBiBi.it is a dubbing and language localization company, whose strenght comes out of its founding partners’ cinema, theater, television and advertising experience.
LaBibi.it, thanks to its own talents and vocal directors, as well as the best freelance vocal artists, performs feature films, tv-movies, live-action serials, cartoons, interactive games and documentaries dialogue replacement, from the starting process of dialogue translation and adaptation to the final layback of the mixed Italian track on the video master, including the Italian graphics and titling job.

Name: PhotoCineShop
Description:
PhotoCineShop est une entreprise spécialisée dans la vente en direct et en ligne de matériel destiné aux professionnels de la production audiovisuelle.

Distributeur français de produits très hauts de gamme tels que Zeiss, Arri, Denz, Sachtler… notre vocation est de proposer les meilleurs produits du secteur et d’accompagner au mieux nos clients lors de leurs projets professionnels : tournages cinéma, publicités, clips, courts métrages. 

Nous comptons également dans notre catalogue les poids lourds du marché : Canon, Nikon, Sony, Blackmagic Design, AJA, et bien d'autres…

Forts de notre activité en France, nous sommes de plus en plus présents sur les marchés étrangers (Europe, Etats-Unis, Afrique du Nord…).

Name: Pagliai Film Group
Description:
Pagliai Film Group è una casa di produzione cinematografica, televisiva e commerciale con sede a Firenze.

Nata dalla fusione tra Otello Pagliai Produzioni e Saints Film Group, è specializzata nella realizzazione di produzioni cinematografiche quali lungometraggi, cortometraggi e documentari; produzioni televisive come serie TV e fiction; produzioni pubblicitarie quali Spot, Company Profile e Videoclip, e produzione di contenuti audiovisivi per il web.

Lavoriamo con alcuni dei maggiori brand a livello internazionale nei settori della moda, della musica, della nautica, dell’auto motive.

Name: Giant Films
Description:
Founded by Ian and Cindy Gabriel in 1995, Giant Films is a creative partnership that is known and trusted throughout the world.

Always independent, with a desire to tell emotionally compelling stories, and with a depth of experience and know-how, Giant Films strives to communicate messages that resonate across all genres of filmmaking. As well as receiving multiple awards for its work in feature films, commercials, documentaries and music videos, Giant Films continues to build on its reputation for creatively innovative and conceptually-driven productions. Giant Films offers production facilitation of commercials and music videos and co-production for feature length films.

Giant Films represents directors IAN GABRIEL, KARIEN CHERRY, PAUL WARD, PERI, THATI PELE, ALLISON SWANK, JESSIE ZINN & KATYA ABEDIAN

Name: The Knowledge
Description:
The Knowledge book was first published in 1986 by three production managers, who decided to get together and pool their contacts and expertise.

The result, over thirty years on, is a directory that has become known as the industry bible for film and TV professionals.

Twelve years after the print edition was launched, the website was born.
Theknowledgeonline.com quickly became a one-stop shop for those looking for crew, service providers, suppliers and anyone who may work behind the camera in film and television.

A few years later we launched The Knowledge Bulletin.

This weekly news digest now carries advertising as well as a potted version of the varied original content – news, features and guides - published over the last seven days, and goes out to over 20,000 people.

MBI took over The Knowledge in 2015. The site now has over 420 categories, from armourers to art directors, from baby wranglers to line producers, making it a must-use-tool for anyone looking to source services, suppliers, crew or studios in the UK.

Take a look around the website and find out why so many industry professionals rely on The Knowledge for all their production needs.

Name: Silver Salt Restoration
Description:
Silver Salt are the UK's leading experts in Film and Television Archive and Restoration work.
Our team of specialists offer a full 360° service covering all aspects of the digital remastering process.
As a firm we are leading the current movement towards 4k 16bit workflows for UHD delivery.
Working closely with our clients we select the best picture and sound elements available from archives sourced the world over. From the careful handling and cleaning of physical film to the painstaking manual restoration and grading of the subsequent digital film frames we work to retain the integrity of our clients' content.
Our purpose is to preserve and restore original source film elements to produce new master versions that will protect and future proof content with an ultimate goal of presenting a renewed film that celebrates the original vision of the artist.

Name: Nomadic
Description:
A future- facing, full service production company. Telling the stories that deserve to be told. Often on the road.

Whether creating independent films or crafting stories with our clients, we strive to create something beautiful, fresh and different. From ideation all the way through to post-production, our team of content creators work collaboratively to ensure every piece of work we produce is innovative, authentic and has the signature Nomadic aesthetic.

Name: LB Entertainment [Losbragas]
Description:

Behind hits such as Sintonia (Netflix's biggest brazilian premiere in 2019) and Samantha! LB also collaborated with organizations such as the United Nations and Mandela Foundation and developed special projects for brands such as P&G, Heineken, FIAT and Santander. To explore new formats and new ways of telling engaging, original stories is what motivates LB, a company aiming at high production value for its projects - through creativity, cooperation and special access to talent and new ideas. LB is currently producing Amazon Studio's new show in Latin America, "Lov3", and has recently premiered two feature documentaries on HBO.
The team at LB is fully dedicated to the development of original intellectual property, deeply believes in the force of emerging voices in Latin America, and in how talent can establish a relevant, new dialogue with global audiences. This means working with independence — in the name of good storytelling and bold ideas.

The African Film Festival - FCAT

Name: Spotter
Description:
Over the last two decades, the capture formats, workflows, deliverables, exhibition media and consumer technology have all evolved drastically, giving creators more power and flexibility to tell their stories in a more immersive manner. Enabling that creative power however requires more planning, organization, foresight, transparency and stronger technical skill sets than ever before. We live in an era where post-production is not just a formality to be completed, but rather an integral part of telling a story where the storytelling as well as the viewer experience can be elevated to a higher level. How do we ensure we don’t simply use the crafts of post-production to fix mistakes, but rather captivate our audiences' attention in every frame?

And that is exactly what I have been attempting to solve for most of my professional life and why I wanted to start Spotter.

Over the last four years, I served as the Director of Post-Production for Netflix, India where I built a team and worked closely with India’s post vendor and talent ecosystem to change how we look at post-production. After being involved in almost 60 titles over these years across scripted series, feature films and non-fiction content, I realized that much of that expertise and best practices we pioneered on these projects had not spread beyond the Netflix ecosystem.

And that had to change. 
To continue this revolution, I joined forces with Sreeram Ramanathan and Sumeet Kamath, who in many ways have been fighting for the same cause for as long as I have, through Telecartel and Coolab.

Together, our goal is to streamline and improve post-production management across India and as many emerging entertainment production markets as possible. In the process, we also hope we can decentralize post-production using technology, and help creators access the finest post-production talent from all parts of the world.

Don’t fix it in post. Let Spotter fix your post.

Vijay Venkataramanan
Co-Founder

 From payroll services incorporating EP On LocationTM or our premium EP Plus service, we deliver like no one else. Even tax credit tracking is made easier and faster by our software and skilled staff.

Description:
Donna Schenker Holly, founder of Sonderful Productions, interviews and video records (on Zoom or in person) individuals, couples, families and family offices telling the stories of their lives to be preserved as a legacy for their kids, grandkids, other family members (as well as future family members!) and friends.  

The goal of Sonderful is to capture some of the big things (like stories of one’s childhood, family ancestry, education, love, career, children, grandchildren, friends, passions, hobbies) as well as the little or not-discussed-as-often things, the stuff we often wish we knew (their favorite this or that, how they experienced historical events, times they remember laughing the hardest, people who made the biggest impact on them, lessons learned) and those things that are hard to describe but that we so want to always remember (maybe it’s the way someone’s eyes crinkle when they laugh, how they wave their arms around when they’re telling a story, the funny squeak they make when they sneeze…the stuff that makes them them).  

Prior to starting Sonderful in 2021, Donna was President and co-owner of The Investment Institute (TII), now known as Academy for Institutional Investors, an educational membership organization for institutional and private investors, family offices, managers, and other financial professionals. 

Donna spent eight years as an advertising agency producer in New York, developing TV and radio commercials for national clients, first at Wells Rich Greene BDDP and later at Ammirati Puris Lintas. She received her Bachelor of Arts degree in English from the University of Florida, studied psychology in a post baccalaureate program at Hunter College, gets back to her hometown (Miami, FL) as often as possible, and is now, along with her husband, studying the development and care of chickens and hound dogs in her own backyard, after a culture-shock producing move to Roswell, Georgia after 19 years in Manhattan.
