Name: La Guarimba International Film Festival
Description:
La Guarimba is a cultural organisation situated in the southern Italian region of Calabria with the aim of bringing the cinema back to the people and the people back to the cinema. We work with cinema and illustration using culture as a vehicle to promote our values of participatory democracy, integration and accessibility.

Upon returning to his homeland, Calabro-Venezuelan Giulio Vita founded the film festival in collaboration with Sara Fratini, a Venezuelan illustrator and Madrid Fine Arts graduate and El Tornillo de Klaus, a Spanish audiovisual artists collective.

Guarimba, in venezuelan indigenous language, means “safe place”.

La Guarimba’s main objective is to bring the cinema back to the people and the people back to the cinema. This goal is at the helm of the restoration of a 938 seat outdoor theater in Calabria, the organization of an international film festival with free entry, and the creation of La Scuola Delle Scimmie in Puglia, an informal school for teaching cinema and illustration. It also prompted us to create La Guarimba On Tour, an initiative that takes the festival’s official selections around the world for smaller, often impromptu, screenings. What’s more, in August 2015 we organized the first European Vimeo conference about direct online distribution for independent film.

Name: Creativ Sün Films
Description:
Creativ Sün Films conçoit et réalise des films stratégiques destinés à traduire l’action publique, associative et territoriale en récits clairs, stratégique et efficaces.
Notre approche est issue du cinéma documentaire: elle combine exigence artistique, compréhension fine des enjeux institutionnels et regard politique sur les territoires.

Nous accompagnons les acteurs engagés - collectivités, institutions, associations, entreprises responsables - dans la mise en récit de leurs projets afin de:
- rendre lisibles des actions complexes,
- valoriser l’impact social, environnemental ou territorial,
- créer de l’adhésion, de la compréhension et du dialogue,
- renforcer la légitimité et la portée de leurs dispositifs.

Creativ Sün Films ne se positionne pas comme une agence de communication, mais comme une structure de création documentaire au service des récits d’utilité sociale. Chaque projet fait l’objet d’un accompagnement narratif approfondi, fondé sur:
- l’écoute stratégique,
- l’écriture documentaire,
- une relation de confiance avec les équipes
- et une exigence esthétique forte.

Name: Erler Film A.Ş.
Description:
Erler Film-Türker İnanoğlu Sunar..." Erler Film'in kurulduğu 1960 yılından bugüne nesiller bu cümleyle büyüdü.. Önce beyazperdede yankılandı bu cümle, sonra da renkli camda..

1950'lerin ikinci yarısında, 20'li yaşlarında sinema aşığı bir genç olan Türker İnanoğlu, Ö. Lütfi Akad ve Nişan Hançer gibi usta yönetmenlerin asistanlığını yaparak sinemaya adım attı. Çeşitli yapım kuruluşları için yönetmenlik yaptıktan sonra kendi filmlerini kendi şirketi için çekmeye karar verdi ve 1960'ta Erler Film'i kurdu.

Türkiye'de kurumlaşan ilk film şirketi olan Erler Film, kurulduğu günden bugüne, bünyesinde sürekli olarak bir yapım ekibi bulundurmayı ilke edinerek, 40 yılı aşkın bir süredir ara vermeksizin, siyah-beyazdan renkliye, yerli yapımlardan koprodüksiyonlara, tarihi filmlerden komedilere kadar geniş yelpazede sinema filmleri üretmektedir.

1990'lardan başlayarak, Türk televizyonlarına sinema tadında diziler de hazırlayan Erler Film, yapımlarının temelindeki sağlam senaryolar, her zaman en iyi oyuncu ve yönetmenlerle çalışması ve Türk halkının tüm kesimlerine hitap edebilen kaliteli eserler üretmesiyle, ülkenin en başarılı yapımevlerinden birisidir.

Name: New York International Children's Film Festival
Description:
New York International Children’s Film Festival was founded in 1997 to support the creation and dissemination of thoughtful, provocative, and intelligent film for children and teens ages 3-18. The Festival experience cultivates an appreciation for the arts, encourages active, discerning viewing, and stimulates lively discussion among peers, families, and the film community.

The flagship New York City Festival has grown from one weekend of films into the largest film festival for children and teens in North America. Screened over the course of four weeks at venues throughout NYC, the Festival program – narrowed down from roughly 2,500 international submissions – is comprised of approximately 100 short and feature films, filmmaker Q&As, retrospective programs, parties, and premieres. Audience members of all ages vote on the Festival-winning films. The Festival is an Academy Award qualifying festival, one of only four film festivals in New York State – and only two children’s film festivals in the country – to hold that honor. Winners of the Festival’s juried prizes are eligible for consideration at the annual Academy Awards. 

In addition to presenting the annual event, New York International Children’s Film Festival is a multifaceted arts organization that offers year-round engagement with special event premieres, nationwide touring programs and satellite festivals, filmmaking camps, and educational programs for school groups.

Name: NORMANDIE IMAGES
Description:
Normandie Images œuvre au développement du cinéma, de l’audiovisuel et de la création multimédia, en accompagnant la mise en œuvre des politiques publiques du territoire.
Elle travaille en direction des professionnels, des collectivités publiques et de tous les publics.
Normandie Images accompagne la création et la production, mais aussi l’accueil des tournages, mène des actions en faveur de la diffusion des œuvres.
Pôle de ressources, de conseils et d’expertises, elle participe activement à l’animation de réseaux, à la coopération interprofessionnelle et favorise les conditions du développement de la filière.
L’agence encourage également les pratiques innovantes et l’adaptation aux enjeux des technologies numériques et des nouveaux usages.
Par son travail d’éducation, notamment auprès des scolaires, elle facilite l’accès de tous les publics aux images, dans le respect des principes et des valeurs des droits culturels.
Enfin, grâce à la collecte et la valorisation de films amateurs ou professionnels, elle construit la mémoire cinématographique et audiovisuelle de la Normandie.

L'association est financée et soutenue par le Conseil Régional de Normandie, des services de l'État : Direction Régionale des Affaires Culturelles et l'Académie de Normandie ; Centre National du Cinéma et de l'Image Animée ; Conseils Départementaux de l'Eure, du Calvados, de la Manche, de l'Orne et de Seine-Maritime.

Name: Cinéma l'Alhambra
Description:
L’Alhambra, équipement culturel de la Ville de Marseille, construit en 1928, a réouvert ses portes en 1990 après avoir été rénové par la Ville de Marseille. Sa façade est caractéristique des cinémas des années 1930 et s’ouvre sur la place Raphel à Saint-Henri, du côté de l’Estaque, dans le 16ème arrondissement.

Classé Art et Essai, labels Jeune public, Patrimoine/Répertoire et Recherche et Découverte, ce cinéma est doté d’une salle de 232 fauteuils avec un écran de 12 m sur 7 m, de halls d’accueils et de convivialité et d’un espace d’exposition. L’Alhambra dispose également d’espaces permettant l’organisation d’ateliers de réalisation : un studio de tournage, une salle de montage, une petite salle de projection et une salle MashUp.

Il organise chaque année autour de 1200 séances de cinéma et réunit 60 000 spectateurs. De nombreux évènements sont organisés : ciné-repas, ciné-concerts, débats, reprise de la Quinzaine des Réalisateurs chaque année fin mai juste après Cannes, festivals Télérama adulte et jeune public, etc. Par ailleurs, des formations, des résidences et de nombreuses animations s’y déroulent.

Depuis plus de 30 ans, son travail de diffusion cinématographique s’accompagne d’une action culturelle et éducative quotidienne destinée au plus grand nombre (autour de 8000 élèves chaque année), plaçant la transmission et l’éducation aux images au cœur de son projet.

L’Alhambra Cinémarseille est une association présidée par Robert Guédiguian.

Name: Saxonia Media Filmproduktionsgesellschaft mbH
Description:
Emotionale Geschichten, brisante Themen auf höchstem filmischen Niveau zu erzählen und damit spannend zu unterhalten, diesem Credo fühlt sich das Team der Saxonia Media Filmproduktionsgesellschaft mbH verpflichtet. Der Fokus liegt dabei auf der Etablierung fiktionaler Serien, Reihen und der Produktion erfolgreicher Fernsehspiele.

Die Saxonia Media ist einer der führenden deutschen Serienproduzenten und produzierte seit 1995 mehr als 100 Tatorte und Polizeirufe, sowie über 40 Fernseh- und Kinofilme . Mit den Serien In aller Freundschaft und Tierärztin Dr. Mertens produziert die Saxonia Media zwei der quotenstärksten Primetime-Formate des deutschen Fernsehens. Das Spin-off In aller Freundschaft – Die jungen Ärzte gehört zu den erfolgreichsten Formaten im Vorabendprogramm der ARD. Mit WaPo Bodensee und WaPo Berlin etablierte die Saxonia Media seit 2017 eine neue Krimimarke in diesem Programmsegment. Die Kinder- und Jugendserie Schloss Einstein ergänzt das Portfolio und feierte mit der 1000. Folge 2021 ein ganz besonderes Jubiläum. 

2020 gründete die Saxonia Media das Label RED PONY PICTURES. Zusammen mit jungen und erfahrenen Kreativen aus der Filmbranche werden unter diesem Label innovative und zeitgeistige fiktionale Serien und Filme – von Mainstream bis edgy, von national bis international – für die Welt der Streaming- und Online-Plattformen entwickelt. Die exklusiv für die ARD Mediathek produzierte Serie 2 Minuten war für den Grimme Preis 2021 nominiert und läuft weltweit erfolgreich auf Festivals. Exlusiv für Netflix wurde der Film Du Sie Er & Wir produziert.

Name: Salón de Productores y Proyectos Cinematográficos - SAPCINE
Description:
El SALÓN DE PRODUCTORES Y PROYECTOS CINEMATOGRÁFICOS -SAPCINE- es un proceso de formación y fortalecimiento para 42 proyectos iberoamericanos de largometraje -sostenibles e incluyentes- conformado por un evento de inmersión total académico y de mercado (SAPCINE FICCALI); asesorías permanentes -hasta que la película lo requiera- con énfasis en las coproducciones y temas como contratación, presupuestos, distribución, derechos de autor (SAPCINE LAB); acceso a actualización constante en temas pertinentes a la industria y al quehacer cinematográfico (SAPCINE CONTINUADO) y participación de jóvenes productores emergentes del Valle del Cauca (SEMILLERO SAPCINE).

El evento inmersivo -SAPCINE FICCALI- componente de industria del Festival Internacional de Cine de Cali, se desarrolla a través de conferencias y tutorías, así como espacios de networking y one to one en un entorno de mercado audiovisual. SAPCINE le apuesta a la coproducción del cine iberoamericano y al trabajo colaborativo desde un modelo de producción incluyente, consciente y sostenible.

Cuenta con más de 80 aliados que apoyan a los proyectos participantes, cubriendo las necesidades de acuerdo a la etapa en la que se encuentren. Nuestras empresas y eventos aliados otorgan múltiples beneficios y premios como equipos, postproducción, asesorías, talleres, acompañamientos, coproducciones, ventas internacionales y rutas de circulación en festivales y otros encuentros. 

Somos el proceso cinematográfico que más premios entrega en el mundo!

Name: Epsilon Film
Description:
EPSILON FILM is a joint venture between Alice von Einem (née Buquoy) and Julia Weber, two former Global Screen executives, and the Beta Group.

We are a global distributer of high-quality and commercially appealing feature films. Our focus is on family entertainment and brand-based content. We scout for and participate in projects at the earliest stage and have a close hands-on approach during development, financing and production. We act quickly and can create synergies through Beta’s excellent TV sales division, production companies, distribution entities and service providers, among others.

Throughout our career we have gained thorough experience in family entertainment and are proud of our track record: While at Global Screen, we gained particular expertise in the area of family entertainment by being responsible for the worldwide acquisition and sales, with titles such as IP-driven features as LASSIE COME HOME, THE AMAZING MAURICE or original content like OOOPS! NOAH IS GONE…, MY FAIRY TROUBLEMAKER, THE LAST WHALE SINGER.

Moreover we have had acquired internationally successful titles like NICK OFF DUTY, THIS CRAZY HEART and adaptations of internationally bestselling novels by Sebastian Fitzek CUT OFF or Ferdinand von Schirach THE COLLINI CASE.

Name: Film i Skåne
Description:
Film in Skåne is a regional resource and production center for film that works widely throughout the film area and collaborates with many campanies both regionally, nationally and internationally. Feel free to contact us with your ideas and questions. Our employees look forward to helping you! 

The vision 
Film in Skåne's vision for the business reads: “Skåne is Scandinavia's most dynamic film region where film is seen as an important art and communication form, where a strong and extensive film production develops Scanian creators and companies, attracts national and international film investments, creates attention and contributes to to strengthen the Skåne brand from a broad perspective. ” 

Film in Skåne works on the basis of two assignments 
1. Promotion of film cultural activities; mainly financed by the Cultural Committee Region Skåne. 
2. Growth in Skåne through film production; mainly financed through assignment agreements with Film i Skåne's owner Business Region Skåne.

Name: Gebeka Films
Description:
Créée en 1997 par Jean-Michel Gévaudan, Marc Bonny et Jacques Kraemer, Gebeka Films affirme une ligne éditoriale forte : distribuer en France des films de qualité à destination du jeune public (longs, moyens et courts métrages, en animation ou fiction). 
En 2018, Hildegarde, la holding créée par Reginald de Guillebon, (également propriétaire des sociétés Folimage et Les Armateurs) acquiert Gebeka Films.

Gebeka Films, c’est aujourd’hui plus d’une centaine de titres au catalogue, avec une grande majorité de films d’animation.

Parmi les auteurs français ou étrangers représentés : Michel Ocelot, Hayao Miyazaki, Karel Zeman, Grégoire Solotareff, Isao Takahata, Serge Elissalde, Jean-François Laguionie, Garri Bardine, Jacques-Rémy Girerd, Claude Barras, Jiri Barta, Tomm Moore, etc.

Depuis sa création, Gebeka Films œuvre ainsi aux succès du box-office français avec Kirikou et la sorcière (1998), Mon voisin Totoro (1999), L’enfant qui voulait être un ours (2002), Kirikou et les bêtes sauvages (2005), Les trois brigands (2007), Brendan et le secret de Kells (2009), Une vie de chat (2010), Le tableau (2011) ou encore Ma vie de Courgette (2016).

En plus de la distribution, Gebeka Films c’est également une activité de production initiée en 2000 avec Princes et princesses de Michel Ocelot, qui se poursuit notamment avec Loulou et autres loups, Les contes de l’horloge magique, Le jour des corneilles, Ma vie de courgette ou Zombillénium.

Depuis plus de vingt ans, Gebeka Films s’est installé dans le paysage de la distribution française et figure très régulièrement dans le top 25 des distributeurs avec une bonne moyenne d’entrées par copie. Gebeka Films collabore régulièrement avec les sociétés françaises et internationales, leaders de la production d’animation.

Name: Cinemateca Distrital
Description:
En 1971 siguiendo el ejemplo de la Cinemateca Francesa, se fundó en Bogotá la Cinemateca Distrital: un archivo fílmico, una biblioteca especializada y una sala de cine que fue la primera de su tipo en Colombia. Desde ese entonces, la Cinemateca Distrital, ahora principal escenario de la Gerencia de Artes Audiovisuales, es un observatorio de cultura audiovisual gracias a sus investigaciones y publicaciones.

Es un centro de formación para los realizadores colombianos y un espacio que ofrece a los colombianos todo el cine del mundo: desde las grandes obras del patrimonio audiovisual de la humanidad, pasando por lo más reciente de la producción global e incluyendo también los audiovisuales experimentales, comunitarios y alternativos que se producen tanto en los barrios populares de Bogotá, Colombia como en las calles de todos los continentes.

Name: Film Festival Academy
Description:
The Film Festival Academy has been established with the intention of becoming a credible, ethical, flexible and truly international community network platform for film festival professionals (and all other constituents involved or interested in the film festival world), providing a neutral space for knowledge exchange, vocational training and actual collaboration.

Primarily the operation will entail specially curated and specifically themed industry events run at and with international film festivals, where the festival hosts the events but the Film Festival Academy, after discussions with the festivals regarding actual content and formats etc, takes the main responsibility in programming, organising and delivering the event. (We will also be working with other hosts and collaborative partners, such as film institutes, film schools, etc.) The events are therefore genuinely collaborative in nature, co-produced by the Film Festival Academy and the hosting festival etc. The plan is to have 4–6 high-profile events across the world, throughout the year, added to by other 'branded' smaller events as and when strategically appropriate.

In parallel to this, many online services and activities will include the events being accessible somehow (whether via video broadcast and/or digital podcast and/or edited transcripts), various means of festival professionals' interconnectivity (much like an industry-specific LinkedIn), a diverse range of publications related to film festivals (from academic, film critical, and trade journalistic texts to official industry reports and festivals' own materials), and daily film industry and festival news etc. All this means that the Film Festival Academy will be a truly unique operation as no other organisation has functioning online and offline means of delivering services, activities and content, being truly of use to a very wide range of constituents.

Name: Texas Archive of the Moving Image
Description:
The Texas Archive of the Moving Image (TAMI) is an independent non-profit organization founded in 2002 to discover, preserve and make accessible, and educate the community about Texas’ moving image heritage. TAMI's collection includes more than 9,000 videos related to the history and culture of the state of Texas streaming at TexasArchive.org. 

Since 2008, TAMI has partnered with the Office of the Governor’s Texas Film Commission on the Texas Film Round-Up, a traveling media history and preservation program providing free digitization for Texas moving images. The program won the Texas Digital Library’s Outreach Award in 2000, and the American Association for State and Local History’s Leadership in History Award of Merit and WOW Award in 2010.

Name: TELOS ADAPTATION
Description:
TELOS est une société spécialisée dans l’adaptation de documentaires, de films, de séries TV et de vidéos institutionnelles.

Les équipes de TELOS – composées de directeurs artistiques, d’ingénieurs du son, de monteurs, d’opérateurs de sous-titrages, de traducteurs, d’adaptateurs et de comédiens – œuvrent avec la plus grande exigence pour fabriquer des versions multilingues de qualité.
Chaque film qui nous est confié est visionné avec la plus grande attention afin de proposer l’équipe la plus adaptée qui tout au long de la fabrication, restera à l’écoute des réalisateurs / producteurs / chargés de programme etc.
Notre but est de réaliser des versions sous-titrées et / ou doublées qui serviront au mieux l’œuvre originale. Nous adaptons des films depuis et vers toutes les langues grâce à un réseau solide et varié de traducteurs en langues rares notamment : français – anglais – italien – espagnol – portugais – polonais – danois- suédois – finnois – norvégien – russe – chinois – japonais – coréen – arabe – hébreu – hindi– néerlandais – vietnamien …

Nous croyons à l’interculturel, aux binômes, à la rencontre de deux langues maternelles qui viennent donner toute sa richesse et sa justesse à une adaptation.
Nous mettons un point d’honneur à travailler avec des opérateurs de sous-titrage pour les simulations des versions sous-titrées et des directeurs artistiques pour les versions voix car ce sont eux qui apportent un regard neuf sur le texte et lui donne vie, l’un en peaufinant le sous-titrage pour s’assurer ou faire en sorte qu’il soit fluide et presque invisible, l’autre en dirigeant les comédiens pour que le texte prenne corps.
TELOS c’est l’assurance d’équipes unies et fédérées autour d’un projet, chacun mettant son expertise et sa connaissance au profit de vos films.

Name: ALIAS AGENCE ARTISTIQUE - ALIAS TALENTS
Description:
Talent Agency representing Actors, Directors and Screenwritters.
A talent agent, or booking agent, is a person who finds jobs for actors, authors, film directors, writers and other people in various entertainment businesses. 
Agents make their money by taking a percentage of the money that their client is paid. 
There are different regulations that govern different types of agents that are established by artist's unions and the legal jurisdiction in which the agent operates. There are also professional organizations that license talent agencies.

Actors may be interested in working theatrically (stage, film or television) as well as in commercials. Some agents will handle all types of acting work while others may specialize in a particular area. There are agents who represent television, voice-overs, or just film and television. Typically, the larger the agency, the more specialized the agents.

A well established agent will have networks upon networks of contacts. Also, agents have access to professional casting services. Many of these casting resources are not available to the general public.

Name: Copper Wire Productions
Description:
So, you really want to know all about me?  

In February 2015, after 32 years in radio I was at the height of my success, the apex, I could see the summit and was about to reach it!  My skills were so finely tuned that I was 34 for 34 in radio reclamation projects, never missing an objective, ever, regardless of the difficulty.  

Rewards were being showered on me from every direction!  High six-figure salaries, huge cash bonuses, awards for top sales performance, manager of the year awards, station of the year programming awards, and opportunity to go to the next level despite not having a college degree.    

34 disastrous radio stations all losing millions and millions of dollars when I got there, and I quickly turned them into record setting revenue powerhouses every single time!  My teams beat everyone and never lost.  The competition, the other stations in our own company, the analyst's expectations, the stockholder’s expectations, there was simply no goal we could not reach.  We outperformed everyone, everything in every market regardless of the format, ratings, or the economy.  

Sounds amazing, I was living the dream, but the funny thing was, I really, really, really hated going to work every day!  I was caught up in the everyday definition of management, a series of interruptions interrupted by more interruptions.  I was not designing the LIFE that I wanted to live so....

At the height of it all, I just got up and walked away…  

I write, produce, direct, and star in my own independent films as myself, Hugh McPherson, as a character, or as The Movie Star Next Door!

Name: Canacine México
Description:
La Cámara Nacional de la Industria Cinematográfica y del Videograma (CANACINE) es una institución autónoma de interés público, con personalidad jurídica y patrimonio de duración indefinida. 

Cuenta con  circunscripción en todo el territorio mexicano y está constituida conforme a la Ley de Cámaras Empresariales y sus Confederaciones. Su principal objetivo es ofrece a sus asociados toda una gama de servicios para colaborar en la superación y competitividad de sus empresas, beneficiando así a la Industria Cinematográfica Nacional.

En su seno está representado el interés general de la Industria Cinematográfica y del Videograma, ya que en ella están integradas las personas físicas o morales que se dedican a:

      * Producción de películas de largometraje y cortometraje.
      * Distribución de películas comerciales de largometraje y cortometraje.
      * Exhibición de películas cinematográficas, de largometraje y cortometraje.
      * Los estudios cinematográficos y de doblaje, los laboratorios y talleres que directamente estén relacionados con la industria cinematográfica.
      * Productoras, reproductoras, distribuidoras, exhibidoras y comercializadoras en general de videogramas, en sus distintos formatos.

CANACINE es foro de industriales, donde se intercambian opiniones y experiencias, y se toman decisiones sectoriales que representan y favorecen el interés de los mismos.

Name: Escuela de teoria y critica cinematografica Observatorio de Cine
Description:
El Observatorio es la primer escuela de España especializada en Documental, Teoría y Crítica de Cine.
Además de conformarse como Escuela, El Observatorio tiene como meta construir un espacio de generación y debate de ideas en torno al cine, con la vocación de llegar a ser un auténtico Centro de Estudios.
En El Observatorio trabajamos sobre dos áreas: el Área de Teoría y Crítica de Cine y el Área de Realización Documental.
Poseemos tres tipos de cursos: las Diplomaturas en Teoría y Crítica de Cine y en Documental Creativo (únicas en España y de un año de duración ); los Cursos Superiores de Crítica y de Documental Creativo (cuatrimestrales y con un enfoque más práctico); y los seminarios monográficos.
La filosofía de El Observatorio se basa en la discusión teórica y el análisis, pero con un claro objetivo de generar documentales de autor y productos culturales relacionados con cine. Es un centro de formación e información, de contacto con pares y de especialización en la práctica de la crítica cinematográfica y la realización documental.

KAIRA FILMS on oululainen videotuotantoyhtiö, mutta toimintakenttämme on aktiivisesti ympäri Suomen ja tarvittaessa myös maan rajojen ulkopuolella.

Olemme erikoistuneet laadukkaiden audiovisuaalisten produktioiden tuotantoon, alusta loppuun. Kerromme yrityksesi tarinan kaivautuen pintaa syvemmälle.

KAIRA FILMS  on video-, valokuva- ja äänituotannon alan ammattilaisista koostuva tiimi, joka pystyy vastaamaan vaativimmakin videotuotannon haasteisiin, ja joka luo vaikuttavaa mediasisältöä kaikkiin viestinnän eri tarpeisiin.

Uskomme visuaalisen viestinnän vaikuttavuuteen. Vahvuutenamme on visualisoida asiakkaamme ideat mieleenpainuviksi sisällöiksi. Luomme kuhunkin tuotantoon puhuttelevat tarinat ja tunteikkaat äänimaisemat. Tarinamme välittävät tietoa, herättävät tunteita ja tuottavat elämyksiä.

Video- ja valokuvatuotantomme lisäävät yritysten tunnettavuutta ja toimivat keskeisenä markkinoinnin välineenä.
Haluamme tuottaa palvelumme asiakasta tyydyttävällä tavalla ja ammattimaisin lopputuloksin. Varmistaaksemme asiakastyytyväisyyden teemme kiinteästi yhteistyötä asiakkaan kanssa koko prosessin ajan.

Kaira Films on viimeisen 7 vuoden aikana toteuttanut yli 30 musiikkivideota, joilla on yhteensä noin 32 miljoonaa katselukertaa.

Elä epäröi ottaa yhteyttä ja toteutetaan yhdessä sinun tai yrityksesi näköinen videotuotanto!

Name: Ojos Rojos
Description:
"Ojos Rojos" nace como consolidación de diversos proyectos realizados a lo largo de una década. Sus socios vienen de diversas áreas lo que la transforma en una productora transversal en cuanto a servicios. 

Sus primeros trabajos son tres cortometrajes, "El Vaso de Leche", "El Duelo" y "Roldán", seleccionados en festivales tanto en Chile como en el extranjero. 

El 2008 y gracias al aporte de CORFO desarrollan el piloto de la serie ¿QUIEN MATÓ A GAETE?, inspirada en la canción del poeta chileno Mauricio Redolés. 

El 2009, en el marco del XXI Recontres Cinemas d Amerique Latine de Tolouse, la productora estrenó con gran éxito su primera producción, el documental “Más allá de estos Muros”, una película que narra la vida y obra del artista chileno Juan Downey (1940-1993. Este proyecto fue realizado en parte  gracias a los aportes de Fondart 2004, Corfo Distribución y  la DIRAC del gobierno de chile. 

Recientemente  la productora acaba de estrenar en las salas de cine chilena el documental “Ojos Rojos”, un proyecto desarrollado gracias a los aportes de CORFO 2006 del gobierno de Chile, el FONDO DE FOMENTO AUDIOVISUAL 2010 del gobierno de Chile, y empresas privadas como ENTEL, COCA-COLA y NIKE entre otras.  "Ojos Rojos" se estreno en Mayo 2010 y es el documental mas visto en toda la historia del cine chileno ha participado en festivales de Chile, Canada, Mexico y Cuba.

Name: Solothurner Filmtage
Description:
Die Solothurner Filmtage sind das bedeutendste Festival für den Schweizer Film. Jahr für Jahr im Januar präsentieren die Filmtage im "Forum" eine repräsentative Auswahl an aktuellen Schweizer Filmen. Die Werkschau wird ergänzt mit zwei exklusiven Spezialprogrammen: dem Programm "Rencontre" und dem Programm "Invitation".

Während neu 8 Tagen wird Solothurn zum Ort der Begegnungen und des Dialogs zwischen Film, Politik und Kultur. Die Schweizer Filmakademie ist zu Gast am Festival. Sie wählt die Kandidaten für den Schweizer Filmpreis "Quartz" und gibt diese am Ende der Filmtage an der "Nacht der Nominationen" feierlich bekannt.

Das Filmprogramm widerspiegelt die Vielfalt des nationalen Filmschaffens, soll anregen, unterhalten, die Sinne fordern und unser Blickfeld weiten. Für dieses Kino und seine Macher stehen die Solothurner Filmtage seit 46 Jahren ein.

Die nächsten Solothurner Filmtage finden vom 19. bis 26. Januar 2012 statt.

Contrary to popular belief, modeling is more than just pretty people posing. Despite all of its critical acclaim and artistic achievements, photography is still thought of as just snapshots. At JCY Models, we believe that modeling and photography are works of art.

Our goal is to be the best resource and community for models, photographers and everyone involved in the creative process. All of us are, by our very nature, creative, so we believe that we can help you no matter what your goal is.

You might be an experienced model or a fresh talent. You might have just bought your first camera, or you’ve invested a small fortune into photography equipment. Whoever you are, you’ll find the perfect avenue for your talent to shine, for your skills to grow and for your ideas to blossom at Now Modeling.

The range of services that Now Modeling provides will ensure all your needs are met easily and swiftly. We gather the models, cast the talent, coordinate the shoots, source for on-ground promoters, organise lifestyle events and, of course, produce the creative product you need. We are familiar with the demands of television, print, fashion showcases and general commercials – leave everything to us, and we’ll see to it that your artistic visions come to life.

At the end of the day, try not to think of us as an agency – think of us as your friends who know the right people and have the right resources. We’ll be glad to chat with you no matter how where you are in your creative process. After all, cultivating ideas, nurturing talent and creating art is what we at Now Modeling are all about.

Il programma prevede abitualmente un Concorso, una personale completa di un autore contemporaneo poco conosciuto, una retrospettiva su un autore del passato e/o una rassegna tematica.

Mostra Internazionale del Cinema d’Essai
via Pignolo, 123 - 24121 Bergamo (Italy)
Tel. +39 035 363087 - Fax +39 035 341255
info@bergamofilmmeeting.it // www.bergamofilmmeeting.it

Name: NFTS Leeds
Description:
Operating from the prestigious ITV Emmerdale Studios, NFTS Leeds are delivering first class training to the film and television industry.

The National Film and Television School is an acknowledged global leader in the provision of postgraduate, high-level, creative and technical skills for the audio-visual industries. Winner of the Outstanding British Contribution to Cinema BAFTA in 2018 and with 95% graduate employment within six months of graduating, it has been cited by some media as one of the top five film schools globally and by one as the No.1 international film school.

The NFTS Leeds portfolio of courses brings this world-class learning provision to the North of England to benefit professionals working in the creative industries here. Diversity and inclusion are key priorities for NFTS Leeds alongside supporting established individuals and new entrants to the industry to develop and build on their skills.

Name: Festival FILMAR en América Latina
Description:
FILMAR en América Latina est le plus important festival consacré au cinéma et aux cultures latino-américains en Suisse.

Fondé en 1999 et basé à Genève, le Festival FILMAR en América Latina soutient le cinéma indépendant et les cinéastes d’Amérique latine. En novembre de chaque année, il propose de visionner des œuvres ancrées dans les réalités sociales et politiques du continent à travers de grands classiques et des films nouveaux, dont beaucoup d’avant-premières. C’est aussi une plateforme qui met en lumière les minorités, dont les cultures autochtones, indigènes et afro-descendantes ainsi que les communautés LGBTIQ+.

Des films militants et engagés, des témoignages, des rétrospectives de personnalités du cinéma, les premières œuvres de talents émergents : la programmation reflète la richesse, la diversité et les mémoires du continent latino-américain autour de sept sections.

FILMAR est aussi un lieu d’échanges et de rencontres entre les publics genevois et les cinéastes d’Amérique latine qui se déplacent à Genève pour l’occasion. Des tables rondes et des conférences autour de thématiques actuelles y sont notamment organisées en partenariat avec des institutions suisses et des organisations à but non lucratif. Les festivaliers sont également conviés aux fiestas : découverte de gastronomies et de musiques latino-américaines avec les after FILMAR.

FILMAR en América Latina s’attache aussi à son jeune public : une programmation ciblée est proposée aux cinéphiles en herbe. Avec FILMARcito, les enfants sont invités à découvrir des longs-métrages et des séries de courts-métrages en famille ou dans le cadre parascolaire. En parallèle et durant l’année, FILMAR École présente des projections scolaires adaptées à tous les degrés et à de nombreuses disciplines.

Chaque édition est clôturée par une cérémonie de remise du Prix du public et du Prix du Jury des jeunes, décernés aux deux films ressortant des sections en compétition : FOCUS SUD et OPERA PRIMA.

Name: NOMAD
Description:
Nós somos um povo diferente.
Que está em todos os lugares.
Vendo. Vivendo. Registrando. Tudo.
Somos um povo sem fronteiras. 
Sem barreiras.
Somos a Nomad Nation. 
Uma nação de gente criativa alegre, trabalhadora.
De todas as bandeiras. De todas as emoções. De todas as pessoas. 
E que produz muito. 
Em todos os lugares. Em todo o mundo. Em todos os formatos.
É só você olhar que vai ver a gente por aí. 
Nas produções, nas fotografias, nas cenas, nos movimentos.
Porque o único lugar onde a gente para é atrás das câmeras.
E é nessa “direção” que o nosso mundo gira.
NomadNation. 

We are different people.
That is present everywhere.
Watching. Living. Capturing. Everything.
We are people without borders. 
Without barriers.
We are the Nomad Nation. 
A nation of happy, creative and hardworking people. 
From all flags. From all emotions. From all people. 
And that produces so much.
Everywhere. All over the world. In all formats.
You just have to look around and you will see us. 
Through productions, photography, scenes, movements. 
Because the only place where we’ll stand still is behind the cameras. 
And it’s in this “direction” that our world spins. 
NomadNation.

Name: Club de l'Etoile
Description:
Construit au début des années 1920 sur le modèle d'un théâtre à l'italienne, le cinéma de l'Etoile va être rapidement consacré au cinématographe. Participant dans les années 1950 à la naissance du mouvement "Art et Essai", c'est en 1985 que le cinéma deviendra définitivement le Club de l'Etoile, salle de projection privée de grande capacité.
Salle de référence pour la post-production, le Club deviendra peu à peu un lieu incontournable pour le monde de la production et de la distribution comme pour celui des entreprises à la recherche d'un lieu privilégié où organiser leurs événements.
Ayant déjà accueillis de grands groupes tels que Total, Air France, Vivendi, Dior ou encore Universal, le Club a depuis peu été complètement rénové permettant d'offrir un confort incroyable et un équipement de projection optimal dans un espace historique et majestueux.
Depuis 2015, le Club est aussi ouvert au public, ajoutant à ses activités la programmation d'opéras, de ballets, de concerts, d'expositions, des projections de grands classiques remastérisés ou encore des débats...

Name: Dadomani studio
Description:
Dadomani is a creative studio founded in Milan in October 2007 by four young artists sharing the same passion for animation. Each brings their own artistic skills, backgrounds, and experiences that combine into one creative vision. They develop and manage projects in 360 degrees, from the initial idea up to the delivery of the finished product.

Dadomani's clients include companies in advertising, film, and television. The team creates HD films for commercials, short films and short animated scenes using computer graphics, traditional animation and stop motion.

Dadomani's trademarks are their innovative techniques and artisanal use of materials such as paper, plasticine, balsa wood, resins, and polystyrene. A truly multidimensional creative studio, Dadomani is a dynamic and cohesive team working together to bring an original and fresh take on animation.

Name: thenilegroup
Description:
The Nile Group is a pioneering media and entertainment conglomerate, nestled in the vibrant heart of Africa's cinematic landscape. At the intersection of innovation and sustainability, we proudly celebrate the vast richness of African culture, fostering a deeper understanding and appreciation of the continent's diverse heritage. By connecting captivating stories with global audiences, we bridge cultural divides and create a shared human experience.

Through our commitment to creative storytelling, cutting-edge technology, and eco-friendly practices, we redefine the entertainment industry's standards. Our mission is to amplify African voices, showcase authentic narratives, and inspire cross-cultural connections. By doing so, we not only entertain but also educate, enlighten, and empower. Join us in our journey to revolutionize the world of entertainment, one story at a time.

Name: Raven Banner
Description:
Now in its thirteenth year of business, Raven Banner Entertainment has firmly cemented its reputation as one of the most respected and admired international sales companies of elevated genre films. Based in Toronto, Canada, RBE currently represents over 200 films for sales in either the worldwide or international marketplace. Through its expertise in strategic project management, Raven Banner can assist in any and all stages of project production - from acquisitions, representation, negotiations, strategic marketing plans, consultation, and sales. Recent sales titles include: SLUMBER PARTY MASSACRE, TIGERS ARE NOT AFRAID, THE FIGHT MACHINE, FOR THE SAKE OF VICIOUS, HAGAZUSSA: A HEATHENS CURSE, BELZEBUTH, CYST, BENNY LOVES YOU, YUMMY, and one of the most acclaimed horror titles of 2022 THE SADNESS.

In 2013 Raven Banner Releasing was formed as the Canadian distribution arm of Raven Banner Entertainment, and over the years has released such films as: AUTOPSY OF JANE DOE, THE VIGIL, BASKIN, JOHN DIES AT THE END, LOWLIFE and Gaspar Noé's CLIMAX. 

Two years later Northern Banner Releasing was formed to distribute all films outside of Raven Banner's wheelhouse, from critically acclaimed arthouse fare to children's films to social & cultural docs, releasing titles such as: HELLO DESTROYER, BLACK COP, HOW TO PLAN AN ORGY IN A SMALL TOWN, THE PAINTED BIRD, THE WALRUS & THE WHISTLEBLOWER, Academy Award Nominee EMBRACE OF THE SERPENT, and Bruce La Bruce's SAINT-NARCISSE. 

Raven Banner has also acted as Executive Producers on numerous features including TURBO KID, THEY CAME FROM THE DESERT, SKY SHARKS, FOR THE SAKE OF VICIOUS, SHOOT TO MARRY, TRENCH 11, and PSYCHO GOREMAN.

Finally, in 2018 Raven Banner formed the production shingle Hangar 18 Media which has produced the titles V/H/S 94, NAIL IN THE COFFIN: THE FALL AND RISE OF VAMIPRO, SPARE PARTS, as well as the upcoming films THE FIGHT MACHINE, THE BREACH, BROOKLYN 45, and JUNCTION ROW.

Name: Industry Art Works
Description:
Industry Art Works was founded in March 2006 by two veteran studio professionals who saw a need, and responded with the creation of a full-service company to meet the photographic demands of studios, independent producers, and distributors.

Our team consists of passionate and dedicated photo editors and retouchers who focus on providing the highest quality imagery for film marketing campaigns. In the span of just over 10 years, IAW has worked on hundreds of projects ranging from blockbuster hits, Academy Award winning films, compelling documentaries, and binge-worthy episodic shows.

Name: West Lothian Film Festival
Description: Jonathan Nolan said, "The secret to all drama, film, TV, or books - the thing that people respond to most, and the thing I find myself as a viewer feeling most interested in, is the idea of change." This captures exactly what the West Lothian Film Festival is all about. We are a vibrant celebration of emerging film and TV talent rooted in the heart of West Lothian. We provide an engaging platform for up-and-coming filmmakers and creatives with a connection to not only West Lothian but Midlothian and East Lothian as they embark on the early stages of their careers. And, as such, (hopefully) change their respective futures.

Name: Barefoot Studios
Description:
Barefoot Studios is a team of filmmakers, editors and content creators, specialising in video content for businesses, social media, events and branded content.

Our core services include: Video Production, Filming, Drone Filming, Video Editing, Motion Graphics, Content Production, Branded Content, Content Creation & Event Coverage.

Our team includes a range of production specialists with crews tailored on a project-by-project basis to ensure the skills match the brief. We provide a bespoke service and flexible arrangements to work within scope and budget.

We’re on a mission to craft excellence with every step.

5* Google Reviews.

hello@wearebarefoot.co.uk

Name: SAE / Sociedad Argentina de Editores Audiovisuales
Description: La Sociedad Argentina de Editores Audiovisuales (SAE), fundada el 1 de diciembre del 2012, es una asociación civil sin fines de lucro que reúne a destacados profesionales de la edición audiovisual para promover, jerarquizar y proteger el arte y la profesión del editor audiovisual.

Name: Relive360 - Wedding Coverage
Description: We capture wedding event in virtual reality video so that you can everyone can relive it everytime.

Name: CRIAmov
Description:
Somos uma produtora especializada em vídeos. Atuamos em diversos  nichos. Nosso foco principal é lifestyle, moda e eventos, mas o destino é sempre o mesmo: CRIAR.

Prezamos pela essência e pelo detalhe. Buscamos sempre um olhar  diferente em tudo que fazemos.

Seguimos criando. A diferença é que o verbo vira nome próprio.  E hoje podemos dizer que, além de criar, somos a CRIA.

Name: La Marea Producciones S.l.
Description:
La Marea Producciones es una productora audiovisual que centra su actividad en el ámbito del documental, la publicidad y la ficción, desarrollando proyectos propios y ejecutando servicios de producción en todas sus facetas para otras compañías.

A lo largo de nuestra trayectoria hemos escrito, producido y dirigido documentales como El 5º por la izquierda, La Fuente de la Vida o Miguel Hernández para los programas de TVE y CANAL +, Documentos TV, Imprescindibles, Así Somos o La Noche Temática.

También en el medio televisivo hemos llevado a cabo la producción ejecutiva y la dirección del programa Viaje al Interior de la Cultura, producido por Televisión Española, Multi Platform Content y la Fundación Telefónica y la dirección y la jefatura de Producción del programa ¿Cómo lo fabricamos? producido por Visual Noise para Discovery Max.

En el terreno publicitario y comercial hemos producido audiovisuales enmarcados en acciones de branded content y de comunicación en redes sociales y hemos realizado también spots publicitarios y videos corporativos e institucionales. En colaboración con agencias como Revolution, Multi Plattform Content, El Teniente Sam, La Lata Latina, Young & Rubican, Publicis o Tandem DDB, hemos elaborado diversos audiovisuales para el Ministerio de Sanidad, Unicef, el Instituto Nacional del Consumo, la Comunidad de Madrid, Plan España, Malibu, Telefónica, Coca Cola o Beefeater.

En el área de la ficción hemos producido cortometrajes como El Balcón o Yo Can, subvencionados por la Comunidad de Madrid y el Ministerio de Cultura, y seleccionados y premiados en festivales nacionales e internacionales.

Name: BASIS BERLIN Postproduktion GmbH
Description: BASIS BERLIN Postproduktion GmbH is one of the leading Film & TV Postproduction Houses in Berlin. BASIS BERLIN provides full service postproduction services for Film, TV and commercials including full Dolby Licenced Rerecording and Color Grading.

Name: Mayadroom Ajans
Description:
Mayadroom Ajans; 2001 Yılında Mevlüt Dede tarafından kurulan, Türkiye'nin ilk ISO 9001 ve OHSAS 18001 kalite yönetim belgeleri ile birlikte 10 ödüle sahip, 3.5 milyonu aşkın kayıtlı üye sayısı ile Türkiye'nin görsel çalışmalara hizmet veren en büyük model ve casting ajansıdır. 

Hizmet aşaması olarak en köklü kuruluş olan Mayadroom Ajans, genç ve dinamik ekip anlayışı ile hareket etmektedir. 150'yi aşkın resmi çalışanı ile görsel çalışmalara hizmet veren en geniş personel ağına sahiptir.

Name: Jóvenes Realizadores
Description: Jóvenes Realizadores es una distribuidora de obras audiovisuales. Distribuimos cortometrajes, largometrajes, documentales videoclips y spots publicitarios. Además, contamos con un portal cinematográfico en el que comentamos las últimas novedades del cine, publicamos reseñas de estrenos y artículos de opinión. Distribuimos cine. Hablamos de cine.

Name: EDCF - European Digital Cinema Forum
Description:
The EDCF serves as a central European platform for innovation and knowledge sharing, addressing both the opportunities and challenges shaping the future of the big screen.

Founded in 2000, the European Digital Cinema Forum (EDCF) was instrumental in the successful digitisation of European cinemas, helping the industry navigate this major technological shift with minimal disruption. Today, the EDCF continues to unite professionals from across the film ecosystem - including trade association, standard bodies, cinema operators, manufacturers, service providers, distributors, post-producers, and content creators - to explore the evolving landscape of cinema technology.

Name: CG Lab Private Limited
Description: The CG Lab Pvt Ltd is located in Mumbai, India. We were founded in January 2010. We are a company servicing clients all over the world for commercials, feature films, music videos, broadcast design, web based work and graphic design.

Name: StaticVFX Studio
Description:
StaticVFX is a visual effects and post-production studio based in Bucharest, Romania. We started with one goal in mind: to provide full suite of digital production services for feature films, tv series and high-end commercials.

It all started with the passion we have for the visual effects and film. Founded by artists with international experience in big studios from London and Vienna, StaticVFX wants to become one of the high-quality visual effects suppliers for international clients and studios. This is why we pay attention to pipeline, workflow and last but not least - communication with our artists and clients as well.

Name: Wolf News
Description: Fox Star Studio India Pvt Ltd is a motion pictures and film company based out of Off Dr E Moses Road, Mahalakshmi Senapati Bapat Marg, Mumbai, Maharashtra, India.

Name: Phars Film
Description:
PHF acquires and distributes movies from different producers (Hollywood, Bollywood, and South Indian motion pictures).
PHF is independently responsible for the distribution and exhibition of the critical mass of American, Malayalam, Tamil, Telugu, Arabic and other Foreign Language films brought to the Middle East. PHF’s unparalleled distribution network and stakeholder partnerships are now responsible for the regional distribution and exhibition of over 350 titles per annum making by far the largest film distribution and exhibition network in the Middle East.

Name: Cinema do Brasil
Description: Cinema do Brasil is a Brazilian agency that encourages the development of coproductions, stimulates international sales of productions services, gathering producers and sales from the entire country and marketing Brazilian films abroad.

Name: Eurofins Digital Media Services (Resillion)
Description: Eurofins Digital Media Services has now become Resillion. Visit our new LinkedIn page or our website at: www.resillion.com.

Name: Big Sky Editorial
Description:
Big Sky Edit is an award winning full service post production boutique located in New York City, specializing in editing, sound design, graphics, VFX, and finishing for commercials, music videos, and films.

Our commitment to craft and excellence ensures that every project receives meticulous attention to detail and a creative touch that sets us and the work apart.

Name: Dones Visuals
Description: DONES VISUALS som un espai de trobada, debat i formació per a dones i identitats dissidents professionals de tots els oficis del sector amb l’objectiu de revertir la situació de desigualtat històrica existent al sector audiovisual. Per fer-ho, incorporem la perspectiva de gènere interseccional a nivell estratègic en els nostres valors i en les accions culturals que generem.

Name: Imagem-Tempo
Description: Com dez anos de atividade, a Imagem-Tempo tem como foco a produção audiovisual, realizando filmes em diversos formatos, nas áreas de institucional, publicidade, TV e cinema, com detaque para os curtas “Depois das nove” (2008, Allan Ribeiro), Prêmio Especial do Júri no Festival de Brasília, “Uma noite” (2011, Daniela Santos), que ainda circula pelos festivais, já tendo passado por quase vinte nacionais e internacionais, “A Dama do Estádio” (2012, Eduardo Ades), que já recebeu cinco prêmios, entre eles o de Melhor Filme no Festival Primeiro Plano, de Juiz de Fora/MG, e o documentário “Retratos Brasileiros: Hélio Silva” (2011), para o Canal Brasil. Realizou treze mostras de cinema, em parceria com o CCBB, a Caixa Cultural e outras instituições, sendo a mais recente delas “Kenneth Anger – O fetichista pop” (2011). Em 2010, realizou a exposição “Espelhos de Luz e Sombra – Fotografias de Irina Ionesco”, que percorreu três capitais do país. No teatro, apresentou diversas montagens em parceria com o SESC e, em 2011, com patrocínio da Eletrobras, o espetáculo “Lição 18 – Romeu & Julieta”, com texto de Doc Comparato e direção de Lucas Marcier. No momento, finaliza o curta “Apocalipse de Verão”, de Carolina Durão, e o novo documentário de longa-metragem de Maria Augusta Ramos, “Morro dos Prazeres”. Para 2013, os projetos em andamento são os documentários de longa-metragem "Luli e Lucina", de Rafael Saar, "IML", de João Candido Zacharias e o curta "Rancho Santa Mônica", de Eva Randolph.

Name: The Forge Entertainment
Description: The Forge is a UK-based independent drama production company, established in 2014 by George Faber. Its aim is to develop and produce original and innovative television drama, working in collaboration with the UK's leading and emerging creative talent.

Name: Toy Box Entertainment
Description:
We are an entertainment marketing agency that creates audio-visual advertising campaigns for major Hollywood studios. But we're not your typical "trailer house."    

We are a production company with a history of writing, producing and directing projects of all sizes.  Whether it is a special shoot for a theatrical trailer, to a behind-the-scenes special, a long-format corporate branding film, or a TV commercial.  

We are a visual effects house  with the latest software and technology, utilizing such programs as Maya, Lightwave 3D and After Effects.  From 3D modeling and animation, to rotoscope work and green-screen compositing, we have the tools to make any vision a reality.

We are Toy Box Entertainment: a unique and full-service production company with the ability to carry out any project, of any size, from concept to completion.  When every detail counts, every strategy must be explored, and every audience must be reached, you’ll find everything you need right here … in the box.

Name: Movie Summaries
Description:
About Us

Welcome to Movie Summ, where the magic of cinema meets the art of summarization! We began our cinematic journey on November 13, 2023, with a passion for making movie summaries accessible, enjoyable, and easy to digest.

Our Mission

At Movie Summ, our mission is to provide concise yet comprehensive summaries of your favorite movies. We understand that life can be busy, and not everyone has the time to watch every film in its entirety. That's where we come in, offering bite-sized recaps that capture the essence of each story.

Name: Selbstständig
Description:
Filmmusik
Sounddesign
Audiopostproduktion

Name: R&G Productions
Description: R&G Productions is a tv show production company founded in 1997 and based in Boulogne-Billancourt, France (Burger Quiz, Samedi d'en rire, Retroscopie).

Name: Millstreet Films BV
Description:
Millstreet Films produces commercially driven and creatively-spirited independent feature films and TV series, with an eye for talent development and innovation. We build long term relationships with our writers and directors. Our strength lies in the creations of strong brands and film properties.

Millstreet Films was founded in 2010 by Rachel van Bommel. Our film catalogue includes Dutch box office smash hits Loft, Viper’s Nest and Sophie 1 and 2.

In 2014 Millstreet Films produced its first drama series The Neighbors, which got very high audience ratings. It is also the first Dutch TV show to be distributed to a global audience via Amazon Prime Video. Season 1 and 2 are available on the platform in 200 countries and territories. In Holland all four seasons are available on VOD Platform Videoland.

After the success of both feature films, Sophie has returned as a TV series. Millstreet Films also produced the new high profile drama series Anne+, which was selected for numerous international film festivals, such as Series Mania and Tribeca. A second season coming soon.

Feature films Single Street and Amsterdam Vice were released in Dutch cinemas last year. The accompanying Amsterdam Vice TV series was just aired in The Netherlands. A third Sophie feature film is in the making and will hit theatres at the end of the year.

Name: VIDEO STUDIO PRODUCCIONES
Description:
Hace unos 20 años que inicié mi actividad en el campo audiovisual y puse en marcha mi pequeña productora, Vídeo Studio Producciones, ofreciendo una alternativa creativa frente a la creciente demanda de formatos audiovisuales, por parte de instituciones públicas, televisiones, Productoras, empresas privadas...
Con una contrastada experiencia en el mundo de la comunicación audiovisual, hemos  ido
superando y asumiendo retos día a día; desarrollando todas las necesidades del mercado, y ofreciendo una amplia gama de posibilidades de servicios a la producción de otras empresas audiovisuales y también servicios  freelance al cliente:

• Operador de Cámara (video, cine, Red One)
• Director de Fotografía e Iluminación
• Realizador y ayudante de realización
• Editor, montador (postproducción)
• Dirección
• Producción
• Guionista
• Fotografía, etc.

Mi preparación a lo largo de todos estos años, me permite desarrollar varias funciones
a la vez, reduciendo, así, los costes de cada producción.

Disponemos  de equipos propios, para satisfacer la demanda de contratación externa de profesionales freelance para desahogar el booking de otras empresas audiovisuales en momentos puntuales.

Pudiendo así ofrecer dos opciones de contratación, freelance sin equipos (para trabajar con el equipamiento propio de la empresa contratante) o con equipos propios tanto para grabación como para edición.

En definitiva conseguir la mayor satifaccion de mis clientes, ofreciendo el mejor servicio que precise en cada momento.

Seriedad, disponibilidad, profesionalidad y por supuesto creatividad.

Name: DAS WERK Group
Description:
DAS WERK is one of Europe's leading networks for the creation and enhancing of moving image content.
For over 30 years, DAS WERK has been one of the leading European networks for the creation and editing of moving image content.

Numerous awards, coupled with passion, creativity, and experience, establish DAS WERK as the go-to destination for conceptualization, creation, design, and enhancement of TV, cinema, and web commercials. It is also a top choice for digital post-production, visual effects editing, distribution, and archiving of moving images.

Die DAS WERK Gruppe gehört zu den führenden europäischen Netzwerken für die Gestaltung und Bearbeitung von Bewegtbildinhalten.
DAS WERK gehört seit über 30 Jahren zu den führenden europäischen Netzwerken für die Gestaltung und Bearbeitung von Bewegtbildinhalten.

Zahlreiche Auszeichnungen und die Leidenschaft, Kreativität und Erfahrung machen DAS WERK zur ersten Adresse für Konzeption, Kreation, Design und Veredelung von TV-, Kino- und Web- Commercials und für die digitale Postproduction, Effektbearbeitung, Distribution und Archivierung bewegter Bilder.

Name: Serif Creative
Description:
Serif is a modern brand content studio founded by Doug Joseph and is based in Columbus, Ohio. 

We have evolved from a small video production company to an elite roster of over 200 filmmakers and creatives. With a focus on story, emotion, and expression, we have collaborated with over 300 brands, prioritizing relationships and timeless excellence. 

We’re easy to work with, midwest nice, and a good time.

Name: R.U.R.
Description: We are a creative postproduction company based in Prague. We combine the skill, experience and resources of a large production house with the passion, ambition and flexibility of a small studio. This enables us to take on projects of all sizes to the highest quality. Our experienced artists use the best tools available to respond creatively to our clients' needs.

Name: Indépendant
Description: Auteur, scénariste, concepteur indépendant. Enseignant

Name: West London Film Studios
Description:
Under new management since 2014, West London Film Studios offers a total of 105,000 sq ft of space with extensive facilities and sound reduced stages which cater for film and television productions, along with commercials and stills photography. The continuing investment programme to renovate the studios and main building is also well under way!

Located just off the Uxbridge Road in Hayes, there is easy access to Central London, the M4/A303 and Heathrow Airport. 

To arrange a visit to the studios, or a meeting with the team, simply get in touch.

Name: FootageFest
Description:
FootageFest is a yearly conference in Hollywood bringing together footage industry professionals from around the world. Everyone in the industry that touches third-party content at all is invited into the circle: “Users” are not only made up of researchers and clearance folks but writers, directors, producers and editors.  Likewise, “Providers” are not just made up of stock footage professionals, but TV and film studio licensing reps, production companies, independent shooters, and news and viral video agencies.  

Growing exponentially every year, FootageFest continues to attract dozens of niche footage libraries, hundreds of archive and clearance professionals, producers, studio licensing reps, and regional footage research reps from Toronto, Mexico City, New York, as well as across the Atlantic – from the U.K., Ireland and, yes, The Middle East.  No region is too small; no language is too complex – FootageFest unites all of us to learn, discuss, challenge, and celebrate this amazing industry we have all made our home.

Name: Women of Carbon documentary
Description: Told through a feminine lens, the documentary story delves into the minds and spirits of dedicated, driven and dynamic 21st century trailblazers whose work in science is placing them at the core of decarbonization, human health and economic opportunity. Innovative women are redefining our relationship with carbon by repurposing living materials, reengineering waste into valuable chemicals that clean the climate, and driving decarbonization in our built environment. They share life/work challenges while thriving in male-dominated industries.

Name: Yellow inc
Description:
Yellow inc is a content marketing, production, syndication and consultancy services firm.

We are a team of credible and talented professionals with a strong detailed understanding of industry, expertise and skills, backed with experience of over 2 decades.

With hands-on knowledge to connect with audiences and a network alliances to deliver content across platforms in India.

Name: Visual Effects Society - French Section
Description: The Visual Effects Society (VES) is a non-profit professional, honorary society, dedicated to advancing the arts, sciences, and applications of visual effects and to improving the welfare of its members by providing professional enrichment and education, fostering community, and promoting industry recognition.

Name: GeniusPark
Description:
GeniusPark is the leading industry talent pool of Turkey and Europe.

The highly experienced and talented visual FX artists of GeniusPark provide everything from concept design to modeling, camera tracking to rotomation, matte painting to motion graphics. As a Visual FX post studio we are fully committed to delivering exceptional results in the shortest time possible.

GP is fully committed to provide you with exceptional results in the shortest amount time.

http://www.imdb.com/company/co0431896

Name: Cuarto Creciente Producciones
Description:
Cuarto Creciente Producciones is a production company based in Spain since 2004. Our main goal shifted from producing high production-value film and television programming, documentaries and feature films to distributing them. We have developed in the process a large network of international contacts that allows us to reach a wide spectrum of diversified territories.
Led by Roque Madrid, the Cuarto Creciente in-house development and production teams are passionate, creative, and professional. Working collaboratively with a talented pool of accomplished writers, directors, editors, and craftspeople in the Spanish production community, Cuarto Creciente consistently delivers premium quality products to its broadcast clients and distributors.

Name: SketchPixel
Description:
Sketchpixel is a digital studio specializing in Archviz, CGI, Immersive Experiences and web/native solutions development. We have a multidisciplinary team of creatives, designers and programmers, who work closely with each client, seeking to understand their goals and objectives. We believe that this close relationship allows us to develop customized solutions that help our customers to boost their business.

Portugal (sede): +351 253 617 003
França: +33 (06) 7127 5606

Name: FÉLICINÉ CINÉMAS
Description:
FÉLICINÉ est une société qui gère en toute autonomie des cinémas de proximité, souvent en partenariat avec les communes et les communautés de communes. Notre siège est basé à Villefontaine, mais nous intervenons sur toute la région Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes.

 Notre force :

-  Proposer une programmation riche et diversifiée qui s'adresse à tous les publics, y compris les enfants et les amateurs de cinéma Art et Essai.

-  Animer nos cinémas en collaborant avec les associations locales, les communes, et en organisant des événements avec des réalisateurs et des acteurs.

-  Offrir des expériences uniques de cinéma plein air, permettant à notre public de profiter de projections en extérieur dans des cadres exceptionnels.

-  Mettre à disposition notre régie publicitaire interne, permettant aux entreprises et aux marques locales de promouvoir leurs produits et services au sein de nos salles, tout en soutenant le commerce local.

-  Proposer aux entreprises, aux CSE et aux collectivités des locations de salles, des projections privées, des tarifs préférentiels et des animations spécifiques.

-  Être réactifs et indépendants, afin de fournir rapidement des solutions sur-mesure adaptées aux besoins de nos partenaires.

-  Promouvoir les commerces locaux en intégrant des offres et des services de proximité dans nos événements.

Name: Traziende Films
Description: Traziende es una casa productora de entretenimiento con oficinas en México con más de 15 años de experiencia en la industria del cine y la publicidad. Obtuvo éxito comercial desde su primera producción con Warner Bros.  “Efectos Secundarios” en 2005.

Name: OktoStore
Description:
Oktostore, sinema ve bilişim sektöründe yazılım ve hizmet geliştiren Oktotech Firması’nın bir kolu olarak 2014 yılında kurulmuştur. 

Sektöründe öncü Tiffen, Prism Lens FX, VAXIS, Edelkrone, PATONA, MOVMAX, Datacolor, OSEE, Feiyutech, VSGO, TERIS gibi dünyanın önde gelen markalarının Türkiye distribütörü olarak yer almaktadır. Müşterileri ile görsel iletişimin her alanında sadece seçkin ürün portföyünü değil aynı zamanda düzenlediği etkinlikler, webinarlar ve workshop organizasyonları ile bilgi ve deneyimini paylaşmaktadır.

İşinde gösterdiği titiz yaklaşım ve sunduğu müşteri deneyimi ile sinema ve fotoğrafçılık sektörünün güvenilir ve öncü platformu olma hedefini taşımaktadır.

Oktostore was established in 2014 as a branch of Oktotech Company, which develops software and services in the cinema and information industry.

It is the distributor of the world's leading brands such as Tilta, Prism Lens FX, Cineroid, Hollyland, Edelkrone. It shares not only its outstanding product portfolio in all areas of visual communication with its customers, but also its knowledge and experience through the events, webinars and workshop organizations it organizes.

With the meticulous approach it shows in its business and the customer experience it offers, it has the goal of being the reliable and leading platform of the cinema and photography industry.

Name: SRI SARATHI STUDIOS PRIVATE LIMITED
Description:
Sarathi Studios is the oldest and very first film studio in the states of Andra Pradesh/Telangana which established in 1956. Now it is situated in the heart of Hyderabad City. Having a vast area of Indoor Shooting locations, Shooting floors and complete Post-production facilities, the prestigious Sarathi Studios continues as one of the busiest film studios in the south India.
The Post-Production division of the Sarathi Studios is renovated in 2022 with  most advanced technical solutions in a modern and high facilitated new building. The new facility includes VFX, Advanced Edit suits, Dubbing/Recording Suits, Digital Intermediate suites with Baselight/Davinci Resolve & Barco 4K Projectors.
And one of the major updates made by the studio is the introduction of Virtual Production for films. Bringing the most advanced Realtime camera tracking solution Mo-Sys Star tracker with Mo-Sys VP Pro first time in India makes us the early birds in this new technology for Films, in India. We are having Studio floor equipped with LED walls for XR-Virtual Production with Realtime camera tracking with Mo-Sys and Unreal engine. 
Also having the green screen based virtual production with Mo-Sys VP Pro & Unreal Engine. This workflow also gives the Realtime composite output with graphics Background and real actors, live on the monitor. This will save the film makers and DOPs from shooting their content guessing something will come later in the background. They have a clear view of the final frame live on the monitor with background. So they are free to make their creative frame compositions and camera movements.

Name: Vuelta Germany
Description:
Unter der Dachmarke Vuelta Germany zentralisiert Vuelta ab Mitte 2025 die Aktivitäten ihrer deutschen Tochterunternehmen SquareOne Entertainment GmbH, Telepool GmbH und EuroVideo Medien GmbH (nach Fusion künftig Vuelta Entertainment GmbH) und positioniert sich damit als eines der führenden Distributions- und Medienunternehmen im deutschen Independent-Markt.

Im Mittelpunkt von Vuelta Germany steht die stetig wachsende Library an hochwertigen Programm-Rechten, zu der Filme wie ZIEMLICH BESTE FREUNDE, THE IMITATION GAME, BOOK CLUB, DIE FRAU DES NOBELPREISTRÄGERS, CHRISTIANE F., DER KLEINE LORD, RAUMPATROUILLE ORION und ONE LIFE gehören. Der Fokus von Vuelta Germany liegt weiterhin auf Koproduktionen, sowie dem Vertrieb nationaler und internationaler Independent-Filme und -Serien im deutschsprachigen Europa.

Die Vuelta Gruppe wächst europaweit kontinuierlich und erweitert ihr vielfältiges Portfolio durch spannende Lizenz- und strategische Unternehmensakquisitionen.

Name: Teevra Studios
Description: Teevra Studios is an AI-first creative studio delivering custom ad visuals and ultra-realistic videos ultrafast. Get tailored, high-quality content with quick turnaround to elevate your digital marketing, content and storytelling.

Name: PRK Productions
Description:
PRK Productions is also known as Parvathamma Raj Kumar Productions is an Indian Film Production Company, founded by Puneeth Rajkumar and Ashwini Puneeth Rajkumar in 2017. Based in Bangalore, with main interests in production and distribution of Kannada films.

PRK was named after Puneeth Rajkumar’s mother, Parvathamma Raj Kumar. 

First featuring movie is "Kavaludaari" began to production in 2017, Hemanth Rao directed the new thriller film in his second venture. Rishi, Anant Nag, Achyuth Kumar played a pivot roles. After successful show of movie, it's been remade in Tamil, Telugu, Malayalam and Hindi. (Remade in Telugu as Kapatadhaari, and Tamil as Kabadadaari.)

2nd is "Mayabazar 2016", critically acclaimed and was remade in Tamil as Naanga Romba Busy by Badri.

3rd & 4th - LAW & French Biriyani released directly on Amazon Prime Video as Amazon Originals due to the ongoing Covid-19 pandemic situation.

Upcoming, films "One Cut Two Cut", "Man Of The Match" and "Family Pack" are under post production phase.

Name: LIVXS
Description:
LIVXS primarily based in New Delhi, came into existence in the year 2004. We believe in creating work that is honest, end results that are exploratory and the final output to be conceptually unique and visually stunning. Our Founders and Directors hold a unique set of expertise in their own profiles. Our Core team of qualified professionals brims with zeal and fervor to make an event of yours an extravagant affair to be remembered for ages.

Our Strong Network of association & partners enables us to certify enchantment for all the services we provide to our clients to convert ideas to things, and eventually a reality. Our Team with an Experience of over 400 Projects will cater to all your needs no matter how trivial it is. Name: Flins y Piniculas
Description:
Flins & Pinículas nace en el año 2001 con el fin de distribuir películas de alta calidad, estando  especialmente comprometida con el cine infantil y europeo. Desde que comenzase su andadura, hace ya más de 10 años, la compañía ha acumulado más de 200 títulos convirtiéndose en un referente del cine infantil independiente de nuestro país y habituales de los festivales de Gijón y Sevilla así como en la sección infantil del Festival Internacional de San Sebastián. Caben destacar películas como Krabat, La Layenda de Santa Claus, Los Cinco,  El Cascanueces 3D, Upps, ¿Dónde está Noé? o las más recientes El Hijo de Bigfoot y Luis y Los Alienígenas. 
Desde 2011 Flins comienza a adentrarse en el mundo de la coproducción, participando en títulos como E.S.O o El Secreto de los 24 Escalones, decidiendo así apostar por nuestra industria.
En 2014, dando un paso más, nace FyP MEDIA, como parte de Flins Y Pinículas destinada a la coproducción y distribución de títulos para un público más adulto. Bajo esta línea FYP ha estrenado largometrajes como El Primer Ministro, Colonia Dignidad o Péle.  De este modo Flins y Piniculas amplía su margen de acción y sigue apostando por el desarrollo de una industria cinematográfica heterogénea de calidad y de referencia. 
Nuestra apuesta por el cine como motor cultural nos lleva, además, a colaborar con diferentes asociaciones y fundaciones con el fin de apoyar en su labor para fomentar la inclusión, tolerancia y asistencia colectivos en riesgo de marginalidad o discriminación social.  

Email: info@flinsypiniculas.com
