Name: Spirit Media Pvt Ltd
Description:
Spirit Media was founded by Rana Daggubati in 2005 as a VFX & Production company and has now evolved into a 360-degree Content and Brand ecosystem with an inhouse Marketing Agency, Celebrity Management Agency, Media & Tech Start-up incubator & accelerator, and direct investments in technology & IP that aid the art of storytelling. 

As a Media House Spirit Media empowers creators and entrepreneurs by providing them with knowledge, capital, technology, and infrastructure. With a philosophy that is centered around collaboration and community, where producers and entrepreneurs work together to build a sustainable ecosystem that spans the entertainment, media, and consumer sectors globally.

Spirit provides producers with access to creative talent and industry experts, making it cost and time-efficient to produce, sell, market, and distribute content. And their entrepreneurs work to scale investments made by the group with consumer brands or technology.

Spirit Media operates in a bucket of four - Content, Services, Consumer Brands, and Investments - each with Producers and Entrepreneurs, supported by a shared pool of Human Resources, Finance, and Legal personnel.

Name: MovieMaker Magazine
Description:
Movie Maker Magazine is the nation’s leading resource on the art and business of making movies and the world’s most widely read independent film magazine. 

Movie Maker’s content is directed at the audience as well as the artist, and its lively mix of interviews, trend-setting criticism, DIY techniques, festival coverage, distribution and financing tips, behind-the-scenes indie “war stories” and appreciations of classic Hollywood actors, directors, cinematographers, producers, screenwriters and editors makes Movie Maker Magazine a perennial favorite and trusted brand with cinema artists and discriminating film fans everywhere.

Name: Thunderbird Releasing
Description: Thunderbird Releasing is an all-rights film distribution company based in London.

Name: Echo Studio
Description:
Echo Studio is a film studio dedicated to the production and distribution of films addressing social and environmental issues of our planet. Environment, education, health, human rights and peace are among the key themes which we will cover through both feature films and documentaries distributed on all formats such as cinema, TV, e-cinema, web, for a broad audience.

We are facing unprecedented social and environmental challenges around the world. It would be easy to succumb to denial or despair. But in many places, men and women are mobilizing for a better future. We tell their stories and we want their stories to inspire others.
Echo Studio's ambition is to encourage citizens to act by offering a new positive vision of the future.

Name: Tallinn Black Nights Film Festival | PÖFF
Description:
Started in 1997, the Tallinn Black Nights Film Festival has grown into one of the biggest film festivals in Northern Europe and busiest regional industry platforms, hosting more than 1000 guests and industry delegates and over 160 journalists. The festival screens around 250 features and more than 300 shorts and animations and sees an attendance of 80 000 people annually. 

As of 2014 the festival holds the FIAPF accreditation for holding an international competition programme which puts the festival into the so- called A-category of film festivals, alongside other 14 festivals in the world.

Name: Gachiro Films S.L.
Description:
Las tres principales huellas pertenecen a Rubén, Pablo y David.

Nos avalan más de diez años de experiencia por separado en el sector audiovisual, con trabajos para clientes como Movistar +, ALSA, Gobierno Vasco, Real Sociedad C.D.F. ... o agencias como Record-Time, Dimension, VCCP o Fandom.

Además, en el ámbito de la ficción hemos firmado largometrajes estrenados en festivales de prestigio como San Sebastián, Nantes, Santa Bárbara, Madrid o Moscú. Nuestras películas se han vendido en países como China, Corea del Sur, Francia, Italia, Argentina o Chile; y hemos trabajado en proyectos con compañías como Shoreline Entertainment, Pecado Films, Corte y Confección de Películas o Baleuko SL.

GACHIRO es, a partir de ahora, la resultante de la suma de nuestra experiencia, con base fundamental en dos localizaciones principales: Madrid y Euskadi.

En la actualidad, además de la serie de ficción “Pollavieja y Magufa", estamos desarrollando el cortometraje "Mosquito" y el largometraje “Nueva Vida”. En este último proyecto, al igual que en "Pollavieja y Magufa", contamos con la coproducción de Bixagu Entertainment. 

Además, hemos firmado un acuerdo estratégico de management con la compañía MoJo Global Arts, radicada en Los Ángeles (EEUU), lo que nos permite internacionalizar nuestro radio de acción.

Name: The Holocraft
Description:
The Holocraft specializes in real-time content and VFX, hardware, and Consulting for LED and green screen virtual production.

We at HoloCraft believe that the future of make-believe is where real-time technology meets life-like visuals. We are a team of creative designers and developers specializing in the domain of Virtual Production. We have been a part of many firsts and some notable projects across the industry along the spectrum of virtual production and real-time content creation.

Name: Broadway Cinema
Description:
Currently in its 22nd year of operation and attracting 400,000 visitors annually, Broadway is located in the Creative Quarter of Nottingham and is recognised as one of the leading independent cinemas and creative media centres in the UK.

Broadway delivers an expanding number of programmes supporting skills, employment and enterprise for people entering and working in the creative and digital content industries alongside providing affordable office space to filmmakers and artists; aiming for its success and that of the creative community to continue in close alliance.

Current projects include:

Near Now is Broadway's commissioning and artist development programme, working closely with artists and designers to produce and present playful projects that critically explore the place and impact of technology in everyday life. Supported by Arts Council England, Near Now invests in practice-led research across art, design, technology and education, acting as a development programme for artistic talent and bold ideas.

Projector is Broadway’s business support programme which assists pre-start, startup and existing businesses in the creative industries. Targeting businesses from disadvantaged wards of Nottingham City, Projector offers participants free 1-2-1 business advice, workshops and events, grants and industry specific support. It is part financed by the European Regional Development Fund Programme 2007 to 2013.

As a partner of the BFI’s Film Academy UK Network, Broadway runs intensive, professional-level programmes for 16 to 19 year olds, offering an entry point to a career in film.

Broadway’s reach extends beyond Nottingham. It was recently selected as one of nine Film Hub Lead Organisations, in partnership with Cambridge Film Trust, working together as the BFI’s Film Audience Network to support the cinema exhibition sector and boost film audiences across the UK.

Name: Cadence Effects
Description:
Cadence Effects  |  Invisible by Design 

Cadence Effects is quickly becoming a catchphrase synonymous with trusted specialists in visual effects. As a sought after award-winning VFX company in upstate New York, we believe in the positive power of stories infused with creative solutions and innovative ideas.

We are here to collaborate, season, and solidify your storied vision. We love to make the impossible possible. And most importantly, WE LOVE WHAT WE DO. Cadence is a close-knit, imaginative, and problem-solving team. Each team member has been hand-picked for their SUPER POWERS, bringing us all together to form a powerful, efficient team all in step with one another.

We are located 24 miles SE of Albany, on a 6-acre park-like campus in a converted 1800's dry stacked Stone 6000 sq foot facility. New Lebanon is a charming city break and creates a relaxed and inspiring environment for our artists.

Additionally, Cadence Effects boasts a TPN certified facility and high-speed internet access. Our team of focused, high-quality artists provides exceptional work with the least amount of headaches or disruptions to your creative vision.

Cadence Effects is skilled in handling 4K, native stereoscopic, set extensions, wire/rig removals, retimes, sky replacements, blue and green screens, crowd duplication, cgi integration, cosmetic enhancements, and matte paintings. We always deliver great service and technically correct work to our clients on time.

Name: PT First Media Production
Description:
Pada Februari 2008 PT First Media Productions (FMP) didirikan sebagai perusahaan penyedia konten.  Melalui konten, Perseroan dapat membangun semua informasi yang baik bagi masyarakat, bukan hanya menghibur tetapi dapat mendidik, sekaligus menguatkan persatuan. 

FMP memiliki tiga kelompok produksi yaitu kreatif, rumah produksi dan bagian post-production. Ketiga kelompok produksi tersebut berorientasi pada creativity and impacting. FMP memulai kiprahnya di industri kreatif melalui produksi film yang diberi judul ‘SEPULUH’ yang rilis pada bulan Febuari 2009. Film itu juga yang menjadi landasan awal bagi tim dari FMP untuk terus melanjutkan kiprahnya di industri kreatif. Selain memproduksi film, FMP juga melebarkan sayapnya dengan memproduksi iklan. Hingga saat ini FMP sudah memproduksi puluhan iklan dan Company Profile dari berbagai brand terkemuka di Indonesia.

Pada tahun 2011, FMP mulai melakukan shooting Film Televisi (FTV) pertama mereka yang terus berlanjut hingga saat ini. Hingga tahun 2013, FMP sudah menghasilkan 31 FTV yang bekerja sama dengan berbagai production house terkemuka dan pada bulan Januari 2013, FMP kembali menghasilkan film layar lebar keduanya yang berjudul ‘MIKA’. 

Sampai dengan tahun 2013, FMP telah menyediakan 4 saluran televisi di HomeCable dan BIG TV yang sebagian besar programnya diproduksi secara independen. Keempat saluran saluran tersebut adalah Hi!, J’Go, Dangdutz dan Mix.

Name: Alphapanda
Description:
Alphapanda is a marketing agency for the film industry based in Berlin, Warsaw, and Lausanne.

Since 2011, we have developed an expertise in all areas of film marketing and social media for a variety of films and projects, from Hollywood blockbusters to indie documentaries, from festival darlings to film-related organisations.

We have worked on over 200 films over the years, helping us identify the needs of filmmakers as well as understand the specificities of the international film market and of audiences
across borders.

Our team represents eight nationalities and covers a wide range of skills: strategy, design, video editing, campaign management, copywriting, community management, and media buying.

We work with producers, distributors, sales agents, streamers, funding bodies, promotion agencies and other organisations, adapting our expertise to any stage of the lifecycle of a film or series and to any need of companies in the film value chain.

The list of clients we have worked with include NEON – Super, The Match Factory, Warner Bros, 20th Century Fox, Bankside Films, Beta Film, Zentropa, Break Out Pictures, Curzon, British Film Institute, and several independent production, distribution and sales companies.

Our ethos is handcrafted, boutique, and homegrown. This is underpinned by three core elements that form the foundation of our business:  

CREATIVE INTEGRITY - This is artistic freedom expressed throughout all phases of the creative process.

OPERATIONAL EFFECTIVENESS - Professional business practices are imperative to our filmmaking realisation. 

The combined effort of these three principles is our formula for success. We're always open to hearing from new collaborators and prospective partners, so feel free to drop us a line or two...

Name: REEL CANADA
Description:
REEL CANADA is a charitable organization that celebrates Canada through film.

Canadian films are the stories we tell about ourselves – they open the door to so many conversations about place, nation, identity, and what it means to be Canadian.  REEL CANADA promotes the power and diversity of Canadian film and encourages this on-going conversation.

Our travelling film festival has held over 6,000 screenings and reached over one million students and other Canadians since 2005.

Name: inTERREviews
Description:
"in" Etre impliqué + "TERRE" dans le monde + "views" en croisant les regards.
inTERREviews est une agence de production plurimédia qui valorise les projets de communication visuelle dédiés aux enjeux de l’économie sociale et solidaire, de la solidarité et de la transition écologique.

InTERREviews c'est aussi la technique : captation et retransmission en direct d'évènements, studio et régie.

Et aussi des conférences interactives, masterclass et modules de cours sur l'enjeu de la transition écologique par le prisme de l'art comme levier pour engager la mobilisation en faveur d'un futur désirable, souhaitable, soutenable. Interreviews explore les imaginaires avec ses outils que sont la photographie et l’écriture pour inviter à un nouveau récit qui entend susciter l'émerveillement pour émouvoir et renforcer l’action. 
A destination du public étudiant, grand public et collaborateurs en entreprise.

Name: Dinamo Film
Description:
We are an independent film and audiovisual production company based in Puglia (Italy). We make documentaries, movies, branded content and TV commercials inspired by out-of-the-ordinary real-life stories, through an unconventional creative vision.
We provide executive production services in Italy with a particular focus on Puglia, a region that in terms of financial resources, its variety of landscapes and local expertise represents one of the most in-demand areas for both the national and international film industry. We also provide support for every production service including budgeting, location, crew, casting, logistics, organisation, tax credits and tax incentives for all budgets.. Our company is a partner of CNA (Cinema and Audiovisual Puglia), of Doc.it (the Association of Italian Documentary Filmmakers) and of Distretto Puglia Creativa.

Description:
Barter Entertainment è una new agency che opera tra Cinema, TV e Web. 
Interpreta il mondo moderno, l’evoluzione tecnologica, il cambiamento nella comunicazione e lo rielabora sulla propria pelle, mettendo in relazione settori diversi per un unico grande obiettivo.

Realizza format originali per Rai, Mediaset, Sky e tutte le principali emittenti televisive con una specifica attenzione alle reti tematiche e lavora in sinergia con le principali concessionarie di pubblicità per la produzione di spot e sistemi TLP.

Non solo bartering, quindi, ma lo sviluppo di concept per vere e proprie strategie cross-mediali, dall’idea fino al prodotto finito. Creatività, sviluppo e distribuzione sono le keyword di Barter, nascono così branded content e brand extension, siti web, community, social media activities, ma anche progetti editoriali e attività collaterali sul territorio.

Il cinema è passione, da sempre, e il posizionamento Barter non può che confermarlo. Produzioni volte a valorizzare pellicole di qualità, "Il Divo", "El Artista" e una distribuzione capillare sul territorio di lungometraggi e documentari internazionali attraverso i circuiti cinema più importanti. Lovelace, biopic sulla vita della star di Gola Profonda, ne è un esempio.

“La macchina da presa è più di un registratore, è un microscopio, penetra, entra dentro le persone e consente di vedere i loro pensieri più intimi e nascosti.”
Elia Kazan

Name: LAB111
Description:
LAB111 is een eigenzinnige cult cinema gevestigd in een monumentaal oud pathologisch anatomisch laboratorium in Amsterdam. Onze eigenwijze programmering bestaat uit bijzondere classics en frisse perspectieven die tot de verbeelding spreken, aanzetten tot nadenken en inspireren. Van verdiepende documentaires, moderne klassiekers tot onconventionele genrefilms.

Naast de bioscoop kun je exposities komen ontdekken, vinden er debat avonden plaats en kan je in Bar Strangelove dineren of juist lekker barhangen.

Verder is het ook mogelijk om verschillende zalen bij LAB111 te huren. Zoek je een zaal voor je teamvergadering? Of wil alle zalen afhuren voor een festival? Niet alleen voor vergaderingen en festivals, maar ook voor premières, viewings, presentaties, lezingen en workshops is LAB111 de ideale plek.

Name: Porto/Post/Doc
Description: Porto/Post/Doc: Film & Media Festival takes place in November, in several venues and emblematic spaces in the city of Porto. With “our stories are real” as its main motto, Porto/Post/Doc: Film & Media Festival aims to occupy an increasingly relevant and differentiated place in the city's cultural agenda: a film festival with a large audience, dedicated to to a genre of greater relevance in cinematographic history and in contemporary society: the documentary. The festival focuses mainly on contemporary cinema of a hybrid nature, that is, on films that cross the languages of fiction and documentary.

Choreography and Movement Direction | Consultancy and Research | Casting Dancers and Choreographers |

The Movers are a full service dance production company for moving picture. We give movement advice for short scenes or create a complete choreography for your film or commercial. Whether you're looking for edgy, natural or mainstream, The Movers are your one stop shop for anything dance.

Based in beautiful Squamish, British Columbia, for more than 15-years, Anthill has constantly evolved our production techniques and equipment specifically to capture high-quality, dynamic imagery in hard to reach places. Our small, full-time crews, work as adaptable teams so we can react quickly and efficiently to changing conditions on the ground and always get the shot. 

Clients: Toyota, Red Bull, Sony, Clif Bar, Lululemon, Saatchi & Saatchi LA, Outside Television, Olympic Channel, TELUS, Rethink Canada, Trek Bicycles, Shimano, UNIQLO and more.

Name: District 360 | Creative Foto- & Video Agency
Description:
Bij District 360 helpen we bedrijven hun verhaal visueel te versterken met hoogwaardige fotografie en videografie. 

In een wereld waarin beeld de eerste indruk bepaalt, zorgen wij ervoor dat die indruk meteen goed zit. Want sterke merken verdienen krachtige beelden. 

Met een professionele en strategische aanpak maken we beelden die niet alleen mooi zijn, maar ook impact hebben. Of het nu gaat om corporate fotografie, branding content of dynamische videoproducties, wij helpen bedrijven om hun identiteit krachtig neer te zetten.

Wat ons drijft? De combinatie van creativiteit en strategie om merken te laten groeien. Geen standaardoplossingen, maar maatwerk dat past bij de identiteit en ambities van onze klanten.

Benieuwd hoe sterke beelden jouw bedrijf kunnen versterken? Stuur een berichtje naar simon@district360.eu

Peccadillo Pictures is an award-winning UK film distributor, bringing quality international films to the UK since October 2000.

We have grown to become one of the UK’s most recognised distributors of LGBT, British Independent and World Cinema titles with an impressive collection of films from Europe, Latin America and Asia.

Peccadillo nurtures new and upcoming talent alongside established directors. In addition, Peccadillo Pictures also distributes short films and re-releases of classic titles. As well as bringing an array of films to cinemas across the UK and Ireland, we provide film viewing on a variety of platforms, from online, video on demand, iTunes, Blu-ray and DVD.

Sadly, Bam Bam the official Peccadillo mascot and celebrity feline passed away in 2009. She is always in our thoughts.

Description:

We see things in a different light, but with our own eyes and draw upon a wealth of experience.

Name: Bangladesh Film Development Corporation (BFDC)
Description:
Bangladesh Film Development Corporation

Bangladesh Film Development Corporation or [BFDC] is a government owned and operated corporation in Tejgaon, Dhaka, Bangladesh. SM Haroon-Or-Rashid is the managing director of the corporation.

History
The organisation was founded in 1959 as the East Pakistan Film Development Corporation which was changed to Bangladesh Film Development Corporation after Bangladesh achieved independence in 1971.[5] It signed an agreement with National Film Development Corporation of India in 2016 to jointly produce a documentary on Bangladesh Liberation war. It has faced criticism on mismanagement and waste of public funds. On 3rd April of every year the National Film day of Bangladesh is observed, the day is organised and celebrated by the corporation. The day marks the occasion when Sheikh Mujibur rahman then Minister of Industries and Commerce of East Pakistan introduced the bill to formulate the East Pakistan Film development corporation.

Name: SPG Studios
Description: SPG provides foreign-language dubbing services to prominent TV, film, video game, and advertising clients. We don’t know how to spell burokracy. But we do understand deadlines and delivering under pressure. We have ambitions to grow and are excited for the challenges that lie ahead.

Name: Reversal Films
Description: Reversal Films produces culturally significant films for distribution to niche and general audiences. Since incorporating in Spring 2007 in Austin, Texas, Reversal has sold two award-winning documentaries, one earning a Gotham Award nomination, produced Freeman Film's Skateland starring Twilight’s Ashley Greene (2010 release), produced its own original documentary Echotone (2010 release), and has received coverage in Variety and The Hollywood Reporter. Reversal is distinguished by its centralized producer team of four principals specialized in all phases of film finance to distribution, filling an infrastructural gap in Texas and the broader industry to source top creative talent, produce premium quality films, and distribute through major and independent film channels. Reversal has operated an office since inception called The Integrated Media Community (The IMC), which hosts complementary businesses such as a 3D animation and post effects team, a post editing firm, and a professional sound design and music composition company. IMC clients have included Universal Pictures, Sony Pictures, Troublemaker Studios, and MTV. Reversal’s bi-annual concert event in Austin, the “ATX Series,” draws over 3,000 people to celebrate convergence in Austin’s media arts community. Reversal maintains talent and distributor relationships in New York and Los Angeles, and frequent industry festivals, and has created film opportunities with Oscar-winning Executive Producers, festival-winning Directors, and rising stars.

Description:
PRODUTORA DE VÍDEO, COMO ESCOLHER?
Quando contratamos uma pessoa ou empresa para realizar um trabalho precisamos saber de duas informações: EXPERIÊNCIA e PROJETOS REALIZADOS na sua área de atuação.

Ao contratar uma produtora de vídeo você deve levar em conta quatro itens para ter sucesso no seu projeto: REPERTÓRIO, TEMPO DE ATUAÇÃO, QUALIDADE DOS PROFISSIONAIS E QUALIDADE DOS EQUIPAMENTOS.

A Estúdio Ki cumpre todos esses requisitos: PROFISSIONAIS ESPECIALISTAS EM EMPRESAS, REPERTÓRIO COM MAIS DE 750 VÍDEOS, 15 ANOS DE MERCADO E EQUIPAMENTOS DE ÚLTIMA GERAÇÃO.

Name: MINDED FACTORY
Description:
Minded Factory is a film production and advertising company based in Barcelona, Madrid, Bogotá and Ibiza. The company counts with talented directors, DOP's and photographers worldwide . 

Since the foundation in 2008 we have completed numerous film and advertising productions around the world, collaborating with leading production companies, agencies, brands and artists across the audiovisual market.

Our vanguard team includes film-, art- and creative directors and cinematographers, as well as writers, editors, colourists, 3D, FX, Vfx, 360° film-makers, photographers, programmers, designers and specialists in global markets. We create audiovisual content for multi-platforms (film, tv, web and mobile), feature films, short films, documentaries, video clips, 360° films, fashion and advertising campaigns. 

Our company also provides support for the entire production process across pre-production, production and post-production; including rental services for audiovisual equipment, photo and video studios, editing rooms, casting sessions, photo shoots, CGI / 3D, Spanish location directories, transportation, legal services and catering. 

“Our passion is for great ideas, beautifully executed, that engage audiences irrespective of platform, device or venue.”

Name: day for night*
Description:
We are a UK based independent film organisation working across the film exhibition, distribution and screen translation sectors. We seek to take some of the freshest and most distinctive independent films and moving image works to wide and diverse audiences across the UK and further afield, with accessibility, diversity and inclusion at the core of our philosophy. We work with artists, filmmakers, curators, translators, distributors, festivals, venues and audiences, with the central aim of enabling broader access to visual culture.

Access:
From screen to text – enhancing moving image culture and access for wider audiences, through subtitles, audio description and translation for film and the arts

Curatorial Projects:
Celebrating the best in moving image culture, with a particular focus on under-represented and under-acknowledged areas of cinema

Specialist Film Distribution:
Creating a platform for singular and distinctive independent works, with a particular focus on Asia, Latin America and experimental cinema

Description:
Have a Nice Day Films est une société de production spécialisée dans le film d’animation créée par Emilie Djiane, ancienne directrice de la distribution cinéma (plus de 60 films sortis dont Incendies, The Lunchbox, Tatsumi, Have a Nice Day) et Denis Walgenwitz, expert dans la fabrication de films d’animation.
Sans limites de formes, de durées ou de media, Have a Nice Day Films a pour projet de raconter aux enfants, et aussi de temps en temps aux plus grands, de nouvelles histoires, des récits originaux, des fables réjouissantes…
Nous souhaitons accompagner des réalisateurs, des créateurs et des artistes dont le travail donne à lire le monde qui nous entoure.
Notre aventure commence cette année avec la réalisatrice Olesya Shchukina et son projet de long métrage Papa et moi que nous développons.
Pour la suite… To be continued ! En attendant, on vous souhaite une Nice Journée !

Name: Open City Documentary Festival
Description:
Open City Documentary is home to several projects in the world of documentary and is dedicated to developing and supporting non-fiction storytellers.

Since 2008, Open City Docs School has been running short courses covering documentary in various forms, covering filmmaking, audio and virtual reality; as well as film theory lectures, practical camera training, film editing and workshops with award-winning documentarians.

The school also runs an MA in Ethnographic and Documentary Film Practice, and an MFA in Creative Documentary as part of the UCL Anthropology department.

The organisation nurtures the next generation of filmmakers, audio producers and VR filmmakers through training programmes, an annual film festival and other screening projects throughout the year.

Celebrating the art of non-fiction, Open City Documentary Festival creates an open space in London to nurture and champion the art of creative documentary and non-fiction filmmakers. We aim to challenge and expand the idea of documentary in all its forms. We provide a platform for emerging talent as well as established masters working within the documentary form.

The festival takes place over seven days in venues across Central London, and consists of international contemporary and retrospective non-fiction film, audio and cross media, as well as filmmaker Q&As, industry panels, workshops, networking and parties.

Name: Cineimpact Academy - Film, Transmedia, Social Sciences
Description:

Answering to a world where interlaced knowledge becomes more necessary than ever, CINEIMPACT Academy creates a regional hub which rethinks transdisciplinary innovation by putting Filmmaking, Social Sciences and Interaction Design in mutually empowering collaborations.

The global values of such collaborations are increasingly requested by society, technology and communication needs within all regions, contexts or creative industries.

Since 2014, CINEIMPACT constructs effective methodologies and tailor-made solutions for film and cross-media projects, by exquisite mastering of cinematic UX Storytelling sustained by immersive Socio-Anthropologic Understanding of Humanity.

Innovative methods and cross-disciplinary skills are made available to multifarious beneficiaries - students, professionals, organisations, who want to develop successful projects through cineimpactic expertise of increasing necessity 

Don’t be shy and write to us at
contact@cineimpact.org
in order to let us know how we can help or just to receive the latest info through
Cineimpact Academy Newsletter
comprising the future activities and the latest innovations in
Filmmaking, Anthropology, Transmedia, Docu-Fiction Storytelling

Name: ZINEBI - Festival Internacional de Cine Documental y Cortometraje de Bilbao
Description:
ZINEBI is the International Festival of Documentary and Short Film of Bilbao, organized by the Department of Culture of the City Council of Bilbao. During the month of November, Bilbao becomes the stage for documentary and short films that are screened throughout the city. Each edition ZINEBI receives around 5,000 short films and documentaries from all over the world, of which less than a hundred take part in the International Competition. Other cycles and tributes complete the festival program.



ZINEBI es el Festival Internacional de Cine Documental y Cortometraje de Bilbao, organizado por el Área de Cultura del Ayuntamiento de Bilbao. Bilbao se convierte, en el mes de noviembre, en escenario de películas y cortometrajes que se proyectan por toda la ciudad. Cada edición ZINEBI recibe alrededor de 5.000 cortometrajes y documentales de todo el mundo, de los cuales menos de un centenar toman parte en el Concurso Internacional. Otros ciclos y homenajes completan la programación del festival.

Name: JayByrd Films
Description:
JayByrd Films is a is a globally recognized pioneer in the field of FPV and aerial cinematography. Established with a passion for pushing the boundaries of visual storytelling, we are a full-service production company that has revolutionized the way audiences experience film through innovative technique, cutting-edge technology and monumental sound design.

Our mission is to capture the world from breathtaking perspectives, leveraging FPV and aerial cinematography to create immersive, awe-inspiring content. We strive to push the limits of creativity and craftsmanship, delivering unparalleled visual experiences that captivate and inspire audiences worldwide.

Name: Access Moving Image
Description:
Access Moving Image (AMI) is a multi award winning production company founded in 2003. We produce entertaining and thought provoking films for cinema and internet audiences, along with highly effective communication films for business clients in the private, public and third sectors.

We're a little different from other production companies, because we use our own profits and surplus revenues to subsidise or fund social film projects through our groundbreaking First Shot and InFocus initiatives. These projects allow everyone - including young people, the marginalised and the ignored - to contribute to discussions about issues that affect them. The films offer a candid insight into the cultural make-up of our society and can be used to influence decision makers and affect change. AMI often works in partnership with other organisations, agencies and local authorities to develop projects within the region and across the UK.

The company was founded by Craig Lawson in response to his frustration at the lack of opportunities for working class filmmakers in the region. He remains as passionate today as he did back in 2003 about the need to find and develop talent. Our New Wave programme was established to support and incubate emerging filmmakers from non-traditional backgrounds across the north of England by creating freelance work opportunities and access to advice and low cost resources. The programme has supported the development and production of countless short films culminating in the award winning feature documentary 'We Are Poets'.

Name: Festival Biarritz Amérique Latine
Description:
Depuis 1992, le festival a pour mission de promouvoir le cinéma et la culture latino-américaine auprès du public français et offrir des opportunités de distribution ou de co-productions aux films latino-américains.

Outre les films en compétition (court-métrages, longs-métrages fictions et documentaires), le festival présente chaque année des hommages et des rétrospectives autour de différentes thématiques.

Il est également proposé découvrir la culture latino-américaine sous d’autres formes avec des rencontres littéraires, des expositions de photographies et des conférences universitaires.

De plus, chaque année le fameux Village du festival, lieu de convivialité et d’échanges situé face à l’océan, permet d’assister aux expositions, aux conférences et tous les soirs aux concerts gratuits.

Name: Cinema Animadores
Description:
HÁ 12 ANOS NO MERCADO PUBLICTÁRIO - SÃO MAIS DE 500 FILMES EM VÁRIAS LINGUAGENS E TÉCNICAS FEITAS PRÁ CLIENTES COMO RENAULT, BANCO DO BRASIL, DANONE, FORD, FININVEST...

A PRODUTORA TEM SE ESPECIALIZADO TAMBÉM EM CONTEÚDO TRANSMIDIÁTICO.

Começamos em 98 (!!!) fazendo animaçao prá publicidade e aos poucos fomos pegando o gostinho de contar histórias. 

Aí percebemos que podíamos aliar muitas linguagens e ferramentas - então começamos também a filmar. 

Depois, foi a descoberta das plataformas. TV, Cinema, internet, celular, até revistas!

Aí descobrimos que tudo junto fica também muuuuito mais divertido. 

Por conta disso, para aprender mais e poder atuar de maneira bastante profissional neste novo momento da comunicação, fizemos uma parceria com a Conteúdos Diversos de Sérgio Lopes (ex QG/Talent) e ajudamos a organizar a vinda de Jesse Cleverly (ex BBC) ao Brasil, para 2 programas de capacitação profissional em TRANSMÍDIA: em novembro de 2009 foi dado um seminário na Fundação Padre Anchieta, promovido em conjunto com o AnimaTV, Minc e UPTO3' e um workshop no MIS, em parceria com o Programa Cinema do Brasil, Minc, Secretaria da Cultura do Estado, Mis e UPTO3'

Name: SOFICA Cinémage
Description:
En 20 ans, les SOFICA Cinémage sont devenues leader sur le marché des SOFICA (fonds d’investissements défiscalisés dans le cinéma et l’audiovisuel) en termes de volume cumulé d’investissements.

Ainsi, depuis plusieurs années, les SOFICA Cinémage occupent une place spécifique sur le marché du financement. Ceci grâce à un portefeuille particulièrement varié, comportant : 

Des succès commerciaux : Intouchables, Le sens de la fête, L’Arnacoeur, Babysitting 2, Première année, Alice et le maire, Hors normes, Au nom de la terre, Antoinette dans les Cévennes, Le discours, Boite noire, Mon Crime, Anatomie d'une chute… 

Des films d’auteur : Titane, Deephan, Annette, La vérité, Perdrix, Le daim, La villa, Les garçons sauvages, La tortue rouge, Mon roi, De rouille et d’os, Des hommes et des dieux, Le Règne Animal, Le Fil, Miséricorde, Vingt Dieux… 

Des films d’animation : Flow le chat qui n’avait plus peur de l’eau, La Plus précieuse des marchandises, Une nuit au zoo, … 

Des séries à succès, notamment : Le Bureau des légendes, En thérapie, Mytho, Tropiques Criminels, Follow… 

Plus de 230 films sélectionnés dans des festivals internationaux de catégorie A, dont plusieurs primés : Anatomie d’une chute, La Tour de Glace, Titane, Annette, Dheepan, Mon roi, Jeune femme, Trois souvenirs de ma jeunesse, L’Inconnu du lac, Des hommes et des Dieux, Reality... 

Les SOFICA Cinémage jouent également un rôle proactif d’animateur du marché du financement. En effet, les SOFICA Cinémage ont investi plus de 160 M€ dans l’audiovisuel et le cinéma à ce jour. Ce qui représente plus de 700 œuvres financées et plus de 250 sociétés de production aidées dans le développement. Les SOFICA Cinémage sont ainsi devenues un partenaire privilégié des producteurs indépendants.

Name: HOPE | Documentary
Description:
Documentary | 90 min | D/UG
Today an entire generation is growing up in a world surrounded by negative headlines. Disasters, climate change, and wars threaten our very existence. Artificial intelligence is taking our jobs. The understandable result - pessimism and despair.  
Young Gloria has already lost everything. Her home, her family and her friends have been forever taken. Alone and penniless in a foreign country, she does not despair over her fate, but courageously follows her seemingly destined path. Despite her circumstances, her path leads step by step from despair. To the pathway of hope. 
HOPE is the courageous response to the challenges of our time.

Name: Archival Producers Alliance
Description:
Archival Producers Alliance was founded in 2023 as a way for independent archival producers to come together, create community and develop best practices around their unique role within the film industry. Our group represents over 400 archival producers - and counting - from across the US and internationally. As individuals, our work has appeared on cable, public & network television, streaming platforms, as well as in theaters and festivals around the world. 



As a group, we are taking our unique collective knowledge and using it to influence policy and affect change within the industry. Our first initiative looks to address the impact of generative AI on the field of documentary film and archival work (you can learn more on our AI Initiative page).

Name: Murdoc
Description:
Founded in 2008 by Fede Alvarez, Guillermo Carbonell, and Pedro Lafferranderie, Murdoc quickly became one of the hottest production companies in South America, producing commercials for agencies and clients throughout the entire continent and providing production services for companies around the world. After the big success of “Panic Attack!” (2009), Fede left the company and moved to Hollywood to pursue a career as a director of blockbusters.

Name: EGEDA MÉXICO - Licenciamiento Audiovisual
Description:
EGEDA (Entidad de Gestión de Derechos de los Productores Audiovisuales) es una entidad sin ánimo de lucro que representa y defiende los derechos de los productores audiovisuales en España y en los 20 países de América Latina: Argentina, Bolivia, Brasil, Chile, Colombia, Costa Rica, Cuba, Ecuador, El Salvador, Guatemala, Honduras, México, Nicaragua, Panamá, Paraguay, Perú, Puerto Rico, República Dominicana, Uruguay y Venezuela.
Cualquier productor audiovisual latinoamericano puede ser socio de EGEDA de forma gratuita y beneficiarse de sus servicios.


El principal servicio que EGEDA presta a sus socios es la gestión de ciertos derechos de propiedad intelectual en todo el mundo. ¿Sabía que si su obra ha sido emitida en televisión en cualquier país del mundo donde se reconozcan derechos como la remuneración compensatoria por copia privada, o la comunicación pública por retransmisión, podría cobrar por ello? Hágase socio de EGEDA y comience a cobrar su dinero.

Además de ello, nuestros socios tienen acceso a un amplio abanico de servicios gratuítos.

Miles de productores latinoamericanos son ya socios de EGEDA a través de la red internacional de entidades creadas en España, Chile, Colombia, Ecuador, Perú, República Dominicana y Uruguay. EGEDA cuenta también con oficina en Los Angeles (Egeda US), cuya misión es representar a sus socios en Estados Unidos y servir de enlace en las relaciones entre la industria audiovisual estadounidense y la iberoamericana.

Name: Pandora Film Verleih
Description:
In 1982, Pandora Film was founded by Reinhard Brundig and Karl „Baumi" Baumgartner in Frankfurt as a production company and a distributor. What began as a project of two firm enthusiasts turned out to become a great success story in the 1980s and 1990s when Pandora Film became one of the biggest and most renowned independent distributors in Germany - always aiming at getting a wide audience enthusiastic about their national and international arthouse productions.  Reinhard Brundig und Karl „Baumi“ Baumgartner managed to work together on a long-term basis with the most important directors of international independent cinema at the time such as Aki Kaurismäki („The Man without a Past“), Jim Jarmusch („Only Lovers left Alive“), Bent Hamer („Factotum“) or Emir Kusturica („Black cat, white cat“). 

Pandora Film celebrated its biggest success in the years after its foundation when Jane Campion won the Palme d’Or in Cannes for her film THE PIANO in 1993 and when Emir Kusturicas won the Palme d’Or for UNDERGROUND in 1995. THE PIANO turned out on of the most successful films in the history of Pandora Film: 2 Min. people saw the drama in German cinemas in 1993. Another success story of Pandora Film was SOUL KITCHEN by the German director Fatih Akın with 1.3 Mio. moviegoers when the film was released in German in 2009.  

Every year, Pandora Film releases 5-6 selected films. The distributor is known for its individual, exceptional Marketing and PR campaigns - and for his continuous, intensive work with national and international directors such as Andreas Dresen („From Hilde, with love"), Christian Schwochow („Je suis Karl“, „Paula“), Terrence Malick („A Hidden Life“) or Lukas Dhont („Close“).

Name: Chiledoc
Description:
Chiledoc is the brand that gathers the Chilean documentary sector under two principles that identify us: the associative nature of our community and the diversity of our productions.
Both qualities -community and diversity- are what we have defined as “The outlier way”, or an atypical way of doing things, where the emphasis is on the balance that is achieved by the sum of regards that are acknowledge as different. This feature is also part of the country and the territory that we inhabit.

We are an exception:
In the bottom, to the most left side of the map.
A historical, social, economic and cultural anomaly that defines us and makes us distinctive.
A change in the variables that in the long run defines the result.
We are not a sector, we are a collective force.
We are not represented, we are representatives.
We are not just one more, we are outliers.

Chiledoc is a public-private alliance between the Chilean Documentary Corporation CCDoc and ProChile, subject to the Ministry of Foreign Affairs.

In addition to its content library Comarex is the exclusive sales agent for various production companies including Canal 13 Sudmedia (worldwide) and in Latin America and Hispanic USA to Studio 100 Media, MTV Networks  and Dicon Media, as well as Mediaset Distribution in Africa, Asia and Latin America.

Name: Film Friendly Locations
Description:
Welcome to Film Friendly Locations! 

We specialise in connecting unique spaces with storytellers in film, television, and advertising. Our mission is to transform Toronto's unique locations into unforgettable narrative settings. We offer property owners the unique opportunity to showcase their spaces on screen, while providing producers with a curated selection of inspiring locations that streamline the scouting process. At Film Friendly Locations, we stand at the intersection of cinema and real estate, committed to facilitating the stories that shape our city's legacy.

Every space tells a story, and we find your story its space.

Description:
4:08 Productions creates high-value, story driven content for a variety of clients. Our productions include Emmy-winning documentaries, major event video production, and branded content.

The company was founded in 2011 by filmmaker and director Nic Davis. Nic wanted to bring his talented friends together to create amazing content. Their shared love of music and film led to 4:08 Productions.

Cinemont est aussi l'endroit idéal si vous souhaitez organiser un repas d’entreprise, un apéritif, un séminaire, une conférence, une assemblée, un cocktail ou simplement une soirée privée. 
Votre événement est créé clé en main et se déroule parfaitement dans l’une de nos 4 salles de cinéma, adjacentes à nos 2 bars, ou dans notre salle de séminaire « Lounge Lumière ».

Name: Vancouver Post Alliance
Description:
The Vancouver Post Alliance (VPA) is a non-profit association established for the benefit and representation of the Post Production industry in British Columbia, Canada.

The VPA is dedicated to serving professionals and companies that provide Post Production services and/or technology. The VPA is also a great resource for students who are seeking employment in the Post Production industry.

The VPA encourages competitive business practices within the BC Post Production industry and is competitive with Post Production jurisdictions worldwide. The VPA will leverage its neutral positioning to promote cooperation amongst stakeholders and maintain a healthy, growing and globally competitive Post Production industry in British Columbia.

The Vancouver Post Alliance’s Mission is:
- to act as a catalyst for knowledge exchange & professional development to the BC Post Production community.
- to promote and market British Columbia’s Post Production industry.
- to become the central platform for communication between the British Columbia Post Production industry and Government.
to provide a forum for networking and collaboration.

Name: GUM Studios
Description:
Founded in 2008, GUM Studios is a Level-2 QPF, WMBE certified, women-owned production facility that operates in Industry City, Brooklyn. We offer world-class spaces for feature films, commercials, TV, photography, music videos and events. In addition to our stages, GUM Studios also offers a full-service equipment rental house. Our extensive inventory includes top-of-the-line lighting units, such as tungsten, HMI, Kino, LED, and Profoto, to ensure that your project is lit to perfection. 

Our team of experienced professionals will ensure your projects receive the highest level of support and service. With our commitment to quality and customer satisfaction, you can count on us to bring your vision to life. GUM Studios participate in the New York State Film Production Tax Credit Program. This program offers substantial tax credits to eligible productions.

Name: THE 6 PM MEDIA
Description:
The 6 PM Media – Revolutionizing Visual Effects and Motion picture production in the Cloud Era

At The 6 PM Media, we've reimagined the world of Visual Effects (VFX) and Production by pioneering a production house that operates entirely in the cloud. Saying goodbye to geographical limitations, resource constraints, and IT infrastructure hassles, as we redefine the boundaries of creativity in the digital realm.

TPN Certified: Certified by TPN (Trusted Partner Network), we're dedicated to safeguarding your content with top-notch measures. From inception to delivery, rest assured, your projects are in safe hands. With us, your creativity is boundless, and your content is always secure.

Unleashing the Power of the Cloud:
Our studio is the first of its kind, transcending traditional studio setups with an innovative approach. We've harnessed the capabilities of cloud computing to create a seamless, globally-connected environment for our artists and teams. Regardless of their location, our talents collaborate effortlessly, thanks to our cutting-edge IT infrastructure on the cloud.

Instantaneous Output, No IT Barriers:
Our commitment to breaking down IT barriers means you can expect lightning-fast turnarounds. With our own render farms, workstations, and servers residing in the cloud, we eliminate bottlenecks and deliver quick, high-quality outputs to our clients. You'll experience unmatched efficiency and precision in every project, as technology seamlessly integrates with artistry.

Name: Western Norway Film Fund
Description:
Our goal is to develop a thriving audiovisual industry, funding the very best projects from regional producers and creatives, while championing Western Norway as a leading destination for international film and series production.

We manage state and regional funds, supporting the production of short films, development and production of documentary features and series, and the development of feature films, drama series, and games. We provide grants for talent development and skill-building initiatives, and we run BAKOM - a creative production workshop for young talent. 

Western Norway Film Commission is an integral part of the fund, promoting the region and offering free services to major productions considering shooting in and/or co-producing with Western Norway.

Backed by our owners, Bergen municipality, Vestland, and Møre & Romsdal counties, we are proud to power the regional film, TV, and games industry.

Name: Revolution Pictures
Description:
Revolution Pictures was started by Randy Brewer in 1997 where frosted tips, rockin’ a Space Jam VHS, and singing along to “Semi-Charmed Life” were the rage. Like all startups, we hustled; we cultivated our creativity and ventured into mainstream country and pop music videos. We smashed car windows with Carrie Underwood, we went to prom with Taylor Swift, and we stood under the mistletoe with Justin Bieber. Brands knocked on the door, soon enough. 

RAM Trucks asked for beautiful footage of horses to be narrated by Sam Elliott––done. We gave the sweet gift of laughter to the world in Verizon’s web spot starring a twelve-year-old that looks like he can lift your grandma. For Sony Pictures Home Entertainment, we put a shark in a living room. 

We’re still that same company from twenty years ago. However, we traded in the cubicles for an office with glass doors and open lounge areas. Our core tenets of people first, disruptive creativity, and dynamic storytelling continue to be the bedrock from which we build our legacy. The future is paved with more groundbreaking work to be done.

Name: Paperny Entertainment Inc.
Description: Based in Vancouver and New York, the award-winning Paperny Entertainment Inc., run by partners David Paperny, Audrey Mehler and Cal Shumiatcher, is one of the world's pre-eminent producers of high-quality factual television programming and an emerging leader in new media and interactive projects. From groundbreaking documentaries and documentary series to popular reality and lifestyle programmes, Paperny Entertainment has produced over 600 hours of provocative television since its inception in 1994. Seen on 25 networks across Canada and the United States and in 36 countries worldwide, Paperny Entertainment’s programmes excel in capturing the essence of the human story.

Name: Trip to the Moon Films
Description:
Beyond the noise, Trip to the Moon Films helps you connect and inspire trust through film.

In our commercial partnerships, our goal is to help brands stand out with content that resonates beyond trends—timeless and bold. If you’re ready to make a lasting impact, let’s create something extraordinary.

Founded in 2018 in Amsterdam, our film production company has since created countless commercials across television, social media, out-of-home, and other platforms. Alongside these, we’re passionate about cinema, producing a range of short fiction and documentary films.

Contact us or hop by our office to get a better taste of our cup of tea.

Description:
Studio Jadu's vision is to make storytelling a viable business for all creators — empowering them to bring ideas to life, grow audiences, and share in the rewards of their creativity.

Panteao also offers the largest online firearms training streaming service Make Ready TV. Check out Makeready.tv to see our library. GRABACIÓN: Disponemos del equipo necesario para cubrir las producciones más exigentes.
EDICIÓN: Editamos todo lo que llega a nuestras manos, tanto si lo hemos grabado nosotros como si no. Nos apasiona el montaje.
GRAFISMO: Animaciones, motion graphics, rotulaciones o fotomontajes de tu viaje a Japón. Tú lo sueñas, nosotros lo hacemos.
FOTOGRAFÍA: Las fotos de tu evento serán tan increíbles que conseguirás miles de likes en tus redes sociales.
DISEÑO GRÁFICO: Carteles, logotipos o el tatuaje que tanto deseas. Si buscas un diseño, cuéntanos tu idea.
STREAMING: Tus eventos en directo. Tú eliges el número de cámaras, nosotros nos encargamos del resto.
GUIÓN/CONTENIDOS: Sin un buen guión no hay historia. Sin una historia no hay mensaje.
LOCUCIÓN: Tú eliges el idioma. Nosotros no te sonaremos, pero las voces de nuestros locutores seguro que sí.
GRABACIÓN AÉREA: Vídeo y fotografía. Somos operadores certificados por AESA (Agencia Estatal de Seguridad Aérea)

No te rompas la cabeza, nosotros nos encargamos de todo.

Especialistas en producir cortometrajes animados tipo documental para sitios turísticos, generando en su alrededor innovadores modelos de negocio y productos.

Name: Alvernia Studios
Description:
Alvernia Studios is a filmmaking one-stop shop providing full service during the shooting period and postproduction facilities. Experienced international team of professionals equipped with the most modern technology providing services in the field of production and post production of video and audio. The studio produces features films, commercials, video games and music projects.

The image and sound acquisition facilities include 3 soundstages, full shooting equipment (cameras, lighting, grip, location sound, power generators), mobile units in a fleet of modern swap bodies and Motion Capture services based on ultramodern Vicon’s cameras. Our Music Scoring Studio is suitable for recording of all types of music, we own music instruments including a Steinway & Sons Model D piano and a variety of Kolberg Percussion instruments.

Postproduction facilities offer a full range of services: a negative laboratory with telecine transfers, scanning and colour correction. The VFX department picks up the most complex challenges while the audio postproduction department provides world-class score recording, ADR processing, sound effects, and the final mix in a Dolby Premier certified dubbing studio. An ultramodern Digital Intermediate department is one of the 25 studios that have obtained Truelight Theatre Certification and the only one in Poland to allow 4K colour correction in real-time. Alvernia is Poland’s only site where FilmLight’s Baselight 8 colour correction system is in use.

Name: LUMS Media Arts Society
Description:
The LUMS Media Arts Society, undoubtedly one of the largest and most happening societies at LUMS, inspires all those who recognize the ever growing importance of media as a powerful channel for human expression. LMA is dedicated to promoting creativity via the different forms of media available to us today. From its inception, LMA has been involved in varied media ventures including photography and film making. LMA seeks to become the primary outlet for students who want to express themselves in different forms and polish their skills thereby streamlining their creative zeal towards meaningful end products.

Apart from the production of films, LMA organizes and hosts various events that highlight the importance of media and serve as outlets for innovative and productive activities. The main events are FiLUMS, the annual All Pakistan short film festival; Olympiad, a manifold event celebrating art and media; The Intra LUMS Movie Trivia; and Film Realm, a movie trailer, music video, scriptwriting, speed filming and photo essay competition.

Not only are these events attended by the leading universities and schools of the country and many talented individuals, but they also receive immense media coverage and celebrity attention.

From professional live broadcasts to the the rental of a film and TV studios to the production of high-quality advertising films we offer you everything from one source.

A Brazucah desenvolve projetos culturais com foco em cinema brasileiro e a democratização em parceria com organizações, empresas e marcas.

Também é focada em distribuição de filmes em circuitos comerciais e alternativos, ações de guerrilha, marketing universitário e promocional com o objetivo de atingir o público jovem e nichos específicos.

Quem somos. 

Cynthia Alario: Sócia fundadora da Brazucah. Formada em comunicação social pela Universidade de São Paulo (USP), especializou-se em Film and Television Business na Fundação Getúlio Vargas (FGV) e em Educomunicação na USP e atualmente é pós-graduanda na UNIPAZ. Desenvolveu no seu trabalho de conclusão de curso o mapa da exclusão cinematográfica paulista e ministrou inúmeros workshops em universidades brasileiras e latino-americanas.

Marco Costa: Sócio da Brazucah. Formado em Publicidade e Propaganda pela Universidade de São Paulo (USP), realizou especializações na área de Gestão Cultural no Centro de Pesquisa e Formação do SESC-SP, Economia Urbana na PUC-SP, Administração de Empresa pela FGV e Planejamento Estratégico, na Escola Superior de Propaganda e Marketing.

Cidalio Santos: Formado em administração de Recursos Humanos, foi coordenador de projetos socioculturais nas cidades de São Paulo e Santos. Desde 2006 é integrante da equipe de projetos da Brazucah Produções, atualmente é o coordenador do projeto CINEB.

BB Films, her türlü indoor ve outdoor çekimlerinizde prodüksiyon öncesi hizmetlerden post-prodüksiyon sürecine kadar her alanda hızlı organize olabilen genç yapısı ve dinamizmi ile sizlerin hizmetindedir. 

BB Films , BILKORAS TASARIM AMBALAJ SAN TIC LTD ŞTİ Kuruluşudur.

Name: ITACA The Outdoor Community
Description:
ITACA cura, organizza e promuove rassegne cinematografiche che porta in tour in Italia. 

Nasce nel 2013 con l’obiettivo di presentare anche in Italia i migliori corto e medio metraggi finalisti al prestigioso Banff Centre Mountain Film Festival (Banff, Canada). 

Dal 2017, amplia la sua attività al mondo del mare, con l’Ocean Film Festival, e dell’arrampicata, con il Reel Rock Tour, di cui è licenziataria in esclusiva per l’Italia.

Nel 2019, ITACA distribuisce in esclusiva il film FREE SOLO, vincitore dell’Oscar 2019 come Miglior Documentario. Il prestigioso riconoscimento e il grande riscontro da parte del pubblico sono una testimonianza di quanto i temi dell’outdoor abbiano tutte le caratteristiche per uscire dal circuito più ristretto dei festival e delle rassegne di settore. 

Forti di una tradizione decennale in rassegne cinematografiche, nel 2020 abbiamo portato online la nostra passione per l’avventura con il lancio di Itaca on Demand, la prima piattaforma in streaming interamente dedicata al mondo outdoor.  

Le storie dei film creano una specie di triangolazione tra spettatore, montagna e vita outdoor, dove il racconto assume la prospettiva di un viaggio attraverso le terre più remote e affascinanti del Pianeta. L’avventura e l’esplorazione diventano anche strumento di sensibilizzazione sui temi del rispetto della natura e della wilderness.

ITACA è impegnata a creare una vera a propria community di appassionati di montagna, avventura e discipline outdoor,  persone che condividono passioni e interessi e si riconoscono nei valori proposti, da cui l’hashtag #bepartofit come espressione di questo sentire comune.

Name: Interloper Films
Description:
INTERLOPER FILMS is an international, award-winning production company founded by acclaimed filmmaker Ondi Timoner. We develop and produce original feature documentaries, shorts, series, and narrative work that amplify bold voices, urgent stories, and the human experience.

Our distinguished catalog includes Sundance Grand Jury Prize winners DIG! (2004) and WE LIVE IN PUBLIC (2009), and critically acclaimed films like COMING CLEAN (2020), THE NEW AMERICANS: Gaming a Revolution (2023, Netflix), LAST FLIGHT HOME (2022, MTV Documentary Films/Paramount), THE INN BETWEEN (2024), and ALL GOD’S CHILDREN (DocNYC Centerpiece) — films that explore culture, identity, justice, community, and change. MAPPLETHORPE (2018), our first scripted feature, premiered at Tribeca and won multiple audience awards before theatrical and Hulu release.

Our work also spans acclaimed shorts like LIBRARY OF DUST, OBEY THE ARTIST, and THE LAST MILE. In 2025, ALL THE WALLS CAME DOWN — Ondi’s deeply personal documentary short about the 2025 LA fires and community resilience following the loss of her Altadena home — was shortlisted for an Academy Award in Documentary Short Film and has screened widely, sparking dialogue and action around climate impact and equity.  ￼

Interloper’s films are featured in the Museum of Modern Art (MoMA) permanent collection and have earned festival honors and industry recognition. We also produce multimedia series and initiatives—including BYOD (Bring Your Doc), A Total Disruption, and WeTalk—that extend Interloper’s mission: to tell impactful stories that shape culture and inspire action.

Description: Can you improve the world by making corporate films, school promotional films, documentaries and other video productions? Por favor para mayor información, lista de trabajos realizados y demos de videos, ingresar en nuestra página web: www.tvcameraman.com.ar.

Muchas Gracias

Martin Errea

Name: Dot Films
Description:

In addition to our feature films, we craft stories for mid to large-sized B2B and B2C companies that demand video content more innovative than traditional corporate materials.

We harness the power of cinematic storytelling to showcase how individuals are positively affected by businesses, projects, and services, fostering genuine empathy and creating a person-to-person connection with the narrative.

Name: Creative Europe Desk UK (MEDIA)
Description:
Creative Europe is the European Union's programme to support the cultural, creative and audiovisual sectors. From 2014-2020, €1.46 billion is available to support European projects with the potential to travel, reach new audiences and encourage skill sharing and development.

Launched in January 2014, Creative Europe brings together a Culture sub-programme, which provides funding for the cultural and creative sectors, and a MEDIA sub-programme, which invests in film, television, new media and games.

Creative Europe Desk UK promotes awareness and understanding of Creative Europe, and provides free advice and support for applicants from the UK. Creative Europe Desk UK’s team of specialists is based across the UK (in London, Manchester, Edinburgh, Glasgow, Cardiff and Belfast) and we organise workshops, seminars and industry events.

Description: Girls in Film is a network and platform for new generation of womxn in film. We organise events, run a video platform and production company in aim to support and connect young female filmmakers.

Pictures in our minds, flying in our hearts.
Fast, precise, dynamic – benchmarks for today’s aerial filming and benchmarks we set ourselves. We utilize the latest technology in aerial filmmaking to reach the ultimate goal and fulfill our passion: Capture unique images that tell a story! To realize that goal, piloting skills are essential. Our award winning Skynamic Pilots look back at 15 years of flight experience in the RC Model sector, having 700 flight hours a year. Our Team includes filmmakers and photographers, which means that we all speak the same visual language.

Produção de Filmes e Séries.
