Name: La Tuna Group
Description:
SOMOS PROFESIONALES PERO TAMBIÉN AVENTURADOS
Somos un grupo de amigos que un día se reunieron en un Pollo Loco de Los Ángeles para formar una productora, estábamos nostálgicos y por eso elegimos una fruta tan simbólica. Han pasado 20 años desde entonces y el equipo ha crecido, todos los que estamos en La Tuna amamos nuestro trabajo. Tenemos una gran relación con nuestros clientes, con los cuales hemos crecido y a muchos otros los hemos ayudado a crecer. Honramos la cultura del trabajo pero también disfrutamos prender lumbre y reunirnos a gozar la comunidad que hemos creado. Estamos orgullosos de nuestra trayectoria y queremos trabajar con marcas y personas con quienes podamos ver hacia atrás y sonreír por lo que hicimos.

Name: Stichting Oxville
Description: Stichting Oxville is opgericht door Carlo Dias, Aydin Dehzad en Bas Broertjes om cinema naar Amsterdam Nieuw-West te brengen. Toen zij elkaar in 2016 tegenkwamen op het filmfestival van Cannes kwamen ze achter een gezamenlijk gemis. Film leeft ontzettend in Amsterdam, maar in hun buurt – Nieuw-West - konden ze niet naar de bioscoop. Uiteindelijk besloten ze zelf het heft in eigen handen te nemen en richtten ze Stichting Oxville op. Het trio is reeds een decennium actief in het distributie- en productiewezen en ziet met Oxville Cinema de uitgelezen kans om hun passie voor film over te brengen op Nieuw-West. Samen met haar bewoners wensen zij een community op te bouwen van filmliefhebbers. Het filmaanbod willen zij zo breed mogelijk opzetten zodat iedereen – van jong tot oud – bediend kan worden. Van arthouse tot blockbusters.

Name: L'Entraide du Cinéma
Description:
Fondée en 1933, l'Entraide du Cinéma est la première association nationale qui se donne comme objectif d'organiser la solidarité entre tous les professionnels du cinéma et du spectacle. 

En fédérant 9 associations régionales présentes sur tout le territoire, l'Entraide centralise la collecte de fonds et en assure une redistribution solidaire et équitable sous forme de subventions, d'activités de vacances et de loisirs réservées à la communauté des professionnels du cinéma.

Chaque année, l'Entraide offre à plus de 1000 membres la chance de profiter d'infrastructures de qualité dans des lieux uniques et privilégiés, aux tarifs les plus justes.

Missions:

ANIMER le réseau humain de solidarité des professionnels du spectacle, composé par ses membres fondateurs, rassemblés au sein des 11 associations régionales, mais aussi ses membres bienfaiteurs, membres adhérents et bénéficiaires.

PROMOUVOIR le dispositif du Chèque Cinéma Universel auprès des collectivités et des entreprises et, par cette action, encourager la fréquentation de tous les cinémas et lieux de spectacles.

SOUTENIR la diversité, la créativité et la pérennité de la communauté du cinéma
et du spectacle.

CRÉER DES LIENS entre toutes les professions du cinéma et du spectacle.

Name: Oble
Description: Oble is an independent and international studio. We produce fiction and factual stories. We entertain differently. Meaningfully.

Name: BIM Produzione
Description: Bim Produzione was founded in October 2019 by Italian film distribution company Bim (a Wild Bunch Group owned division) and Riccardo Russo (former Head of Tv at Leone Film Group and Head of International Co-productions at Lux Vide). The company mission is to produce high-end content in Drama Series, Documentary and Film for the Italian and international market. Thanks to its international presence, the pan-European holding Group has contributed to the success of numerous feature films such as The Artist (5 Academy Awards, including Best Film), Blue is the Warmest Colour, Dheepan, Fahrenheit 9/11 (all of which won the Palm d’Or at the Cannes Film Festival ) and Pan’s Labyrinth (3 Academy Awards). Bim Produzione joins the other European production company divisions of Wild Bunch AG: Senator Produktion (Germany), Vertigo (Spain) and Wild Bunch (France).

Name: Mosaic
Description:
Mosaic is an independent audiovisual production company, coming from the heart of the Mediterranean, with a global outlook. For the last four years, we have specialised in different publicity, television and documentary formats. 
We have a vast network of international collaborators belonging to a new generation of filmmakers and creative executives, which allows us to face any type of project.
Our current Cosmopolitan approach is based on the need for expression and lays its cornerstone from communication and people. In us, you will discover a close, flexible and creative production company.

Name: FrameBreed Studio
Description: FrameBreed Studio, established in 2008, is a leading name in Romanian Post Production, focusing on 3D Animation and VFX. Our extensive portfolio consists of involvement in various projects, from TV commercials and advertising to short and  feature films, from game-style cinematics to animated series, showcasing our unwavering dedication to every endeavor. With specialized departments for CG Character & Creature Animation, equipped with cutting-edge tools and processing power, we ensure top-tier quality for live-action integrated CG or full CG productions.

Name: Popsicle Creative
Description:
We are a young creative studio specializing in VFX, Motion Graphics and
Creative Content. We love good design, great storytelling and clever content marketing - the three most important aspects of any successful business.
 
Our goal is to empower small and medium businesses by giving them customized creative solutions they need. Our clientele includes, BBC, Netflix, Bloomberg, Natgeo, OSN, Frico, Shahi Spices and so on.

Name: Location Sound Corp.
Description:
LSC is a dealer of professional audio and communications solutions for film, video, broadcast, business, and recording applications. For over 30 years, our hallmark has been a commitment to offering unmatched support services before and after the sale.

Take comfort in knowing that our highly experienced, non-commissioned sales staff only recommend audio gear that best suits your recording application. Period.

Name: ZaLab
Description:
ZaLab produce laboratori di video partecipativo e documentari in contesti interculturali e di marginalità geografica e sociale. 

I laboratori di ZaLab si rivolgono a chi non ha possibilità di esprimersi con il video, ma che per questo sa offrire spesso uno sguardo completamente inedito sulla realtà. Fino a oggi ZaLab ha realizzato laboratori di video partecipativo in diverse regioni d’Italia, in Spagna, in Germania, in Tunisia e in Palestina.

I documentari di ZaLab possono nascere da un laboratorio o dal percorso individuale di un autore. I documentari di ZaLab raccontano vite ignorate e segnate dai conflitti di oggi, con il desiderio di farne storie per tutti.

ZaLab sviluppa infine un’ampia progettualità sul web, per diffondere nello spazio della comunicazione globale le esperienze creative e i racconti maturati in contesti di margine.

Name: Plan B Free S.L.
Description: Planb is an agency in the heart of Barcelona that provides specialized representation of cinematographers worldwide. Our company has been operating for over 24 years, representing an exclusive selection of international directors of photography. A carefully selected list of highly accomplished and skilled specialists in cinematography.

Name: Servicevision
Description:
Somos fabricantes de lentes, grúas, cabezas calientes  y mandos remotos se pueden ver en rodajes en cualquier lugar del mundo bajo nuestra emblemática marca Scorpio.

Fundada en Barcelona en 1986 por los hermanos Andrés y Alfredo Vallés con el objetivo de prestar servicios técnicos a la industria cinematográfica. La empresa se inició con el desarrollo de sistemas ópticos y más adelante se introdujo en la fabricación y alquiler de equipos para rodajes cinematográficos. 

Servicevision es hoy una de las mayores casas de alquiler de equipos para cine, televisión y fotografía de España. Nuestra sede en Cornellà de Llobregat (Barcelona), con más de 12.000 m2 cuadrados que albergan también un conjunto de cuatro platós para cine y televisión.

En España nuestro equipo está formado por más de 50 empleados y disponemos de Servicevison USA como sede en Estados Unidos para ofrecer servicios de alquiler y de post venta de los equipos Scorpio diseñados y fabricados en la empresa madre Servicevision Bis S.L en España.

----

We are manufacturers of lens, cranes, hot heads and remote controls that can be seen in shootings anywhere in the world under our emblematic brand Scorpio.

Founded in Barcelona in 1986 by the brothers Andrés and Alfredo Vallés in order to provide technical services to the film industry. The company began with the development of optical systems and later was introduced in the manufacturing and equipment rental for film shooting. 

Today, Servicevision is one of the largest rental houses of equipment for cinema, television and photography in Spain. Our headquarter is located in Cornella de Llobregat (Barcelona), very close to the airport of El Prat, with a building area of 12,000 m2 where it houses a collection of film and television sets.

In Spain, our team with over 50 people and a Servicevision USA as the US branch to offer rental and after sales services of Scorpio equipment designed and manufactured in the mother company Servicevision Bis S.L. of Spain.

Name: Five to Sixty
Description:
Five to Sixty is a creative production agency driven to create the snackable, shareable five to sixty second content that today’s internet audience hungers for.

Whether a 5 second Instagram video, 15 second TikTok ad or full blown 60 second broadcast spot, we have the talent and capability to do it all.

We are millennials and generation z making videos for our peers.

Name: NFTS North
Description:
Operating from the prestigious ITV Emmerdale Studios, NFTS North are delivering first class training to the film and television industry.

The National Film and Television School is an acknowledged global leader in the provision of postgraduate, high-level, creative and technical skills for the audio-visual industries. Winner of the Outstanding British Contribution to Cinema BAFTA in 2018 and with 95% graduate employment within six months of graduating, it has been cited by some media as one of the top five film schools globally and by one as the No.1 international film school.

The NFTS North portfolio of courses brings this world-class learning provision to the North of England to benefit professionals working in the creative industries here. Diversity and inclusion are key priorities for NFTS North alongside supporting established individuals and new entrants to the industry to develop and build on their skills.

Name: CBRA FILMS
Description:
CBRA FILMS es una productora independiente de contenidos yservicios audiovisuales en Santiago de Chile.

CBRA FILMS logra con un sistema de alianzas con los mejores profesionales y productoras del país logra entregar los mejores productos audiovisuales con los costos más bajos del mercado.

Name: The OTHRS
Description: The OTHRS is a full-service media and production company. Our team of filmmakers has spent their lives rejecting the binaries, identities, and categories required by society. Through complex yet emotionally universal films, we showcase the extraordinary endeavors of everyday people whose journeys bring us to the center of the zeitgeist.

Name: Curated London
Description:
CURATED is a creative content studio that works across commercials, music videos and films. 

With a focus on amplifying new voices, CURATED produce culturally relevant content combining the craft and expertise of established directors with the vital energy and fresh perspectives of the next gen of UK creative talent.

Name: Caligari Film- und Fernsehproduktions GmbH
Description:
Caligari Film- und Fernsehproduktions GmbH was founded in 1986 by Gabriele M. Walther and is market leader in the domain of animation in Germany. The family entertainment specialist is one of the leading independent production companies in the German and international film and TV market. Whilst 30 years in business Caligari Film continually created outstanding programs in all genres with numerous productions awarded.

The highly watched animation programs of Caligari Film are sold into over 200 countries and territories, amongst them famous brands like “Coconut the little dragon”, “Knight Rusty” and “Moonbeam Bear”. In the field of fiction Caligari Film has been producing the most successful German sitcom “Hausmeister Krause”, the end-time thriller “Hell” received rave reviews and six nominations for the German Film Prize (2012). 
In addition to its head office in Munich, Caligari Films has subsidiaries in Stuttgart (Traffix Entertainment), Cologne (Caligari Entertainment) and Berlin (Synergy Film).

Name: FilmeLab
Description: Produtora Audiovisual com 3 estúdios equipados para todo tipo de produção - da ideia até a postagem.

Name: Mother Production
Description: Mother Production is a production company that creates and produces web series, films, and comedies.

Name: Czar BE
Description: An award-winning film, tv & photography production company based in Brussels.

Name: Helsinki International Film Festival – Rakkautta & Anarkiaa / Love & Anarchy
Description:
Helsinki International Film Festival (HIFF) consists of the 11-day festival Love & Anarchy held annually in September and the industry event Finnish Film Affair which takes place during the festival. HIFF’s boutique festival R&A Spring Break is organized in April. 

HIFF promotes the artistry of filmmaking by showcasing inventive, groundbreaking and visually stunning new films. Love & Anarchy’s program consists of 130 feature films and 140 short films. The festival programme presents new films from well-known filmmakers and fresh talents alike, with the emphasis on addressing societal issues, promoting gender equality and diversifying the representation of voices and makers in cinema.

HIFF’s mission is to celebrate the art of film and make the world better together with love and bold, critical thinking. Everything we do is based on our core values of kindness, courage, diversity and ambition.

Join the celebration of cinema at the 36th Love & Anarchy 14.–24.9.2023 and 12th Finnish Film Affair 20.–22.9.2023.

Name: Seriously Funny Productions Ltd
Description:
Seriously Funny Productions creates bold, character-driven comedy across film, web series, and digital media. Led by writer-director-performer Kevin Durham, the company focuses on sharp storytelling, inventive formats, and a distinctly British sense of humour that blends heart, awkwardness, and authenticity.

From the feature film B-Movie (now streaming on Amazon Prime) to ambitious web series like Braveish, comedy-drama screenplays, and experimental AI-enhanced sketches, Seriously Funny Productions is built on a commitment to producing work quickly, smartly, and with cinematic ambition. The company thrives on mixing traditional production with cutting-edge creative tools, allowing for high-quality comedy on an agile timeline.

Whether it’s scripted narrative, live-event-inspired content, or short-form comedy built for social platforms, Seriously Funny Productions develops stories that entertain, connect, and leave a lasting impression.

If you’d like this shortened for a LinkedIn headline or expanded into a full “About” section, I can create those too.

Name: Framebrains
Description:
Let us show you what we can do with a couple of cameras, a great team of creators and a kickass idea. We strongly believe that an investment in commercial film is the best action you can take, to move yourself and your brand forward. If we didn’t believe that we would never be doing this.

So what do you say? Let's produce something completely ***** nuts together!

Name: Fondazione Veneto Film Commission
Description:
The Veneto Film Commission is a non-profit foundation. The Veneto Region is a founding member.

Its purpose is to promote the region as a location and to attract Italian and foreign products to the area. The film commission also acts as a reference for the local film and audiovisual industry, creating job opportunities and providing services, and for those who want to invest in productions made in Veneto.

The Film Commission offers those wishing to make a film in Veneto free services in the pre-production phase and during filming, also acting as a partner with local authorities to facilitate the realization of the works. It also provides sector operators with a database of production and service companies, professionals, actors and venues in the Veneto region.

The Veneto Film Commission Foundation is a member of:

IFC – Italian Film Commissions

EUCFN – European Film Commissions Network

Name: Vetor Lab
Description:
We are VZ Lab, a creative lab that gives to life new and innovative kinds of immersive experiences for agencies and brands alike. 

As part of South America's highly awarded 3D and animation powerhouses Vetor Zero and Lobo, Vetor Lab pulls its momentum from a group that has been working with innovation and technology for the last 20 years, doing CGI and animation projects for agencies and brands all over the world. 

Lately, we have our sights pointed towards creating and producing the best VR, AR and Mixed Reality content possible, pushing the limits of what is possible in storytelling using the latest technology tools available like 360 video, ARCore, ARKit, Oculus, Vive, Hololens and Magic Leap. 

Be it as a standalone piece or as part of a 360 campaign (digital and/or experiential), we can conceive the whole user experience and storytelling and deliver truly immersive and interactive experiences for the user.

Name: DOGEATDOG
Description: https://dogeatdog.co/

Name: Kinopoisk
Description: KinoPoisk is a Russian website about cinematography. The site provides information about movies, TV shows, actors, directors, producers, screenwriters, composers, editors etc. It also has some features of social networks. At the moment it is one of the most popular movie portals of Runet, it occupies the 18th line in Alexa rating of Russian websites as of July 2016.

Name: Visualizarte

Name: Chasing Dreams in the Philippines LLC
Description:
Welcome to the adventure!
Hey there, fellow Dream Chasers!

We’re Chasing Dreams in the Philippines, as an American digital creator family with a passion for travel, culture, and pushing the limits of adventure. I’ve traded the familiar roads of the U.S. for the breathtaking islands, vibrant communities, and untamed landscapes of the Philippines — and I’m bringing you along for every wild, beautiful, and unforgettable moment.

From hiking the chocolate hills of Bohol, to a family reunion in Gubat Sorsogon, getting tattoos in the mountains of Luzon, to discovering hidden street food gems in the heart of Manila & Cebu and even diving into the slums of Happyland in Tondo, this page is your front-row seat to our journey across this incredible country.

Expect:
 • Epic travel vlogs
 • Real-time tips for fellow adventurers
 • Behind-the-scenes fun
 • And a whole lot of Filipino hospitality and heart!

If you love travel, culture, or you’re just here for the ride — welcome! Hit that like, share and subscribe button, leave a comment, make sure you have notifications turned on and let’s explore the Philippines together!

Tara na Dream Chasers! (Let’s go Dream Chasers!)

Name: Toonbox
Description:
Toonbox was founded in 2008. To date, the company has produced more than 260 projects, totaling more than 12 hours of high-quality animation content recognized around the world for its creative and production excellence.

Mr. Freeman is a short form animated series produced by Toonbox specifically for Internet. Each episode features the iconic and cynical Mr. Freeman delivering his uniquely harsh diatribes on modern life. The show has been an Internet sensation, gathering more than 15 million fans and 60 million views on YouTube alone.

With only 11 episodes produced by Toonbox, Qumi-Qumi has managed to find unqualified success in Russia (more than 200 million views on YouTube). The project has found young audiences on both major Russian kids channels (Karusel, CTC, Multimania, Detsky, 2x2) as well as the Internet. The original visual style of the project has proven to have international appeal as well.

Toonbox has also found success delivering high-concept and top-quality animation services. In 2012, Om Nom Stories, the TV-series produced by Toonbox for ZeptoLab’s smash gaming brand “Cut The Rope” was recognized with the iKids Awards for Best Web/App Series. Its 28 episodes gathered more than 300 million views.

Toonbox continues to grow and develop at a rapid pace. Today the company’s portfolio contains a number of animation projects at various stages of production. One of the major projects for 2015 is “Kit^n^Kate”, a multi-platform animated pre-school property for the international market that includes a 32 x 5’ animated series.

In addition to their original projects, Toonbox has provided animation services to international clients including Microsoft, Adobe, Ahmad, Nokia, Danone, AIG, Kaspersky Lab., Wacom, Braun, Oriflame, and Activision-Blizzard, to name but a few.

La pasión por crear historias nos empujó a producir “Ozzy”, nuestro primer largometraje de animación 3D, en coproducción con Canadá. Con un presupuesto superior a los 7.000.000€ esta comedia de aventuras fue
lanzada en 2016 y se estrenó en más de 60 países. Fue nominada a dos Premios Goya (Mejor Película de Animación y Mejor Sonido) y un Premio Platino (Mejor Película de Animación), siendo además galardonada por el Círculo de Escritores Cinematográficos y los Premios Gaudí.

Por lo que respecta a la ficción de imagen real, Capitán Araña estrenó en febrero de 2020 el drama “El Plan”, fue dirigida por Polo Menárguez y protagonizada por Antonio de la Torre, Raúl Arévalo y Chema del Barco, y recibió dos nominaciones a los Premios Goya.

En 2021 estrenamos la comedia “Sevillanas de Brooklyn” (dirigida por Vicente Villanueva), que participó en la Sección Oficial del Festival de Cine de Málaga y que contó con la participación de TVE, Canal Sur y Movistar+ y la financiación del ICAA y de la Junta de Andalucía.

Criada pelos irmãos Walter e João Moreira Salles em 1986, a VideoFilmes é uma produtora independente com 35 anos de trajetória no mercado audiovisual, considerada referência pelo valor artístico de seus trabalhos.

A produtora já realizou mais de 100 projetos de filmes de ficção, documentários, séries, programas para Tv, coproduções nacionais e internacionais. Dentre suas produções estão os filmes de ficção “Central do Brasil” e “Linha de Passe”, de Walter Salles; os documentários “Santiago” e “No Intenso Agora” de João Moreira Salles; e filmes de renomados diretores como Sérgio Machado, Eryk Rocha e Karim Aïnouz, além dos documentários do grande mestre Eduardo Coutinho.

Dentre as produções recentes estão “Deslembro”, longa de ficção de Flavia Castro, que estreou no Festival de Veneza de 2019; “Irmãos Freitas” série de ficção de Sérgio Machado, de 2019, em coprodução com a Gullane; “Fico te devendo uma carta sobre o Brasil”, o documentário que estreou no IDFA de 2019, de Carol Benjamin, em coprodução com a Daza Filmes e Muiraquitã Filmes. A VideoFilmes coproduziu com a Uns Produções o documentário de Renato Terra e Ricardo Calil, “Narciso em Férias”, que estreou na Biennale de Veneza em 2020, e produziu o documentário “Marinheiro das Montanhas”, de Karim Aïnouz que estreou em Seção Especial no Festival de Cannes em 2021.

Name: Es Film
Description:
Hak

Biliyoruz, herkes kendisini hakkımızda bölümü altında açıklar. Vizyonunu, misyonunu, felsefesini, 

yapmak istediklerini... Biz ise kendimizi, en çok inandığımız kavram altında açıklayalım istedik. Çünkü 

en doğrusu bu olacaktı.

Hak... Yani kazanç. Projemize katkıda bulunan herkes bizim için iş ortağıdır. Dolaylı yollara sapmaz, 

işin hakkı neyse onu veririz, işin hakkı neyse onu yaparız.

Hak... Yani doğruluk. Her projede doğru olanı yapmaya çalışır, doğruyu söyleriz. Bu şekilde 

davranmayanlarla ilişkimizi keseriz.

Hak... Yani emekten doğan manevi yetki. Çalışma arkadaşlarımız en değerli yatırımımızdır. Maddi 

manevi haklarını ödemek bizim en büyük sorumluluğumuzdur.

Hak... Yani pay. Yaptığımız işin kazancını paylaştıkça, bereketin artacağını düşünürüz. 

Biz ise işimizi hakkıyla yapmak isteyen iki yol arkadaşıyız. 

İlk işimiz olan Filinta ile yola çıktık. 

Yetenekli olan kim olursa olsun kapımız ardına kadar açık. 

Bekleriz.

Name: Nayla Al Khaja Films

Our CEO, Nayla Al Khaja, is the first female film Director/Producer in the United Arab Emirates. She wrote and directed several films, all presented and awarded in international film festivals. Nayla’s accolades include being ranked among the Top 50 most powerful personalities in Arab Cinema, and 100 most powerful Arabs under 40 by Arabian Business Magazine. She’s Brand Ambassador for Canon Middle East since 2011. She was declared Entrepreneur of the Year during the Gulf Business Awards 2017.

Inspired by Nayla Al Khaja’s professional experience, creative input, cultural knowledge, and never-ending commitment to quality, we deliver high-end materials in line with the highest standards in the industry. Our storytelling-oriented approach helps us produce result-driven films/videos and dynamic digital content. Our corporate culture is led by personalization, commitment and flexibility. Over the years, we have produced films for brands like Mercedes, BMW, Vogue, Nike, Nivea, Gucci, Samsung, Canon, LG, Maggi, or Neutrogena.

Nayla Al Khaja Films liaises with the Dubai Film and TV Commission and the National Media Council to assist with film and photography shooting permits in the UAE and manages the process with utmost speed and efficiency. Name: FILMEXPLORER.CH
Description:
Check our manifesto https://www.filmexplorer.ch/about/manifesto/

EXPLORER
Even though moving images have become one of the most common and familiar languages, technological and cultural transformations are constantly changing the way we produce and receive them. The number of cinemas is decreasing but the number of screens in our societies increases. Filmexplorer wants to be sensitive to the uncommon, the unknown, the new in the world of moving images – a world to be explored. That’s why traveling is so important to us: traveling to see the movies, traveling in/with the movies, letting the movies travel. 

EXPERIENCE
Filmexplorer focuses on movies as sources of experience, and not as commodities to be consumed. Experience as a principle of discovery means effort, commitment, curiosity, passion, and taking the time to enjoy a movie – a revolutionary stance today. That’s why Filmexplorer doesn’t have a quantitative, but a qualitative target, and addresses people who share our passion for moving images.

EXPERIMENTAL
Loving movies and taking time to enjoy them means being ready to go beyond the usual boundaries of filmmaking and being open to movies that have an artistic value. Filmexplorer promotes movies that experiment, because experimentation is the secret ingredient of experience, and also the perfect way to interrogate and learn about the formal aspects of moving images – which is fundamental to obtaining a true film culture and being flexible towards the changes of today.

Name: ALCA FILMS
Description:
Con sede en Barcelona y Andorra, somos una empresa de producción audiovisual con un crecimiento activo. Contamos con una larga  lista de clientes nacionales e internacionales desde 2011.

Historiquement ancrée dans la fiction, l’entreprise a élargi son savoir-faire pour répondre aux exigences de tous les formats et plateformes : séries, longs-métrages, documentaires, films institutionnels, animation, communication digitale et corporate.

 SAYA DAILIES : Acquisition rapide et sécurisée des rushes et médias
 SAYA LAB : Gestion des rushes, postproduction image, transcodage, contrôle qualité (QC), livrables 4K / 2K / UHD / HDR / Dolby Vision
 SAYA SOUND : Enregistrement, postsynchronisation, mixage 5.1 / 7.1 / Home Atmos

 Notre force ?

Nous plaçons l’innovation et l’adaptabilité au cœur de notre démarche pour répondre aux défis d’une industrie audiovisuelle en constante évolution.

En tant que membre du Groupe Laukimax, Saya bénéficie de synergies uniques au sein d’un réseau d’excellence, offrant des solutions toujours plus performantes, durables et sur mesure.

 Nos engagements :

- Certification sociale
- Pionnier de la mesure de l’empreinte carbone en postproduction avec Flying Secoya

Dirigée par Julien Loron, Saya accompagne vos projets les plus ambitieux avec exigence, passion et confiance.

Name: Asian Film Archive
Description:
The Asian Film Archive (AFA) was founded in January 2005 as a non-profit organisation to preserve the rich film heritage of Singapore and Asian Cinema, to encourage scholarly research on film, and to promote a wider critical appreciation of this art form. AFA joined the National Library Board as a subsidiary in 2014.

AFA aspires to be a hub for the Asian film community, contributing to culture, scholarship and industry through organised screenings, educational and cultural programmes that open and enrich new intellectual, educational and creative spaces, to promote a wider critical appreciation of this art form.

The AFA holds Singapore’s first collection of films (AFA Cathay-Keris Malay Classics) inscribed into the UNESCO Memory of the World Asia-Pacific Register, a listing of significant documentary heritage that are a legacy for the world’s community. It has a collection available for public reference at the library@esplanade.

AFA is an affiliate of the International Federation of Film Archives (FIAF), an institutional member of the Southeast Asia-Pacific Audiovisual Archive Association (SEAPAVAA) and the Association of Moving Image Archivists (AMIA).

Name: Private Individual
Description: Based in CA, USA.

Name: DOK.fest München
Description:
We see documentary film as an art form that uses the means of cinematic aesthetics to negotiate relevant values and invites dialogue on a social, personal and artistic level.

Documentary film is the art of the hour.

Since 2019, DOK.fest München has been the largest documentary film festival in Germany and has become one of the most relevant platforms for documentary film in Europe. Every year in May and throughout the year, we present outstanding documentary films from all over the world.

As a cultural event host, as an employer and as a team, DOK.fest München is committed to the following principles:

Local and global
We live exchange at eye level and across borders, in our films and in conversation with guests and audiences.

History-conscious and future-oriented
Our programme deals with the past, accompanies upheavals in the changing times and casts a glance into the future.

Intergenerational
We offer programmes for audiences of all ages and consciously promote exchange between the generations.

Genderdiverse
We want our films to appeal to all people and reflect the diversity of our society.

Ecologically sustainable
We are committed to the goals of sustainability and work with numerous certified partners.

Fair
Our team is our most important resource. Because we care about the well-being of our employees, we are committed to fair employment and wage policies.

Analogue and digital
The long documentary film is our focus. We celebrate it on the big screen and look for new ways to secure its future.

Name: Spotlight Pictures
Description:
Spotlight Pictures is a next-generation international sales agent of independent films. Founded on efficiency, transparency and effectiveness, Spotlight looks to take advantage of changing buying patterns and distribution pathways in global markets. The experience within the company has logged well over 25 years in the industry and maintains an impeccable reputation with the international community. Long established as one of the most successful distributors of genre product worldwide, Spotlight’s ambitions have moved it into the acquisition and sales of art house and theatrical product.

Our main focus is to maximize revenue for our producers through theatrical, DVD, VOD, pay television and free television sales. To accomplish this, Spotlight Pictures attends every major film market and sells to 750 distributors in 50+ territories worldwide. Our clientele range from the US studios, to local conglomerates, multi-territory buyers, niche buyers and TV channels. If there is an international company that acquires independent motion pictures, you can rest assured that they are part of the Spotlight network.

Name: 5Elements Entertainment Pvt Ltd

Choosing 5Elements Entertainment means selecting a partner that understands the importance of quality, timeliness, and innovation. Join us on this exciting journey as we redefine visual effects possibilities, creating unforgettable moments that captivate audiences worldwide.

Name: Utah Film Center

• Two annual film festivals
• Post-film Q&As and discussions with visiting artists and professionals
• Professional development for teachers to use film and digital media in the classroom
• Programs for students to learn about storytelling through film
• Artist support through fiscal sponsorship

Utah Film Center, a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization, continually strives to bring our community together through the powerful and efficient medium of film. We reach more than 38,000 film lovers annually and over 86% of our programming is free!

Name: Dilated Pixels
Description:
We tell stories across film, TV, digital platforms, and interactive experiences. Our award-winning multidisciplinary team thrives on bringing creative solutions to our clients’ objectives.

We are Dilated Pixels.

Name: New Deal Studios
Description:
New Deal Studios is a 21st Century Creative Studio. As the studio has evolved over 20 years our creativity and ability to manage have remained consistent while the tools and screens have changed.  We specialize in telling stories visually and through characters. We confidently delivery each project managing a balance between creativity and parameters. 

Currently we are helping develop and create the new ecosystem of Virtual Reality.  We are pioneers having worked in the space for over a year and a half.  We have created many experiences that include live action narrative pieces, live sports, digital,  in addition to working with major brands and tech companies to help build pipelines and tools.   

Founded in 1995 by Matthew Gratzner, Ian Hunter and Shannon Blake Gans, this artist owned and operated independent studio, born in the heyday of visual effects, has truly evolved into the technology driven studio for the future, consistently delivering the perfect marriage of artistry and technology.

Award winning credits by New Deal Studios include high-profile projects such as Interstellar, The Aviator, Dark Knight Rises, Hugo, The Avengers, Iron Man, The Dark Knight, Watchmen, I Am Legend, Night At The Museum 2, Whiteout, 2012, Alice in Wonderland, Inception and Battleship. For a more complete list of work titles please visit our IMDB page. 

Additionally to its award-winning feature film work recognized by The Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences, The Visual Effects Society, & The British Film and Television Academy, New Deal Studios has picked up several nominations and wins from the Visual Effects Society for their work on campaign spots for Walgreens, New Balance, Gatorade, Ford and Dodge. Moreover, New Deal Studios was honored with a Clio award and a Cannes Golden Lion award for its creation of the Halo 3 “Believe” campaign spot.

We exist to create.

We love to create extraordinary films. Films that impress. Films that touch. Be it commercials and corporate communications or documentaries and feature films, we love what we do and we want you to love the product.

- providing the required production personnel (head of production, assistants, drivers)
- location scouting
- casting 
- finding the suitable crew and partners (directors, DOPs, audio and lighting technicians, sound engineers, actors, speakers and rental companies)
- providing technical equipment
- scheduling of the film shoot
- obtaining the necessary permissions
- film shooting (on set including all the personnel and equipment)
- post-producing 


Do not hesitate to contact us! We are happy to help.

To reach us:

info@filmgerberei.ch

Description:

A própria palavra 'Paralaxis' é um convite à percepção de mudança, um fenômeno que nos permite ver o mesmo objeto sob diferentes pontos de vista. É esse o coração da nossa marca: revelar múltiplos ângulos da mesma história, capturar a essência do movimento, da luz, da sombra. Mergulhe conosco nesse universo onde cada projeto é uma nova descoberta.

Name: Feature Subtitling, Captioning, Translation & Education
Description: For over a decade, our clients have come to rely on Feature’s superior service and quality for their subtitling, captioning, and translation needs. We have a seasoned and highly professional group of experienced and accredited translators and captioners. We use strict quality control measures to ensure accuracy and fluidity of our subtitles, captions, and translations.  All of Feature’s translators and editors are native speakers in the source and target languages they are being asked to translate and/or edit. At Feature, we are large enough to handle any or all of your projects. Small enough to care about each and every one of your projects. Flexible enough to customize a solution for your difficult projects, and we are geared toward complete client satisfaction! Feature translates and subtitles thousands of movies, including famous movies such as Casablance, Silence of the Lambs, The Terminator, and The Matrix. We caption thousands of music videos, documentaries, and concerts for PBS stations, independent producers, and performers such as N’Sync, Marc Anthony, Gloria Estefan, Shakira, Jennifer Lopez, and more. Feature does thousands of hours of Spanish captioning for shows such as Plaza Sesamo, the Mexican version of Sesame Street, and CNN en Espanol. We caption entire video libraries for clients such as World Wrestling Entertainment (WWE). Feature does thousands of hours of live captioning for both public and private television stations.

Name: FBFX Ltd.
Description:
FBFX is a world-leading maker of special FX costume and props for film and TV. Established in 1993, our workshop offers skilled craftsmanship alongside cutting-edge 3D design and manufacture, photogrammetry and CNC for an unrivalled ‘concept to completion’ service.
 
Specialists in spacesuits, superheroes, sci-fi and armour, we’ve created iconic costumes for blockbusters including Deadpool & Wolverine, Gladiator, Halo, Star Wars, Prometheus, Guardians of the Galaxy, The Martian and Dune. 
 
FBFX Studio, established in 2011, is our scanning and creative digital department. FBFX’s photogrammetry scanning rigs capture highest quality raw scans for the creation of premium assets used in VFX and Realtime production, either in-house or by our clients across multiple creative industries. 
 
Our London workshop, close to Heathrow Airport, central London, Shepperton, Pinewood, Leavesden and Shinfield Studios, is conveniently located for VIP scanning and fittings. 
 
Facilities:
•	Fully equipped 20,000 sq ft workshop
•	3D modelling
•	3D printing 7-axis CNC robot
•	Three-dimensional fabric printing
•	Specialist electronics
•	Concept illustration and design
•	VIP scanning and fitting
•	Full-body photogrammetry rig
•	High resolution 3D head and facial expression capture
•	Photogrammetry robot
•	3D asset scanning
•	VFX and Realtime asset creation 
•	Digital clothing creation and simulation 
•	Human and animal digital doubles
•	Rigging for animation
•	PBR material and texture scanner
•	Technical soft costume studio 
•	Sewing lab specialising in stretch, military and high-performance stunt costume
•	Ultrasonic sewing machines and bonded garment production for sew-free construction
•	Laser cutting

Name: Fortissimo Film Sales
Description:
FORTISSIMO FILMS is one of the world's leading international film, television and video sales organizations specializing in the production, presentation, promotion and distribution of award-winning and innovative feature films. With offices in Amsterdam, Hong Kong, London, New York and agents in the USA, Europe, Tokyo, Beijing and the Middle East, the company has a truly global presence and reach.

Founded in 1991, the company is well known for its commitment to original and groundbreaking films and for nurturing relationships with talented new directors and producers. Fortissimo enjoys maintaining excellent relationships with key international distributors and film festivals, not to mention international and local journalists around the world. Going into its twentieth year of business, the company has experienced uninterrupted growth and continues to move from strength to strength.

Name: T-VFX

From pre-production to post-production, we work closely with directors, producers, and other key members of the film and television industry to create photorealistic visual effects, animated characters, and intricate environments that enhance the storytelling and leave audiences in awe. We also bring our expertise to the commercial world, delivering visually stunning effects that help brands connect with their audience and stand out in a crowded marketplace.

Our state-of-the-art facilities and software, combined with our passion for storytelling, allow us to create dynamic, eye-catching visuals that will make your project unforgettable. Whether you're looking to create an epic battle scene, a futuristic world, or an immersive brand experience, T-VFX has the expertise and technology to bring your vision to life.

Name: SCOPE
Description:

Our core business is the (co)production of full-length movies, television films and series, documentaries, animated films, etc.

Offering a full array of Film and Video Production Services from inception to completion including Creative, Production and Post-Production, serving Local, National and International clientele.

Experienced, Resourceful, Responsive, Versatile, Unflappable, Unafraid, Cost Effective, Flexible, Fixers, Accessible, Creative, Collaborative, Savvy, Irrepressible, Irreplaceable, Positive, Practical, Grounded, Fun To Work With professionals in any Commercial, Digital, Corporate, Network Promo, Location, Studio or Editorial production situation…we are who you want to be working with.

Name: Gulliver Studios
Description:
Established in 2019, Gulliver Studios has quickly developed into one of South Korea’s leading VFX Studios.  Our team has created stunning visual effects for numerous great films across the globe, including The Cursed: Dead Man’s Prey, Collectors, The Yin-Yang Master: Dream of Eternity, Hometown, Stranger 2, Lost, and more. Moreover, we’ve received a worldwide recognition from viewers with the Netflix Original Squid Game which has become Netflix’s All-Time Most Viewed TV show with over 142 Million views. 

Our staff consists of worldwide talented artists with over 20 years of industry experience, ranging from Hollywood, China, Hong Kong. Our global network provides us with multi cultural know-how that allows us to collaborate with numerous production companies around the world. 

We provide our clients with a comprehensive All-In-One Solution. From Pre-Production to Post-Production, we work closely with film makers at all stages of the production pipeline to bring their imaginations to reality. Our comprehensive system consists of a wide range of high quality VFX services from Conceptual Design, Creature Development, Modeling, Rigging, Compositing, VFX Supervision, Pre-Visualization and more.

Visit our website at: 
www.gullivervfx.com

Name: Metro Screen
Description:
Following devastating cuts by federal screen agency Screen Australia we will close our doors in December 2015 having provided essential support and development for emerging screen practitioners for more than 34 years.

Be immersed in filmmaking at Metro Screen, the independent filmmakers hub. Find your creative soul mates, take risks, build your team and define your voice. Come to Metro Screen for project development and funding, practical and creative training, regular filmmaker events, along with gear, studio and post production facilities.

Metro Screen. Making filmmakers.

Name: Viola Film srl
Description:
Viola Film è nata a giugno del 2016 dall’incontro tra il produttore Alessandro Passadore e Eric Welbers, CEO della Bravado Media, con l’obiettivo di produrre contenuti di grande qualità per l’Italia e l’Europa. 
L’obiettivo di Viola è quello di specializzarsi nella produzione indipendente e nella produzione esecutiva di prodotti originali e innovativi per il cinema, la televisione e il web.

Name: Filmray
Description: Filmray, Inc is a film production and finance company that specializes in guiding investors, filmmakers and technology companies through all aspects of film production, financing and distribution in the rapidly evolving film business.

Name: Nordisk Film & TV Fond
Description: Nordisk Film & TV Fond promotes production and distribution of feature films, drama series and creative documentaries in the Nordics.

Name: Airmedia360 - Professional drones for cinema, advertising and events
Description:
Airmedia360 is a company specialised in the manufacture and rental of professional drones to film movies, advertising and events. It has more than 20 years of experience in the world of model aeroplanes and radio control. Its experience backs the company, with more than 2,500 national and international productions and over 4,500 hours of flying. Its professionals are experts in providing a vision from the sky that offers added value to any production. Airmedia360 has offices in Madrid and Tenerife, along with delegations in Barcelona, New Jersey (United States) and Versonnex (France).

The company has one of the best fleets of drones in Spain for any audio-visual project: for cinema and television, for localisation, for FPV, for industrial and agricultural uses, for lighting, for city flights and for festivals. It also has auxiliary equipment like Cable Cam.
Location: Arganda del Rey, Community of Madrid

Name: Federación de Cines de España, FECE
Description:
En 1977, nace la Federación de Entidades de Empresarios de Cine de España, como institución empresarial sin ánimo de lucro, con el fin de representar al sector de exhibición cinematográfica en España.

Nuestros socios son empresarios de cine, empresas de exhibición cinematográfica, asociaciones y agrupaciones empresariales y entidades asociativas que puedan integrar las categorías anteriores. En su conjunto integran y vienen a representar el 80% del total de pantallas existentes en el país.

Name: RHAYUELA FILMS
Description:
Con más de 25 años de experiencia somos una de las productoras más reconocidas en Colombia.  Desarrollamos y producimos largometrajes, documentales, series de TV, etc. en toda Colombia, Latinoamérica, USA, España y Francia.
Desarrollada y producida por Rhayuela Films, Mil Colmillos, es la primera serie Premium de HBO en  Colombia, que explora los géneros del suspenso, terror y la acción militar
https://variety.com/2018/tv/global/hbo-latin-america-first-colombian-fiction-tv-series-1202854373/

Name: Monaco Streaming Film Festival
Description:
The Monaco Streaming Film Festival is a first of its kind, innovative, hybrid “Festival-meets-Summit” experience which celebrates the streaming industry’s content makers, creators, and talent. It brings forth insider know-how in the film and content production industry.

The Festival focuses on the AVOD, SVOD and TVOD streaming platforms aiming to network with producers, distributors, and talent. The industry leaders and talents will arrive at the glamorous Principality of Monaco, the Festival’s location base, to partake in four dynamic days of premieres. This includes a Gala Awards night, VIP receptions, marketplace, and various conferences. 

Technologically driven and global in scale, The Monaco Streaming Film Festival extends beyond Monaco’s borders, opening its doors to a global audience via our live streaming platform. Those present will be able to enjoy original premieres, screenings, acquire or distribute new original content, discover the latest developments in media technology, and meet financiers and industry services providers.
 
Masterclasses: https://live.streamingff.com/ 

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/monaco_streaming_filmfestival/

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/Monacosff

Name: Frame One
Description:
Frame One is a next generation remote editing platform. We bring the resilient, highly available infrastructure of the cloud to a custom, bare metal post production environment to create a one-of-a-kind editorial experience with unparalleled reliability, security, and scalability.

With data centers in Los Angeles, New York City, and London, Frame One enables production companies, universities, and enterprises to edit collaboratively across North America and Europe with low latency and dedicated post production support.

Name: IDendeaf - Producción y Formación Audiovisual en Lengua de Signos
Description: IDendeaf nace con la idea de poner en valor la Identidad, la Cultura Sorda y la Lengua de Signos a través del audiovisual. Nuestros objetivos son crear contenidos audiovisuales de entretenimiento, divulgación cultural e información, usando como herramienta principal de comunicación la Lengua de Signos Española. Por otro lado, ofrecemos formación audiovisual dirigida a personas sordas y/o usuarias de la Lengua de Signos Española que quieran formarse en el mundo cinematográfico, televisivo y audiovisual en general.
Location: Puerto de la Cruz, Santa Cruz de Tenerife

Name: Quiprocó Filmes
Description: A Quiprocó Filmes é uma produtora audiovisual independente, sediada no Rio de Janeiro, que busca provocar mudanças através de um olhar inquieto. Criamos imagens atentas às histórias, emoções, afetos e vozes, transformando  a maneira que as pessoas vêem suas próprias vidas e os diferentes elementos da nossa cultura. Criamos conteúdo para Cinema, TV e streaming. Produzimos conteúdo institucional para organizações. Realizamos oficinas audiovisuais em parceria com instituições da sociedade civil.

Name: Reel One Srl
Description:
In un mondo di continua rinnovazione tecnologica e repentine mutazioni dei workflow la serietà e la professionalità non sono un ”plus” ma la condizione di base dalla quale partire nel mercato della post-produzione digitale.
La Reel One nasce dalla richiesta del mercato stesso di essere presenti nel polo cinematografico e televisivo romano, nel quartiere Prati, portando know how e competenza in un settore dove l’esperienza di oltre 50 anni e la freschezza delle nuove competenze possano garantire affidabilità e precisione nella realizzazione di un prodotto televisivo e cinematografico.
Ci avvaliamo di personale estremamente formato e di grande esperienza affidando i nostri processi ad
-	un reparto di Color-GradinG 4K/UHD SDR/HDR , 3 Sale di color Televisiva e una sala di Color cinematografica Blackmagic DaVinci Resolve in sharing project con reparto Dailies e Conforming.
-	Un reparto di Conforming con 4 stazioni interconnesse in Avid MediaComposer e Blackmagic DaVinci Resolve in sharing project.
-	Un reparto di trascodifica giornalieri rapido ed efficiente dei Dailies con consegna in meno di 24h e la consegna su richiesta dei materiali su server Signant MediaShuttle con velocità garantita upload/download  di 1Gb.
-	Un reparto di Grafica e VFX.
-	Un reparto di Delivery con 5 stazioni MacPro basate su DaVinci Resolve e Apple FinalCut.
-	Una sala Control con monitor 65” UHD HDR Oled Sony e impianto 5.1 per il QC.
-	Un reparto DCP al servizio sia delle produzioni interne sia per la localizzazione di contenuti esteri, sia per la gestione della delivery tramite sistema MartCinema per la trasmissione Satellitare in partnership con Telespazio spa e la gestione KDM centralizzata e automatizzata. Forniamo servizio assistenza h24 7/7day per distribuzione ed esercenti nella consegna di KDM garantendo la copertura di tutte le sale nazionali.
-	Un reparto di Scansione e Restauro pellicola con Scanner Cintel Blackmagic e restauro su MTI DRS

Name: Fondazione Piccolo America
Description:
La Fondazione “Piccolo America” nasce nel settembre 2014 come Associazione Culturale per la salvaguardia, la tutela e la promozione del patrimonio cinematografico, e acquisisce lo status di Fondazione nel 2022. È un’organizzazione senza fini di lucro, apolitica e apartitica, composta da ragazzi e ragazze tra i venti e i trenta anni.
Dal 2015 la Fondazione organizza la manifestazione culturale “Il Cinema in Piazza”, una rassegna cinematografica a ingresso gratuito in tre aree del centro e della periferia di Roma. Da settembre 2021 il Piccolo America gestisce anche il Cinema Troisi a Trastevere, storico monosala riaperto dopo anni di abbandono tramite un ampio progetto di restauro e di risanamento conservativo, supervisionato dalla Soprintendenza Speciale Archeologia Belle Arti e Paesaggio di Roma.
____

The “Piccolo America” Foundation was established in September 2014 as a Cultural Association for the protection and promotion of film heritage and acquired Foundation status in 2022.
It is a non-profit, apolitical and non-partisan organization led by a group of young people between the ages of twenty and thirty.
Since 2015, the Foundation has been organizing the cultural event “Il Cinema in Piazza”, a film retrospective, admission-free, that is taking place in three public squares located in the center and suburbs of Rome.
Since September 2021, Piccolo America also runs the Cinema Troisi in Trastevere, a historic single-screen cinema reopened after years of neglect through an extensive restoration, supervised by the Soprintendenza Speciale Archeologia Belle Arti e Paesaggio of Rome.

Name: The Camera Division
Description: The Camera Division

Name: Nice Ninja
Description:
Nice Ninja is a film company specializing in animation and filmmaking. 

Since the beginning Thomas and the award-winning team behind Sunshine Barry and the Disco Worms has produced various feature film, short stories and TV series. And it is important that all the stories we create can expand to other platforms.  
Our vison is to create unique experience by seeking for the best in every story and unfold it in a visual strong and interesting way. We often use new technology and with our experienced team and with an efficient pipeline it enables us to do high-end production on a modest budget.
We are storytellers and we love to laugh and have fun, which explains why most of our projects are comedies.

Name: Sofica COFINOVA
Description:
COFINOVA est une SOFICA (Société pour le Financement de l’Industrie Cinématographique et Audiovisuelle) dont l’objectif est d’investir chaque année dans la production indépendante de films de long métrage et de programmes audiovisuels.

Depuis sa création, la société a investi plus de 50M€ dans plus de 400 films, parmi lesquels un grand nombre de films qui se sont distingués dans les festivals et dans les salles. 2018 a été une année exceptionnelle marquée par l'attribution du César du meilleur film à 120 battements par minutes de Robin Campillo, qui a également été choisi pour représenter la France aux Oscars. Plus récemment, COFINOVA a investi dans des films très attendus, tels que Le Chant du Loup, premier long métrage d'Antonin Baudry avec Mathieu Kassovitz, François Civil, Réda Kateb et Omar Sy

Name: Makinarium s.r.l.
Description:
MAKINARIUM è un gruppo specializzato nella produzione e nello sviluppo di sistemi di effetti speciali fisici e digitali integrati, che opera in ogni campo dell'industria della "illusione visiva". 

E' un progetto portato avanti dai più innovativi e vitali artisti e tecnici provenienti da settori diversi quali lo studio della percezione visiva, la post-produzione digitale dell'immagine, l'animazione 2D e 3D, l'animatronica, gli effetti meccanici, lo special make-up e le riproduzioni iperrealiste. 

Fondata sull'esperienza e creatività del LEONARDO CRUCIANO WORKSHOP, fucina di creazioni nei più eterogenei ambiti dei Practical Effects e Special Make-up, la struttura si arricchisce e completa non solo di un reparto di Visual Effects tra i più interessanti d'Europa, ma di collaboratori e partners specializzati nei vari settori della scansione laser, della ripresa video digitale di miniset e miniature, nella prototipazione di piccoli brevetti di fisica ottica ed elettronica.

Realtà ormai affermata nel campo della post-produzione audio e video e dell'animazione, la SMART BRANDS si pone a capofila dell'iniziativa, forte dell'esperienza del producer, manager nonchè compositore Angelo Poggi.
Tutto ciò ha già permesso in tempi brevissimi di sviluppare e registrare il suo primo sistema di effetti speciali integrati denominato "LCW's INTEGRATE SISTEM".
Un sistema che permette di evitare di affidare l’azione di creature e personaggi a set in green screen separati, e di ricostruire in CGI porzioni troppo protagoniste su soggetti e ambienti, rendendo ogni immagine della visione del regista molto più controllabile in previsualizzazione e sul set.

Alla Supervisione dei sistemi integrati degli effetti speciali si alternano, a seconda delle peculiarità dei progetti, principalmente l'ideatore del progetto e concept artist Leonardo Cruciano.

Name: SILEX ANIMATION
Description:
In 2014 production house SILEX FILMS creates SILEX ANIMATION, its animation studio in Angoulême. Co-founded and run by Priscilla Bertin and Judith Nora, the studio develops and produces projects with strong artistic potential in 2D for TV and Cinema – as a line producer, executive producer or coproducer.

In 2020, SILEX receives the French TV Producer of the year Award (Animation Category), organized by Procirep.

Name: Mistika Post
Description:
A Mistika, hoje representada pelos irmãos Marcelo Siqueira e Ariadne Mazzetti, destaca-se por ser uma das mais respeitadas finalizadoras do Brasil. Os sócios, que tem histórico em pós produção há mais de 15 anos, assinaram a finalização de aproximadamente 150 projetos entre longas metragens, curtas e séries de TV ao longo dos 7 anos de empresa.

Mistika, today represented by the brothers Marcelo Siqueira and Ariadne Mazzetti, stands out as one of the most respected post-production facilities in Brazil. The partners, who have been in post-production history for more than 15 years, are responsible for approximately 150 projects including feature films, short films and TV series over the 7 years of the company.

Name: Begin Again Films
Description:
Begin Again Films is a Spanish distribution and International Sales Company based in Madrid, Spain.

Our team consists of professionals with extensive experience in film production, distribution, sales, and promotion. We are always on the lookout for new talent and focus on high-quality independent films, including fiction and documentaries.

We showcase some of the best cinema made in Spain, featuring exciting and risky stories for both established and new audiences. Our award-winning films have been selected in leading film festivals around the world.

The name of our company pays homage to the modern classic film “Begin Again,” directed by John Carney and starring Mark Ruffalo and Keira Knightley.

Name: Vitality Visual Effects
Description:
Vitality Visual Effects is a high end VFX boutique specializing in technical and creative work for film and television. Since our inception in 2014, we have worked on projects such as The Little Mermaid, The Whale, The Irishman, Stranger Things, The Bikeriders, The Morning Show and The Night Agent. 

Our team is over 50% women, women-run and the majority of our team are persons of color. We take pride in our healthy work environment and as a result we have a close knit team of artists and producers who work closely with production to ensure quality and transparency. 

We always produce the highest quality work to bring our clients' visions to life. We customize our teams to fit the needs of production, while maintaining competitive pricing due to our cloud infrastructure which keeps operating costs low and allows us to pivot and expand with no limits or down time.

Name: LevelK
Description:
LevelK is handling international sales and aggregation.

We are specialized in rights optimizations that are reflected through our innovative approach to cross-platform/cross-country distribution combining theatrical and traditional means - alongside digital distribution and marketing. Our goal is to bring our films to the market with an individual strategy so the film finds its own path to its audience and hereby increase royalties.

We are working with edgy, original films that we can market worldwide and that will resonate with international audiences.

Our profile includes high quality productions across all genres, working with established and emerging international talents in both English and foreign language. Films must have strong festival potential, international marketability and digital possibilities as we work across all areas.

Name: Front Street Pictures
Description:
Front Street Pictures is a vertically-integrated production company based in Vancouver, British Columbia.

Front Street’s full suite of services include development support, in-house business affairs, legal, budgeting and scheduling. In addition, we offer production office space, crews, storage, post-production facilities, management of all aspects of delivery and experienced finance personnel to ensure the successful completion of the tax credit process.

The company and its work have been recognized with many awards in the past decade, including multiple Emmys.

Name: 兔將創意影業股份有限公司 The White Rabbit Entertainment,Inc.
Description:
兔將的資深管理人員囊括曾任職於矽谷IT領導企業、全球電影及新媒體龍頭皮克斯動畫、WETA Digital，和Electronic Arts 等業界經驗豐富的菁英群，為兔將挹注廣泛的國際經驗、技術、教育及人員培訓。兔將全球佈局下的美國據點由曾隸屬華納兄弟公司，哥倫比亞電影公司和主流3D特效及動畫工作室的資深好萊塢製作人指揮。兔將分別座落在台灣台北、高雄和中國北京，目前擁有包括台灣及其他亞洲地區的傑出菁英，近200名技術卓越的專業美術和技術人員，其人數迅速成長中。 兔將針對電影視覺概念設計、視覺特效製作、3D電影製作以及專業後期服務，為客戶提供最完整的製作支援。針對3D立體電影轉製兔將更開發專有軟體、線上雲端系統，大大提高效率與提供高品質的轉製服務。 

自從2011年成立以來，兔將服務如成龍的《十二生肖》，劉德華的《風暴》，成龍《天降雄師》、華語票房紀錄締造者《捉妖記》、《九層妖塔》、《黃飛鴻之英雄有夢》，2016年話題大作《寒戰II》以及眾所期盼的動畫電影《大魚海棠》等重要作品。2016年更製作劇版《微微一笑很傾城》、劇版《三生三世十里桃花》，受到壓倒性的好評。2017兔將更推出好萊塢大作《超凡戰隊》與劇版《醉玲瓏》與《功夫瑜伽》、《健忘村》、《目擊者》等多部票房保證電影作品。兔將的3D作品的客戶已遍及台灣、中國和美國各大主流公司。累積大量的破億鉅作，如《十二生肖》、《捉妖記》、《大魚海棠》、《功夫瑜伽》、《超凡戰隊》等。2016年兔將更獲得來自美國CDSA （內容安全與遞送協會）的CPS (內容保護安全) 認證，成為亞洲第一個獲得此資訊安全認證的電影特效製作公司。

2014、2015年，兔將分別以《五月天諾亞方舟》與《捉妖記》雙雙拿下有3D奧斯卡之稱，由好萊塢Advanced Imaging Society所頒發的Creative Arts Award。《捉妖記》更獲得評審團特別獎。2016年兔將創意影業操刀特效作品，電影《紅衣小女孩》獲得2016年金馬獎『最佳視覺效果』入圍。2017年兔將再次與程偉豪導演攜手打造的驚悚懸疑電影《目擊者》，獲得金馬獎『最佳視覺效果』入圍。2018年由兔將承製視覺特效的電影作品《紅衣小女孩2》，獲得第58屆亞太影展『最佳視覺效果』入圍殊榮。

TWR Entertainment, Inc. is a globally-focused, Asia-based media organization that successfully blends world class creativity and groundbreaking technology innovation. 
Founded by Dr. Charles Lee, a PhD. with degrees from Cambridge University and USC, TWR has rapidly grown into a leading studio which specialize in the following area : full-CGI animation, visual effects and stereoscopic 3D conversion.

Name: Gruppo Alcuni
Description:
Gruppo Alcuni is one of the most important Italian studios for cartoon production. The group creates high quality edutainment, analysing both the content and the graphic aspects. They deal with cinema, television, publishing, games and new media, as well as live entertainment, above all for children.
The productions are original, completely non-violent and promote positive values. Such characteristics help children and youngsters to develop the most diverse of skills. These aspects altogether are with full of humour through interactivity. Our cartoon production takes inspiration from famous characters from European culture (Leonardo da Vinci), traditions (traditional fairytales) and important literary works (The Travels of Marco Polo).
We have been in this domain with our four brands: Leo da Vinci, Leonardo, Mini Pet Pals and Pet Pals, for quite some time now yet, we have always managed to stay on top of our competitors.

Name: Jaibo Films

Nowadays, Jaibo Films produces independent films with creative sense: feature films, animation, documentary and short films; being constantly aware of new audiovisual languages.
We also offer production services in Alicante and New York. Contact us for more information.

Local and international management of AV museum projects and post-production teams for fiction projects. Specialist in creating live visual spaces for brands, conferences, clubs, concerts and festivals.

Whether you are seeking Commercial Production, Visual Effects on a feature film, Stereoscopic Conversion or viral brand establishment and engagement, The Base is active and accepting missions.

Name: LA DALIA FILMS SL
Description: En el año 2015, después de un largo recorrido profesional, decidimos fundar nuestra propia productora, LA DALIA FILMS, con la finalidad de crear y producir contenidos audiovisuales de calidad e innovadores, adaptándonos a los nuevos modelos de producción y consumo, con una clara vocación comercial de competir tanto en el ámbito local como en los mercados internacionales. Name: Digital Media Systems
Description:
https://dmediainc.com

Established in 1978, Digital Media Systems, Inc. is a recognized leader providing best-in-class audiovisual solutions to the motion picture, post production, distribution, and broadcast fields. 

Our comprehensive support of special screenings/world premieres, theater installations, consulting/event management, as well as cinema equipment sales/rentals/maintenance, makes us a one-stop shop for all projection and sound needs.

Known for our incredible knowledge base and the research we put into doing a job properly, we are proud to represent the interests of Walt Disney Studios, NBCUniversal, WarnerMedia, ViacomCBS, and Sony Pictures on the east coast as a trusted service provider.

Name: Social Docs
Description:
The more stories of social transformation are told, the more space in the networks and media they occupy, the more people will be inspired, engaging, and generating new stories of social transformation.

We believe in the thought of Muhammad Yunus: what we imagine in the stories was pursued and achieved by science. If we imagine, it is possible to become real.

Our reason for being is to tell, help to tell and spread social transformation stories to strengthen the imagination and inspire to action. The more stories change people, the more people will change the world.

We want to inspire 100 million people around the world through stories of social transformation in the quest for a more just and balanced society.

Name: Left Post Productions
Description:
Founded in 2006 by Executive Producer Jacqui Pearson and Senior Editor Saki Bergh as an edit house, Left has since then, with the addition of Senior Flame Artist Keno Naidoo(the smartest person in most rooms), grown into a high-end, award-winning edit and finishing house.
We are a multi-media post-production company that crosses genres, platforms and mediums which includes commercials, online content, music videos, and feature films from our lovely offices in Cape Town and Johannesburg.

We love telling stories, as simple as that. But, we also respect the craft demanded to tell those stories.

Embracing collaboration, we pride ourselves in finding the right balance between the creative needs of a project and our service and commitment to our clients' needs.

Name: Entre Chien et Loup scrl
Description:
Fondée en 1989, la société Entre Chien et Loup a réussi à s’imposer sur le marché audiovisuel européen par une politique de production de films à contenu. 

Notre philosophie de production tant dans la fiction que dans le documentaire, est issue d’une même réflexion : l’accès à la diffusion d’œuvres audiovisuelles relève d’un défi permanent et formidable dans une société où la consommation d’images prédigérées est devenue norme.

Entre Chien et Loup reste fidèle à son intention de base: faire des films alliant une narration engagée (par ses auteurs et leurs sujets), une cinématographie forte et une production adéquate pour rencontrer cette ambition.

Et au fil du temps, cette obstination a été payante.

Name: Happy Making Films
Description:
At HMF we transform ideas and thoughts into compelling stories. We believe that every little thought has the potential for greatness. We translate those small ideas and thoughts into visual delights.

Our inspiration arrives in little tufts of epiphanies that we find in the world around us ignited by simple things.
Every film has a journey, every story a destination. Like true voyagers we seek stories in every corner, behind every eye, through rich and deep memories, in every fleeting conversation, in every missed connection. In those stories we find the essence of life, a shared reality that we want to share with the world.

In that quest, two journeymen; a storyteller and an original thinker unite to see that those stories reach their intended destination. The emphasis on stories is the key that we follow as a solution to all the content we produce.

Name: IFC Center
Description: The IFC Center, the ultimate entertainment space for New Yorkers seeking out the best in independent film, opened in June 2005, following an extensive renovation of the historic Waverly Theater.

Name: BeDigitalAdv
Description:
BeDigitalAdv is a European creative production studio specialising in full-service audiovisual content for brands, companies and creators.

We produce cinematic visuals and digital content across a wide range of formats: commercial videos, brand films, social campaigns, YouTube formats, event coverage, sports content, creator-driven productions and tailor-made audiovisual projects for agencies and international clients.

Our team operates through a flexible network of videographers, editors, DPs and creative professionals across Italy, Spain and other European regions, adapting the structure of each production to the scale and needs of the project.

In addition to general video production, we also manage multicamera setups, studio and on-location podcast formats, professional audio recording, lighting design and technical direction. This allows us to support creators and companies in building complete, high-quality formats ready for distribution on any platform.

Our services include:
• Video production (commercial, brand, corporate and digital)
• On-site filming & technical direction
• Multicamera productions (studio & on-location)
• Podcast production (recording, editing & social clips)
• Editing & post-production
• Photography & visual assets
• Social-ready content (vertical & horizontal)
• Production support for creators, brands and agencies

We believe in clarity, efficiency and a modern visual identity, delivering high-quality results whether working remotely or on location.

Based in Europe.
Available for productions worldwide.

Name: Lightcraft Technology
Description:
Lightcraft was founded to bring powerful virtual production technology to small productions. We compressed all of the capability of our Emmy-award winning Previzion and Halide virtual production systems into our new Jetset app. It's a movie studio in your pocket.
https://apps.apple.com/us/app/lightcraft-jetset/id1634621836

Name: Valais Film Commission
Description:
The Valais Film Commission is an organisation affiliated with the departments of the Canton of Valais responsible for culture and the economy. The VFC is composed of a strategic Commission and an operational Bureau. 
Missions of the Valais Film Commission: 
1. Welcome, assist and support the production of audiovisual projects in the canton with a balanced approach towards the Commission’s cultural and economic interests. 

2. Collaborate to promote the canton’s image through the production and creation of films. 

3. Develop the direct and indirect benefits connected to the film industry in Valais. 

4. Encourage the development of a local audiovisual industry and participate in expanding the pool of industry professionals.

Name: Crowsnest Films
Description:
Crowsnest Films is an award-winning boutique production company based in Calgary, Alberta Canada specializing in authentic, creative, cinematic storytelling. 

We work with advertising agencies, brands, broadcasters, studios, streaming services, record labels, artists, directors, producers, writers, and clients to create vital stories, artfully told.

We make commercials, branded content, music videos, feature films, documentaries, corporate projects, promos, photography, and all kinds of screen-based storytelling for domestic and international clients.

In addition to our own work, we provide production services to service productions from all over the world.

Name: Israel Film Festival
Description:
The mission of the Israel Film Festival is to enrich the American vision of Israeli life and culture, to spotlight Israel’s thriving film and television industry, and to promote cultural recognition of Israel through the powerful medium of film.

As an international entertainment industry event, the Festival has brought acclaim to both the films and participants, and has opened new possibilities for cooperation and co-production between the U.S. and Israeli film industries.

Each year, the Festival explores Israeli society by premiering Israeli features, documentaries, television dramas and student shorts, and through conversations with visiting Israeli filmmakers.

For 34 years, the Festival has created an exciting and artistic platform for engaging diverse audiences with the richness of Israeli life and culture.
