Name: Magenta Films & Stills
Description:
We are a high end photography and film company based in Amsterdam, specializing in sports, automotive, fashion and portrait productions. 
Creativity is what we are known for and pride ourselves in, writing up exciting concepts for companies is what we find most fun. We have a vast understanding of sports marketing and are used to working with top athletes world wide. With our industry knowledge and experience, we can deliver images that appeal to both a mainstream and core audience, making your production all the more credible. Magenta Stills works closely together with Magenta Films, we feed off each others ideas and we can offer shoots where we take care of both stills and moving image; our experienced in-house production team will take care of everything.

Name: Red Stone Films
Description:
Founded in 2011, Red Stone Films is a modern day video content & production agency, based in India and UAE

We are brave creative explorers unpacking human emotions to create compelling stories. 

Our storytelling, backed by data and research, is designed to build connections and drive change – in attitude and behavior. We are committed to creating brave and purposeful content, exploring human connections while driving value for our partners and engaging audiences in a meaningful way. 

We work at the intersection of purpose-driven storytelling and research data to create value and impact for our partners. 

We partner with you to achieve your marketing & communication goals through brand-aligned visual storytelling including videos and still images. 

We hope to stir your imagination, paving way for a positive future.
Location: Kashmir I New Delhi I Dubai

Name: Port au Prince Films
Description:
We create and distribute films that both, entertain and inspire their audiences, films daring to be different, whether visually, in their content or in the ways they are being produced & marketed. 

Port au Prince Films is a port for voyagers united by one great passion – Film. To develop films and stories, to produce and to reach out to a big audience is our special privilege. The more passionate a story is being told, the more the audience will be emotionally touched by it. For our team, this means the obligation to produce and distribute our films with the highest level of passion.

People and their stories constitute the main subject of our work. The founding of our company gave birth to the idea of a “Creative Factory”, in which individual people of the film industry feel the obligation to maintain a platform for professional exchange and collaboration. Providing space for creativity and a short process of decision-making are essential for us. 

Our Production Company Port au Prince Film & Kultur Produktion was founded in 2008 by Oliver Rihs and René Römert. In 2010 the creative producer and dramatic advisor Melanie Möglich and producer Jan Krüger, joined the company as partners.

In 2012 followed our distribution company Port au Prince Pictures GmbH, offering high-profile, national and international awarded projects in its portfolio.

We are members of the German and European Film Academy, the Producer’s Network, the European Producer’s Club (EPC), the Atelier Cinema d’Europe (ACE), the AG Verleih & the AG Kino.

Jan Krüger steers as the CEO together with the Port au Prince crew through calm and rough waters, always in mind: never accept the horizon!

Name: The Screen Talent Agency
Description: The Screen Talent Agency represents cinematographers, production designers, costume and makeup designers, editors, ADs, sound mixers, producers and other specialists in film and television production. Los Angeles and London have always been the two major hubs of film and television development, production and distribution. With offices in both cities, Screen Talent has established itself as a global agency with clients working on productions across major and independent features, tv drama, and branded content

Name: Holland Film Nieuws
Description: Holland Film Nieuws is het vakblad en online platform voor het film- en bioscoopbedrijf. HFN heeft tot doel om iedereen die werkzaam is in de sector te informeren over de ontwikkelingen in de branche.

Name: Karma Films
Description:
KARMA FILMS

Established in 2003 by Diloy Gulun in Istanbul with the mission of delivering the highest level of production support for international filmmakers through its strong local connections. KARMA FILMS has also become a renowned film production company that develops and produces film and media projects with both local and international focus.

KARMA FILMS deserved its reputation by adding real production value, providing the creative environment fundamental to exceptional filmmaking, and offering tailor-made services for each project. 

KARMA FILMS had the chance to service various film companies such as Sony Pictures, Amblin Entertainment, Louverture Films US, CBS, EUROPACORP France, Autonomous UK, The Film Department NYC, Filmauro Italy, Madragoa Filmes Portugal, Straydogs Films UK, Mirabai Films, Cine Mosaic NYC, Lupin Film Italy to name a few.

Worked with tremendous directors such as Elisabeth Banks, Ron Howard, Mira Nair, Tom Tykwer, Manoel de Oliveira, Bart Freundlich, Tala Hadid.

KARMA FILMS produced / co-produced:
“The Persian Version” by Maryam Keshavarz, 2023 Sundance FF / US Competition The Audience Award winner
“Hesitation Wound” Selman Nacar’s 2nd feature film, 2023 Venice FF Orizzonti contestant, Zurich Film Festival Best Film winner
“Convenience Store” by Michael Borodin, 2022 Berlinale Panorama CICAE award winner
“Between Two Dawns” by Selman Nacar, 2021 San Sebastian FF New Directors contestant, Torino FF Best Film winner
“AV: The Hunt" by Emre Akay, a feminist thriller for Netflix International
“Butterflies” by Tolga Karacelik, 2018 Sundance FF World Cinema Dramatic winner

Name: Make Me Proud Filmes
Description:
É preciso mais que uma câmera na mão para aquela ideia da sua cabeça virar o filme que você quer.
Produzir é uma aventura que exige preparo, equipe, técnica, repertório, referência.
A ação começa muito antes e só termina muito depois do grito do diretor no set.
Porque se filmar pra gente é trampo, a gente trabalha com todo o profissionalismo que cada projeto exige.
Filmar também é paixão, e a gente se entrega com toda a intensidade que as paixões despertam.
Para fazer filmes que fazem rir
Que fazem chorar
Que fazem dar água na boca
Que fazem a pupila dilatar
Que fazem o coração bater mais rápido
Filmes que, independente do roteiro, tenham um final feliz para a gente e para você.
Porque no fim do dia trabalhamos para ser exibidos.
Exibidos pra você.
Exibidos por você.
Exibidos com você.
Exibidos sempre e com orgulho.

Description: Cyrillica is one of the leading Eastern European localization studios for audio-visual content. We offer a full cycle of work: from theatrical and television dubbing, to voice-overs, subtitling and video game localization, for more than 25 languages.

So, if you have a good idea or an exciting project in mind, don’t hesitate to contact us.

Name: Cinéma Public
Description:
Le Cinéma Public est une initiative de diffusion de films sur grand et petit écran à Tiohtià:ke / Montréal. Actuellement installé à la Casa d’Italia, aux limites des quartiers Villeray, Petite-Patrie et Petite-Italie, le Cinéma Public investit à l’occasion différents lieux rassembleurs, notamment la cour du Livart durant l’été. Les projections sur grand écran sont accompagnées d’une offre en ligne, grâce à une plateforme de location accessible partout au Canada.

Le Cinéma Public œuvre à mettre en valeur le cinéma sous toutes ses formes auprès du public montréalais. Notre programmation est composée de films d’ici et de nouveautés internationales, d’œuvres phare et de pépites méconnues, de courts métrages et de séances familiales, ainsi que de divers événements spéciaux. Nous mettons un point d’honneur à augmenter l’expérience en salle par des discussions avec invité∙e∙s dès que l’occasion se présente.   

L’équipe s’emploie à créer tout au long de l’année des espaces de rencontre entre les œuvres, les artistes et les publics. Que ce soit par la création de contenu original ou l’élaboration d’activités de médiation culturelle, nous cherchons sans cesse à élargir et dynamiser notre mandat de cinéma de quartier.

Le cinéma étant une ode au vivant et le public en salle étant toujours présent, le Cinéma Public s’engage à maintenir sa contribution à la vitalité culturelle de Montréal par l’ouverture prochaine d’un nouveau cinéma.

Name: Oxford Digital Media
Description:
Oxford Digital Media is a video production, filming and internet video company based in the heart of Oxford.

We work with a wide range of businesses, from global brands and education institutions, to SME’s and not-for-profit organisations. Our mission is to add value and prestige to our clients by maximising the power of visual communication.

Headed by producer James Tomalin, we are an expert and friendly team with superior experience and exceptional technical ability across the complete digital video production chain. Our video producers, directors, writers, editors, composers, sound and camera crews have what it takes to bring your video productions to life.

We work only with top quality high definition video and have the resources to film either on location or at our green screen television studio and editing suites in Oxford.

Recent clients include The Body Shop, The BBC, Oxford University Press, Channel 4, The RSPB, The Times, Oxford University, Tetra Pak, Pearson Publishing, Macmillan Education and The Guardian.

Name: Visual Impact Broadcast Solutions
Description:
Visual Impact SA is the leading provider of Digital and High Definition broadcast solutions in Africa and productions originating from South Africa. Visual Impact SA does not only sell and rent out video cameras and cameras, but all the broadcasting equipment needed as well, whilst providing the personnel with the expertise to create solutions for clients.

Visual Impact’s South African operations offers a complete post-production package, it services many European and U.S companies.  One of our many advantages are the joint partnership with HDHUB as well as Mediahive.

Our personnel have developed and participated in large and specialised reality projects such as Idols (East West & South Africa), The Block, The Apprentice, Survivor and Fear Factor series. Through these projects Visual Impact SA has proved its capacity to facilitate world-class quality projects. 

The first full length HD feature (completed in 2001) in Africa with the Visual Impact SA 24p camera also contributed to Visual Impact SA's reputation as the leader in Africa in digital cinematography. The entry of the HD feature "Promised Land" at the 2002 Cannes festival is an important milestone in Visual Impact’s investment in HD technology. This investment and capacity to provide digital equipment and broadcasting solutions was increased significantly by the purchase of Visual Impact SA by the Visual Impact Group. Through the Visual Impact Group's backing Visual Impact SA can now provide a wide range of broadcast solutions.

Visual Impact SA employs two full time broadcast engineers and has personnel capable of manipulating camera menus on all the format cameras. Visual Impact SA’s on set digital grading personnel are used extensively on HD and Digital Betacam productions. This expertise is also vital in situations where digital formats are to be blown up to film, an area Visual Impact SA are leading the way in Africa.

Name: BEEP! Studios

We're a team of creative individuals dedicated to producing high-quality visual content that inspires and entertains. Our goal is to tell compelling stories that spark important conversations and make a real difference in our communities.

We specialize in short films, documentaries, blogs, newsletters, and social media content. From concept to final delivery, we use the latest technology and techniques to create stunning visuals that capture the essence of every story we tell.

Our team is passionate about visual storytelling and strives to create an immersive experience that transports you to another world. We're proud to bring our unique perspectives and skill sets to every project, working tirelessly to bring your vision to life.

Explore our website and discover our wide range of content. We're committed to bringing you the best in creative storytelling and can't wait to share our latest productions with you.

Our philosophy champions collaboration with creatives and storytellers with communication being at the heart of everything we do.
 
We see every project as being unique, each with its own set of challenges and goals. With this in mind we apply a fresh approach to every job, rethinking our pipeline that best suits your requirements and optimises on creative excellence.
 
Wherever you are in Europe, we would love to come and visit you and your team for a chat.

Name: Zooq Films
Description: What’s your story? Let us visualise it for you! Being unusual storytellers, Zooq Films is all about making great content that resonates with your audience. Our expertise in pre-production, production, post-production has given us an opportunity to work with companies in every industry. With a decade long cumulative experience in Television, Films, Corporate and Documentaries, we an enthusiastic team of filmmakers are here to create for you what you are looking for. Any content needed? We are happy to get it done for you at an affordable price and professional quality.

Name: HENX Filmproduktion & Videomarketing
Description: Henx liebt Film. Nach fast 10 zehn Jahren ist von ruhigem Beziehungsalltag keine Spur. Man überrascht gerne mit außergewöhnlichen Konzepten und springt dabei gekonnt zwischen den Genres: sei es Werbefilm, Videomarketing, Kinokampagnen, Imagefilm oder mit künstlerischer Arbeit in eigener Sache. Im Vordergrund steht dabei immer die Idee und der neugierige Blick in die Zukunft.

Name: Duboi
Description: Depuis sa création en 1983, le groupe DURAN DUBOI est devenu un acteur majeur des prestations techniques pour le cinéma et la télévision. Le groupe développe une expertise reconnue dans les métiers de la postproduction autour du montage son et image, des effets spéciaux numériques et de la création d’images de synthèse.

Name: The Nile Entertainment
Description: Nile Entertainment serves as a catalyst for cross-cultural exchange and global appreciation, seamlessly connecting local and international markets to showcase the richness and diversity of African storytelling. Our curated film portfolio, spanning genres from drama to adventure, celebrates the vibrancy of African culture and resonates with universal themes. Through strategic partnerships and innovative distribution channels, we effectively reach a broad audience in the US, Canada, and Europe, collaborating with prominent cinema chains such as AMC, Odeon, Cineworld, and Cineplex. Our core mission is to amplify African voices, foster empathy and understanding, and unite people across cultures by highlighting the shared human experiences that transcend borders.

Name: Magic Production
Description: Our mission is to create high-quality and performing content under optimal conditions and always be a reliable partner for our clients.

Description: Mompracem ha tra gli obiettivi quello di dare spazio ai giovani registi emergenti e dar vita a progetti che mettano insieme intrattenimento e qualità. La nostra caratteristica principale è quella di essere una produzione dinamica, un vero e proprio laboratorio di idee, che opera e lavora fuori dagli schemi più canonici, non perdendo mai di vista il suo obiettivo.

Name: Audiovisual Chile Producciones
Description:
Audiovisual Chile es un grupo de profesionales creativos y proactivos, especializados en la grabación y post producción de eventos y conciertos HD, grabación y mezcla de sonido mulipista, realización de video clips y videos corporativos. 
Además, creamos y producimos contenidos para televisión y empresas, proyectos cinematográficos, y eventos culturales. Contamos con estudio de sonido, isla de edición y rental de equipos audiovisuales.
Estas características, más el gran grupo humano que la componen, hacen de AV Chile una empresa profesional y confiable en el óptimo resultado de todos sus proyectos a lo largo del país.

Name: Lumière Maastricht
Description: Lumière Cinema is dé plek voor de bijzondere film in Maastricht en behoort met wel 8000 voorstellingen per jaar tot de culturele basisvoorziening van de stad. Het filmtheater is een van de grootste filmhuizen van Nederland en vervult een niet weg te denken rol als vertoner van de kwaliteitsfilm, voor stad en regio. Sinds september 2016 is Lumière gehuisvest in het oude ketelhuis van de voormalige Sphinxfabriek. In het monumentale pand aan het water staan film, ontmoeten, gastronomie en gastvrijheid centraal. Lumière Restaurant Café beschikt over een restaurant met 150 zitplaatsen, het café biedt plaats aan 75 gasten en het terras beschikt over 100 zitplaatsen. Lumière Restaurant Café is 7 dagen per week geopend van 11.00 tot 01.00 uur. Een zakelijke lunch, een gezellige borrel of een uitgebreid 3-gangendiner, Lumière biedt voor ieder wat wils.

Name: Giordani Studio Srl
Description:
Film boutique located in the heart of Rome, specializing in editing and post-production services for producers, distributors, and independent projects.

The approach of our studio is inspired by the concept of the "Renaissance workshop," where high-quality craftsmanship merges with experimentation. In this setting, technique intertwines with art, placing the human being at the center of the creative process.

Each project is undertaken with meticulous dedication and passion, aiming to exceed expectations and create distinctive audiovisual works. There is a constant commitment to exploring new production models and developing customized workflows, always keeping creativity and quality at the heart of our work.

Name: Accademia Cinema Toscana
Description:
Accademia Cinema Toscana e Accademia Recitazione Toscana sono corsi triennali completi e formati per chi vuole lavorare nell'audiovisivo.

Accademia Cinema Toscana è un corso formativo completo e pratico per professionalizzarsi e lavorare nel mondo del Cinema e dell’Audiovisivo. Dal 2014 nel Campus a LUCCA. Punta alla creazione di figure professionali: regista, sceneggiatore, copywriter, editor e montatore, tecnico di post produzione e grafica 3d, operatore, assistente alla fotografia, direttore della fotografia, direttore di produzione, produttore esecutivo, produttore.

Accademia Recitazione Toscana è un corso intensivo rivolto a chi desidera affrontare professionalmente il mestiere dell'attore, è un percorso formativo che mira a conferire strumenti pratici, creativi e teorici a chi vuole fare della recitazione il suo mestiere.

Name: VFX Hire
Description:
We exhaustively track what potential candidates have done, what they want to do and when they are available. We have access to talent pools globally. 

Founded in 2020, VFX Hire has built relationships with countless professionals globally in the CG industry. Our core principle: Take the time to speak to everyone, listen intently to what people need and provide opportunities and solutions which match.

Name: PM Film Production
Description:
PM Film Production is a collective of artists based between Kyiv and Berlin, dedicated to amplifying LGBTQI+ voices and responding to Ukraine’s current cultural and political landscape through film and media.

Rooted in community and creative resistance, PM Film Production plays a central role in producing the upcoming feature-length documentary TO DANCE IS TO RESIST — a poetic exploration of queer love, identity, and survival during wartime.

Through collaborative, independent filmmaking, the collective works to center underrepresented narratives and bring urgent stories from Ukraine’s underground art scene to international audiences.

Name: VFX Summit
Description: VFX Summit (http://vfxsummit.in/) is a 2-day event celebrating the Indian visual effects content, under the congregation of IndiaJoy (www.indiajoy.in) , India’s largest Digital Entertainment fest, supported by the Government of Telangana.

Name: Wanda Media
Description:

With development, investment, production, publicity, marketing, copyright operations, and other multi-directional film and television functions integrated into the company’s businesses, the company actively participates in cooperation with overseas film and television businesses.

Name: ModelingCafe Inc.
Description:
Update the world with modeling

What is Modeling Cafe
We, Modeling Cafe, are a company whose mission is to “model” fresh surprises and new value to the world with advanced CG technology + α.

At Modeling Cafe we support the modeling of a wide range of needs, from live-action videos such as movies, commercials, dramas, and games to virtual humans such as imma (Aww Inc.), Japan’s first virtual human.
We actively invest in “virtual” genres to support technological development. We are currently focusing on VR / AR space and content creation using game engines such as Unreal Engine and Unity.

We also present our research and development results at our regular seminars. If you are an educational institution or company wishing to hold a workshop, please feel free to contact us.
We are looking for a wide range of development partner companies to accelerate the research and development of new content and services that utilize modeling.
By utilizing our technology and know-how, we will expand the fields where our “modeling” can play an active role.

In Modeling Cafe, we have four expert teams: 
1) a modeling team that produces high-quality modeling. 
2) an art team (at // c) that prepares the blueprints necessary for modeling.
3) a rigging team that builds a mechanism to move a model.
4) a technical directors/system engineer team who develop modeling technology and design infrastructure.
Cooperating as a team, we can always continue to provide the highest quality modeling in the industry.
Furthermore, in cooperation with group companies such as Aww and Animation Cafe, we will continue to give fresh surprises to the world.


Working at Modeling Cafe
Working at Modeling Cafe is to update yourself.
You have the freedom to try out new software, plugins, and resources.
We encourage you to learn, and we subsidize participation fees for drawing classes and modeling seminars.
By sharing information with the internal community, you can update yourself efficiently.

Name: Le BEAM (Eastern Townships Film and Television Office))
Description:
Le BEAM is a dynamic nonprofit organization whose mission is to highlight the work of the creative industry in the Eastern Townships, and to connect its members with contacts and resources required to work efficiently in the region. 

Acting as a beacon of social change in its community, Le BEAM has taken root in the small town of Saint-Adrien, in the old church that has been modified to include coworking spaces, a multipurpose room, a high-end post production and recording studio, community garden and more. In serving a large territory, Le BEAM acts as a meeting point where its members can share knowledge and ideas, which are heavily influenced by the way of life in the Townships. 

Le BEAM also acts as the Eastern Townships Film and Television Office : providing resources for producers who want to film their movie in a region boasting a wide range of landscapes. Welcome to Le BEAM!

Name: Unified Filmmakers
Description:
The UNIFIED FILMMAKERS aspires to be a platform, that stands for a new global community of filmmakers. We strongly believe, that films have the power to significantly impact public discourse for the better. Therefore, our Unified Filmmakers Festival each year on one specific topic of global and social relevance.
After the success of the 1st UFM Festival edition in 2021, receiving over 500 films from 72 countries on the topic of COVID-19 pandemic, we are currently organizing our 2nd edition of the festival on the topic of CLIMATE CHANGE.

Name: Oro Studios
Description:
Oro Studios è una società di produzione cinematografica nata con l’obiettivo di strutturare e consolidare una realtà produttiva indipendente e impegnata a ricercare l’originalità comunicativa e insieme l’indagine approfondita delle tematiche sociali e individuali.
Il cinema italiano ha segnato la storia, in diversi momenti ha orientato e modificato il corso del cinema mondiale. Vogliamo collaborare affinchè il nostro cinema abbia anche un glorioso futuro!

Name: VIU CINE
Description:
A Viu Cine é uma produtora de conteúdo para cinema, TV e web, especializada em animação, com atuação no estado de Pernambuco e com 12 anos de presença no mercado de audiovisual. Ao longo desse tempo, a VIU se destacou com importantes projetos na área do cinema, como a realização do filme Recife Assombrado e a série de animação Além da Lenda. Os dois projetos são um sucesso de público e de amplo reconhecimento com importantes agentes do mercado. 
Toda essa expertise de sucesso no audiovisual está à disposição para fortalecer a sua marca. A VIU CINE conta com excelentes profissionais capacitados para produção de conteúdo com qualidade de cinema para projetos institucionais. Podemos produzir para as demandas do setor de Recursos Humanos da sua empresa, memória institucional, vídeos educativos e voltados para comunicação interna. Trabalhamos com tecnologia de ponta, oferecendo, no produto final, imagens com qualidade 4K, com linguagem inovadora e com rigor técnico 
No cinema, a produtora se destaca com realização de importantes obras, como filme Recife Assombrado e o primeiro longa de animação de Pernambuco, Além da Lenda. Também é responsável pela série Pedrinho e a chuteira da sorte e Além da Lenda, exibidas pela Rede Globo Nordeste. 
Hoje, uma marca precisa contar boas histórias para se estabelecer no mercado, construindo identificação e afetos com o público-alvo. Para isso, é preciso oferecer conteúdo de qualidade. Está aí a importância de contar com uma boa produção de conteúdo, para chegar mais rápido aos objetivos do seu projeto, uma experiência que é a vocação da VIU CINE. Estamos prontos para contar e levar mais longe a sua história.

Name: ePlay Studio ES
Description:
ePlay▸ es un estudio creativo con gente diversa, plural y auténtica, que hace videos increíbles para empresas con personas increíbles. Ahora también en Barcelona!

En nuestra esencia, somos una productora audiovisual especializada en la creación de videos (desde la estratégia, el guión y la grabación hasta la animación y la postproducción) con un toque creativo e innovador. 

Nuestro enfoque principal siempre es mantener los más altos niveles de calidad (manteniendo un precio justo), y comprender lo que es lo que quieres comunicar. Ponemos nuestra experiencia y creatividad para asegurarnos de que tu marca o proyecto transmita su mensaje de la manera más efectiva y impactante posible.

Contáctanos hoy y vamos juntos contar tu historia!

Name: On Screen Manitoba
Description:
On Screen Manitoba leads, builds and represents the media production industry in Manitoba, Canada.

As a non-profit provincial industry association, the On Screen Manitoba membership includes individuals (producers, writers, directors and other industry professionals), labour organizations (ACTRA, DGC, IATSE 856), production companies, service suppliers (material, equipment, professional services, etc.), training organizations, film festivals and other stakeholders, representing some 2000 industry professionals. Our members produce all types of content in English, French and Indigenous languages and they have access to some of the best production incentives in Canada.

Building a positive filming environment in Manitoba is essential to the long-term success of our industry. On Screen Manitoba partners and collaborates with organizations both in the province and from across Canada to improve working conditions, support workforce development, attract new workers, and celebrate accomplishments. On Screen Manitoba’s advocacy goals are informed by all sectors of the Manitoba media production industry and the diversity of local workers, including Francophone, Indigenous, BPOC and 2SLGBTQ2+ professionals.

Name: PakPraat
Description:
Dit is PakPraat: dé packaging-podcast van Nederland en België.

Luister via: https://linktr.ee/PakPraat

Wij helpen verpakkers van vandaag op weg naar de verpakking van morgen. 
Met inspiratie, inzichten en energie, zijn wij jouw onafhankelijke gids door de complexe verpakkingsjungle.

Leer van de koplopers, verbaas je over wat er al kan en lach om verrassende uitspraken. 

In PakPraat bespreken we hoe het anders kan en moet. Van wetgeving tot de wil van de consument en van AI tot de allerlaatste trends. 
Met experts uit de hele keten belichten we actuele thema’s.
Dit verbreedt jouw visie en helpt je bij het maken van betere keuzes. 

Wij zijn Ariane van Mancius, Lucy van Keulen en Emmilie Kuks. 
Drie generaties energieke vrouwen met passie voor het vak verpakken. 

Deze aflevering van PakPraat wordt mede mogelijk gemaakt door onze gewaardeerde partners: Luvio Packaging Group, Paardekooper, Guillin, Verpakkings Management en Pickler. 

Laat je informeren, inspireren en verbinden! Welkom bij PakPraat.

Name: Vivants le film
Description:
Synopsis
A la fin de l’été, le docteur Grange fêtera son 3e pot de départ à la retraite. Il a du mal à quitter cette unité de soins palliatifs qu’il a fondée il y a 25 ans dans un petit hôpital de campagne. A l’origine de cet engagement : un drame personnel.
Ces dernières semaines avec le Dr Grange auprès de ses patients, Cynthia, Didier, Jacqueline, questionnent notre lien à la famille et à la vie.

Un film pour ouvrir le dialogue
Le film est un fabuleux support pour aller à la rencontre des citoyens et ouvrir le dialogue sur des thématiques parfois difficiles à aborder.

Vous souhaitez organiser une projection citoyenne ou un ciné débat ? 
Vous êtes une collectivité, une association, une entreprise, une université ?
Contactez nous pour en savoir plus.

Vivants est un film documentaire de 65 minutes. 
Produit par Girelle Production en coproduction avec TV78. 
Le film est soutenu par le Centre national du cinéma et de l'image animée, la fondation Clariane, la MNA TAYLOR et l'association Prisme avec l'aide de la fondation Funecap.

Name: MPC Filmes
Description:
A MPC e Associados é uma produtora carioca com mais de 30 anos de experiência no mercado brasileiro e internacional. Fundada em 1982 pelo produtor e diretor Alberto Graça e tendo como sócia a produtora Luciana Boal Marinho, a MPC atua nas áreas de produção e difusão de conteúdo audiovisual. 

Com 9 longas-metragens produzidos e mais de 50 documentários, programas e séries para TV para o mercado nacional e europeu, a MPC e Associados tem como um de seus diferenciais o foco na construção de relações internacionais, com um vasto histórico de coproduções com canais de TV como France Television, Arte, RTP, BBC, Canal + e NHK, e produtoras como Gaumont Internacional (Le Jaguar), KRE (The Art of War), Mano a Mano (França) e Filmes do Tejo II (Portugal), dentre outras. 

Na área de difusão realiza desde 2000, de forma ininterrupta, o projeto Cinema em Movimento, criado pela MPC com o objetivo de levar o produto cultural audiovisual brasileiro para populações sem acesso econômico ou geográfico ao circuito comercial. Executado em parceria com o ICEM – Instituto Cultura em Movimento é hoje a maior rede não formal de exibição de filmes da América Latina, com atuação em mais de 700 municípios de todos os 27 estados brasileiros e mais de 2 milhões de espectadores atendidos.

Saiba mais sobre os projetos da MPC e Associados nas áreas de produção e difusão nas seções Cinema+TV e Cinema em Movimento do nosso site.

Name: Silicon Valley African Film Festival
Description:
The Silicon Valley African Film Festival (SVAFF) promotes an understanding and appreciation of Africa and Africans through moving images. Aptly themed “Africa through the African lens", the film festival celebrates the vast richness of the African Continent through the lenses of Africa’s seasoned and emerging filmmakers and, crucially, provides audiences with exquisite lenses to the real Africa. Each year, the festival presents a full menu of feature and short length narrative, documentary and animation films from over 30 African countries. From Ghana to Uganda, Tunisia to Tanzania, Nigeria to Namibia, Senegal to South Africa, the diversity of voices represented in our films engage, delight, inspire, provoke and challenge our audience.

Programs of the film festival include:
•	Annual Film Festival: SVAFF’s flagship program is the annual film festival weekend showcase that is held in October. Highlights include:  a Red Carpet walk and VIP reception, parade of flags of the countries in the festival, libation ceremony, film screenings, live performances, an African marketplace, fashion show, visual arts exhibition, dialogue with filmmakers in attendance, panel discussions, community forums, food, awards, etc. Over 50% of the films screened at SVAFF are World / North America premieres.
•	African Cinema Cafe Series: The African Cinema Café Series is SVAFF's community outreach, partnership and audience development program. It is a year-round community screenings of films in community spaces. It offers us the opportunity to use film as a vehicle for dialogue and celebrate its power to inspire and catalyze change.
•	Africa in the Classroom Film Series: The Africa in the Classroom Film Series brings curriculum related films to local elementary, middle and high schools for use in classrooms. Schools are also granted access to our rich library of African films that cover a vast range of topics and many teachers use our films to animate their Africa units.

Our mission at The Creative Mind Group is to find the next generation of talented Film & TV professionals and usher them into the entertainment industry by providing international film programs at the worlds most prestigious film festivals and markets. At each festival and market we provide a platform for filmmakers to showcase their talents via the creation of short films and an opportunity for aspiring film professionals to prove their capabilities, competency, worthiness, readiness and value by interning with film studios, production companies, talent agencies, public relation firms and media outlets who can launch their careers.

To date weâve brought over 1,100 participants to film festivals all over the world, setup more than 600 internships, produced more than 75 films and provided over 100 jobs for our alumni. The Creative Mind Group represents the future of interactive learning experiences while dynamically advancing the way aspiring film and TV industry professionals connect with the entertainment industry.

Description:
Tucker Tooley Entertainment (TTE) is an independent production and financing company focused on delivering bold, emotionally resonant, and globally impactful storytelling across film, television, documentary, and audio.

Founded by producer Tucker Tooley, whose films have earned over $2.6 billion worldwide, and his partner Greg Renker, TTE merges creative ambition with in-house capital and a hands-on producing style. The company develops and produces high-quality, story-driven projects with strong commercial and franchise potential, as well as prestige titles that reflect a deep commitment to authenticity, character, and representation.

Recent productions include  the growing Den of Thieves franchise (Den of Thieves 2: Pantera opened No1 in theaters in the U.S. on January 10, 2025),  The Deliverance (Netflix), Arthur the King (Lionsgate), Concrete Cowboy (Netflix), The United States vs. Billie Holiday (Hulu),  and The Croydon Cat Killer podcast (Audible) . Upcoming projects include Den of Thieves 3, to be directed by Christian Gudegast and starring Gerard Butler and O’Shea Jackson Jr.  and the documentary Finding Satoshi,.

At TTE, we build long-term partnerships with creators and empower stories that leave a lasting cultural impact.

L’association Festivals Connexion est un réseau unique en France qui fédère les festivals et manifestations cinématographiques en Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes.
Créé en 2008, le réseau accompagne ses adhérents dans leur développement en leur proposant des outils mutualisés, des formations, des solutions et conseils individualisés.
Cette mise en commun des expériences a pour but d’aider chacun des responsables de festivals à faire évoluer positivement et professionnellement sa manifestation que ce soit sur le plan de l’organisation, de la programmation, de la formation des personnels.

Depuis 2019, Festivals Connexion propose un dispositif de diffusion d'œuvres en réalité virtuelle destiné aux Festivals et structures culturelles et éducatives de la région Auvergne Rhône-Alpes.

Name: aiTe (asociación de industrias técnicas del audiovisual español - Audiovisual Industry Association )
Description:
Asociación de industrias técnicas del audiovisual español

AiTe es una asociación profesional sin ánimo de lucro que agrupa a las empresas vinculadas al proceso técnico de creación o realización de una obra o producción audiovisual o sonora para cine, vídeo o multimedia.

El objetivo primordial de la Asociación es el fomento de la actividad de la industria técnica en el sector audiovisual español y la defensa del interés general de sus asociados. Por este motivo, aiTe pone a disposición de todos sus asociados una plataforma capaz de atender sus necesidades de representatividad sectorial ante el sector audiovisual y ante la opinión pública, defendiendo los intereses comunes de todas y cada una de las empresas que forman parte de la asociación.

Objetivos de la Asociación

Representar y defender los intereses de los asociados de aiTe ante las instituciones y los agentes claves del sector. Trabajamos para promover una legislación que haga posible la estabilidad y el crecimiento de una industria autosuficiente capaz de incorporar permanentemente los últimos avances tecnológicos.

Promocionar la Asociación y a nuestros asociados en el mercado audiovisual nacional y extranjero, así como en la sociedad en general.

Divulgar el conocimiento mediante el intercambio de experiencias, la participación en seminarios, la difusión de las actividades que desarrollamos, la edición de publicaciones especializadas en analizar distintos sectores de las industrias técnicas,…

Name: Palm Beach County Film & Television Commission
Description: Whether you're searching for the ideal backdrop, experienced local crew, services, and/or accommodations, you've come to the right place. No project's too small or too large for clients to discover our "can do" approach, superior service, attention to detail, responsiveness and the resources to make your project a reality.

Name: Makro Vídeo e Makro Digital - Central de Soluções em Videos
Description: Fundada em 1972 a Makro Vídeo / Digital rapidamente se colocou entre as principais produtoras do mercado brasileiro tendo conquistado os principais prêmios regionais, nacionais e internacionais. Somos focados em pessoas, acreditamos que a paixão e o talento são as únicas formas de transformar idéias em filmes de verdade. Nossa receita mistura diretores consagrados, infra estrutura arrojada e jovens talentos! Nossa missão é produzir imagens que envolvam as pessoas. Buscamos inovação com propósito, fotografia com conteúdo e somos incansáveis na busca da excelência em tudo que fazemos.

Name: Wild Dream Lab
Description: Wild Dream Lab is a comprehensive provider for boutique post-production services based in Los Angeles. We combine the latest technology, the highest security standards and the expertise of our extensive resources with outstanding client support to provide the highest quality work through all the stages of your project.

Name: AGOSTO
Description: Agosto is a film production company based in Barcelona, Madrid and Buenos Aires.

Name: 2MCine
Description: Productora de Cine, Publicidad y Contenidos. Productora de Cine, Publicidad y Contenidos. Productora de Cine, Publicidad y Contenidos. Productora de Cine, Publicidad y Contenidos. Productora de Cine, Publicidad y Contenidos. Productora de Cine, Publicidad y Contenidos.

Name: Cinewaves Films
Description: Cinewaves Films the leading Saudi Distribution Company owns the Largest Short & Feature Saudi, film library in the market. A remarkable contribution to the filmmaking production and entertainment sector in the region. Cinewaves has released more than eleven Saudi films in all Saudi cinemas, Netflix, and Shahid platforms since the last year and has collaborated with various Saudi and international organizations program many cultural screenings. In addition, Cinewaves films have brought several Saudi films to local, regional, and international film festivals and won several awards between 2020 and 2021.

Name: Origina Conteúdo
Description:
A Origina é a produtora do roteirista e produtor executivo Matheus Colen. Uma empresa focada na etapa de desenvolvimento no audiovisual e na produção de não-ficção. 

Realizamos anualmente o laboratório de roteiros de ficção com foco em coprodução internacional Histórias Que Viajam, levando comitivas de autores brasileiros para eventos internacionais. 

Produzimos documentários originais. Nossa primeira série, Tempo de Dança estreou no canal Arte 1 em Março de 2025. 

Atuamos com consultorias para produtores independentes na área de roteiro e de produção executiva.

Name: TF films

Description: Global Screen - a TELEPOOL Brand - is a leading international sales & distribution company for theatrical films, TV programs and formats based in Munich, Germany. It is owned by TELEPOOL, a vertically integrated media and licensing company with more than 55 years of experience in film distribution.

Online movie magazine with all the latest industry news,

Description: We support the directors, producers and creatives who entrust us with their ideas. We support the clients who entrust us with their brands. We support the salespeople who entrust us with their credibility. We support the employees and freelancers who entrust us with their livelihoods. We do so by recognizing that the primary responsibility of a company is to make a superlative product in a positive and stable environment. You will believe this by talking to us and by talking to others about us. You will experience this by working with us.

Name: Avanti Producciones
Description: Como especialistas en la producción audiovisual, nos dedicamos a potenciar la comunicación efectiva, interna principalmente, en empresas, instituciones y organizaciones sin fines de lucro. Ofrecemos un enfoque integral y creativo para cada proyecto.

Name: Lumiere VFX Inc.
Description:
Launched in March 2008, Lumière VFX is one of the newest visual special effects company to set up in Montreal. Our company is artistically and technically driven, creating first class visual effects for film and TV. We provide our artists with the tools they need to do what they do best: create, animate, embellish and transform elements into breathtaking visual effects.

Lumière believes in the power of creativity and draws talent from Montreal, Canada, and beyond.

Name: TAFF Pictures
Description: TAFF Pictures (Tam Aile Filmleri Fabrikası), 2013 yılında Timur Savcı ve Cemal Okan tarafından kuruldu. Kurucularının ve ekibinin, sinema televizyon sektöründeki tecrübesiyle kısa zamanda adından bahsettiren filmlere imza atan TAFF Pictures, insan hikayelerini ve hayallerini sinema perdesine aktarmaya devam ediyor...

Name: TATINO Films
Description:
Tatino Films is a collaborative and growing organization dedicated to supporting filmmakers from all over the world.

The visionary team behind the remarkable programs Pop Up Film Residency, First Cut Lab, and Full Circle Lab.

Name: Black Robot Entertainment LTD
Description:
Black Robot Entertainment LTD is a new production and audiovisual management company, based in UK, which operates mostly in the field of cinema, television and web production.
We're working hard to provide you the greatest service.

Name: FILM CONSTELLATION
Description:
FILM CONSTELLATION is an integrated production, finance and sales company headquartered in London and Paris.

The company builds on a track record for growing award-winning filmmaker brands, and continues to expand its diverse slate of talents including Werner Herzog, Georgia Oakley, David Lynch, Natalie Erika James, James Marsh, Ekwa Msangi, Michaela Coel, Paco Plaza, Jamie Dack, Lotfy Nathan, Saim Sadiq, Rashaad Ernesto Green and Carlos López Estrada among others.

Name: Bare Metal Project
Description: Film and initiative seeking accelerate decarbonization and impact scope 3 emissions through fostering strategic engagement between the digital infrastructure end users and primary materials industries.

Name: Produtora Produz
Description:
Somos uma Produtora com paixão pela arte de contar histórias.
Muito além do que transcrever momentos, entregamos sentimentos e experiências desde 2016 em mais de 1.500 sonhos registrados no RJ e em todos outros estados do Brasil.
Acreditamos que as fotos e vídeos carregam a missão de congelar cada detalhe precioso do seu evento e compartilhar a felicidade e emoção nesse dia tão especial.
Location: Duque de Caxias, Rio de Janeiro

Name: Kettle Black Films
Description:
Kettle Black Films is a ‘film first’ content generation platform –
focused on telling high quality original stories through the visual medium.
All our content, whether original or contracted, stays true to the medium.

Our presence is ubiquitous. We do not lay our roots down and work from fixed desks. Our workspace is up in the clouds, coursing the interwebs. We predominantly work with creative individuals from across the globe, allowing a wide spectrum of varied talent  to collaborate and create individualistic and original content. In doing this, we create a digital infrastructure based on mutual contribution.

With our content, we like being relevant while staying removed from the bustling bandwagon. We skim the avant-garde, stroll the ‘trending’ trails, all whilst paving our own roads.  Not only do we roll with the new age mechanics of business but also make sure to establish our professionalism. Without exception, we maintain timelines and quality, and are constantly working towards building fixed assets.

We believe and will fight to the bitter end that our stories
are conceptualised, produced and delivered only after we know that they are each uniquely different and are close enough to our impossible standards.

Name: Documentary Film Council (DFC)
Description: The Documentary Film Council (DFC) is a new member-led organisation for the UK’s independent documentary film industry. Designed in collaboration with stakeholders from across the documentary community, the DFC will be democratically run by and for its members and will take effective, coordinated action on the key issues in our industry.

Name: WILLA
Description: WILLA is a production and distribution company recognized by Forbes 30 Under 30 and supported by Sundance Institute, amplifying exceptional storytelling across genres that explores today's most relevant social and cultural themes.

Name: Abroad in Japan
Description:
Founded by British filmmaker and Sunday Times best-selling author Chris Broad, Abroad in Japan is one of the largest foreign YouTube channels in Japan, with over 2.95 million subscribers and 450 million views.
Abroad in Japan has become one of the most respected brands sharing Japanese culture with the world, praised for the high production quality of the content and for exploring regions of Japan often overlooked by traditional media.
The channel's aim is to entertain and educated audiences on life in Japan - an often misunderstood culture - and in the ten years since its inception the channel has been prominently featured in the global media, including: BBC, Tedx, The Guardian, The Nikkei and the Japan Times.

Name: Aircraft Pictures
Description:
Aircraft Pictures is an Academy Award and Emmy nominated producer of scripted content for kids, families and young adults. Based in Toronto with an office in Los Angeles, the production company was founded by Anthony Leo and Andrew Rosen. Aircraft develops, finances and produces live action and animation content for a variety of platforms ranging from independent feature films to high-end television series to digital first productions for an international audience.

Select producing credits include the animated theatrical feature film The Breadwinner – a co-production with Cartoon Saloon and Melusine Productions in association with Executive Producer Angelina Jolie – nominated for an Academy Award and Golden Globe Award for Best Animated Feature Film and winner of the Los Angeles Film Critics Award and Annie Award for Best Independent Animated Feature; five seasons of the Canadian Screen Award-winning and Daytime Emmy-nominated live action Hulu Original series Holly Hobbie; three television movies based on the Bruno & Boots book series by young adult fiction icon Gordon Korman and twenty-six episodes of the Kidscreen Award-winning single camera comedy Raising Expectations created by Tom Saunders (Arrested Development) and starring Jason Priestley and Molly Ringwald.

Past credits include the internet motion picture Cybergeddon by C.S.I. creator Anthony E. Zuiker; Dark Matters - the NBC Universal web series prequel to the Heroes: Reborn television reboot (Webby Award winner); the twenty-six episode Canadian Screen Award-winning supernatural comedy series Todd & The Book Of Pure Evil; the forty episode tween sitcom What’s Up, Warthogs and a series of short films for Sesame Street.

Name: Apollo Productions Ltd
Description:
Apollo Productions is a fully integrated production services company and a partnership between Steve Norris, Pinewood Shepperton and Double Negative Films.  It has been created to provide backing to visually bold, interesting and ambitious market facing films in the £2m – £10m budget range, with an increasing interest in high-end TV productions.

Apollo will work with, and support, the best of British talent as well as encouraging independent filmmakers from around the world to utilise Britain as the ideal film location for both filming and post-production.

Name: Video Mercury Films
Description: Somos la distribuidora del mayor catálogo de cine español, mostrando al mundo entero la trayectoria y la calidad de las películas que son impronta de nuestra cultura.

Name: eNStudios
Description:
eNStudios is a place for the creative industry that offers endless possibilities. The modern complex has everything you need including: space, equipment and specialists. It is here that you will turn even the most daring ideas into realized projects thanks to: 1) Virtual Production Studio, 
2) Photo & Video Studio with a spacious cyclorama,
 3) Audio Studio - three separate rooms connected to the control's room, 
4) Motion Capture technology, 
5) Virtual prop room and set design studio. 
For more information, please visit our website.

Somos una empresa con prestación completa de Pre-Producción, Producción y Post-Producción. Tenemos gran experiencia en diseño de producción y logística a nivel nacional e internacional. Sabemos cumplir con las exigencias de cada cliente trabajando con calidad humana, técnica e infraestructura.

We represent top directors and provide production services.

Name: Gaumont GmbH
Description: Die Gaumont GmbH mit Sitz in Köln und Berlin ist ein Tochterunternehmen des französischen Filmstudios Gaumont – des ältesten Filmproduktionsunternehmens der Welt.

Name: MEDIA FENIX GROUP
Description:
Media Fenix è una società fondata nel 2018 specializzata nella post-produzione audiovisiva, produzione di sottotitoli e audiodescrizioni, localizzazione dei contenuti, theatrical/broadcast/VOD mastering e delivery,

Media Fenix nasce con l’ambizione di offrire soluzioni scalabili capaci di coprire tutti gli aspetti della produzione e distribuzione audiovisiva dall’On-set Data Management al master finale. Garantendo alti standard qualitativi e una gestione centralizzata e trasparente di tutte le problematiche di produzione e distribuzione.

Name: Color En Movimiento
Description:
Postproduction studio specialized in color grading.
We are Based in Madrid, but we will be charmed with colouring for the world!

Name: Alba Sotorra Cinema Productions
Description: Based in Barcelona, we produce films for cinema, TVs and platforms internationally. With a women-led team, we tell stories of the present that move us by their feminist, genuine and risky essence. We have attended renowned international film festivals and have a solid relationship with film funds.

Name: Wmix Distribuidora Ltda
BlackStar
Description:
BlackStar creates the spaces and resources needed to uplift the work of Black, Brown and Indigenous artists working outside of the confines of genre. We do this by producing year-round programs including film screenings, exhibitions, an annual film festival, a filmmaker seminar, a film production lab, and a journal of visual culture. These programs provide artists opportunities for viable strategies for collaborations with other artists, audiences, funders, and distributors.

We prioritize visionary work that is experimental in its aesthetics, content, and form and builds on the work of elders and ancestors to imagine a new world. We elevate artists who are overlooked, invisibilized or misunderstood and celebrate the wide spectrum of aesthetics, storytelling and experiences that they bring. We bring that work to new audiences as well as place it in dialog with other past and contemporary work. And, we curate every aspect of our events to be intentional community building efforts, connecting diverse audiences in a Black-led space centered on joy and thriving.

Name: Krakow Film Festival
Description: Krakow Film Festival is one of the oldest film events dedicated to documentary, animated and short fiction films in Europe. Films are presented in 4 competitions and in special sections like retrospectives, thematic cycles, archive screenings. Festival is accompanied by exhibitions, concerts, open air screenings and meetings with the filmmakers. Every year Krakow Film Festival hosts Polish and international guests: directors, producers, film festival programmers and numerous audience from Krakow.

Name: Finnish Film Foundation
Description:
Finnish Film Foundation supports and promotes the Finnish film industry by funding professional film production and the exhibition and distribution of films. The Foundation is also responsible for the cultural export of Finnish film and provides support for the international promotion of Finnish films.

Finnish Film Foundation receives its funding through the Ministry of Education and Culture for promoting film art.

Finnish Film Foundation was founded in 1969 as an independent foundation operating under the supervision of the Department for Cultural Policy of the Ministry of Education and Culture.

Name: Boundary Visual Effects
Description:
State-of-art Rotoscope Boutique, providing the following services for film and television productions: 

Rotoscope, Keying and, Matte Generation, Rig and Wire Removal, Paint and Plate Reconstruction, Compositing.

Its founders are distributed worldwide, with artists in the US, UK, Canada and Brazil.

Name: BeDigital
Description:
BeDigital est une structure de post-production spécialisée dans la réalisation d'effets spéciaux numériques.
Depuis 2007, BeDigital et ses infographistes 2D & 3D vous accompagnent dans l'étude, la supervision et la réalisation de vos effets spéciaux numériques.
Passionnés par notre métier, par l'image et par les rapports humains qui se tissent dans les collaborations artistiques, notre créativité et notre expérience sont à votre service et au service de vos images.

Name: The House of Representatives
Description:
Representing a diverse group of directors, editors and artists for episodic, commercial film, digital and experimental work.

The House of Representatives is currently representing: RSA Films, Object & Animal, Ruckus Films, Pulse Films, Native Content, Station Film, Knucklehead, Wild Gift, Monument, Harvest, Cut+Run, and Jamm VFX.

Name: Cumulus VFX
Description: Cumulus VFX is huge supporter of Australian and International independent filmmakers and specialise in developing innovative strategies to support any creative vision. We can collaborate closely with other studios, big or small on any VFX project. Located among the idyllic surrounds of Byron Bay, Cumulus VFX Studios uses custom remote data management software Syclone to ensure efficient and fast data transfer and communication, no matter where you're located. We engage with directors to make your visual effects dreams a reality.

Name: motion capture society
Description:
The Motion Capture Society (MCS) is an international, professional, honorary nonprofit organization dedicated to advancing the arts, sciences, and applications of the motion capture industry.

This society supports people and companies with an expressed interest in the motion capture profession and is committed to enhancing the global state of the motion capture industry. We celebrate everyone from enthusiastic beginners to the industry leaders in every aspect of our community: artists, designers, animators, programmers, directors, producers, hardware and software developers. We celebrate, aggregate, support, train and promote motion capture professionals in their local and global communities. We offer unbiased enthusiastic support of all genres, styles, tools and outlooks. No matter what the format or scope, we tie the whole community together.

Name: cabinet
Description: Still, motion, interactive ...

Name: Come and See Pictures
Description:
Come and See Pictures was founded in 2020 by Joko Anwar (director and screenwriter) and Tia Hasibuan (producer) who have worked together for more than 2 decades in the industry. Their professional chemistry as well as shared vision for the future of cinemas urged them to create a film production house that nourishes the purpose. 

Satan’s Slaves 2: Communion is the first feature length film produced by Come and See Pictures.

The company is based in Jakarta, Indonesia.

Name: Phars Film LLC
Description:
The core competencies of Phars Film are in the distribution and exhibition of Motion Picture entertainment in the Middle East. Representing the majority of leading international studios in the region today our long established name, industry experience, cross-channel distribution network and stake-holding partnerships have made Phars Film the largest Motion Picture distribution network in the Middle East today.

Widely recognized as the pioneer of the cinematic movement in the region, our policy remains to nurture our film distribution and exhibition counterparts and assist them to develop, maintain and capitalize effectively upon their respective markets.

Name: STUDIOS DE MARSEILLE
Description: STUDIOS DE MARSEILLE is a motion pictures and film company based out of POLE MEDIAS BELLE DE MAI 37 RUE GUIBAL, MARSEILLE, France.

Name: Fokys Studio
Description:
Fokys Studio est un studio de cinéma d'animation dans une charmante ville de la région nantaise, Clisson.
Publicité, court métrage, film d'entreprise, sous-traitance sur de la série animé, voici quelques exemples d'activités exercées avec passion dans nos locaux.
N'hésitez pas à nous suivre, ou encore à nous contacter pour tout type de projet !
Un petit mot pour les graphistes adeptes des petites villes ou du télétravail, contactez-nous !

Name: J2F PRODUCTION
Description:
J2F Production est une société de Production Audiovisuelle située à Paris 17. 
Nous sommes divisée en 2 branches distincte : 
- Documentaire (Judiciaire, investigation, jeunesse, sportif, conso, etc...), en partenariat avec France Télévisions, Equidia, Planète CI, etc...
- Jeunesse (Long Métrage, Fictions courtes humoristique, émissions de flux) en partenariat avec Disney Channel, Gulli, Canal J...

Name: Blue Post
Description:
Home to Australia’s leading long-form post-production facilities; Offering technical knowledge, creative flair and a collaborative approach - Blue Post employs the industry’s best artists and state-of-the-art equipment to consistently provide world-class service to the Australian and International market. 

Formed in 2003 by Producer / Post Supervisor, Peter Millington and Editor, Peter Carrodus; the two saw an opportunity to create a boutique facility that was focused on  long-form productions, where quality is first priority. 

With offices in Sydney & Melbourne; Blue Post provides workflow planning data management and rushes transfers, offline editing equipment, visual effects planning and implementation, online editing, colour grading and delivery on all formats from UHD Dolby Vision to the web.

Name: Bow Tie Cinemas
Description: Bow Tie Cinemas is a four-generation, family-owned company. Founded in 1900 by vaudeville impresario B.S. Moss, the company is the oldest theater circuit in North America and is America’s eighth-largest movie theater chain. Bow Tie Cinemas operates 377 screens at 58 locations in five states (CO, CT, MD, NJ, NY & VA).

Name: MJM Post Production
Description:
Basé en région Parisienne, MJM est un studio de post-production offrant une large gamme de services de qualité.
De la localisation (doublage - sous-titrage) au traitement de l'image et du son (mixage, montage, étalonnage, sound design...), nous mettons notre expertise ainsi que notre professionnalisme au service de vos projets.

Based in the Paris area, MJM is a post-production studio offering a wide range of quality services.
From localization (dubbing - subtitling) to image and sound processing (mixing, editing, coloring, sound design...), our expertise and professionalism are at the service of your projects.

Name: RPM
Description:
Creating Bespoke Music for Film, TV and Advertising.

RPM does not provide music for libraries or catalogues. It is dedicated to the creation of Music to Picture using contemporary and conventional techniques.

Recent projects include dramas for BBC1, Mazda and Volvo commercials, Award winning feature and festival films.

Please visit the website to find out more about the music.

Name: LUPIN FILM S.r.l.
Description: Founded in 2005, Lupin Film is an Italian independent production and service company which produces feature films, documentaries, tv-commercials and photographic shoots.

Name: La Manchester
Description: La Manchester és una productora audiovisual de Sabadell (Barcelona) especialitzada en programes de TV, documentals i no-ficció. Els nostres programes estrella són 'Quatre Gats' i 'Planta Baixa', presentats per Ricard Ustrell.

Name: Matchstick Productions
Description: For over 30 years, Matchstick Productions, a world-renowned production company, has specialized in creating award-winning content.  Using state-of-the-art technology, including the most advanced aerial and ground filming equipment available, we are able to bring the clients’ vision to life from concept to finished product. Our expertise extends beyond the camera as we create storyboards and scripts, scout locations and find talent. We will make things as easy as possible for you by taking care of logistics and attaining permits to seeking legal clearances. We deliver the final project in all needed formats from our top of the line editing suites. Hire us for your production and promote your brand in a powerful way.

Name: Films Femmes Méditerranée
Description:
Les Rencontres Films Femmes Méditerranée créées en 2006 à Marseille, ont pour vocation première la découverte des œuvres des réalisatrices des deux rives de la Méditerranée. Elles sont un rendez-vous unique en Europe par leur double caractère : cinéma au féminin, cinéma du Sud. Un cinéma exigeant, souvent dérangeant, fort d’une énergie remarquable où se mêlent dans le drame et la comédie, l’intime et l’Histoire en mouvement. 

Lors de nos Rencontres cinématographiques annuelles, les films que nous présentons, à Marseille et dans des salles de la région, sont sélectionnés pour permettre au public de découvrir la diversité et l'audace de nouvelles réalisatrices d'une trentaine de pays, ou de redécouvrir des réalisatrices remarquables, et de les rencontrer au cours de projections, de tables rondes, de leçons de cinéma, ou de rétrospectives où elles viennent présenter leur démarche.

Depuis 2018, Films Femmes Méditerranée apporte un soutien particulier aux jeunes cinéastes méditerranéennes en organisant une journée professionnelle pour les aider à produire leur film. Ainsi 8 à 10 réalisatrices sont sélectionnées à l’issue d’un appel à projets diffusé sur l’ensemble du bassin méditerranéen et au-delà.
Toutes nos projections sont gratuites pour les publics jeunes, étudiants, sans emploi, ou bénéficiaires des minima sociaux !

Depuis sept ans, nous proposons à des publics éloignés du cinéma des projections gratuites et animons des ateliers d'éducation à l'image pour faciliter les échanges avec les autres, pour sensibiliser à des thématiques sociétales et ouvrir le regard sur un cinéma d’auteure, fait par des femmes de la Méditerranée.

Name: MCM Cine
Description:
ww.mcmcine.com

Productora con amplia trayectoria en la elaboracion, propuesta, implementacion , produccion, post produccion de Imagen & Audio.
Solido manejo financiero, solidez y experiencia.
Sumado a  jovenes e inovadoras visiones, nuestros directores.Misión:Al talento de nuestros directores, que potencian al 100% tus ideas, le sumamos una experiencia 100% satisfaccion garantizada, en la atencion a cliente, solucion de problemas y trabajo pro activo, resultado del cual tu trabajo siempre sera el mejor.

Name: MSP Film Society
Description:
The Film Society of Minneapolis St. Paul is Minnesota’s leading exhibitor of international independent cinema. Our mission is to foster a knowledgeable and vibrant appreciation of the art of film and its power to inform and transform individuals and communities. The Film Society hosts screenings and events year-round at the St. Anthony Main Theatre, and presents the annual Minneapolis St. Paul International Film Festival.

The Minneapolis St. Paul International Film Festival is Minnesota's largest film festival, and a catalyst for artistic discovery and an essential Spring showcase of more than 250 new films from around the globe. Over 17 exhilarating days, the Twin Cities blossoms into an epicenter of cinematic achievement as 45,000 avid film fans converge for hundreds of packed screenings, unforgettable parties and illuminating conversations. MSPIFF’s lineup annually includes films from both intrepid new artists and influential luminaries alike hailing from more than 70 countries.

The 36th Annual Minneapolis St. Paul International Film Festival will take place April 13-29, 2017.

Name: Cinematographer
Description: Cinematographer.com (former Cameraman.com) was created in 2010 in an attempt to organize online information pertaining to professional and amateur video.  Founder Martin Ureta wanted to have a site that could not only feature high quality videos of filmmakers working but would also create a community for creative filmmakers to discuss their work and the work of others. Today the primary channel of Cinematographer.com is the Instagram account Cinematography www.instagram.com/cinematography. We share Behind the Scenes, Filmmaker's Interviews and Gear Reviews.

Name: Festival du Cinéma Espagnol de Nantes
Description: Depuis sa création en 1990, le Festival du Cinéma Espagnol de Nantes est devenu le rendez-vous majeur du cinéma espagnol en France et en Europe. Le Festival propose à un public fidèle (25 000 spectateurs en 2025) 60 longs et courts-métrages inédits dans l’Hexagone (soit environ 250 projections en version originale sous-titrée) et a vocation à faire connaître le cinéma espagnol dans toute sa diversité (fictions, documentaires ou encore films d’animation) à travers des cycles thématiques qui entremêlent actualité sociale contemporaine, sujets historiques et recherche formelle. Le Festival accueille chaque année une quarantaine d’invités (cinéastes, acteurs, écrivains, historiens, etc.). L'édition 2026 sera l'occasion de célébrer différents anniversaires : les 35 ans du Festival, les 25 ans de la Fenêtre basque et les 20 ans de la Soirée du Court-métrage.

Name: Leiden Shorts
Description:
Over the past 15 years, Leiden Shorts (previously known as Leiden International Short Film Experience) has become the second largest short film festival in the Netherlands with submissions from over 80 countries around the globe.

During the four festival days, we screen some of the world's best new short films, alongside a colourful side program of events, lectures, workshops, parties and meetings between filmmakers, the public, and other partners.

Since 2009, Leiden Shorts (formerly known as LISFE) has been run by a diverse team of expats, locals, and is powered by a team of international and Dutch volunteers. Together, we envision Leiden Shorts as both an alternative and sustainable creative space where we can collectively explore the storytelling power that short films have.

As avid promoters of international film, Leiden Shorts aims to create a cultural conversation that can be sustained outside of the festival. We are fundamental believers in cinema as a tool for social change, and want to become an outspoken voice in Leiden’s cultural scene. We fully embrace diversity, not only in culture but also in discipline, medium, and expression.

Above all, Leiden Shorts views the creation of short film as a self-sustaining cycle that both shapes communities while constantly being shaped by the places they emerge from. Our various competitions, side events, and growing collaborations with local museums, collectives, and other international voices are just some of the ways in which we hope to shape the future of short film.

Name: Beirut
Description: Beirut is a production company based in Malmö, Sweden that works mainly with photography and videography. Also taking on editing and larger motion picture projects. Currently consists of Jesper Berg and John Arbén both with long experience in the business.

Name: THE ASSOCIATION OF MOTION PICTURE SOUND (AMPS)
Description:
The Association of Motion Picture Sound (AMPS) is a craft guild made up of 590 of the most imaginative and highly experienced people working in Film, Television and Game sound. 

Our members have been nominated for many awards around the world and include many BAFTA, Oscar, Emmy, and MPSE winners.

Based in the UK, AMPS was founded in 1989. Our mission was to create a space where members could exchange information, solve common problems and keep abreast of rapidly changing technology.

Since then we have grown to include technical demonstrations, talks by prominent industry figures and peers, networking, podcasts, film screenings, mentoring, training and UK wide social events in a busy programme of activities. 

The AMPS awards are prestigious sound awards celebrating the best of Film and TV sound craft and technologies - for the industry, by the industry.

Name: Awesometown Entertainment
Description: Awesometown produces and develops animated and live action entertainment; including feature films, television specials and episodes, direct to DVD content, and Visual Effects elements. International industry expertise has led to content development for audiences all around the world.

Name: PROA, Federació de Productores Audiovisuals
Description:
PROA is a Spanish federation of audiovisual producers founded in 2008. In 2015, with the aim of providing better services to its members, PROA underwent an important structural change with an internal organisation based mainly in sectoral associations.

The Federation includes over 250 production companies and is still expanding and growing. It's made up of seven associations, being five of them sectorial and the two generalist. Sectorial associations in the Federation are, among others:  ProDocs (documentary), ProAnimats (animation), ProFicció (fiction), ProTV (television) and Devicat (videogames). The two generalist associations are APAIB (Balearic Islands) and AVANT (Valencia, Castellon, Alicante).

PROA’s Board of Directors is led by Raimon Masllorens, president of the Federation, and is made up of representatives of all the associations. PROA has also a technical team headed by Montserrat Bou, Director.

The Federation acts as a mediator and representative, as a strategic agent in defence of the  audiovisual sector’s interests both at national and international levels.

PROA functions as a lobby before public institutions and other agents of the industry to favour the global positioning of film and video production as well as to increase its visibility through events, conferences and attending festivals and markets.

The Federation’s main objective is to create an ecosystem to improve its members´ conditions. In addition to this, it generates a variety of information and training spaces accessible to all of them. To this end, PROA has been working during the last years on a thorough investigation of new forms of audiovisual financing.

Name: kaboom productions
Description:

We are woman owned, story igniting, nimble acting, collaborative and genuine. We have vast experience and are always evolving. Awards have been won, but at kaboom, happy clients and working with people we like equal a zillion gold statues. It’s all about good people, even better dogs, great ideas, and excellent work. tobin sanson - director/photographer who specializes in branded storytelling films - anything story & character-driven.

Name: Alan Films
Description:
Gücünü bilgi, deneyim ve yaratıcılıktan alan Alan Films, son teknolojili donanım ve ekipman desteği ile ihtiyaç duyulan her alanda, profesyonel prodüksiyon hizmetleri sunar. Başta firma ve markalar olmak üzere; kurum, kuruluş ya da bireylerin beklenti ve istekleri doğrultusunda prodüksiyon sürecinin her alanında hızlı ve etkili çözümler üretir. 

Hizmet sunduğu kişi ve kurumlara artı değer katmak için tam hizmet prodüksiyon şirketi olarak faaliyet gösteren Alan Films, ihtiyaçların sürekli olarak değişim gösterdiği günümüzde, 21. yüzyılın sektörel dinamiklerini takip ederek ve gelişmiş görüntüleme teknolojilerini kullanarak yüksek standartta kaliteli yapım hizmetleri sunar. 

Şirket Kurucusu ve Yöneticisi Berk Alan’ın kurumsal deneyimi ve zengin portföyü ile marka kimliğini güçlendiren Alan Films başta; Tanıtım Filmi, Reklam Tanıtım Filmi, Kurumsal Film, Dijital Filmler ve Müzik Klibi gibi kısa ve uzun metrajlı tüm filmlerin üretimi için güvenilir ve etik hizmet yaklaşımını sergiler. Film üretim sürecinde; senaryo ve yaratıcı fikir üretim aşamasından çekim, kurgu, montaj, renk düzenleme, görsel efekt, ses miksajı gibi post prodüksiyon sürecine kadar profesyonel hizmet veren Alan Films, Tanıtım Filmi Çekimi, Profesyonel Tanıtım Filmi, Tanıtım Çekimi ve Kurumsal Tanıtım Filmleri gibi film üretimi dışında; ekip ve ekipman kiralama, reji, canlı yayın ve özgün müzik üretimi gibi alanlarda kapsamlı prodüksiyon hizmeti sağlar.

Name: Little Farm
Description: Little Farm is an award-winning creative editorial and visual effects boutique focusing on commercials, features, short films, music videos and emerging media content. Name: BREAKOUT FILMS
Description:
BREAKOUT FILMS Dedication to the finer details is ingrained in our process. From pre-production planning to post-production finesse, we leave no stone unturned. Our commitment extends beyond the glitz and glamour to the nuanced subtleties that elevate a production from good to exceptional.

The success of any film is a collaborative effort. Our team's ability to seamlessly integrate with diverse cultures and teams is reflected in the regional and international collaborations we've fostered. In a world where each frame matters, where every second on screen is an opportunity to captivate, we offer more than a service – we offer an unwavering commitment to transforming visions into timeless masterpieces. Our 30-year journey is not just a testament to our past; it's a promise for the future – a future where each project is an opportunity to push boundaries, tell compelling stories, and create cinematic magic that resonates across continents.

With over 15+ yrs of specialized experience in this imagery eloquence, our team has contributed and delivered high–quality visual effects for award-winning projects and episodic televisions. We make sure to roll up the sleeves only after the shot outlives our client’s note, so we work for your goals 24*7 and successfully manages projects and pipelines. Regarding the VFX paths, whether it is an element, creative transition, or atmospheric effects, we seamlessly integrate realistic visuals and offer acceptable production quality work. 
Our accomplished professionals and seasoned VFX artists provide innovative solutions for technically challenging projects; they prove that we are a progressive choice for extensive creative projects. We foster a great working culture with solidarity and fun that makes us enjoy the work and bring immense value to the projects.
