Name: Citizen Film
Description: Citizen Film is a not-for-profit production company dedicated to crafting documentaries with care and dignity. We collaborate with our partners - including civic institutions, community organizations, and social entrepreneurs - to tell stories that inspire reflection and action.

Name: 93 METROS
Description:
93 Metros is a production company that specializes in high-end feature and television documentary formats based upon an unique and exclusive ability to access into the trickiest clandestine worlds from all around the globe. In a nutshell, 93 Metros is access and immersion, and its ethos, information, action and emotion; stories by all means.

We are the producers of "Clandestino", a series directed and presented by war reporter David Beriain, who is also a founder of the company. Clandestino was selected twice as one of the best three current affairs programs in the world by the Real Screen Awards. This series is the best example of the philosophy that moves our productions. With its unprecedented access to clandestine worlds such as the Sinaloa cartel, the FARC guerrillas, the rhino poachers in Mozambique or the Hmong militias in Laos, among others, it is our best example of journalism turned thriller.

Our work has also been recognized with an Emmy nomination in the category of Outstanding Investigative Journalism in Spanish for our documentary “Latinos on Death Row”.

We have co produced with The Mediapro Studios  “El Palmar de Troya”, a documentary series that is being recognized as the best non-fictional series premiered in Spain this year. 

One of the pillars of 93 Metros is the certainty that good stories can be found everywhere. We have traveled half of the world looking for them. But sometimes we have found the best in everyday life and also around brands and the corporate world.
 
 Our territory is reality, the most radical, intense and exciting playground that a storyteller can find.

Name: The Exchange.
Description: The Exchange is a leading worldwide sales, finance  and production company committed to creating strong relationships between filmmakers, film financiers and distributors through the exchange of product, information and commerce. Created by veteran sales executive Brian O’Shea, the company specializes in high quality, commercial films that appeal to North American audiences and the ever-evolving global film market. Over the past nine years, The Exchange has acquired, financed, produced and/or sold over 200 films ranging in budgets from $5 million to $90 million, including studio films from Disney, Sony, Fox, Paramount, Warner Bros., Universal, Amazon, and Netflix. Such films include Universal’s 2 Guns, starring Denzel Washington and Mark Wahlberg (sold in collaboration with the exclusive sales agent, Foresight Unlimited); Netflix’s Shimmer Lake and Irreplaceable You; Sundance Award Winners Blaze, directed by Ethan Hawke, and We the Animals, directed by Jeremiah Zagar; Sundance and Independent Spirit nominees and winners, The Killing of Two Lovers, Spree,  Dear White People, The Spectacular Now, Obvious Child; as well as, prominent documentary films, like, The Biggest Little Farm, Gleason, and Street Gang: How We Got to Sesame Street. Its first production, The Stand In, starring Drew Barrymore, was released by Saban in December of 2020.

Name: Deutsche Filmakademie e.V.
Description:
Die Deutsche Filmakademie mit Sitz in Berlin wurde am 8. September 2003 gegründet und vereint inzwischen über 2200 Mitglieder aus allen künstlerischen Sparten des deutschen Films.

Wir sind mit der Durchführung des Deutschen Filmpreises betraut, sind Veranstalter des Nachwuchspreises First Steps, fördern im Rahmen unserer Bildungsprogramme die Auseinandersetzung mit Film als Kunstform im schulischen und außerschulischen Kontext, sind Initiatoren der Veranstaltungsreihe Mein Film, den Werkstattgesprächen, des Podcasts Close Up und vielen weiteren Aktivitäten, die den Austausch und die Diskussion um das Filmschaffen in Deutschland und Europa unter künstlerischen, wie ökonomischen Gesichtspunkten fördern.

Die Deutsche Filmakademie – das zentrale Forum für Filmschaffende in Deutschland – ist ein unabhängiger, gemeinnütziger Verein, der sich ausschließlich durch Mitgliedsbeiträge und Spenden finanziert. Nachwuchsförderung und gesellschafts- und filmpolitisches Engagement spielen bei unseren Satzungszielen eine große Rolle.

Name: Scarabeo Entertainment
Description:
Film Production Company

Scarabeo is devoted to authenticity at any costs in the stories it tells, in the places and in the characters of people. And people, their experiences and fates, are at the center of every story.

Name: BRAFFTV - Brazilian Film & TV Festival of Toronto (Festival de Cinema Brasileiro em Toronto)
Description:
O BRAFFTv - Brazilian Film & TV Festival of Toronto (Festival de Cinema Brasileiro em Toronto) é fruto de uma parceria entre a empresa brasileira Puente e pela canadense Southern Mirrors. A equipe conta com profissionais de diversos setores – cineastas, produtores, empresários, historiadores, etc.
 
Várias ações são realizadas no festival: mostra convidada e competitiva, pré-BRAFFTv, seminário, coquetel de abertura, festa de encerramento, visita técnica a um estúdio de cinema, encontro de networking da delegação brasileira com profissionais da indústria audiovisual canadense, cerimônia de premiação, etc.
 
O BRAFFTv também apresenta o UpTo3´, mostra paralela ao Festival, com exibição de animações e filmes com até 3 minutos para novas mídias e Pink Brazil, mostra de diversidade sexual.
 
O Festival faz parte do Fórum dos Festivais, está registrado na Ancine e faz parte do Guia Brasileiro de Festivais de Cinema e Vídeo 2011, publicado pela Associação Cultural Kinoforum.

Name: Windy Films
Description:
We tell stories of impact and innovation through film.

Our clients and collaborators aim to influence the world, or a piece of it, for the better. They are feeding the homeless, empowering local veterans, providing affordable health care, eliminating malaria, protecting fish habitats and shutting down coal power plants. Our first full-length documentary is now on PBS.

Name: MAGMACX
Description:
The future will not just emerge, it will be shaped by cultural changes to be spread by those who defy boundaries.
Image should no longer be conceptualized as a stylish expression but as a creative force, an act of resistance for many subcultures. 
As narrative strategists, we help brands interpret new future languages in a more sensitive and meaningful way because we believe in aesthetics and narrative as powerful transformative tools.
People change things. New narratives shape them.

Name: Traffic Film and Video Production
Description:
Traffic is a one-stop video content creation shop offering creative solutions no matter the budget.

Traffic’s experienced in-house team of producers, directors and editors offer a range of cost-effective services tailored to your project’s needs,  outcomes and budget.

With over 15 years' experience creating content all over Australia and internationally, we've got the goods when it comes to: producing, shooting, directing and editing TV commercials, corporate videos, events, online content, animation and motion graphics.

You name it; we’ve been there, done that and kicked the goal. From pre-production right the way through to post-production we will handle all aspects of your project.

Traffic has offices in Brisbane's West End and Redfern, Sydney. Our Brisbane office is kitted out with two edit suites, plus all the other bells and whistles like a meeting room, lounge and a kitchen with beer and wine in the fridge. The Sydney office also has edit facilities and a fridge full of beer and wine.

Traffic provides the total package to facilitate productions for the international advertising, film and content industry. Whatever your project, we offer our clients great value, awesome locations and a diverse and experienced talent pool of cast and crew.

Name: ONEIGHTY
Description:
ONEIGHTY is a production company founded by a group of former professional professional athletes. We pride ourselves in finding the sweet spot where sport, entertainment and art collide, aiming to go where few have gone before.

Collectively we have nearly two decades of experience at the elite level in professional sport, so it allows us to connect with talent authentically and go to new depths of storytelling.

We’ve worked with some of the worlds leading brands & creative agencies, and continuously aim to push the bar to create purpose driven film that can enact positive change.

We also feature the largest on-site outdoor shooting space in the area.  Grumman Studios is just a short trip from Manhattan and minutes from Republic Field airport.  As a location, Long Island has hundreds of communities representing nearly every suburban setting, beaches and marinas, vineyards, farms, wooded areas, office buildings and industrial parks, etc.  Nearby accommodations include world-class hotels and furnished house or apartment rentals for every budget.

Name: EATSA Art & Tourism Film Festival
Description:
The EATSA Art & Tourism Film Festival aims to honour and celebrate creativity, innovation, and change initiatives, that enhance the knowledge of the world and the sense of appreciation for the human essence and environmental beauty.

We strive for a tourism industry that goes beyond a rhetorical approach to sustainability, in a shift from transactional to transformational. Our view is driven by an unwavering belief that positive outcomes result from an endless shifting process of human mindsets, desires, knowledge, experiences, and consciousness. This aspirational dimension is framed on sustainability theories and practices that foster interconnectedness between humans and nature, that is not limited to avoiding damage but has a positive impact on our destinations and ultimately in our communities and our lives.

Name: ICE THEATERS
Description: Live the ultimate immersive experience | More info on www.icetheaters.com

Name: Trésor Films
Description:
Dès le début des années 2000, grâce aux courts-métrages, Alain Attal a pu rassembler autour de lui une équipe de jeunes réalisateurs, comédiens et auteurs talentueux parmi lesquels Gilles Lellouche, Guillaume Canet ou encore Philippe Lefebvre, qu’il a naturellement accompagnés pour leurs premiers longs dans une envie commune d’un cinéma populaire de qualité.

Rapidement, le cercle des talents du Trésor s’est élargi avec des réalisateurs confirmés tels que Nicole Garcia, Radu Mihaileanu ou encore Maïwenn, dont les films, à la fois succès critique et public, ont obtenus de nombreuses récompenses nationales et internationales.
Dans une quête perpétuelle de nouveaux regards, Alain Attal a également produit de nombreux premiers films, participant à l’émergence de nouveaux talents comme Romain Lévy, Régis Roinsard, Jeanne Herry, Thomas Bidegain, Stéphanie Di Giusto ou encore Laurent Lafitte.
Avec plus de 30 films produits à ce jour, cumulant près de 30 millions d’entrées et lauréats de prix prestigieux, Trésor Films continue de défendre une certaine vision du cinéma : indépendant, exigeant et populaire.

Name: Sonilab Studios
Description:
Sonilab Studios is a Catalan company founded in Sabadell with more than a decade of experience designing sound in the audiovisual sector. It has 1,500 m² of facilities and the best technology for making the production and post-production process in its projects as easy as possible, achieving the highest levels of quality and efficiency.

Sonilab Studios is a business project born and created by the founder of the legendary Urquinaona Studios (1988) offering you a team of highly qualified professionals to provide the best service, giving you the creativity to make your project unique. The company is run by a sound engineer with more than 25 years’ experience in the music and audiovisual industry who pioneered sound recording with mobile units in Spain. In recent years, its know-how has been enriched with the incorporation of staff with a high level of knowledge and proven experience in the sector.

Créée en 2019 par deux jeunes passionnés de cinéma et aux parcours riches en expériences et diversifiés, Rebel Films est une maison de production qui assure tout type de productions cinématographiques et télévisuelles.
Rebel Films est dotée d’une équipe professionnelle, experte en matière de cinéma et d’audiovisuel, qui assure la production en utilisant les dernières technologies et en respectant les normes cinématographiques.


Film, Series, Émission, Post-production, Publicite, Clip video, Graphisme, Photographie, Evénementiel, Vidéo Promotionnelle, Prise De Vue Aérienne, Location De Matériel

Name: The Fridge, part of THE PACK
Description:
The Fridge.tv has grown into a creative hot-shop of the post-production scene. A company increasingly sought after by high-profile clients in the advertising and broadcast industry because it is known to be big enough to offer cutting-edge facilities while still small enough to be fun and full of fresh ideas.

The Fridge.tv is a specialist in visual effects, motion graphics and 2D/3D animation. We provide everything you expect and more from a leading post-production company. Seeing that we are a medium-sized independent, we always work together as a close-knit team and give all our clients the individual attention they deserve.

We are passionate about technology and creativity. Together with our clients and partners, we develop new and refreshing ideas. Driven by technology and supported by our expertise, we create fascinating and innovative stuff.

This creative collaboration within our company and also towards our clients is what our growing reputation is based upon. Every member of our team has skills they excel in, and because we are constantly exchanging new ideas that we are enthusiastic about means that our clients typically come away with results beyond their expectations. Furthermore, the happy atmosphere, comfortable surroundings and the great hospitality don't go amiss either.

Name: Valladolid City Of Film
Description:
La Valladolid Film Commission es una oficina técnica pública, integrada en la Sociedad Mixta para la Promoción del Turismo de Valladolid (cuyos socios son: Ayuntamiento de Valladolid -55%-, Diputación Provincial -15%-, Cámara Oficial de Comercio e Industria -15%- y Asociación provincial  de empresarios de hostelería -15%-), que se encarga de asistir a las productoras audiovisuales (cine, TV, publicidad, animación, digital) que desean desarrollar sus proyectos en la ciudad de Valladolid y su provincia, proporcionando, igualmente, la información logística, artística y profesional necesaria para rodar en cualquier localización seleccionada, en todas las fases desde la pre a la post producción.


Creada a finales de 2014 dentro del plan de acción para la promoción del turismo internacional de la Sociedad Mixta de Turismo, siguiendo un modelo consolidado en todo el mundo desde hace décadas, desde su puesta en marcha Valladolid Film Commission forma parte activa de la Spain Film Commission -SFC-(entidad nacional de promoción de rodajes), y desde octubre de 2016 ostenta una de sus Vicepresidencias, especialmente dedicada al denominado “Turismo cinematográfico”, y (gracias a la colaboración con la Fundación Casa de la India, radicada también en Valladolid) a la promoción de la relaciones con las diferentes industrias audiovisuales de la India, primer país del mundo en número de producciones.

Objetivos
El principal objetivo de Valladolid Film Commission, no obstante, es promocionar Valladolid y su provincia como localización de cualesquiera proyectos audiovisuales locales, nacionales o internacionales, con la finalidad inmediata de generar actividad industrial local, y paralelamente promover un nuevo nicho de actividad turística. Para ello, el primer paso es contar con un ecosistema productivo profesional de base amplia, que incluya no solo localizaciones variadas, accesibles y asequibles, sino también profesionales y empresas.

Name: In N Outs Media Pvt Ltd
Description:
Welcome to IN N Outs Pvt Ltd, Kolkata's first 360 degree post production studio! With a comprehensive suite of services, we specialize in bringing your creative visions to life. From inception to execution, we handle every aspect of the production process with precision and expertise.

At IN N Outs Pvt Ltd, we pride ourselves on our diverse range of offerings. Whether you need assistance with script writing, storyboarding, editing, or on-set visual effects supervision, we've got you covered. Our team is equipped to handle high-end feature animation and effects work, clean-ups, 3D previsualization, concept art, pre-production support, motion tracking, and final compositing.

But that's not all! We're more than just a post-production studio. Our capabilities extend to commercial and digital advertisement, corporate and social events, line production of ads, short films, and much more. Plus, our expertise in digital marketing ensures that your content reaches the right audience and makes a lasting impact.

With a commitment to excellence and innovation, we strive to exceed our clients' expectations on every project. Let us be your creative partner in bringing your ideas to fruition. Get in touch with us today and let's turn your vision into reality with IN N Outs Pvt Ltd.

Name: KAHWA Entertainment
Description:
KAHWA Entertainment is led by the NATIONAL AWARD winning Producer-Actor Sanjay Suri with over 18 years of experience in the Indian Motion Picture Industry who has been at the forefront of the current revolution of Independent Cinema in India.

Sanjay has produced 8 feature films under various banners like Kahwa Entertainment, Anticlock Films & Four Front Films, including the path-breaking My Brother Nikhil that dealt with the Stigma of HIV and homosexuality for the first time in India. I AM Afia, Megha, Abhimanyu, Omar, was producer’s 3rd feature film that won 2 prestigious National Awards. It was one of India’s largest crowd-sourced film with over 400 co-producers from over 40 cities across the world. Producer’s 5th feature film project CHAURANGA (Four Colours), Winner Grand Jury Prize for Best Feature at IFFLA ( Los Angeles ) 2015, Winner Best Film at ‘MAMI’ The MUMBAI FILM FESTIVAL (INDIA GOLD) 2014, winner Incredible India Award as the best co-production project at Film Bazaar 2011 & the winner of Goteborg International Script development fund. Produced & released Onir’s 'SHAB' & Samir Soni's directorial debut 'My Birthday Song' (a psychological thriller) produced by Sanjay Suri & Samir Soni.

Sanjay has participated in various International Co-Production markets & festivals.

Sanjay has served as a Jury member at MAMI (Mumbai Academy of Moving Images, 2012) and as a Jury Member at the prestigious Dubai International Film Festival (2013) feature category in the ‘Muhr Arab’ Section.

Kahwa ventured into sales & distribution with films of cinematic excellence. The team has been associated with films like the National Award winner & India’s Oscar selection “Village Rockstars” by Rima Das, National Award winner “Bulbul Can Sing’ by Rima Das. Team Kahwa released the Japanese Palme d’Or winner SHOPLIFTERS , Chinese film ASH IS PUREST WHITE , Egyptian award winning film YOMEDDINE and Cannes Jury Prize winner 'LES MISERABLES' in India.

New Kore VFX is a visual effects studio with 29 years of experience delivering post-production services for films, series, ads, and digital content. We collaborate with production houses and studios worldwide.

Our services cover the full VFX pipeline, including compositing, rotoscoping, paint, matchmove, CG, and on-set supervision. We support projects of all scales and ensure that every shot aligns with the visual goals of the production.

We collaborate closely with clients to understand project needs, maintain deadlines, and deliver consistent results. Our team follows secure workflows and adapts to changing production requirements.

New Kore continues to support storytellers with dependable service and a focus on getting the work done right.

For our members, we show loads of free movies in private cinemas throughout the year. We also put on other events, from excellent parties to educational opportunities. All this is to encourage more socialising and exchange of information & ideas, which is what a society is all about! For non-members and prospective members we have a few open events, including our bi-annual sponsored membership drive party. If you are not yet a VES member, please join the mailing list to get notifications of any upcoming open events by contacting us at vesindiasection@gmail.com

Name: MISP - Master in International Screenwriting and Production
Description:
At our Master in International Screenwriting and Production, whose Italian edition has been running since 2000, we have trained young Italian professionals, a relevant number of which have been highly successful in several areas of this industry and in many countries. 
With the same passion for education - and connection with the industry - we have decided to launchin 2016  a new International program focused on Screenwriting and Production, that in its first edition has gathered brilliant students from 14  countries, so different as United States and Malaysia, Colombia and France, Russia and Lebanon
We believe that in the show business (as in any other business) good ideas are important. But, like Ed Catmull, the visionary head of Pixar Animation Studios, we also believe that ideas are not enough: people --well trained, able to think, to evaluate, to choose and to create-- are even more important for success.
And a product of success, in the entertainment industry, can define who we are, because it defines what we love. And those who can move the human heart can change the world.

Name: CINEMECCANICA SPA
Description:
Cinemeccanica is one of the world`s pioneers in the production of Cinema equipment. The company based its own tradition on a long series of worldwide success. Leader in developing cinema technology, like projectors and sound equipment, Cinemeccanica is present in 90 countries.

Since 2004, CINEMECCANICA has been involved in a re-organization process to be part of the digital cinema, with an improvement in the internal team skills and signed a long-term partnership with Barco, the digital cinema projectors worldwide leader. In the last years, CINEMECCANICA designed and produced a suite of products, named CINECLOUD, which includes the cinema server, the TMS (Theatre Management System), the videoscaler 4K and the laser light source adaptable to any DLP cinema projector.

Name: LA FARÁNDULA ACTORES S.L.

Name: NARRA POST-PRODUCTION STUDIOS BY WILDSOUND
Description: Narra Post-Production Studios is an award-winning and internationally-recognized creative and technical post-production facility located in the heart of Manila's entertainment industry. For more than a decade, we stand proud as the longest-running post-production and the only accredited Filipino partner of Dolby (Atmos Cinema, Atmos Home Entertainment, Atmos Music), and member of the Trusted Partner Network. We cater to productions of every scale, from local independent film features to global high-end blockbusters and TV.  That means we offer our team members and clients the best of both worlds: the tight-knit culture of creatives with access to the specialities and scale of global output. Our clients come to us to build their films through sound design, online and offline editing, color grading, Dolby Atmos mastering, and audio and video restoration.

Name: Centrum Kultury Filmowej im. Andrzeja Wajdy
Description:
Uchwałą Rady Miasta Stołecznego Warszawy w lipcu 2018 roku powołane zostało Centrum Kultury Filmowej im. Andrzeja Wajdy. Działalność merytoryczną CKF rozpoczęło w maju 2019 roku.

Celem Centrum jest kształtowanie świadomej publiczności poprzez prezentację filmów oraz promowanie filmowych projektów artystycznych. CKF służy rozwojowi kultury filmowej, jej upowszechnianiu, ożywianiu i inicjowaniu. Kultura filmowa to rozpowszechnianie najnowszych i klasycznych dzieł kinematografii, wnikliwa ich analiza, dyskusje o nurtach, stylach i tendencjach w kinie, a także piśmiennictwo - od scenariuszy po recenzje filmowe. Kultura filmowa to także rozumienie przeszłości kraju czy miasta dzięki obrazom filmowym i budowanie wspólnoty na podstawie doświadczania kina. Kultura filmowa to też innowacje i technologiczne odkrycia oraz poszukiwanie granic realności: od dziewiętnastowiecznego biopleografu po doświadczenia XR i rzeczywistość immersyjną. Kultura filmowa to wreszcie edukacja: otwieranie się na film i rozmowa o świecie poprzez kino.

Description:
Animation and Transmendia Productions

Dal 1993 anno della sua fondazione l’attività di Gertie per la storia dei suoi soci è Ricerca e Formazione, Produzione, Distribuzione, Servizi Tecnici, Editoria di qualità.

Per Cinema e Televisione (Non Fiction): progettazione, realizzazione, finalizzazione di filmati con qualsiasi tecnica di animazione, anche frutto della propria ricerca, per scopi pubblicitari, promozionali, istituzionali e di comunicazione d’impresa.

Per Cinema e Televisione (Fiction): ideazione, produzione, realizzazione, post-produzione di serie televisive, special, lungometraggi in animazione con ricerca di nuove tecniche per pubblico sia di intrattenimento educational sia multitarget .

Per l’ Editoria: ideazione, progettazione e realizzazioni editoriali per periodici, libri, multimedia, giochi interattivi. Anche derivati da serie o film di animazione.

Name: Glasgow Short Film Festival
Description:
Glasgow Short Film Festival, the largest competitive short film festival in Scotland, champions new film talent by providing an annual showcase and meeting point for new and established Scottish and international filmmakers, industry delegates and the local audience. Our programme celebrates diverse forms of cinematic expression, whether fiction, documentary, animation or artists’ moving image, and foregrounds disruptive, ground-breaking work that transgresses the boundaries of conventional narrative film.

GSFF is a friendly and inclusive festival in which the work of emerging Scottish filmmakers is presented in the context of an international programme. We believe that international collaboration is vital for Scottish filmmakers. GSFF not only advocates the importance of short film in progressing future generations of filmmakers, but provides the meeting-place where collaboration can begin.

GSFF’s core programme comprises international and Scottish competitions. New talent is supported through a programme of learning and networking events, including panel discussions, workshops and one-to-one sessions. GSFF curates unique special programmes on particular movements or filmmakers of international importance, and hosts parties and live performances throughout the festival week.

Name: Solita Films
Description: SOLITA FILMS has been created with a company policy focusing on creativity and development of thought provoking feature films, to be financed internationally, and aiming for an international distribution fulfilling the demands of sales agents, distributors and audience. Our aim is to produce artistically daring and commercially appealing films for the global marketplace.

Name: Voyage Visuals
Description:
Voyage is a full-service video agency, specializing in everything from strategy/creative to production and post-production services. Whether you need a video and don't know where to start, or have a full-fledged concept and script — we are here for you. We create digital commercials, videos, and documentaries for the web, TV, and social media.

This is where the Voyage begins.

Name: Dokumalia Producciones Audiovisuales
Description: Expediciones al Himalaya, alpinismo, escalada deportiva, grandes desafíos, streaming de pruebas deportivas o algo tan cercano como las carreras por montaña han sido nuestros escenarios protagonistas. #Storytelling, #BrandenContent, #RRSSmedia, #HistoriasHumanas, #Factual, #Reality, #Documental, #TVcontents.

Name: GEMS Vancouver
Description: Gender Equity in Media Society Vancouver (GEMS) is a member-based organization committed to furthering gender equity in film and television. Previously named Women in Film and Television Vancouver (WIFTV), GEMS incorporated in 1989 as a not-for-profit society registered in British Columbia. By addressing systemic barriers, GEMS works towards supporting more inclusive, representative media.

Name: Ozone Films
Description:
Our mission is to connect the things that make us human to the brands that empower them through engaging visuals & storytelling. We believe this is how we make our impact on the world – working and partnering with brands that improve the lives of everyone!

We're a video and animation production agency specializing in guerrilla filmmaking dedicated to creating content that engages audiences on a human level and creates new levels of success for growing brands. Whether we're creating content to communicate a start-up's vision in order to close a funding round or developing a comprehensive content campaign, our flexible teaming and specialized approach has meant that startups, tech, apparel, hospitality and lifestyle brands across the globe have trusted us to bring their brand image to new heights – and we've done it time and time again. We work tirelessly to generate outstanding returns that elevate each client's mission in every collaboration.

Name: DOCUBOX EADFF
Description: We exist to enable talented, driven, focused and accountable East African artists to produce unique films that unearth new realities and cross trans-national boundaries. Through training, development and production grants, screenings for people who love documentary films, we promote East African filmmakers and share their unique stories with the world through creative documentary.

Name: Integrated Production
Description:
A Saudi based company that creates and invests in a diversified portfolio of film production related businesses, placing Saudi Arabia’s content firmly on the global visual entertainment map.

An ecosystem of production and production services, premium content and stories/talents development, and a digital content platform.

www.fwdfilms.com
https://www.youtube.com/c/QutrobENT

Name: Setucom Studio
Description: Welcome to our design-based motion graphics company in Ahmedabad - where we turn your ideas into stunning animations. We like our green teas and our indoor plants as much as we like shooting, designing, and animating beautiful pieces of work. Our team of skilled animators and designers are like a group of superheroes, but instead of capes, we wear stylish graphic tees and sip chai instead of coffee. We're all about creating visually stunning and engaging animations that capture the essence of your brand and help you stand out in the digital world. Follow us to see our latest projects and find out why working with us is more fun than a ride on a rickshaw in the rain.

Name: OpenEyes Film
Description:
OpenEyes Film è una casa di produzione video, attiva da diversi anni nel campo dell’ideazione e della produzione di programmi e serie tv nei settori di entertainment e infotainment, video aziendali corporate, magazine tematici e format specifici per il web.

Partendo dallo sviluppo creativo del concept con il cliente, OpenEyes Film sviluppa una specifica strategia di storytelling del prodotto che, attraverso la progettazione degli storyboard, approda infine alla regia e alla produzione.

Un servizio a 360° nell’ambito della produzione video, che in ogni fase tiene conto delle esigenze dei clienti, assicurando loro l’elevata qualità del prodotto finale. 

Azienda dinamica e creativa, OpenEyes Film realizza anche produzioni video per magazine tematici, libri e home video: specializzata nell'editoria food, attualmente l'azienda si occupa della realizzazione delle due prestigiose riviste culinarie Cotto e Mangiato e Mela Verde. All'interno della sede principale, inoltre, è presente uno spazio cucina super attrezzato, set ideale per foto, video shooting ed eventi di food art.

OpenEyes Film is a video production company, with a long experience in ideating and producing programs and TV series, corporate videos, thematic magazines and specific web formats.  

Starting from the creative development of the concept in collaboration with the customer, OpenEyes Film develops a specific product storytelling strategy up to the direction and the production. 

A 360 ° service in the field of video production to ensure a high quality final product.  A dynamic and creative company, OpenEyes Film also produces videos for thematic magazines, books and home videos: specialized in food publishing, currently the company deals with the creation of the two prestigious culinary magazines Cotto and Mangiato and Mela Verde. Furthermore, in the main building there is a super-equipped kitchen space, an ideal set for photos, video shooting and food art events.

Name: IFA PICTURES
Description: Independent Film Production Company

Name: HUACE TV & FILMS
Description:
Established in October 2005, Huace Media is a creative cultural enterprise dedicated to the production and distribution of film and TV contents. Its wholly-owned subsidiaries include Golden Globe Pictures Co., Ltd, JinXi Film & TV Co., Ltd and DaCe Advertising Co., Ltd. Huce is not only one of the largest and most powerful private film and TV companies in China. It is also the first batch of Key Enterprises of National Culture Export approved by the Ministry of Commerce, Ministry of Culture, State Administration of Radio, Film and Television (SARFT) and General Administration of Press and Publication in China.

In October 2010, the company completes its IPO on Chinext and aggresively expanding its business in the entertainment industry.

Description:
MOOD Content | Produtora audiovisual

Name: Lucky Day
Description:
Lucky Day is a post-production studio that believes in the power of collaboration, and we have built our roster of incredibly talented editors, colorists, VFX artists and post producers to ensure that the project you want becomes the project we make.
 
We consistently execute premium work while remaining nimble in our approach to the individual resource demands of each project. From concept through delivery for social campaigns to feature-length projects, when we collaborate it’s always your Lucky Day.

Name: Kalispéra
Description:
Ti diamo il benvenuto in Kalispéra.

Realizziamo video integrati alla tua campagna di comunicazione, spot aziendali e ancora video emozionali per lavorare sull’identità del brand. Lo facciamo a stretto contatto con te, seguendoti in ogni passo del processo, fino alla sua resa finale. Non ci fermiamo mai, e per questo motivo abbiamo deciso di estendere i nostri servizi nell’area dello streaming.

Con noi potrai organizzare lezioni, webinar o eventi in live streaming, tutto con il sostegno costante del nostro team di professionisti.
Shaping Your Video significa offrire un servizio fatto su misura per te.

Raccontaci la tua storia, e insieme faremo il resto.

Name: Ardmore Sound, Ardmore Studios, Ireland
Description:
Ardmore Sound has been providing Sound Post Production facilities and talent for Film and Television since 1995. Based on the Ardmore Studios lot just south of Dublin, Ardmore Sound is home to Ireland's only Dolby licensed feature film mixing theatre and Ireland's only purpose built foley recording studio. We have worked on Irish, UK, European and US productions including sound design, foley, ADR and mixing for director's such as John Boorman, Neil Jordan, Oliver Hirschbiegal, Rodrigo García, Lenny Abrahamson, John Carney and Liv Ullmann.

In 2010 Ardmore Sound merged with Ireland's leading Post Production facility, Screen Scene. That same year both companies were responsible for all the sound and picture post on Season 1 of HBO's Game of Thrones. Since then we have worked on major television series such as Ripper Street: Season 2 (BBC), Moonfleet (SKY), Ice-cream Girls (ITV), The Widower (ITV), Loving Miss Hatto (BBC) and Haughey (RTE).

Today Ardmore Sound boasts the most experienced pool of sound talent and facilities between the two companies. At Ardmore Sound in Ardmore Studios we have the Main Stage for feature mixing and ADR recording, The Foley Stage and several 5.1 ProTools HD equipped Sound Design rooms.

At Screen Scene, in the heart of Dublin, we have two purpose-built Dolby licensed Mix Theatres, Centre Stage 1 and Centre Stage 2, for feature film, feature documentary and TV drama mixing, the ADR Studio equipped with ISDN and Source Connect for local and remote ADR sessions, and 4 more 5.1 ProTools HD equipped Sound Design rooms.

Name: Romulus Entertainment
Description:
Launched in 2016, Romulus Entertainment is an independent production company that produces and finances original film and television content. Romulus Entertainment is founded upon the principles of efficiency, timeliness, and selectivity while still creating transcendent, thought-provoking material. 

Romulus Entertainment strives to create exceptional content at any budget level. We provide filmmakers the resources and the freedom to help bring their distinctive visions to reality. We aspire to tell stories that expose, inspire, and challenge the complexities of life, not merely to entertain, but to provoke an everlasting effect on those that experience them.

Name: Asia Pacific Screen Awards
Description:
The Asia Pacific Screen Awards (APSA) are the region’s highest accolade in film, where cinematic excellence shines.

Established in 2007, the Asia Pacific Screen Awards are the region’s highest accolade in film where cinematic excellence shines. With films from 78 countries and areas in the region, APSA honours filmmaking that best reflects its cultural origins and the diversity of the Asia Pacific.

APSA is an international cultural program presented by the Asia Pacific Screen Academy. It was established with endorsement from UNESCO and FIAPF-International Federation of Film Producers Associations.

Now in its second decade, APSA has solidified itself as a globally-recognised event that is a defining part of the international film calendar. Nearly 3000 films have featured in competition and while they cover varied genres, styles and scope, they have all been united by their diversity. Each film tells its own unique story in its own way, from its own country of origin.

Name: Yatecasting
Description:
Yatecasting es el gran portal de castings on line a nivel mundial para publicidad, cine, televisión, teatro, etc.. 
Un espacio sin intermediarios que evita los largos procesos de preselección de candidatos para anuncios o campañas publicitarias.
El casting on line es una herramienta de apoyo imprescindible para aquellas campañas que requieran una fase previa de selección. La rapidez, tanto en el acceso y selección de candidatos, como en la disponibilidad de la información garantizan una respuesta ágil y eficaz en un proceso de selección.
Además con nuestro sistema de avisos la comunicación cliente-candidato es inmediata. Puedes activar los avisos por SMS y por email si te han seleccionado para un casting o se ha publicado un nuevo casting con el cual tu perfil concuerda.
Yatecasting no es una agencia de selección, es un espacio que se limita a poner en contacto modelos y/o actores con agencias, productoras, escuelas de formación y agencias garantizando la confidencialidad y la protección de todos los datos de nuestros usuarios registrados.
En Yatecasting trabajamos para ampliar las posibilidades de la web.

Name: Overclock
Description: Prod. service | Events | Movies | Videoclips | TVSeries | Commercials

Name: O'Brother Distribution
Description:
Our Benelux film distribution company operates directly in Belgium, Netherlands and Luxembourg. Our aim is to select and bring to Benelux audiences original, quality national and international movies and to provide the proper means, experience and enthusiasm in their marketing. 

O’BROTHER distribution was created in september 2009 by the film producers Jacques-Henri and Olivier Bronckart, who felt there was a demand for such specific distribution on the Belgian market. Although totally independent from our sister companies VERSUS production, created by the two brothers back in 1999, and the Tax Shelter company INVER INVEST, we work hand in hand with their teams whenever synergies can be made and share offices in Liège and Brussels. 

Our goal is to become the privileged local partner for the directors, producers and international sales agents who entrust us with their work, by offering them efficiency, transparency and a true dedication to each film we distribute through all rights : theatrical, video and TV.

Name: UCLA Professional Programs School of TFT
Description: Taught by top experts and leaders working in the entertainment industry, Professional Programs at the UCLA School of Theater, Film and Television offers numerous graduate-level, non-degree courses modeled after UCLA TFT’s world-renowned M.F.A. curriculum.

Name: OMAJA
Description:
Omaja is a film production company based in Lisbon, Portugal.
Our mission is to give voice to new authors and embrace projects that we consider culturally relevant and geographically decentralized.

Name: SIDERAL
Description:
Sideral es un estudio de producción, distribución y ventas internacionales de cine independiente, que apoya al cine de autor aportando elementos comerciales que hacen más atractivas las producciones para la audiencia. 

Nuestro objetivo es satisfacer al público más fiel a las salas a través de contenidos cautivadores y narrativas universales, sin dejar de lado tendencias de vanguardia que conecten con el lenguaje y los impulsos de las nuevas generaciones.

En Sideral acompañamos al talento, ya sea nuevo o consagrado, en la maravillosa aventura de hacer cine.

Name: Hamptons International Film Festival
Description: The Hamptons International Film Festival was founded to celebrate Independent film – long, short, fiction and documentary – and to introduce a unique and varied spectrum of international films and filmmakers to our audiences. The festival is committed to exhibiting films that express fresh voices and differing global perspectives, with the hope that these programs will enlighten audiences, provide invaluable exposure for filmmakers and present inspired entertainment for all. The 21st Annual Hamptons International Film Festival will take place October 10-14, 2013.

Name: Advanced Digital Services
Description:
ADS is a full-service post-production and distribution facility with full Finishing cabilities - Online, Color Correction, Audio Mix, QC and Deliverables.  Plus room and Avid Rentals.  In a prime location - Burbank adjacent - Advanced Digital Services’ MPA and studio security-compliant facility supports digital media services and file-based workflows for post-production and distribution of 4K and HD content.

With our talented and highly-experienced staff, ADS is also equipped to process and deliver large volumes of high-quality packages from our state of the art facility.  Throughout the years, ADS has been a trusted business partner, processing and delivering both first run programming and library content, on time and on budget, with the high quality all projects deserve.

Name: Iyuno Media Group Germany
Description: Iyuno Media Group is a global technology and localization company serving the world’s leading entertainment studios in dubbing, subtitling and media services with 35 offices, in 34 cities, in 30 countries.

Name: Hello Edit Production
Description:
A small production company based in Copenhagen Danmark. 

Hello Edit production has a unique approach to film production combining more than 20 years of acting with the fine art of telling storys through commercials, documentaries, corporate films, music videos among others.

Show it - Don't tell it!

Name: Mesopotamia Film
Description: Mesopotamia Film is a production company offering services through the whole production process. We are Stockholm based company collaborating with our global network of filmmakers and creatives.

Name: Focus Filmtheater Arnhem
Description: Na jarenlang gehuisvest te zijn op de Korenmarkt verhuist Focus Filmtheater Arnhem in april 2018 naar een fraai nieuw pand op het Audrey Hepburnplein. Behalve een zaaluitbreiding (van drie naar vijf zalen én een openluchtzaal op het dak) en dus de mogelijkheid om meer en diverser te programmeren krijgt Focus met FOCUS | ETEN + DRINKEN een prachtig, ruim restaurant dat van tien uur in de ochtend tot middernacht geopend is. FOCUS | ETEN + DRINKEN opent op 28 april, het filmtheater gaat vanaf eind april (proef) draaien en wordt op 15 juni 2018 officieel geopend.

Name: Ferrorama.tv
Description:
Aqui todo mundo nasceu nos anos 80, cresceu nos anos 90, vivemos nossas maiores aventuras nos anos 2000 pra chegar até aqui com essa bagagem que nos ajuda nas escolhas criativas diárias. 
Preferimos que o nosso portfólio fale por si só, mas se é pra traduzir em palavras, a gente sempre tenta encontrar uma saída criativa diferente para contar a sua história. Somos fissurados em criar conteúdo, seja em programas de TV, vídeos institucionais, coberturas de eventos em tempo real, DVDs musicais, videoclipes ou documentários.

Name: Entract Films
Description: Studio indépendant jumelant la distribution et production de films, Entract a notamment distribué quatre Palmes d’or consécutives, deux productions gagnantes de l’Oscar du Meilleur Film en plus de longs-métrages québécois ayant rayonné sur nos écrans comme à l’étranger.  Entract collabore de près avec les créateurs afin de développer, produire et distribuer des films porteurs de qualité.

Name: Charlie Chaplin (Official)
Description:
Roy Export SAS is the owner of the Chaplin films made from 1918 onwards except A Countess from Hong Kong, and all the copyrights, rights, images, documents, writings and archives relating to those films and to Mr Chaplin’s life and work in general. All requests concerning screenings or reproduction of images from these films should be addressed to Roy Export SAS.

Bubbles Inc, whom we also represent, was set up  by Charles Chaplin in 1972 for merchandising of the Chaplin image. A gentleman, a poet, a dreamer, a lonely fellow, always hopeful of romance and adventure - Charlie’s growling stomach, aching feet, and empty pockets will never become outdated!

Follow us at Facebook.com/CharlieChaplinOfficial !

Name: Arcadia Media
Description:
Arcadia Media is een bedrijf die gespecialiseerd is in het maken van promotie video’s, foto’s en websites!

Heeft u een van de volgende promotie materialen nodig of een combinatie daarvan, neem dan gerust contact met ons op of kijk op onze website: www.arcadiamedia.nl

Name: Rude Boy Films
Description:
S.J. Fleck at an early age was in love with film, media and audio. He received a degree in Cinema and Broadcasting with a minor in Art Photography in 2003. He has watched over 10,000 films / television shows and is an expert on the subjects of Art, Music, Film, History, and more. He refuses to be assimilated into the mainstream and has a love for the underground. He was born in and grew up just outside the city limits of Detroit, Michigan, USA. Has been an underground artist, DJ and Musician that makes short independent art films and also does live visuals that often include cinematic effects. 

Born in 1979, and living outside of Detroit, he was influenced by all sorts of avant garde film, including silent, blaxploitation, slasher, horror, indie, sci-fi, film noir, french new wave, punk, MTV / Music Videos, 60's, 70's, 80's, 90's Indie, and so on.

Favorite Directors: John Carpenter, Tim Burton, Stanley Kubrick, Todd Solondz, Michel Gondry, Spike Jonze, Chris Cunningham, Spike Lee, Takashi Miike, Timur Bekmambetov, Sophia Coppola, Michael Moore, Dario Argento, Jennifer Saunders, Quentin Tarantino, Fritz Lang, David Cronenberg and many more.

Name: Black Women in Scripted
Description:
Black Women in Scripted (BWIS) are an impressive collective of Black British, Scripted Film and Television Executives, Writers, Script Editors/Consultants, Writer’s Assistants, Directors, DOPs and various above and below the line scripted crew. 

BWIS WhatsApp group was set up in December 2020  by Madeline Addy, BBC Studios Comedy Executive Producer, Cassandra Johnson-Bekoe, Writer and Script Editor signed to Curtis Brown and Thara Popoola, Writer and 2021 Channel 4 Screenwriters Alumni. Born out of a desire to create a safe and inclusive space and a positive network for black women and non-binary individuals. Through word of mouth, the group has steadily grown to over 300 members and counting. 

Participants in our group work for or are writing for various scripted indies and broadcasters including the BBC, BBC Films, Bad Wolf, Marvel, AMC, Audible, Netflix, Sister, Home Team, Lookout Point, Sky, Merman, Clerkenwell Films, Eleven to name but a few.

We share intel on scripted job opportunities, scriptwriting competitions, online masterclasses, available diverse crew. We also share advice on anything and everything from how to write treatments, sell your idea, using Final Draft etc.

Crucially, we support and encourage each other. It’s a wonderful and much needed space for a talented group of highly creative and professional Black British scripted talent. 

We are all scripted stars of the present and future.

Name: Digital Golem
Description:
Digital Golem is a VFX & 3D animation studio based in Brussels.

Since 2006 Digital Golem creates high-end quality Visual Effects & 3D Animations for feature films, commercials, and television series.
We offer a full range of creative services beyond VFX & 3D animation, such as: concept art, compositing, character design, storyboarding, shoot previz & mattepainting.

Our passion is investing our skills & talent into the creation of beautiful imagery.

Name: Votion Studios
Description:
Introducing Votion Studios – a new state-of-the-art extended reality (XR) studio and production facility located in Hong Kong. Unparalleled creative tools and workflows to empower digital content creators, brands, and artists, to deliver their creative vision. Open for productions in early 2022. 

Powered by Emmy award-winning Vobile (SEHK: 3738), a SaaS industry leader worldwide in intellectual property protection, monetization, and marketing. Vobile services the world’s largest platforms, film studios, TV networks, sports leagues, music labels, and other content owners.

Name: Astrea
Description:
Specializing in both B2B and B2C distribution, ASTREA collaborates with partners across sectors. From licensing content to executing one-of-a-kind immersive and interactive installations, Astrea’s core values are rooted in the power of storytelling through innovative technologies.

Astrea is the third branch of Atlas V, the immersive production studio behind Gloomy Eyes, Spheres, Battlescar, the Emmy nominated experience The Dawn of Art, and the 2022 Emmy award winning experience Madrid Noir.

From bespoke distribution plans for projects still in development to finding new life for existing IP, Astrea's main areas of specialty include:

> Publishing and marketing
> Localisation & optimisation
> International licensing

Astrea - your portal to immersive worlds.

Name: GARUWA
Description: GARUWA is a 100% Aboriginal-owned, multidisciplinary creative agency with a focus on telling stories with purpose, impact, and intention. We work across various mediums including film, audio, animation, public art and installation.

Name: Enquadramento Produções
Description:
Enquadramento Produções é uma produtora independente, sediada em São Paulo e fundada pelo produtor Leonardo Mecchi, focada no desenvolvimento e produção de projetos cinematográficos, em especial primeiros e segundos longas de jovens e promissores realizadores. Entre seus filmes encontram-se obras selecionadas para alguns dos mais importantes festivais nacionais e internacionais, como Cannes, Locarno, Rotterdam, Viennale, FidMarseille, BAFICI, Brasília, Tiradentes e Gramado.

A produtora atua ainda na concepção e realização de mostras e festivais dedicados ao cinema brasileiro e internacional.

Name: Forward Films
Description:
Sensibilidad estética, audacia técnica, rigor informativo y, sobretodo, profundo compromiso y responsabilidad social: juntos, estos elementos hacen que el audiovisual sea una poderosa herramienta de transformación de la realidad.

Bajo esa premisa, la productora Forward - Images that Move, produce contenido para ONG, movimientos, organizaciones internacionales, empresas y formuladores de políticas públicas comprometidos con la justicia social, además de proyectos independientes.
 
El objetivo: producir filmes que ayuden a enfrentar los desafíos sociales más urgentes de América Latina y el Caribe.
 
Desde 2016 nuestro equipo de periodistas, directores, cinematógrafos, productores y diseñadores desarrolló varios proyectos en diversos países de la región.

Name: Elle Driver
Description:
Elle Driver is an international sales, acquisitions and production company based in Paris. Across a broad spectrum of budgets and content (thrillers, comedies, animations, documentaries, genre, etc), our slate emphasizes a diversity of films each with a unique universe and sensibility.  Our ambition is to promote worldwide an activist, creative cinema, through an original, demanding and alternative lineup. 

Since its creation in 2008, ELLE DRIVER has chosen to hand-pick the films it represents, focusing on quality rather than quantity. This strategy, in addition to proving its success with the numerous film selections in major festivals around the world, has allowed ELLE DRIVER to be renowned by its foreign partners and producers, with whom ELLE DRIVER co-develops or co-produces half of the films presented in recent years. After 12 years of existence, ELLE DRIVER now holds a catalog of more than 150 films, with a wide range of stories and storytellers, from young promising filmmakers to directors with an already well-established reputation. 

From the Caméra d'Or at the Cannes Film Festival in 2009 with SAMSON & DELILAH by Warwick Thornton until the Sundance Grand Prize in 2018 with THE MISEDUCATION OF CAMERON POST by Desiree Akhavan and the Berlinale Silver Bear for Best Screenplay in 2019 for PIRANHAS by Claudio Giovannesi, the company has seen its films selected and awarded prizes in major festivals every single year. Elle Driver has worked with renowned and award-winning filmmakers such as Emmanuel Mouret, Claire Denis, Costa-Gavras, Emmanuelle Bercot, Cedric Kahn, Naomi Kawase, Benoit Jacquot, Cristi Puiu, André Téchiné, Tommy Wirkola, Mohamad Rassoulof, Anurag Kashyap, Leslye Headland, Gabriele Muccino, Tanya Weixler.

Name: Memento Films
Description: Memento Films is a creative and vibrant company providing an integrated Video Production service from Scripting and Casting, to Shooting and Editing. In addition to this we also offer a range of production facilities such as Studio Hire for Photographic, Film, or Video Shoots, Crewing, Post Production Facilities, Duplication Services and Rehearsal Space.

Name: D-Seven Motion Pictures
Description:
D-SEVEN offers a full array of production services including Feature Films, Music Videos, TV commercials, Corporate and Promotional films. Our imaginative production work will capture the attention of your target audience, customers, employees or investors and move them into action.

D-SEVEN and its subsidiaries are led by the direction of Nayla Al Khaja, who is UAE's first female film producer. Our studios are conveniently located in Dubai Media City and Twofour54, Abu Dhabi.

Our film production services include:
Film / Video Production – HDSLR, Video, 16mm, 35mm - RED, Canon, ARRI
Location scouting
Casting
Film permits
Production design, props sourcing, set building and decorating
Packs preparation and presentation
Animatronics and prosthetics
Stunts, special effects, and precision driving
Experienced and highly-professional film crew
Camera, grips, and lighting equipment
Film set catering
Cost reporting and budget management
Script breakdown and shoot scheduling
Production and weather insurance
Negative processing, transfer, editing, and grading
Studio Facilities
Original Score Music / SFX & ADR
State-of-the-art Digital filming, post-production, and animation

Name: IBW Studio
Description: We are an emerging brand focusing on visual story-telling. Whether it is a commercial film or a branded content or anything in between, our well experienced team has a unique perception and an extremely refined visual style to assure that the client’s vision is realized on screen. We partner with brands and clients that seek to push the boundaries of what is possible in pursuit of their artistic vision. Into the Black & Wood Studio is a production house that promises on the most desirable and finest visuals.

Name: APOLO FILMS SL
Description: Estudio europeo dedicado principalmente a la producción, distribución y comercialización de largometrajes de animación para cine basados en conocidos personajes a nivel internacional. Liderado por un equipo formado por profesionales con larga experiencia en el sector del entretenimiento, está especializado en producciones en 3D de alta calidad y en la gestión de marcas dirigidas a un mercado mundial.

Name: ImageNova
Description:
ImageNova is a film production company specialising in content for multi-platform use, including online and broadcast. Our company is focused on creativity and the production of highly engaging videos to ensure your  marketing strategy exceeds its objectives. 

Located in the heart of Leicester’s vibrant Cultural Quarter, Image Nova is driven by a highly experienced team of creative and talented producers delivering tailor-made media solutions to meet the vision and objectives of our clients.

We produce live action and animated films and documentaries, promotional videos and web channels along with high quality narrative, script-writing, editing and web content, for a broad range of clients.

Image Nova has access to the very best crews, facilities, equipment and locations, enabling us to offer our clients everything they need for a successful campaign which delivers above and beyond the impact required.  Creating strong content however, is not enough; we ensure that through early and smooth communication, it fits precisely with your marketing plan to achieve optimum results.

Image Nova will bring your campaign vision to life, creating innovative and engaging content and ensuring that it achieves the right exposure and reaches the intended audience.

Name: Dreamcatcher Productions Kenya Limited
Description:
Dreamcatcher Productions Ltd is a film and audio-visual  company based in Nairobi ,Kenya 
specialising in the production of:

TV and Radio Commercials
Corporate Videos
Documentaries
TV Shows and Series
Feature Films
Still Photography

We are registered agents with the Kenyan Department of Film Services (DFS) and recognized
by the Kenya Film Commission.

In 2010 Dreamcatcher Productions partnered in the co-production of the feature film "The Rugged Priest"
and went on to win 7 of 10 nominated awards at the 2011 Kalasha Awards Festival, a yearly event 
aimed at acknowledging and rewarding Kenya’s finest industry practitioners.

Dreamcatcher’s awards are not restricted to Kenya only and we are proud to have also won the award for 
"Best Film in the Human Security" category for the TV series "The Team" at the We the Peoples Film Festival in
London, November 2010.

Dreamcatcher Productions has also produced top notch TV and Radio commercials, Documentaries and 
Corporate videos for leading local and Multi-National brands to mention a few.

www.dreamcatcher.co.ke

Name: Vértigo Films
Description:
Vértigo Films es una productora y distribuidora cinematográfica independiente con mas de 24 años de existencia en el sector audiovisual.  Vértigo forma parte del grupo Wild Bunch ( http://www.wildbunch.eu | https://www.linkedin.com/company/wild-bunch/), multinacional europea con sede en Francia dedicada a la co-producción, compra, distribución y venta internacional de películas y series de TV . 

Con presencia en diferentes países (Francia, Austria, Alemania, Italia, USA y España) es una de las empresas europeas referente en el sector cinematográfico independiente a nivel mundial. 

Vértigo ha producido y co-producido películas como "Kiki, el amor se hace" o "La vida de Adele".

Igualmente ha distribuido en el mercado español títulos como las aclamadas "Amélie",  la saga "Millenium" , "Ciudad de Dios", "Carol", "La Juventud", "Sólo los amantes sobreviven", "Tenemos que hablar de Kevin", "Mulholland Drive", "Amy", "Rebeldes", "Her", "Comanchería" y muchas más.

El catálogo de películas en las que trabaja Vértigo se puede visitar en el siguiente enlace:

https://www.vertigofilms.es/peliculas/



Entre sus últimos proyectos del 2018 se encuentran títulos como:

"Lazzaro Felice", de Alice Rorhwacher; "Girl", de Lukas Dhont; "Under the Silver Lake", de David Robert Mitchell; "Burning", de Lee Chang-Dong; la última entrega de la saga Q, "Expediente 64: Los casos del Departamento Q", de Christoffer Boe; o la reedición especial de títulos de Studios Ghibli, como "La Princesa Mononoke", "El viaje de Chihiro", o "Mi Vecino Totoro". 

Próximos estrenos, consultar:

https://www.vertigofilms.es/

Name: Lightstairs Entertainment Company
Description:
The Official LinkedIn Home of Lightstairs Entertainment Company.

At Lightstairs, we craft and deliver spectacular stories for audiences across all media. Through the years, we've mastered the art of the impossible—from traditional films to extraordinary sci-fi action and adventure, cutting-edge visual effects to wonderfully animated stories. Today, we’re established across the multimedia industry, driven by the most sophisticated and powerful creative forces that propel us forward.

Our company offers a broad scope for individuals seeking professionally crafted services tailored to their needs, as well as for those eager to join our ever-expanding and diverse ventures. With multiple industries and countless opportunities operating under the Lightstairs Entertainment Company umbrella, we stand as the primary leader and owner in this creative arena.

Currently, we're expanding our reach across major sectors, including Film, Television, Gaming, Education, Innovation, and Multimedia. We’re also on the lookout for passionate individuals ready to evolve their talents and hone their skills in these fields. Follow us on LinkedIn, Facebook, and Twitter to stay informed about upcoming opportunities across these sectors. We’ll be launching many exciting projects and job openings soon—so stay connected and stay tuned!

Note: Please hold off on contacting us for inquiries at this time, as our websites and related platforms are still in development. We’ll notify you when we’re fully up and running. Until then, thank you for visiting our page and following us. We appreciate your valuable time and support. Thank you!

Name: Pacha 3 - Société de production Films Indepéndante
Description:
Dans Pacha 3, nous transformons la vie des clients en une œuvre cinématographique. Nos documentaires sont bien plus que des films : ce sont des legs visuels qui préservent les émotions, les souvenirs et l’essence de nos histoires.

Les films de familles offrent une expérience profondément humaine et artistique, inspirée par l’esthétique du cinéma européen. Chaque histoire est unique, racontée avec la sensibilité, le soin et la poésie que seul le cinéma peut offrir. 
Les films corporatifs et documentaires institutionnels son réalisés avec une approche sensible et cinématographique. Chaque projet devient un récit vivant : nous mettons en lumière l’âme d’une entreprise, son histoire, ses valeurs humaines et sa vision. À travers des images soignées, des mots justes et une narration fluide, nous créons des films qui touchent, inspirent et transmettent, bien au-delà de l’information. Parce qu’une entreprise, c’est aussi une histoire à raconter.

Name: Spring Onion Studio
Description:
Spring Onion Studio is a creative production studio from Belgrade, Serbia. Our roots go back to 2008 growing from 2 artists up to 25 in house artists. Through years of work in the creative industry and working with advertising agencies, production houses, television and brands, Spring Onion Studio has built an industry reputation with its high-end, stylized and realistic animation. 

At Spring Onion Studio we focus on technical excellence and art quality. 

Spring Onion Studio is open to everyone who shares a passion for visual arts, storytelling and characters, entertainment, and creative production. Our studio nurtures teamwork, diversity, mutual respect and transparent communication. We are artists in our mind and soul and our working environment is enriched with creative thoughts that push you forward and make your working experience inspiring.   


OUR VALUES

Transparent Communication
Communicating project ideas clearly with all key stakeholders. Defining the project scope, setting the artistic vision and bringing value to the creative process with transparent communication and feedback.

Work Optimization
With the technical preparation and optimization, we are creating the system which we then improve through the communication and feedback with the client. That's why we invest in our Pipeline. Automating instead of repeating steps means respecting the working time of our artists and deadlines of our clients.

Long-term Collaboration
For almost every business, the need to establish strong, mutually beneficial relationships with strategically-chosen partners is essential. And the longer that relationship lasts, the better for all parties. The advantages include improved performance, greater cost efficiency and helping businesses to develop.

Description:

Passione e impegno sono i due cardini intorno ai quali ruota ogni attività.

Oki Doki Film spazia dall'ideazione e produzione di programmi televisivi e videoclip musicali, alla realizzazione di spot e video aziendali. Oki Doki Film ha creato negli anni un team di professionisti affiatati, che collaborano in sintonia con l'obiettivo comune di realizzare un prodotto qualitativamente elevato, supportato dall'utilizzo delle migliori attrezzature disponibili sul mercato.

Oki Doki Film è una casa di produzione giovane, che ha voglia di sperimentare e mettersi in gioco continuamente, con idee nuove e originali.

The Makkina is the brainchild of Ines von Bonhorst and Yuri Pirondi, a dynamic creative duo. Ines and Yuri are filmmakers, creative directors, and visual artists whose work spans cinema, TV commercials, brand content, video installations, and documentaries.

Name: Martini Film Studios
Description:
Martini Film Studios provides a full-service production facility to meet the needs of the most demanding film and television projects.

The studio boasts 150,000 sq. feet of space over eight stages, with an additional 100,000 sq. feet of support space, as well as a full suite of back lot support services provided by MBS.

All three individual studios are constructed of tilt-up concrete, with acoustical insulation, sound doors, and have mill, wardrobe, and office spaces attached to serve the growing needs of North American filmmakers and producers.

Martini Film Studios is conveniently located 5 minutes off the 200th St. Highway 1 Exit, making it easily accessible by car. Situated east of the Langley-Surrey border, productions filmed at Martini Film Studios are eligible for provincial tax credits. To learn more about the geographical benefits of Martini Film Studios and the tax credits available in British Columbia visit creativebc.com.

Name: SyncOnSet Technologies
Description:
SyncOnSet Technologies is an Emmy Award-winning technology company that offers modern software solutions to TV and film productions and studios.

For productions and crews, SyncOnSet helps optimize workflows and secure communication throughout the project. Creative departments use SyncOnSet production apps from pre-production (script breakdown and budgeting) to principal photography (continuity notes and photos), through wrap (wrap labels and reports).

For studios and production companies, SyncOnSet offers the first and only physical asset system designed specifically for studio workflows: Asset Hub. With Asset Hub, studios track the dispositions of all physical assets across series, franchises, and warehouses. In addition, SyncOnSet offers enterprise solutions for increased oversight and control over their production data and content.

SyncOnSet is trusted by thousands of TV series and films around the world. The Company is based in Los Angeles, California and Boston, Massachusetts USA.

Name: Epic Pictures Group
Description:
Founded in 2007, Epic Pictures is an independent content studio with the mission of delivering the best-in-class genre entertainment “for fans, by fans.” Epic Pictures produces, finances, and distributes approximately twenty-thirty independent genre films a year. 

In 2013, the company established Epic Pictures Releasing which is its US focused distribution division. In 2017, Epic Pictures acquired the world’s most popular horror website, Dread Central, and launched its unique horror label, Dread, followed by its AVOD channel, DreadTV. 

In 2019, Epic Pictures started the horror gaming site, DreadXP, with a focus on editorial, reviews, podcasts, and original streaming content. In 2020, DreadXP began a video game production and publishing division in collaboration with some of the most innovative developers in the independent gaming space.

Name: Vancouver Asian Film Festival
Description:
VAFF is dedicated to promoting and celebrating the diversity and depth of Asian culture and identity in film and media, and to help North American Asian actors and filmmakers more authentically and more powerfully define and express themselves on screen. Through its annual film festival and many other programs and events hosted in Vancouver, VAFF’s mission is to be the “go-to” forum for the public and the film industry to engage in and support the rise of Asian influence in film and media in the world. VAFF envisions a world where North American Asian actors and filmmakers have the resources and opportunities to shape mainstream culture in a powerful and positive way.

Founded in 1995, the Vancouver Asian Film Festival (VAFF) is the longest running Asian film festival in Canada.

It debuted in September 1997 and has attracted tens of thousands of film lovers who have enjoyed a diverse selection of North American-Asian and international films over the years.

Each year VAFF attracts close to 4,000 audience members over its four-day festival and year-round events. It also reaches many more through word of mouth, pre-festival events, and traditional and social media throughout the year.

VAFF is entirely organized and produced by a group of dedicated volunteers, and is made possible by generous financial support from corporate sponsors, public funders and private donors.

Name: IMAGINARIO Colectivo
Description:
Somos un pequeño ESTUDIO CREATIVO — Creación & Realización de Contenido
FICCIÓN / SERIES / DOCUMENTALES / BRANDED CONTENT

IMAGINARIO Colectivo es una productora y estudio creativo dirigido por Majo Einfalt y Cristián Grez Donoso. Como dupla creativa, desarrollamos y producimos contenidos en diversos formatos y géneros: ficción, documental y series.

Contamos historias que conmueven y entretienen. Nos inspiran los proyectos que cruzan lo histórico con lo social, que reflexionan sobre la identidad chilena y la condición humana desde una mirada contemporánea, sensible y universal.

Desarrollamos proyectos que conectan pasado y presente, que entretienen, pero también interpelan; que profundizan en lo humano y por sobre todo en la idiosincrasia chilena, pero con un corazón universal.

Clermont-Ferrand / Lakino Berlin / Filmets Festival España. / SANFIC / MTV Open Pitch / MORBIDO LAB / SANFIC INDUSTRIA / BIFF Festival de Cine Fantástico de Bruselas / SANFIC Talento joven

Name: Mountainfilm
Description:
Mountainfilm uses the power of film, art and ideas to inspire audiences to create a better world.

Mountainfilm is a dynamic organization and festival of films, people, stories, and ideas that celebrates indomitable spirit, educates and inspires audiences, and motivates individuals and communities to advance solutions for a livable world.

Started in 1979, Telluride Mountainfilm is one of America’s longest-running film festivals. Through the years, in and out of trends and fads, the festival has always been best described by one unchanging word: inspiring. Far more than any other adjective, that’s how festival audiences describe their experience.

Name: Café des images

Expérimentations plurielles, participatives et réflexives y prennent ainsi place pour mieux imaginer avec les habitant.es et les publics l’avenir du territoire comme celui de la salle de cinéma.
Situé au cœur des quartiers politique de la ville d’Hérouville-Saint-Clair, le Café des images est un Cinéma-Monde aux horizons ouverts. Lieu multiple et hybride, ouvert et ancré sur son territoire, il envisage la salle de cinéma comme un lieu de vie total en dialogue avec les populations.

Name: Cineart Multiplex
Description:
Há quase 70 anos, ousadia e pioneirismo começaram a escrever a história de sucesso da Cineart, acontecimentos que marcaram o desenvolvimento da capital mineira. Era década de 40, Juscelino Kubstichek tomava posse na prefeitura de Belo Horizonte, e a Cineart preparava um presente para os belo-horizontinos: a chegada do Cine Teatro Brasil, o primeiro cinema de rua da capital mineira. O lugar, que contava com 1.850 lugares, teve a maior bilheteria da América durante as décadas de 50 e 60. Nessas mesmas décadas, foram inaugurados os cines Palladium, Metrópole, Acaiaca, Jaques, Pathê, Odeon, Floresta e Tamoio.

Com capital 100% brasileiro, a Cineart sempre teve como foco a tecnologia e a qualidade no atendimento ao público, tornando-se assim líder de mercado, com o maior market share de Minas. Buscando constantemente inovação e crescimento, a rede investe no incremento de seus complexos com o que há de melhor no mercado mundial de cinema.

Desde a sua inauguração, a Cineart se orgulha por possuir valores sustentáveis em seu DNA. A rede agrega em suas campanhas e ações contribuições para um sistema social justo, com equilíbrio ambiental e economicamente viável. Entre os projetos, destaca-se a inserção cultural e social de crianças carentes na fase escolar, por abrir novas janelas e novos mundos aos pequenos que participam. Esse projeto é desenvolvido em parceria com a Prefeitura de Belo Horizonte.

Name: Spanish Screenings
Description:
Spanish Screenings is a program for the internationalization of Spanish cinema that receives a new boost in 2022-2023, with more diversity of content and a greater volume of activities.

It grows to adapt to the new challenges of the audiovisual industry and does so thanks to the budget allocation framed in the Recovery, Transformation and Resilience Plan to strengthen Spain's role as Europe's audiovisual HUB. Thus, with the Ministry of Culture and Sport through the ICAA, and the Ministry of Economic Affairs and Digital Transformation through ICEX, this event adopts a new format to become 'Spanish Screenings XXL', an international market for Spanish audiovisual production. 

It consists of the creation of an audiovisual market for Spanish-produced content that favors the exchange and generation of new projects in a framework of interaction and business, and that contributes to strengthening the entire value chain of the Spanish audiovisual industry.

The action of the Spanish Screenings is developed around four pillars: Content, Financing & Tech, On Tour and 360. In an increasingly pluralistic audiovisual industry, Spanish Screenings is committed to the diversity of content, formats and origins, seeking maximum representation and commitment to innovation.

Name: ETC - Entertainment Technology Center @ USC
Description: The Entertainment Technology Center at the University of Southern California (ETC@USC) is a think tank and research center that brings together senior executives, innovators, thought leaders, and catalysts from the entertainment, consumer electronics, technology, and services industries along with the academic resources of the University of Southern California to explore and to act upon topics and issues related to the creation, distribution, and consumption of entertainment content. As an organization within the USC School of Cinematic Arts, ETC helps drive collaborative projects among its member companies and engages with next generation consumers to understand the impact of emerging technology on all aspects of the entertainment industry, especially technology development and implementation, the creative process, business models, and future trends. ETC acts as a convener and accelerator for entertainment technology and commerce through: Research, Publications, Events, Collaborative Projects and Shared Exploratory Labs and Demonstrations.

Name: Forrest Motion Pictures Ltd
Description:
Forrest Motion Pictures Ltd is an off-shoot of Forrest Equity Management Ltd. Forrest Motion Pictures and its partner, Baker Street Entertainment, have come together to launch the “Forrest Equity Film Fund” (FEFF LLP), a limited liability partnership registered in the UK.
During the year, Forrest Motion Pictures plans to launch up to three film funds; each fund will include between three and five films.

The fund takes a new approach to film finance and is founded on a business model and finance structure that sets out to balance the interests of all parties who are stakeholders in the finance, production and distribution of films.

Name: This is Sound Design
Description:
This is Sound Design is focused on creating original sound for film, broadcast, online content and interactive media. While we offer all the technical infrastructure and knowhow of name-brand studios, we put creativity and craft at the forefront of our process. Our goal is to discover a unique approach to the sound for each project. 

     We believe the standard industry process for post production sound, breaking the work into pieces to maximizes efficiency, is counterintuitive and lacks a conhesive creative voice on all but the largest projects. As the tools and filmmaking process has evolved in the last decade, most projects can and should have a more personal and organic approach to fully realize potential of the sound.

      We built our company around a comprehensive, in-house method for creating original soundtracks that integrates the workflow around a small team, collaborating through the entire sound post process: from initial concept, through editorial, design, foley, and the final mix. We have the knowledge, experience and tools to assure your content will comply to loudness standards and sound great at any scale, be it theatrical presentation, television, radio, online, mobile phone, or tablet.

Description:
