Enerzijds wil het Food Film Festival de liefde en waardering voor voedsel in het algemeen in beeld brengen, en anderzijds de vele problemen én oplossingen gerelateerd aan ons huidige voedselsysteem voor het voetlicht brengen. 

Kleine festivals worden groot. Althans: groter. Na drie fantastische, volledig uitverkochte edities in het Amsterdamse filmhuis Studio/K zijn we uit ons jasje gegroeid. Tijd dus voor een nieuwe locatie én een nieuwe datum: Westergasfabriek in Amsterdam van 9 t/m 11 mei 2014! Check de website: www.foodfilmfestival.nl

Name: Musicmedia
Description:
Musicmedia edizioni musicali & produzioni discografiche srl. 
Un patrimonio di esperienze materiali e umane relative a circa mezzo secolo di attività editoriale e discografica: è questo il principale capitale di Musicmedia, una società milanese nata nel 1997 che ha fatto confluire in sé due case editrici musicali esistenti sin dagli esordi di San Remo, negli anni ’50. MM è cresciuta negli ultimi decenni sia sviluppando importanti partnership con grandi gruppi editoriali stranieri (in particolare parliamo del ricchissimo catalogo della libreria tedesca Sonoton, ma anche delle libraries USA Parry e MusicBox e dell’inglese MusicOnLine, della scandinava ADAP - tutti consultabili su un unico sito: www.sonoton.com), sia attraverso la realizzazione di propri cataloghi, in particolare l'etichetta Music.it  e Concerto, label di musica classica. Oggi Musicmedia è una realtà ricca di esperienza, che conta su un repertorio importante per qualità e vastità, in continuo arricchimento e facilmente consultabile attraverso Internet grazie a una piattaforma tecnologica all’avanguardia ma di facilissimo utilizzo.La passione autentica per il proprio lavoro e i propri clienti, ispirati entrambi a qualità ed eccellenza, fa il resto.

Name: Bus Producciones
Description:
BUS es una productora de cine publicitario con más de 19 años de experiencia en el mercado español y una fuerte presencia en el ámbito argentino e internacional.

Como algo inherente a nuestra forma de trabajar, en BUS siempre hemos creído en la importancia de apoyar el talento, la experimentación, el otro punto de vista de las cosas. Siempre hemos apostado por las buenas ideas y todos aquellos proyectos extra-publicitarios que puedan enriquecer el campo artístico de lo visual.

Una inquietud que nos ha llevado a involucrarnos en la realización de cortometrajes, documentales y ficción. Por otro lado, en el año 2005 creamos el sello editorial BUKS. Una propuesta editorial para difundir en un soporte impreso otra clase de materiales.

La sede central de BUS se encuentra en Madrid. Asimismo, también tenemos oficinas en Barcelona y en Buenos Aires (Argentina). En España somos representantes de los realizadores argentinos más destacados del panorama actual y en Argentina ofrecemos un amplio marco de posibilidades para llevar
a cabo cualquier producción.

El interés por investigar nuevos campos audiovisuales nos ha llevado a crear BUS ANIMATION. Una división especializada en animación mediante la cual representamos a los estudios de animación más vanguardistas e innovadores de Europa y América del Norte y del Sur.

Name: Excuse My French

Name: Filmfest Bremen

Name: FILM RÓJ S.A.
Description: „RÓJ” to opowieść o rodzinie, która nie odnajduje się we współczesnym świecie, pełnym pośpiechu, pogoni za karierą i walki o przetrwanie w wielkomiejskiej „dżungli”. Name: De l'Autre Côté du Périph'
Description:
Trois valeurs sont au cœur de notre ligne éditoriale : talent, originalité et engagement. Chez DACP, nous avons pour ambition d’accueillir une nouvelle génération d’auteurs qui, à travers leurs films, représentent la société française dans sa diversité et ses différences. Les auteurs que nous choisissons d'accompagner sont les talents de demain.

La variété des parcours, des origines et des influences de nos auteurs nous permet de proposer des œuvres originales qui bouleversent les habitudes, tant par leur sujet que le traitement dont elles bénéficient.

Notre approche est celle de la banalisation de la diversité : elle est toujours présente sans être le sujet-même des œuvres que nous produisons.

Name: Spanda Produtora
Description:
A marca Spanda Produtora foi fundada principalmente para desenvolver projetos com causas e propósitos voltados à comunicação de iniciativas de impacto social positivo,
produzindo conteúdo inovador de alta qualidade para o mercado de impacto, social, institucional, cultural e publicitário.
O nome Spanda vem do sânscrito e significa, em poucas palavras, “O pulso criativo do universo”.

Somos uma produtora com 10 anos de existência, e neste tempo muita coisa boa aconteceu: crescemos, aprendemos mais e mais e estamos agora em um momento de maturidade.

Em 2017 e 2018 além da nossa especialização em conteúdo para mídias digitais, desenvolvemos trabalhos direcionados ao universo de beleza e moda atendendo marcas como Zattini, Wella Koleston, Wella Professionals e Sebastian. Também nos aprimoramos em conteúdo de treinamento corporativo desenvolvendo mais de 20 módulos de treinamento para a área de trade de Burger King. Possuímos também uma equipe especializada em cobertura de eventos, que cobriu recentemente eventos como GOVTECH, LiveTalks e Creative Mornings.

Nossa História :

Em março de 2014 começamos a operar a Produtora a_dupla, resultado do encontro dos executivos Ana Clara Cenamo (Ex-Havas, Ogilvy e Getty Images) e Renato Dias (Ex-AgênciaClick e Natura). Ao longo do primeiro ano de vida, a produtora desenvolveu filmes para clientes Johnson & Johnson, Natura, Pernambucanas, Campari, Catho, International Paper, entre outros. Neste mesmo ano, a_dupla foi reconhecida pela Revista Proxxima como um dos 50 profissionais mais inovadores do mercado de comunicação no país, ocupando a 5ª posição no ranking.

Visando atender a demanda por projetos de diferentes mídias, budgets, formatos e linguagens, mudamos nosso nome e marca para Spanda para poder contar com, além dos queridos Mari Rossi e Danilo Mantovani (ex-a_dupla), novos diretores como a dupla NA Direction (Nicole e Amadeo).

Name: Invisible Women
Description:
Invisible Women are:
→ A feminist film collective, organising public screenings of female made archive films 
→ An editorial resource for entertaining, accessible writing on women and film history
→ An archive activist research project, advocating for a broader, more inclusive canon

Invisible Women was founded by Camilla Baier and Rachel Pronger in Edinburgh, Scotland in 2017. We formed the collective while researching a jointly written thesis at the University of Edinburgh, inspired by our fascination with film archives and the issues of representation contained within those often flawed, incomplete collections.  

Our mission is to increase awareness amongst general cinema audiences of the fascinating work made by women that exists in our film archives globally. The priority of the project is to organise accessible and exciting public screenings in collaboration with open minded venues and partners, and to advocate through exhibition and editorial for a broader and more inclusive history of cinema.

Name: SyncLodge LTD
Description:
SyncLodge is an award-winning platform with an award-winning management team. SyncLodge does not curate or deal manage. SyncLodge searches all the world’s released music and delivers the associated metadate through real-time API access. SyncLodge delivers state-of-the-art music sync licensing management tools for professional music supervisors, visual production professionals, and music copyright owners/administrators.

SyncLodge Delivers: Ease of flow to the sync licensing industry. IP licensing project management clarity to the visual production industry. SyncLodge empowers the music supervisor by delivering automated systems that greatly reduce time spent on administrative tasks. The platform allows all who create music to have equal opportunity in sync placement, regardless of where they are in the world, regardless of their connections, finances, or level of fame. 

SyncLodge is a B2B platform for the facilitation of the management processes of music synchronization licensing. An intuitive ecosystem and work environment for music supervisors to be able to leverage advanced technology to conclude all their tasks in the most efficient way, including one-click copyright owner/admin data search and delivery that auto-populates into the project, automated cue sheets, automated payment ledgers, all the necessary contractual information and communication management tools to professionally license music. Our technology reducing the time spent on a project by a possible 60% or more. 

Connecting the music supervisor with the visual production company and the copyright owner/admin, SyncLodge makes for ease and transparency for all sides of the sync licensing industry.

With features including:
SAM: Synchronization Authority Mapping system. Know the authority is confirmed.
PreSync: Audio to Visual syncing system. Easy idea syncing, team access, EDL export.
COMAP: Composer Market Place. Looking for a composer? Easy to search, vet, and connect.

Name: Nuovo Cinema Aquila
Description:
Nuovo Cinema Aquila è una multisala di Roma.
L'obiettivo che si prefigge è quello di offrire al pubblico romano il cinema in tutte le sue declinazioni: i film di intrattenimento ed i blockbuster, il cinema di tendenza, il cinema d'autore e d'essai, il cinema indipendente , le cinematografie minori e misconosciute di ogni angolo del globo, il cinema altro (come il documentario, l'animazione, la sperimantazione, etc). Una programmazione assai ricca ed articolata che trova fulcro in tre ottime sale di proiezione (pellicola e D-cinema) ed un foyer costantemente impegnato in istallazioni artistiche, presentazioni, incontri e dibattiti. Un cinema che non vuole essere il mero terminale della filiera produttiva del prodotto filmico, ma che proficuamente si pone come attore nel settore del cinema. Come? Innanzitutto ponendosi come scopritori di talenti, andando a scovare per festival, scuole di cinema e anteprime film e autori meritori di visibilità nonostante le maglie censorie del mercato. E ospitando e organizzando importanti festival (Festival del Cinema di Roma, Mostra del Cinema Nuovo di Pesaro, FishEye experimental film fest, RIFF, TekFest, Visioni fuori raccordo, ed altro), E ancora icon iniziative di impegno sociale che sappiano portare il cinema a divenire un presidio di cultura, intrattenimento, socialità e legalità all'interno del tessuto urbano.
Il NCA è collocato al Pigneto, un quartiere che è un crogiuolo di culture e il laboratorio culturale della città.

Name: New Version Studios Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
New Version Studios is a Visual Effects Studio providing uncompromising creativity solutions to the media, entertainment, advertising and gaming industries. We started in 2012 with stereoscopic 3D conversion and now offer whole package of visual effects services such as conceptual design, look development, 3D animation/CGI, matte painting, compositing and finishing. Led by Senior Visual Effects Supervisors and a team of 60+ artists brewed with a combination of youth and experience are passionate for creativity and are always up-to-date of the latest trends in the visual effects industry 
We are known for our ability to produce excellent quality just in time. Our process is reinforced by proficient production management, which lets us work on hundreds of shots or an entire film without any compromises on delivery time or quality. We normally achieve 95% first-time shot approval rates. When shots require creative iteration we work round the clock to produce the desired quality.
Our 3D conversion process impeccably integrates with natively filmed shots. This allows filmmakers with far more flexibility in cases when shooting in native 3D isn't possible or shots need to be fixed.

Description:

Na parte EDUCACIONAL temos consoco a UNIP - Universidade Paulista, onde coordenamos (e também damos aula) nas Pós Graduaçôes de Direção Audiovisual, Roteiro, Formação de Atores e Fotografia. Na parte internacional, somos embaixadores no Brasil da Full Sail University, de Orlando (EUA), a melhor universidade de cinema do mundo.

Name: CinemadaMare International Film Festival
Description:
CinemadaMare is an International and Itinerant Film Festival created in 2003 by the Italian LA7 journalist Franco Rina. In 2011, the Italian National Commission for UNESCO has granted its patronage to the festival.

Every year the festival hosts 200 young filmmakers coming from all over the world, for free. They participate in the festival over 10 weeks, during which they shoot their films and watch them publicly screened in the squares of the many cities the festival stops in. 

To all of them we guarantee free accommodation and a partial refund of the costs of their flight. 
The festival is itinerant, therefore we travel for thousands of kilometers along Italy every summer! 
The guys shoot their films in each city / stop of our tour. The aim is to let them work together on the same set. We also enable them to meet the greatest authors of the International film world. 

During these eleven years we have had the pleasure to host: Wim Wenders, Giuseppe Tornatore, Ken Loach, Giuliano Montaldo, Margarethe von Trotta, Mario Monicelli, István Gaál, Amos Gitai, Krzysztof Zanussi, Nicola Piovani among others. All of them have held workshops for the participants to the festival. 

The festival includes two film competitions. 
The Main Competition - The Official Competition for short films open to everyone. 
The Weekly Competition - An internal Competition for the participants of the festival that takes place every week-end.

Visit our Website : http://www.cinemadamare.com/
Follow us on : 
•Twitter : https://twitter.com/CinemadaMare
•Facebook : https://www.facebook.com/CinemadaMare
•Instagram : http://instagram.com/cinemadamare
•Pinterest : http://it.pinterest.com/cinemadamare

Name: Lucca Film Festival
Description: Il Lucca Film Festival, organizzato dalla Associazione Vi(s)ta Nova, nasce dalla volontà di proporre un nuovo approccio al cinema fatto di sguardi sempre nuovi che vedono tutto ogni volta come per la prima volta,promuovendo una cultura cinematografica dalla pluralità di sguardi, stili, prospettive: una cultura che non sia soltanto semplice visione tradizionale di un tessuto narrativo, ma esperienza sensoriale ed intellettuale. Affrontando gli apparenti contrasti tra cinema d'essai, sperimentale e mainstream nella più ampia categoria dell'opera d'arte, il Festival ha già ospitato molti registi, critici, attori e artisti internazionali, creando un momento di incontro e di scambio che si è sempre rivelato molto utile, interessante e a tratti unico.

Tel-Air 2.0, a legacy production company based in Hollywood, Florida, returns after a six-year hiatus with a renewed focus on motivational storytelling and excellence across film and streaming platforms. Name: FIRMAMENT Pictures srl
Description:
Firmament è una casa di produzione, post produzione, promozione e distribuzione cine-audiovisiva, che realizza e distribuisce lungometraggi, documentari, cortometraggi, serie, fiction, videoclip, spot pubblicitari, servizi e format web e televisivi, in ambito nazionale ed internazionale.
La società è costituita da un collaudato team di professionisti del cinema che da decenni lavora alla produzione e distribuzione di film, documentari, cortometraggi, videoclip seguendo e coordinando anche la produzione esecutiva e la filiera di post produzione per terzi.

La mission di Firmament è realizzare, distribuire e promuovere, insieme ai suoi partener artistici e tecnici di consolidata esperienza e capacità, film, biopics, docu-film, serie, servizi e contenuti di altissimo profilo.
La nostra realtà è strutturata per gestire sinergicamente al meglio le capacità, i talenti e le competenze dello Staff e di chi vi collabora.
Soci e collaboratori vantano più di dieci anni di esperienza in numerosi settori essenziali allo sviluppo delle attività: produzione, produzione esecutiva, soggetto e sceneggiatura, direzione della fotografia, casting, videoriprese cinematografiche, post-produzione, sottotitolazione, soundtrack, graphic design, social network, consulting, composizione musicale, concezione sonora, logistica e servizi di produzione correlati.

Un ruolo privilegiato ricopre il settore della distribuzione
digitale. La società, infatti, crede fermamente nelle
potenzialità di estesa diffusione di questo canale per
portare le sue opere e i suoi cataloghi di titoli ad un
pubblico sempre più vasto. 
Firmament ha la capacità e le
competenze per presentare, licenziare e vendere prodotti
cine-audiovisivi e televisivi alla maggior parte delle realtà,
piattaforme od emittenti, oggi presenti sul mercato
internazionale.

Name: MG PRODUCTION
Description: We are a film production company. We produce the films and docufilms that touch your heartstrings...

Name: Schwarzseher | Filmproduktion+
Description:
Wir lieben Film. Und wir lieben positive Veränderung. Deshalb nutzen wir das aufmerksamkeitsstärkste Medium aller Zeiten als Hebel, um für unsere Kunden was zu bewegen. 

Wir helfen Menschen mit ihren kleinen, mittleren oder mittelständischen Unternehmen die Aufmerksamkeit und das Vertrauen ihrer Zielgruppe zu gewinnen. Mit unseren Filmkampagnen erreichen sie die richtigen Mitarbeiter:innen oder die richtigen Kund:innen und komplexe Dinge werden plötzlich verständlich.

Wir unterstützen unsere Kund:innen dabei, ihre Kommunikation auf allen Ebenen auf die eigene Zielgruppe und deren Bedürfnisse auszurichten. Von der Klärung der größten kommunikativen Hebel durch Zielgruppen-Feedback über die passende Ansprache mit einem kreativen Storytelling bis hin zur Umsetzung als aufmerksamkeitsstarke Filmkampagne auf den richtigen Kanälen.

Filmkampagnen für echte Menschen eben.

Wir sind ein stark wachsendes Netzwerk von 18 fest angestellten und 20+ freien Film- und Onlinemarketing-Expert:innen in Oldenburg, Bremen und Berlin.

Wir sind seit 2021 die erste Gemeinwohl-bilanzierte Filmproduktion der Welt. Für uns ist »ein gutes Leben für alle« das wichtigste Ziel unserer Tätigkeit. Wir verstehen uns dabei als Teil einer Bewegung von vielen tausend Unternehmen weltweit, die zeigen wollen, dass sich Wirtschaflichkeit und sozial-ökologisches Bewusstsein miteinander verbinden können. 

Wir unterstützen Dich von der Strategie über die Idee bis zur Umsetzung und  Kampagne. Und wir unterstützen Dich und Deine Mitarbeiter:innen für einen besseren Arbeitsalltag im Marketing. Mit Coaching für Auftritte vor der Kamera, Kameraführung, Schnitt und Equipment-Auswahl. 

Wir sind die erste Gemeinwohl-bilanzierte Filmproduktion der Welt. Für uns ist »ein gutes Leben für alle« das wichtigste Ziel der Zusammenarbeit. Wir verstehen uns dabei als Teil einer Bewegung von tausenden Unternehmen weltweit, die Wirtschaflichkeit und sozial-ökologisches Bewusstsein miteinander verbinden.

Name: STUDIO IO
Description:
We are the Impossible Objects, or Studio IO. Impossible objects are those that can only exist in art form, not in the real world. Studio IO is a collective of industry creatives using our 30 years combined experience in both traditional and emerging media to bring ambitious projects to life.

With one foot in both sides of the industry, we are in a position to achieve the results many production companies simply cannot. It’s the best of both worlds: We get how the big boys do it, but we also have the know-how in the digital content and emerging film technology spaces that are too new and complex for traditional studios to get into easily.

Studio IO is the perfect marriage of art and logistics. Not only are each of us indie writer/directors with interesting projects under our belts; but we have also all produced and handled detailed professional logistics for major companies such as NBC, ABC, FOX, Discovery Channel, Disney+, National Geographic, MTV, Hulu, YouTube, HBO MAX, Amazon, Nickelodeon, The Food Network, as well as many of today's top digital brands like Funny or Die, SMOSH, Philip DeFranco, Screen Junkies, The Fine Bros, Machinima (Universal), Awesomeness TV (Warner Bros.), Donut Media, and SourceFed.

Name: Cine Forma
Description:
A Cine Forma nasceu com o propósito de ampliar o acesso ao conhecimento de mercado no audiovisual, unindo mentalidade de negócio, arte, comunicação e criatividade. Acreditamos que formar profissionais completos é essencial para o fortalecimento e a sustentabilidade do setor.

Nossos cursos são online e ao vivo, com interação direta com grandes nomes do mercado, criando uma ponte real entre profissionais experientes e talentos de todas as regiões do Brasil. Essa troca imediata é o que nos diferencia: aqui, o aprendizado acontece na prática, em contato direto com quem faz o audiovisual acontecer no país.

Sabemos que talento e criatividade são fundamentais, mas sem estrutura financeira, planejamento e estratégia, os projetos não saem do papel. Por isso, queremos que criadores, produtores e realizadores deixem de contar com a sorte e passem a atuar com clareza de visão e posicionamento estratégico.

A Cine Forma acredita que o criativo precisa dominar também o lado empresarial da profissão. Nossa missão é capacitar nossos(as) alunos(as) para que construam carreiras sólidas, sustentáveis e lucrativas, com autonomia e visão de mercado.

Somos uma plataforma de cursos ao vivo, especializada em Produção Executiva e Gestão de Projetos Audiovisuais. Criada por profissionais do mercado, para formar profissionais prontos para o mercado.

Aqui, você aprende não apenas a criar grandes produções, mas também a estruturá-las, financiá-las, distribuí-las e viver delas. Nossa abordagem é prática, estratégica e conectada à realidade do setor — preparando nossos alunos para atuar com segurança, propósito e impacto.

Name: Apollostreet Films
Description:
Apollostreet is een toonaangevend full-service filmproductiebedrijf met een bevlogen team van ervaren professionals in de filmindustrie. Wij zijn gedreven om hoogwaardige filmprojecten te realiseren, vanaf het allereerste concept tot aan de laatste fase van distributie.

Bij Apollostreet is ons ultieme doel om ambitieuze merken en agencies de tools te geven om hun verhalen op een onvergetelijke manier over te brengen. We geloven dat film een krachtig medium is om emoties te laten spreken en connecties te creëren met het publiek. 3.. 2.. 1.. ACTION ! Laten we een afspraak maken en inventariseren hoe wij jou kunnen ondersteunen. Geen tijd te verliezen, dus stuur ons een berichtje en laten we samen aan de slag gaan!

At Edgy Films, we’re more than just a film production company; we’re a collective of storytellers, innovators, and dreamers committed to the pulse of independent cinema. Nestled in the heart of the international film industry, we’ve carved out a niche where bold ideas meet cinematic craftsmanship, creating a sanctuary for stories that defy convention and challenge perspectives.

Edgy Films is your ideal partner for shooting your next film in Abu Dhabi, the capital of the United Arab Emirates (UAE), offering unmatched local expertise, a proven track record in the region, and specialization in setting up complex international co-productions.

Their dedicated team excels at navigating the intricacies of global filmmaking, collaborating with a network of international partners to bring a wealth of resources and perspectives to your project.

Their deep understanding of Abu Dhabi’s diverse landscapes - from modern urban settings to stunning desert vistas - ensures that your film will capture the perfect backdrop. With comprehensive production services, Edgy Films handles everything from permits and logistics to sourcing
top-tier local talent and equipment.

Moreover, partnering with them means you’ll benefit from Abu Dhabi’s generous film incentives, including a 35% to 50% cash rebate on production costs, making your project even more cost-effective. Combined with the region’s state-of-the-art infrastructure, Edgy Films ensures your production is both seamless and economically advantageous.

Name: Odesa International Film Festival
Description:
ODESA INTERNATIONAL FILM FESTIVAL (oiff.com.ua) is one of the major film events in the CEE region which has it all for the recipe of success: wonderful and eager audience, great location in the beautiful city of Odesa on the Black Sea shore, and great background in the film history. In 2016, there will be held 7th edition of the festival.

CONCEPT
OIFF is an audience festival which program focused on art mainstream films. The Grand Prix is awarded by the audience vote. The Jury chooses winners in the following nominations: Best Film, Best Director and Best Actor/Actress in the International Competition Program, and Best Ukrainian Film, Best Actor/Actress and Best Short for the National Competition Program.

AUDIENCE
The audience numbers are constantly growing:
2010 – 40,000
2011 – 70,000
2012 – 100,000
2013 – 115,000
2014 – 105,000
2015 – 120,000

MEDIA COVERAGE
The festival is winning its place in the local and international media event calendar*:
2010 – 350 journalists
2011 – 450
2012 – 700
2013 – 894
2014 – 900
2015 - 920
*In 2011, OIFF was acknowledged by HFPA (Hollywood Foreign Press Association)

OIFF HIGHLIGHTS
-	Open-air screenings, including the biggest one at historical Potemkin Stairs for 15,000 viewers
-	Film Industry Office and Film Market
-	OIFF opening at the Odesa Opera House (listed among the most beautiful sights of Eastern Europe according to Forbes magazine)
-	The New European documentary competition
-	non-competitive sections (“Gala Premieres”, “Festival of Festivals”, “Retrospectives”, “OIFF for Kids: with Children Kinofest”)


OIFF GUESTS
During its relatively short history, OIFF was honored by visits of John Malkovich, Cyllian Murphy, Michael Winterbottom, Rutger Hauer, Claudia Cardinale, Geraldine Chaplin, Jos Stelling, Peter Greenaway, Jerzy Stuhr, Roger Corman, Jim Sheridan, Darren Aronofsky and many other outstanding guests.

OIFF Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/odessaiff/

Name: Love Interdicted
Description:
Love Interdicted is the generic name of a writing project with several expected outputs, including a limited-run series (TV/streaming), at least a short film and web or print publications.
Love Interdicted is an original and deeply authentic incursion into a certain type of prostitution: one that seems compatible with individual self-determination and with an “other” life, namely family life - paying the price of systematic concealment and the psychological costs of a double life.
Behind Love Interdicted and giving it its powerful and original strength are:
- a desire for truth, and weariness with prevailing views and clichés in bibliography and filmography on themes or characters linked to sex work: male (from demonizing to idealizing) or sanitary points of view; or erotic visions of escorts, selected clients and their luxury hotels;
- a survey of many years, a survey that turned into friendship and admiration, an approach in depth, pursuing detail and singularities, rather than an encyclopedic approach.

While terribly close to real life events, Love Interdicted is pure fiction where, led by the story of a very lonely woman, battling many inner and outer spectres, almost accidentally, we glimpse a peculiar milieu of “antres vast and deserts idle”, hearts of darkness, heavy pasts, oversex.
We want to keep developing and produce Love Interdicted on a 100% independent basis, keeping total creative and ethical control of the project. 
Follow us and find out more on how you can contribute by joining our team as a (part-time) volunteer, or (later stages) as a funder, patron or small investor, or just by spreading the word.
Join Love Interdicted's unique strength and truthfulness, and help unheard voices wake up the readers' and viewers' minds, heart and senses.

Love Interdicted  is an original concept by Nuno Fonseca, co-written by Venus C. and developed by Cruel Lilacs Film Creation and Production.

Name: Wasabi Film
Description:
Wasabi Film har base i Filmby Aarhus og producerer film for danske og internationale brands, kampagnefilm, TV, Fiktion og dokumentarfilm. 

I de seneste år har vi blandt andet lavet kampagnefilm for Smukfest og Økologisk Landsforening, Vestas, produceret animationsfilm for ATP og energiselskabet Eniig, filmet en præsidentkampagne i Nigeria, optaget “Den Store Strikkedyst”, skudt reklamer for Aarstiderne og Bauhaus, og så har vi udviklet det prisvindende koncept “Gintberg på Kanten” samt den komedie serie GG HORSENS, sæson1 og 2.


Selskabet blev skudt igang, da det i 2003 producerede “M/K Annette – En sømand skifter køn” til DR Dokumentar. Det blev til to programmer af hver en times varighed, som blev set af en million danskere. 

Alt vi foretager os er drevet af lyst, nysgerrighed og en stærk ambition om altid kun at præstere det bedste. 

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Wasabi Film produces image and campaign film as well as television.
We draw on our rich experience with prime time TV productions for the major Danish television channels.

Today Wasabi Film have it’s base in Filmby Aarhus and our portfolio ranges from a presidential campaign in Nigeria, films for the music festival Smukfest in Skanderborg to corporate productions for Vestas and the development of the hit-program “Gintberg på Kanten” shown on DR1.

Wasabi Film was founded in 2003 when we produced “M/F Anette – A sailor changing sex” for DR Documentary. One million people saw the documentary when it first aired.

Everything we do is driven by our curiosity, our desire and strong ambition to produce nothing but the best.

Name: Archimede Srl
Description:
L'Archimede nasce nel 1997 come casa di produzione e distribuzione fondata da Matteo Garrone.
 Il primo film prodotto è Terra di mezzo ('97) in concorso al Festival Cinema Giovani di Torino (Premio speciale della giuria e premio Cipputi) , a cui seguiranno Ospiti ('98) premiato alla Mostra Internazionale d'Arte Cinematografica di Venezia (Premio Kodak), Menzione Speciale al Festival di Angers, Miglior Film al Festival di Valencia e Premio Kodak al Festival di Messina ed Estate Romana, realizzato nel 2000 e presente nella selezione ufficiale della Mostra del Cinema di Venezia.
 Nel 2008 l'Archimede produce l'opera prima di Gianni Di Gregorio Pranzo di Ferragosto premiato con il Leone D’Oro come Miglior opera prima alla 65° Mostra Internazionale d'Arte Cinematografica di Venezia.
 Nel 2011 co-produce, insieme alla Fandango, il film Reality diretto da Matteo Garrone e vincitore del Grand Prix al Festival di Cannes 2012.
Nel 2014 produce il fantasy Tale of Tales sempre diretto da Matteo Garrone con ampio respiro internazionale. Il film, presentato in concorso alla 68°esima edizione del Festival di Cannes, ma vanta un cast come Salma Hayek, Tobi Jones, Vincent cassel, J.C Relly oltre che importanti partecipazioni produttive quiali l’Hanway Filmd di Jeremy Thomas ed ha ottenuto 7 riconoscimenti ai David di Donatello tra cui il premio per la Miglior Regia.
Nel 2015 produce il primo corto d’autore e spot “Before design Classic” con la regia di Matteo Garrone per l’Edizione 2016 del Salone Internazionale del Mobile.
Nel 2016 inizia nuovi progetti indipendenti quali il noir drammatico opera prima “Achtung Baby” di Andrea Tagliaferri (ancora in lavorazione).
Ad oggi sta sviluppando il nuovo progetto di Matteo Garrone.

Name: Dutch Academy For Film (DAFF)
Description:
De Dutch Academy For Film verenigt ruim 750 makers uit alle disciplines, die zich inzetten voor een sterke filmsector.

DAFF-leden kiezen de nominaties en winnaars voor de Gouden Kalveren, zoals dat ook gebeurt bij de Oscars en de BAFTA’s. Daarnaast organiseert de Dutch Academy For Film activiteiten voor leden en zet zij zich in ter verbetering van de overlegstructuren van de sector. 

De leden van de Academy zijn filmprofessionals, die voor of achter de camera hun sporen verdiend hebben, en zich met expertise en kennis inzetten in het belang van de gehele sector.

De DAFF verenigt de audiovisuele sector doordat makers uit alle disciplines in één organisatie vertegenwoordigd zijn. Als vereniging willen we de zichtbaarheid van de Nederlandse film én filmmakers vergroten. We streven ernaar een verbindende rol te vervullen binnen de sector en werken hiervoor samen met alle vakverenigingen en andere relevante partijen zoals het ministerie van OCW, Eye en het Filmfonds.

Voor het uitreiken van de jaarlijkse filmprijzen werkt de DAFF samen met het Nederlands Film Festival. Tijdens het Nederlands Film Festival 2015 zijn voor het eerst de Gouden Kalveren voor lange speelfilm en lange documentaire door de Academy uitgereikt. Net zoals bij de Oscars (VS), de Bafta’s (UK), de Césars (Frankrijk) en de Lola’s (Duitsland) zijn het de filmprofessionals zelf die de winnaars van de grote Nederlandse filmprijzen in dertien categorieën kiezen.  

De DAFF is lid van FAN of Europe, het netwerk van nationale film academies en de European Film Academy. Sinds de oprichting in 2006 komt dit netwerk regelmatig samen om informatie en ervaring uit te wisselen. Het ontwikkelen van gezamenlijke activiteiten om de Europese cinema te promoten en het opleiden van jong talent staan hierbij hoog in het vaandel.

Name: Studio727
Description: Studio 727 was established in 1997, formly as a postproduction studio delivering film editing and animation. Soon the range of possibilities widened and Studio 727 become known on the Slovak market for its complex film a video post-production. Main focus are full length films, historical, documentary and short films, commercials and music videos etc. As for post-production services 727 Studio delivers the full palette of technologies – film scanning, digital color correction, digital film restoration, offline / online film editing, cartoons, 2D and 3D animation, online compositing, special visual effects and etc. Years of technological knowledge, supported with world leading technique, combined with experienced team of artists and operators, are making an optimal environment for the most sophisticated projects, whether on the level of logistics, creativity or technology. The Northlight II film scanner, only one in Slovakia, delivers film scanning on the most highest technological level. Consequent post-processing for digital restoration (only one in Slovakia) runs in most cases parallel to the scanning process enabling minimal technological delay. Practically unlimited potential of digital color correction in Autodesk Lustre can be used on reference monitors and projectors with the ability to simulate specific film materials in the system of Trueligth. The editing work is performed on up-to-date version of Avid Media Composer and Film Composer, respectively in Final Cut Pro. The team of experienced animators use Autodesk Maya, in collaboration with high computing power of dedicated raid servers and render stations. Compositing and special visual effects are delivered on the platform of Autodesk Flame/Flint, worldwide recognized leader in the field of compositing. The sound post-production is performed on the system of Digidesign ProTools.

Name: Coral Gables Art Cinema
Description:
Coral Gables Cinemateque Inc. is the nonprofit organization that operates the Coral Gables Art Cinema.

2020 marked the 10th anniversary of Gables Cinema as an anchor of Coral Gables community and culture. Since opening our doors October 15, 2010 our nonprofit cinema and its preeminent cultural programming has taken root and served almost 400,000 customers and infused $18 million into the local economy. In a typical year almost 20% of Coral Gables residents visit the Coral Gables Art Cinema. Miami-Dade County Department of Cultural Affairs invests $125,000 annually in our operations.

Coral Gables Art Cinema is a world-class institution and boasts world-class leadership in its board of directors, including: Mitchell Kaplan, who reinvented the community bookstore and has been profiled by the New York Times; Steven Krams a recognized leader in the international Cinema industry; Don Slesnick, former Coral Gables Mayor; David Duckenfield former Deputy Assistant Secretary in the U.S. Department of State’s Bureau of Public Affairs; Ana Salas Siegel, General Counsel for NBCUniversal Telemundo Enterprises; and Dr. Flor A. Mayoral, dermatologist and photographer.

Coral Gables Art Cinema is one of the brightest beacons Coral Gables has to offer and has been a source of significant economic impact on the neighboring businesses, who will now need every opportunity to reboot as we emerge from this crisis. Our history has demonstrated our contribution to our community.

Description:
Keystone Entertainment is an integrated entertainment company focused on producing, distributing family films, and content licensing. Keystone established a reputation as a pre-eminent filmmaker for the family market with the creation of the “Air Bud” franchise, which grew to include five films featuring Buddy the lovable golden retriever in various sports.

Air Bud was followed up with the “MVP” (Most Valuable Primate) series of three films featuring Jack the chimpanzee. Other films produced during this time included “The Duke”, “Spymate” and “Chestnut”. Following these films, the “Air Buddies” hit franchise was born, with installments ranging from golden puppies sledding across Alaska to walking on the moon. The Franchise has been an incredible success for Disney and continues to grow.

Keystone’s success in the high-concept, family film genre has enabled it to build strong relationships with major U.S. film studios including Disney, Miramax, Warner, Sony and others.

Nos films couvrent les questions géopolitiques, l’histoire, l’art et la culture, les sciences, la découverte et les faits de société. 
Notre expérience nous a permis de faire coïncider pertinence éditoriale et production de programmes audiovisuels dans des formes allant du documentaire de création au film d’investigation, du premier film de jeunes talents aux grandes séries internationales. 

Notre filmographie récente inclue : La série documentaire « Djihad sur l’Europe » de Hugo Micheron et Magali Serre, « Femme, Vie, Liberté : une révolution iranienne » de Claire Billet, « Fontainebleau, La vraie demeure des rois » de Stéphane Bégoin et Thomas Marlier, « Panique en Mer Baltique » de Frédéric Compain et Benoît Laborde, « Les Évangéliques à la conquête du monde » de Thomas Johnson, « Votre santé, un trésor très convoité » de David Carr-Brown…

Nous produisons aussi de nombreux films sur l’art. De grands portraits d’artistes : Brancusi, Joan Mitchell, Georgia O’Keeffe, Christian Boltanski, Gertrude Stein, Magritte, Rodin, Hitchcock-Truffaut, Boulez, Poliakoff, Ligeti, Edgar P. Jacobs, Blais, Messiaen, Claude Chabrol, Romain Gary, Sagan, Nijinski... Une série sur la photographie contemporaine  (14 x 26’) Ou des films thématiques : les coulisses de la Comédie Française, l’art contemporain en Chine, les 30 ans du Centre Pompidou, la sculpture en 3D, les musiques sacrées...

Name: FRED Film Radio
Description:
FRED is the radio for anyone passionate about cinema.

FRED (an acronym for Film Radio Entertainment & Dialogue) is a multi-channel internet radio station targeted at all those who love independent cinema and gravitate around the world of film festivals: filmmakers, film critics, journalists specializing in cinema, film students, festival organizers and film industry workers (producers, distributors, sales agents, etc.), and simply film buffs who want to know more about independent cinema.

FRED wants to convey “the festival experience”. The idea of FRED is to allow all those who cannot be at film festivals to share in the experience as if they were and to offer more in-depthThe idea of FRED is to allow all those who cannot be at film festivals to share in the background as if they were and to offer more in-depth information and targeted entertainment to those there. 
We provide information on film premieres, the response of critics and audiences to films and information on films’ production and distribution. We also offer information connected to productions and co-productions, the advantages of shooting in certain areas, interviews with festival directors and other key players in the film industry, or interviews with film directors, actors and critics. Now and then, we broadcast live from the festivals.

FRED radio is available online on  www.fred.fm and also on  iTunes\google play\spotify

Name: Ushuaia Film
Description:
Fondata nel 2017 dai registi Niccolò Maria Pagani e John Bonardo, Ushuaia Film è una casa di produzione cinematografica indipendente con sede a Milano.

Diventata Srl nel 2018, nei suoi primi quattro anni di vita Ushuaia, grazie anche alla collaborazione con Indiana Production, produce cinque film-documentari: Social Dream, realizzato nel 2018 per Sky Cinema e dedicato al mondo degli YouTuber; The Italian Spirit of Le Mans, il racconto della corsa automobilistica più leggendaria al mondo; Nick Drake: songs in a Conversation, presentato alla Festa del Cinema di Roma del 2019; Un sogno chiamato Vendée, che racconta il giro del mondo in barca a vela in solitario dello skipper Giancarlo Pedote; e Se ti abbraccio non aver paura, con il ritorno on the road di Franco Antonello e suo figlio Andrea, un ragazzo autistico.

Grazie a quest’ultimo progetto, realizzato nel 2018 mentre il regista premio Oscar Gabriele Salvatores girava il suo film Tutto il mio folle amore, ispirato alla storia di Franco e Andrea, Ushuaia si fa notare nel panorama internazionale partecipando a numerosi festival cinematografici in giro per il mondo, ottenendo circa trenta nomination e una decina di statuette. Nel 2021 entra inoltre nella selezione finale dei Nastri d’Argento, permettendo al film di andare in sala in più di 10 paesi nel mondo.

Parallelamente, Ushuaia dal 2017 realizza numerosi videoclip musicali (Malika Ayane, Cristiano Godano, Daniele Stefani, etc), spot pubblicitari (tra i clienti: Red Bull, Hyundai, Porsche, Paul & Shark, North Sail, Luna Rossa, DHL, Bullfrog, Snam, etc), e due cortometraggi (Forget Me Not, Mississipi 1…).

Dal 2020 produce per Giorgio Armani spa il format Talks, una serie di interviste, condotte dal Federico Russo di Radio Deejay, legate al mondo della musica e del cinema. 

Nel 2022 Ushuaia Film viene interamente acquisita da Niccolò Maria Pagani, diventando così srl a socio unico, e aumenta il proprio capitale sociale a 40.000€ interamente versati.

Somos un equipo de reconocida experiencia internacional que pensamos en el sonido como un ingrediente fundamental a la hora de contar historias. 

Nos comprometemos de modo creativo desde la etapa de escritura de guion hasta las mezclas finales, disponiendo de instalaciones adecuadas a las necesidades de cada proyecto.

Name: interfilm Berlin Management GmbH
Description:
INTERNATIONAL SHORT FILM FESTIVAL BERLIN
From its beginnings as a Super-8 festival in Kreuzberg, the International Short Film Festival Berlin has developed into one of the most important festivals in Europe. The six day event held in November draws filmmakers and visitors from all over the world.

KUKI – INTERNATIONAL SHORT FILM FESTIVAL FOR CHILDREN & YOUTH BERLIN
Known for its exceptional programming the International Short Film Festival for Children and Youth Berlin is dedicated to presenting fabulous and unusual films that young people would otherwise rarely get a chance to see. 

INTERNATIONAL SHORT FILM SALES
interfilm sales offers an ever-expanding catalogue of currently around 300 internationally successful and outstanding short films for exploitation on TV, DVD, Internet, mobile phones, closed-circuit and other media.

INTERNATIONAL SHORT FILM DISTRIBUTION
interfilm distribution offers short films not only to cinemas, but to festi- vals, institutes, associations, schools and a variety of other interested organisations.

INTERFILM AGENCY
From the monthly short film programme Shorts Attack to Going Underground, the short film festival in subway trains, DVDs right up to thematic programmes representing German short filmmaking at the EXPO 2010 in Shanghai – interfilm Berlin specialises in the conception and realisation of high-profile short film competitions and cooperative strategies relating to a specific theme or product.

IMPRINT
www.interfilm.de/impressum

Name: Arab Film and Media Institute
Description:
The Arab Film and Media Institute (AFMI) is a unique ecosystem to find, nurture, connect, and develop Arab film and media projects and empower local Arab talent to tell their communities’ stories in their own voices.

The Arab Film and Media Institute (AFMI) seeks to transform the way people see the world through Arab films. AFMI is built upon four main pillars: 

•	The Arab Film Festival, with expanded curated screenings, short film programs, and special events and showcases.
•	Education Program, providing films and content along with curricula to high schools and colleges to fight stereotypes and foster understanding of Arab experiences.
•	Training and Support for Filmmakers, including a Filmmaker in Residence, Master Classes and Fiscal Sponsorship
•	AFMI Original Content, to produce and support new content

AFMI launched in 2017.  First phase of the programming will be centered on the Education Program in Los Angeles and San Francisco, expanding to more cities nationally in 2018.

Name: Singapore Film Society
Description:
Singapore Film Society is the hub for film festivals and events in Singapore. Since our founding in 1958, we have been nurturing a growing community of cinephiles with carefully curated programming and events. We believe that film should be accessible to everyone, and we want to be an entry point for anyone who’s interested to learn more about film or the film industry.

SFS is a non-profit organisation, and is registered with the Registry of Societies in Singapore. We are funded solely by our members and sponsors, and are supported by our dedicated group of volunteers.

Name: Freelance Producer and Location Manager

I have been a location scout / manager, producer, and photographer for over thirty years working in Detroit, LA, Paris and NYC. I have scouted, location managed, and produced assignments for many productions, commercials and independents.

I have produced commercial advertising for over 25 years and have recently produced movies starring Eric Roberts, in Fractured, and David Arquette, in Orion; the critically acclaimed, Cash Only, which the NY Times called “the new Mean Streets” and a documentary on predatory lending, Loan America.

I have experience in Budgeting, Casting, Location Research and Scouting, Permits and Contracts, Vehicle and Equipment Rentals, Crew Booking, and Travel Coordination.

Please check my references and my website to see the breadth of my experience, everyone I have worked with has been overwhelmingly satisfied with my work.

Name: A Talk to Remember
Description:
A Talk to Remember helps families, wealth management professionals, and organizations create legacy projects for their loved ones, clients, and institutions, respectively. We specialize in producing documentary-style films that capture storytellers’ most meaningful moments and experiences, one conversation at a time. 

Unlike other companies that merely videotape a subject talking for several hours, we distill the highlights from your longer audio stories into a beautiful motif of shorter showcase pieces that you  — and friends and family  — will want to watch time and again. We then integrate your most cherished and newly digitized photographs and home videos with musical overlays to bring your core stories to life.

We believe passionately in providing a deeply personal, hassle-free, and joyous experience, which is why we dedicate ourselves to a handful of projects each year. We invite you to review our most recent work and learn why clients describe our legacy process as “truly rewarding,” “a trip down memory lane,“ and “pure fun!” 

Celebrate your life story today and preserve your family history for generations to come.

Name: Populate film agency
Description:
Populate är en kommunikationsbyrå för film – en filmbyrå – för samhällsbärande aktörer och företag som vill göra skillnad och fyller en viktig funktion i samhället.
Vi tror att det behövs filmbyråer, en ny typ av kommunikationsbyrå, med en samlad kompetens inom kommunikation, storytelling, filmproduktion och spridning. 

Varför jobba med oss?
Vi tror att en bra filmbyrå är lojal mot tittarna. Dagligen laddas det upp miljontals filmer på internet. Lösningen är sällan “ytterligare” en film, utan vi måste förtjäna tittarens uppmärksamhet. Det gör vi genom att alltid försöka utgå ifrån mottagarens villkor när vi skapar filmer. Då får vi filmer som både är relevanta och berörande. Och förhoppningsvis en upplevelse. Det är vad vi menar är lojalitet mot tittaren.

Vårt erbjudande
Vi är en strategisk fullservicebyrå inom kommunikation via film och rörliga medier. Vi hjälper våra uppdragsgivare med utbildning, rådgivning, strategi, konceptutveckling, idé- och manus, filmproduktion, distribution, spridning, effektmätning, analys och förvaltning. Alltid med fokus på film och rörliga medier och med målet att alltid skapa värde för våra uppdragsgivare.

Name: Goodfellas
Description:
Based in Paris, Goodfellas is a world-renowned independent film sales and production company. 

Films with which the Goodfellas team (formerly Wild Bunch International) was previously involved include Fahrenheit 9/11 by Michael Moore (Palme d'Or, 2004), The Emperor’s Journey by Luc Jacquet (Oscar for Best Documentary Feature, 2005), Pan’s Labyrinth by Guillermo del Toro (2006), The Wrestler by Darren Aronofsky (Golden Lion, 2009), The Artist by Michel Hazanavicius (5 Oscar wins including Best Picture, 2011), Blue is the Warmest Color by Abdellatif Kechiche (Palme d'Or, 2013), The Grandmaster by Wong Kar-wai, Dheepan by Jacques Audiard (Palme d'Or, 2015),Capernaum by Nadine Labaki (Jury Prize, Cannes 2018) and Megalopolis by Francis Ford Coppola.
 
Goodfellas will continue to build on its long-established relationships with world-renowned directors including Hayao Miyazaki (Spirited Away - Oscar for Best Animated Feature, Golden Bear, 2003), Ken Loach (I, Daniel Blake - Palme d'Or, 2016), two-times Palme d’Or winners Jean-Pierre and Luc Dardenne (Two Days, One Night), Kore-Eda Hirokazu (Shoplifters - Palme d’Or, 2018), Claire Denis (Both Sides of the Blade - Silver Bear, 2022, Stars at Noon - Grand Prix, Cannes 2022), Gaspar Noe, and Arnaud Desplechin, amongst numerous others.
 
The Goodfellas team is also renowned for discovering new and innovative directorial talent, such as J.A. Bayona (The Orphanage, 2007), Cristian Mungiu (4 Months, 3 Weeks and 2 Days - Palme d’Or, 2007), Ladj Ly (Les Misérables – Oscar Nominee, 2019), Kantemir Balagov (Tesnota, Beanpole - Best Director, Un Certain Regard, 2019), Dea Kulumbegashvili (Beginning - San Sebastian Golden Shell, 2020, April - Zabaltegi-Tabakalera 2024), Audrey Diwan (Happening - Golden Lion, 2021), Julia Ducournau (Titane - Palme d'Or, 2021), Alice Diop (Saint Omer - Silver Lion, Best Debut Film, 2022), Laura Carreira (On Falling - Silver Shell for Best Direction 2024).

Name: Filmlance International AB
Description:
Filmlance International is one of Scandinavia’s premier production-companies and leads the way in boundary-pushing storytelling, setting the standard for impactful entertainment built on thematic relevance. Filmlance has solidified its position through strong collaborations with partners such as SVT, DR, TV4, ZDF, Viaplay, Netflix and HBO.
Since 1988 Filmlance has crafted a portfolio of critically acclaimed drama series and award-winning feature films for a broad local and international audience. Titles like the long-standing Beck and The Sandhamn Murders, the renowned The Bridge, distributed in over 180 countries, the recent Netflix release Ronja the Robber’s Daughter, adapted from the celebrated work of Astrid Lindgren, Fallen for TV4 and Beartown for HBO. The repertoire extends to the streaming sensation Caliphate for SVT and Netflix and award-winning feature films, among others Run Uje Run (Guldbagge, Best Film, Best Script, Best Male Actor).

Filmlance International is part of Banijay Entertainment, media and entertainment powerhouse. Banijay, is home to over 130 production companies across 21 territories, a multi-genre catalogue boasting over 190,000 hours of original standout programming. Filmlance is based in Stockholm but also has an office in Malmoe.

Name: Festival Black Movie
Description:
International Independent Film Festival  Geneva 
26th edition | 17-26.01.2025

Né en 1991 d’une envie de montrer des films en provenance des pays d’Afrique, manifestation pluridisciplinaire et artistique jusqu’en 1998, le Festival Black Movie entame un tournant en 1999 sous l’impulsion d’une nouvelle direction.

Conservant la vocation initiale du festival de promouvoir des regards modelés par d’autres réalités et d’autres imaginaires que ceux du monde occidental, et en écho à la multiculturalité qui imprime son identité à Genève, le festival élargit la provenance des films proposés aux films des trois continents dits du Sud : Afrique, Asie et Amérique latine, et ponctuellement à des cinématographies européennes émergentes aux formes novatrices. La nouvelle direction recentre aussi complètement la manifestation sur le 7e art.

Le festival a également axé ses propositions cinématographiques sur des films d’auteur, indépendants ou aux formats hors normes, qui ne sortent que peu ou pas dans les salles de cinéma suisses. Son but est d’entrer en résonance avec des cinématographies contemporaines, ancrées dans des réalités sociales et esthétiques d’aujourd’hui, et de développer des programmations inédites et innovatrices.

Description:

Wir sind Filmnerds und das ist gut so. Denn unser Schwerpunkt liegt auf klar erzählten, visuell starken Produktionen. Dazu gehören Imagefilme, Werbefilme, animierte Erklärvideos, 2D- und 3D-Animationen sowie Produktvisualisierungen für Social Media, TV, DOOH und Kino. Das meiste entsteht bei uns inhouse. Das sorgt für effiziente Abläufe, kurze Kommunikationswege und viel kreative Freiheit.

Animation ist unsere besondere Stärke. Komplexe Themen machen wir verständlich, abstrakte Inhalte werden greifbar. Mit Liebe zum Detail und einem Gespür für wirkungsvolle Geschichten schaffen wir Bilder, die im Kopf bleiben und Emotionen auslösen.

Unsere Arbeiten wurden mehrfach international ausgezeichnet, unter anderem in Cannes und Los Angeles. Doch am wichtigsten ist uns, dass deine Botschaft ankommt.

Guave Motion steht für audiovisuelle Kommunikation, die bewegt
www.guavemotion.ch

Name: EUROVOD
Description:
Created in 2010, EuroVoD is a network of independent European Video on Demand platforms specialising in art-house films and independent cinema. Started as a rights holders' initiative, this European network adopted a collaborative management model, where small and medium enterprises pool resources and exchange know-how to increase the transnational circulation of European films. 

EuroVoD also strives to defend cultural diversity, develop Video on Demand as a new, legal channel for the distribution of audiovisual content and provides a new financial resource for the production of European films. With members in 12 countries, the network is constantly growing and already reaches a European audience of more than 385 million people, with more than 10,000 films available to watch.

Name: 102 Distribution
Description:
102 Distribution è una società di produzione e distribuzione cinematografica con sede a Roma, che si occupa di acquisire, distribuire o di produrre film italiani e internazionali, sfruttando i diritti in tutti i canali di distribuzione: cinema, home video, televisione e nuovi media, curando anche l’aspetto marketing del lancio e del posizionamento sul territorio.

Dopo aver iniziato l’attività, acquisendo film nuovi e di catalogo solo per il territorio italiano, 102 Distribution negli ultimi anni, ha iniziato ad allargare il raggio della distribuzione, facendo acquisizioni multi-territoriali dei diritti dei film e acquisendo a volte anche i diritti per tutto il mondo, curando anche l’aspetto delle vendite internazionali oltre alle uscite in paesi come USA, Canada, UK, Cina e altri.

Grazie al know-how del team, la 102 Distribution è stata tra le prime società in Italia a proporre le uscite nei cinema di classici come Le Iene e Pulp Fiction di Quentin Tarantino, o documentari sulla natura come La Vita negli Oceani doppiato da Neri Marcorè o documentari sull’economia come Freakonomics doppiato da Enrico Bertolino e Giovanni Floris, e rimanendo tutt’oggi molto presente nella sezione degli eventi al cinema.

102 Distribution è impegnata anche nella produzione, con le acquisizioni e lo sviluppo di progetti originali e con l’acquisizione di diritti di remake di film già realizzati e di diritti per gli adattamenti di libri di successo.

Name: Pinball Content
Description:
Costumavam nos chamar “produtora de vídeo”. Isso formava uma imagem muito clara na cabeça de nossos clientes. Porém, o mundo evoluiu e isso não nos define mais. Hoje criamos: PRODUTOS DIGITAIS AUDIOVISUAIS.

Utilizamos técnicas e ferramentas que vão além do processo de roteirizar, filmar, editar e entregar. Podemos criar roteiros a partir de pesquisas com as bases de dados do cliente e usar LLMs (large language model) como assistente. Nós também usamos câmeras, mas esse material será enriquecido com vídeos e imagens geradas por IA.

Sim, nós contratamos atores, mas há casos em que nós os criamos do zero com vozes e personalidades adequadas às necessidades do cliente. Assim como no estúdio, tratamos avatares como atores. Nós também criamos fotos de produtos, modelos, cenários, objetos, letterings, 3D e outros recursos usando inteligência Artificial Generativa. Temos uma equipe de nerds bem afiada! Criamos e executamos experiências virtuais, bots, chatbots e gráficos. Produzimos para qualquer tela em qualquer lugar: Imagens, gifs, memes, stories e conteúdo para redes sociais, conforme o briefing. Filmes publicitários, documentários, ficção e vídeos para vários propósitos de comunicação fazem parte do nosso portfólio.

Temos um carinho especial por educação e interesse em fazer parte da revolução que está em curso nesse setor.

O que fazemos é criar soluções artística e tecnologicamente alinhadas à ética e à experiência humana para responder aos desafios atuais da comunicação.

Name: Beyoğlu Sineması
Description:
Beyoğlu Sineması, kapısı sokağa açılan tarihi bir kent sinemasıdır. Ayrıca, 2020 yılında Beyoğlu Sineması tarafından kurulan 1989 Sinema Kulübü ile birlikte farklı bir mecradan sinema kültürünün parçası olmaya da devam edilmektedir.

Name: CATALYST FILMS
Description:
Catalyst Films is a non-profit organisation specialising in social impact campaigns for film, television and immersive media, with a particular focus on projects that are international in scope. It is headed up by Australian-British impact producer Dr Julia Hammett-Jamart, member of the Global Impact Producers Alliance, whose recent projects include the multi-award winning Zinder (France/Niger), the feature documentary Inside Gaza ('DocsConnect Impact Award' 2025 Movies that Matter, 'Best Global Issues Pitch' 2024 Sunnyside of the Doc ) and a forthcoming VR experience Gut Instinct (Venice Production Bridge 2025).

Catalyst's founding principle is that the challenges currently facing our world require pluridisciplinary solutions and global co-operation.  To this end our Advisory Board is constituted of international experts in climate, public health, social justice, education, legal affairs and policy as well as young communications professionals who ensure our work touches the generations that will be most affected by change.

Catalyst also leads impact producing workshops and masterclasses for key industry festivals and organisations including Venice Biennale College (Cinema Immersive), Festival de Cannes (Netherlands Film Academy), New Images Festival, EURODOC, Le Sommet des Arcs, La Fabrique des Formats and l'Institut National de l'Histoire d'Art, as well as KATUU, the annual residency for female filmmakers in Togo.

Catalyst -  HQ in Paris - Campaigns around the world

Name: MY Spotlight Independent VOD (MSIVOD) & MY Production Ltd. Film Distribution, Post & Production
Description:
At MY Production Limited, we bridge the gap between big and small-budget films through our two divisions. MY Production delivers full production and post-production services, including the creation of our own original titles. These films, along with submissions from other creators, are distributed through MY Spotlight Independent and released on our own VOD platform, MY Spotlight Independent VOD (MSIVOD), as well as on major video-on-demand platforms worldwide. We proudly showcase films of every scale side by side with equal respect. By championing the buy-only TVOD model, we help keep transactional video-on-demand alive, offering every film for just £1 to keep.

While ad-supported streaming lets audiences watch for free, many don’t realise how little filmmakers earn - often just pennies for hundreds of views, making it harder for independent creators to sustain their work. Our £1-per-film model, completely ad-free and with no subscription required, ensures filmmakers receive a fair return for every purchase. It allows audiences to enjoy great cinema while directly supporting the people who make it possible. After all, one pound a film won’t break the viewer - but it can make a world of difference to the filmmaker.

Name: Noche de Cine
Description:
Nochedecine.com nació el 20 de Diciembre de 2004, a partir de la necesidad informativa, en internet, de un portal que reuniera y organizara todos los recursos on-line sobre el mundo del séptimo arte: portales de noticias, secciones de biografías y filmografías, webs de estrellas, películas, carteleras, posters e incluso weblogs cinematográficos, todo un sinfín de recursos orientados al cine y lo que le rodea.

Una de las secciones a destacar, es el ´Centro Virtual Cinematográfico´, un lugar para los profesionales del sector que busquen información sobre estadísticas, estudios, asociaciones... una herramienta que reune los mejores datos, estadísticas, estudios y directorios de internet, a nivel nacional e internacional.
	
Con el portal se pretende organizar las mejores webs y weblogs sobre cualquier tema cinematográfico, de tal forma que los usuarios puedan acceder a las mejores fuentes de información dependiendo del tema que estén consultando, todo esto, sin olvidar los servicios propios de un portal de estas características: estrenos, noticias, especiales, foros, entrevistas, carteleras... En resumen el mayor recurso cinematográfico de la red de redes.

Name: Mostra Internazionale del film di Fantascienza e del Fantastico
Description:
Il Fantafestival nasce nel 1981, erede delle esperienze di alcuni appassionati di cinema fantastico che erano stati parte del risveglio di interesse per il genere registrato nella seconda metà degli anni ’70.
In particolare il festival è diretta derivazione delle rassegne nazionali di cinema di fantascienza organizzate per il circuito “Italnoleggio” negli anni ’74-’77 e delle grandi kermesse di cinema fantastico con le quali il Cineclub Tevere di Roma connotò la propria programmazione a partire dal ’75.

Iniziato al cinema Clodio di Roma nell’ottobre del 1981 e poi passato, negli anni, come sede principale al complesso Capranica-Capranichetta, al Barberini, al Quattro Fontane e al Savoy, il festival si è sempre caratterizzato per il taglio popolare, aperto verso il grande pubblico degli appassionati. In alcune occasioni è stato esportato anche in altre grandi città italiane, con contemporanee a Milano, Ravenna, Napoli, Verona e Genova. Grazie alle numerose collaborazioni internazionali nel 1986 è tra i soci fondatori della European Fantastic Film Festivals Federation, fortemente voluta dal Fantafestival e realizzata insieme ai festival di Bruxelles, di Sitges (Spagna) e di Oporto (Portogallo).

Giunto alle soglie dei trent’anni il Fantafestival è ancora vitale e si aggiorna continuamente con le nuove tendenze e realtà del cinema fantastico, preparando la propria struttura per gli anni futuri.

Name: Bel Air Film Festival
Description:

The festival is the largest community event held throughout Bel-Air, and attracts thousands of movie industry pros and media from around the world. The festival promotes the appreciation and knowledge of cinema. Screenings are held throughout the Bel-Air community and greater Los Angeles.

BAFF is dedicated to encouraging underprivileged film school students and is in the process of developing a film school scholarship program to some of the most prestigious film schools. In addition to film, the Bel-Air Film Festival supports and promotes art school programs throughout Los Angeles County.

BAFF includes opening and closing night galas, an education series of film panels, a special red carpet event night recognizing British film hosted by Brits in LA, special red carpet film and comedy night, screenings in private estates, music performances, and networking with some of the top industry pros. Festival winners awarded in a private closing night ceremony. Winners are further assisted with introductions to distribution companies after the event.

Name: SoundTrack_Cologne
Description:
In over 40 round tables, panels, workshops and networking events, SoundTrack_Cologne focuses on current developments in culture, law, marketing and technics of media music and offers business cases and networking events. It will take place for the 22nd time in 2025. 

SoundTrack_Cologne is a film event - from the music perspective. The event addresses business professionals, music students, and everyone interested in film and music.

When it comes to film narratives, SoundTrack_Cologne aims to give its audience a diverse and versatile experience of music and sound. Judicial, economic, and aesthetic work conditions of film composers in a global market stand at the forefront, whereas a dialogue is established between the various film trades in workshops, workshop talks, case studies, and panel discussions by experienced and established film composers to pass on their knowledge to the next generation. 

With competitions such as the European Talent Competition and Peer Raben Music Award, SoundTrack_Cologne aims to appeal to the younger generation of composers and sound designers. With AcadeMeet, SoundTrack_Cologne also hosts events for the European universities and education institutions.

Name: Shine Global Inc
Description:
Mission Statement:
Shine Global improves children's lives by telling powerful stories that raise awareness, promote action, and inspire change.

What do we do? 
Shine Global is a non-profit media company. We produce inspiring films and compelling content about underserved children. Through tailored distribution and outreach, we connect with our audiences in communities, classrooms, museums, and on capitol hill as part of a powerful engagement campaign to encourage social change.

What issues do we explore? 
Shine Global has taken action on issues including child soldiering, undocumented immigration, child labor, homelessness, parental incarceration, child abuse, religious intolerance, stereotyping, and sexual exploitation.

Our passion and hard work have been rewarded:
√	Our films have won more than 100 major awards, including an Academy Award for Best Documentary Short Subject for Inocente and an Academy Award-nomination for War/Dance.
√	Millions pf viewers have seen our films on platforms such as MTV, EPIX, Netflix, iTunes, and DVD as well as in theaters, schools, and community organizations.
√	War/Dance was shown to members of Congress shortly before the passage of the Child Soldiers Protection Act of 2008
√	1 Way Up convinced a London community council to invest in a BMX track for youth.

Name: Trieste Film Festival - Alpe Adria Cinema
Description:
The 34th Trieste Film Festival will be held from January 21 - 28, 2023

Founded on the eve of the fall of the Berlin Wall, Trieste Film Festival is the first and most important Italian festival for Central and Eastern European Cinema. For thirty years it has celebrated productions and filmmakers little known - if not completely unknown - to audiences in Italy and the West in general.
In its 33 years of activity the Association Alpe Adria Cinema and its main project, the Trieste Film Festival, have always stood out for the originality of their initiatives. The festival has analysed and brought to light films and directors that have been forgotten for many years.
The Association Alpe Adria Cinema was founded with the precise aim of promoting and expanding all initiatives in the field of cinema, experimentation and video providing a factor of cultural growth and specific investigations in the area of the countries of Central and Eastern Europe, Central Asia and the countries on the Mediterranean.
The Trieste Film Festival has acquired increasing importance nationally and internationally, becoming a unique point of reference, above all as regards the film-making of Central and Eastern European countries.
At a national level, the festival plays a leading role, being the only festival to have dealt with the film production of these countries for years and with scrupulous attention.
Beside the official selection and the sidebar programmes, starting from 2010 the festival hosts the co-production meetings “When East Meets West”, which involves more than 120 professionals coming from all over Europe.

BEELDRIJK voorziet grensverleggende ondernemers van een straffe audiovisuele oplossing die visibiliteit en vertrouwen genereert, die prikkelt en overtuigt, die de aandacht grijpt en vasthoudt, vandaag én morgen.

Bij BEELDRIJK willen we méér dan louter meerwaarde creëren. We willen een duurzame en standvastige klantrelatie uitbouwen en je geloofwaardigheid, naamsbekendheid en conversie vergroten op lange termijn. We creëren samen een visuele merkidentiteit die de jaren moeiteloos trotseert.

Onze klanten betekenen alles voor ons. Daarom gaan we niet gewoon the extra mile, maar lopen we een volledige marathon. We leveren niet louter piekfijn afgewerkt materiaal, maar blijven sleutelen tot elke pixel goed zit. We streven niet zomaar naar klantentevredenheid, maar transformeren onze klanten liefst in ware ambassadeurs. Daarom bundelen we de hoge kwaliteit van onze foto- en videoproducties met een betrouwbare service, heldere communicatie en ultrapersoonlijke samenwerking.

Jouw verhaal zal stralen als nooit tevoren, dat is onze belofte. Want enkel als we jouw verwachtingen overstijgen, is onze opdracht geslaagd.

Setelah itu, bermula pada 27 Mac 2004, FINAS telah diletakkan di bawah Kementerian Kebudayaan, Kesenian dan Warisan (KEKKWA). Mulai 9 April 2009, FINAS telah diletakkan di bawah Kementerian Penerangan, Komunikasi dan Kebudayaan (KPKK). Pada 15 Mei 2013, FINAS telah diletakkan di bawah Kementerian Komunikasi dan Multimedia Malaysia.

The four-day event gives independent filmmakers an opportunity to have their films seen by peers, film industry pros, and their audience. Submitted films are reviewed by a panel of jurors and prizes are awarded for the best films in a number of categories. PJIFF also provides children, teens, and adults with the opportunity to participate in guided hands-on filmmaking workshops. The 2023 festival will be held in April in the cities of Morgan Hill and Gilroy, California, just south of Silicon Valley. PJIFF i12th - 19th in the communities of Morgan Hill, Gilroy, San Martin, Hollister, and San Juan Bautista.  PJIFF is an all-volunteer organization and part of Poppy Jaspers Inc., a 501c3 nonprofit.

Name: Drôle de Trame
Description:
Drôle de Trame specializes in the production and directing of documentary films, multimedias, installations and stage projections. We follow and work along film makers with a singular and innovating look at history, culture or sciences. We also explore the new territories of audio-visual creation through our new medias productions.

Drôle de Trame est spécialisée dans la production de contenus audiovisuels, documentaires, multimédia et transmédia, la conception et la réalisation d'installations et projections spectaculaires. L’originalité et la diversité des mises en œuvre de l’image est au cœur de nos activités.

Avec ses partenaires tv, musées, institutions culturelles et scientifiques… Drôle de Trame explore les nouveaux territoires de la création audiovisuelle, développe son catalogue de films, et participe à la reflexion sur les outils de diffusion, l’ergonomie et l’interactivité à travers ses productions multimédias et webdocumentaires.

Name: Bedlam Film Productions
Description: Bedlam Film Productions is an independent film and TV production company who received international recognition after the release of ’The Kings Speech,’ (2010) Starring Colin Firth, Geoffrey Rush and Helena Bonham Carter. The film achieved critical acclaim and won four Oscars, including Best Picture and seven BAFTA Awards. This major feature film production won over 80 awards in total and grossed over £300 million at the global box office. Other Bedlam successes include Steel Country (2018) starring multiple-award winning actor, Andrew Scott.

Name: Women In Film and Television International
Description:
WIFTI is a global network dedicated to advancing professional development and achievement for women working in all areas of film, video and other screen-based media. The first WIF network (Women in Film LA) was established in Los Angeles in the 70’s as a reaction to male dominance in the film industry. Today, there are around 50 WIFT and WIFT-partner chapters on six continents – all working for the same goal: gender balance in the industry.
WIFTI was established as the global network connecting all others to speak with one common voice. The strength of WIFTI is based on the strength coming from every member of every chapter all around the world. Together we make a change.

To root our mission towards connection, visibility and knowledge, we are running a series of in-person and online events year-round and collect knowledge in our hub.

Name: Atlanta Jewish Film Festival
Description:
Since 2000, the Atlanta Jewish Film Festival (AJFF) has engaged and entertained our city’s diverse communities through curiosity, conversation, and culture. As one of Atlanta’s premier philanthropic arts organizations, AJFF delivers world-class international and independent cinema, using film as a vehicle to promote empathy, meaningful dialogue, and universal, cross-cultural understanding. AJFF champions an inclusive exploration of the Jewish experience, its complex history, and its intersection with people of all faiths, ethnicities, and backgrounds.

Through the power of storytelling, AJFF brings together a wide range of community leaders, advocates, filmmakers, and educators to contextualize an ever-expanding range of topics, uniting over 38,000 active festivalgoers annually with both in-theater and streaming content offerings.

With an emphasis on continuous innovation and mission-driven expansion, AJFF seeks to inspire the next generation of cinephiles and the culturally curious by actively broadening its educational outreach, community engagement, and accessibility efforts through captivating annual programming and events.

Name: Snowglobe Film
Description:
Snowglobe is a film production company established in Copenhagen in August 2015 by producers Mikkel Jersin, Katrin Pors & Eva Jakobsen.

With its strong international roots, and particularly strong affiliation with Latin America, Snowglobe is a dynamic production company working with feature films and TV series across borders. The company’s primary focus is to develop innovative cinematic content and international co-productions of high-quality from a new generation of filmmakers. The criteria are enthusiasm, quality and artistic integrity.

Snowglobe currently develops, produces and co-produces a nuanced selection of films with an artistic and commercial core by new as well as established directors, who all share a great passion for filmmaking.

The producers’ former and current work include films by directors such as Amat Escalante, Ask Hasselbalch, Ciro Guerra, Joachim Trier, Jonas Arnby, Josefine Kirkeskov, Lisa Langseth, Marianne Blicher, Pernilla August, Ralitza Petrova, Rasmus Birch, Sara Johnsen, & Rúnar Rúnarsson.

Name: filmfaust GmbH
Description:
We believe in the uniqueness of the projects we choose to develop, accompanying our writers from their very first idea to the red carpet. We support them in their aesthetic, thematic, and emotional journeys, while placing great importance on the financial and production feasibility of each project.

We are deeply committed to the visibility and diversity of all artistic and political voices, as we consider them essential to the cultural and social fabric of society. Our projects are designed to contribute meaningfully to societal and political discourse, and we firmly believe in fostering dialogue between even the most contrasting perspectives. And we aim to do all this through the power of cinema!

Our debut feature film, Oray by Mehmet Akif Büyükatalay, won the Best First Feature Award at the Berlinale in 2019, along with numerous other international accolades. It saw theatrical releases in Germany, France, and Turkey. In 2022, our first documentary, Love, Deutschmarks and Death by Cem Kaya, premiered at the Berlinale, where it won the Panorama Audience Award. The film was nominated for the German Film Award in 2023, followed by a Grimme Award in 2024.
Our short films have also enjoyed success. Berzah by Deren Ercenk was nominated for the German Short Film Award in 2020, while Immaculata by Kim Lêa Sakkal was invited to the Directors’ Fortnight at Cannes.
