Name: Plataforma Nuevos Realizadores (PNR)
Description:
La Plataforma Nuevos Realizadores (PNR) es una asociación sin ánimo de lucro fundada en 1989 por un grupo de realizadores y productores emergentes, y que ha contado entre sus socios, en los inicios de sus carreras cinematográficas, con directores como Icíar Bollaín, Fernando León, Jaime Rosales, Chema de la Peña, Juan Vicente Córdoba, Manane Rodríguez, Mónica Laguna, Esteban Crespo y un largo etcétera de reconocidos cineastas.

La PNR nació con el objetivo de lograr un espacio público para los nuevos realizadores, para la proyección y fomento de sus cortometrajes, y que también les sirviera de plataforma hacia sus primeros trabajos largos. Por ello viene estableciendo acuerdos de colaboración sobre exhibición, difusión, normativa y formación con entidades públicas y privadas como Filmoteca Española, ICAA, Comunidad de Madrid, SGAE y Fundación SGAE, EGEDA, asociaciones audiovisuales, etc.

En 1991 la PNR creó la Primera Muestra de Cortometrajes de Socios PNR, germen de lo que con el tiempo ha llegado a ser el actual Festival de Cine de Madrid-PNR, importante espacio de encuentro que poco a poco se ha convertido en una de las grandes citas anuales de los cineastas independientes españoles.

Desde 2002 la cuota por ser socio PNR se mantiene en 9,30 € al mes, es decir casi lo que cuesta hoy en día una entrada de cine. Así, el total anual es de 112 €, abonables trimestral, semestral o anualmente. Pero además, con motivo de su 25 aniversario, la asamblea PNR aprobó un descuento en la cuota del primer año, de 112 a 90 €, para todos aquellos que demuestren ser estudiantes audiovisuales en España (ECAM, TAI, Séptima Ars, ESCAC…) o socios de asociaciones e instituciones del sector audiovisual español (Coordinadora del Cortomatraje, AIC, Academia del Cortometraje, SGAE, CIMA, DOCMA…).

Si eres director/a, productor/a o realizador/a audiovisual, échale un vistazo a todas las ventajas de nuestros socios/as y Únete a nosotros/as!!!

Name: World Class Film Awards
Description:
The World Class Film Awards (WCFA) is designed to honor and appreciate talented filmmakers who have overcome obstacles to create something extraordinary.
Our mission is to discover high quality and ambitious films, to promote filmmakers’ works internationally and to be an important asset in the next step in their career.

We aim to give recognition, exposure and respect back to the filmmakers, which many film festivals have forgotten to provide. Our commitment is to become the leading international platform for filmmakers to showcase their most outstanding work and gain inspiration for their careers. We truly believe that every filmmaker, whether they are established award-winners or first-time creators, should have the chance to flourish and advance their careers. We strive to provide a supportive and authoritative environment that empowers all filmmakers to achieve their goals and reach new heights of success.

Elevate your career and honor your hard work by gaining the global recognition you deserve. You have put in the time, effort, and dedication to achieve your goals, and now it's time to share your masterpiece with the world. Let your projects shine on a global stage and inspire others to pursue their dreams with the same passion and commitment.

WCFA is an international competition with Public Screenings in Cinema and Exclusive Awards Gala Ceremony to celebrate the best talents that the Independent Industry has to offer from the most prestigious competitions around the globe.
During our Grand Gala Dinner Awards Ceremony, the winners of each category are honored with a distinguished Trophy award, recognizing and commemorating their exceptional talents and achievements in the world of film.
This special night will include the “World Class Creator Award” by The FilmmakerLife Magazine to honor distinguished individuals who have achieved outstanding professional excellence in their field.

Le temps d'une semaine, sa programmation mêle projections de films, diffusion de ressources radiophoniques, conférences, expositions, concerts, rencontres avec les réalisateurs·trices…

Le Festival défend plusieurs objectifs : offrir à un large public des créations filmiques originales, bouleversantes et intelligentes, en provenance de cinq continents, en lien avec la transition écologique et
énergétique; et agir pour la protection de la planète en alertant, en questionnant, en sensibilisant et en émerveillant par le biais de projections dans les cinémas et dans divers lieux de diffusion à Toulouse et en Occitanie.

La prochaine édition aura lieu à l'automne 2023, en attendant vous pouvez suivre les actions à l'année de l'association Film Recherche et Développement Durable (FReDD) sur le site lefredd.org.

Name: Filmfonds Wien
Description:
Vorrangiges Ziel des Filmfonds Wien ist, Wien als Film- und Medienstandort sowie als Drehscheibe des internationalen Filmschaffens zu stärken. Filmförderung ist Kulturförderung, aber auch Wirtschaftsförderung im allgemeinen Sinn und trägt zur Erhaltung der Beschäftigung in der Filmbranche bei, einem Kernstück der Kreativwirtschaft.

In Verfolgung dieser Ziele vergibt der Filmfonds Wien erfolgsbedingt rückzahlbare Zuschüsse und – unter bestimmten Voraussetzungen – nicht rückzahlbare Zuschüsse für Projektentwicklung, Herstellung und Verwertung von Filmen. Die eingereichten Projekte werden nach ihrer kulturellen, künstlerischen und filmwirtschaftlichen Bedeutung für Wien beurteilt. Letztere wird am Wiener Filmbrancheneffekt gemessen: Mindestens 100 Prozent der gewährten Fördermittel müssen der Beschäftigung Wiener Filmschaffender, der Nutzung der Wiener Filminfrastruktur oder Wien als Drehort zugutekommen. Der tatsächlich erzielte Effekt liegt jedoch seit Jahren im Durchschnitt weit über 200 Prozent.

Eine weitere wichtige Aufgabe fällt dem Filmfonds Wien darin zu, den von ihm geförderten Filmen – allen voran den am Standort Wien entwickelten österreichischen Filmen – zu einer größtmöglichen Öffentlichkeit zu verhelfen. Darüber hinaus fungiert der Filmfonds Wien als Plattform für alle Belange des Filmschaffens in Wien, vor allem durch Beratung und Vernetzung sowie Partnerschaften im Bereich der Aus- und Fortbildung auf regionaler und internationaler Ebene und mittels einer gezielten Strukturförderung.

Die Stadt Wien finanziert den Filmfonds Wien im Jahr 2022 mit rund 11,5 Millionen Euro.

Name: Asociación Estatal de Cine
Description:
NUESTRO OBJETIVO

Nuestro objetivo es hacer crecer la industria del cine y, con ella, la riqueza, el empleo, la cultura y la innovación en España.

NUESTROS COMPROMISOS

Nuestro compromiso con la Sociedad:
La sociedad avanza y progresa cuando se impulsan iniciativas pensadas para mejorar la vida de todos. Es la razón por la que nos comprometemos a:
1. Impulsar el crecimiento económico del país, ya que somos uno de los sectores con mayor crecimiento en el mundo.
2. Crear empleo cualificado, el tipo de trabajo que ofrece el ámbito audiovisual.
3. Contribuir al desarrollo cultural del país, y a su expansión internacional.

Nuestro compromiso con la Industria:
Una industria que comparte objetivos no compite entre sí, sino que es competitiva en el marco global. Por eso, nos comprometemos a:
1. Promover la unidad y el desarrollo de nuestro sector.
2. Mantener un diálogo permanente con los actores políticos y económicos nacionales e internacionales.
3. Mejorar la percepción social de la industria del cine.

Y, por supuesto, nuestro compromiso con los Asociados:
1. Ser la voz colectiva frente a las instituciones en todas las cuestiones que les afecten.
2. Defender sus intereses profesionales y comerciales, y mejorarlos si cabe.
3. Mantenerles actualizados sobre la actividad pública y privada que afecte a sus intereses.

Name: Europa Creativa Desk - MEDIA Catalunya
Description:
El subprograma MEDIA és una iniciativa de la Unió Europea que té per objectius preservar i potenciar la diversitat cultural i lingüística europea i la seva cinematograﬁa i patrimoni audiovisual, garantint-ne la seva accessibilitat al públic i promovent el diàleg intercultural; enfortir la competitivitat del sector audiovisual en un mercat lliure, i augmentar la circulació internacional i el visionat dels productes audiovisuals europeus dins i fora de la UE. 

Europa Creativa Desk - MEDIA Catalunya és l'oficina d'informació del Subprograma MEDIA a Catalunya. Les funcions d'Europa Creativa Desk - MEDIA Catalunya són:

1. Donar assistència als professionals per a presentar candidatures als ajuts MEDIA (Informació i formularis disponibles al nostre lloc web, traduccions al català, atenció personalitzada, recordatoris de dates límit, consells per millorar candidatures, presència als principals festivals i mercats, etc.)

2. Proporcionar informació sobre el subprograma MEDIA (Notícies diàries al nostre lloc web, servei de subscripcions per correu electrònic, informacions i seguiment en directe d’esdeveniments a les xarxes socials, vídeos de jornades i conferències, revista digital, publicacions, MFDB, etc.)

3. Ajudar els professionals catalans a millorar la competitivitat de les seves candidatures i millorar-ne el seu potencial internacional (Organització de jornades, xerrades i debats sobre temes d’interès, posada a l’abast i elaboració d’estudis, organització de sessions d’assessorament individuals amb experts, etc.)

Name: Festival de Cine de Madrid PNR
Description:
El Festival de Cine de Madrid FCM-PNR es ya un evento propio de la ciudad de Madrid. Es uno de los certámenes cinematográficos más antiguos de la capital y desde su primera edición en 1991 está consolidado como un escaparate fundamental para producciones emergentes, a las que da cobijo y promoción, aglutinando la mejor selección del diverso cine nacional que no se comercializa en nuestro país.
Con foco en obras de los nuevos realizadores, es un lugar de encuentro en constante búsqueda de nuevas narrativas y creadores que necesiten una ventana desde la que proyectarse. Su identidad propia y diferenciada hace que su público crezca año a año y se renueve con nuevas generaciones de espectadores y autores, muchos de los cuales serán con los años quienes muestren sus obras al gran público y quienes se verán atraídos por estas, lo que ha venido sucediendo en ediciones previas. En definitiva, constituye una de las citas ineludibles para el público cinéfilo de Madrid y ocupa un puesto relevante en el circuito nacional de festivales, por lo que está incluido en la preselección de candidaturas a Mejor Cortometraje en los Premios Goya de la Academia de la Artes y las Ciencias Cinematográficas de España.

Historias que transmitan, atrapen y a menudo hagan reflexionar al espectador.  

Apostamos por proyectos de cine de autor, ofreciendo oportunidades a los nuevos realizadores, que reflejen los valores que se quieren transmitir desde la productora: creatividad, talento, compromiso social, y sobre todo, amor por el séptimo arte.

Under the leadership of Lee Mancini and Gillian Byrne, Agility Films continues to push the boundaries of storytelling. 

Agility Films is more than just a production company; we are a collective of storytellers committed to making a difference through film. Our passion for storytelling, combined with our technical expertise and dedication to community, sets us apart. 

Join us on our journey as we continue to explore new horizons in film production, bringing stories to life in ways that are both powerful and unforgettable.

Name: Haus des Dokumentarfilms
Description:
Das Haus des Dokumentarfilms – Europäisches Medienforum Stuttgart e.V. (HDF) widmet sich in seinem Programm, in Forschung und Förderung dem dokumentarischen Film in allen Facetten – ob Fernsehen, Kino oder Streaming. Ein großer Teil der Arbeit findet Eingang in Workshops/Meisterklassen und Kino-Premieren sowie in Online-Angebote wie dokumentarfilm.info, DOKsite oder die kostenlose DOKapp. Sie spiegelt sich überdies in der Vernetzung mit anderen Institutionen sowie den jährlich stattfindenden großen Branchenevents. 

Zu den Leuchtturmveranstaltungen des HDF zählen das Roman Brodmann Kolloquium mit Preisverleihung in Berlin (am 19. April 2024 mit dem Roman Brodmann Preis ausgezeichnet: Farahnaz Sharifi für MY STOLEN PLANET) sowie DOKVILLE in Stuttgart – am 20. und 21. Juni 2024 im Hospitalhof (+ Livestream) mit Impulsvorträgen, Panels und Case Studies zum Thema KRIEG UND DES:INFORMATION. 

Dem HDF angegliedert ist die Landesfilmsammlung Baden-Württemberg (LFS), die im Jahr 2000 als zentrales Archiv für das Filmerbe des Bundeslandes ins Leben gerufen wurde. Ihre Aufgaben sind die wissenschaftliche Erfassung, Restauration, Digitalisierung und Zugänglichmachung von historischem Bewegtbild. Inzwischen umfasst die Sammlung über 12.000 Filmtitel, darunter Image- und Werbefilme, Städte- und Firmenporträts sowie Amateuraufnahmen.

Mitglieder des 1991 gegründeten Vereins sind das Land Baden-Württemberg (MWK), der SWR, SWR Media Services, die Stadt Stuttgart, die Verwertungsgesellschaft der Film- und Fernsehproduzenten, der Hessischer Rundfunk (hr), das ZDF, der Westdeutsche Rundfunk (WDR), die MFG Medien- und Filmgesellschaft Baden-Württemberg, Arte, der Bayerischer Rundfunk (BR), der Rundfunk Berlin-Brandenburg (rbb), die IHK, der Norddeutsche Rundfunk (NDR), die Evangelische Landeskirche Württemberg, die Diözese Rottenburg-Stuttgart und Radio Bremen.

A Saburá é uma produtora de vídeo criada em 2021 e está comprometida não apenas com a excelência na entrega de projetos audiovisuais para a indústria, mas com o impacto que esse conteúdo pode gerar para o cliente, atuando como business partner. Nosso papel é consultivo, colaborativo e estratégico.

Chez Noé Cinémas, nous pensons que le cinéma ne se limite pas à une séance dans le noir. C’est un lieu de vie, de rencontre, de transmission.

Name: Aurora Filmes
Description:
A Aurora Filmes é uma produtora audiovisual voltada para o mercado de cinema e TV do Brasil e do exterior. Fundada em 2006, aposta no desenvolvimento de um cinema que alia público, conteúdo e identidade cultural.

A partir de uma cuidadosa curadoria, a produtora busca fomentar a diversidade de identidades profissionais e o debate de estilo e linguagem para o audiovisual. Ao longo dos anos, vem formando importantes parcerias para a realização de suas obras, como coproduções com a França, Alemanha, Espanha, Uruguai, Argentina e Canadá.

Os projetos da Aurora Filmes são aclamados por crítica e público e já receberam importantes reconhecimentos, como o Prêmio Hubert Bals Fund (Holanda) e o Prêmio da Indústria/Cine em Construcción do Festival de San Sebastián (Espanha), além de terem participado e sido premiados em importantes festivais, como Festival de Cannes, Berlinale, Locarno Festival, Festival Internacional de Cinema de Rotterdam, Festival Internacional do Novo Cinema Latino-americano de Havana, Festival Cinélatino Encontros de Tolouse, Mostra Internacional de Cinema de São Paulo, Festival de Brasília, Festival do Rio, Mostra Tiradentes, entre outros.

A Aurora Filmes acredita no poder da arte de emocionar e transformar, de trazer novas reflexões e provocar discussões importantes sobre os mais variados temas.

Digital Revolution Studios is a full-service, stereoscopic 3D production company that specializes in creating beautifully realistic high quality stereoscopic 3D content from creation to delivery.

Each project is managed by a team of highly skilled industry professionals with a combined experience of over 40 years as leaders in stereoscopic 3D technology and production. From stereographers to post-production specialists, Digital Revolution Studios has every resource and ability to create high quality content to fit your budget. At DRS, it is our mission to produce media that has a positive impact on today's society, promoting progressive, conscientious and informative entertainment for the masses. We are committed to only producing content of the highest caliber, with standards of supreme production quality and storytelling. We distinguish ourselves as being the only stereoscopic 3D company that works within the reality of today's economy, persistent of the fact that every S3D production we touch will be spectacular, and not break the bank.

Digital Revolution Studios serves the following markets: Entertainment, Feature Film, Short Film, Television, Broadcast, Educational, Medical, Commercial, Music, Live Events, Live Broadcast, Theatrical, Artistic, Fashion, Food, Institutional, Industrial, and Instructional.

Call us today for a free quote!

Name: Renaissance Studio. Ltd.
Description:
Renaissance Studios, Ltd. (“RSL”) is the corporate platform for a "virtual" motion picture studio. Through extensive research and development, RSL has created proprietary systems of film writing, development, production, distribution, marketing, advertising, risk management, investment, business practices and capital market strategies that are designed to deliver superior risk adjusted returns on investment (“ROIs”) to RSL shareholders. The mission is to create a new audience and investor focused paradigm of filmmaking and investment that: 

•	Redefines filmmaking and investment to unlock very extraordinary risk adjusted ROIs. 
•	Competes successfully with the major studios by targeting the underserved global markets. 
•	Utilizes proprietary story writing methodologies that match content with global audience preferences.
•	Produces movies with compelling resonance elements that attract large international audiences. 
•	Creates stories that stimulate positive social, political and geopolitical change in entertaining ways. 
•	Employs methodologies that mitigate risks while preserving huge upside earnings potential. 
•	Produces cost effective films that deliver strong earnings through sustainable film franchises.  
•	Creates a new epicenter of filmmaking and investment outside the flawed “Hollywood” paradigm. 
•	Exploits irrational 25x+ P/E multiples in the public equity markets through an IPO in 5 years.

RSL has identified movie market and capital market anomalies and the methodologies to exploit them. RSL is grounded in 1) an a comprehensive 139 page business plan that articulates proprietary methodologies and strategies, 2) an initial slate of 12 motion picture screenplays that will launch up to 8 major film franchises that will resonate with large global audiences and 3) a plausible goal of converting as little as $50 million of equity capital at risk into $5+ billion of IPO proceeds in as little as 5 years: A 10,000% ROI.

Name: EH! Filmes
Description: Há 30 anos, a produtora ELISA TOLOMELLI fundou a EH! Filmes, onde se consolidou como uma das principais produtoras de cinema do país. Maria do Caritó, protagonizado por Lília Cabral, lançado em outubro de 2019, é o oitavo longa de sua empresa, que conta em seu portfólio com Mulheres do Brasil, Como Esquecer, Margaret Mee e a Flor da Lua, A Floresta Que Se Move, Berenice Procura, entre outros.

Name: Sanfona Filmes
Description:
Quando dois dos mais reconhecidos diretores de cena de Uberlândia se unem para tocar no bailão, só pode dar música boa. Até que enfim o talento toca mais alto que a estrutura e a imaginação e o poder criativo fazem dançar muito mais que o discurso pronto. Tem banda que tem nome. Tem banda que tem tamanho e muita gente. Mas uma dupla, afinada e premiada assim, não é todo dia que vem fazer show na cidade.

Mas, afinal, por que sanfona? Ora, simples. Já notou que só uma sanfona já anima o baile inteiro? Não é preciso mais estruturas infladas e orçamentos extravagantes pra mexer com os quadris e com as emoções, basta entusiasmo, harmonia, comprometimento com a causa e o resultado e, o mais importante, saber o que você está tocando, saber fazer. Outra porque a sanfona é um instrumento flexível, que se ajusta também ao tamanho da festa. E hoje soluções adequadas aos pedidos da platéia agradam muito mais. Não é preciso uma banda grande pra fazer um grande som. Até porque a gente já aprendeu que há muita diferença entre ser uma banda grande e ser uma grande banda. Entre no salão, que o arrasta já começou.

O resultado disso só pode ser um: aquele sorriso de satisfação ao fim de cada música.

Name: Versión Digital
Description:
Versión Digital es la distribuidora número uno de Event Cinema en España. 
Nuestros principales productos son las óperas y ballets de los mejores teatros del mundo. El catálogo de eventos lo complementan documentales, conciertos y películas exclusivas.

Name: SilverGrey Pictures
Description:
SilverGrey Pictures, founded in 2001, became the first film production company to establish a full-scale operation in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, even during the national ban on cinema and the arts. With the launch of Vision 2030 and its strong endorsement of the film industry, the company chose to focus exclusively on fiction and documentary projects, spanning both short and feature-length formats.

Despite the many challenges over the years — from the events of 9/11 to the Covid-19 pandemic, and numerous conflicts in between — the company has maintained a reputation for delivering productions and services that meet global standards. SilverGrey Pictures has consistently upheld its commitment to quality, navigating turbulent times while continuing to grow its presence in the industry.

The team has cultivated an extensive global network of industry partners, talents, and artists, enabling them to swiftly assemble crews for productions of any scale. Their expertise covers every stage of the filmmaking process, from script development through to production and distribution, ensuring a seamless and professional experience for every project.

Name: Best Film Co Sp. zo.o.
Description:
Best Film to wiodący polski, niezależny dystrybutor filmowy działający na rynku od 1995 r. Firma współpracuje z największymi producentami, których filmy dystrybuują najbardziej renomowane studia filmowe na świecie.

Best Film wprowadził na polskie ekrany takie przeboje kinowe, jak: "Tajemnica Filomeny", “Żelazna dama”, "Tajne przez poufne", "Prawo zemsty", "Za wszelką cenę", “Underworld”, a także filmy prestiżowe, wielokrotnie nagradzane m.in.: "Motyl i skafander", "Niczego nie żałuję - Edith Piaf", "Broken Flowers".

Niezależnie od dystrybucji filmów zagranicznych firma aktywnie współuczestniczy w produkcji polskich filmów jako koproducent i dystrybutor ("Plac zbawiciela", "Jasminum", "Pora umierać”, "Mój Nikifor"). W pamięci widzów z pewnością najbardziej zapisały się komediowe przeboje kinowe Best Filmu, wśród nich uznane już za filmy kultowe: "Chłopaki nie płaczą", "Poranek kojota" i "Sztos".

Best Film to również prężnie działający dystrybutor DVD i BR-DVD oraz dostawca konentu VOD.

Firma jest m.in. wyłącznym dystrybutorem produkcji BBC na terytorium Polski (produkcje Davida Attenborough, ekranizacje powieści kostiumowych, "Sherlock", "Teletubisie" i wiele innych).

W ofercie wydawniczej Best Filmu można znaleźć wiele pozycji “kultowego kina polskiego” – zarówno najlepsze komedie (Bareja, Machulski) jak i klasykę naszego kina (Kieślowski, Wajda, Polański). Z okazji 50-lecia Polskiej Szkoły Filmowej Best Film Co przy wsparciu Polskiego Instytutu Sztuki Filmowej wydał okolicznościową kolekcję filmową przygotowaną specjalnie na tę okazję.

Firma współpracuje z największymi wydawnictwami prasowymi przy tworzeniu kolekcji specjalnych DVD m.in. dla Agory, Bauera, Polityki, Edipresse oraz Burdy.

. Patrick Dewaere, mon héros, d’Alexandre Moix, prime time France 5, coproduction Zoom Production, avec RTS, RTBF, Planète+ Canada, en Sélection Officielle au Festival de Cannes 2022 à Cannes Classics.

Name: AGICI - Associazione Generale Industrie Cine-Audiovisive Indipendenti
Description:
L’AGICI - Associazione Generale Industrie Cine-Audiovisive Indipendenti è stata costituita nel 2007 con l’intento di rappresentare gli Associati nei confronti delle Istituzioni e broadcaster, favorirne lo sviluppo industriale e tutelarne gli interessi in occasione dell’emanazione di normative nazionali e comunitarie.
 
L’Associazione Generale Industrie Cine-Audiovisive Indipendenti svolge le seguenti attività:
Tutela gli interessi dei Giovani Produttori e Produttori Indipendenti nei confronti di Istituzioni, Broadcaster e altre Associazioni di Categoria; supporto istituzionale delle istanze territoriali, segnalate dai Gruppi Regionali AGICI, a livello nazionale; organizza il Meeting del Cinema Indipendente: un evento ricco di seminari, incontri, gruppi di lavoro, eventi di networking e pitching, durante i quali i produttori provenienti da tutta Italia hanno la possibilità di incontrarsi, presentare il loro progetti ai colleghi, condividere le reciproche necessità e generano nuova rete e nuove partnership; redazione di un protocollo per indurre i produttori a considerare l'ambiente tra i fattori di decisione nonché impegnati a sensibilizzare la filiera tutta al tema ambientale, sui cambiamenti climatici e sulle loro conseguenze, attraverso la sezione AGICI Becoming Green; organizza incontri di alta formazione denominati Masterclass for Producers.
AGICI è oramai riconosciuta in Italia ed all’estero come l’ente di rappresentanza ufficiale dei giovani produttori e dei produttori indipendenti italiani.
 
Dal 2014, AGICI è associata all'AGIS – Associazione Generale Italiana dello Spettacolo.

Name: DoPchoice GmbH
Description:
Headquartered in Munich, Germany, DoPchoice has provided a fresh take on light refining accessories for the world’s top light fixtures since it’s founding in 2008 by Stefan Karle. In 1984, the Korean Film Council (KOFIC) established Korean Academy of Film Arts (KAFA) as the cradle for highly trained and creative professionals. KAFA offers elite courses in film directing, animation, cinematography, and producing to a small number of select students. In 2006, we added the new Advanced Program to the curriculum, expanding the scope of practical education that brings students closer to the filmmaking scene and help them produce four feature films each year. Most of these films have been submitted to renowned domestic and international film festivals and have won numerous awards and acclaim. Today, KAFA is South Korea’s leading film school with more than seven hundred graduates.

Description:
I have over 25 years of computer generated imagery (CGI) experience specialising in 3D animation primarily in the oil and gas sector. My career began at Petroleum Engineering Services (P.E.S.) in Aberdeen where I gained extensive knowledge in the operation and maintenance of downhole intervention and completion tools. This experience has led me to pursue my passion for CGI and the animations of oilfield equipment.  This skill set has made it possible for me to take on senior roles, that include marketing and media management at companies such as Petrowell, Weatherford International, Paradigm Group and more recently Technical CGI Director at GEODynamics.  


Over the years I've enjoyed being involved in a wide range of projects, helping a number of different clients to visually communicate technical information. Name: British Columbia Environmental Film Festival Society
Description: British Columbia Environmental Film Festival (BCEFF) Society will bring together film makers and scientists to share stories about our environment through film.  Using innovative ways of mass communication, we will introduce science-based films from around the world to Canada that will inject fact-based knowledge, interest, and passion for environmental issues. Our annual film festival will showcase fact-checked science-based films with an environmental theme. Through other events such as filmmaking workshops, we will better facilitate the collaboration between film makers, scientists, and distributors. With a background in international film making, we will bring a unique form of communication to engage those who aren’t always involved in science, including new Canadians, People of Colour, indigenous communities , LGBTQ2S+ Comunity and Wemen. We will work in conjunction with other organizations, teams, and individuals to foster, develop, and grow in societal awareness of environmental issues and provide a means to facilitate positive and proactive communications with the greater global community.

Name: lichtfeldfilm
Description:
Die lichtfeldfilm GmbH wurde von Robin Meisner und Benedikt Kohly mit Sitz in Berlin gegründet. Die Entwicklung und Produktion von nationalen und internationalen Spiel- und Dokumentarfilmen mit politischer Haltung und Zeitgeist als auch die Herstellung von Commercials, Image- und Porträtfilmen sind Schwerpunkte unserer Arbeit. Wir stehen für ein neues, nachhaltiges Narrativ im Film und verstehen diesen als grundlegenden und unentbehrlichen Motor gesellschaftlicher Diskurse. Als Filmemacher:innen halten wir daher stets Ausschau nach alternativen  Blickwinkeln auf das aktuelle Zeitgeschehen.

Wir setzen auf Projekte und Regisseur:innen mit einem starken filmischen  Duktus und einem originellen Zugriff auf die Gegenwart. Dabei liegt uns eine  langjährige partnerschaftliche Beziehung und Zusammenarbeit mit unseren Autor:innen, Regisseur:innen, Partner:innen und deren Vertrauen in unsere Arbeit sehr am Herzen.
 
Unsere Philosophie ist es, jedes Projekt als Einzelstück mit eigener Komplexität und Herangehensweise zu begreifen. Die Machart jedes Films birgt individuelle Sehnsüchte und Ansprüche. Unsere Hingabe besteht darin, den dafür passenden Weg zu ebnen und mit unseren Filmen Geschichten zu erzählen, die das Publikum berühren und über das Filmerlebnis hinaus prägen.

Die lichtfeldfilm GmbH ist Mitglied in der Allianz Deutscher Produzentinnen und Produzenten – Film, TV und Audiovisuelle Medien e.V.

Name: Tucson Film Festival
Description:
21st annual October 9-12, 2025!

Tucson Film Festival (fka TFMF or Tucson Film & Music Festival) has screened over 900 films since its inception in 2005. With attendance of over eight thousand filmgoers, the festival has showcased Arizona and World Premiere film screenings including: Academy Award Short Film winners "I'm Not A Robot" (dir. Victoria Warmerdam) and "God Of Love" (dir. Luke Matheny), along with "The Song of Sway Lake" (dir. Ari Gold), "Zen Dog" (dir. Rick Darge), "Strutter" & "Border Radio" (dir. Allison Anders), "Pavilion" (dir. Tim Sutton), "Cortez" (dir. Cheryl Nichols), "Anvil: The Story of Anvil" (dir. Sacha Gervasi), Scott Walker: 30 Century Man (dir. Stephan Kijak), Kumaré (dir. Vikram Gandhi), "The Adventures of Power" (dir. Ari Gold), "The Last Safari "(dir. Matt Goldman), "High and Dry: Where the Desert Meets Rock ’n’ Roll" (dir. Michael Toubassi), "Hell on Wheels" (dir. Bob Ray), "Heaven Adores You: Elliott Smith" (dir. Nickolas Rossi), Sounds of Tucson (dir. Guillaume Dero) and "We’ve Forgotten More Than We Ever Knew" (dir. Thomas Woodrow).

Tucson Film Festival is part of an Arizona nonprofit organization dedicated to creating community through cinema, theater and documentary filmmaking. The festival is an annual, multi-day event in Tucson, Arizona, showcasing music-related films with a special nod to films and filmmakers with a connection to Arizona or the desert southwest. TFF screens at multiple venues around downtown Tucson including; The Loft Cinema, The Screening Room and The Rialto Theatre. All films are regional or world premieres and feature Q&As with filmmakers and talent from the films! #tucsonfilmfestival

Description:
The goal for the SoundWorks Collection is simple; we are dedicated to profiling the greatest and upcoming sound minds from around the world and highlight their contributions. The SoundWorks Collection was created in 2009 by filmmaker Michael Coleman as an online destination that takes you behind the scenes and straight to the dub stage for a look into audio post-production for feature films, video game sound design, and original soundtrack composition.

This exclusive and intimate video series focuses on individuals and teams behind-the-scenes bringing to life some of the worlds most exciting projects. The SoundWorks Collection video series has surpassed 200 million hits and 8 million views and has included interviews with directors Steven Spielberg, George Lucas, James Cameron, Mel Gibson, Robert Zemeckis, Brad Bird, Mark Andrews, Lee Unkrich, Edgar Wright, Brian Helgeland, Joseph Kosinski, and many other leaders in the film industry.

Name: European Film Festival SCANORAMA
Description:
Founded in 2003 as the Nordic Film Forum, SCANORAMA has evolved into one of Lithuania’s leading film festivals, dedicated to European cinema. Over more than two decades, the festival has established itself as a key cultural platform, annually presenting over 100 carefully curated films from major international festivals and welcoming around 30,000 viewers.

In recent years, including the 2025 edition, SCANORAMA has continued to expand its geographical reach, taking place in 10 Lithuanian cities and strengthening its connection with regional audiences while maintaining high curatorial standards.

At the heart of SCANORAMA are its two competition programmes, focused on emerging European short and feature-length filmmakers. Selected by an international jury of industry professionals, the awarded films receive financial prizes and increased international visibility, supporting the next generation of European cinema.

Beyond screenings, SCANORAMA offers a rich cultural and educational programme, including thematic retrospectives, special previews, discussions, and in-depth conversations with filmmakers. The industry platform SCA Directions has become an important meeting point for professionals, hosting masterclasses and talks with internationally recognised cinema figures.

SCANORAMA is a proud member of the Moving Images – Open Borders network, collaborating with six European film festivals to promote artistic diversity, regional specificity, and the socio-political relevance of European cinema. From 2022 to 2026, SCANORAMA coordinates the network’s activities, with a strong emphasis on sustainability, accessibility, equality, and professional development within the cultural sector.

November 5–22, 2026, SCANORAMA will take place in 10 Lithuanian cities, continuing its long-term mission to present high-quality European cinema and to cultivate an informed, engaged, and curious audience.

Why we started GIFTED?
Because we saw big changes coming.

Changes in the evolution of commercial and artistic content – that it can go together, not in opposition. Changes in managing exceptional talents that need freedom as well as support to fulfil their creative potential. And in this realm of constant change, we are looking for ‘gifted’ ones.

People who don’t limit themselves to a narrow profession. Artists who are curious and see what others can’t. And finally, professionals who know that talent isn’t magically bestowed but requires constant work and perfection.

We believe that this is what the industry needs right now.

Name: True/False Film Fest
Description:
Exploring fact, fiction and what lies in between, the True/False Film Fest champions films that breathe life into the nonfiction format by honoring the finest new work redefining this exploding form. T/F spotlights long-form examinations of complex issues; tight, humorous stories of curious people and places; unexpected glimpses of life from around the globe; films that push the boundaries of their genre. Focusing on the connection between diverse filmmakers and our community rather than on awards, True/False fosters collegial camaraderie and an unhurried opportunity to view and discuss great films. Mixed in with a full schedule of films are a full slate of music, art installations, and events designed to stimulate conversation, debate, community, and pure fun. These include parties, field trips, panel discussions, a game show, and a parade that kicks off the four-day weekend.

Having celebrating its 12th anniversary March 5-8, 2015, True/False has attained a unique status in the documentary world. It is now seen as a "filmmaker utopia" which attracts the best documentaries in the world, accompanied by their directors--all to a small town in the Midwest. Far from the mountains, oceans, media machines or other perks that usually mark a festival destination, Columbia is a friendly college town of over 100,000 people. The festival was started locally, and it is now a grassroots phenomenon, selling 45,000 tickets and supported by 1,000 volunteers. Marked by a small-town fervor usually reserved for college football, True/False is instead targeted to films that fall outside of mainstream fare. More than anything, we take pride in creating a joyful, festival atmosphere that simultaneously takes the movies very seriously. The festival, launched in 2004, married our love of documentaries and our town’s heritage of great journalism.

Get a sense of the Fest by watching our daily recap videos at www.truefalse.org.

Name: Indie

D'investissements en investissements, Indie Location propose aujourd’hui un service complet dans un point unique de retrait : caméra, optique, lumière, régie, grip, machinerie, véhicule, consommable et d’un studio de tournage.

Le catalogue de matériel disponible est en perpétuelle évolution. Notre site internet http://indie.rent permet à nos clients d’établir eux-mêmes un devis en ligne pour gagner en rapidité, et ainsi nos clients connaissent immédiatement, pour leur projet, quelle liste de matériels loués pour quel budget. Nous appliquons une dégressivité tarifaire journalière et ne facturons que les journées où le matériel est exploité. Un service de livraison est possible.

Fort de plus de 10 ans dans la production, le fondateur Maël André, propose à ses clients une étude avant tournage et un accompagnement pendant tournage si besoin, pour anticiper tout problème technique et vous permettre de vous consacrer pleinement à la réalisation de votre film.

Nous disposons d’un large panel de caméras, enregistreurs vidéo, gimbals, lumières, machineries, optiques, drones, groupe électrogène, steadycam, micros, cartes mémoire, drapeaux, chroma key, réflecteurs, pieds, moniteurs, bague d’adaptation, matte box, follow focus, convertisseurs, rig, cross, tournette, grue, slider, monopod, trépied, talkie walkie, enregistreur audio, système HF. For this last title, the studio staff received the Italian Academy Award, David di Donatello 2017, for best sound.
InHouse offers, in a unique space, the possibility to meet all creative needs with attention to the technical and organizational aspects of each stage of the process.
Post-production is of unique artistic value with InHouse: color and sound design are realized with no compromises in quality, meeting the highest possible standards in order to create the best work possible.
Furthermore, InHouse is a certified laboratory for the management of MiBact materials, observing a rigid anti-piracy protocol, in which all physical spaces where project source files are in processing are areas of limited access, protected with codes that are individually-assigned to each member of the team.

Services
Dailies full service, Color grading DCI, Conforming, Backup on LTO, Creation of opening and closing credits, Sound editing, Sound design, Foley and ADR recording, Sound mix, Mastering deliverables DCI and Video.

Name: VELVET
Description:
The story of VELVET begins in 2008 when two experienced cinematographers decide to create the luminaires with which they already dreamed at the film school where they met: robust, autonomous, versatile and lightweight luminaires with almost instant color temperature variation and green-magenta white point adjustment. 
 

They developed new LED-based lighting technology. Both pioneers traveled around the world presenting their innovative LED articulated panels. After this adventure, they soon launched the nowadays worldwide known VELVET panels. These quickly became iconic products of the industry due to the soft natural light texture and ease of use in combination with unique weatherproof protection for outdoor shooting.

 

Ben-Hur, Mission Impossible, Star Wars Episode VII, Trainspotting 2, James Bond Specter, A Monster Calls, Narcos are only some of the movies featuring VELVETs. Ten years later, the story continues developing new lighting solutions. The new EVO range full of velvety colors was born, as a result of close collaboration between cinematographers and VELVET’s Research and Development department.

Name: BIGGER THAN US
Description:
Directed by Flore Vasseur and produced by Elzévir Films as well as by Marion Cotillard, this documentary is an exploration and an adventure on youth activism. 
This is the story of a young Indonesian girl, Melati who has been lobbying her local government since the age of 12 to ban the sale and distribution of plastic bags in her island, Bali. 
And she won !!! Campaigning for 5 years, Melati has become a leading figure of an emerging trending, maybe a power, under the radar, of youth empowerment. She decides to go around the globe to meet her tribe, proven activists like her. She wants to meet her tribe, her peers, and to join forces.

Welcome to an underground and amazing reality, where kids change lives, live big and crack our resistances to save us from our apathy.

Name: 360FX
Description:

Our highly creative and professional studio offers value and quality of unique products, a friendly crew in a beautiful atmosphere, a fully equipped kitchen and a team of people with a unique approach to special effects and especially to the table top world.

The constant search for a new, innovative and revolutionary way of showing products has allowed the creation of our specific machine that allows you to stay in focus even when in motion; an in/out track, an in/out tilt and even a panning that remains a challenge when using high speed. This results in a spectacular result when shooting a desktop spot, a static shot is replaced by a regular camera movement, keeping the product in focus and giving it a stronger effect.

Our company is also made up of a team of people who understand the know-how of the table spot. The executive producer of 360FX, Antonella Scoliero, has more than 20 years of experience in the field of production and advertising. His experience in the largest advertising agency and in the production company makes his ads of high value and quality. Ensures efficiency, quality and a good working environment.

Name: Red Dust
Description:
RED DUST is a film production company based in Antwerp, Belgium. We are a one-stop shop from concept creation through to postproduction.

Style matters. So does the truth, and it definitely sells. We believe in the truth. That is why we like to tell true stories. Long ones and short ones. They are what your audience likes. But how do you tell the truth? Because style matters, remember?

The answer lies in this quote by the great American ad director Bill Bernbach: “The truth isn’t the truth until people believe you, and they can’t believe you if they don’t know what you’re saying. And they can’t know what you’re saying if they don’t listen to you. And they won’t listen to you if you’re not interesting. And you won’t be interesting until you say things imaginatively, originally, freshly.”

True that. Now add some Red Dust, and here is what you can expect: a stylish documentary look and feel, with emotion and atmosphere being the key elements. The result is straightforward pureness through which your audience will identify with your brand. Because they recognise truth. In content and in style.

Name: Costa Rica Film Commission
Description:
The Costa Rica Film Commission is a public-private council that boosts local audiovisual production business, fosters foreign investment attraction to film in the country, and encourages the exportation of audiovisual production services and contents to international markets.
Formats developed in the country and promoted by the organization cover fiction feature films, series, documentaries, commercials, photoshoots, video clip or corporate videos, video, and audio postproduction.
The commission includes the participation of: 
•	COMEX (Ministry of Foreign Trade)
•	PROCOMER (the Foreign Trade Corporation of Costa Rica)
•	CINDE (The Costa Rican Investment Promotion Company)
•	The Ministry of Culture and Youth (MCJ)
•	Costa Rican Center for Cinematographic Production (Centro de Cine)
•	The Costa Rican Tourism Board (ICT)
•	Costa Rican Chamber of Information and Communication Technologies – Audiovisual Chapter (CAMTIC / CAIAC)
The Costa Rica Film Commission is a member of the Association Film Commissioners International (AFCI) and the 
Latin America & Caribbean Film Commission Network (LAFCN).
Development of an industry; benefits for the whole country 
The Costa Rica Film Commission offers various development and showcase options to strengthen capabilities, increase attractiveness and volume of productions, and promote the country as both location and audiovisual hub.

Name: The Frida Cinema
Description:
Proudly serving as Orange County, CA's sole non-profit art house theater, The Frida Cinema is a cultural institution that fulfills its mission -- to enrich, connect, and educate communities through the art of cinema -- by applying a curatorial approach to cinematic programming, focused on ensuring a diversity of offerings ranging from international, independent, foreign, documentary, LGBT, short, locally-produced, student, educational, and classic films, across a full spectrum of genres. Our cinematic programming is complemented with other avenues for cultural and civic engagement, including art shows, live music, dance, and theatrical performances; community presentations, panels and discussions; educational workshops; and so much more. Our organization also has a proud and celebrated history of partnering with arts, educational, and cause-based organizations and institutions in our community, both within and outside of our venue, in a variety of events ranging from collaborative film screenings to fundraisers to special community events.  Christened both "Downtown Santa Ana's Cultural Anchor" and "OC's Year-Round Film Festival" by OC Weekly, The Frida Cinema has established itself as a safe and supportive space for artists to amplify their visions, passions, and voices.  

Since opening in 2014, The Frida Cinema has served as a home and supportive partner for dozens of film festivals, including SIKHLens Film & Arts Festival; Hola Mexico Film Fest; NGF: Next Generation of Filmmakers; and events showcasing the works of students from local elementary schools, high schools, and colleges and universities.  The Frida Cinema has partnered with well over one hundred local institutions, raising funds and/or awareness for issues including human trafficking, homelessness, LGBT rights, suicide prevention,  the humane treatment of animals, immigrants' rights, and domestic violence.

"The Frida is anything but your typical theater." - Los Angeles Times

Name: Insignia Films
Description:
Insignia Films has earned a national reputation for creating landmark documentary films – meticulously crafted, immersive, character-driven narratives – that respect their subjects and captivate their audiences. Insignia's team has been recognized with numerous nominations and awards, including Primetime Emmy’s and honors from the Directors and Writers Guilds of America. Led by director/producers Stephen Ives, Amanda Pollak and Lauren DeFilippo, Insignia has carved out a distinguished record of independence and accomplishment, while never losing sight of its core mission – to reveal the essential issues and struggles of our time with complexity and compassion.

Insignia’s feature documentary Ailey premiered at Sundance in 2021, and was released theatrically by NEON in the summer of 2021. The film will air on American Masters/PBS on January 11th and stream on HULU. Their new 2-part series Citizen Hearst aired on American Experience/PBS in September and their limited series American Veteran airs on PBS at the end of October.

Best known for creating nearly two dozen films and series for national broadcast on PBS, the company also helped found the ground-breaking digital news platform, Retro Report and has produced films for HBO and National Geographic. Most recently, the Emmy-nominated film Into the Grand Canyon (2019, dir. Pete McBride), premiered on National Geographic; and their portrait of a ground-breaking Mars simulation, Red Heaven (2020, dirs. Lauren DeFilippo and Katherine Gorringe), received its world premiere at DOC NYC and was a selection of the SXSW, Tribeca and CPH:DOX festivals.

Name: Festival Films courts de Dinan
Description:
Bienvenue sur la page officielle du Festival Films courts de Dinan, un événement cinématographique international dédié aux courts métrages francophones, se déroulant chaque année à Dinan, au cœur des Côtes d'Armor en Bretagne. 

Depuis 2018, l'association "Court vers le large" orchestre cet événement, ouvert à un public diversifié, comprenant amateurs de cinéma, scolaires et professionnels.

Notre festival met en compétition une sélection d'une cinquantaine de courts métrages provenant de la francophonie entière. Les distinctions honorifiques sont décernées par un jury composé de professionnels du cinéma. En parallèle à la compétition officielle, des séances thématiques regroupent des œuvres diverses, tandis que des initiatives spéciales sont déployées pour le jeune public.

Nous vous invitons à nous rejoindre pour la neuvième édition, qui se tiendra en novembre 2026. Ensemble, célébrons la créativité cinématographique et favorisons l'échange au sein de l'espace francophone.  #Dinan2026 

Festival Films Courts de Dinan  est une marque déposée appartenant à l’association Court Vers le Large

Name: Rumblefish VFX
Description: Rumblefish was founded in Milan in 1992 by Massimo Germoglio, who today is the company's lead executive producer. Rumblefish’s philosophy has always been one of providing an alternative to traditional post-production work; coupling comprehensive, project consultancy with in-house artistic and management teams. Rumblefish blends technology with human talent. We offer our clients the most sophisticated post-production equipment - motion graphics, color design, VFX, and character animation - and experienced, skilled creative artists and technicians needed to use this equipment in flexible and innovative ways. Working to address the continuing challenges of its clients, Rumblefish is the fulcrum between ideas and their execution. Our independent infrastructure -- at the service of advertising agencies, production houses, directors, and DOPs -- always maps the best course of action to deal with unexpected delays or limited resources, making us an indispensable element of the creative process.

Name: Corporación Chilena del Documental CCDoc
Description:
La Corporación Chilena del Documental CCDoc es una corporación sin fines de lucro, dedicada a promover el documental chileno dentro y fuera del país, a fomentar su distribución y comercialización, a fortalecer los lazos entre todos quienes integran la comunidad local de realizadores de documentales, así como a la creación de redes que potencien su internacionalización. Otro pilar esencial de su quehacer es relevar el rol del productor como ente creativo y ofrecer formación en diversas áreas para el desarrollo de competencias específicas que aporten a la producción local de documentales.

La formación; la creación de redes de contacto; la difusión de información; distribución de documentales a nivel latinoamericano; y el impulso de iniciativas asociativas; son sus principales líneas de acción.

Entre sus actividades más destacadas están la marca sectorial Chiledoc, en conjunto con ProChile; el encuentro internacional de industria documental Conecta; y el programa de distribución de documentales Miradoc.
Trabajamos para potenciar la distribución y comercialización de obras locales mediante instancias de formación a productores, difusión masiva de contenidos y alternativas de financiamiento, establecimiento de relaciones directas con distribuidores, agentes de ventas, representantes de fondos, festivales y espacios de negocios.

Name: Zedem Media - Animation Studio
Description:

The studio specializes in the creation of publicity and educational videos for businesses and non-profit organizations from all around the world. Name: Les Films du Fleuve
Description:
In 1975, when they began their career in video, Jean-Pierre and Luc Dardenne created Dérives, an organisation to help them produce their documentaries.

In 1977, Dérives was recognised as a Belgian French Community cinematographic and videographic workshop and very quickly began to produce documentaries by other filmmakers. Dérives was also to become the organisation that produced the first works of fiction by the Dardennes (one short film and two feature length).

In 1994, with the aim of separating their “documentaries” and “fictional work” and at the time that they had just started making their third feature film, « La Promesse », the Dardenne brothers founded the society Les Film du Fleuve. The objective of this production house was not only to finance their own fictional work, but also to collaborate with foreign producers and directors on artistically ambitious projects.

In 1999, following the magnificent success of « Rosetta » all over the world, Luc and Jean-Pierre Dardenne decided to add a new dimension to their activities as producers by increasing their team and setting new objectives.

Today, Les Films du Fleuve is well established on the cinematographic landscape, thanks to not only the films by the Dardenne Brothers but also the quality of projects and directors supported – Ken Loach, Costa Gavras, Jacques Audiard, Laurent Herbiet,…

Name: Olhar de Cinema - Curitiba IFF
Description:
Olhar de Cinema – Curitiba IFF began its activities as an independent film festival. Since 2012, the festival has attracted more than 150,000 people to movie theaters, 30,000 people watching movies online and exhibited more than 900 films from all over the world.

In 2020, it completed its ninth edition with the screening of more than 78 films, enabling online access for more than 30,000 people to these works.

After nine years of experiments, risks and accurate shots, Olhar de Cinema is already part of the cultural scene of independent cinema in Paraná, Brazil and around the world.

The event aims to highlight and celebrate independent cinema made around the world through the official selection of films with inventive, engaging and thematic commitment, ranging from addressing contemporary concerns about the daily micro universe of relationships, to interpretations and positions on politics and world economy. Films that venture into new forms of cinematographic language, which are open to experimentalism and which, nevertheless, have a great potential for communicating with the audience.

Amidst these requirements, it is possible to compose a program of great thematic and aesthetic diversity, which does not reject genres, formats and durations. A universe composed of approximately 90 films per year, Olhar de Cinema always seeks to value Brazilian and Paraná cinema as well, by digging up what is most precious and urgent in these cinematographies, ensuring special care when programming such works.

The festival seeks to compose shows that mix Brazilian and foreign films, enabling dialogue and exchange between all these universes. Alongside the shows that make up the event’s official selection, the festival also sheds light and pays tribute to masters of world independent cinema, restored classic films and also new directors who, even with a short filmography, already have a strong artistic identity.

Name: Zero em Comportamento
Description:
Um dos objectivos da Zero em Comportamento – Associação Cultural é tornar acessíveis ao grande público filmes e realizadores que se preocupam com o conteúdo dos seus filmes, promovendo a pluralidade cultural e contribuindo para o desenvolvimento e educação do espectador, por forma de enriquecer a sociedade.

A associação nasceu em Dezembro de 2000 e, desde logo afirmou-se como uma alternativa à exibição comercial de cinema em Lisboa, apostando na reposição de filmes e, principalmente, na apresentação de títulos inéditos em Portugal. Entre 2001 e 2003, a sua actividade esteve centrada na programação do Cine-Estúdio 222. Em 2004, organizou a primeira edição do IndieLisboa – Festival Internacional de Cinema Independente, actualmente um dos maiores e mais importantes festivais portugueses.

Tem desenvolvido outras iniciativas pontuais no âmbito do cinema, como foi o caso do Festival CineEco em Seia; da Mostra de Cinema Visões do Sul, em Portimão; da Mostra Anual de Cinema de Hong Kong e também de algumas retrospectivas de realizadores como foi o caso das retrospectivas dedicadas aos cineastas Brillante Mendoza, Sergei Loznitsa e Kim Longinotto. Editou ainda, em conjunto com a FNAC, duas edições do DVD Fnac/IndieLisboa 10 Curtas Metragens Portuguesas.

Desde finais de 2013, a associação desligou-se do IndieLisboa, passando a Zero em Comportamento a focar-se mais no público mais jovem e infantil.
Consciente da falta de oferta de cinema de qualidade para este público tão importante e ainda tão “moldável”, a Zero em Comportamento preocupa-se em disponibilizar filmes de grande qualidade artística mas que, ao mesmo tempo, apresentam um conteúdo de significativo valor educativo e que, portanto, são perfeitos para os educadores (pais e professores) abordarem diversas questões fundamentais para o crescimento das crianças e jovens enquanto seres humanos conscientes e críticos do mundo em que vivemos.

영화 VFX후반 작업뿐만 아니라 영화, 뉴미디어, 커머셜 콘텐츠의 기획부터 투자, 제작까지 담당하며, 각 사업부별 최고의 아티스트, 풍부한 경험의 수퍼바이저, 테크니컬 디렉터의 기술 R&D가 모여 국내외 영상산업 발전에 기여하고 있습니다. 

自1998年以来，最初以韩国国内大片电影起步，现拥有国内外400多部电影VFX制作经验和技术力，是具备国内最大规模设备的亚洲顶级VFX，新媒体，商业广告，VR等，综合制作工作室。

Description:
Location scouting for film shoots, is arguably the most painful task in a Film making venture. The uncertainties and amplitude in terms of time, costs and trust is extremely high.

Filmapia is a Film-shoot Enabler:

Name: Jogja-NETPAC Asian Film Festival
Description:
Jogja-NETPAC Asian Film Festival (JAFF is a premier Asian film festival in Indonesia focusing on the development of Asian cinema. This festival not only contributes to introducing Asian cinema to a wider public in Indonesia, but it also provides a space for the intersection of many sectors such as arts, culture and tourism.

Since its inception, JAFF has worked closely with NETPAC (Network for the Promotion of Asian Cinema), a worldwide organization of 30 member countries. Headquartered in Colombo Sri Lanka, NETPAC is a pan-Asian film and cultural organization involving critics, filmmakers, festival organizers and curators, distributor and exhibitors, as well as educators. It is considered a leading authority in Asian cinema.

Each year, JAFF presents several awards to the best films in Asia such as Golden Hanoman Award, Silver Hanoman Award, NETPAC Award, Blencong Award and Geber Award to express the deepest  appreciation for Asian cinema.

Name: Embaúba Filmes
Description:
A Embaúba Filmes é uma distribuidora especializada em cinema brasileiro, criada em 2018 e sediada em Belo Horizonte. A empresa é dirigida por Daniel Queiroz, que vem de uma experiência prévia de mais de 10 anos como programador de cinema.

Queiroz é um dos coordenadores da Semana de Cinema, que acontece no Rio de Janeiro e trabalhou anteriormente no Cine Humberto Mauro, no Cine 104, no Festival Internacional de Curtas de Belo Horizonte e no Festival de Brasília, dentre outros.

Ça va bien se passer!

Name: IT'S US Media GmbH
Description: Film ist heute überall. Das Konsumverhalten entwickelt sich ständig, Grenzen verschwimmen, Ansprüche steigen. We also know more than just lighting and shooting. Our expertise and experience includes branding, social media, and digital distribution. We are refined video guys!

You'll be hard pressed to find a video production company in Los Angeles or New York that can compete with our output, cost, and most importantly, our vibe & style!

Name: TriArt Film
Description:
TriArt Film är ett svenskt inköps- och distributionsbolag som grundades 2010 med syfte att skapa en modern och fri fortsättning på Triangelfilm som var verksamt mellan 1988 och 2007. Vår ambition och inriktning är att vara det ledande kvalitetsfilmbolaget i Sverige. Ett företag som verkar i tiden och presenterar nya filmer och talanger i lika hög grad som man hyllar gamla mästare.

TriArt Film har de senaste åren varit Sveriges största distributör av svensk film. Något vi värderar mycket högt och vill förvalta på bästa sätt. Sverige är i dag ledande i Norden när det gäller debuterande kvalitetsfilmregissörer och auteurer. TriArt Film vill medverka till att detta fortsätter. TriArt Film driver också en av de ledande streamingtjänsterna av kvalitetsfilmer i Norden. TriArtPlay är en satsning som vill nå ut till alla människor som suktar och längtar efter bra film.

Name: 誓死效忠文創有限公司
Description: 誓死效忠文創相信一部好的影片，具備「人格化」的特質。「影片」對於不同的您，應有多種不同的意義。身為觀眾的您，喜歡接受到好看、有趣、感動的內容；身為老闆的您，希望能夠將自己的服務、產品以「貼近人」或「專業」的方式打動客群受眾，進而購買；身為工作者的您，希望將自己的故事、形象讓大眾知道，自己的夢想和自己努力的方向。這就是「影像」的魔力，無論電影、戲劇、廣告、動畫、形象、活動紀錄，誓死效忠都能努力替你達成使命，為您的產品、您的精神傳達價值，也讓身為觀眾的您能因為故事而感動。

Name: TIAFF Tilburg Architectuur Film Festival
Description:
WHO’S GOT THE POWER

Lange tijd leken architecten de drijvende kracht achter ruimtelijke veranderingen. Maar is dat nog steeds het geval? Of geldt: ‘wie betaalt, bepaalt’? We kijken naar de rol van gebruikers, ontwerpers, overheden en ontwikkelaars. Bij wie ligt de macht? Wie neemt verantwoordelijkheid? Ontstaat er ergens tegenkracht? De tiende editie van Tiaff draait om power!  

Op vrijdag 14 en zaterdag 15 maart presenteert TIAFF in art-house bioscoop Cinecitta een programma vol inspirerende 
beeldverhalen en lezingen. We laten zien hoe mensen, met inventiviteit en doorzettingsvermogen, nieuwe vormen van 
samenleven en samen wonen ontwikkelen. We verkennen hoe overheden voorwaarden kunnen scheppen om samen ruimte 
te vinden en maken. En gaan op zoek naar hoe het bedrijfsleven tot nieuwe economische modellen en financieringsvormen 
kan komen om duurzame ontwikkeling mogelijk te maken. Waar komen belangen samen en waar schuurt het? En wat kan 
de rol van architecten, ontwerpers en gebruikers zijn? 

Het tiende jubileum van TIAFF draait om macht: om power over en power to. Met een gevarieerd programma met films en 
sprekers beantwoorden we de vraag: Who’s got the power? 

Bekijk films, ga met filmmakers, sprekers elkaar en ons in gesprek.

Het Tilburg Architectuur Film Festival toont op een toegankelijke wijze de wereld van maatschappij, stad en architectuur. Hedendaagse ontwikkelingen, vernieuwende ideeën of conservatieve gedachten in de maatschappij krijgen vorm in architectuur en stedenbouw. Op film is dat vastgelegd. Door het festival wordt dat bevraagd en gevierd!

Name: Le bon sens, le film
Description:
C’est l’histoire d’une tribu de chefs d’entreprise qui trace sa route loin du fantasme du parcours sans embuches : ils créent, développent, abandonnent, recommencent leur boîte.

Tous empruntent des chemins de traverses entre : 
- enthousiasme et angoisse
- euphorie et déconvenues
- fierté et doutes
- désir de liberté et contraintes économiques
- réussite et échec

Qu’est-ce qui fait qu’ils continuent ?
Quel impact sur eux, sur leurs proches ?

Ce film documentaire raconte leur histoire pour t'aider à tracer ta propre route et pourquoi pas te faire prendre quelques raccourcis !

Name: Finnish Film Affair
Description: Finnish Film Affair (FFA) is the bold, bubbly and beloved industry event of the Helsinki International Film Festival – Love & Anarchy. For over a decade, FFA has been a must-visit September market for film professionals worldwide, offering a daring, fresh, and delightfully extravagant showcase of Finnish and Nordic film. In 2024, FFA is diving headfirst into the hottest trends like AI, transmedia, innovative financing models and layered storytelling. The 13th Finnish Film Affair will take place from 25th to 27th September 2024.

Name: Aim Films
Description:
We’re not here to chase trends. We’re here to build things that last.
AIM Films is a full-service creative agency and a collective of global minds: directors, writers, cinematographers, strategists, designers and people who see stories where others see noise.

We work across continents, across time zones and sometimes across impossible deadlines. 
From Abu Dhabi to Amsterdam, our work moves through culture, across industries and into the hands of clients who don’t settle for average.

We concept. We write. We shoot. We build. But more than that, we listen so the final result isn’t just beautiful, it’s right.

Luxury brands, heritage institutions, tech visionaries, disruptive startups, they come to us when they’re ready to say something that matters.

Because we don’t do filler. We don’t do generic.
We do creative that leaves a mark.
We make things people feel. (Then buy.)

Name: Lemon Tree Creative

Name: Intimacy Professionals Association
Description: Intimacy Professionals Association (IPA) is a network of knowledgeable intimacy professionals that promotes safe, high-quality work on topics of intimacy. Intimacy professionals for TV and film are experts on topics related to intimate material, including but not limited to sexuality, gender, relationships, and sex work. They are adept at telling the story of intimate moments on screen while keeping actors safe in the process. Intimacy professionals include intimacy coordinators, trans consultants, topic expert consultants, and choreographers. IPA connects these professionals with film and TV productions in need of their services. In addition, IPA also trains and certifies intimacy coordinators.

Name: EggwhiteVFX
Description:
At EggWhite VFX, we are redefining the art of visual storytelling. Based in the heart of the vibrant Malayalam film industry, we are more than just a visual effects company – we are passionate storytellers, innovators, and creators of immersive cinematic experiences. Our team of talented artists, animators, and technicians specialize in pushing the boundaries of visual effects (VFX), CGI, and animation to bring even the most imaginative concepts to life.

Since our founding, we have been committed to delivering unparalleled quality and innovation in every project. From breathtaking VFX sequences to seamless CGI integration, we work closely with filmmakers and creative visionaries to exceed expectations and inspire audiences. Whether enhancing the visual appeal of a scene or crafting otherworldly landscapes and fantastical creatures, we bring a blend of precision and artistry to each narrative.

Our mission is simple – to transform dreams into reality through the power of visual effects. At EggWhite VFX, we approach every project with enthusiasm, dedication, and a relentless pursuit of excellence. We invite you to join us on a journey where imagination knows no bounds – and together, we can bring your vision to life on the silver screen.

It offers several national funding schemes with an international scope, intended for Swiss producers, distributors, festivals, markets, film education and training programmes. Its mission is: Funding, consulting, and networking in a European context.

Elle conseille et sensibilise les professionnels pour le développement d'une offre de cinéma accessible à tous.

Cinealliance are also rendering the services on the video production , designing of sound, 3d animation, compositing.

WAX, an award-winning creative collective founded in 2014 by Executive Producer Toni Lipari, is dedicated to crafting impactful stories that resonate deeply with audiences. WAX's commitment to excellence is further underscored by its minority ownership and WBENC certification, reflecting a dedication to diversity and inclusivity in every aspect of its operations.

At WAX, we embody diversity, equity, and inclusion as core principles that guide our actions and shape our culture. We prioritize creating an environment where everyone feels valued, respected, and empowered to contribute their unique perspectives.

Paying it forward is at the heart of WAX's ethos.

We believe in using our success as a platform to uplift others and make a positive impact in our community. That's why we're proud to donate to an underfunded charity on a quarterly basis. For us, it's not just about financial support—it's about doing what's right and giving back to those in need. By investing in organizations that are making a difference, we strive to create a ripple effect of kindness and generosity that extends far beyond our own walls. It's our way of embodying the values of compassion and social responsibility that drive everything we do at WAX.

Omringet af smuk natur ligger Danmarks største studier, Studie 6 og Studie 7, som allerede har huset flere kendte produktioner, bl.a. Lærkevej og Lulu & Leon samt et utal af reklamefilm. 

På området omkring studierne er der hundredevis af locationmuligheder, i form af bygninger, natur og masser af afspærret vejstrækninger.

Name: LordeLIFE RED  Cinema Studio
Description:
Throughout his 20 year service as a Navy Diver in the U.S. Military Special Ops Community, Mariano Lorde had a compelling ambition to capture through video the incredibly unique locations to which he traveled, and more importantly, his fellow servicemen and women. He founded his own cinematography studio in 2008 while still dedicating his life to his country as a Navy Diver. His history as a man who walked-the-walk provided a profound and personal perspective when in 2013 he was requested by NDSTC (Naval Diving and Salvage Training Center) to create one of his first and most memorable military productions "The Water's Edge" which was followed by dozens of retirement and burial ceremonies, and promo videos such as "Quiet Professionals" (his contribution to our Navy's Explosive Ordnance Disposal Special Operations teams in 2019).

His notoriety as a trailblazer in cinematography circles expanded to the various U.S. military branches, to the Mixed Martial Arts arenas, the Fashion Industry, television series, commercial companies, online travel videos, and in-house short films. 

Naduah - a Mexican model and actress - joined Mariano's studio during her modelling tour in California. She brought to LordeLIFE a vibrant history of performance in theater as a classical dancer and work in the arts, including writing, portraiture, and graphic design. 

As an internationally experienced and well-rounded team, LordeLIFE takes its productions on the road in response to the many requests for its specialized cinematography services, which includes stunning underwater and aerial/drone footage. 

As a bonus, they document their travels through a soon-to-be released web series "LordeLIFE" where you can follow their professional, personal, and artistic adventures.

Name: Antorcha Films
Description:
ANTORCHA FILMS SAS es una empresa de producción cinematográfica colombiana Liderada por los productores  Jhonny Hendrix Hinestroza y Andrea Aljure Dorronsoro. 
 
En el 2006 ANTORCHA FILMS produce el largometraje PERRO COME PERRO de Carlos Moreno la cual tuvo su premiere mundial en Sundance Film Festival 2008 e inició un recorrido en festivales internacionales que hizo del film uno de los más prestigiosos de Colombia en los últimos tiempos. A la fecha PERRO COME PERRO ha sido invitado a 37 festivales,  y recibido 14 premios internacionales además de cinco premios nacionales de cine, nominación a los Goya de España, los Ariel en México y ser la película presentada por Colombia a los Oscares.  

En el 2007 ANTORCHA FILMS realiza la producción ejecutiva y presta servicios de producción para la película DR ALEMÁN de Tom Schreiber para la productora Alemana 2Pilots Filmproduktion. Este film, realizado enteramente en Colombia, cuenta con la actuación de August Diehl.

En el 2008, en conjunto con Efe-X Cine produce en Medellín el largometraje EN COMA dirigido por Juan David Restrepo y Henry Rivero. Durante el mismo año coproduce HIROSHIMA de Pablo Stoll con Control Z (Uruguay), Rizoma Films (Argentina) y Wanda Films (España). 

ANTORCHA FILMS empieza el 2010 como  productor asociado de TODOS TUS MUERTOS de Carlos Moreno (Fribourg Forum 2009, Premio FDC Producción Digital), tiene en preproducción PORFIRIO  de Alejandro Landes (Cannes Cinéfondation 2008, Sundance Screenwriters Lab 2009, Cinemart Rotterdam 2009, Sundance Directors Lab 2009), y cuenta con doce proyectos de cine en desarrollo entre los cuales se destacan SAUDÓ de Jhonny Hendrix (Premio FDC Desarrollo, Premio Ibermedia Desarrollo, Beca Fundación Carolina). Adicionalmente, la empresa también desarrolla cuatro series para televisión.
 
ANTORCHA FILMS cuenta con oficinas en Cali, Colombia y en Barcelona, España

Name: Cornerstone Films
Description:
A leader in the global independent film community, Cornerstone is a vertically integrated company with offices in London and Los Angeles that specializes in international sales, financing, and distribution of feature films. Cornerstone is also a partner in Genstone, a London-based content management company. In addition, Cornerstone co-develops and produces content with our partners in Europe, X-Filme and Beta Cinema. Cornerstone provides curatorial direction combined with a proven track record of success to producers, financiers, and creative storytellers, delivering the critical link between the creative vision and the successful global exploitation of content. The company was launched in 2015 and is headed by prominent industry figures Alison Thompson and Mark Gooder.  

Cornerstone’s current slate includes Harry Lighton’s directorial debut Pillion starring Alexander Skarsgård and Harry Melling which screened in Official Selection, Un Certain Regard at the Cannes Film Festival, writer-director Theo Rhys feature debut Stuffed starring Jodie Comer and Harry Melling, Simon Bird’s Pretend I’m Not Here starring Matthew Broderick, Sally Hawkins and Martin Freeman, Mike Leigh’s upcoming Untitled 2025 film as well as Hard Truths starring Marianne Jean-Baptiste, James Kermack’s Breathe Deep, Aron Gaudet and Gita Pullapilly’s revenge thriller Wild World, Andrea Arnold’s Bird starring Franz Rogowski and Barry Keoghan, Polly Steele’s magical romance Four Letters of Love starring Pierce Brosnan, Helena Bonham Carter and Gabriel Byrne, and Beast of War from Kiah Roach-Turner. Previous titles include Daniel Kokotajlo’s supernatural horror Starve Acre, Euros Lyn’s supernatural black comedy The Radleys starring Damian Lewis, Christine Jeffs’ gripping medical drama A Mistake starring Elizabeth Banks, and four-time BAFTA Award nominated Good Luck to You, Leo Grande, directed by Sophie Hyde and starring Academy Award winner Emma Thompson.

Valk Vision Productions is een professioneel videoproductiebedrijf uit Barneveld dat MKB-bedrijven helpt groeien met strategische videoproducties. Wij creëren video’s die jouw verhaal krachtig overbrengen, vertrouwen opbouwen en zorgen voor meer zichtbaarheid én conversie.

• Wervings- & employer branding video’s

• Aftermovies & eventvideo’s
• Bedrijfsvideo’s & brandingcontent

Waarom Valk Vision Productions?
 Gericht op resultaat
 Persoonlijke aanpak

Wildcard Distribution is an Irish film distributor established in early 2013 specialising in new and fresh approaches to distribution.

We acquire and release films in Irish cinemas as well as on Video on Demand and DVD. Our goal is to break down the barriers of traditional film distribution using disruptive and innovative technologies to bring the best in Irish and international film to audiences when and where they want it. We believe in distribution strategies across multiple platforms and in multiple territories simultaneously.

In addition to distribution, Wildcard also offers a consultancy service advising on sales and marketing films at different stages from script to screen.

Name: CatchLight Studios
Description:
Catchlight Studios is not just a production company; we are a creative force that believes in nurturing filmmakers, artists, and storytellers. We think differently, embrace entrepreneurship, and strive for a fresh approach to filmmaking rooted in creative integrity, innovation, and collaboration.
We create character-driven, genre-agnostic, crowd-pleasing films and television shows that realize the filmmaker's vision within a responsible model. Name: Haibun
Description:
Haibun è una casa di produzione fondata da Cesare Fracca e Silvia Blosi nel 1995.
E’ una azienda che si posiziona tra i leader del mercato pubblicitario e della comunicazione specializzata nella produzione di Spot pubblicitari di altissima qualità e notorietà.
In 30 anni di attività Haibun ha realizzato produzioni per tutti i maggiori clienti ed agenzie di comunicazione.

Avevamo meno di 30 anni quando abbiamo fondato la Haibun ma avevamo già di 10 anni di esperienza alle spalle, e sin dall'inizio abbiamo voluto infondere nella nostra struttura tutto l'entusiasmo, la professionalità e la passione cha abbiamo per questo lavoro.

La versatilità, l'inventiva e la capacità di trovare soluzioni a tutte le sfide che spesso questo mestiere mette davanti sono caratteristiche che abbiamo voluto comprendere nel nostro nome : Haibun è una parola giapponese che identifica un particolare tipo di poesia derivata dall'Haiku. L'Haibun è la sintesi nel minor numero di parole possibili del testo di un Haiku mantenendone il senso e le caratteristiche. Un concentrato, una riduzione al senso profondo delle poesia con i termini più brevi e semplici possibili.
Esattamente quello che si fa in uno spot, nei pochissimi secondi a disposizione si deve riuscire a trasmettere un'emozione, una serie di concetti, un messaggio.

Haibun per noi è : l'arte di dire e fare cose complesse in modo semplice.

As part of video production, we also help you reach greater audience through professional live streaming services with multiple cameras. Name: Ruedafilm&content

En Rueda Film&Content, somos creadores de historias únicas.  Con 12 años de experiencia en cine y televisión, nos apasiona contar historias que no solo se ven, sino que se sienten.

Nos especializamos en transformar ideas en experiencias visuales inolvidables, utilizando efectos visuales y un enfoque creativo para que tu mensaje se destaque. Cada proyecto es una oportunidad para contar algo original y auténtico.

Si buscas una manera única de compartir tu historia, estamos aquí para hacerlo realidad. Hablemos y hagamos algo increíble juntos!

Name: A.R.T.S. association régionale des techniciens du Sud Est
Description: L’Association Régionale des Techniciens du Sud-est est un réseau de techniciens du cinéma et de l’audiovisuel en Région Sud, l’Hérault, le Gard, l’Ardèche et la Drôme.Depuis 2002, elle représente ses membres auprès de tous les acteurs de son secteur d’activité et favorise le développement de la filière.
