Name: horschamp
Description:
HORSCHAMP est une invitation à vivre la culture avec ceux qui la font.
_
 
L'association a fondé l'ensemble de son activité sur la notion de rencontre. C'est une collection riche et complète, des retransmissions de master classes, la proposition de connexion entre spectateurs et cinéastes, photographes, artistes contemporains, la découverte de créateurs émergents, la réalisation de portraits, le besoin de rendre la création d'aujourd'hui visible et accessible pour tous.
 
L’initiative de ce projet se fonde sur la rencontre et l'interactivité autour d’un artiste, d’une conception, d’une méthode de travail et de clés essentielles à toutes formes de réponses. HORSCHAMP se veut encyclopédique. Une collection digitale avançant au premier plan l’interaction entre un artiste et son public. Il s’agit ici de s’attarder sur une œuvre. L’analyser dans son entièreté. Ouvrir un dialogue à son propos et offrir une trace écrite et mouvante qui traversera le temps et constituera peu à peu un ensemble cohérent de références.

Name: RiverRun International Film Festival
Description:
The RiverRun International Film Festival is a non-profit cultural organization dedicated to the role of cinema as a conduit of powerful ideas and diverse viewpoints. Our mission is to foster a greater appreciation of cinema and a deeper understanding of the many people, cultures and perspectives of our world through regular interaction with great films and filmmakers.

Held annually each spring, RiverRun screens a wide variety of feature-length and short films from all genres, and also presents a broad range of special events, including high-profile regional premieres of significant films, celebrity tributes, family matinees and classic retrospectives as well as a mixture of panel discussions and parties.  In 2012, the Festival presented  more than 140 films from 25 countries, bringing close to 100 filmmakers and other industry professionals to Winston-Salem from around the world.

Name: Salmorejo Producciones - Productora Audiovisual Córdoba
Description:
Somos una productora de cine con sede en córdoba especializada en ficción, videoclips y publicidad.

En Salmorejo Producciones trabajamos con garantía de calidad, mucha creatividad y con resultados profesionales, dejando siempre un aspecto cinematográfico único a un precio competitivo.

Llevamos a cabo la producción y realización de videos corporativos, spots comerciales, cortometrajes, videos musicales, servicios audiovisuales, documental, proyectos de animación 2D y 3D, fotografía. etc... incluyendo todo el trabajo de postproducción, edición, montaje, efectos especiales, etalonaje final y estrategia de marketing.

Ya seas de Madrid, Barcelona, Valencia, Girona o hasta de Murcia, no te preocupes, trabajamos desde Andalucía para toda España y nos desplazamos donde haga falta.

Pregunta por nuestras tarifas sin compromiso.

Name: KAREVI - Entreprise de l’ESS agréée ESUS
Description:
KAREVI est une solution pour améliorer le quotidien des personnes qui souffrent d’isolement tels que les seniors en EHPAD, les patients dans les hôpitaux, les adultes en situation de handicap, mais aussi les proches aidants et le personnel soignant. 
Grâce à notre application de vidéos 360° et au casque de réalité virtuelle, l'utilisateur est "téléporté" pour "vivre" un moment d'évasion de découverte ou de bien-être "comme s'il y était"!
Créateur de contenus, nous tournons en très haute définition et avec une technique qui évite la nausée (que l’on peut retrouver dans la réalité virtuelle).
Notre vidéothèque est composée de vidéos uniques : visites guidées, relaxation, sensation ou encore Karevi KIDS avec le vocabulaire et la musique adaptés aux enfants.
Karevi est un outil de médiation, un soin de support.
C'est le voyage et la culture au service du soin et du lien social.

Name: New Day Films
Description:
New Day Films is a unique, filmmaker-run distribution company, providing award-winning films to educators, community groups, government agencies, public libraries and businesses since 1971. Democratically run by more than 150 filmmaker members, New Day delivers hundreds of titles that illuminate, challenge and inspire. New Day was initially formed because the women's movement had arrived and a group of independent filmmakers were unable to find a distributor for their feminist films—so they decided to create one. Today, New Day members sustain the ideals that inspired the company's formation in 1971 - partnership, great stories and changing the world - and curate its collection to encompass a wide range of subject areas. 

New Day has continued to deliver dynamic, provocative storytelling for more than four decades. Our members carefully select all the films in our collection. New Day titles have won an Academy Award, 9 Academy Award nominations, 4 Emmys, and hundreds of awards at prestigious film festivals. New Day films have been broadcast on PBS, HBO and other media outlets. Because our members both make and distribute their own films, New Day is equally committed to making high quality films and to finding and engaging the audiences that can most benefit from them. As the digital landscape evolves, New Day works hard to deliver its films in the formats that best suit customer needs.

New Day functions as a participatory democracy whose organizational structure and business practices embody the values promoted by its films.

Name: Festival de Cine y Derechos Humanos de Barcelona
Description:
Considerado como el festival nacional independiente más antiguo y con una gran reputación a  sus espaldas en materia de derechos humanos, el Festival de Cine y Derechos Humanos de Barcelona se erige como puente entre el mundo del cine no comercial y la defensa de los derechos humanos universales. 

Dirigido por Toni Navarro desde la plataforma Derechos en Acción, reúne una muestra de más de 110 películas que, con frecuencia, se estrenan por primera vez y que compiten en distintas secciones, como largo, medio y cortometraje, ficción, documental,.... 

De la mano de Madrid, Nueva York y París, el Festival de cine y derechos humanos de Barcelona pretende ser el puente entre directores, observadores de la realidad humana en todo el mundo, y la ciudadanía, difundiendo un cine que nos haga reflexionar, despierte conciencias, denuncie injusticias y refleje la diversidad social y cultural de la humanidad. Ése es el objetivo del Festival de Cine y Derechos Humanos de Barcelona.

Description:
VidéPro is een videoproductiebedrijf gevestigd in Lelystad. Bij VidéPro zetten we onze passie, creativiteit en expertise in om jouw verhaal te vertellen via video. Wij geloven namelijk dat een verhaal op de juiste manier verteld, je helpt om je doelgroep te bereiken én te raken en vertrouwen  en/of autoriteit op te bouwen. Een goed en sterk verhaal helpt om mensen te inspireren en/of te overtuigen.

Bij VidéPro zijn we gespecialiseerd in het maken van bedrijfsfilms, livestreams en/of hybride events en producties in onze eigen studio. L'ENTREPRISE LEADER DANS LA PRISE DE VUE AÉRIENNE PAR DRONE

Name: TAKE ONE Magazine
Description:
TAKE ONE is an independent film magazine and website run by volunteers. We cover the best in independent and festival cinema year round.

The first hard copy issue of TAKE ONE was distributed in Cambridge, UK on September 8th 2011, and the website officially launched in November 2011 and runs throughout the year covering cinema and film festivals worldwide.

TAKE ONE evolved in 2011 from the original Cambridge Film Festival Daily as the official source of news, reviews and interviews on all films screened during the Cambridge Film Festival, and every year we are still responsible for the full, comprehensive coverage of the Cambridge Film Festival. 

Online you will find a complete archive of all reviews and interviews from the Cambridge Film Festival, as well coverage of other festivals and the ever-active world of cinema. We promise that we will do our best to do our duty to film makers and film lovers, to entertain, encourage and inform, and never to carp at or harp on good, honest film.

Name: KIDS Regio
Description:
Looking for an initiative that is passionate about promoting high-quality European children's films? Look no further than KIDS Regio! As a lobby initiative, KIDS Regio serves as an agent between policy makers, industry professionals, and the scientific community to create a network that discusses new synergies and works to improve the status, transfer, and variety of European productions and co-productions for a young audience.

KIDS Regio stands up for original live-action feature films that offer children a diverse range of stories, genres, and styles, while also promoting children's film as an essential part of cultural diversity. In addition, KIDS Regio is dedicated to promoting film literacy and introducing cinema and film as an art form into school curricula and society in general.

Since its establishment in 2009, KIDS Regio has hosted a variety of events and meeting points across Europe, serving as a mediator between academics, politicians, and the children's media industry. The Erfurt Declaration of 2009, detailing the future of European children's film, set the direction for KIDS Regio's work, and subsequent forums have continued to address important issues surrounding distribution, access, and marketing of European children's film.

Join us at one of the upcoming KIDS Regio events, where industry professionals, policymakers, and academics will come together to learn from each other and develop new strategies to strengthen this important cultural asset. At KIDS Regio, we are passionate about promoting high-quality and multi-faceted children's films that inspire, sometimes educate, and most certainly entertain young audiences.

An initiative under the roof of the @Deutsche Kindermedienstiftung Goldener Spatz and within the framework of @Cine Regio.

Name: First Run Features
Description:
First Run Features was founded in 1979 by a group of filmmakers to advance the distribution of independent film. Under the leadership of the late film pioneer, Fran Spielman, First Run Features quickly gained a reputation for its controversial catalog of daring documentaries and fiction films. Today First Run remains one of the largest independent distributors in North America, releasing between 15-20 films a year in theaters nationwide, plus an additional 30-40 films annually to schools, libraries and other educational institutions; on home video on DVD and Blu-Ray; to television broadcasters; and online through a diverse group of innovative digital partners.

The First Run legacy includes films by such notable directors as Spike Lee, Michael Apted, Peter Jackson, Alex Gibney, Joe Berlinger, Allen Miller, Rose Troche, Sven Nykvist, Jane Campion, Ross McElwee, Michael Winterbottom, DA Pennebaker and Chris Hegedus, Barbara Kopple, Dariush Mehrjui, David O. Russell, Lizzie Borden, Michael Verhoeven, Claude Chabrol, Jan Svankmajer, Claire Denis, Benoit Jacquot, Marleen Gorris, Radley Metzger, Mark Kitchell, Deborah Shaffer, Victor Nunez, The Brothers Quay, George Sluizer, Monika Treut and Satyajit Ray.

 Su objetivo es identificar nuestro territorio como localización idónea para rodaje de producciones audiovisuales y promocionar el sector audiovisual andaluz en el ámbito nacional e internacional.
CARMONA FILM OFFICE pertenece a la red ANDALUCIA FILM COMMISSION y es miembro de SPAIN FILM COMISIÓN  y de la AFCI (Association of Film Commissioners International) con sede en Los Angeles lo cuál es sinónimo de  prestigio, credibilidad y servicio homologado internacionalmente.
Carmona Film Office facilita toda la información necesaria sobre la ciudad y ofrece asistencia técnica para la obtención de permisos, la coordinación con Administraciones Públicas, Policía Local, Empresa Municipal de Limpieza, servicios e Infraestructuras, contactos con hoteles, restaurantes, profesionales locales, etc., apoyando el sector audiovisual andaluz, promocionando nuestra ciudad como lugar de rodaje y ofreciendo estos servicios a los productores.

O objetivo da empresa é realizar obras que dialoguem com seu público, sabendo identificá-lo em cada projeto.
Os principais diferenciais competitivos da produtora são seus sócios: ambos com formação em cinema, experiência prática de produção cinematográfica e capacitação em cursos e trabalhos na área de administração e finanças. Geograficamente, a produtora se insere nos principais mercados do país, pois possui sede nas cidades de São Paulo e Rio de Janeiro, estando constantemente em contato com projetos, roteiristas e diretores de norte a sul.

Name: KAVI National Audiovisual Institute
Description:
National Audiovisual Institute (Kansallinen audiovisuaalinen instituutti or KAVI in Finnish) is a state institution under the authority of the Ministry of Education and Culture in Finland.

KAVI safeguards the Finnish audiovisual heritage for future generations by acquiring, restoring and preserving films, film related materials, television programmes and radio programmes. The institution conducts and supports research and strengthens knowledge of audiovisual culture. It seeks to promote media education, children's media skills and the development of safe media environment.

National Audiovisual Institute was formed in January 2014 as a result of the National Audiovisual Archive KAVA (formerly Finnish Film Archive, 1957–2007) merging with the Centre for Media Education and Audiovisual Media (formerly Finnish Board of Film Classification, 1946–2011).

Odeon Firenze è un progetto di Regione Toscana e FST Mediateca Toscana Film Commission in collaborazione con Provincia e Comune di Firenze.

Name: Blue Faces
Description:
We are proud of our team of passionate and experienced artists, producers and pipeline developers. Thanks to them and our sophisticated pipeline we are able to make the impossible, possible and create stunning visual effects for feature film, commercial, music video and games projects.

Since 2010 we have proved our skills in compositing, matte painting, matchmoving, rotoscoping and animation in 1,000s of shots, more than 35 feature films (some of them Academy Award nominees: Harry Potter, Avengers, Anomalisa, ) and 100s of commercials (BWM, Nike, Orange, etc.). In 2015, we launched our 3D department in order to embrace all your 3D CG needs from basic 3D modeling to complex smoke and blast simulations.

Our use of technology makes production more time and budget efficient, while keeping the original artistic visuals remain a top priority of our proffessionals. For almost a decade we have been honing our skills im 2D and 3D animation, character design, rigging, simulations, and much more ever since. In 2024, we launched a 2D department with stronger focus on cut-out and hand-drawn animation.

We focus on bringing your ideas to life through combining clever use of technology and animating skills. We’ve had the honor of contributing to award-winning films and are always ready to provide complex support throughout the entire production process for new animated projects.

Name: The Independent Film Trust
Description:
The Independent Film Trust, exists to advance the cause of independent filmmaking by uncovering new stories, empowering new voices and developing new audiences. We advocate for more diversity and representation in the film industry, amplifying stories that explore new ideas, challenge audiences and inspire empathy.

The IFT was set up in 2004 and is a UK-registered charity. Our activities include advocacy for a more diverse and representative film industry, support for filmmakers struggling to develop projects and the provision of film and media training for those who are marginalised. 

Collaborations with industry partners help us impact positively on the professional UK film industry and advocate for greater equality and innovation in storytelling. Our community outreach allows people who might never engage with film to take an active role in producing cinema and contributing to British film. 

At every stage we campaign to provide an independent film scene that is challenging and entertaining whilst inclusive and representative of the broader UK public.

Name: Sehsüchte International Student Film Festival
Description:
Sehsuechte (German: Sehsüchte; neologism generated of the words Sehnsucht (eng: longing) and sehen (eng: to view, to see)) is an international student film festival with an over 60 years lasting tradition. It takes place annually in spring in Potsdam-Babelsberg, Germany. 

Annually, about 120 short and feature films in the categories fiction, documentary, genre, animation as well as music videos and youth films are screened. The program always comprises films from Europe and the whole world. In 2016, the program included projects from 28 countries, such as Russia, Israel, India and China.  
A jury, consisting of prominent filmmakers and film experts, ultimately rewards the best oeuvres. 
The organizers’ aim is to provide a platform to young international filmmakers and to enhance the exchange of ideas among themselves, with media and film professionals as well as with the broader audience. Especially the latter emphasizes that Sehsüchte always seeks to be a public event. Annually, about 8.000 film-enthusiasts, qualified visitors and journalists attend the several days lasting festival, which takes place in next to the famous Studio Babelsberg, Europe’s oldest and biggest film studio.

Name: Maverick Entertainment Group
Description:
Privately held Maverick Entertainment Group has a reputation for consistently releasing niche genre films that major studios often overlook. Founded in 1997, Maverick continues to be a leading distributor of niche independent and Urban content. Having released more than 900 films over the past 25 years, Maverick currently controls the world's largest library of feature-length Black Cinema. In addition to funding and producing originals, Maverick releases over 100 movies a year and distributes physically and digitally worldwide.

Maverick's far-reaching and boutique distribution is due to direct relationships with digital platforms and retailers including Roku, Tubi, Samsung, Peacock, LG, Vizio, Vudu-Fandango, and many more. Maverick connects with its consumer base through DVD, Video-on-Demand, and streaming.

Maverick supports independent film producers by providing a pipeline of content that streams from filmmakers to movie watchers. Likewise, Maverick accommodates consumers with a consistent flow of the genre films they wish to view. By maintaining an exemplary reputation within the film and business communities, as well as establishing direct relations with content creators and media providers, Maverick positions itself as a leader within the home entertainment industry.

Doug Schwab founded Maverick and continues to oversee the company. He and his team of key personnel have forged the cornerstone of the company's growth into the future.

Its integrated approach, corporatised structure, strong balance sheet and a professional, capable team are catalysts to a higher than average growth in the future. Shree Ashtavinayak Cine Vision Limited is the pioneering corporate structure in the tinsel town.

With a clear focus on high entertainment value, Shree Ashtavinayak Cine Vision integrates the value chain in the commercial motion picture segment from production to distribution to exhibition.

Name: Letter to Memphis
Description:
Fondée par un ancien avocat, notre agence de production audiovisuelle est spécialisée dans les récits à forte dimension humaine. Nous accompagnons les professionnels du juridique, les artisans, et les structures innovantes ou expertes en réalisant des films qui donnent la parole à celles et ceux qui font vivre leur organisation. Chaque projet est une rencontre, un récit incarné, une prise de parole sincère, captée avec sensibilité et justesse.

Trop souvent, la communication d’entreprise est formatée, impersonnelle, oubliable. Chez Letter to Memphis, nous prenons une autre voie : celle de l’humain, de l’authenticité.

L’émotion donne sa force au récit. Notre méthode lui donne sa portée.

Nous nous appuyons sur une approche rigoureuse, inspirée de la science du storytelling : clarification des intentions, sélection stratégique des protagonistes, construction narrative solide. Et parce que la forme porte le fond, nous accordons autant de soin à l’image, au rythme et au son qu’à l’écriture.

Le résultat : des productions haut de gamme qui touchent, engagent et marquent les esprits. Des films sensibles, puissants, et parfaitement alignés avec vos enjeux. Pensés pour durer, ils dépassent le simple cadre de la communication pour devenir des récits qui comptent.

We aim to establish ourselves as the leading full service production, multi platform and creative driven in Vietnam. Also, our ambitious is to make a positive difference and to be recognized in the Global Entertainment and Media industry.

Name: Caju.Prod
Description:
Somos Caju.
Escolhemos dar voz às histórias que carregam a transformação, que têm o poder de impactar e de nutrir. Nosso trabalho não é apenas mostrar o que é bonito, mas o que é necessário e transformar isso em imagens que toquem, que mexam, que movam.

Acreditamos que cada imagem, cada palavra, cada filme tem um propósito. Queremos usar nossa arte para algo maior, para conectar quem está fora do olhar comum, para dar visibilidade ao invisível, para plantar sementes que possam gerar frutos em forma de mudança real.

Nosso trabalho é simples, mas profundo.
É técnico, mas cheio de alma.
É modesto, mas com o poder de transformar.

Porque, no final, acreditamos que o verdadeiro impacto não vem do que mostramos, mas do que deixamos para trás.

Somos Caju.
E estamos aqui para criar histórias que deixam raízes.

Name: EVASIÓN
Description:
Evasión Digital es la empresa de Servicios de Post-Producción-Digital para los mercados de CINE-PUBLICIDAD-TELEVISION-EVENTOS.

Evasión ha sabido posicionarse en el mercado de Post-Producción Digital gracias a la profesionalidad de su equipo y del servicio al cliente Evasión ofrece servicios integrales de post-producción de alta gama para la obtención del INTERNEGATIVO DIGITAL, desde el proceso del escaneado del material, pasando por los fx, etalonaje, hasta el proceso de filmado, ofreciendo al cliente final una solución única en el mercado "llave en mano". 

Evasión se está afianzando en la postproducción digital en 4K al ofrecer el único sistema BASELIGHT-FOUR (películas como Harry Potter y Narnia han sido post-producidas en sistemas Filmlight) dentro del mercado español, aportando al cliente la mejor solución para el etalonaje digital de su películas. Dentro de los servicios ofrecidos para la post-producción, también apuestan por la creatividad como valor añadido, desarrollando de esta manera Títulos de Crédito, Trailers, Teasers y propuestas gráficas para sus producciones.  

Un factor decisivo es la supervisión en rodaje, que garantiza el buen fin de post-producciones complejas. Asi, contando con los Directores de Fotografía, Directores y Productores, genera una comunicación fluida entre todos los departamentos responsables, dando como resultado el ahorro de costes al final del proceso y la máxima calidad en los acabados.

Name: Warsaw International Film Festival (WFF)
Description:
Held for almost 40 years, the Warsaw International Film Festival is one of the most renowned cultural events in Poland and, at the same time, recognizable in the world.

The most important features of our Festival:

1. Prestige: Belonging to the world's elite of film festivals

Since 2009, WFF has been one of the elite group of 15 festivals accredited by the International Federation of Film Producers Associations (www.fiapf.org) as international competition film festivals - next to festivals such as Cannes, Venice, Berlin, Locarno, San Sebastian.

2. Elitism: it is the only international film festival in Poland, and it is also placed by the American Film Academy on the so-called "Oscar list" - the four winners of the Short Film Competition (Best Film, Best Live Action, Best Animation, Best Documentary) go directly to the vote for the Academy Awards, i.e. the Oscars.

3. Popularity: it is the largest, most important and most popular film festival in Poland.

4. Mediality: A rich repertoire, almost 200 films from over 60 countries, almost half of them are world, international and European premieres.

5. Massiveness: The number of viewers exceeds 100,000 and 1.2 million website visitors. Nearly 1,400 accredited journalists and professionals as well as emerging stars of world cinema.

6. Engagement in the international promotion of Polish cinema. Thanks to the Fair and screenings accompanying the WFF, Polish films are presented at major film festivals and distributed abroad. It was after the screening organized by us in the summer of 2013 that "Ida" by Paweł Pawlikowski was invited to the festival in Toronto, starting the way to the Oscar.

7. Scale: During 10 days there are ca. 350 screenings in several Warsaw cinemas and numerous professional and social events.

Name: Gimli International Film Festival
Description:
The Gimli International Film Festival (GIFF) is Manitoba’s largest film festival and the biggest rural film festival in Canada, welcoming over 12,000 attendees each July to the shores of Lake Winnipeg. For over two decades, GIFF has been a destination for film lovers and filmmakers alike, celebrating bold storytelling, emerging filmmakers, and community connection. 

Guests can explore our DIY cinemas throughout Gimli, enjoy unique networking events, and gather for our signature Sunset Beach Screening under the open sky, every night of the festival. Not to mention our various competitions and a lineup of over 100 narrative and documentary features, short film programs, and more!

GIFF proudly pays all curated filmmakers minimum IMAA fees. Filmmakers interested in sharing their work can find submission guidelines on our website. 

Organizations interested in exploring unique and creative marketing opportunities can connect with our team at info@gimlifilm.com

Those who wish to get involved can join our dedicated volunteer community by reaching out to volunteer@gimlifilm.com

If you don’t have time to volunteer but still want to support Manitoba’s vibrant film culture, consider becoming a GIFF Northern Star Donor by visiting gimlifilm.com/donate or directly through CanadaHelps at https://www.canadahelps.org/en/charities/giff/ 

-- Discover more at gimlifilm.com --

Our staff assists SCA students and alumni with strategies on festivals and distribution for their projects. We also negotiate distribution deals for USC-produced projects, from broadcasts on HBO to streaming on iTunes or Amazon.

Name: Melbourne WebFest
Description:
Melbourne WebFest is Australia’s international web series festival. MWF was the fourth festival of its kind in the world, and remains the biggest celebration of web series in the Southern Hemisphere.

Digital series entertainment is growing rapidly and is fast rising to challenge traditional modes of producing, distributing and engaging with screen content. Innovative web series creators are a driving force in this storytelling evolution.

Melbourne WebFest is working to acknowledge digital screen producers and is creating a hub for networking and professional development in the heart of Melbourne. It is also an opportunity for the public to experience the best in digital series entertainment from around the globe. The festival includes screenings, keynotes, discussion panels, masterclasses, and, a live pitching competition.

In addition to the annual official selection, MWF also promotes Australian productions with its Spotlight program, which screens on the first day of the festival.As a new addition in 2017 we are introducing an award for student series, and student productions can submit at a reduced fee. 

The festival is closely affiliated with LA WebFest, the first and biggest international web series festival in the world, and the Marseilles WebFest, Europe’s biggest web series festival, alongside a rapidly growing network of international web series festivals, across the Americas, Europe and Asia.

Name: Rialto filmtheater
Description:
Rialto film theatre is a household name in Amsterdam with two distinct locations: Rialto De Pijp and Rialto VU. Rialto has always loved and supported non-Western cinema, since beautiful films are not only made in Europe and America, but all over the world. This is why the cinema screens many splendid European and American films as well as special gems from Latin America, Asia and Africa. Rialto spotlights non-Western cinema throughout the year, but especially in August during World Cinema Amsterdam.

Another distinguishing feature of Rialto are its many specials. The art films in Cracking the Frame, documentaries in Docupodium, classics in Rialto Classics, new film talent in Rialto For Short, to name some. For a special to become special something special must happen! This can be anything: an introduction, an interview, a workshop, or a party until the wee hours.

The Rialto bar and box office are run by volunteers. Their dedication is very important!

Name: The Munchies
Description:
The Munchies Movies Production nasce come societa’ di produzione audio e video, specializzata nella creazione di format di intrattenimento e animazione per il mercato nazionale ed internazionale.
Nel 2003 i due soci, Charlie e Miki, spinti da una forte passione per il cinema e lo spettacolo riescono a tradurre le loro idee in immagini e a farne un lavoro.
Punto forte della societa’ e’ la cura e l’attenzione alla qualita’ e l’abilita’ ad osare in contenuti e stili creando dei prodotti che si contraddistinguono per la loro originalita’.
Oggi si avvale di professionisti specializzati in diversi campi: dalla regia alla musica, dall’editing video a tutte le fasi ed effetti di post produzione, oltre che esperti di attrezzature all’avanguardia.

Name: Revelation Perth International Film Festival
Description:
For Revelation , films are a backdrop to a wider conversation.

Revelation commenced its formal life in 1997 in the basement back room of the Greenwich Club , Perth's legendary jazz venue. The festival was designed to showcase ideas "at point" in contemporary independent film and find a place for them in a conservative cinema and social environment. Today, the event includes over 120 international films presented at cinemas, galleries, cafes and bars across Perth. It attracts 12,000 patrons and 50 national and international guests over 13 days.

Revelation includes a unique Academic component (introduced in 2012), industry discussion sessions, live performances, masterclasses, visual art exhibitions and other hybrid activity generated by the event or independent curators. Revelation always welcomes independently curated or initiated programs and ideas and actively embraces creative professional development and mentoring opportunities. Over 500 films submitted each year for selection from local and international filmmakers and features world and Australian premiere films of all genres. In 2014 Revelation introduced the monthly Australian Revelations program designed to explore the best in new and archival Australian Cinema.

Revelation maintains its focus on signature driven works and embraces audiences of all ages, tastes and backgrounds. Like the films it presents, the event maintains a vitality and enthusiasm for the industry quite unlike any other film festival in the country. Over its 20 years it has developed a reputation as Australia's leading independent film event and continues to actively advocate for Australian screen culture practice in a still conservative exhibition environment. It maintains an ethical partnership agenda which is not always easy to do in resource and mining based economy, has an open mind and has a strong social justice program at its core.

We are about cinema, ideas, politics, personality, history, access and equity.

Name: MILIANI
Description:
Founded in 2010, MILIANI is a full-service 360° agency providing music publishing, artist services, label operations, music supervision, and press relations. The agency supports a wide range of musical expressions, with a strong editorial focus on blues and its derivatives, rooted and world musics, as well as electronic aesthetics influenced by rock’n’roll and jazz.

MILIANI is notably the publisher of Martin Dupont, the cult French new-wave band, and Rocío Márquez, the first Spanish artist to be awarded at Les Victoires de la Musique. The agency also collaborates in press relations with international artists such as Rodrigo Cuevas, Silvia Pérez Cruz, and Katia Guerrero..
As a label, MILIANI has produced the Swedish blues singer Bror Gunnar Jansson and the American artist William Z. Villain; released David Christie – Disco Collection (25th Anniversary), a double vinyl album featuring analog-remastered recordings by the disco icon; and produced Chansons bachiques au Château du Clos de Vougeot, an album of classics from the French repertoire. The agency is currently preparing the new album of the legendary ensemble Le Mystère des Voix Bulgares.

In music supervision, MILIANI represents the acclaimed Catalan producer Raül Refree, oversees and supports the artistic legacy of the late Burkinabé musician Victor Démé, and handled the music supervision for the feature film Les Rascals, directed by Jimmy Laporal-Trésor.

The company is a member of leading French and international professional institutions, including SACEM (Société des Auteurs, Compositeurs et Éditeurs de Musique) and the CNM (Centre National de la Musique). MILIANI is also affiliated with the SMA (Syndicat des Musiques Actuelles) and APRES, the French professional union of press officers.
Nicolas Miliani previously chaired the Communication Committee of the CSDEM (Chambre Syndicale de l’Édition Musicale) and is a voting member of the Victoires du Jazz & Musique du Monde.

Name: Vivian Studios
Description:
Welcome to Vivian Studios!
Founded amidst the challenging times of the COVID-19 pandemic on May 30th, 2020, Vivian Studios embarked on a remarkable journey. In a world grappling for survival, we set out with a unique vision – to illuminate the splendor of life through captivating visual narratives. Specializing in 3D animation and CGI, we began our odyssey by sharing these visual stories on our Instagram page.
What started as a humble endeavor in a small room in Dhaka, fueled by nothing but passion, dedication, and an insatiable thirst for learning, has now blossomed into a thriving creative hub. Our initial steps were guided by online tutorials, our determination to master the art of animation unwavering. Today, we stand proud as a dynamic team, a collective of skilled individuals, all with diverse talents and a shared love for crafting mesmerizing visual experiences.
Our motto, "Big dreams," encapsulates our core philosophy. We firmly believe in the transformative power of storytelling, the ability to reshape perspectives and inspire grand aspirations. As we weave intricate narratives through pixels and polygons, we aim to ignite imagination, spark conversations, and foster a sense of boundless possibility.
Join us on this extraordinary journey as we continue to paint stories with light and imagination. Vivian Studios is not just a company; it's a testament to the human spirit's capacity to innovate, create, and dream big.

Name: Screen Tasmania
Description:
Screen Tasmania, a business unit of the Department of State Growth, is the Tasmanian Government body responsible for supporting and developing the state's film, television and multimedia industries by increasing the amount of independent screen production occurring in Tasmania.

Screen Tasmania aims to build on the growing success of the screen sector in Tasmania with a focus on attracting high quality, high value productions to the state, developing the substantial talent of Tasmanians and supporting Tasmanian-based projects.

Screen Tasmania's work, as outlined in our Strategic Plan 2017-21, is focused on:

1 - Growing optimal production levels across all formats to sustain Tasmania production and deliver strong outcomes for the Tasmanian economy.
2 - Supporting the development of Tasmanian talent to tell Tasmanian stories to the world.
3 - Actively promoting the development of a sustainable, innovative digital content sector in Tasmania.
4 - Working towards increased inclusiveness with a focus on diversity, both on screen and within the sector.
5 - Continuing to build Screen Tasmania as an efficient, transparent part of Government.

Screen Tasmania provides grants and equity investments in the development and production of Tasmanian screen projects including short films, drama, documentaries, feature films, TV series and digital media, and provides direct support in the form of industry and professional development.

Name: Cinema Jove - Festival Internacional de València
Description:
El Festival Internacional de Cinema de València - Cinema Jove és un festival de cinema que es desenvolupa anualment a València, habitualment el mes de juny. La primera edició va tindre lloc el 1986.

El festival manté la vocació de ser un fòrum de trobada entre joves cineastes internacionals. Compta amb tres seccions, una dedicada a llargmetratges que s'estrenen a Espanya, una altra dedicada als curtmetratges més sòlids del panorama internacional i una altra dedicada a la preestrena de sèries internacionals. Una programació que proposa altres seccions amb homenatges a cineastes veterans, joves directors "de culte", exposicions, trobades professionals, etc.

Cinema Jove està organitzat per la Generalitat Valenciana a través de l'Institut Valencià de Cultura (IVC), i està reconegut per la Federació Internacional de Productors de Films (FIAPF).

-

El Festival Internacional de Cine de Valencia - Cinema Jove es un festival de cine que se desarrolla anualmente en Valencia, habitualmente en el mes de junio. La primera edición tuvo lugar el 1986.

El festival mantiene la vocación de ser un foro de encuentro entre jóvenes cineastas internacionales. Cuenta con tres secciones, una dedicada a largometrajes que se estrenan en España, otra dedicada a los cortometrajes más sólidos del panorama internacional y otra dedicada al preestreno de series internacionales. Una programación que propone otras secciones con homenajes a cineastas veteranos, jóvenes directores "de culto", exposiciones, encuentros profesionales, etc.

Cinema Jove está organizado por la Generalitat Valenciana a través del Instituto Valenciano de Cultura (IVC), y está reconocido por la Federación Internacional de Productores de Filmes (FIAPF).

Wij werken met mensen uit de randen van de samenleving, mensen met een PGB (persoonsgebonden budget) in combinatie met prijswinnende Nederlandse en Vlaamse topacteurs en een professionele film- & theatercrew.
.
Wij geven “ongewoon” talent gewoon de kans zich te ontwikkelen.
.
Wij creëren een groter collectief bewustzijn.
.
Wij zijn inclusief.

Laten we van én met zorg kunst maken!

Name: Fish Film
Description:
No Fish Films.
Ni Fish Producciones.
Ni siquiera Fish Factory.

Sólo Fish.

Trabajamos con y para creativos
para hacer las mejores películas
que podemos.

Name: Frida Films
Description: Frida Films is a Spanish production company founded in 2008 and based in Galicia, Spain. The company specializes in arthouse films, producing feature-length films and documentaries. Their aim is to produce quality auteur movies with commercial potential and worldwide relevance.

Name: Docuperu
Description:
DOCUMENTAL PERUANO es una organización sin fines de lucro que documenta, promueve, realiza y difunde procesos y productos documentales descentralizados, como herramientas de expresión y empoderamiento para el desarrollo comunitario, para la inclusión social, para generar y aumentar el interés en las diversas problemáticas (culturales, sociales, medioambientales, entre otras) de nuestro país.
Nuestro objetivo es fomentar y ampliar el espacio para la producción y distribución independiente de obras audiovisuales.

DOCUPERU is one of Peruvian organization that has specialize in promoting independent documentary production in the country as well as in the consolidation of a space for documentary discussion. Our Mission is to document, promote, produce and to encourage, descentralize documentary processes and products as an empowerment and expression tools aiming the improving of different peruvian regions, with an educational, intercultural and collective development approach.

Name: SOME FINE DAY Pix
Description:
SOME FINE DAY Pix conveys the award-winning work of ONE FINE DAY Films & Ginger Ink. Films into a charitable training initiative.

The program consists of three segments:

LEARNING is a webinar series for East African film practitioners and people interested in the industry.

Within the MAKING segment of the film program, upcoming filmmakers from Kenya get the opportunity to develop, produce and distribute their own fiction short film.
Filmmakers can choose to apply for ONE of the following classes:
•	Scriptwriting
•	Directing
•	Producing
•	Cinematography
•	Editing
•	Location Management
•	Assistant Directing
•	Costume & Make-Up
•	Production Design
•	Film Music
•	Accounting


TALKING is a podcast series revolving around what inspires us to make films and what it means to be an artist.

Name: VIM Media, LLC
Description: VIM Media LLC is a black owned media firm that specialize in content development and distribution of films, television series, and documentaries.

Name: FilmFiji
Description:
Film Fiji is the film commission of the Republic of Fiji, tasked with managing the government’s film and television incentives. The commission provides location services, administers the rebate process, grants film permits and facilitates necessary approvals from authorities such as the tax department, immigration and other government departments.

Film Fiji also provides advice on production budgets and assists with administrative procedures, with the aim of making the business of filmmaking exciting, stress-free, and ultimately positioning Fiji as one of the most sought-after film destinations in the world.

To further assist production companies, Film Fiji has a number of licensed audio visual agents that offer a range of services including logistical support, accounting services, legal services, to name a few.

Film Fiji also provides regular skill based training to individuals in order to equip them to work in large productions in numerous capacities. In addition, it maintains a database of experienced local crew, which production companies may access.  There is also an extensive online locations gallery that provides various location options to filmmakers.

As a government statutory body, Film Fiji has a large network of local stakeholders who are directly involved in the film industry, ensuring that production companies have a pleasant experience while shooting in Fiji.

Name: Arrow Films Filmproduktion
Description:
We are a film production company.

Arrow Films is specialising in conceptual films, branded documentaries and content based web-series. 
With our strategic background, a strong focus on aesthetics and a unique style we lift ideas from average to epic.

We are experienced in small and large scale productions for companies, institutions and the government, we know what it takes to deliver top notch in every step of the process.

Founded in the heart of Vienna, committed to our clients around the world we do:
documentaries // web-series // commercials // broadcast // TV // virals // image-spots // cinema

Welcome to our Homebase.

Name: Directors Notes
Description: Since 2006 Directors Notes - a British Independent Film Awards (BIFA) Qualifying Festival - has featured the work of the world’s best filmmakers, sharing the production stories behind their outstanding films with a worldwide audience of industry professionals, festival curators and dedicated film fans. Eclectic in its tastes, Directors Notes is where you can find the most cutting edge films regardless of genre, length or technique.

Name: Festival Films courts de Dinan
Description:
Bienvenue sur la page officielle du Festival Films courts de Dinan, un événement cinématographique international dédié aux courts métrages francophones, se déroulant chaque année à Dinan, au cœur des Côtes d'Armor en Bretagne. 

Depuis 2018, l'association "Court vers le large" orchestre cet événement, ouvert à un public diversifié, comprenant amateurs de cinéma, scolaires et professionnels.

Notre festival met en compétition une sélection d'une trentaine de courts métrages provenant de la francophonie entière. Les distinctions honorifiques sont décernées par un jury composé de professionnels du cinéma. En parallèle à la compétition officielle, des séances thématiques regroupent des œuvres diverses, tandis que des initiatives spéciales sont déployées pour le jeune public.

Nous vous invitons à nous rejoindre pour la huitième édition, qui se tiendra du 19 au 23 novembre 2025. Ensemble, célébrons la créativité cinématographique et favorisons l'échange au sein de l'espace francophone.  #Dinan2024 #Cinéma #FilmsCourts

Festival Films Courts de Dinan  est une marque déposée appartenant à l’association Court Vers le Large

Name: Films Grand Huit
Description: Films Grand Huit nait en 2015 de la réunion de 2 producteurs, Lionel Massol & Pauline Seigland aux énergies, aux tempéraments et aux parcours aussi divers que complémentaires. Tous 2 diplômés des Gobelins et après 10 ans d’expérience respectivement comme bras droit de producteurs (auprès de Chaz productions) & directrice de production (pour des films comme Chambre 212 de C. Honoré) ils fondent un modèle qui leur est propre : Résolument pensée comme une structure légère et de combat, Grand Huit existe comme un cadre de travail libre et structuré. Lauréat de 3 césars, de plusieurs nominations à Cannes, à Venise, à Locarno, à Toronto, Films Grand Huit accompagne ses réalisateurs du court au long métrage. La société compte désormais 2 bureaux, l’un à Paris et l’autre à Saint Pierre Quiberon où les réalisateurs sont accueillis durant les périodes d’écriture et de post prod.

Name: Media Insight
Description:
Media Insight Films
Saudi Production for Films and Creative Media.

Name: ESRA Bruxelles
Description:
Ecole Supérieure de Réalisation Audiovisuelle, formation aux métiers techniques du cinéma et de l'audiovisuel.

Depuis son ouverture en 2015, l’établissement bruxellois du Groupe ESRA s’est implanté de manière significative dans le paysage audiovisuel franco-belge.
Forte de l’expérience et de la qualité des programmes d’enseignement du Groupe ESRA, l’école de Bruxelles s’est forgée une véritable identité, notamment grâce à une équipe pédagogique composée de professionnels actifs dans les différents métiers du secteur audiovisuel. 

L’ESRA Bruxelles est une école où un suivi personnalisé des étudiants est proposé tout au long du cursus pédagogique, tout en bénéficiant du réseau professionnel du Groupe ESRA.

Name: Roitman Group Dubbing & Subtitling
Description: Productora especializada en la realización de doblaje y subtitulado de audiovisuales de todo idioma al Español Neutro (Latin American Spanish) de programas de televisión; películas, series, documentales, dibujos animados (Cartoons) y todo tipo de materiales audiovisuales que requieran de la narración y/o dramatización en idioma Español Neutro.

Name: City Films
Description:
City Films is an independent film production agency specialized in TV & Digital Commercials, Corporate Films, Documentaries and Social Media Videos.

We write. We shoot. We edit. We analyse. We report.
And if all goes well, we make sure to celebrate the moments with our clients.

Name: Utah Film Studios
Description: Utah Film Studios is a cutting edge Motion Picture and Television Production Facility located in beautiful Park City, Utah. Featuring 45,000 sq. ft. of sound stage space with an additional 25,000 sq. ft. of production office space divided into four separate suites. Each individual stage is 15,000 sq. ft. (150'x100') with a floor to grid height of 35', each stage is constructed with wood floors for easy attachment and enhanced acoustics.  There are also 3 changing rooms, 4 break rooms, 2 conference rooms and a total of 36 private offices located throughout the building.

Name: ELZEVIR FILMS
Description: Société de production cinéma et audiovisuel

Name: Andaluz Pictures
Description: Look, tell and transform. In that order or all together. This is our way of doing it. Three ideas that help us understand who we are and what we do. Each Andaluz Pictures project is an exercise in looking. What cameras can capture is only a part of what the eyes see. As for the soul, to reach it, it is necessary to live each story.

Name: IATSE 514
Description: IATSE 514 est un syndicat québécois représentant plus de 1 700 techniciennes et techniciens en production cinématographique. IATSE 514 fait partie de la grande famille IATSE, la plus importante organisation syndicale de l’industrie du film et du spectacle en Amérique du Nord, en plus d’être aussi fièrement affiliée à la FTQ, la plus grande centrale syndicale québécoise.

Name: Team Montana Films
Description: Convertir tus deseos en películas es la razón por la que hemos llegado hasta aquí. Team Montana Films es el proyecto que nos impulsó a comprender a las personas, las marcas y las empresas para contar sus historias. Todos tenemos en común la capacidad de sentir, entonces, ¿por qué no proyectar esos sentimientos visualmente con el fin de emocionar?

Name: Estúdio Base 2
Description: estudiobase2.com

Name: Sound Design Film
Description:
SoundDesignFilm.com was created by supervising sound editors Manuel Maneiro and Alberto Castaño in response to an overwhelming need among producers, film directors and indie artist to be able to create a world class sound design for their projects for a price that would fit their budget.

SDF takes the worry out of all the project sound by coordinating all the steps and details of the production.

Complete coverage of all the production sound, from preproduction design to final masters and prints, with dedicated and continuous sound supervision of the complete process.

SUPERVISING SOUND EDITION
SOUND DESIGN
SOUND FX RECORDING
BACKGROUNDS RECORDING
FOLEY
ADR
MUSIC RECORDING
MIXING

-Studio Bookings
-Profesionals Bookings (a choice of the finest sound crew)
-Airline Tickets
-Hotel Reservations
-Travel while in Galiza

Name: METEOR AGENCY
Description:
Chez Meteor-Agency, nous donnons vie à vos idées à travers des créations audiovisuelles de qualité.
 
Que ce soit pour des publicités, des films d'entreprise ou des projets créatifs, notre équipe transforme chaque concept en une expérience visuelle unique.
 
Avec une approche personnalisée et un savoir-faire technique, nous vous aidons à capter l'attention de votre public et à raconter votre histoire de manière percutante comme un météore. 
 
Vos idées, notre mission.
Faire en sorte qu'elles brillent comme des étoiles!

Name: JONNA.
Description:
Independent Film Production 
 Created by award winning filmmaker Johanneke Dijkstra
 𝚂𝚑𝚘𝚛𝚝 𝙵𝚒𝚕𝚖 | 𝙼𝚞𝚜𝚒𝚌 𝚅𝚒𝚍𝚎𝚘 | 𝙳𝚘𝚌𝚞𝚖𝚎𝚗𝚝𝚊𝚛𝚢


Johanneke Dijkstra (she/her) is an award-winning filmmaker from Friesland, The Netherlands. She tells stories that affect local and international communities. She wrote, directed and produced several innovative films that have been presented internationally. Her short film RITUS was selected for the Cannes Filmfestival. With her production company JONNA. she strives for more inclusion and making a social impact. 

Johanneke is lecturer at the Minerva Art Academy where she teaches film and philosophy. 

Website: www.jonna.eu.com
Social media: @jonna.mov

Name: .DPX Studios
Description:
We are from India with more than 2 years of experience in Various International Visual Effects Projects. .DPX Studio began its journey of creative work in 2019 and has grown in size and stature to become one of the premiere visual effects (VFX) houses in India and catering to Hollywood.

Provide support services such as Camera Tracking, Matchmove, Roto Animation, and Rotoscope for movies, commercials, and TV series.
Our main focus is to offer an outstanding international quality output in a comparatively less budget in the requested time.

Name: WABI PRODUCTIONS
Description:
We’re all about the craft—the details, the raw moments, the stories that stick. At our core, we believe in pushing creativity forward, shaping ideas into visuals that connect and resonate. Every project is a new challenge, and we embrace it with curiosity, collaboration, and a commitment to doing the work right.

With years of experience across global markets, we bring together the right talent for each project, making sure every piece finds its own rhythm and voice. From the first spark of an idea to the final cut, we’re hands-on, thoughtful, and always learning.

We are storytellers, problem-solvers, and builders. A production company that listens, adapts, and delivers.

Let’s create something real.

Name: Assembly Films
Description:
Assembly Films is a New York-based live-action commercial production company, applying our collective directorial and production experience to serve and further the creative process and actualize exceptional storytelling content. 

Our roster of celebrated directors come to the table with a fresh perspective, vast experience and clever solutions to your creative needs from concept development to production to editorial. Meanwhile, our post-production facility The RecRoom can take you all the way to delivery. 

Award-winning directors include: Christopher Bean, Samuel Bennetts, Jeffrey Fleisig, Guillaume de Fontenay, Jorn Haagen, Kellen Keene, Gary McKendry, Manuel Miranda, Mike Rowles and Julian West.

Name: 70 STEPS
Description: 70 Steps is a production company with a focus for extraordinary projects on a national and international scale. Working with upcoming talent from Germany and beyond, we want to tell stories that captivate the audience. In that sense we don't differentiate between fiction and non-fiction projects - we care about content that needs to be told.

Name: Tondero Distribución
Description:
TONDERO DISTRIBUCIÓN  es la mejor opción para la exitosa colocación y éxito de producciones audiovisuales en el Perú y el extranjero. 

Distribuimos producciones audiovisuales (CINE, TV y otras plataformas)  en el Perú y el extranjero.  Representamos producciones audiovisuales de los mejores directores y productores nacionales e internacionales.  Asesoramos campañas de lanzamiento de productos audiovisuales en todo el circuito de distribución cinematográfica.  Adquirimos productos para el mercado local e internacional. Generamos acuerdos de co -producción.  

Contamos con una amplia y consolidada red de contactos de primer nivel alrededor del mundo,  el respaldo de una reconocida imagen de marca y garantizados por el compromiso, calidad y excelencia en todo lo que hacemos. 

Representantes en Latinoamérica de la venta internacional de las novelas y series de América TV y TV Perú. Canales líderes en nuestro país.

Enfocados en la distribución local e internacional en cines y venta internacional para múltiples plataformas y medios de difusión.

Name: Mtn Craft
Description: Mtn Craft is a full-service commercial video production company and creative studio headquartered in Fairmont, West Virginia— proudly located in the heart of Appalachia! Our core team is small and nimble, but we easily scale up to meet the needs of more demanding jobs requiring world-class production.

Name: Lucisano Media Group SpA
Description: Lucisano Media Group SpA is based in Roma (Italy).

Name: Festival C.L.A.C.
Description:
Certains L'Aiment Court (C.L.A.C) is a short films contest organized by the student Art Club from emlyon business school. 
Adressed to young talented directors, the competition is constructed around a theme which is updated each year.
The rules ares easy: maximum 7 minutes for each short film.
In may, when the official ceremony takes place, the 2021 winners will be awarded. Five prices will be given by a panel of film professionnals and students.

Name: Trust Filmes
Description:
Trust Filmes is an audiovisual production company and a strategic partner for brands and agencies.

For over 20 years, we have been producing advertising films, branded content, and event coverage that connect people and brands through creativity, agility, and high-quality delivery.

With a complete in-house structure and award-winning projects recognized by ABC da Comunicação, Trust Filmes works with major brands such as GM, Nissan, Zeekr, and Linea, delivering impactful audiovisual solutions across Brazil.

 Expertise: Advertising, Branded Content, Aftermovies, Live Marketing, and Corporate Films.

Name: Outsider Video & Motion Graphics
Description:
Outsider is a full-service video production and motion graphics studio based in Columbus, Ohio. We deliver compelling, high-level video content that is critical to business success.

We engage directly with clients in a range of categories, from financial services to manufacturing to healthcare. The common thread among them? A need for inspiring, brand-driven storytelling that engages an audience.

Name: Yeah Post House
Description:
Small House. Big Color. 

We love images that resonate. After a decade of co-owning a NYC post production facility, our family decided to launch a fresh, fully remote boutique shop specializing in color and finishing for commercial and independent content. We launched in 2019, survived the COVID-19 pandemic, and have been rocking the grade since.

Name: Citrine Films
Description:
Citrine Films is your premier partner for top-tier film solutions that redefine excellence. Our vision is to transform your cinematic dreams into stunning realities. With a dedication to uncompromising quality, we specialize in crafting visually captivating narratives that leave a lasting impact.

Our film solutions are a testament to our commitment to perfection. We leverage cutting-edge technology, creative expertise, and a passion for storytelling to deliver films that resonate with audiences worldwide. From compelling documentaries to breathtaking commercials, every project we undertake is a masterpiece in its own right.

At CitrineFilms, we believe in the power of collaboration. We work closely with our clients to understand their unique vision and goals, ensuring that our films exceed expectations. Our portfolio speaks volumes about our prowess in the world of filmmaking, making us the go-to choice for those who demand nothing but the best.

Join us in crafting exceptional cinematic experiences, and let CitrineFilms elevate your storytelling to new heights.

Name: Houe Film
Description:
Houe Film er dit lokale produktionsselskab! Vi er et lille, engageret team, der tror på, at markedsføring tæt på giver mening – både i geografisk og menneskelig forstand. Vores stærke rødder i Nordvestjylland holder os dog ikke tilbage, og vi udfører naturligvis opgaver for kunder i hele landet.

Vi sætter storytelling i centrum af alt, hvad vi laver, og er med jer hele vejen igennem – fra udvikling og produktion til redigering og ikke mindst distribuering af jeres indhold! 

Vores historie går tilbage til 2017, hvor tre 16-årige startede Houe Film. Drevet af en kæmpe passion for film- og videoproduktion, blev hobbyprojektet til fuldtidsjobbet. I dag er vi et stærkt hold af dygtige og kreative folk, der brænder for at formidle dit budskab.

Name: Catalunya Film Festivals
Description:
QUI SOM?

Catalunya Film Festivals és l’associació de festivals i mostres de cinema catalans que defensa i gestiona el gran valor cultural que aquests suposen pel sector audiovisual, la cultura i la societat.

Els festivals de cinema són una peça clau del sector cinematogràfic català; una plataforma de difusió de cinema inèdit, plural i divers i un generador de reflexió i experiències col·lectives. A CFF contribuïm al creixement i a la projecció local, nacional i internacional de més de 48 festivals i mostres de cinema de Catalunya.

Des de 2005 treballem sota uns paràmetres de qualitat, excel·lència i compromís social per donar cobertura als festivals catalans i apropar-los als ciutadans i ciutadanes a través de projectes en comú.

48 festivals i mostres
1.500 professionals
570.000 espectadors/es
200 espais de projecció
100 localitats de Catalunya

QUÈ FEM?

- Interlocució
- Jornades professionals
- Assessorament jurídic
- Difusió
- Projectes comuns als festivals i mostres

FESTIVALS SOCIS

Americana Film Fest, Animac, Asian Film Festival, BCN Sports Film Fest, CLAM, Cerdanya Film Festival, Choreoscope, D’A Film Festival, Docs Barcelona, El Meu Primer Festival, FASCURT, Festimage de Calella, Festival de Curtmetratges del Masnou, Festival BBVA de Cinema de Muntanya de Torelló, Festival de Cinema de Terror de Molins de Rei, Festival de Cinema Jueu de Barcelona. Festival Ohlalà!, Festival Wallay!, FICMA, FILMETS, FIRE!!, Gollut, IN-EDIT Barcelona, INCLÚS, L’Alternativa, Mecal, Memorimage, Moritz Feed Dog, Most, Mostra de Cinema Espiritual de Catalunya, Non Stop Animation Barcelona, Penedès Festival Internacional de Cinema del Vi i el Cava, Mostra Internacional de Films de Dones, Mostra de Cinema Llatinoamericà de Catalunya, Nits de Cinema Oriental de Vic, OFFSIDE Fest, Festival Protesta, REC, Serielizados Fest, Festival de Sitges, Zinemaldia.cat, ZOOM Festival.

Name: Pack Films
Description: We help businesses stand out and generate leads consistently with high-end video production. From our base in Nashville, TN, we partner with companies nationally that utilize video to accelerate their outreach.

Name: Bonobo Pictures
Description:
We are Bonobo!
A creative content driven production house. Ever evolving, curious and  exploring.
TV Commercials, Web Content, Short Films, Web Series, Feature Films. 
Almost everything under the sun to do with film & video production. 
We take a simple idea and help it evolve into an audio-visual medium.
With an industry experience of over 10 years, we make sure every idea is evolved and executed to its full potential. Be it an indie film or a magnum opus, we treat every idea with similar passion and focus!

Name: Glocal Edit
Description:
We do what comes after LIGHTS, CAMERA, ACTION! We cut, caption, and style videos and package them into stories that speak for themselves. Our professional video editors offer in-demand and on-trend video editing solutions at a flat monthly rate. High-tech equipment, cutting-edge video editing software and passionate video editors are our recipients for ULTIMATE VIDEO EDITING.

You can call us the 'kick-ass video editing company' that finds the sweet spot between professional and creative!

Name: Dumela
Description:
At Dumela, we turn ideas into stories that connect, inspire, and make an impact. We are a creative audiovisual production company specializing in videos that blend creativity, technical excellence, and compelling storytelling.

Since 2015, we’ve been helping businesses and brands communicate their messages clearly and effectively. Our portfolio includes corporate videos, commercials, music videos, documentaries, animations, and more.

With a passionate team and state-of-the-art equipment, we handle every stage of production—from script development to final delivery. Our mission is to take your message further with professionalism, authenticity, and excellence.

Dumela means "Hello" in Setswana, the national language of Botswana, where our story began. Inspired by the giraffe, a symbol of wide vision, balance, and inspiration, we craft narratives that reach great heights.

Let’s make something amazing together.

Name: Hand Crank Films
Description: Our best films are personal. In every script, every frame captured, every cut made, a small part of our lives are imitated. We have lived the moments, felt the emotions, learned from the experiences. We have been there before. You probably have too.

Name: Blue Table Post
Description: Blue Table Post is a full service post production facility in Boerum Hill, Brooklyn, specializing in film and television editorial, sound mixing & design and digital intermediate color grading.

Name: Eye Slice Pictures
Description:
Eye Slice es una casa creadora de sueños y pesadillas cinematográficas. Nuestro foco principal es el desarrollo creativo, la financiación y producción de películas de género. 

Si te gusta la inquietud, abre bien los ojos. Estamos afilando la navaja…

Name: Berliner Synchron GmbH
Description: Berliner Synchron GmbH is the origin of dubbing services in Germany for the professional language adaptation and subtitling of international feature films and television productions, corporate media content as well as barrier-free localisation solutions. As one of the leaders of the German dubbing industry, the company has built up an excellent world-wide reputation over its 65 years and has a track record of more than 8,000 projects. With a passion for language and sound as well as respect for the creative invention of the original, this well-established company has been devoted to one purpose since its founding in 1949: To feel the original.

Name: GhostFrame
Description:
GhostFrame makes the impossible possible: LED screen with Green Screen, Hidden Tracking, and Multiple Sources.
GhostFrame works by displaying more than just the video feed on the LED panel. This magic makes it possible for professional cameras to capture one or more sets of images while the naked eye only sees one.

Name: Accademia09
Description:
Accademia09: dove il talento diventa professione

Siamo più di una scuola di formazione che forma ogni anno 600 allievi. Siamo un ecosistema creativo dove talenti emergenti e professionisti affermati si incontrano, collaborano e crescono insieme. Da oltre quindici anni formiamo eccellenze nel cinema: attori, registi, sceneggiatori e tutte le figure della produzione audiovisiva, radiofonica, televisiva e musicale.

Un metodo formativo che produce da anni grandi risultati.

Crediamo nell’apprendimento esperienziale. I nostri studenti lavorano fianco a fianco su progetti concreti, simulando l’ambiente professionale e creando connessioni che durano tutta la carriera.

Un polo d’eccellenza per l’audiovisivo

Accademia09 è un punto di riferimento per l’industria. I nostri ex allievi sono oggi professionisti di successo nel cinema, nella TV, nella radio, nel doppiaggio e nella produzione musicale, con riconoscimenti in festival e rassegne di prestigio.

Un luogo inclusivo di incontro e innovazione

Più che una scuola, siamo una community. Qui nascono amicizie, collaborazioni e progetti che danno forma al futuro dell’audiovisivo in un ambiente inclusivo e stimolante.

Investi nel talento e nell’innovazione

Se sei un investitore, uno stakeholder o un professionista del settore, Accademia09 è il partner ideale per sostenere la crescita dei talenti e dell’industria audiovisiva.

Contattaci e scopri come fare la differenza.
Insieme, costruiamo il futuro dell’audiovisivo.

Name: M2 Pictures S.r.l.
Description:
Nata nel novembre 2010 dalla passione per il cinema di Rudolph Gentile e Marco Dell’Utri, M2 Pictures è una giovane e apprezzata società di distribuzione cinematografica indipendente attiva in ogni segmento della catena di sfruttamento del prodotto filmico, dall’acquisizione dei diritti alla distribuzione attraverso i vari canali (Cinema, Pay TV, Home Video, New Media, Free TV).

La solida esperienza pregressa nel settore dell’entertainment maturata dai due soci fondatori tra il 2003 e il 2006 alla guida della Moviemax, ha portato M2 Pictures a stabilire in breve tempo una stretta rete di rapporti con società di produzione e distribuzione in tutto il mondo.

I film M2 Pictures toccano tutti i generi cinematografici, trovando nel grande intrattenimento il minimo comune denominatore. 
La strategia di selezione dei titoli mira a individuare prodotti che siano d’appeal per il pubblico, puntando su registi e cast di livello internazionale, oltre che su concept originali e innovativi.

Name: Guesswork Television
Description:
Guesswork Television works with the finest and funniest creators and stars in Australian television and pairs them with teams that are passionate about making great, global TV.

Guesswork Television is a full-service production company with offices in Melbourne and Sydney, specialising in narrative comedy, authored documentary and studio entertainment shows. Guesswork’s slate of projects includes Hannah Gadsby: Nanette, Please Like Me, Frayed (co-produced with Merman), Rosehaven, Hard Quiz, The Weekly with Charlie Pickering, Get Krack!n, The Katering Show (Season 2), Whose Line is it Anyway? Australia, Judith Lucy’s Spiritual Journey, Judith Lucy is All Woman, Problems and The Edge of the Bush, as well as live standup comedy specials for Amazon Prime Video and Stan. 

Since kicking off in earnest in 2012, Guesswork shows and their creators have bagged a Primetime Emmy and multiple other awards including Australian Academy of Cinema and Television Arts (AACTA) Awards, Logie Awards, Writers’ Guild Awards, Screen Producers Awards and numerous other guild awards. In 2018, Guesswork Television was honoured by its peers as the Screen Production Business of the Year.

Guesswork Distribution launched in 2017 to handle exploitation of Guesswork Television’s growing slate of original series, innovative formats and award-winning stand-up.

Name: JEF
Description:
A diverse range of youth films broadens the perspective of children and young people. This offers them opportunities to better determine the world they want to live in. JEF makes youth film available to exhibitors, visible and accessible to a wide and diverse audience as well during school and leisure time.

Through its active role in network organizations, JEF is the youth film contact for policy makers and the (inter)national film industry. At JEF, children and young people find a place to create, experience, and critically review film together. For and by youngsters is one of the central mottos throughout the JEF organisation.

Name: CURIOSA FILMS
Description: CURIOSA FILMS is a motion pictures and film company based out of 7 AVENUE FRANKLIN DELANO ROOSEVELT, PARIS, France.

Name: Magnolia Pictures / HDNet Films / Landmark Theatres / Truly Indie
Description: Magnolia Pictures is the theatrical and home entertainment distribution arm of Todd Wagner and Mark Cuban's 2929 Entertainment, specializing in a unique and eclectic slate of films. Formed in 2001 by Bill Banowsky and Eamonn Bowles, Magnolia's releases have included the Academy Award nominated documentaries ENRON: SMARTEST GUYS IN THE ROOM, CAPTURING THE FRIEDMANS, the groundbreaking BUBBLE by Steven Soderbergh, and numerous other successes: ONG BAK, DISTRICT B13, PULSE, KEANE, THE WORLD'S FASTEST INDIAN, WOMAN THOU ART LOOSED, READ MY LIPS, LATE MARRIAGE, and the 2006 Oscar Nominated Shorts.

Name: Ai Weiwei: Never Sorry
Description:
AI WEIWEI: NEVER SORRY is the first feature-length film about the internationally renowned Chinese artist and activist, Ai Weiwei. In recent years, Ai has garnered international attention as much for his ambitious artwork as his political provocations. AI WEIWEI: NEVER SORRY examines this complex intersection of artistic practice and social activism as seen through the life and art of China’s preeminent contemporary artist.

From 2008 to 2010, Beijing-based journalist and filmmaker Alison Klayman gained unprecedented access to Ai Weiwei. Klayman documented Ai’s artistic process in preparation for major museum exhibitions, his intimate exchanges with family members and his increasingly public clashes with the Chinese government. Klayman’s detailed portrait of the artist provides a nuanced exploration of contemporary China and one of its most compelling public figures.

Name: NFD | Norsk Filmdistribusjon
Description:
Norsk filmdistribusjon (NFD) er landets største og eldste uavhengige distributør av norsk film. Selskapet ble opprettet i 1990 og har bidratt til å slippe mange overraskende publikumssuksesser på kino i årenes løp. NFD har siden oppstarten prioritert nytenkende og ambisiøse filmskapere, og selskapet spilte en sentral rolle i at norsk kinofilm fikk en ny vår tidlig på 2000-tallet, med lanseringer av filmer som Morten Tyldums Buddy (2003), Aksel Hennies Uno(2004), Hans Petter Molands Gymnaslærer Pedersen (2006), Stian Kristiansens Mannen som elsket Yngve(2008), Nils Gaups Kautokeino-opprøret (2008) og Erik Skjoldbjærgs Nokas (2010).

Norsk filmdistribusjon har også distribuert en rekke særegne norske familiefilmer, senest med de sprudlende og fargerike Knutsen & Ludvigsen-filmene og den kritikerroste Tottori! – Sommeren vi var alene. Internasjonalt prioriterer NFD ambisiøse kinofilmer som har noe på hjertet, og de siste årene har selskapet gjort seg bemerket med prisvinnende titler som Quentin Tarantinos The Hateful Eight (2015), Jim Jarmuschs Paterson (2016), Sean Bakers The Florida Project (2017), Pawel Pawlikowskis Cold War (2018) og Pedro Almodóvars Smerte og ære (2019).

Description: Création de contenus vidéos/photos de qualités pour les entreprises et les particuliers. Ma passion pour la vidéo, combinée à une bonne maîtrise en drone, me permet de capturer des moments uniques et de raconter des histoires visuelles captivantes.

Name: Inspira Stop Motion

Inspira is a stop motion animation studio bringing stories to life one frame at a time.

We specialize in handcrafted techniques like stop motion, pixilation, paper motion, clay/plasticine animation, and anything else you can dream up.

From commercials to content creation, we create visually vivid, emotionally smart work with a distinct, artistic edge. Whether it’s puppets, paper, or a blink-and-you’ll-miss-it eyebrow raise, we’re all about animation with soul.

Let’s make something weird, wonderful, and wildly original.

Name: MediaFusion Entertainment, LLC

Founded in 1999 in Washington, DC, MediaFusion Entertainment, LLC (aka - MediaFusion Distribution Company, mediafusiondc.com) moved its headquarters to New Orleans, Louisiana in 2010, providing a full array of services for film, and television. From finance to recoupment; for producers to distributors to government agencies around the world. Name: W&B Television GmbH
Description:
Die Wiedemann & Berg Film wurde 2003 von Quirin Berg und Max Wiedemann gegründet, gefolgt von der Gründung der W&B Television 2010. Beide Firmen sind seit Januar 2020 Teil der neu gegründeten LEONINE Studios. Zu den über 120 Produktionen zählen der Oscar-prämierte Kinofilm DAS LEBEN DER ANDEREN, der zweifach Oscar-nominierte WERK OHNE AUTOR sowie zahlreiche Nummer-1-Hits wie MÄNNERHERZEN, WHO AM I, VATERFREUDEN oder WILLKOMMEN BEI DEN HARTMANNS sowie eine Vielzahl an Fernsehprojekten wie die Kultserie 4 BLOCKS (TNT Serie), DER PASS (Sky) oder das erste deutsche Netflix Original DARK, das von der führenden US-Bewertungsplattform „Rotten Tomatoes“ zur beliebtesten Netflix Original Serie der Welt gewählt wurde. 
Pioniergeist, die Bandbreite von großem Kino, linearem Fernsehen und High-End-Drama für Streaming-Partner, kontinuierlich große Besucher- und Zuschauerzahlen, der Focus auf Qualität, die Zusammenarbeit mit herausragenden Kreativen und ein großartiges Team haben Wiedemann & Berg zu einem der erfolgreichsten Produktionshäuser in Deutschland gemacht – nominiert und ausgezeichnet u.a. mit Bambi, Bayerischer Fernsehpreis, Bayerischer Filmpreis, Deutscher Fernsehpreis, Deutscher Filmpreis, Goldene Kamera, Goldene Nymphe, Grimme-Preis, GQ Award, Europäischer Filmpreis, Hollywood Reporter Award, LA Critics Award, Magnolia Award, Rockie Award, Academy Award, BAFTA, César, Romy und Golden Globe.

The two year, full-time MFA in Cinematic Arts Program at RSICA has been tailor- designed with research and consultation from a selection of the most successful film and media schools in the world. The MFA curriculum has been designed specifically for needs of the region; to produce industry-ready graduates who are skilled craftspeople, and highly employable critical thinkers, professionally trained and experienced in all areas of pre-production, production, and post-production.

Name: Operatie Timo - De Documentaire
Description:
Een verhaal over hoop, moed én doorzettingsvermogen.

Bij de 8 jarige Timo, gamer, Formule 1 fan, voetballer én Feyenoorder in hart en nieren, laten juist zijn nieren hem ernstig in de steek. Op zijn 12e stopt ook zijn blaas ermee. Inmiddels is Timo 15 en niemand kan hem beter maken. Van samen met zijn vader trainen en juichen op het voetbalveld naar moedig zijn in het Sophia Kinderziekenhuis. Timo heeft een nieuwe nier nodig, die hij van zijn vader krijgt. 

 "Operatie Timo - De Documentaire" werpt een licht op de verborgen dagelijkse wereld áchter zijn aandoeningen. Over hoe het voor hem, zijn ouders, zijn zus en zijn omgeving is om de moed niet op te geven en om elke keer weer op te staan. Timo hoopt hiermee een stemversterker en inspiratie voor anderen te zijn. Want er zijn meer chronisch zieke jonge helden, kanjers en bikkels zoals hij. Die simpelweg inspireren door de wijze waarop ze al op jonge leeftijd onzichtbaar ziek worden, daar niet over klagen en het beste ervan maken.

De documentaire volgt Timo gedurende het hele proces voor, tijdens en na zijn ingrijpende transplantatie. En we zien of het lukt om van Timo weer de sportieve voetballer te maken die hij zo graag wil zijn.

In de media:
Algemeen Dagblad: https://www.ad.nl/rotterdam/toen-joeri-49-zijn-zoon-na-jaren-van-ziekte-kon-helpen-deed-hij-dat-meteen-maar-ik-ben-geen-held~a4f6de31/?cb=e6a04ec17bbdb253a1322463ea249871&auth_rd=1

Ook te volgen onder "Operatie Timo" op Facebook. Instagram, TikTok en YouTube.

Formada por um time de mulheres negras membras da Rede de Talentos do Projeto Paradiso, realizou curtas-metragens selecionados para mais de 30 festivais e exibidos em mais de 10 países. Realizou produção local no longa-metragem antológico “Insubmissas” da Daza Filmes (RJ) com licenciamento para o CineBrasilTV e Itaú Cultural Play, estreado no Festival do Rio, exibido no Festival Mix Brasil e com destaque na Vogue Cultura. 
Também assina produção local no longa-metragem documental “Anna Borges do Sacramento”, uma co-produção Brasil-Espanha premiada no Encuentro Internacional de Industria Documental Conecta (Chile). 

Produzirá em 2025 o longa-metragem de sci-fi “Sol a Pino” com distribuição da Vitrine Filmes, aporte de produção da Lei Paulo Gustavo, patrocínio da YDUCS e apoio da Condé+. A produtora criou o selo criativo Películas Negras que, além de ser um laboratório audiovisual para novos cineastas com duas edições realizadas, também atua como um núcleo criativo de desenvolvimento de projetos de ficção, com foco em cinema de gênero.
