Name: Good Planet Innovation
Description:
OUR MISSION
Our mission is to facilitate a paradigm shift in the entertainment and advertising industries toward sustainable production and event practices as well as inspire conscious consumer behavior by integrating sustainable, healthy, and ethical products and brands in major movies and television shows.

PRODUCTION SUSTAINABILITY
As most of us in production are aware, our industry is incredibly wasteful, sending thousands of tons of waste to landfills every year, much of which can be re-purposed, recycled, donated, or composted. Good Planet Innovation is guiding the shift to sustainable practices, both behind the scenes and on screen. Providing consultation and hands on support from pre-production to post, Good Planet finds sustainable solutions for every department, from art department to catering, from the office to transportation. Enabling positive, eco-friendly operations behind the scenes without compromising the production’s timeline, budget, quality, or safety goals. In addition to the robust programs during productions, we will manage and coordinate donations of everything from sets to wardrobe to leftover catered food, keeping nearly all of it out of the landfill, often making the production ‘zero-waste' while supporting the local community. Our sustainability initiatives will save the production money in many departments, provide tax receipts for the donations, and create valuable positive PR content for the project and company.

ETHICAL BRAND INTEGRATION
As filmmakers, we also have powerful influence on our audiences and can use that power for good through conscious product and behavior integration while maintaining and even enhancing the integrity of the story. Good Planet Innovation provides full spectrum brand integration and consulting services to help you inspire a positive shift in your audiences’ behavior well after they have enjoyed your film.

Name: Vitamedia Film - Independent Boutique Production Company
Description:
Vitamedia Film ist eine unabhängige Boutique-Produktion für cinematic hybrid storytelling – an der Schnittstelle von Fiction und Non-Fiction. Unsere Produktionen gehören zu den meist ausgezeichneten des deutschen Fernsehens der letzten Jahre: Grimme-Preise, Deutscher Fernsehpreis, Blauer Panther, Robert Geisendörfer Preis, Katholischer Medienpreis, Diakonie Journalistenpreis und viele weitere.

Wir entwickeln und realisieren Stoffe, die dokumentarische Wahrhaftigkeit mit der erzählerischen Präzision fiktionaler Dramaturgie verbinden. Dieses Prinzip prägt internationale Benchmark-Formate wie „Herbstresidenz“ und „Zum Schwarzwälder Hirsch“ – Projekte, die Genregrenzen verschieben und gesellschaftliche Wirkung entfalten.

Wir arbeiten global mit Broadcastern, Streamern und kulturellen Institutionen und bauen den Bereich high-end cinematic storytelling konsequent aus: Serien, Mockumentaries, visuell anspruchsvolle Hybridformen und gesellschaftlich relevante Utopien.

Vitamedia Film steht für eine Haltung: keine Kompromisse, keine zweitbeste Lösung. Wir erzählen Geschichten, die nicht nur berühren – sondern eine tatsächliche Spur hinterlassen.

Name: Aperture Music
Description: Founded by Manish Raval and Tom Wolfe in 1997, Aperture Music offers music supervision, music editing, and original music production services for film and television. Notable television projects include Community, This Is Us, and Girls, which earned them an Emmy nomination. Name: Riverbank Studios
Description:
We are a film production company based in New Delhi, India for the past 35 years. Set up as a fully integrated documentary and motion picture film production unit, Riverbank Studios was the first of its kind in Northern India.
   
Riverbank Studios was started in 1973 by Mike H. Pandey; internationally known filmmaker.  Today, a team of committed professionals is the driving force that constitutes the Riverbank spirit. The constant endeavor is to bring about awareness to shoulder the responsibility that rests on the human race.
  
 
The creative impulse at Riverbank has always been governed by a deep-rooted affinity to the natural order of the living world. Our filmmaking experience has been diverse and we have a wide spectrum of productions including films on wildlife and the environment, corporate films and advertisements, feature films, television programming, nature series for national television and socially motivated awareness campaigns.
 
Over the years however, our focus and commitment has been towards films on the natural world. Shooting all over India we have developed a tremendous bank of footage and stories that represent various facets of the country’s incredible natural and social heritage.
 
Our production "The Last Migration-wild elephant capture in Sarguja" was the first Asian film to win the world’s most prestigious award – The Green Oscar - Panda Award at the Wildscreen, 1994.

The film "Shores of Silence-whale sharks in India" was also the Winner of the Green Oscar - Panda Award in the year 2000 – the second Oscar for Riverbanks.

In October 2004 Riverbanks won the Green Oscar – Panda Award for the third time for the film “Vanishing Giants” 

The film "Honey Hunters of the Blue Mountains" has won several international awards including the second Prize at 'Earth Vision' in Santa Cruz, USA, and the 'Mayor of Prague Award' at the International IFFAF at Prague, 2002. 

The Riverbank outlook is to present the real picture in totality.

Name: JEF
Description:
A diverse range of youth films broadens the perspective of children and young people. This offers them opportunities to better determine the world they want to live in. JEF makes youth film available to exhibitors, visible and accessible to a wide and diverse audience as well during school and leisure time.

Through its active role in network organizations, JEF is the youth film contact for policy makers and the (inter)national film industry. From story development and storyboarding to sound design and post-production, our clients reach out to us from a wide array of industries with business-driven needs like: education and research, marketing, advertising, training, web site development, and many other internal & external communications projects. Comprised of a staff of dedicated post-production professionals regarded as industry leaders throughout their respective disciplines in the film and television communities, Sixteen19 has positioned itself as the film and television industries' leading technology liaison, by combining new workflow paradigms and cost saving methodology with traditional means of postproduction. 

In a marketplace comprised of obsolete, technology laden, big-iron facilities and fly by night sensationalized file-based shops, Sixteen19 offers the production community a true hybrid of traditional post experience and new technology vision. With divisions in New York, Los Angeles, New Orleans and London, and comprised of a core group of employees that have worked together for close to a decade, Sixteen19 maintains close relationships with creatives and producers  throughout the film and television communities around the world.

Name: FrostFX
Description:

Known for its exceptional experience in fluid simulation effects, like water and fire, the company’s credits include projects for Coca-Cola, Danone, Carlsberg, Microsoft and Honda. 

FrostFX offices are in Estonia, located in north-eastern Europe, and referred to as “e-Estonia”, relating to Estonia’s emergence as one of the most advanced e-societies in the world, has been called “the role model for tech-enabled states” by Ben Rooney for the Wall Street Journal and is known as the birthplace of Skype.

Name: CZAR.BE
Description:
CZAR is an international production company with offices in Brussels, Amsterdam, Hamburg, Berlin and Paris. We produce and co-produce feature films, short films, documentaries, tv shows and commercials.

But most of all, CZAR is about talent, guts and the creativity of its directors and producers.

Name: University of Oregon Department of Cinema Studies
Description: The Department of Cinema Studies at the University of Oregon serves as a dynamic interdisciplinary major, program, and way of life at the University of Oregon. The major allows students to study moving image media as multicultural, transnational and richly humanistic phenomena. As a comprehensive liberal arts degree, the major cultivates an appreciation of the arts, an ability to communicate ideas using a broad array of media, and an understanding of how various cultures tell their stories. The department is made up of over 300 students and faculty members from a diverse background of academic fields and industries.

Name: Photon VFX
Description:
Visual Effects & Animation company established 1992 in Australia. Credits include, Australia, Superman Returns, Animalia, House of Wax, Ghost Ship, Scooby Doo and many more.

Photon has extensive experience with motion control, miniatures as well as a offering a full CGI suite.

We are located on the Gold Coast at Warner Roadshow Studios.

Name: AiR - Art in Research
Description:
L'Agence de communication scientifique AiR apporte des solutions uniques et sur-mesure -- vidéos, photographies, sites web ou autres supports -- pour mettre en avant les chercheurs et les activités de recherche. Entreprises, fondations, instituts ou universités, AiR répond à tous les besoins en termes de communication scientifique, interne ou externe.

En parallèle de l'Agence, il y a la Galerie. Première galerie dédiée à la photographie scientifique, AiR met en avant le regard que portent les scientifiques sur leur travail et propose des tirages de photographies prises par les chercheurs dans leur laboratoire. Notre singularité s’exprime aussi dans notre engagement, prônant un art responsable : une partie de nos recettes finance en effet les projets de recherche derrière chacune des œuvres. Pour en savoir plus : www.artinresearch.store

Toutes les republications sur cette page correspondent à des réalisations AiR.

Name: Montreal Greek Film Festival
Description: An annual cultural event celebrating Greek films showcasing the talent of Greek directors, producers and actors.

Name: WESTEND FILMS
Description:
WestEnd Filmsis a dynamic London-based production, financing and international sales company for feature films and TV. It offers filmmakers finance, production and sales expertise as well as an extensive network of contacts across all sectors of the industry.

WestEnd’s diverse slate of features includes Oscar nominees THE BREADWINNER, ALBERT NOBBS, FOOTNOTE and THE INVISIBLE WOMAN. Recent titles include FREUD’S LAST SESSION starring Anthony Hopkins and Matthew Goode, IRENA’S VOW starring Sophie Nelisse and Dougray Scott; THE LAST RIFLEMAN starring Pierce Brosnan.

Through its WeLove brand, WestEnd develops and produces female-specific content.

WestEnd has also established a television arm, WeSeries, whose first developed and produced show VALLEY OF TEARS was acquired worldwide by HBO.

Westend Films was founded in 2008 by veteran producer Sharon Harel Cohen, Maya Amsellem and Eve Schoukroun, and their credits include Stephen Frears’ TAMARA DREWE, Ralph Fiennes’ THE INVISIBLE WOMAN, Oscar-nominated ALBERT NOBBS, Benedict Andrews debut Film UNA, Hideo Nakata’s CHATROOM, and the acclaimed television series VALLEY OF TEARS.

Name: Bulut Film
Description: Founded in 2006 by Yamaç Okur and Nadir Öperli, Bulut Film is a production company that aims to produce films with directors’ labels. As such Bulut Film is interested in avant-garde styles, experimental narratives, and fresh talents. Bulut Film’s vision is to produce first films of young and talented directors who are eager to have a word in international cinema scene, and to support young and talented screenwriters. Bulut Film also plans to produce or coproduce the prospective projects of internationally acclaimed Turkish directors. As such, Bulut Film aims to accelerate the number of Turkish films that will be screened in international festivals and other distribution cycles.

Name: Raul Torres Jr. Music, LLC
Description: Music Composition Services for Film, TV and interactive media.  Specialising in full orchestral, electronic, jazz, vocals and multipurpose ensemble music.

Name: Viva Filmes
Description:
A paixão pelo cinema e pela publicidade foi a união que deu início à Viva Filmes, uma produtora de vídeos especializada na linguagem cinematográfica! 
Com uma equipe altamente capacitada e atendimento de excelência, nosso compromisso está em realmente “ouvir” os nossos clientes e traduzir suas necessidades em produções audiovisuais de altíssima qualidade.
Podemos te ajudar na produção de vídeos institucionais, vídeos marketing, documentários, vídeos de produto e vídeos de treinamento.
Os projetos são desenvolvidos de forma individual, priorizando o atendimento personalizado e com o acompanhamento de todas as fases da produção.

Name: Animación al Frame
Description: Desde Animación al Frame ofrecemos cursos de animación online y divulgación sobre animación en YouTube

Name: Goalhanger Films
Description:
Goalhanger Films is a UK-based television and podcast production company specialising in sport. We produce access documentaries featuring major sports stars across the globe.

Our recent slate of projects includes Football, Prince William and Our Mental Health; Hand of God; Mo Salah: A Football Fairytale, and the upcoming Serena Williams documentary with Amazon Prime.

Name: European Digital Cinema Forum
Description:
The EDCF serves as a central European platform for innovation and knowledge sharing, addressing both the opportunities and challenges shaping the future of the big screen.

Founded in 2000, the European Digital Cinema Forum (EDCF) was instrumental in the successful digitisation of European cinemas, helping the industry navigate this major technological shift with minimal disruption. Today, the EDCF continues to unite professionals from across the film ecosystem - including trade association, standard bodies, cinema operators, manufacturers, service providers, distributors, post-producers, and content creators - to explore the evolving landscape of cinema technology.

Name: Amalgamated Pixels
Description:
Amalgamated Pixels is a high-end visual effects production company specializing in complex computer generated effects for motion pictures, television and large format entertainment venues.   A partial list of credits include The Matrix, The Cell, Blade Trinity, Die Hard 4, Get Smart and Over Her Dead Body.  We are also well versed in the special needs of large format and 3D films like Tall Tales, The Journey, Mummies: Secrets of the Pharaohs and Shark Boy and Lava Girl.  
      Amalgamated Pixels was founded in 1995 by Derry Frost, an accomplished 3D animator with a diverse background.  Over the years, Amalgamated has grown into a successful company that in March of 2008 will be moving into a brand new 10,000 square foot facility in Westlake Village, CA.  With over 70 workstations and 12 management offices, we now have the capacity to handle any size job.  Much of this recent growth can be attributed to the wealth of new talent added to the Amalgamated staff.  Recently we've added Jeff Wood, formerly of ILM where he managed over a 100 CG technical directors on films like Men in Black and StarWars: The Phantom Menace.    And our latest addition is Executive Producer Bonnie Kanner who joins us after a very successful tenure at Pixel Magic.  
      Under Derry's direction, Amalgamated Pixels has developed a fine team of managers, artisans and technicians who share his commitment to quality as well as his passion for pushing the envelope of visual effects artistry.  We utilize a wide variety of software packages including Maya, 3D Studio Max, Lightwave, Project Messiah, Z-Brush as well as After Effects and Digital Fusion for our 2D solutions.  This diversity of people and software allows us to tackle anything from rig removal to complex 3D animation.

Name: La Casa Rossa
Description:
La Casa Rossa is an independent
production company born in Rome in 2019
founded by producer Francesca Verdini.

Name: MONSTRA | Lisbon Animated Film Festival
Description:
A MONSTRA | Festival de Animação de Lisboa é uma realização da Taumotrópio Lda. em parceria com a EGEAC | EM e conta com o apoio da Câmara Municipal de Lisboa | Pelouro da Cultura, do ICA/MC e outras entidades públicas e privadas.

Este festival apresenta, há 15 anos, o que de melhor se realiza no mundo do cinema de animação e divulga novas propostas de diálogo entre as artes e a animação, a performance, interatividade, entre outras.

A edição de 2016 será marcada por um vasto, profundo e diversificado olhar pelo melhor cinema de animação que se realiza anualmente no mundo inteiro com dois focos principais: o cinema de animação dos países da Ex‐Jugoslávia, com especial ênfase na animação Croata, Eslovena e Sérvia; e o Fado e a Animação, com especial ênfase nas várias formas em que as duas artes se podem relacionar. 

Ao longo destas 14 edições do festival e através de muito esforço, vontade e trabalho alcançámos um lugar de destaque no panorama nacional e internacional do cinema de animação, bem como nas áreas das transversalidades artísticas, formação, exposições e na formação de novos e jovens públicos.

Name: dreamin' films
Description:
Creemos en las historias locales con valor universal, en las nuevas miradas y en un cine más interesado en plantear preguntas que en responderlas.

También en que el mundo se puede cambiar a través del poder de la ficción. Por eso nuestras historias se trabajan desde los márgenes y la diversidad, sin romper la promesa de ser sorprendentes y entretenidas al mismo tiempo.

En dreamin’ films no solo queremos respetarnos a nosotrxs como creadores, también a ti como espectador.

Name: Hendy Street Produxions
Description: "Hendy Street" as the cool kids like to call it, a North Carolina-based powerhouse in media creation, where creativity and innovation have flourished since 2007 we have built a legacy that stands as a testament to our dedication and expertise. What truly sets us apart is our unparalleled marketing strategies, meticulously crafted to deliver exceptional results. At Hendy Street Produxions, we don't just create content—we craft stories that resonate. Our distinguished portfolio features over 100 acclaimed films and TV shows, alongside a remarkable array of commercials and promotions that more than doubles that figure. Hendy Street has truly mastered the art of storytelling and excel in adapting to the ever-evolving media landscape.

Name: Door G
Description: From global brands seeking seamless, channel-spanning narratives to agencies balancing demands, our virtual production capabilities and agile workflows redefine what’s possible. We deliver uncompromising quality, remarkable speed, and cost-efficiency at any scale.

Name: Flymark
Description:
Drive more business with media that does the heavy lifting - inspiring people to engage, visit, or purchase without ever stepping foot on site.

When customers can’t see or feel your space, they hesitate. 
But being there in person isn’t always possible. Time, distance, or uncertainty gets in the way.

WHAT IF THEY COULD FEEL YOUR SPACE BEFORE THEY EVER ARRIVED?
Not just see it — believe in it.
Remove the friction.
Earn their trust.
Make the decision easy.

• We are focused on your business goals.
• Our cinematic tours aren’t just eye candy - they're strategic tools to convert your ideal customers into buyers.

Results that Justify the Investment
• You’ll get powerful media assets
• Receive a strategic, step-by-step guide
• Understand exactly how to use your videos effectively
• Learn how to apply them to achieve 10X results

Name: ZAZI FILMS
Description:
Zazi Films est une société de production de cinéma et télévision française.

Elle a été créée par Danièle Delorme et Hugo Gélin en 2008, dans la continuité de la société La Guéville (La Guerre des Boutons, Un éléphant ça trompe énormément, Nous irons tous au Paradis, Le château de ma mère, La gloire de mon père, Le Grand Blond avec une chaussure noire…), fondée par le cinéaste Yves Robert.

En 2018, Sarah Gélin s'associe à Hugo Gélin et développe les pôles série TV & web au sein de Zazi Films.

Zazi Films a produit à ce jour 4 longs-métrages, deux mini-séries pour Canal + et du contenu multimédia.

Name: CTT EXP & RENTALS
Description:
CTT EXP & RENTALS es una empresa mexicana dedicada a la renta de equipo para cine y video, a lo largo de sus 20 años de experiencia en la industria audiovisual ha logrado ser parte de exitosos largometrajes, cortometrajes, documentales, comerciales, videos y series de televisión. Hoy en día es una de las empresas más sólidas y reconocidas de la industria en México.

CTT busca satisfacer las necesidades y expectativas de productores ejecutivos, productores, fotógrafos, directores, gaffers y todos aquellos que forman parte de la producción, con un servicio personalizado y de excelencia. Para el desarrollo de nuestra labor contamos con equipo de alta tecnología y con personal ampliamente calificado que garantiza la calidad en cada uno de nuestros servicios. Nuestro mayor interés será siempre ofrecer soluciones confiables.

Name: Artbox Production House
Description:
Established in 2003 ARTBOX is now one of the leading film and TV commercial production companies in the Baltic region, providing wide range of production services in Lithuania and Latvia.

In thirteen years of work ARTBOX has gathered a truly professional team, has archived a great number of varied locations and vast international casting experience.

ARTBOX works with new talents as well as experienced artists. Productions and co-productions with wide international appeal is the main goal of the company.

ARTBOX has co-produced films with Italy, Finland, Armenia, Latvia, Poland and other countries. As a production service provider, ARTBOX also produces big international films and TV commercials for partners from all over the world.

Latest films co-produced by ARTBOX are the award-winning Finnish-Lithuanian feature “2 Nights Till Morning” starring Palme d’Or Best Actress winner Marie-Josée Croze and the Armenian-Lithuanian film “The Last Inhabitant”. Music for this film was created by American–Armenian band “System of a Down”.

We like challenges. We love our job. We are perfectionists and seek for only the best quality, at the same time being creative in offering solutions how to keep the costs attractive. To be open-minded & committed, youthful & responsible and always have fun. This is the attitude with which we approach every project.

Name: TEAM FILMS Angola
Description:
A TEAM Films é uma produtora audiovisual angolana de serviço completo especializada em publicidade, conteúdos para televisão e cinema. Com um vasto conhecimento do território, da cultura e do mercado angolano, a TEAM Films disponibiliza os recursos humanos, os meios técnicos e o know-how necessários para produzir ou co-produzir os mais diversos tipos de projectos audiovisuais em Angola.

Para a TEAM Films, cada projecto é mais do que um desafio. É um trabalho colectivo que reúne o empenho, as capacidades e a experiência da nossa equipa com as necessidades, os objectivos e aspirações dos nossos clientes para alcançar um produto audiovisual do qual todos se orgulhem. Dedicamos a maior atenção a todos os detalhes e procuramos acrescentar valor em todas as fases do processo, desde o briefing inicial à entrega do projecto acabado. Tudo para garantir o cumprimento de todos os requisitos de prazo, orçamento e qualidade. Para criar peças que se distinguem no panorama audiovisual nacional e internacional. E para consolidar a nossa posição como uma das maiores e melhores produtoras audiovisuais angolanas a trabalhar para o mercado interno e externo. 

A TEAM Films foi fundada em 2014 pelo seu CEO "Gildo Mariano" com o objectivo de oferecer aos seus clientes, e ao mercado Angolano em geral, soluções de Publicidade Globais, TV/Cinema, service e Integradas que permitam às empresas desenvolver e melhorar os seus negócios e as suas relações com os seus Clientes.
Tudo começou no mercado de service com grande domínio, até nos afirmarmos como produtora de serviço completo, um sonho que nasceu em 2006.

Name: DISORDER: The Rare Disease Film Festival
Description: Disorder: The Rare Disease Film Festival showcases films from around the world that address the challenges of life with a rare disease. Most (but not all) of our films are documentaries. Many are less than 15 minutes.

Name: Athea Visuals
Description: Athea is a multidisciplinary creative company based in Jakarta. We are a collective of passionate souls, aiming to deliver deeper impacts to our society through a creative approach. We encompass a few affiliates that focus on different kinds of works.

Name: Various Artists Limited
Description:
Various Artists Limited - VAL - is an award winning independent television production company based in central London, dedicated to making ambitious and bold scripted comedy and drama programmes for the global market. VAL was founded in July 2017 by the writers Sam Bain and Jesse Armstrong, together with producers and ex Channel 4 commissioners Phil Clarke and Roberto Troni. BBC Studios holds a minority share in the company.

Recent credits include: 

the critically acclaimed I May Destroy You (written by and starring Michaela Coel, and co-produced with Falkna Ltd), for the BBC and HBO

Sally4Ever, winner of Best Scripted Comedy BAFTA 2019, (written by and starring Julia Davis and co-produced with Hush Ho) for Sky and HBO

Dead Pixels (created by Jon Brown and starring Alexa Davis, Will Merrick, Charlotte Ritchie, David Mumeni and Sargon Yelda) - 2 seasons for E4

Name: Archivio Audiovisivo del Movimento Operaio e Democratico
Description: La Fondazione Archivio Audiovisivo del Movimento Operaio e Democratico, nata alla fine degli anni Settanta, svolge la sua attività nel campo degli audiovisivi (cinema, tv, multimedialità), per favorire la costruzione di una memoria collettiva dei movimenti sociali e dei loro protagonisti. Primo presidente della Fondazione è stato Cesare Zavattini che ha ricoperto il ruolo fino alla sua morte nel 1989. La nostra Fondazione è da sempre impegnata nella ricerca, raccolta, conservazione di documenti audiovisivi storici, di repertorio, di attualità, di ricostruzione narrativa, e nella promozione della loro conoscenza, studio, analisi ed elaborazione. Organizza ricerche e studi, convegni, seminari, rassegne e mostre su temi riguardanti la storia e la società, e cura pubblicazioni specializzate.

Name: Cheap Shot Ltd
Description:
We provide in house 2D compositing teams for visual effects on feature films. Using primarily Nuke software, we set up experienced compositors who can handle a wide variety of shots working closely with the VFX supervisor, Director and Editorial department.

Name: producciones BAJOCERO
Description:
Empresa productora dedicada a la publicidad, cine y videoclips.
Desde la creación han sido más de 48 videoclips los realizados y más de 200 piezas publicitarias para distintas agencias y marcas. Hemos logrado varios premios en distintos sectores y aumentando el número de clientes cada año pero lo más importante es que seguimos con los mismos clientes con los que empezamos.

Name: TAKAMI PRODUCTIONS
Description:
TAKAMI PRODUCTIONS est née de la rencontre de deux auteurs-réalisateurs, Karine Blanc et Michel Tavares, qui ont eu envie d’associer leurs parcours et compétences complémentaires pour accompagner des auteurs.

Depuis ses débuts en 2002, TAKAMI PRODUCTIONS a produit près de 80 courts-métrages, avec le souci constant de débusquer de nouvelles voix, de nouveaux regards sur le monde, de développer des histoires, d’accompagner des trajectoires singulières, de répondre aux exigences techniques et artistiques de chaque projet.

En 2015, TAKAMI PRODUCTIONS a obtenu le Prix Procirep du Producteur de Court-Métrage à Clermont-Ferrand.

Name: Incipit Film
Description:
We are an independent production company with a clear vision: make culture through audiovisual.

Audiovisual is an ongoing evolution’s world for us, a means of telling culture.
We produce culture and we work on every project integrating traditional production techniques with new languages and new technologies.
We work together with European and international producers, directors, distributors, museums and cultural institutions, with the common aim of giving voice to sensitive issues of impact for contemporary society.

We take care of every aspect: from the development of embryonic ideas of authors and clients, both established and emerging, up to the production strategy, the organization of filming and post-production. But we certainly do not stop there. We assure each audiovisual product a targeted and dedicated distribution, inclusive of all the promotional channels offered by the current market.

For us at Incipit Film every film is a new beginning.

Name: Ministério Dos Filmes
Description: We are Ministério Dos Filmes, a portuguese leading film production company, founded in 1999.

Name: Impulso Filmes
Description:
A Impulso atua no segmento audiovisual com foco no desenvolvimento de soluções criativas em videos institucionais, corporativos e artísticos através de diferentes linguagens e técnicas. Já assinou trabalhos para diversas instituições, como Rayovac, Camesa, Frigorífico Saudali, Santa Casa de Misericórdia, CBA, Fundação Estudar, Editora Abril e UFJF. 

No campo da produção autoral conta com núcleo criativo interno criando e planejando projetos de curtas, longas e documentários, tendo em seu histórico a participação em diversos festivais e o licenciamento de diversos produtos para o Canal Brasil, CineBrasilTV, Canal Curta e segmentos de streaming (O2Play e NETNow).

Name: Talking Pictures Productions
Description: Talking Pictures Productions is an award winning Bahrain based production house offering a full range of film, audio, photography and digital production services.  Founded in 2007 by Sanjay Kapoor, who has over 20 years of international experience in the film industry, we specialise in the production of TVCs/corporate films/radio commercials/digital communicationsto international standards for advertising agencies and corporate clients in the region.

Name: qq studio
Description:
For over 30 years, QQ Studio has established itself as one of the most prolific film companies in the Czech Republic, producing thousands of series, hundreds of premium advertisements, and numerous films that showcase their creative and technical expertise. With a legacy of producing captivating content that continues to captivate audiences today. The studio's roots are in traditional animation. Over time, the scope of work has expanded, and now offers a complete support system for filmmakers not only in the Czech Republic but all across Europe. QQ film house includes everything from film equipment rental, video editing, coloring labs, 5.1 and 7.1 sound stages, VFX departments, 2D & 3D animation departments, podcast studios, film workshops, music studios, green screen studios, film sound department and more then 50 professionals in team. The studio is based in Ostrava and Prague. Join us in collaboration.

References: Netflix, Warner Bros. Pictures, Czech Television, Nova, Prima, Coca-Cola, ArcelorMittal, Skanska, Schwing Stetter and many others.

Name: Cinema Thom
Description:
Cinema Thom is a boutique production company focused on luxury photography and film across fashion, beauty, travel, and the events space. Thom works at the heart of digital strategy and filmmaking, combining both elements to take content the farthest it can go from the beginning. 
Pronounced; Tom

Name: Fluid Pictures
Description: Fluid Pictures is an independent, creative studio founded in 2006 by award-winning animators David Throssell, MJ Azzopardi and Adrian Wyer. We specialise in CGI, visual effects, VR, motion graphics and design.

Name: SODA FILMS
Description: Founded in 2009, Soda Films is an enterprise focused on the development of film events as festivals, seminars, workshops, labs in Peru, Argentina and Colombia. In Peru, we also produce the annual contest 48 Hours Film Project-Lima. We are committed to the development of new audiences for author's film in Peru.

Name: inHouse VFX
Description:
"Transforming visions into reality. InHouse VFX specialized in cutting-edge visual effects for film, television and advertising. With a passion of creativity, technical excellence and always a good mood, we bring your stories to life."

Name: Panda Films
Description:
We make films with passion.

PANDA is founded to make beautiful films and to make everyone happy at the end.

We love what we do and in order to make impressive films, we work hard.

We produce TVCs for the local market and service all kind of projects for Bollywood, Hollywood, European Cinema, Independent World Cinema, TV shows, travelogues, short films, music videos, branded content, documentaries, line production for films, TV Series, Web Series. We also do fixer jobs if we really like the idea behind the project. We also like to service photo shoots and photography projects. We always take good care of our clients and they keep coming back.

Some of the clients that we have worked for are Excel Entertainment India, Apple, Netflix, TUI, TV8 Malaysia, TLC China, JMC Trucks China, Eurosport, NRK Drama, Piaget, Jeep, Harley Davidson, France Ô and much more.

PANDA is GOOD, PANDA is COOL, be like PANDA, call PANDA !

Name: Khalkedon Film
Description: Khalkedon Yapım olarak, sinema ve televizyon alanında özgün işler üretme; reklam ve tanıtım alanında etkili, yaratıcı ve yenilikçi çözümler sunma sorumlumluluğuyla hareket eden bir yapım şirketidir.  Ayrıca bünyesinde, aynı adla bir çizgi film stüdyosunu barındırır.

Name: Eyecatcher, de filmmakers
Description:
Wij maken films, maar dan net effe anders...

Een professionele bedrijfsfilm maken begint bij een goed verhaal. Daarom willen we eerst alles weten van je bedrijf, product en organisatie: welke waarde voegen jullie toe? En aan wie? Wat is jullie merkbelofte en hoe ervaren jullie klanten dit? Wij maken het verhaal voor een pakkende bedrijfsfilm die indruk maakt. Een film waarmee we je bedrijf op de kaart zetten!

Onze aanpak is eigenlijk simpel. Eerst inventarisatie en analyse, daarna volgt het schrijven van een creatief verhaal. We koppelen deze terug in een uitgewerkt script. Als je net zo enthousiast bent, gaan we aan de slag. Wij gebruiken uiteraard high-end apparatuur, van 4K camera’s, sliders tot drones, en wij monteren alles inclusief voice-over, muziek, animatie en motion graphics tot een overtuigend en professionele film voor jouw bedrijf.

Groeten, het team van Eyecatcher – de filmmakers

Name: Utopia-Cinéma Durable !
Description:
GARANTI SANS POPCORN ! Le petit réseau Utopia  est implanté  dans  6 villes : Avignon, Bordeaux, Montpellier, Saint-Ouen l’Aumône, Toulouse, Tournefeuille. La plupart  de ces structures sont en SCOP (société coopératives détenues par les salarié.e.s). 
Toutes parviennent à une bonne santé financière sans recourir à des subventions de fonctionnement, ni à des recettes annexes (telles que publicités, confiseries…). Les tarifs sont les plus démocratiques et possible (le prix moyen d’une entrée est à 5€). Aux blockbusters américains, nous préférons les films de la diversité, la richesse fabuleuse de la petite et moyenne production indépendante. Nos salles sont classées Art et Essai avec les trois labels : Recherche, Patrimoine, Jeune Public… Les  nombreuses rencontres, activités organisées, font que les Utopia sont des lieux de vie en perpétuelle ébullition. Les films sont défendus grâce à un programme, La Gazette, particulièrement étoffé et très largement diffusé par nos soins… HALTE À LA FRILOSITÉ FACE AU RÉCHAUFFEMENT CLIMATIQUE !  Le modèle dominant va-t-il pouvoir perdurer longtemps avec ses grandes salles, grands halls? On chauffe, on climatise... du vide ! Nous avons décidé d’agir, en créant un prototype de cinéma qui vise une ambition environnementale jamais atteinte en  France ni sans doute au-delà de nos frontières.  Il sera le premier cinéma à énergie positive avec un tel niveau d’exigence.  Quant à son bilan carbone : 12 ans de fonctionnement équivaudront à un aller-retour pour 5 personnes à Nouméa… Ont été privilégiés les matériaux biosourcés (bois, paille,terre crue). Il sera zéro déchet, grâce au compostage, et économe en eau avec ses toilettes sèches high tech, plus hygiéniques, moins propagatrices de virus que les toilettes humides. Les urines, seront revalorisées dans des filières d’économie circulaire.  Situé au cœur du tout premier éco-quartier de l’Aube, à Pont-Sainte-Marie, près de Troyes. Pour en savoir plus : https://lnkd.in/dxndGXg

Description:

"Escape to Pacific" is an upcoming project that will begin filming at the end of 2025. The team is seeking interesting research proposals from marine biologists or organizations with a focus on the Pacific region, with a preference for global research. The research will be part of the film project, and marine biologists will join the Escape to Nature team. The team offers a perfect background aboard a catamaran, assistance, a friendly community, film footage and photo documentation of the research, and many materials, including new technology - virtual reality.


IMDb: www.imdb.com/name/nm6344673/

The previous episodes of the Escape to Nature TV documentaries were produced by our team, with only a few episodes produced with a minority participation by Czech National TV. Several major partners from the ranks of investment institutions, camera and diving equipment manufacturers or sellers, and other small but essential partners supported us. Episodes from our production were broadcast on Czech Television, on foreign TV channels in TELE Aruba, CCTV China, Ray Italy, as well as in MENA territories, Arabic-speaking countries (Ar-Riham). You can currently watch them on Comcast, EST, Roku Channel, Fawesom, Cineverse, Amazon Prime, and TUBI TV in North America (USA, Canada) and from next year on Disney+ channels (in Europe).

Description:
l Milano Film Network (MFN) è la rete che unisce l'esperienza e le risorse dei sette festival di cinema milanesi per offrire una proposta culturale lungo tutto l'anno e una serie di servizi per chi si occupa di cinema e audiovisivo a Milano e in Italia.

Realizzato grazie al sostegno della Fondazione Cariplo, il Milano Film Network nasce come progetto organizzato da sette festival di cinema della città di Milano – Festival del Cinema Africano d'Asia e America Latina, Festival MIX Milano, Filmmaker, Invideo, Milano Film Festival, Sguardi Altrove Film Festival, Sport Movies & Tv Fest – in un’ottica di confronto e di condivisione di esperienze organizzative, produttive e di sperimentazione, raccogliendo le esigenze delle singole realtà e ponendosi come referente autorevole per tutto il settore cinematografico e audiovisivo sul territorio.

Il Milano Film Network si propone come progetto inclusivo non solo degli operatori del settore, ma anche di istituzioni e attori socio-economici, a riconoscimento della valenza del cinema in quanto forma d’arte ma anche settore produttivo che genera ricadute positive su un ampio tessuto urbano.

Name: New Zealand Writers Guild / Puni Taatuhi o Aotearoa
Description:
The New Zealand Writers Guild (NZWG) is a professional organisation for script writers in the fields of film, television, theatre, new media and radio. With over 400 members, the NZWG is the representative body for writers in the New Zealand entertainment industry and is affiliated with international Writers Guilds. 

The aim of the NZWG is to protect the rights of the writers and offers them advice and support during contract negotiation. Furthermore, the Guild works to lobby government and funding bodies. Maintaining and improving the minimum condition of work and rates of compensation for writers is one of the main objectives of the NZWG. Located in Auckland, New Zealand, the Guild functions and works in  way that adheres to the spirit and principles of the Treaty of Waitangi. 

Our services help writers to focus on their crafts and scripts. We help them to improve their craft and build a sustainable career. 

WHAT ELSE DO WE DO? 
> Workshops
> Producer and Writer Networking 
> Find-a-Writer
> Reader Service
> Seed and Seed Advanced Grants

Name: !f istanbul
Description:
!f Istanbul Independent Film Festival was founded in 2001 and every February and March, it hosts some 85,000 film buffs and celebrated filmmakers from around the world. 

Dedicated to showcasing the best in contemporary film, !f believes that the shared experience of cinema is a form of activism that has the power to connect people across borders and boundaries of all description. The festival is curated and based on thematic sections, some of which change every year to reflect issues that are gripping the world's - and filmmakers'- imagination. Through !f ², a ground-breaking alternative film distribution and sharing project, !f shares the festival spirit with 33 cities in Turkey, Palestine, Armenia and Cyprus. 

In 2008, !f launched an international film competition - !f Inspired- designed to showcase emerging directors who are taking film in new directions. The competition carries a $10,000 prize for the Most Inspired Director. Love & Change, launched in 2014 is an international platform hosting not only films but also filmmakers who look at the world through critical eyes and with soft hearts, believe that another world is possible, and who prove to us, through their work, that cinematic interventions can make a change. Competition contributes to dream of another world with an award of $10,000.

16th !f Istanbul will be held between February 16th to 26th in Istanbul.
Visit ifistanbul.com/en for more information.

Name: FILMTRIBE
Description:
WHO WE IS			
Passionate creatives. Masterful directors. Keen-eyed shooters. Savvy producers. Atlanta-based, in the “New Hollywood.” 

WHAT WE DOES  			
FilmTribe is a great little department store — you can one-stop-shop for a bunch of big things. Live Action. Full Post Production. Superior VFX.  Emerging Digital technologies. A powerhouse playhouse of communicators with their high-tech toys. Producing seriously great work without the Hollywood overhead. On-time. On target. On the good ship lollypop...or the Millennium Falcon.

OUR SACRED MISSION
Do amazing work. We know we impact our society through visual messaging. So we use The Force wisely. And we do our work for everyone, with the highest levels of quality. And business integrity. With an eye on social responsibility.  Plus, we’ve promised the Jedi High Council that we would protect and serve and continue to do our best work so help us, gosh. You may be seated.

Name: Visual Anthropology Center
Description:
In our age ever so overwhelming with visual data we find it crucially important for documentarists and social scientists to cooperate with visual artists, film and theater-makers in order for their work to be not only relevant but visually enticing as well.

Transdisciplinary research of motion picture and photography, or any kind of visual art shouldn’t just be a tool in the hand of the scientist; visual anthropology and film are to have a symbiotic relationship, documentaries and feature film can have an anthropologic approach and anthropology and social science in general can have an artistic approach – it is our belief that the much desired social change depends on such approach.
The VAC intends to be the first step on a long road that leads to a global network of similar hubs aiming to be a powerhouse of socially sensitive artistic and scientific work.

Documents can be art as pieces of art can be documents.

Name: Rauwkost Film
Description:
“Geen woorden maar beelden” is het arbeidsethos van het Rotterdamse film- en mediacollectief Rauwkost Film. Een team van expressieve makers met elk hun eigen visie en achtergrond, maar allemaal met één doel voor ogen: mooie verhalen vertellen. Zowel in opdracht, als autonoom.

Door als collectief en niet hiërarchisch te werk te gaan, wordt ieders creativiteit optimaal benut. Op zoek naar vernieuwing, spanning en het rauwe randje transformeert Rauwkost Film sinds 2013 gedurfde ideeën naar expressieve films, documentaires, reclames en mediaproducties.

Name: Image Hunters S.r.l.
Description:
Image Hunters si è affermata come studio creativo dedicato alla produzione di documentari, cortometraggi, spot pubblicitari, videoclip, campagne virali e di iniziative culturali legate al mondo del cinema. Ha realizzato numerosi Short Film, aggiudicandosi importanti premi e riconoscimenti, tra cui il David di Donatello, una nomination ai Nastri d’argento e la partecipazione al Festival di Cannes.
Negli anni Image Hunters ha collaborato con partner come Sky Arte, Canon e Rai Cinema e con affermati professionisti del cinema italiano: Nicola Giuliano, Pupi Avati, Gabriele Mainetti.
Produce ed organizza il Roma Creative Contest, Festival Internazionale di cortometraggi con la presidenza onoraria del Premio Oscar Giuseppe Tornatore. La manifestazione premia i migliori cineasti consegnando ogni anno incentivi di produzione per un valore di 30.000 euro.
Il Festival promuove film e cortometraggi in un il network internazionale che coinvolge il Raindance Film Festival, Miami Short Film Festival, Cinema Italian Style di Los Angeles ed Italian Heritage Month.

Name: Frames Per Second Films
Description:
Incorporated in the year 2015, Frames Per Second Films [FPSF] burst into the film production services industry, with its very first project - the successful Swedish Television Mini Series, ‘Delhis Vackraste Händer (The Most Beautiful Hands of Delhi)’, based on the acclaimed telenovela of the same name.

Brainchild of Owner and Producer, Rakasree Basu, FPSF is a young and dynamic company on the rise, backed by a blend of experienced professionals and young minds who combine their dedicated passion with a personal touch. We excel in accommodating all kinds of budgets and offer tailor-made production plans that best serve the  vision of any project without compromise.

We know that all productions have their unique set of requirements. On a foreign production, the regular challenges of film shoots can feel magnified, especially in an anomaly of a nation like India, with its mind-bending diversity of people and plethora of locations. From scorching deserts to lush mountains, sultry beaches to thick forests, manicured tea-gardens to majestic tombs and imposing fortresses, swanky skyscrapers to thriving slums, India is an architectural and geographical force to reckon with – a compelling ‘exotic’ marvel that bewilders as much as it delights.

FPSF comes with a trove of local knowledge and ability to steer a film project through this kaleidoscope of cultures, languages, traditions and processes and enable the filmmakers to tap into its limitless cinematic potential.

While there are many production service companies in the industry that can get the job done, we do the job well and build long lasting relations through our work. Engaging with the script and the brief creatively and understanding its possibilities and scope, we aim to provide the highest production value and quality on screen while delivering the output within prescribed timelines.

Name: Cinema Politica
Description:
CINEMA POLITICA is a media arts, non-profit network of community and campus locals that screen independent political films throughout Canada and abroad. We believe in the power of art to not only entertain but to engage, inform, inspire, and provoke social change. Cinema Politica is the largest volunteer-run, community and campus-based documentary-screening network in the world. All screenings are by donation.

Cinema Politica is committed to supporting alternative, independent, and radical political film and video, and the artists who dare to devote time, passion and resources to telling stories from the margins. We program works that feature under-represented characters and tell stories which confront and challenge conventional fiction and documentary narratives. 

With continued support from the Canada Council for the Arts, Cinema Politica is able to focus on independent Canadian filmmakers whose work explore political issues and stories of oppression and resistance that are excluded from the mainstream media. 

Cinema Politica also relies on the essential contributions of audiences and local members while building an international alternative distribution and exhibition network for independent political film and video.

Name: Get Lifted Film Co.
Description: Get Lifted Film Co. is led by Emmy and Tony Award-winning producer Mike Jackson, EGOT recipient and award-winning producer John Legend, and Emmy Award-winner and CEO of the management, media and social impact company Friends At Work, Ty Stiklorius. Their upcoming projects include the film adaptation of S.A. Cosby’s novel BLACKTOP WASTELAND, Al Sharpton’s documentary LOUDMOUTH, which premiered at the 2022 Tribeca Film Festival, where it was the closing night film, and the highly anticipated third season of the IFC and AMC comedy series SHERMAN’S SHOWCASE. Most recently, Get Lifted produced a trio of critically lauded documentaries; CNN FILMS and HBO Max’ CITIZEN ASHE about the legendary tennis player and activist Arthur Ashe HBO documentary, THE LEGEND OF THE UNDERGROUND and A CRIME ON THE BAYOU. Get Lifted produced the NAACP Award-nominated JINGLE JANGLE: A CHRISTMAS JOURNEY for Netflix, the HBO, IDA Award-winning docu-series ATLANTA’S MISSING AND MURDERED: THE LOST CHILDREN, SHERMAN’S SHOWCASE: BLACK HISTORY MONTH SPECTACULAR, and RHYTHM + FLOW. They also produced the documentary 40 YEARS A PRISONER on HBO Max, the Netflix documentary GIVING VOICE and the Netflix film MONSTER. Get Lifted and Erik Feig’s PICTURESTART formed Picture LIFT, a joint venture focused on developing, producing and financing multiple films in the $10M range, featuring diverse filmmakers and inclusive casts.

Meer info over zaalverhuur of een vrijblijvende offerte: verhuur@hartlooper.nl / 030 232 0452.

Het filmtheater is vernoemd naar de Utrechtse Louis Hartlooper (1864 - 1922), een van de beroemdste explicateurs van Nederland in de tijd van de stomme film. De explicateur verklaarde de film in woord en gebaar en was vaak populairder dan de film zelf.

Name: films & casting TEMPLE
Description:
films & casting TEMPLE is an award winning boutique film production, film consultancy and casting company based out of Fox Studios - Sydney. TEMPLE is committed to narrating diverse Australian stories for an International audience and renowned for its practice and support of diversity behind and front of camera. TEMPLE has been widely credited as pioneering Australia's film links with India & Bollywood. Operating initially as a sole trader then a company since 2000 , TEMPLE has over 300 projects to its credit . After servicing high end TV commercials, feature films, and TV fiction from India, China, Denmark, and USA, TEMPLE has been working on its own slate of Feature films, TV Commercials, and Feature documentaries. Temple's credits  feature films including unINDIAN (starring Australian cricket legend Brett Lee and award winning actress Tannishtha Chatterjee), award winning feature documentary The Run based on Pat Farmer's iconic spirit of India run through the length of India, Destination NSW biggest ad campaign 'Jhappi Time'. TEMPLE through its MD Anupam Sharma has also provided consultancy and advisory services on issues related to Australian cinema and its links with Indian film & media sector to Department of Foreign Affairs and Trade (Australia), Austrade, Screen Producers Association of Australia, Australian Academy of Cinema Television & Arts, Governments of Queensland, NSW, and South Australia among others. 
TEMPLE is currently various stages of development, pre production and post production on a rich slate of feature films and feature documentaries with investments/support/grants from International companies, Screen Australia, and Screen NSW.

Name: Big Picture Alliance
Description: Big Picture Alliance uses digital filmmaking to engage, educate and empower over 200 youth every year through our award-winning after school, workforce, and summer programs across Philadelphia. We partner with schools, cultural institutions and social service agencies to bring filmmakers into classrooms and communities to teach collaborative filmmaking through a hands-on project-based curriculum. Youth develop digital literacy and 21st Century skills through producing original films from script to screen - writing, shooting, and editing original films that communicate their perspectives which they present through industry field trips, screenings and broadcasts.

Name: Progressive Productions
Description:
Progressive Productions is a Hungarian production company dedicated to production, location and casting services for film and still photography. It is one of its region’s leading production service company. It has cooperated with many international brands, industry professionals and celebrities. Progressive Productions has worked on television commercials, for example for Nikon, Samsung, FedEx and Kellogg’s. It has collaborated with actors and celebrities such as Lady Gaga, Adrien Brody, Julie Andrews, Ryan Gosling and others. It has produced photo shoots for brands like CondeNast, Brax and Boden.

Progressive Productions is based in Budapest, Hungary since it was founded in 2009 by Iván Gerő and Zoltán Haulis. It also has an office in Vienna, Austria. The company has experience in film, television, commercial and still photography. Progressive Productions is a founding member of the international PSN - Production Services Network.
 
The company offers in-house location and casting services. Progressive Productions so far has worked for a wide range of clients from twelve different countries, such as producers, production companies, Hollywood studios or advertising agencies. So far they have produced TV commercials, television series episodes, as well as advertising, editorial and fashion photography campaigns.

Name: Roffa Mon Amour
Description:
Roffa Mon Amour is een filmplatform voor nationaal en internationaal filmtalent voor het publiek. Het is onze missie om nieuwe films te verbinden met het publiek waar ze in eerste instantie voor zijn gemaakt. 
Elke zomer organiseert de stichting een openlucht filmfestival in Rotterdam waar eerste en tweede speelfilms worden vertoond.

Name: LICHTER FILMKULTUR

Das LICHTER Filmfest Frankfurt International ist ein Fest für den Film. Es bringt seit 2008 die Region, ihr Publikum und ihre Kreativen mit Gästen aus aller Welt zusammen. Sektionen des Festivals: Internationale Lang- und Kurzfilme, Regionale Lang- und Kurzfilme, Zukunft deutscher Film, LICHTER Art Award, VR Storytelling Award.

Über die Festivalzeit hinaus bereichert LICHTER das kulturelle Leben in Frankfurt und der Rhein-Main-Region in vielfältiger Weise, beispielsweise mit dem Freiluftkino Frankfurt, dem Kongress „Zukunft Deutscher Film” und dem High Rise Cinema.

-------
The LICHTER Film Festival Frankfurt International is a celebration of and for film. Carried by a high-quality regional as well as international program, it shines a light on the facets of film art that too often miss out in the everyday of cinema and television.

Sections of the festival: International Feature and Short Film, Regional Feature and Short Film, Future German Cinema, LICHTER Art Award, LICHTER VR Storytelling Award.

Beyond festival time, LICHTER adds to the cultural life of Frankfurt and the Rhine-Main region significantly in a variety of formats like the open-air cinema Frankfurt, the "Zukunft Deutscher Film" congress and High Rise Cinema.

Name: Charlotte in red
Description:
The idea of Charlotte in red was born out of two observations:

First, the digital space has become crucial for artists to showcase their talent and increase their audience. At the same time it has become increasingly difficult for artists to distinguish themselves and carve a niche, even more so as in the wake of Covid, the virtual world has become the main stage. 

Second, women have never been treated equally in the art, music and film world. Even though numbers are slowly increasing women remain underrepresented and undervalued. And this gender bias often extends to how women artists are portrayed in the mainstream media.

And the project was born out of the passion its founders share for digital documentaries, impactful storytelling and visual aesthetics.

In a nutshell, Charlotte in Red is about documenting the creative process of women, about showcasing their talent and about giving them a voice.

Name: SevaProject_official
Description:
Cos'è SEVA?


SEVA è una serie di documentari che punta a raccontare, attraverso storie di viaggio, alcune delle tematiche di importanza capitale per la salvaguardia della vita sul Pianeta. Il tutto guidato dalla narrazione di Stefano Tiozzo, fotografo naturalista e autore dei documentari di viaggio più seguiti e apprezzati sul web.

Il primo episodio di SEVA sarà un Road Trip in Islanda, dove affronteremo il tema del Climate Change e delle energie rinnovabili. La terra del ghiaccio e del fuoco è infatti un luogo esemplare per mostrare le due facce di questo problema, da un lato la rapidissima fusione di enormi ghiacciai, e dall’altro una posizione di avanguardia mondiale nello sviluppo di uno stile di vita a emissioni zero.

Il 50% del ricavato dalla vendita dei documentari verrà usato per finanziare un progetto di riforestazione grazie alla collaborazione di SEVA con Treedom, il resto servirà a coprire i costi di produzione, in quanto SEVA è totalmente autofinanziato, e non prevede crowdfunding: questo ci permette di essere totalmente liberi nell’affrontare con la massima serietà i temi più importanti per la nostra sopravvivenza.

Non dobbiamo aspettare che sia un governo o un'azienda a dirci cosa fare per migliorare il pianeta, siamo NOI a doverlo fare per primi. Solo allora il mondo cambierà direzione. Dai il tuo segnale, unisciti a SEVA oggi e supporta in maniera diretta la riforestazione e lo sviluppo delle energie rinnovabili.

Name: Vico Films
Description:
Established in 2004 by Peter Foott, Cormac Fox and Michael Doherty, Vico Films is one of Ireland’s leading and most dynamic film / TV production companies.  The company enjoys strong relationships with financiers, broadcasters and content providers including BBC, Screen Ireland, Netflix and RTÉ.

Vico Films’ productions have screened at over one hundred international festivals, winning over thirty awards. The company’s most recent film release, The Young Offenders, was the Irish box-office sensation of 2016 grossing almost €1.3million at the Irish box office and went on to receive 8 Irish Film & Television Academy (IFTA) award nominations.

2018 saw the release of the BBC-commissioned series The Young Offenders which debuted to wide critical acclaim and became one of the most successful UK & Irish TV series in recent years (recipient of 7 IFTA nominations). The team are currently in Prep on Series 2, shooting in 2019.

Other confirmed projects for 2019 include the release of Berlinale and Sundance-winner Sophie Hyde’s sophomore feature, Animals starring Holliday Grainger (Tulip Fever, My Cousin Rachel) and Alia Shawkat (Arrested Development, Search Party); and Cold Courage, an international crime thriller series set in London based on the best-selling Nordic novels by Pekka Hiltunen and directed by Agneta Fagerström Olsson (Wallander).

The company's films have been accepted into over 100 film festivals around the world and have won 14 awards including at the Venice Film Festival, LA Short Film Festival and the BBC New Talent Awards, to name a few.

Vico's current focus is on developing a slate of feature projects, three of which have so far received development funding from the Irish Film Board. Vico Films is set to co-produce the feature film "Teenage Kicks" with Northern Irish production company, Geronimo Pictures. Shooting is set to take place in August 2009

Name: Film Training Manitoba
Description:
FTM is dedicated to providing high caliber training and professional development programs to sustain Manitoba’s Film Industry, which is part of Manitoba’s vibrant cultural community. FTM works closely with the industry to identify the training needs within the community. We deliver practical workshops that provide entry-level and advanced skill development for Manitoba crewmembers.

FTM offers the required courses for membership to IATSE local 856 and the DGC Manitoba District Council. In September of 2008 we began offering these courses online, providing access to training for people living in rural areas of Manitoba. FTM also collaborates with sponsors and industry partners to put together workshops and presentations that provide our local crewmembers with advanced training and professional development. 

FTM also partners with local production companies to offer work experience opportunities. All work experience opportunities occur within active film work environments such as film sets, production offices or related facilities.

Finally, FTM offers career counselling and information sessions throughout the year. Those who are new to the industry learn about Manitoba’s film industry, our training programs, and career opportunities.

Name: Studio POW
Description:
StudioPOW is an independent Production company founded in 2016. In our
short history, we have been involved in the creation of several feature films,
television shows, music videos and documentaries.

Our films have been featured by the biggest and most widely-read
publications in the World such as Rolling Stone Magazine, Variety, The
Hollywood Reporter, The Daily Mail, The Times, and the list goes on. We have
a reputation for sourcing excellent scripts which attract top talent to our
productions. OSCAR & BAFTA nominees and winners Sir Michael Gambon,
Emily Watson, Stephen Graham, and Eddie Marsan have all starred in our
films.

Our first feature, Funny Cow charts the rise to stardom of a female
comedienne through the 1970’s and 1980’s. It is set against the backdrop of
working men’s clubs and the stand-up comedy circuit of the North of
England. From her troubled childhood to her turbulent adult relationships,
the Funny Cow uses the raw material of her life experiences to bring her
unique style of comedy to the stage. A stand-up comedienne in an all-male
world, Funny Cow delivers tragedy and comedy in equal measure.

Midas Man will be the definitive telling of an extraordinary life. The first, last
and most respectful cinematic portrait ever painted of Brian Epstein. And one
which helps him achieve something he dreamed of in life, but never
achieved: to become a star of the silver screen.

A Brush With Comedy is a SKY ARTS documentary based on the RTS Award
Nominated Short of the same name. This feature length documentary is
about the connection between comedy and art and the inner conflicts that lie
within, featuring Spencer Jones, Simon Munnery, Bec Hill, Miriam Elia and Jim
Moir (AKA Vic Reeves).

Name: Avalanche Studios
Description: We are story tellers. Avalanche Studios is a full-service video and film production company located in Salt Lake City, Utah, USA. Since 1992, Avalanche Studios has helped clients tell their stories through high-end TV Commercials, Web Videos, Corporate Videos, TV Production, and Documentaries. With award-winning producers and crew, high-end production values and facilities, you'll be thrilled with your next video or film production from Avalanche Studios.

Name: Robert McKee's Story Magazine
Description:
Story Magazine is for writers by writers.

Inside each monthly issue you’ll learn the art of storytelling from Fulbright Scholar Robert McKee, who has dedicated the last 30 years to educating and mentoring screenwriters, novelists, playwrights, poets, documentary filmmakers, producers, and directors from all across the world.

Peter Jackson (writer/director The Lord Of The Rights Trilogy, The Hobbit) has lauded him as “The Guru of the Gurus.”

For the writers of Pixar (creators of Toy Story 1, 2, & 3, Finding Nemo) McKee’s STORY Seminar is a rite of passage.

You’ll also learn through exclusive interviews and articles from the most talented, accomplished and decorated professional writers in the business, including: two-time Academy Award winning producer Ed Saxon (Philadelphia, Silence of the Lambs & 21 other films), Academy Award winner Paul Haggis (Million Dollar Baby & Crash), Writer’s Guild award winner and Emmy award winner, Margaret Nagle (My So-Called Life, Red Band Society, Empire Boardwalk, The Good Lie), two-time Emmy Award winning CBS producer, Joel Bernstein, Best-selling author and screenwriter Steven Pressfield (The Art of War, The Legend of Baggard Vance), comedian/actor/writer Russell Brand and MANY more!

Plus: in each issue Story Magazine features special offers, product reviews, book reviews, and many more valuable resources to help you nurture your craft.

Name: Millagro Produtora
Description:
A Millagro nasceu em 2001, quando o até então produtor musical e empresário do ramo artístico, Cassiano Scarambone, decide ir além das notas musicais. Experiente em edição no Pro Tools, software de edição sonora, resolve também editar imagens, aventurando-se em um mundo de novas possibilidades, experimentando um novo e vasto universo. Dirigiu grande parte dos trabalhos da casa, tendo sido o primeiro profissional no mundo a rodar um longa com uma Canon 5D Mark II, segundo a própria fabricante.

No início de 2012, junta-se a produtora Aleksander Farias, o “Dinho”. Com experiência na produção de dramaturgia e entretenimento para novas mídias, Dinho passa a fortalecer a presença e networking da Millagro no mercado Paulistano.

Em 2023, a operação da Millagro em São Paulo, passa a se chamar Cuco Filmes, concentrando-se no nicho de filmes para obras de engenharia e arquitetura.

Name: The Film Tuition
Description:
The Film Tuition is dedicated to the education of filmmakers, content creators and performing artists. The Film Tuition is a brainchild of Hassan Ahmed Raja who believes that the artists, especially in Pakistan, need more platforms to learn film and performing arts to become the ace of their fields and to compete in the global market. After teaching film for more than 4 years to bachelor’s and master’s degree students under two of the best art institutions in the world, he made a platform for aspiring filmmakers and performing artists to polish their skills through affordable short courses. 

Every artist needs guidance to reach their full potential. We groom the passionate artist in you towards success. The Film Tuition aims to offer a unique and extensive expertise bringing you some of the best professional education and training in the film and performing arts industry at a very affordable price. Due to the current pandemic situation, we are currently offering 4 Online and Studio short courses including Screenwriting, Film Studies, Film Production I (basic), and Film Production II (advanced). Throughout these offered courses, the students will be given assignments each week to bring out an outcome from each week’s learnings so we could assess each students’ strengths and weaknesses to bring out the best in them. Moreover, we help our students in creating outstanding portfolio items to successfully get into their desired film and art schools. We believe that there is only one way to learn filmmaking; You have to make films! 

After completing the course, each student will have individual portfolio items to add to their portfolio which will have a strong impact either they’re apply for work in the field or applying at an institution. We’ll provide a certificate of finishing the tuition after all the requirements are fulfilled and we’ll also provide a recommendation letter for the institutions.

Name: Cinephile: Film society of BHU
Description:
Announcement: Launch of BHU's Biggest Film Society*

We are thrilled to announce the formation of Banaras Hindu University's biggest film society, dedicated to fostering creativity and cinematic talent within our community. Our mission is to produce short films on various compelling topics and share them across our social media platforms.

*Who We Are:*
Our society brings together passionate filmmakers, writers, actors, and technicians who are committed to creating thought-provoking and high-quality short films. Whether you are an experienced filmmaker or a novice with a keen interest in the art of cinema, our society welcomes you.

*Our Vision:*
We aim to create a dynamic and inclusive environment where members can collaborate, learn, and grow. By producing diverse short films, we seek to highlight important issues, tell unique stories, and showcase the rich talent at BHU.

*Activities and Opportunities:*
- *Short Film Production:* Regular projects where members can gain hands-on experience in all aspects of filmmaking.
- *Workshops and Seminars:* Learn from industry professionals and seasoned filmmakers through exclusive sessions.
- *Screenings and Critiques:* Watch and discuss films to understand different perspectives and improve our craft.
- *Social Media Presence:* Share our work with a broader audience, engage with film enthusiasts, and build a strong online community.

*How to Join:*
If you are interested in becoming a part of BHU's biggest film society, please follow our social media channels for updates on our inaugural meeting and membership registration details. We look forward to your participation and collaboration.

*Follow Us:*
Please stay connected with us on social media for the latest news, events, and film releases.
Instagram: cinephile_bhu

Name: KEDD Animation Studio
Description:
In Hungarian KEDD means Tuesday, so KEDD is a weekday between Monday and Wednesday. However, KEDD is also an animation studio - a very successful one. It is located in Budapest, Hungary, and since it’s foundation in 2002, KEDD has produced several animation series, commercials, music videos, short films and experimental works. KEDD’s films participated at international festivals worldwide.

Géza M. Tóth Oscar-nominee director is the founder and leader of the studio. Apart from his Academy Award nominee short animation, MAESTRO, KEDD’s productions were recognized with more than 100 prizes, our films participated at international festivals worldwide. 
In the KEDD Studio we produce very popular creative series for kids and individual short films.  In addition to the production and development of individual animated films and children's series in the studio, the company sells films on the largest film platforms as a distributor. KEDD is the largest children content supplier to all kinds of content providers (TV channels etc.). The studio makes its own-produced and distributed children’s content continuously available on KEDDnetwork’s YouTube channel, which is one of the biggest channels in Hungary. They also have a merchandising department, in Kedd’s webshop they sell all kinds of animation related products. 

After all, KEDD cannot be defined as one thing. KEDD is an animation studio, a creative workshop, a lovely place near the Danube, our workplace, our mission, our honour, our team. KEDD is us.

Name: Louisiana International Film Festival
Description:
What is LIFF?
 
The Louisiana International Film Festival & Mentorship Program (LIFF) aims to act as a conduit for education and outreach where the residents of Louisiana may obtain skills and relationships that enable them to play a central role in the State’s burgeoning film industry. Created as a nexus for local talent, LIFF provides access to opportunity through carefully developed mentorship programs, workshops, guest lectures, and competitive screenings. The festival's signature event is its inaugural launch April 18 - 21, 2013 in New Orleans and Baton Rouge, Louisiana (USA).

What is this festival all about?

A film festival is an extended presentation of films in one or more movie theaters or screening venues, usually in a central location. Film festivals provide an excellent platform for filmmakers and distributors to build an audience prior to distribution. Sometimes there is a focus on a specific filmmaker or genre or subject matter, such as horror film festivals. The Louisiana International Film Festival will focus on American Independents, World Cinema and Louisiana’s unique arts & culture, music and history.

Name: DTMC PRODUCTION
Description:
Fort de plus de 15 ans d'expertise et de savoir-faire en production audiovisuelle créative, nous avons su nous établir en tant que studio de grande qualité auprès des professionnels du cinéma mais aussi de la publicité, des artisans et des institutions. 

 Basé à Paris, Orléans et Pau, DTMC est un "studio nouvelle génération" formée par un collectif de collaborateurs dynamiques, volontaires et inspirés maîtrisant parfaitement les techniques des nouveaux médias et possédant l’audace de l’innovation.

 Avec plus de 2 500 vidéos à notre actif, nous avons bâti bien plus qu’une expertise technique : nous avons créé une approche humaine, où l’on privilégie l’écoute, la compréhension et l’attention pour que chaque projet soit fidèle à votre ambition et vos valeurs.

 Notre Mission ? Donner vie à vos histoires !  Qu’elles deviennent inspirantes, authentiques et incomparables !

 Notre Objectif ? Défier la banalité et apporter de la créativité, de l'authenticité et de l'humain dans chaque campagne vidéo que nous créons.

 Notre Proposition de Valeur ? Apporter un esprit cinéma à vos vidéos d’entreprise, institutionnelles et de services, avec une narration soignée et un travail d'image digne du cinéma.

 Des vidéos corpo percutantes, des pubs qui marquent et démarquent, des docus immersifs et des émissions taillées sur mesure.

 Que vous soyez une entreprise, une marque, une institution, un artiste ou un artisan, nous vous proposerons des solutions adaptées pour captiver votre audience.

IPER is an award winning video production company based in Brisbane, Australia. We aim for mastery of our craft and have experience in the planning, production, and implementation of video projects. At IPER we pride ourselves on our professionalism, and we are dedicated to maintaining both a high quality of work and client satisfaction. Cliche’ as it sounds. The reason our clients keep coming back, month after month, year after year, is the “IPER Experience” (or so we’ve coined it).

At the risk of sounding arrogant, time and experience tell us that we’re providing a better production experience, and a higher quality outcome than our competitors. BUT… we leave the ego on our “about us” page. Our staff are leaders in their roles. Award winning directors, DOP’s, editors, motion designers and more, but they’re good people too. We start there.

Description:
La Fabrique est un collectif de création cinéma fondé par des actrices et des acteurs qui mutualisent leurs expériences et leurs savoir-faire pour produire et jouer dans les courts-métrages qu’ils tournent. Faisant appel ponctuellement aux professionnels nécessaires à leurs créations.
Fondé en mai 2019, La Fabrique a participé à plusieurs concours comme le Nikon Film Festival, le Défi 48h Très Court, le 48h Film Project et fait vivre ces courts-métrages en festival.
Le Collectif La Fabrique a fêté, il y a peu, ses deux ans d’existence. 
En deux ans, les tournages de 5 court-métrages, d’un moyen-métrage, d’une série, la diffusion dans plus de 20 festivals à travers le monde et déjà 4 récompenses.
Et encore des projets pour notre troisième année d’existence, dont la sortie, à la rentrée, de notre moyen-métrage réalisé par Regis Mardon  et la diffusion de notre websérie réalisée par Lucas Zef qui a bénéficié du soutien du Centre national du cinéma et de l'image animée (CNC) et dont nous vous parlerons très prochainement …
Les membres de la Fabrique sont mesdemoiselles Lilly Caruso, Valeria Dafarra, Anne-Laure Denoyel, Charlotte Dhenaux, Dominique Jambert, Ombline Lockhart et Valentine Riedinger et messieurs Mehdi Fettah, Ivan Herbez, Vincent Mangado et Camille Saint-Martin.

Name: Studio89
Description:
Created as a part of the Vault89 ecosystem, at Studio89 we love filmmaking - whether that is in a commercial, documentary or narrative story. We offer full production capabilities, and are lucky to work with a diverse team of creatives rooted in the Pacific Northwest. 

We believe the best storytelling comes from authenticity, trust, curiosity and creativity. 

Authenticity
Studio89 seeks opportunities to make the truth shine. When you prioritize displaying the truth of a concept or script, there is no end destination that is the same. 

Trust
Good work is only done through good relationships. Productions are no different. From start to finish, Studio89 is all about gaining and maintaining the trust of the clients and creatives each project requires. 

Curiosity
Bored people are boring. We look for the reason to make every project better than our last, and thrive on keeping curiosity at the forefront of our business.

Creativity
Projects with Studio89 should not feel like any other - intentionally. Through championing authenticity, trust and curiosity - no story is alike. Supporting that mission is a team of ego-less creatives who want to do good work and do it together.
