Name: image+nation culture queer
Description:
A pioneer of LGBT2SQ+ cinema and culture for 35 years, image+nation culture queer is dedicated to sharing the stories and experiences of LGBT2SQ+ people. As its main production, image+nation. festival film LGBTQueer Montréal - now in its 34th year - is an annual inclusive 11-day festival, the oldest of its kind in Canada, featuring ground breaking locally and internationally produced films that strives to preserve the authenticity and diversity of LGBT2SQ+ voices. Our newest exhibition project, I+N festival courts queer short film fest pays homage to the short form film.

image+nation’s mission is to represent, protect and prepare the present and future generations of queer storytellers and media makers while building empathy through sharing stories with audiences here in Canada, and throughout the world increasingly with our ongoing collaborations with cultural events and new online initiatives.
-
Pionnière en cinéma et culture LGBT2SQ+ depuis 35 ans, image+nation culture queer se dédie au partage des histoires et expériences des personnes LGBT2SQ+. Sa production principale, image+nation. festival film LGBTQueer Montréal, maintenant dans sa 34ème année, est un festival inclusif annuel de 11 jours, le plus ancien en son genre du Canada, présente des films révolutionnaires produits localement ou à l’internationale et a pour but de  préserver l'authenticité et la diversité des voix LGBT2SQ+. Notre projet de représentation I+N festival courts queer short film fest rend hommage à la forme du court métrage. 

La mission d’image+nation est de représenter, protéger et préparer les générations de cinéastes, de créateurs et créatrices médiatiques queer actuelles et futures tout en créant de l’empathie par le partage d’histoires avec l’audience ici, au Canada, et à travers le monde de plus en plus grâce à nos collaborations continues avec des évènements culturels et de nouvelles initiatives en ligne.

Name: Fado Filmes
Description:
Fundada em 1997, pelo realizador e produtor Luís Galvão Teles, a Fado Filmes é uma das mais antigas e ativas produtoras de cinematográficas no paradigma português.Ao longo de 25 anos produziu mais de 40 longas-metragens, incluindo coproduções internacionais com países como: França; Espanha; Suíça; Itália; Reino Unido; Irlanda; Bélgica; México; Brasil; Moçambique; Guiné-Bissau; e Luxemburgo.Contando com o apoio de Fundos Internacionais como, Eurimages, Ibermedia e Media, os seus filmes têm vindo a marcar presença em vários Festivais Nacionais e Internacionais de Cinema, como Cannes, San Sebastian, Roterdão e Veneza, somando cerca de 931 participações e 215 Prémios.

A FADO FILMES tem contribuido para a internacionalização do cinema português, distribuindo os seus filmes pelo mundo inteiro. Um dos seus maiores sucessos FADOS (2007) foi vendido para mais de 100 países e atingiu o 1º lugar no top de audiências de documentários portugueses. No total, a FADO FILMES tem já mais de 11 milhões de espectadores no mundo inteiro e podemos rever muitos dos seus filmes em catálogos da plataforma portuguesa FILMIN, da HBO Max e nas televisões portuguesas.

Name: Los Angeles/San Diego International Children's Film Festivals
Description:
The Los Angeles and San Diego International Children's Film Festivals each year present more than 150 short films from around the world - live-action, animation and documentary - made for toddlers through teens and beyond. Our filmmakers are of all ages - from kids to university students to middle-aged to seniors. The LAICFF opens every year at WonderCon in Anaheim before moving through May to UCLA and other venues across Los Angeles.

The SDICFF opens each year in late July at Comic-Con International: San Diego, the largest popular-culture convention in the world, where filmmakers and animators greet people visiting our festival table, and we screen films all day on Sunday (Kids Day) in theater Room 9, with ongoing panels throughout the day. The festival then moves to other San Diego venues throughout August.

Admission to WonderCon and Comic-Con screenings is free to attendees with WC and CC badges. Admission to our events at all other venues is free. We also feature occasional all-virtual festival events online.

The festivals are run by an all-volunteer team. We are a 501(c)(3) non-profit. We welcome partnerships and sponsorships. And more volunteers!

The San Diego festival celebrated its 20th season in 2024, while the Los Angeles festival celebrates its 19th season March-May 2025. We've seen more than 30 of our former filmmakers/animators go on to become part of Oscar-winning teams, and dozens of collaborations initiated. We're very proud of our alumni!

Most of all the festival is a family of like-minded creators and volunteer organizers who support each other. The best moment of every festival is when a child stands on her seat in the back row during a QA and yells out the simple question: How did you do that?!

That's why we're here!

Name: CINEFLEX
Description:
Nevada City, CA – October 16, 2017 – Gyro-Stabilized Systems, LLC (GSS) of Nevada City, California announces the purchase of Cineflex trademark (brand), intellectual property as well as taking over Cineflex camera system service and repairs.

Read full press release here: 

https://gyrostabilizedsystems.com/blog/gss-acquires-cineflex-camera-systems

_______________________________________________________________________________________________________________

A pioneer in high-definition aerial camera technology, CINEFLEX specializes in the design and manufacture of HD gyro-stabilized, multi-sensor, multi-axis camera systems serving customers in the motion picture, broadcast media, major sporting events and government industries.

The unique ability of CINEFLEX products to track targets from great distances led to its extensive use for animal photography in a multitude of BBC/Discovery channel documentaries for both film and television including the famed HD production of “Planet Earth" and "Frozen Planet".

CINEFLEX products are now field interchangeable with RED, ARRI, and Sony cameras, supporting super telephoto lens options creating the most versatile stabilized camera system in the industry. With advanced capabilities such as GEO+ for Geo-pointing, Geo-location, on-screen display and synchronous metadata. CINEFLEX advanced feature set expands the user’s ability to capture the perfect shot.

CINEFLEX has been proven reliable world-wide for over a decade.  From the frozen Antarctic ice sheets to the sweltering deserts of the Sahara, to soaring peaks of the Himalayas to the oppressive basin of Death Valley.  Cineflex allows you to unleash your imagination to capture those breathtaking images wherever they are on “Planet Earth”.

CINEFLEX a General Dynamics brand.

Many developments were made for all kinds of special applications, film editing, telecine, viewing and

In 2003  STEENBECK moved from Hamburg/Germany to Venray/Holland in the Dutch province Limburg, 
specifically in an Industrial High Tech Park near the Dutch motorway A73 that connects Germany to Amsterdam.
Here we manufacture film viewing and controlling tables, spare parts and carry out maintenance. 
We sell new and also (young) used/fully reconditioned Steenbeck flatbeds.  
STEENBECK is alive and kicking and we still continue to develop and implement improvements.
These are clearly seen in our  ‘New Line Series’ and  ‘Jubiliee Series’.
Many Steenbecks are and will be in use for many years to come in film archives, film restoration facilities, 
post production houses, film scan facilities and film schools all over the world.

Steenbeck will keep on producing film viewing and controlling editors to meet the demand of the
contemporary field of film expertise; connectecting the analogue systems with the newest digital
available applications

Name: Shaw Brothers (Hong Kong) Limited
Description:
Shaw Brothers - History

The seeds of this legendary Chinese film empire were sown in Shanghai in the 1920’s by six enterprising brothers. Taking root in then British Hong Kong in 1958 with the construction of the largest privately-owned film studio in the world at the time, the Shaw Brothers produced one thousand films - mostly Chinese cinema classics - over the next three decades, amassing the largest Chinese film library ever.

Shaw Brothers later acquired and developed cinemas throughout Southeast Asia, Japan, Australia, North America, Hawaii and Canada, establishing itself as by far the most dominant film production, distribution and exhibition group in the entire region.  In the 1970’s, the size of the theatre group exceeded 200 screens (with 600 more listed as having distribution deals), boasting several grand 1000-seat plus flagship houses in Hong Kong.  

In 1973, Sir Run Run launched TVB, Hong Kong’s first wireless commercial television station.    By the 80’s, Hong Kong real estate values were soaring to the stratosphere, and many of the large Shaw cinemas were gradually converted into other commercial uses.  Sir Run Run grew TVB into one of the top 5 television producers in the world, based on output

The new millennium also brings a new era to Shaw Brothers.  The world’s most advanced film production and digital post production facility is nearing completion on a beautiful hillside site in Tseung Kwan O, Hong Kong.  The US$180 million Shaw Studios features one of the largest, fully air-conditioned and sound and vibration-insulated soundstages in Asia, a full-service color lab and digital imaging facility, over 20 sound and editing suites, a 400-seat dubbing and screening theatre, executive and production office space, banqueting facilities, and visual effects and animation capabilities.  In all, over a million square feet of digitally-wired and secure facilities dedicated solely to film production and post-production.

Name: Pixel Production
Description:
Yeteneklerini teknolojik altyapısıyla harmanlayan Pixel Production teknolojinin en son olanaklarıyla kaliteli hizmeti kendine ilke edinmiştir. 

Pixel production bünyesinde 4 ses kayıt stüdyosu, 1 surround mix stüdyosu, 2 mix stüdyosu, 1 montaj stüdyosu ve 1 kurgu-color stüdyosu bulunmaktadır. Tüm stüdyolar, ses yalıtımı ve akustik ölçümlerle kurulmuştur. 

Pixel production seslendirme kadrosu Türkiye’nin en deneyimli ve alanında kendini kanıtlamış sanatçılardan oluşmaktadır. 

Kadro yapısı ve çevirilerden başlayan hassasiyet, rol dağılımı, düzgün Türkçe kullanımı, kayıt, senkronizasyon ve teknik kadronun ince işçilikleriyle kendini hissettirir. 

Çalışılan proje, kayıt ve mix odasındaki ince işçilikten sonra son izleme adını verdiğimiz kontrol ile tamamlanır. 
Firmamız, dublaj hizmetinin yanı sıra, altyazı, çeviri, kaset aktarım, kurgu-color, M&E, reklam, dizi ve film müzikleri hizmeti vermektedir. 

Deneyimli bir ekip ile sunduğumuz yüksek teknoloji ve kaliteli hizmet sayesinde Pixel Production, kısa sürede sektörün lider firmaları arasında yer almayı hedeflemektedir.

La Tele Producciones, nace de la idea de los productores Sara Williams y Diego Rosás que intentan unificar bajo un mismo estandarte, todos los servicios que pueden ofrecerse en el mundo del cine y la televisión.

Este estandarte es hoy una garantía de calidad, profesionalidad y eficiencia gracias al equipo humano de profesionales que bajo nuestra marca, que es capaz de optimizar los recursos para ofrecer un trabajo acorde a las necesidades de los clientes.

Name: Flash Solutions Inc.
Description:
At Flash Render, we are driven by our steadfast commitment to providing outstanding rendering services, which sets us apart from our competitors in the industry. Our team has put in a lot of time and effort to learn all aspects of rendering, leading to the development of our exceptional, ultra-fast, and powerful render farm. By thoroughly studying other companies in the market, we have made sure that Flash Render offers top-speed equipment at the lowest price to our clients, raising the bar in the industry.

We noticed that many companies had complicated and hard-to-use interfaces. This inspired us to create our own user-friendly platform that is easy to navigate, making the rendering process simple for our users. Additionally, we wanted to tackle the issue of high prices in the industry, so we made it our goal to offer the most competitive and budget-friendly rates to our customers. Moreover, Flash Render is located in an area that uses eco-friendly energy sources, which helps us reduce our carbon footprint and lessen our impact on the environment.

At the core of Flash Render, we understand the importance of excellent customer service. Our team of skilled developers is always ready to help with any questions or issues our clients may have, ensuring a smooth and trouble-free rendering experience. We also recognized the need for reliable render farms in areas with stable economies. To address this, Flash Render proudly provides our clients with the added benefit of data security through our US-based render farm.

Name: Buffalo International Film Festival, Inc.
Description:
Mission Statement
Buffalo International Film Festival (est. 2006) champions regional, national, and international films that push the limits of independent cinema, presenting quality films from around the world to WNY residents and visitors. BIFF is committed to amplifying diverse voices and exhibiting cutting-edge programming in narrative, documentary and experimental film.  A proud supporter of local filmmaking, BIFF also offers year-round workshops, seminars, industry panel discussions, fiscal sponsorship and professional development opportunities.

Core Principals
Artistry – We provide Western New York audiences and visitors access to the very best offerings in contemporary local, national, and world 

Community Collaboration –We connect filmmakers, and WNY film and arts communities through collaborations and partnerships that align with local efforts to provide access to an increasing quantity of quality filmmaking resources in WNY.  We contribute to WNY’s thriving cultural ecosystem through the implementation of this world-class festival.

Education & Engagement – We provide educational, financial and logistical support to local institutions, makers, and audiences by offering quality programming, as well as seminars, workshops, classes, internships and career development resources for film arts

Diversity – We celebrate the diversity of our community through programming and community partnerships that reflect and represent the rich and eclectic cultural fabric of WNY.

Name: Undocumented Filmmakers Collective
Description:
Building upon the media justice organizing of other undocumented leaders, the Undocumented Filmmakers Collective tackles the systemic inequities that undocumented immigrants face in the field of filmmaking, by centering the expertise of undocumented people not only as sources of stories but more importantly as creators, artists, and primary audiences.

The Undocumented Filmmakers Collective envisions a filmmaking landscape where undocumented people have the autonomy to tell our own stories for ourselves by having access to sustainable careers, pipelines, and resources to thrive as artists and storytellers. We center the sensibilities of undocumented audiences and produce stories that speak to our intersectional experiences, whether or not they are about immigration.

Name: Palette Pictures LLC.
Description:
Palette Pictures was founded in Los Angeles, USA. Palette Pictures focuses on bringing together Hollywood and Chinese filmmaking resources to develop, produce and finance Hollywood-style Chinese genre films and web TV series.

In 2013, Palette partnered with Gehua Culture Group, Beijing's cable company, to finance the feature film, Day of Redemption (早见晚爱). The film was directed by Lawrence Lau (Lee Rock series, starring Andy Lau, and Queen of Temple Street) and starred Zhou Yumin (aka Zai Zai, a member of the hugely popular Taiwanese group F4). It was theatrically released in mainland China nationwide. Its online release on Tencent Video, a major Chinese video portal, received over 12 million clicks in the first week.

2013 also saw Palette's works gaining recognition, including the Elder Yao's Beijing in the Heavy Rain short film series and Flavor in the Bright Lights short film series, which won the "Best Film" and "Audience's Favorites" award at the Chinese International Short film Gala and the Best Short Film award at the Beijing International Short Film Festival.

In 2014, Palette has developed and is co-presenting the web TV series, The Substitute, with iQIYI, the largest web TV portal in China. The series is the first web TV genre series in China and also the first one that aims to combine the skills and visions of Chinese and American filmmakers.

千色映画诞生于美国洛杉矶，由第一位获得美国加州艺术学院制片硕士学位的华人白羽创立，专注于引进好莱坞人才和资源，开发、制作和投资类型片式的中国电影，以及为互联网、移动互联网量身订造的类型清晰的新媒体电影和网剧。

2013年暑期千色映画和北京歌华文化集团共同投资、制作的商战爱情电影《早见，晚爱》并被CCTV新闻联播进行推荐。于7月19日登陆全国院线，获得了良好的口碑和业界的广泛认可。本片由执导过《我要成名》《庙街皇后》等著名影片的香港导演刘国昌先生执导，《疯狂的石头》、《疯狂的赛车》的摄影师杜杰担任摄影指导，台湾著名影星周渝民（仔仔）、内地著名演员童瑶和“相声小王子”曹云金等主演，在业界获得了良好的口碑。该片在腾讯视频上线后仅一周即获得超过1200万点击量。

同年，千色映画策划、制作的微电影系列屡获殊荣，《大雨》之《老姚的北京》获北京国际微电影节“最佳影片奖”，并在首届中国微电影大典17000部参赛作品中脱颖而出，获得“最佳微电影宣传片奖”；《人在北京》之《味道》获第二届中国国际微电影大典“最佳网络人气奖”。

2014年，千色映画策划、与爱奇艺联合出品的《替身》，力邀中美资深电影人加盟，以好莱坞的叙事方式打造中国首部商业谍战网络剧，于2015年上线。

Name: Composite Films
Description:
Composite Films is a production studio founded in 2013 by Samuel François-Steininger that specializes in the colourisation and restoration of film and archive footage, the production of animation films and the creation of new documentary content.
 
In the space of four years, the studio has become a major player in the archive footage colourisation business. We have developed our unique expertise by combining cutting-edge technology, artistic design and in-depth historical research.
 
Our latest work includes America in Color, a colorized series about American history between the 1920s and the 1960s. We have also restored and colourised footage for Raoul Peck’s I’m not your Negro, which went on to win several prizes at various Film Festivals and was nominated at the 89th Academy Awards for Best Documentary.
And Maria by Callas by Tom Volf, an amazing feature documentary that was selected at TIFF and was released in theaters in more than 30 countries.
 
At the same time, Composite Films has also produced To Build a Fire. This animated short film has been screened at more than 50 festivals and has won various awards, including Grand Prize Winner Best Animated Short Film at Flickers Rhode Island 2016, which qualified the film for the Oscars. The film is still touring prestigious festivals around the world, and was broadcasted on France 2.
In 2019, we produced and co-produced 2 live action short films: 
- Sous la Peau directed by Julien Mignot, starring Victoire du Bois, Damien Bonnard and Mathieu Amalric, shot in 35mm film.

- Safety directed by Fabrice Joubert, starring Rob Nagle, Gatlin and Garrison Griffith, longlisted for the 2020 Academy Awards.

A lot of projects are in development at the moment, including live action, documentary and animation short and feature films.

Name: Verein zur Förderung der Dokumentarfilmkultur e.V.
Description:
Verein zur Förderung der Dokumentarfilmkultur e.V.
Der Verein will durch die Förderung der bundesweiten Dokumentarfilmtage „LETsDOK“ die Dokumentarfilmkultur in Deutschland stärken.

Der derzeitige Boom des Dokumentarischen auf Online-Plattformen und in Mediatheken zeigt die hohe Relevanz des Genres für vertiefende Informationen in Kultur, Politik und Gesellschaft.

Die Vernetzung der filmkulturellen Akteure ist uns besonders wichtig, denn wir stehen für die Interessen der Dokumentarfilmkultur und Filmbildung auch gegenüber der Politik und Verwaltung.

LETsDOK wurde 2020 von der AG DOK initiiert. Seit 2022 werden die LETsDOK Dokumentarfilmtage vom „Verein zur Förderung der Dokumentarfilmkultur e.V.“ in Köln und weiteren Partnern und Partnerinnen in den Bundesländern organisiert. 

Wir wollen die gesellschaftliche Relevanz und die erzählerische Qualität des Dokumentarfilms herausstellen und damit die Wertschätzung für das Genre weiter erhöhen.

Description: Die NATOURALE ist ein Festival für die Themen Natur, Reise, Umwelt und Tourismus. Filme, Vorträge, Workshop und besondere Veranstaltungen erwarten die Gäste aus aller Welt. Alleine bei der letzten NATOURALE waren 68 unterschiedliche Nationalitäten vertreten.  Das Partnerland 2024 ist die SCHWEIZ. Die Eröffnungsveranstaltung wir durch die KLM gefördert. Für die besten Filme zu den Themenbereichen erhalten die Filmemacher den HESSISCHEN LÖWEN. Verliehen wird dieser im Kurhaus Wiesbaden. Einreichungen sind noch bis Oktober 2024 über die Homepage möglich. Alle Infos hier: www.natourale.com

Name: Roze Filmdagen | Amsterdam LGBTQ+ Film Festival
Description:
The 29th edition of Roze Filmdagen takes place from 18 - 29 March, 2026

Since 1996, the Roze Filmdagen LGBTQ+ film festival has been a given in the Amsterdam cultural scene. It is currently both the biggest and the longest standing queer film festival in the Netherlands, and showcases quality feature films, shorts and documentaries from around the globe. 

The festival is a catalyst in strengthening queer community bonds and increase visibility of all aspects LGBTQ+ life.

Name: Kinescope Film GmbH
Description:
KINESCOPE FILM produziert jährlich über 25 Projekte und zählt somit zu einer der aufstrebenden deutschen Filmproduktionsfirmen. Das Team aus Bremen und Hamburg hat bereits über 100 nationale und internationale Auszeichnungen und Nominierungen für seine insgesamt 250 Spielfilme, Serien, Dokumentarfilme, Shows, Konzerte und Reportagen erhalten, die für Kino, Fernsehen und Streamingdienste realisiert wurden.
KINESCOPE FILM ist eine kreative Produktionsfirma, die europäische und internationale Kooperationen nutzt, um gesellschaftlich und künstlerisch relevante Themen mit jungen Talenten und erfahrenen Filmschaffenden umzusetzen.

Name: TOPSHOT - Drones Profesionales para Cine y Publicidad
Description:
LEADERS / +500 city flights
We are the first aerial advertising filming operator in Spain authorized by AESA for flights in controlled areas (CTR, security areas, airport surroundings, and night flights). 
Since 2020, we have conducted over 500 operations in urban areas.

EXPERIENCE MATTERS / +15 years
Over 15 years of experience in various fields and countries support us (aeronautics, engineering, photography, and film). Our team holds all the required titles and certifications.

CUTTING-EDGE TECHNOLOGY / +20 drone fleet
We have a wide fleet of latest generation drones that allow us to handle any type of project. Among others, we have the cinema heavylifter generation (Alta X and 8), intermediate drones such as Inspire 3, Inspire 2, and Mavic 3, as well as the FPV range. We have an R&D department where we craft key ad hoc elements for our drone fleet and peripherals.

EXCEPTIONAL SERVICE / 24/7
We are a versatile team composed of aviation pilots, Directors of Photography, camera operators, and aeronautical managers. A union born from talent and the desire to provide differential value. With offices in Madrid, Barcelona and Palma, we deliver best-in-class service, always connected and ready to provide value to our customers anytime, ensuring excellence in every project we undertake.

Name: cicciotun srl
Description:
Cicciotun is a Film Production Company  established in 2000 by Jacopo Martinoni and Francesca Bozzano, specialized in animation movies of every type, duration or style.
Creativity, competence, experience and professionalism are the main features of a team capable of great enthusiasm and great successes.
From Commercials to Corporate videos, from Open credits for the TV to Animated Series, the company today represents one of the most beautiful, true and established reality of this area.

Name: MadLove Group
Description:
Creative studio and production company with more than 10 years of experience, MadLove develops and produces original and impact entertainment that engages through emotions alongside experience. 

With global audiences in mind, our portfolio extends through multi-platform content across feature films, shorts, videoclips, custom-made interactive experiences and training laboratories.

Founded by Natalia Agudelo Campillo and lead by Nicolás Herreño Leal, MadLove is moving forward Latin American co-productions, big format events and new content development. Our latest film Nobody’s Watching of Julia Solomonoff won Best Actor in Tribeca 2017 and traveled the world in festivals as Warsaw, Rome, Rio de Janeiro, La Habana and Gijón.

Among our projects are: Days of the Whale debut feature of Catalina Arroyave that premiered in past SXSW where received Female First Feature Award also was selected in BAFICI and FICCI 59; NOCAUT a documentary by Jose Varón that won the grant for production of Proimágenes Colombia and is currently in postproduction; ALICE currently in development, the second feature film of Guillermo Pfening and that will be starred by Cecilia Roth. 
In our education department, just had the BOGOTÁ SERIES LAB with Nestor Hernández from Mediapro US to develop seven projects with their showrunners and in our events department designed the Opening of the new Cinemateca de Bogotá.

Name: Afterparty VFX
Description:
We are a high-end visual effects and finishing studio built as a more intimate response to the increasingly corporatized post production landscape. Everything we do is driven by our love of the craft, a craving to invent, and a desire to exceed expectations. 

We bring together the latest technologies with our exceptional creatives and producers to deliver innovative and superior content.

Name: UGC by Chriz

Name: Crazot
Description:
You want your project to get noticed, create an impact, and make a difference, right?
At Crazot Studios, we're not just video creators; we're your project's impact amplifiers. 

Whether you're a business looking to showcase your social responsibility, a startup ready to launch a game-changing product, or a non-profit on a mission to change the world, you need engaging video content that makes people engage with your cause.

We are video content wizards!  We don't just point and shoot; we dive deep into your project's goals and aspirations and create videos that are tailored to get you noticed. With the latest AI tools and a passion for storytelling, we'll transform your vision into a captivating video masterpiece.

Our diverse portfolio includes:

●	 Social impact videos that'll make your audience feel all the feels 
●	Corporate content that proves you can be socially responsible AND cool 
●	Product launch and promotional videos that'll make your audience say, "Shut up and take my money!" 

Let's join forces and create videos that ignite awareness, make a positive impact, and change the world, one view at a time.

Name: Festival Del Cinema Italiano
Description:
Festival del Cinema Italiano (FCI) è una rassegna cinematografica che celebra e valorizza le produzioni nazionali, in particolare le opere prime e seconde dei film usciti nelle sale nell’ultimo anno. Un appuntamento esclusivo che porta il cinema Made in Italy anche nei luoghi in cui il cinema non c’è.

Durante le giornate del Festival, i documentari diventano il link per trattare anche tematiche ambientali. Approfondimenti su vari argomenti del settore, allo scopo di consentire ai visitatori e ai partecipanti di conoscere più da vicino i grandi temi relativi alla battaglia contro i cambiamenti climatici e alle misure attraverso le quali affrontare il futuro in chiave sostenibile. Appuntamenti caratterizzati da una forte connotazione territoriale, valorizzando il sito di pregio naturalistico e ambientale in cui hanno luogo.

Name: Ekolojik Keşifler (old Sihirli Çiftlik)
Description:
Bu yolculuğa 2014 Haziran'ında başladık. Önce kendi ihtiyaçlarımız için, şehir dışı denilebilecek mesafelerden süt getirmeye başladık kendimiz için. 20 Yılı aşkın süredir teknoloji ile uğraşan birisi olarak, bir anda ortaya çıkan fırsattan doğan iş fikrine ısınıverdik.

Herkesin gıda sektörüne dair bir fikri vardı, biz ise önce doğalı diye hayal ettik. Tüm hayaller bir hayalperest ile başlar diyerek yola çıktığımız maceramız İstanbul Kartal'da bir apartmanın bodrumunda vücut buldu. Müşterilerimiz kulaktan kulağa ürün ve hizmet kalitemizi anlatıyor, para kazanmasak ta mutlu günler geçiriyorduk. Kapısı çaldığımız müşteriler gülerek karşılıyordu bizleri.

Çok uzun hikayeleri kimse sevmez; 2016 Nisan'ına geldiğimizde bir mağaza kararı verdik. Aracısı olduğumuz üreticilerde, ürünlerimize ilgi duyan müşterilerimiz de bu kararımıza destek verdi. Dağıtımın yoğun olduğu  bölgeyi dikkate alarak verdiğimiz mağaza lokasyonu karar Çekmeköy olarak gerçekleşti. 2020 yılı itibarı ile ilk şubemizi Bağdat Caddesi Göztepe'da açtık. Duyulan güven ve kalite anlayışımızdan ödün vermeden faaliyetimizi bu yeni adresimizde sürdürüyoruz. 

Hedefimiz:
Sihirli Çiftlik Ekolojik Market, halen beş kanal üzerinden sağlıklı ürünleri tüketici ile buluşturuyor. Kurucusu olduğumuz bu organizasyonda misyonun getirdiği sorumluluk yayılımın artması yönünde bir hedef üretti. Kaynağın sahibi olmaktansa, kolektif kaynaklar ile daha fazla insana daha makul maliyetler ile kalite ve doğallıktan ödün vermeden ulaşmak istiyoruz. Bu ülkü doğrultusunda gelecek yatırım ve destek teklifleri bizler için son derece değerli..

Name: Big Mouth
Description:
Somar em projetos além do agregador, mas sim
como um todo. Uma ferramenta de expansão
para novas ideias, visando um horizonte de
possibilidades e projetos desafiadores, contando
com a qualidade, craft e olhar refinado que cada
obra merece, aliado as maiores agências do
Brasil e grandes marcas do mercado.

Nosso casting de diretores conta com talentos em
ascensão do mercado audiovisual, trazendo em
sua visão seus toques peculiares, sensíveis e
coerentes ao mundo atual, questões sociológicas,
mercadológicas e percepções necessárias aos
dias de hoje. Norteados criatividade, atendimento
a necessidade e coesão ao tempo que vivemos.

TODA HISTÓRIA PODE SER MAIS. E É ISSO QUE EXPANSÃO PROPORCIONA.

Name: Kalapa Films
Description:
Kalapa Films is a film and video production agency in Barcelona. It has been working globally in the film and commercial industry for the past 20 years. It houses a multilingual, creative, jack-of-all-trades team.

Based in one of the most beautiful and international hub cities of Europe, we can work and move fluidly throughout the world, including NYC, Lisbon, Berlin, London, and Tel Aviv.

Name: Tandem Studios USA
Description: Founded in 2011, Tandem Media | Tandem Studios provides photography and film services from three Northeast Florida studios and on-location. We offer professional photography and corporate/commercial/feature film services to businesses and executives; entertainers including actors, models, musicians, dancers, athletes, etc.; students and families. If you can imagine it, we will create it – Concept to completion.

Description:
HACIENDOCINE  I Industria & Cultura. 

Haciendo Cine se desempeña desde hace 25 años como una empresa de productos y contenidos culturales en Argentina. Es participante activa de eventos, convocatorias, concursos, ciclos, festivales, seminarios, programas de capacitación, producción y distribución de cine y programas de TV, y todo tipo de actividades relacionadas a la industria audiovisual a nivel nacional e internacional.

Name: SHOWBIZ MOVIES - MODELS
Description:
PRODUZIONE CINEMATOGRAFICA, VIDEO E PROGRAMMI TV. AGENZIA SPECIALIZZATA IN FORNITURA MODELLE, MODELLI, HOSTESS E PROMOTER.
Tour, Roadshow, promozioni InStore, Guerrilla marketing, Interpretariato, Fiere. I nostri servizi sono rivolti alle aziende o alle agenzie specializzate, sempre con la professionalità e la cura che ci rende leader nel mercato dal 2002. Showbiz Models ha il catalogo attivo di personale più grande d'Europa, con oltre venticinquemila hostess, steward, modelle e attori. Forniamo modelle professioniste, modelli e attori per Spot, Showroom, sfilate e eventi di immagine. Showbiz Movies, parte del gruppo Showbiz, si occupa per Vostro conto anche della produzione dell'evento, Service audio Video, Produzione Spot e Video Aziendali, cataloghi e servizi fotografici. Una hostess promoter di bella presenza, di grande professionalità, che offre un Vostro prodotto è la garanzia migliore per incentivare la vendita. Un back office accurato consente la pianificazione di tutte le risorse impegnate in ogni singola provincia italiana, con reportistica, feed back, e garanzia di riuscita. Siamo anche società di produzione Cinematografica, tra le nostre produzioni YOUNG EUROPE Premiato come miglior  regia al Milan International Film Festival, e LOVERS premiato come miglior film ai Festival Internazionali di Londra, Lisbona e Philadelphia, visibile su Amazon Prime Video. Realizziamo Spot e video virali, ci occupiamo anche del marketing dei video realizzati per rendere i prodotti protagonisti

Name: Matilda Talents
Description:
Matilda Talents es una agencia de representación de actores y actrices que nace de la mano de la ilusión y del virtuosismo.  Con ingenio y capacidad de resolución, trabajamos por y para el actor/actriz y por y para los personajes que necesitan una cara, una voz y un gesto. Creemos en la profesionalidad y la confianza como lenguajes imprescindibles para la relación entre actores, representantes, directores de casting y productoras.

Matilda Talents está formado por artistas pluridisciplinarios que coincidimos en el tiempo con la constante transformación del sector audiovisual y las artes escénicas. Como buenos anfitriones de este momento que nos toca vivir, está entre nuestras aficiones  ver series y películas en plataformas online como Netflix, Filmin, HBO, AmazonPrime, Movistar, Orange, Vodafone, Sky, Rakuten, etc.,  escuchar música en Spotify, Apple Music, Tidal, Youtube, SounCloud, Deezer, etc., vender ropa de segunda mano en Vinted, Wallapop, etc., socializar en Twitter, Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, etc. También nos encanta comer palomitas en el cine viendo una película en pantalla grande, tener al actor a un metro en una obra de teatro y que se nos erice la piel ante una obra de arte en una exposición.  Pero por encima de todo está hacer lo que más nos gusta a todas las generaciones como buenos fans de Matilda: comer pastel de chocolate y leer un buen libro.

Name: Incision

At Incision, our main goal lies in empowering change through awareness.

Name: American Film Convention (AFC)
Description: At American Film Convention, we envision a future where the boundaries of cinematic creativity are constantly pushed, where innovation knows no limits, and where the global film community comes together to inspire, educate, and elevate the art of storytelling. We strive to create a platform that transcends traditional conventions, fostering an environment where creativity and commerce converge, and where the seeds of collaboration sprout into groundbreaking cinematic achievements.

Name: Cinecolor Brasil
Description: Presente no país desde 1998, a Cinecolor Brasil faz parte do Cinecolor Group, que atualmente é líder em serviços audiovisuais na América Latina, e a única empresa presente no México, Colômbia, Argentina, Chile, Peru, Venezuela e Brasil. A empresa possui quatro ramificações: Cinecolor SAT (distribuição de conteúdo via satélite), Cinecolor Films (coprodução, produção, distribuição para cinema), Cinecolor Digital (pós-produção).

Name: Cine8 Filmes / Produtora Audiovisual
Description:
NARRATIVAS DE IMPACTO

A Cine8 Filmes transforma ideias em experiências visuais marcantes, criando conteúdos de alto impacto para marcas, empresas e instituições que entendem o valor de uma comunicação envolvente e estratégica.

Somos pioneiros na produção de microdramas verticais, especialistas na produção de vídeos publicitários, institucionais, conteúdos para redes sociais, filmes e documentários, entregando narrativas de impacto que vão além da estética.
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Description:

A produtora

Com ideias inusitadas, imaginação fértil, espirito jovial e muita dedicação, desde 2009 a produtora inicia sua trajetória com um grupo de entusiastas e com um foco: Viver de cinema. Construindo maquetes gigantes, efeitos especiais, maquiagens e muita criatividade sem medo de ousar e expor nossa arte. Description: With locations in LA & Pittsburgh- we offer creative solutions for high-end VFX needs in film, television & advertising.

Name: CINEMA226
Description:
CINEMA226 was founded in 2013 as a production company, and in 2017, formed a group of production companies that strengthened and supported their individual funding applications to financing sources with greater resources, sharpening their abilities to identify, develop, produce, and market current options for FILM and VOD. Since then, CINEMA226 has produced several feature films, including "Coraje" with Rubén Rojo Aura (2022); "Influencia" with Pablo Aura, Feral, and Andrés Kaiser (2019); "Traición" with Ignacio Ortiz (2019); "La venganza del Jairo" with Simón Hernández (2019); "Malacopa" with Armando Casas (2018); and "El año de la plaga" with Martín Ferrera (ESP-MEX-BEL) as its first international co-production (2018). CINEMA226 also produced some feature films that are premiere pending, including "Lítica" (produced in 2023); "Póstumo" (produced in 2022); "Lloródromo" (produced in 2024); "Vino la noche" (produced in 2024) and "Ventitontas" (2025).

Together with Roomtone, he is currently involved in the production of his first animation project, a series called "Mirror Keepers".

Name: 84S videoproducties
Description: 84S videoproducties heeft al jaren ervaring met het uitvoeren van audiovisuele producties: Het creëren van een concept, uitwerken tot een scenario, plannen van de productie, realisatie van opnames en tenslotte het afwerken bij de montage!

Name: Festival Imagésanté
Description:
Biennale de cinéma, le Festival Imagésanté, promeut la santé auprès des citoyens, des professionnels et des étudiants. En 15 éditions, il est devenu le principal festival de cinéma en Europe qui fait vivre la santé à travers des œuvres documentaires d’auteurs engagés, des conférences, un programme de culture scientifique et des rencontres professionnelles.
La santé, sujet vaste, dense et riche, touche l’ensemble de la population. Pour sortir des méthodes de prévention habituelles, Imagésanté associe la culture artistique et scientifique pour créer de nouvelles interactions avec le public.

Name: Trinidad+Tobago Film Festival (TTFF)
Description: The largest film festival in the English-speaking Caribbean, the trinidad+tobago film festival (ttff) is an annual celebration of the best films from Trinidad & Tobago, the Caribbean, the Caribbean Diaspora and Latin American countries in the Caribbean Basin. In addition to screening films, the festival also hosts workshops, panel discussions and other film-related events.

Name: Dedo Ciego
Description:
DEDO CIEGO is the work of mixed media directors, art directors and visual artists Ana Gale and Joaquín Urbina. We create films, visuals and graphics for brands, tv, musicians, art and ourselves.

We love to explore moving images, WE CHASE THE IDEAS INSIDE THE FORMS. We walk diverse and unexpected paths combining handcraft techniques, physical objects, digital materials and analogue processes to achieve unique results.

Our art direction driven work combines animation, live action and print and has been recognised by Vimeo Staff Picks, Laus Awards, Stashmedia, Motionographer, Onedotzero, Art of the Title, Ciclope and Gràffica among others.

Our base is Barcelona.

Selected Clients:

Brands
FXM Networks, TV3, Solvia, Direct, Heineken, Gas Natural, J&B, ING, Ajuntament de Barcelona, Yoigo, Smashing Mag, Seat, Canal+, Toyota, Generali, Movistar +

Name: NextVideo GmbH
Description:
Katherina Nehr und Alexander Eggers erstellen bewegende Videos für Ihr Unternehmen. Dazu gehören Event-, Image-, Recruiting- und Lernvideos.
Weiterhin produzieren wir Videos aus unserem Studio, dass Sie auch mieten können unter www.studio-365.de.

Name: Bad Blood Films
Description:
Bad Blood Films is an independent British horror and thriller film production company with a studio approach to filmmaking, tapping into a long tradition of commercially successful companies such as Hammer and more recently Blumhouse.

Welcome to our Horror Playground.

Led by founders Mark Kenna and David Creed, Bad Blood Films ambition is to support sustainable film-making in the UK through creative storytelling, innovative, high-quality productions whilst supporting up-and-coming talent.

The first release from a slate of up and coming projects will be the folklore, supernatural horror Sacrilege has its U.K. theatrical release 6.3.2020, US/Canada digital & DVD 16.3.21, Sweden 6/21, Germany Blu-ray 3.9.21 and U.K. streaming 27.9.21. 

#faceyourfear

Please get in touch for investment opportunities: investor@badbloodfilms.com

Name: Oakville Festivals of Film and Art
Description:
Oakville Festivals of Film and Art (OFFA) is a cultural not-for-profit that provides the Oakville Film Festival and other film and arts events in the beautiful and tranquil setting of Oakville, Ontario, Canada. 

Our Mission: To foster community through the appreciation of film and art by offering to the public an inclusive, intimate access to local, Canadian, and International films and filmmakers, and by using film as a catalyst to connect the public with local social issues.

How You Can Get Involved
Volunteer with us: You can make a difference. Build your skills, grow your network, and have fun with our vibrant cultural events while helping people connect with their community and interact with filmmakers and artists.

Partner with us as a Sponsor: You have the power to make a difference through the arts while building your brand image. Partner with us to bring unique, exciting cinema and arts experiences to an engaged, influential audience in Southern Ontario.

Name: Foxtrot X-Ray
Description:
Foxtrot X-Ray is a Visual Effects and Motion Design company specializing in delivering high-end imagery for film, television, and web video projects.

We’re a team of experienced freelancers, vetted and supervised by the company’s founder Paul DeNigris, an award-winning filmmaker, visual effects artist, and film educator with over 25 years of experience in the field. Having worked on projects such as Revenge, Castle, Wicked City (ABC), Scorpion, NCIS, Hawaii Five-O, Extant (CBS), Veep (HBO) and more, and having trained a new generation of professionals who have contributed visual effects to productions like Stranger Things, Ender's Game, Avatar, The Avengers, Pacific Rim, Game of Thrones, Frozen, and many, many more, Paul and the team combine Hollywood experience with the independent filmmaker’s spirit of getting more done with less.

Name: PixelSky
Description: Ontdek de wereld door de lens van PixelSky! Vanuit elke hoek en hoogte kunnen wij elk moment vastleggen. Wij zijn gespecialiseerd in adembenemende foto's, meeslepende video's en indrukwekkende drone-opnames. Name: Moving Forward Studios Inc
Description:
At Moving Forward Studios, we are a boutique post-production studio driven by passion, precision, and partnership. Since 2001, we’ve specialized in visual effects, color correction, finishing, compositing, and animation, delivering high-end work for film, television, advertising, and entertainment.
We believe great post-production is built on more than technology, it’s built on human connection. We collaborate closely with clients, building lasting partnerships that inspire trust, creativity, and outstanding results. Every project is fueled by enthusiasm, care, and a shared commitment to storytelling that resonates.
Our leadership reflects this philosophy. Leo Lovera, Founder & CEO, brings over 30 years of experience in VFX, compositing, and finishing. He’s been part of the product design team at Assimilate Inc. since its inception, helping shape SCRATCH, and has served as an alpha and beta tester for nearly all major post-production tools, insights that refined many of the industry’s most trusted software.
Alongside Leo, Oscar Martínez leads our color department as Senior Colorist. With a refined eye for tone and storytelling, Oscar ensures every frame carries visual consistency, emotional depth, and a cinematic finish. Beyond color, he’s an enthusiast programmer who develops custom tools to enhance grading workflows, including a live streaming system that lets clients remotely connect to his color monitor and supervise sessions in real time, enabling seamless collaboration from anywhere.
As the industry evolves, we’re experimenting with AI-powered tools, exploring how emerging technologies can be thoughtfully integrated into workflows to boost efficiency and creative flexibility, while maintaining the craft and quality that define our work.
At Moving Forward Studios, we don’t just love what we do, we live it. Our passion, experience, and collaborative approach are the foundation of every partnership and project. Together with our clients, we move stories forward.

第三楼所有的服务都旨在为客户在项目创作前期过程中提供最合适的技术解决方案。

Name: La Lanterne Magique
Description:
La Lanterne Magique est un club de cinéma pour enfants âgés de 6 à 12 ans. Son but est de faire connaître aux plus jeunes le plaisir incomparable de la découverte du cinéma… au cinéma!

Une fois par mois, tous les membres du club reçoivent chez eux un petit journal qui les invite à découvrir dans une vraie salle de cinéma un film de qualité adapté à leur âge. Sans leurs parents, mais entourés d’adultes responsables, les enfants apprivoisent alors les grandes émotions cinématographiques, qui sont aussi celles de la vie: le rire, le rêve, avec juste ce qu’il faut de peur et de tristesse. Ils font non seulement l’expérience inoubliable de partager ces moments privilégiés avec des camarades de leur âge, mais aussi celle d’apprendre à lire les images, grâce à un spectacle pédagogique qui précède le film et met en évidence une ou plusieurs de ses particularités et de ses qualités.

Par le biais de ce concept unique, La Lanterne Magique fait découvrir le cinéma en tant qu’art et rend les enfants attentifs à ses différentes composantes artistiques: de la musique au théâtre, en passant par la littérature.

Name: The Film Noir Foundation
Description:
The Film Noir Foundation is a non-profit public benefit corporation created as an educational resource regarding the cultural, historical, and artistic significance of film noir as an international cinematic movement.

It is our mission to find and preserve films in danger of being lost or irreparably damaged, and to ensure that high quality prints of these classic films remain in circulation for theatrical exhibition to future generations.

That's the high-toned legalese. Here are the facts: Even as the high-tech revolution lets us own vast film libraries on DVD, the risk grows greater all the time that 35mm prints of some films will fall into disuse and eventually disintegrate—especially lesser-known titles that have slipped through the cultural cracks, but are worthy of rediscovery.

As a focal point of the classic film noir revival, the Foundation serves as a conduit between film companies and repertory cinemas still eager to screen these films in 35mm. Revenues generated by ticket sales encourage studios film archives to strike new prints of films that are at risk of disappearing from public view, either through neglect or scarcity. Once these films sare unearthed and returned to circulation, the chances exponentially increase that they will be reissued on DVD, available in pristine, affordable form for future generations of film-lovers.

The Film Noir Foundation has funded and produce restorations of the following films:
"Cry Danger" (1951)
"The Prowler" (1951) – Funded by the FNF in conjunction with the Stanford Theatre Foundation
"Try and Get Me!" (1951)
"Repeat Performance" (1947) - Funded by the FNF in conjunction with the Packard Humanities Institute
"High Tide" (1947) - Funded by the FNF in conjunction with the Packard Humanities Institute
"Too Late for Tears" (1949)
"The Guilty" (1947)
"Woman on the Run" (1950)
"Los tallos amargos" (1956)
"The Man Who Cheated Himself" (1950)
"Trapped" (1949)
"La bestia debe morir" (1952)
"El vampiro negro" (1953)

Name: NewMotion Programm
Description:
NewMotion ist ein Projekt der NewMotion GmbH und der Produktionsallianz Campus GmbH. 

Das Job-Einstiegs-Programm richtet sich gezielt an Berufs- und Quereinsteiger:innen ohne Kontakte in die Branche. Teilnehmende begleiten bei Job-Shadowings erfahrene Filmschaffende für drei Tage bei der Arbeit, um sich erste Eindrücke von Arbeitsabläufen bei Film- und Setarbeit machen zu können.

Ziel von NewMotion ist es, insbesondere Menschen aus marginalisierten Gruppen für eine Karriere im Film zu begeistern. Das Programm setzt dabei auf einen unkomplizierten Ansatz und konzentriert sich auf Crew Jobs, für die herkömmliche Ausbildungswege fehlen.

NewMotion wurde von den Produzent:innen Roshanak „Rosh“ Khodabakhsh und Jorgo Narjes initiiert und wird als gemeinsames Projekt von der NewMotion GmbH und der Produktionsallianz Campus GmbH verantwortet und umgesetzt. Das vom Bundesministerium für Wirtschaft und Energie (BMWE), dem Beauftragten der Bundesregierung für Kultur und Medien (BKM), der Filmförderungsanstalt (FFA), Netflix und Prime Video geförderte Projekt erleichtert durch niedrigschwellige Angebote den Zugang zu Film und Fernsehen.

The ACO intends to provide a forum for discussion about the role of the operator, to  provide a knowledge and skills resource for producers, directors and others, and to  offer workshops, training and information to its members to enhance their effectiveness. 

The ACO works closely with other industry organisations and companies who share  a common interest in excellence.

We're not your average production company, we're your creative partners, your problem solvers, and your ticket to cinematic excellence.

Picture this: seamless coordination, state-of-the-art equipment, and a dedicated team of professionals working tirelessly to bring your creative vision to reality. 

For more info, visit our website: www.primeproductions-amg.com 
Or get in touch with us at info@primeproductions-amg.com

Name: Mezcla Media Collective
Description: Our mission is to provide resources to ensure that women and non-binary filmmakers of color realize their full potential as storytellers and agents of change at a local level. Mezcla currently has three tiers of resources offered: hyper-local, knowledge transfer, and career advancement. By creating a local hub in Chicago, women of color can be provided with resources to enhance their craft by way of creating access to a network, workshops, and a centralized local community. Mezcla also seeks to level the playing field, ensuring that women and non-binary filmmakers of color are able to participate in their city’s bustling media production scene.

Name: Tasty Pictures
Description:
Tasty Pictures is a specialist video and moving image production company that is home to two high-speed, motion control BOLT robots and 40ft of track. We re-image food, product and tabletop production and have an expert team of tabletop directors, cinematographers, producers, food stylists, stills photographers and robot technicians, who collaborate to provide the complete production experience.

Our high-speed, motion control robots, affectionately named Fred and Barney, are based alongside the 40ft track in our purpose-built Tasty Studio in Brisbane, however, they can be relocated and moved to shoot locations around Australia to create mind-blowing visual and motion content. 

It is our mission to create the highest quality and most innovative specialist content in the world. It’s a big claim, but we have the experience, expertise and vision to make it a reality.

Name: nya studios
Description: Located in one of Hollywood’s most renowned areas, nya studios, is an elevated and multi-hyphenated space that allows for an array of experiential possibilities. Made up of over 50,000 sf of indoor space and an abundance of outdoor space, the campus includes 3 sound stages with gorgeous support spaces, an elevated and adaptable event space, 77 person seated cinema, board rooms, coffee bar and lounge. The space has been curated to be serene but also transform itself for any creative experience or film shoot. nya studios follows the classic phrase coined by Leonardo Da Vinci, “simplicity is the ultimate sophistication.”

Name: Green Kit Ltd
Description: Greenkit is a London based film lighting rental company supplying energy efficient lights and lighting accessories to film makers. Our clients are DPs, Gaffers and Producers making corporate vidoes, commercials short and independent films. Our kit is a carefully chosen selection of the best lights and lighting accessories around chosen for their performance, power and energy efficiency.

Name: Mobius MC Ltd
Description: Mobius is a visual effects facility with a commitment to producing world class visual effects by building a creative studio where talented artists and producers gather to contribute to award winning content.

Name: DSP - Criação e produção audiovisual
Description:
Produtora audiovisual destinada ao serviços de captação, criação e pós-produção em áudio e vídeo para empresas e corporações.

Criada em 2010, a DSP atende às necessidades de propaganda e marketing de MEIs a grandes empresas de diversos setores.

Em seu portfólio, conta com uma vasta carteira de clientes envolvendo McDonald’s, IBM, Sanofi, Leroy Merlin, Nissan, Hyundai, dentre muitos outros.

Name: Neurazitelny podcast Jardy Jiráka
Description:
Ahoj, jsem Jarda Jirák, fearhacker a tvůrce Neurazitelného podcastu.
Pokud toužíte najít odvahu dát světu i sobě to nejlepší, co ve vás je, jste na správném místě!
Najdete tu nefiltrované náhledy do nejpozoruhodnějších českých hlav a příběhů v nich ukrytých.
Pomůžou vám objevit, kým můžete být vy.
Buďme víc

Name: Planet in Focus
Description:
Now in our 25th year, Planet in Focus is an environmental media arts organization that produces an annual international film festival and year-round programming. Our mandate is to produce cultural events that showcase engaging and artistic films that question, explore, and tell stories about the world in which we live. We use film as a catalyst for public awareness, discussion and engagement on a broad range of environmental issues.

Donations accepted through the charitable foundation Planet in Focus Foundation.
https://www.canadahelps.org/en/charities/planet-in-focus-foundation/

Name: Bosnian-Herzegovinian Film Festival
Description: The Bosnian-Herzegovinian Film Festival (BHFF) is an annual event, featuring contemporary Bosnian- Herzegovinian cinematography and films with Bosnia and Herzegovina as their theme. Since its founding in 2003, the BHFF has gained a reputation as an important showcase that provides a platform for the exposure of up-and-coming and internationally-renowned filmmakers, thus contributing to a greater understanding of this country, its diverse culture and complex history.

Name: SUR5D, Cincode Cinema S.L.
Description: Our company is based in Seville and specializes in film, commercial and event production. Our team can make any project possible from beginning to end: script writing, scheduling, shooting and editing. We also rent cameras, lenses, lighting and sound equipment to fulfill your production needs.

Name: Studio des Ursulines
Description:
Le Studio des Ursulines est un écrin de cinéma historique à destination des petits et grands enfants : projections sur mesure, festivals, ateliers, rencontres… Il y a toujours dans notre cinéma un évènement jeune public !
Notre programmation, exigeante et indépendante, valorise également la jeune création et l'animation lors de temps forts dédiés au tout public (Paris International Animation Film Festival, Aller-Retour, Format Court…).

Les bonnes raisons d’y aller : 
– Sa programmation jeune public variée et de qualité.
– Son engagement à destination des établissements scolaires pour une éducation aux images et au cinéma.
– Parce qu’il est , dès 1926, le premier cinéma précurseur des salles Art et Essai.

Name: Island Studios
Description: With 16 stages across central locations in the UK and South Africa, Island Studios offers more than 90,000 square feet of professional, full-service shooting space supported by a friendly, expert team. Our stages and facilities at Island Studios, combined with decades of hands-on staff experience, can help you turn any vision into reality.

Name: Henneman
Description:
Henneman is a leading talent & content management company in the Benelux.  

Our roster presents the most prominent actors, directors, writers, content creators and their production companies, presenters, comedians, voiceover artists and others involved in all aspects of the entertainment business and cultural sector. People with a voice and, equally important, a potential audience.   

Through our years of combined experience, we know the value and impact of specific talent. Henneman plays a key strategic role between talent, producers, casting directors, broadcasters, distributors, streamers and other vital industry players on a national and international level. We consolidate a deep respect for talent with profound knowledge of the industry and thus are able to tie the right people to the right projects. Our focus is to develop and nurture this talent.  

As Benelux leading agency, Henneman is far-reaching in the outside world, but remains small and personal on the inside. Each client is paired with its own manager and gives the personal attention he or she deserves, whilst simultaneously being represented by the whole agency. This collaborative approach benefits our clients as they look to build their careers across multiple disciplines and platforms. We represent all talent, across all channels.  

In addition to the standard services, Henneman initiates various new TV, film and theatre projects. These projects offer tailormade creative and business opportunities for our clients. We believe successful projects can be engineered and that we have the right experience in talent packaging.  

Henneman is keen to remain the matchmaker between Benelux artists, and the global entertainment industry. By doing so we do not only represent artists, but help them shape the future of entertainment and art.  

Henneman Agency was founded in 2005 by Vanessa Henneman, agent, executive producer and entertainment lawyer.

Name: BUSTER Filmfestival
Description: At BUSTER, we are passionate about showing you the very best films for children and young people and creating experiences that inspire play, community and curiosity based on the fantastic universes of the films. We are part of the Copenhagen Film Festival Foundation together with our cool sister festival, CPH:DOX.

Name: Sayonara Film S.R.L.
Description:
Sayonara Film works in film production and in the short film distribution with passion and versatility. Sayonara is in fact a production film company that grows on the fertile ground of Elenfant Film, active since 2004 in the independent production of shorts and documentaries appreciated all over the world. As a distribution film company, Sayonara relates to the ten-years’ experience of Elenfant Distribution, founded by Adam Selo, that starts distributing shorts in 2008.

Working with Sayonara Film means creating a stimulating and creative dialogue with a network of international professionals, keeping fruitful relationships with the most important festivals, that select and recognize the value of our films.

Name: Xantus TV
Description:
We are a full-service studio offering complete postproduction, from editing, color correction, online and 3D, to emission files. We have an excellet, highly experienced 3D animation team, outstanding supervisors and producers who will guide the client even through the most difficult project.

We implement projects remotely with clients in Poland and abroad. We are supported by Shotgun software for projects coordination and tools such as Zoom, Skype or Whatsup for communication. We also perform remote color correction working with creatvies on Resolve in real time.

We are an experienced team for whom nothing is impossible.

We work with numerous foreign clients and creative professionals. We have implemented a project for the Lay’s brand with Bites studio and director Ronald Koetzier, who did not leave his home in the Netherlands throughout the preparation, shooting and postproduction process. The spot was produced under lockdwon, completly remotely. Another of our recent projects involved 3D animations for the German brand Dr. Beckmann. We also have clients from Vietnam and Russia. We are well prepared for remote work and are good at it.

We have been trusted by:
T-Mobile, Plus, Huawei, McDonalds, Maspex, VW, Polpharma, PGE, Unilever, Sanofi, Red Bull, Fortuna, Samsung, BNP, PKO, Allegro, Empik, Onet, 4F, Skoda and Decathlon.

Name: La Fiera Group Producciones S.L.
Description:
La Fiera Group producciones es una productora independiente integrada por jovenes entusiastas e innovadores, donde llevamos a cabo proyectos audiovisuales modernos y transgresores, inspirados en la cultura del Rock & Roll. Volcados integramente al Cine, Spots y Videoclips.

Twitter: @lafieragroup
Vimeo: www.vimeo.com/lafieragroup
Youtube: www.youtube.com/user/lafieraronnypiturro

Name: Avo Pictures
Description: Avo Pictures is a full service video production company located in Sofia, Bulgaria. We have extensive experience in product & commercial videography, photography, aerial videography, VFX & CGI. We take care of the whole video creation process: from creating a concept to post-production to offer a complete 360 degree service.

Name: ORIGINE FILMS
Description:
ORIGINE FILMS is a motion pictures and film company based in Paris and Lyon, France.

Since 2011, we’ve been committed to promoting the vitality and diversity of short films from around the world.

Name: Freak Independent Film Agency
Description: We distribute a curated selection of films based on true emotional connections with the stories and the crews behind each film.

Name: One Shot Production
Description: One Shot Production in Düsseldorf: Filmproduktion mit Fokus auf Storytelling und cineastische Ästhetik. Spezialisiert auf Film, Werbe-, Image- und Social Media-Videos, die Marken und Geschichten lebendig machen.

Name: Jupiter
Description: Jupiter is a creative studio, agency and tech lab pioneering how stories are told in the age of AI. Our clients include Fortune 500 brands, A-list celebrities, and top film studios, with content ranging from global ad campaigns to full-length TV series.

Name: EFO Films
Description:
Founded in 1998 Emmett/Furla/Oasis Films (EFO Films) is an independent film production company, dedicated to the development, financing and production of top tier filmed entertainment for the theatrical marketplace. The company is a major supplier of quality commercial projects for the studios and major independents worldwide. To date the company has produced 80 films, which have generated over $1 billion worldwide box office dollars to date.

Films produced by Emmett / Furla include:
“2 Guns,” “Lone Survivor,” “Escape Plan,” “Frozen Ground,” “End of Watch,” “Alex Cross,” “Broken City,”
“Empire State,” “The Tomb,” “The Amityville Horror,” “Rambo,” “Righteous Kill,” “16 Blocks,”  amongst many other titles.

Upcoming Movies 
Martin Scorsese Silence, Robert De Niro Bus 657, Monopoly and Hungry Hippo to name a few.

Name: Dream Daily Productions
Description: Home of fresh, modern & relatable storytelling.

Name: Arteria Films Studios
Description:
Somos una empresa de producción audiovisual especializada en la realización de imagen publicitaria y de sonido, con estudio propio de grabación, con más de 30 años de trabajo.

Nuestra Misión es la de ofrecer servicios de producción audiovisual para que tu proyecto impacte, de forma positiva, en tu público objetivo y obtengas una excelente reputación.

Damos solución a las necesidades de transmitir el mensaje y los valores
de los clientes, con el equipo técnico y humano que necesitan para sus producciones audiovisuales.

Name: Delphy Production
Description:
Delphy Production est une société indépendante de création et de production audiovisuelle, reconnue pour son engagement à raconter des histoires authentiques, inspirantes et profondément humaines. À travers une filmographie riche et variée, allant du documentaire réaliste à la fiction poignante, Delphy Production explore avec sensibilité et audace des thématiques universelles telles que l'identité, la résilience, la diversité culturelle et l'empowerment.
Guidée par une passion pour la qualité artistique et un fort engagement envers l'originalité, Delphy Production accompagne les talents émergents tout en collaborant avec des créateurs confirmés pour proposer des films et des séries qui touchent les cœurs et éveillent les consciences.
Avec une approche tournée vers l'avenir, la société mise également sur l'innovation, intégrant les nouvelles technologies et l'intelligence artificielle dans ses créations afin de renouveler constamment l'expérience du public.
Delphy Production, ce sont des histoires vraies, une émotion intense et un regard unique sur notre monde.

Chez Delphy Production, le cinéma est notre passion : nous y partageons notre vision du monde. Nos interrogations portent sur l’identité, l’acceptation, l’affirmation de soi, l’injustice … des thématiques à la portée de tous, qui entendent éveiller les consciences des petits et grands.

Name: Burning Reel
Description:
Burning Reel rosters a unique family of award-winning directors, each individual in their artistry and visual storytelling.

We create talked-about commercials, music videos, branded-content, documentaries, animation and everything in between.

Our work speaks for itself. We build talent and push the boundaries of what is achievable.

Burning Reel strives to be one step ahead of the latest industry changes and we pride ourselves on approaching each project with unmatched energy, flexibility and the highest levels of creativity.
 
Out of the belief that everything is possible, Creep, our sister post-house was born. Whilst Creep has a killer list of independent clients and exists as its own entity, it is there also to draw on as a resource for Burning Reel and its directors.

Name: Mike Martin Media
Description: MMM specializes in video production & creative services for corporations, institutions, organizations and groups around the world. Our mission is to help our clients promote their causes, inform their audiences, and inspire more with their stories.

Name: Glean Productions Inc.
Description: Glean is a content production house that has a history of creating both tactical and branded assets for some of the biggest retailers in Canada. Our mantra of "Small Crew Hustle, Big Toy Muscle" enables higher production value while increasing photo/video output. Quality and volume, the answer is "yes".

Name: Parenthèse Cinéma
Description:
Conseil en communication/marketing auprès des producteurs et distributeurs cinéma.
Partenariats média et hors-média (marques, institutionnels, scolaires, associatifs) + événementiel cinéma et avant-premières officielles

Principaux films accompagnés : "En Fanfare", "Ni Chaines ni Maitres", "LE Fil", "Monsieur Aznavour", "Tirailleurs", "Les petites victoires", "En Corps", "Au nom de la terre", , "Roma", "Coco", "Au revoir là-haut", "Un sac de Billes", "Les Minions", "Bienvenue Chez les Chtis", "Les Choristes", "Océans", "Le secret de Brokeback Mountain", "Mommy", "Minuscule", "Deux frères", "Harvey Milk", "Lost in Translation", "Joyeux Noel"...

Name: Points North Institute
Description:
The Points North Institute is the launching pad for the next generation of nonfiction storytellers.

We build a unique, interdisciplinary community of filmmakers, artists, journalists, industry leaders and local audiences, forming a creative hub where stories and talent are discovered, collaborations are born, and the future of nonfiction media is shaped.

Our programs include the annual Camden International Film Festival and Points North Forum, as well as a growing suite of artist development initiatives: retreats, residencies, workshops and fellowships that nurture the careers of diverse nonfiction storytellers and help them develop a stronger artistic voice.

Name: Auryn Producciones
Description: Auryn Producciones: Es una Empresa de Producción de Contenidos, Música y Cine Digital. Además de asesorías y servicios para la realización de productos cinematográficos y digitales desde el año 2000.

Name: Sala Contraluz
Description:
Sala Contraluz is the color lab of the company Drago Broadcast Services on Madrid center.

Contraluz has 50m2 dedicated to the art and science of audiovisual color: Grade 1 Monitor HDR Sony X300, 4 meters screen and video projection for film, calibrated using LightSpace, 4K, HDR10 and Dolby Vision certification, ACES color management and all the acronyms needed to make your production artistically and technically perfect, from before shooting till final deliveries.

The artist Fan Yang is behind the decoration and art direction.

We use in Contraluz several grading systems and workflows according of timings and budgets of every production. Our experience guide us to provide the best workflow and grading possible to such different productions as features, prime time TV series, daily TV series, TV shows, documentaries or commercials.

Drop us a line to contraluz@gruposecuoya.es or stop by and have a coffee with us (tell us first, we could probably be grading ;).

Name: Astoria Films
Description: Started in 1997 as a production service for other studios, specializing in logistics, budgeting, locations, and equipment.. Since 2010 our focus has been developing and producing original motion pictures and television series for worldwide distribution. In 2014, we began production on our next feature in addition to six new TV pilots.

Name: Set Màgic Audiovisual
Description:
Creada en 2007, SETMÀGIC AUDIOVISUAL es una productora independiente de Barcelona que produce contenidos para cine y televisión.

Gran parte de los proyectos que producimos tienen un denominador común: películas basadas en hechos reales, películas que pretenden recuperar del anonimato personas singulares o cuyas gestas resultaron vitales para la historia. Biopics que ensalzan la grandeza de sus protagonistas.

Así mismo, también producimos contenidos televisivos que abordan temáticas variadas: sociales, económicas y culturales, tanto locales como internacionales, para cubrir las necesidades de un público cada vez más exigente.

Name: RFX INC
Description:
RFX Inc is the leading software solution provider for the visual effects industry. Located in the heart of Hollywood and serving clients all over the world, we are your one stop shop for visual effects advice, service and support in the film, video, web, gaming and interactive industries.

Concept to Completion
Bring RFX into the picture when you are planning your next project.  We are with you every step of the way to enhance your existing production pipeline or help you create one from scratch.

A Strategic Business Partner
With more then 30 years experience and representing over 100 products, RFX will provide you with the best solution to address your needs. Our vast knowledge and expertise helps us reduce your production time and costs.

Give us a call
RFX serves thousands of clients ranging from individual freelancers to some of the largest companies in the industry. Contact us (323) 962-7400.

https://www.facebook.com/RFXinc
http://twitter.com/rfx_inc
http://www.yelp.com/biz/rfx-inc-los-angeles

Name: Lab 80 film
Description:
Lab 80 film started its activity in 1976 in Bergamo as a distributor of films by authors back then unknown for the national film market. The company has been the first to distribute in Italy films directed by Wenders, Fassbinder, Herzog, Wajda and Has. Since 1999 Lab 80 film has created a production specialized on creative documentary, putting it side by side with the historical distribution activity. Lab 80 film also provides audiovisual services and is an exhibitor which organizes projections and cinematographic seasons.

Lab 80 film
Via Pignolo 123, 24121 Bergamo - Italy 
Tel. +39 035 342239 || Fax +39 035 341255 
info@lab80.it || www.lab80.it

Name: Levantine Films
Description: Levantine Films is a New York-based development, production, and film financing company. Backed by Crest Investments, a diversified investment company based in Houston, Levantine focuses on developing, producing, and fully financing commercially viable, character-driven films.

Name: MyMax Edutainment
Description:
MyMax is an independent production company specialising in documentaries for the italian and international market.
In development: 

NORMANS, THE EUROPEAN DREAM, in coproduction with RAI Documentari, ZDF/ARTE and ORF, and in coproduction with Epo-Film (Austria), History, 1x90’ ; OCEAN ONE K in coproduction with Gedeon Programmes and with Rai Documentari and in collaboration with Planete+

Among the latest documentaries:

UNDER THE VOLCANO, Science, coproduction France Tv, RAI, Artline Films, MyMax, 1x90’, 4K, 2021;  THE DAY AFTER POMPEII, History, coproduction ZDF/ARTE, Doc.station, preacquisition A&E Networks Italy History, 1x52, 4K, 2019 ; LA CHAMBREES DES MERVEILLES, Culture, coproduction Filmica Production, ARTE, MYMAX, 1x52, 2019 ; LUCIANO PAVAROTTI, BIRTH OF A POP STAR, Culture, coproduction MDAM (France), MYMAX, ARTE France, SkyArte, 1x52’, 2017 ...

Name: FIRST STEPS
Description:
"FIRST STEPS – Der Deutsche Nachwuchspreis" wird seit 2000 jährlich an herausragende Abschlussfilme von Studentinnen und Studenten der Filmschulen in den deutschsprachigen Ländern verliehen. 
Der Preis präsentiert der Branche das hohe kreative Potenzial des Nachwuchses und erleichtert den Absolventinnen und Absolventen die "ersten Schritte" in den Beruf.
Der Deutsche Nachwuchspreis FIRST STEPS wurde 1999 als private Initiative der Filmwirtschaft von den Produzenten Bernd Eichinger und Nico Hofmann ins Leben gerufen und gilt als renommiertester Preis für Abschlussfilme aus Deutschland, Österreich und der Schweiz. 

Er wird veranstaltet von der Deutschen Filmakademie in Partnerschaft mit ARD, Netflix, Prime Video, Seven.One Entertainment Group, Studio Hamburg, UFA und Warner Bros. Discovery. Allen gemeinsam ist der Wunsch, den Filmnachwuchs sinnvoll und effektiv zu fördern. 
Die Preisverleihung im Berliner Stage Theater des Westens, bei der die jungen Filmschaffenden und ihre Werke im Rampenlicht stehen, stößt bei Branche und Nachwuchs auf begeisterte Resonanz.

Es werden alle Abschlussfilme des Jahrgangs in allen Längen, Genres und Formaten in die Auswahl einbezogen. Das besondere Augenmerk gilt Arbeiten mit fiktiver Handlung, Dokumentarfilmen und Werbespots.
Über die Nominierung und die Vergabe der Preise entscheiden unabhängige Fachjurys.

Name: Denton Black Film Festival Institute
Description:
Storytelling is the core of any culture. Stories are how traditions, ideas and experiences are shared and passed down from one generation to the next. Denton Black Film Festival is a platform for stories about black lives, black culture and black experiences to be shared, told and lived.
The Denton Black Film Festival creates a space where :
- a minority culture can be a majority experience.
- stories on the margins are given center stage.
- the black experience is valued, validated and celebrated.

“Denton is proud to host an event of this caliber to celebrate the talent and creativity of African Americans in the film industry. This event is an opportunity for the Denton community to discover and explore the creative achievements that make African American culture and history unique. ” – Chris Watts, Mayor, City of Denton

Name: Rvk Studios
Description: RVK Studios is a production company focusing on film and television. he company’s director and chairman of the board is Baltasar Kormákur who is a highly acclaimed director, writer and producer on an international scale.In the last decade Rvk Studios has had great success with our own movies; Jar City, The Deep, Virgin Mountain and The Oath. Rvk Studios were associate producers on Baltasar Kormákur’s Everest. The TV series Trapped produced by Rvk Studios, has now been distributed to over 100 territories, gaining great success, both critically and in audience numbers.

Name: Bionaut
Description: Bionaut is an award-winning Czech film and television production company based in Prague and founded in 1999. It ranks among top five Czech production companies in terms of output and turnover. It produces film and television projects of all genres, drama, documentary, animation, etc. It has been awarded, amongst others, an International Emmy award (for the TV series #martyisdead) and Czech Lion and Czech Film Critics Awards. In 2015, Bionaut expanded its scope to include three new labels for different specific genres: Bionaut Animation for animation, Bionaut Docs for documentaries and Bionaut Dark for English-language genre films. It has a subsidiary company: Bionaut Works, a service division, which provides service production and co-production support to projects in the Czech Republic, Poland and Slovakia. In order to develop, produce and distribute international TV and genre projects, joint ventures have been established in Poland (Kosmonaut), Slovakia (Raketa) and Serbia (Aeronaut).

Name: Check Films
Description:
Somos uma produtora de filmes publicitários com atuação em todo o Brasil. 

Nosso estilo de produção é independente, livre & criativo. Imprimimos nossa identidade em todos nossos projetos, da pré-produção à distribuição, acompanhando nossos clientes, anunciantes e agências.

Name: Automatic Films LLC
Description: A well-crafted video is a powerful, proven communications tool that can engage and inspire action. Automatic Films has the experience, expertise and passion to bring your vision to life with an authentic and compelling story.

Name: Milestone
Description:
Milestone - Vidéaste & Photographe. 

Couvre tous vos projets commerciaux, artistiques et événements !

Vidéos d'entreprise, shootings photo, clips musicaux, mariages & co !

Faites nous confiance pour la création de votre contenu au rendu cinématique !

Description:
Capri Entertainment è una società di produzione cinematografica e televisiva fondata da Virginia Valsecchi nel 2018 con sede a Roma. 

L’obbiettivo è di realizzare progetti dal taglio innovativo e raccontare storie con un nuovo punto di vista che possano intercettare nuove generazioni. Il nostro scopo è di realizzare contenuti di alta qualità per un mercato internazionale.

Description:
