Name: The Aerial Film Company
Description:
The Aerial Film Company provide complete, end-to-end to aerial filming services for TV, Film, Commercials and Music Video productions. Our services include:

Helicopters  |  Camera Systems  |  Drones  |  Picture Ships  |  Pilots  |  Camera Operators  |  DoP  |  Helicopter Stunts  |  Equipment Transfer  |  Helicopter & Jet Charter

We operate some the latest generation helicopters and camera systems, including the Shotover K1 and H125 helicopter. All our equipment is in-house, minimising risks, although we can source any additional gear that's required for a production.

Name: Federal Film Akademi
Description:
Özel İstanbul Oyunculuk Ve Seslendirme Kursu; Federal Film Akademi markasıyla T.C. Milli Eğitim Bakanlığı’na bağlı oyunculuk, dublaj ve seslendirme, kurumsal diksiyon ve güzel konuşma eğitimleri veren resmi bir eğitim kurumudur.
Bizzat sektörün içinden yetişmiş olan 21 yıllık dublaj sanatçısı, Walt Disney’in de Türkiye Fragman sesi Kadir ÖZÜBEK tarafından kurulmuştur.
 	Federal Film Akademi alanında uzman eğitmenleriyle ilgili sektörlere mesleki becerilerini kazanmış bireyler yetiştirmeyi amaçlar.
Aynı zamanda günlük hayatta her bireyin ihtiyacı olan doğru iletişim yeteneklerini geliştirerek öz güvenli bir şekilde, iş ve özel yaşamlarında başarılı olmalarını arzular.
Çünkü Federal Film Akademi hayatın her alanını sunum olarak görür ve şuna inanır:
‘’Dünyanın en iyi fikrine, kötü bir sunum yaparak kimseyi ikna edemezsiniz. Oysa kötü bir fikir bile iyi bir sunumla dünyanın en iyi fikri haline dönüşebilir.’’
         İyi bir sunum doğru ve etkili konuşabilmekten geçer. Bu yeteneği mesleğe dönüştürebilmek için de tecrübe paylaşımı şarttır. Her çırak doğal olarak ustasına benzer.
       Onun içindir ki Federal Film Akademi usta-çırak eğitimine büyük önem verir ve sizler için sektörün en iyi ustalarını bir araya getirir.

We’re not starting over.

At xoPost, craft isn’t just what we do - it’s how we connect.

Name: AIR-FLIGHT-FILMS
Description:
Videos müssen mehr als nur gut sein – sie müssen sofort performen.

Name: International Short Film Festival Oberhausen
Description:
The International Short Film Festival Oberhausen has been a catalyst and showcase for current developments in the short form since 1954, a forum for often controversial discussions, a discoverer of new trends and talents and, last but not least, one of the most important short film institutions worldwide. Oberhausen is the oldest short film festival in the world and the largest festival in North Rhine-Westphalia, with around 6,000 films submitted each year, approximately 500 films in the festival programme and over 1,000 accredited professional visitors annually.

Festival Director: Dr. Lars Henrik Gass

Name: Plate Pros
Description:
At PlatePros, we specialize in photographic realistic virtual environments.  We started this journey 18 years ago by capturing driving plates, and since then have been at the forefront of advancing this technology, as well as creating bespoke arrays to capture subway plates, rooftops, and translite backgrounds.

We offer an ever growing library of pre-stitched, high-resolution driving plates from locations across the nation.  If you don’t find exactly what you're looking for in our library, we’ll shoot it for you—custom plates, tailored to your specs, delivered with the same expertise and quality we bring to every production.

We’ve collaborated on thousands of projects with VFX teams, camera departments, and post-production houses worldwide; from the smallest student film to multi-million dollar budget features, we strive to ensure you are fully armed with the knowledge and materials you need to tell the stories that captivate you.

Whether union or non-union, our crews bring deep technical know-how and on-set agility to help you capture exactly what your workflow demands. We’re here to make your pipeline smoother and your results exceptional.

Name: Muy al Sur Films
Description:
Muy al Sur Films es una productora audiovisual especializada tanto en el arte cinematográfico como publicitario. Nos dedicamos a crear historias que no solo capturen la atención del espectador, sino que también logren dejar una huella perdurable a lo largo del tiempo. 

Nuestro enfoque se basa en la combinación de una narrativa poderosa con una producción de alta calidad, lo que nos permite desarrollar piezas cinematográficas que son a la vez creativas y apasionantes. 

En cada proyecto, ponemos todo nuestro esfuerzo para asegurar que el contenido que generamos no solo cumpla con los estándares más altos de la industria, sino que también conecte de manera auténtica y profunda con el público, trascendiendo más allá de lo visual para convertirse en experiencias memorables.

Name: Loba Produções
Description:
A Loba Produções é uma produtora cultural e audiovisual focada em narrativas com perspectiva feminina e projetos de impacto social. Atuando por meio de leis de incentivo e investimento privado, a Loba desenvolve e realiza obras de alta qualidade, com forte viés literário e compromisso com a transformação cultural.

A Loba Produções nasce do encontro entre paixão literária, propósito social e vocação audiovisual, se posicionando como uma produtora que conjuga curadoria narrativa e estética, compromisso institucional e estratégia de impacto com profundidade. Sua força está justamente na interseção entre literatura, audiovisual e transformação cultural, com foco em narrativas femininas e experiências criativas de alto valor simbólico e social. - Lemos Consultoria e Artis Cultural

Name: TF1 FILMS PRODUCTION TELEVISION FRANCAISE 1 FILMS PRODUCTION
Netherlands Society of Cinematographers (NSC)
Description:
NSC is short for the Netherlands Society of Cinematographers. The association stands for good governance and improving creative-, technical- and business opportunities under which camera people -DoP's- achieve their business goals.
Since the start of the association in 1994 the aim of NSC is to cooperate with national- and international organizations within the professional film industry.
Exchange of knowledge and cooperation between members is the major task of the society.
Membership takes place on invitation and introduction by NSC members. NSC also accepts associated and supporting members.
Relationships with respected and leading parties in the film- and television industry are encouraged based on the goals of the NSC society.

Name: BEDESCHI FILM S.R.L.
Description:
Bedeschi Film – Production Ideas
We are a team. Based in Milan since 2002. Our work is our passion. Commercials, branded and digital content, short and feature films, institutional & music videos these are the challenges we face every day.

Mission
We aim to produce high quality video content using a dynamic and creative approach. 

How we do it
We like to give every production project our creative approach. We scout locally and worldwide to find the right talent for each task we are assigned. Furthermore we inspire and raise young up and coming talents. Under Giovanni Bedeschi’s experienced guidance young directors are given the chance to develop their own style and contribute to assignments with fresh insight.

Bedeschi Film – Production Ideas
Siamo una squadra. Operativa a Milano dal 2002 il nostro lavoro è la nostra passione. Spot, branded e digital content, corto e lungometraggi, filmati istituzionali, video musicali sono le sfide che accettiamo ogni giorno.

Mission
Produrre contenuti video di alta qualità, con un approccio dinamico e creativo. Amiamo sperimentare differenti tipi di linguaggi video.

Cosa facciamo
Amiamo trasmettere la nostra creatività in ogni
produzione. Facciamo scouting in tutto il mondo per trovare il giusto talento per ogni progetto. Non ci fermiamo qui: alleviamo giovani talenti, giovani registi guidati dall’esperienza di Giovanni Bedeschi al raggiungimento di un proprio stile narrativo.

Na Brisk Films, criamos vídeos que resolvem.

Mais do que uma produtora, somos parceiros estratégicos na construção de soluções audiovisuais pensadas para comunicar, engajar e gerar resultado.

Chegamos com a agilidade que o mercado pede, a criatividade que o conteúdo precisa e o comprometimento de quem já esteve do outro lado — no planejamento, no marketing, na venda.

We are a production service company in Lisbon serving clients from all over the world for their filming in Portugal and beyond.

It all started rather modestly back in 1993, when we were asked by friends to help out on music video shoots. From there it grew and over the years we've worked on countless commercials and music videos as well as being involved in the production of TV series, documentaries, short and feature films, and organizing stills shoots.

We can therefore say with some confidence that we have the experience, the knowledge and the network required to deliver a smooth-running production for the most demanding directors. That's our commitment!

Our production teams and technical crews are multi-lingual, experienced and close-knit. Our approach is positive and calm but efficient; we leave no stone unturned to achieve excellence. And we do it with a smile because we love what we do.

“Check, double-check and then check again” – that’s the mantra that our team members are taught to always bear in mind.

Welcome to SouthWest Productions for all your filming in Portugal... and beyond!

Name: Arab Film Festival
Description:
The mission of the Arab Film Festival (AFF) is to enhance public understanding of Arab culture and to provide alternative representations of Arabs that contradict the stereotypical images frequently encountered in the American mass media. The Arab Film Festival screens films from and about the Arab World that provide realistic perspectives on Arab people, culture, art, history and politics.

The Arab Film Festival is the largest independent annual showcase of Arab films and filmmakers in the country. The festival has an international standing and is considered one of the most important Arab film festivals outside the Arab world. It strives to present the best contemporary films that provide insight into the beauty, complexity and diversity of the Arab world alongside realistic perspectives on Arab people, culture, art, history and politics.

Name: Cinema Devices
Description: Cinema Devices was born out of a desire to be leaders in innovative production equipment.  Our unique gear is made with a simple philosophy in mind, to bring a level of production value to any shoot in any situation.  Be it a documentary that requires travel to difficult locations or in a studio, our versatile technology allows productions to achieve shots that would otherwise require larger equipment and time consuming setups, as well as produce shots that couldn't be achieved any other way.

Name: Czech Film Commission
Description:
The Czech Film Commission serves primarily international feature film, television, commercial and video production companies and filmmakers by providing consultation, guidance and contacts.

We are the most comprehensive resource for information about filmmaking locally, from legal requirements and permits, to talent and tips on where to throw your wrap party.

We link international filmmakers to the local audiovisual infrastructure and to local authorities. And the communication goes two ways. We also listen to the developing needs of film industry professionals and communicate those to municipal and state institutions to ensure the Czech Republic remains a competitive partner on a global level.

Our services include:
- Providing all relevant information about conditions and possibilities for filming in the Czech Republic
- Connecting producers with the right local service providers, crews, facilities and other partners
- Assisting with preliminary location scouting
- Providing consultation on the Czech rebate scheme
- Acting as liaison with local authorities

Please contact us with your questions about shooting in the Czech Republic. We speak Filmmaking.

Description:
GENTLE GANTS Motion Picture Entertainment with gentleness and sensitivity strives to achieve GIANT dreams GGMPE seeks to collaborate with like minded Passionate & Committed fellow Dreamers. 

GENTLE GIANTS MPE in its endeavour invites alliance with  Corporate and Individual Investors, Angel Investors, Amazing Filmmakers, Content Creators, Out of The Box ,Unique & Original Thinkers, Storytellers & OTHER fellow GENTLE GIANTS.

GENTLE GIANTS Motion Picture Entertainment also known as GENTLE GIANTS MPE is a Film and Audio Visual Content Production Company registered under the Registrar of Companies , Government of India. It is soon slated to become a member of  the Indian Motion Picture Producers Association (IMPPA)Mumbai. 
 
GGMPE's Vision
 
GENTLE GIANTS Motion Picture Entertainment is committed to reach the masses with beautiful, heart touching, soulful true stories, experiences and content with a desire to ENGAGE, ENTERTAIN AND EDUCATE!

GENTLE GIANTS MPE is creating FEATURE FILMS, SHORT FILMS, WEB SERIES, WEB FILMS,CORPORATE FILMS & VIDEOS, DOCUMENTARIES, MUSIC VIDEOS AND OTHER AUDIOVISUAL CONTENT. It is also engaging with new technology in VR, AR for storytelling and communication. Since its formation in 2020 GENTLE GIANTS MPE is in the process of Co- Producing Feature Films and Web Series.

GENTLE GIANTS MPE is open to associate with Individuals and organisations that endorse GENTLE GIANTS MPE’s vision to ENGAGE, ENTERTAIN AND EDUCATE.

GENTLE GIANTS Motion Picture Entertainment works with professionals ethics and  with extraordinary skills through its GENTLE team members who are GIANTS & PIONEERS in their respective fields of Film making, Finance, Technology,Education, Social Change, Marketing, Branding, Market Research, Advertising, PR & Press, Celebrity Management and World Class Events. 

We are here to Engage, Emtertain & Educate . Since you want your dream project to be realized- Get in touch with your dream team at the GENTLE GIANTS MPE immediately!

Name: Grupo Storm
Description:
O Grupo Storm se inspira em criatividade e pensamento crítico para desenvolver projetos audiovisuais e tecnológicos voltados para o meio ambiente. A integração de áreas tão distintas traz ao Grupo Storm um novo modelo de negócios focado em credibilidade, visibilidade, sustentabilidade e responsabilidade social.
 
Na área audiovisual, produzimos filmes, documentários, séries de TV e branded content a partir de roteiros criativos e diferenciados sobre ciência, tecnologia, meio ambiente, história e cultura. 
Na área de tecnologia, desenvolvemos projetos e produtos inovadores. Atuamos na prestação de serviços e no desenvolvimento de projetos de pesquisa com foco em monitoramento climático e meteorológico.


Instagram: instagram.com/grupostorm

Location: São José dos Campos, São Paulo

Name: SPIRA
Description:
Spira est une coopérative vouée au cinéma indépendant dont le principal mandat est de soutenir la production et la distribution de films, qu’il s’agisse de courts ou de longs métrages. Une trentaine d’œuvres voient le jour chaque année grâce à ses programmes de soutien à la création, dont celui, très populaire, de location d’équipement. Spira distribue également des œuvres documentaires et de fiction sur les différents marchés au Canada et à l’étranger : festivals, salles de cinéma, télévision, Web, etc.

Spira contribue activement au dynamisme et au développement de la communauté cinématographique de Québec par la tenue de formations, de classes de maître, de projets collectifs et d’activités de réseautage.

Stimuler l’intérêt du public pour le cinéma fait aussi partie des objectifs de la coopérative. C’est dans cette optique que Spira organise des événements de projection tout au long de l’année, dans différents lieux de la ville de Québec, en collaboration avec des festivals et des organismes locaux. De plus, il est dorénavant possible de visionner sur son site Web, des films issus de son catalogue de plus de 300 titres.

La vision artistique de Spira s’articule autour d’un idéal coopératif qui mise sur la communauté, l’entraide et la mise à disposition de ressources afin de permettre l’avancement de la pratique cinématographique, spécifiquement dans un contexte de production et de distribution  indépendantes. Cette vision se traduit autant par le modèle de gestion de l'organisme que par la nature des activités et des services offerts aux membres et au milieu des arts médiatiques.

Nous croyons à la consolidation de la communauté à Québec et voulons offrir aux créateurs et créatrices indépendant.es les moyens de leurs ambitions en soutenant principalement des projets locaux et régionaux, mais aussi de la grande région de Montréal.

Name: Asian World Film Festival
Description:
WE CHAMPION, RECOGNIZE AND UNITE THROUGH CINEMA

With TheWrap as official media partner, the Asian World Film Festival (AWFF) brings the best of a broad selection of Asian World cinema to Los Angeles in order to draw greater recognition to the region's wealth of filmmakers, strengthening ties between the Asian and Hollywood film industries.

Uniting through cross-cultural collaboration, our festival champions films from 50 countries across Asia spanning from Turkey to Japan and Russia to India.

All films that participate in the Festival will have a unique chance to be guided through the challenging awards season, showcasing their foreign films to the Oscar Academy, the Hollywood Foreign Press Association and all Guilds for enhanced exposure, media attention and awards consideration.

The Asian World Film Festival is organized under Aitysh USA, a 501(c)(3) charitable non-profit organization.

Troya Film Platform is a film development and co-production platform that revitalizes Turkey's cinema industry, offers collaborative opportunities for local projects, and enhances the connections between Turkey and the global film industry by fostering co-production opportunities.

Name: Habbekrats Amsterdam
Description:
Habbekrats is a creative film company flourishing at the intersection of cinema, advertising and contemporary culture. That means we live to make film, know how to sell it and love to see it becoming part of something greater. We are based in Amsterdam, but consider the world as our playground.

Founded in 2004 and firmly rooted in street culture, we will always be interested in things unseen, untold or unwanted. Our mission is to bring compelling stories of our time to a relevant audience.

At Habbekrats we specialize in developing, producing and marketing film projects. While some think the film industry is being threatened, we believe this is the most exciting time when it comes to being a production company. With industry paradigms changing everyday, keeping an open perspective is our strategy for growth. 

Our deep and sincere involvement stretches from developing a filmmaker's idea into a movie until creating the marketing campaign and release strategy together with a distributor.

Name: Les Films du Chêne Rond
Description: Les Films du Chêne Rond rassemblent une famille de jeunes talents, les accompagnent dans l’émergence et l’accomplissement de leurs créations, qu’il s’agisse de longs-métrages, de séries, de courts-métrages ; de fictions ou de documentaires ; qu’elles soient destinées au cinéma, à la télévision, ou aux plateformes.

Name: Digi60 Filmmakers' Festival
Description:
The Digi60 Filmmakers' Festival was founded on the principle that new and emerging filmmakers would be encouraged to create short films, and be able to screen them in a setting that provided a real world film festival experience, complete with jury evaluation, awards, and gala. We have seen many Digi60 Alumni go on to become professional members of the film and television industry. The festival also aims to promote Ottawa as a sustainable film industry destination with desirable cast and crew available for hire.

Digi60 is not just about making films. We also make filmmakers.

Our goal is to be the best growth graphic design company in all of Saudi arabia . 	
 
The meaning of Mohra comes from the Arabic word female white Arabian horse - she stands out from all the others - known for her furious speed and beauty .

Name: Festival Européen du Court Métrage de Bordeaux
Description: Créé en 1996 par l'association Extérieur Nuit, le Festival Européen du Court-Métrage de Bordeaux met à l’honneur l’art du court-métrage, un format parfois méconnu du grand public qui se caractérise pourtant par une grande liberté artistique et qui est souvent à l’origine de nombreuses révélations. Il s’agit d’une véritable occasion pour les jeunes talents européens de s’exprimer à travers le 7e art. Une vingtaine de courts-métrages sont présentés lors des soirées de projection qui ont lieu à l’UGC Ciné Cité de Bordeaux.

Name: Alpha Grip
Description:
Alpha Grip began life at Pinewood Studios and has recently relocated to a new 5000 sq ft facility at Shepperton Studios. Whilst still maintaining a presence at Pinewood, we are proud to be based within the heart of the British film and television industry. Alpha Grip operates all over the UK and Europe working recently in Ireland, Finland and as far a field as Hong Kong and South America. 

Alpha Grip service and support all genres of production. From million pound feature films, live entertainment, TV drama, pop promos & commercials.

Alpha Grip also supply:

•	  Telescopic and modular cranes (up to 52ft) including track. 
•	  Multi axis remote heads, including 3D capability. 
•	  Alpha and Scorpio Stabilised Heads 
•	  All terrain tracking vehicles 
•	  Scorpio Stabilised Remote Arm  
•	  And of course the usual array of Chapman & Fisher Dollies, tripods and heads.

We stock an impressive range of telescopic and modular camera cranes. From the Super TechnoCrane, MovieBird, Grip Factory Munich and the very latest Technodolly which has repeatable and precise camera movements. We also have our very own Alpha Jib, a light weight, durable and easy to set up in 1m sections giving a maximum reach of 3m (14ft).  

Alpha Grip can also boast the very latest in stabilised technology using the Alpha Stabilised Head from Geo Films and the new Scorpio Head from Service Vision.  We also offer the SL Pod, Pee-pods, Track Pod, 2&3 Axis Scorpio Remote Heads and the Mega Remote Head 3.

Name: Catalunya Film Commission
Description: Catalunya Film Commission is part of the Catalan film fund and the first contact point for filmmakers interested in shooting in the region. It provides guidance on accessing funds through the minority coproduction fund available to Catalan companies or via the 30% tax rebate available in Spain. It also acts as a link to the local audiovisual infrastructure and to local authorities and offers a comprehensive database of locations and companies. All our services are free.

Name: Love International Film Festival Mons
Description:
Un festival de cinéma au thème universel !
Le Festival de Mons explore depuis trois décennies le thème de « l'Amour » à travers une programmation internationale composée d'un grand nombre de films inédits et dans laquelle se rejoignent qualité et plaisir de cinéma.

Un espace de rencontre en plein renouveau!
Relancé en 2019 par une nouvelle équipe et une nouvelle dynamique, le Festival de Mons est un rendez-vous cinématographique interculturel et intergénérationnel, un espace de rencontre pour le grand public et les cinéphiles venus partager les émotions du grand écran et rencontrer des personnalités du cinéma.

Un événement international ancré dans une ville qui aime la culture !
Riche d'une longue histoire et d'une identité singulière, le festival rayonne depuis plusieurs décennies sur le plan international. C'est ainsi près de 4000 invités en provenance de tous les continents qui ont foulé les pavés d'une ville devenue Capitale Européenne de la Culture en 2015.

Name: Hand Held Films, Inc.
Description:
Hand Held Films is a leading camera rental facility based out of New York in the heart of Chelsea, specializing in the latest motion picture equipment. Our philosophy is to provide customer service and meticulously maintained equipment to our clientele, offering the finest gear manufactured by the most respected names in the industry.

Hand Held Films has expanded to include an impressive collection of digital equipment throughout the years, in addition to a full grip and lighting department. We offer high definition digital cameras, lenses and accessories, alongside our well-established inventory of film equipment. 

Our professional and thorough staff has allowed Hand Held to enjoy tremendous success over the year, catering to both large and small productions. We have provided gear to numerous independent features, television series, music videos and commercials.

Recent commercial clients include Toyota, Sony, Prada, Donna Karan.

Name: KinoCaen
Description:
• Bienvenue sur la page LinkedIn de KinoCaen !

Chaque session se conclut par une projection publique et gratuite. Le KinoCaen XII aura lieu cette année du 11 au 18 mai 2023 !
 
• Depuis 2018, KinoCaen accueille la Fête du Court métrage, pour enrichir sa programmation de nombreuses projections, animations et surprises. 

• Par ailleurs, depuis trois ans, l’association KinoCaen multiplie les projets auprès de partenaires divers, ateliers de création, actions culturelles, tournages ouverts au public...

• Vous pouvez nous contacter sur l'adresse mail : festivalkinocaen@gmail.com

Name: Wolf VFX
Description:
Wolf VFX started to take shape at the beginning of 2010 as a postproduction "boutique" company, when several artists with over fifteen years' experience in some of the most renowned postproduction houses in Argentina decided to go their own way.

Our main field of expertise is visual effects, which contribute to putting the pieces together without being the main character in a piece of work. We always think that we have made a good job when the audience has a hard time distinguishing what has been shot from the visual effects. We always try to approach a piece in the least destructive way. We are like that great secondary character whose performance is essential to grasp the message conveyed by the film.

We are mostly specialized in chroma keys, matte painting, skin and hair beauty, crowd multiplication, CG crowd simulations, fluids simulations, fumes, particles, pack shots 3D, CG objects/characters, stereoscopic 3D, CG interfaces, high-end compositing and color correction.

Name: KeyFramed
Description:
Bij KeyFramed erkennen we het probleem. U wilt gebruik maken van video om uw boodschap over te brengen, maar de traditionele methoden lijken gewoon niet te werken. Het is tijd voor een frisse benadering – een benadering die de kosten beheersbaar maakt, de complexiteit wegneemt en echte resultaten oplevert.

Bij KeyFramed geloven we in samenwerking. We luisteren naar uw visie, begrijpen uw doelen en werken nauw met u samen om een videoproject te creëren dat de kern van uw boodschap vastlegt en impact maakt. Onze toewijding als filmmaker aan kwaliteit en creativiteit drijft ons om steeds verder te gaan en het buitengewone te bereiken.

Wij staan voor hoogwaardige producties die voldoen aan de hedendaagse kwalitatieve standaarden.

Name: Bella Luna Productions LLC
Description:
Bella Luna Productions is an independent film production company based in Marshalltown, Iowa. Our mission is to produce insightful, intelligent and entertaining narrative films for the domestic and European market. 

It is our hope to create a hub of filmmaking activity far removed from the mainstream. We are inspired by the light, space and people of Iowa, and Marshalltown in particular, by its personality, humor, generosity of spirit, and historic ties to European cinema through the ground-breaking work of Marshalltown-born actress Jean Seberg.

Name: Filmple
Description: Filmple diventa una scelta strategica per le produzioni che operano nel settore cinematografico e pubblicitario. È un sistema che ti permetterà di semplificare tutte le fasi della produzione, avendo la possibilità di reperire attrezzature e facilities, di trovare location, di gestire tutta la fase di produzione esecutiva e di collaborare con crew di professionisti affidabili.

Name: Pris Audiovisuais
Description:
A PRIS Audiovisuais pertence a um grupo de empresas nacionais, liderado pela holding IEG, com atividade nos mercados audiovisuais e media.
As restantes empresas que integram este grupo são a Ecoplay e a Ecogames no mercado de distribuição de videojogos e acessórios.

Fundada em 1984 a PRIS Audiovisuais tornou-se numa das empresas pioneiras da distribuição de home vídeo em Portugal.

Desde então desenvolveu competências que a transformam numa das top players nacionais de entretenimento, tendo expandido a sua atividade para as áreas de cinema, televisão e new media.

Hoje a PRIS é um dos líderes de referência do mercado nacional de distribuição de home vídeo e cinema, representando e tendo no seu portfólio conteúdos dos mais importantes licenciadores mundiais desta área: Sony Pictures, 20th Century Fox, MGM, Lucas FIlms, Lionsgate, Focus Features, The Weinstein Company, Pathé, Filmantion, TF1, BBC, ITV, Freemantle, Jim Henson, Nelvana, entre outras.

Durante estes anos de atividade, a PRIS Audiovisuais estabeleceu laços sólidos com os diversos agentes do mercado e adquiriu um know-how de eleição que se reflete no constante desenvolvimento das nossas operações e dos nossos resultados, bem como na experiência e conhecimento adquiridos pela nossa vasta equipa de colaboradores exclusivamente dedicados a este negócio.

Description:

Name: Stay Gold Features
Description: Stay Gold Features is a film fund and production company established to produce films by auteur directors. Inspired by the last words of THE OUTSIDERS’ Johnny Cade, “Stay gold, Ponyboy,” our mission is to stay true to the integrity and high quality of movies that we admire and to partner with the most progressive and innovative filmmakers of our time. Stay Gold Features will produce elevated content that is at once intelligent and commercial; our films will push boundaries by exploring the human condition, making audiences laugh, cry, and converse. As illustrated by historical success, Stay Gold will continue to work with filmmakers who have extraordinary vision and whose gift as storytellers sets their films apart from the pack.

Name: EURYBIA FILMS
Description:
Eurybia Films is a creative production company with corporate headquarters in Milan which operates between Italy and the United States. 

Founded by Sabrina Digregorio, producer and director, who after her experience with Atena Films of which she was Founder and President, decided to found a new and international project with the intent to create format video, digital contents and film projects.

Eurybia Films obtained, within an international panorama, the trust of Institutions, Enterprises and Audiences for technical and quality skills of its own productions. It translates the most innovative ideas into reality for the distribution of the completed product.

Thanks to its background in cinema, animation and communication, Eurybia realizes strategies focused on the brand’s needs and creative contents and communications campaigns online and offline.

We develop original contents for entertainment, for use in museums, cultural projects, exhibits and events, projects of Virtual Reality and augmented Reality.

In Eurybia Films we produce video for small and medium-sized enterprises, E-commerce, and single professionals who want to create and strengthen their proper brands.

We’re based in Boston, but we work with storytellers and  documentary filmmakers all over the country. Pick from one of our standard Legacy Video packages or call us to create a custom video that will be perfect for you.    

Visit us online at www.legacyvideostories.com and get started on plannig your legacy.

Name: Fundació Festival de Cinema de Girona
Description:
El CINEMA té la capacitat de TRANSFORMAR el món.

El propòsit del Festival és despertar i confrontar el talent del món a Girona. Tot això dins d'una amable competició que genera trobades i intercanvis entre el talent de les diferents sectorials cinematogràfiques, incloent la producció. Això dóna lloc a nous projectes més participatius, més creatius, més possibilitats de coproducció i de finançament. 

El talent només es desenvolupa confrontant-se amb el talent

1.    És un PROJECTE SECTORIAL de producció cinematogràfica.  
2.    El Festival de Girona NO ÉS UN TEMPS DE LLEURE, és un Congrés Internacional de Talent. 
3.    El cinema té la capacitat d'EDUCAR i TRANSFORMAR el món. La clau d’aquest canvi la tenim els cineastes.
4.    El Festival de cinema de Girona és més que un projecte, és una REVOLUCIÓ imparable. Té l'IMPULS i el SUPORT del talent de més de 100 països.
5.    Més de QUARANTA PAÏSOS ENS SUBVENCIONEN els viatges i estada del seu talent a Girona. Perquè el nostre projecte forma part dels seus objectius.
6.    El cinema és un moviment AGLUTINADOR de totes les sectorials creatives. 
7.    És un MOTOR ECONÒMIC i SOCIAL que enriqueix a tots els sectors del país. 
8.    El talent internacional que participa a Girona, arriba amb la imatge preconcebuda que: al nostre es passa gana i hi ha corrupció.

Name: Baltic Film & Creative Tech Cluster
Description:
Baltic Film & Creative Tech Cluster is a leading business cluster based in Lithuania that works with major film, media, digital art, immersive reality and game companies in Lithuania and in neighbouring regions.

Baltic Film & Creative Tech Cluster is newly merged cluster out of leading film & creative tech institutions in Lithuania: Nebula Cluster and Vilnius Film Cluster. Cluster’s vision is to make Lithuania a leading producer of audiovisual content and products in the East and Central Europe that would constitute at least 1% of national GDP. It also aims to strengthen the relationships between different industry bodies to cooperate on industry problems and better implement strategic goals. 

Baltic Film & Creative Tech Cluster works with more than 80 companies that operate in film, immersive reality and gaming sectors. They are helped by a team of 5 experienced professionals that develop infrastructure projects, provide support for the companies, help to develop new R&D projects, organize networking events, training programmes, develop communication material and country branding tools.

Name: Briciolafilm
Description:
Briciolafilm è una casa di produzione indipendente e una bottega artigiana dell’audiovisivo.

Crediamo che questo mestiere non sia soltanto un mercato, ma anche una responsabilità culturale.
Per questo lavoriamo sul tempo dei progetti, sulla cura delle immagini e sulle relazioni, scegliendo la qualità come metodo e non come etichetta.

Sviluppiamo e produciamo cinema, documentari e contenuti per i brand con un’idea precisa:
realizzare immagini che abbiano senso oggi e che possano restare domani.

Lavoriamo al fianco di clienti, brand e case di produzione italiane e internazionali come partner produttivo, mettendo a disposizione esperienza, conoscenza del territorio e un approccio sartoriale.

Offriamo service di produzione per cinema, documentari, pubblicità e contenuti branded; produzione esecutiva per produzioni nazionali e internazionali in Italia; supporto al tax credit e alla strutturazione produttiva dei progetti; coordinamento di troupe, casting, location e post-produzione.

Ogni progetto viene seguito con responsabilità e rispetto, dal primo sviluppo alla consegna finale
.
.
.
Briciolafilm is an independent production company focused on crafted, grounded visual storytelling.

We believe filmmaking is not only a market, but a cultural responsibility.
That’s why we work with care on projects, images and relationships, choosing quality as a working method.

We develop and produce films, documentaries and branded content with a clear goal: creating images that make sense today and can last over time.

We partner with brands, clients and Italian and international production companies, offering experience, local knowledge and a tailored production approach.

Our services include production services, executive production in Italy, Italian tax credit support, and coordination of crews, casting, locations and post-production.

Every project is handled with responsibility and respect, from development to final delivery.

Name: Marina Studios
Description:
Founded by Marina Cappi, Marina Studios is one of the nation’s only female-owned and operated production studios committed to offering the best vendors and most innovative technologies for film production. Marina Studios is home to ‘Whitney Houston: I Wanna Dance With Somebody’, ‘The Collaboration’, and ‘THUG’.

Marina Studios offers the largest soundstage in the Boston area, with two unique filming destinations within minimal distance of Boston’s Logan International Airport. The studio’s Quincy campus is nestled in the picturesque Marina Bay; a waterfront community overlooking Boston Harbor with breathtaking views of the city skyline. This state-of-the-art studio covers over 26,000 square feet, with an additional 15,000 square feet of multi-use production office space and a three-acre backlot. Located 30 minutes west of Boston is Marina Studios’ Canton location, comprised of 32,000 square feet of studio space and an additional 14,000 square feet of office space. With several hotels and restaurants nearby, this charming area is perfect for capturing a true New England feel. The Studio’s newest location is currently in development in nearby Watertown.

Name: Digi Filmes
Description:
A fusão de quem é especialista em imagem com quem é autoridade em contar histórias, faz da DigiFilmes uma empresa magnata do segmento audiovisual! Auxiliamos você e sua empresa a ilustrar de forma dinâmica e interativa, o seu conteúdo! 

Nossas parcerias com indústrias, comércios e agências de comunicação servem de sustentação para afirmarmos que "luz, câmera e ação" tem um só nome: DIGIFILMES.

Name: RINK GmbH
Description:
FILM geht nur über Strategie.
Wir leben sie.

Kernbotschaft (Übersicht):

FILM braucht Strategie: Ohne strategisches Denken ist erfolgreicher Film nicht möglich.

Unsere Haltung: Strategie ist kein Werkzeug – sie ist unsere Lebensweise.

Unser Anspruch: Jeder Film entsteht mit durchdachter, kreativer Planung.

Name: Terroir Films
Description:
Siamo una società di produzione cinematografica con sede a Trieste, Italia, impegnata in progetti audio-visivi con una portata globale al servizio di clienti in Europa e Nord America.
Negli ultimi anni, dal punto di vista promozionale, abbiamo lavorato su progetti pubblicitari con importanti agenzie internazionali e straniere come Dentsu, Storytailors, 89up, Gorilla Gorilla!, Mofilm e Havas. Tra i nostri clienti, siamo orgogliosi di collaborare con aziende italiane e internazionali, tra cui il marchio automobilistico Toyota, la catena di ristoranti Olive Garden, il fondo di investimento Angelini Ventures (parte del gruppo farmaceutico Angelini Industries) e la società biotecnologica Gold Standard Diagnostics. Inoltre, abbiamo collaborazioni significative con enti legati al settore pubblico come Promoturismo FVG, la Regione Friuli Venezia Giulia, Area Science Park e il Comune di Trieste. Tra le altre associazioni di rilievo, collaboriamo con Slow Food Italia.

Produciamo film d’autore e collaboriamo con produzioni italiane e straniere per le riprese di film di fiction e documentari. Lavoriamo a stretto contatto con fondi cinematografici locali e nazionali per richiedere finanziamenti dedicati al cinema e ottenere permessi per riprese in luoghi pubblici.


Partendo dalla nostra esperienza di film documentari, realizziamo dei progetti visivi che abbiano una forte componente narrativa e che si discostino dalla tipica pubblicità televisiva. Crediamo che il miglior modo di raccontare un territorio o un’azienda sia un video di breve durata, capace di emozionare e coinvolgere lo spettatore, generando attenzione e trasformandolo in fruitore diretto.

//

ENGLISH VERSION
Terroir Films is a video company based in Trieste, Italy.  This company focuses on producing advertising videos for agribusiness companies and public authorities.

Name: Eye of Edit
Description:
Are you a videographer who’s tired of editing? Let’s face it, you’d rather be out there capturing the next viral moment than stuck behind a screen. That’s where we swoop in!

 Digital Marketing Agencies, we see you! You create campaigns that dazzle and delight, and we’re here to polish those pixels to perfection.

 Production Houses & Companies, it’s time to shine! From corporate to quirky, we edit videos that make your brand look like the rockstar it is.

OUR SERVICES COOK UP A STORM IN:
 USA & Canada
 Australia
 UK

Name: Navarra Tierra de Cine
Description: Un Festival para promocionar Navarra a través del rodaje de cortometrajes en sus localizaciones más singulares.

Name: TIFF
Description:
'The Interpretation of Art needs no Translation'. 

We are not a company, but we are the sum of all people. We are connected to TIFF by our very DNA engraved into every aspect of our creativity and professionalism.

TIFF is a production and multimedia company involved in the construction of indigenous modern stories and professional cinematic production in the Limpopo and Gauteng Provinces. 

We are driven by the potential to impact social change and instilling a sense of industrial growth/development in South Africa. The company functions under the tutelage of industrial professionals on a call-for-duty basis. This led to the founding of TIFF Ninjas Network. 

The Business focuses on 3 core functions which are, Social, Industrial, and Agency. We are motivated to create change in people's lives. We are highly industrial savvy and desire to grow beyond imaginable capacity. We simply love representing Brands.

Name: Global Peace 360°
Description: Global Peace 360° offers a unique platform where the power of dialogue, education, and community engagement unite to inspire positive social change. Through immersive experiences, diverse perspectives, and strategic partnerships, we empower individuals and organizations to foster peace, promote understanding, and drive meaningful impact on a global scale.  Global Peace 360° is a 501(c)3 nonprofit organization and is the producer of the Global Peace Film Festival.

Name: Karua Films
Description:
Por encima de todo somos un equipo de amigxs, con más de 10 años de experiencia en el campo audiovisual. Tras muchos años trabajando juntxs, hemos decidido emprender lado a lado, para construir una productora audiovisual con un objetivo claro: contar historias emotivas con propósitos ambientales, culturales y sociales.

Tomando en cuenta los distintos perfiles profesionales de cada quien y la variada experiencia que hemos adquirido a lo largo del tiempo, somos una empresa capaz de ofrecer múltiples servicios audiovisuales: publicidad online, corporativos e institucionales, cobertura de eventos, animaciones explicativas y contenidos para redes sociales.

Sin embargo, nuestro mayor fuerte es el documental, al servicio de organizaciones, instituciones o empresas, que desean retratar personajes, mostrar contextos, exponer proyectos, exhibir programas o presentar paisajes. Nuestra mayor pasión es capturar momentos reales, para motivar, enseñar y generar emociones en el espectador.

Name: Vesuvius Film Partners
Description:
Vesuvius Film Partners is a privately owned motion picture finance organization providing a range of investment and advisory services to clients in the international feature film industry. We work with both independent production companies and studios, raising finance and investing directly in only exceptional quality feature film projects with excellent market potential and guaranteed yields. 

We specialize in equity, gap, mezzanine, senior debt and P&A finance for feature film budgets of all ranges, raising finance for production clients via our international network of institutional and retail investors, private wealth funds, VCT/EIS funds and through our private database of corporate investment clients, executive producers and sophisticated investors. We offer secure loans in first position to motion picture production companies against guaranteed income sources such as tax credits and pre-sales.

We pride ourselves on being experts in the feature film finance industry and look forward to ensuring the successful realization of our clients’ film finance objectives. Our management team has been hand picked from some of the finest professionals in both the feature film and corporate finance industries, and represents combined over 100 years of direct film experience. To date our team members have been responsible for securing and managing over €2 billion of investment for feature film projects from around the world, and our access to talent, projects and investment is growing fast. To learn more please explore our website further and contact us with your individual requirements.

Find us on Facebook: http://www.facebook.com/group.php?gid=299915040895&ref=ts

Name: Spinning Path
Description:
We make films that are different. Daringly different. We’re offbeat. Genre-defying.

Spinning Path creates distinctive fiction films, documentaries and music videos.

We believe that director-led work is always best. True to the creator’s vision and free from constraints. But we’re also about championing emerging talent and allowing the cast and crew we work with to bring their own spin on things.

Spinning Path started when Producer Simeon Costello and Writer/Director Tommy Gillard crossed paths in deepest Devon. Building on a shared love of weird cinema, they sought to create equally obscure short films. And they haven’t looked back.

Working with a pool of talent across the South West, Spinning Path has made four films to date, from a gloriously gothic Super 8 silent vampire short to a sweaty, homoerotic portrayal of…badminton

Name: SHOOTnPOST tonbüro GmbH
Description:
Tonpostproduktion, Sounddesign, Sprachaufnahmen und Filmmusik für Kinofilme, TV, Serien, Dokumentationen, Animation und viele weitere audio-visuelle Werke. 

Wir unterstützen Filmemacher und Produzenten bei der Gestaltung ihrer Produktionen mit kreativem Engagement, unserer über 20-jährigen Erfahrung als Studio mit integriertem workflow für alle Phasen der Vertonung und High End Equipment in großzügigen Räumlichkeiten mitten in Berlins am stärksten wachsenden Technik- und Medienzentrum.

Als Mitglied im Studio Netzwerk SHOOT’N’POST bieten wir die eigenständige Integration unserer Arbeiten in die technische Drehbetreuung, Vermietung von Kamera und Lichtequipment, Bildpostproduktion und visuelle Effekte an. Wir sind Ansprechpartner, um Filmproduzenten und Filmemachern auf ihre Produktionen hin maßgeschneiderte Komplettlösungen zu schaffen. Fragt uns einfach frühzeitig vor Produktionsbeginn um Angebote an. 

Euer Projekt zu einer erfolgreichen Produktion zu machen, in der Sound und Musik ihre emotionale Stärke entwickeln, daran arbeiten wir mit – verlässlich, kooperativ und lösungsorientiert.

Name: GLP Creative
Description: GLP Creative is a commercial production company and creative content house. Gary Land and Tibor Nemeth are award winning directors and photographers who know how to maximize a client’s content acquisitions. The group works in digital and traditional photography, film, retouching, and editing. Their combined expertise in broadcast and print makes them a full-service partner to some of the largest brands in the world. GLP has built dynamic campaigns for clients such as NASCAR, Nike, Puma, Under Armour, Titleist, Squarespace, Cadillac, Nyquil, and Jack Daniels. Its list of agency partnerships include CP+B, Wieden Kennedy, Publicis, Arnold, Studio 6, Deutsche, Olson and 77 Ventures.

Name: Shipsboy
Description:
Storytelling is at the heart of what we do. We encourage a new generation of diverse filmmaking talents and focus on films that deeply resonate with the audience, leaving them inspired to see the world from a new perspective.

***

SHIPSBOY is a Warsaw-based production company founded in 2013, working on fiction feature films and serialized content. Shipsboy’s main focus is on original stories with potential to reach wide audiences, both nationally and globally. Our recent credits include: Dust (co-production, world premiere in official competition at Berlinale 2026), Red Path (co-production, world premiere at Locarno IFF 2024, Best Film at Red Sea FF 2024), Operation Hyacinth (Netflix Original) critically acclaimed crime drama; Detective Bruno & Detective Bruno. Baltic Gold family adventure comedy serie awarded as the best Polish Family Film at Polish Film Festival 2022 & 2025. Shipsboy is a member of the Polish Producers Alliance.

Name: 601 Producciones Audiovisuales
Description:
www.601.es ya es mayor de edad! 
Nos dedicamos a la producción y realización de vídeo y la producción de contenidos para cine y televisión. Trabajamos con empresas, agencias de publicidad, productoras y cadenas de TV,  instituciones públicas y privadas.

Name: Smak Film
Description:
Smak Film is a Helsinki-based creative house of film and photography. 

OUR MISSION:
The cinematic arts and photography have an unbeatable capacity to touch us deeply. We want to use that potential to the fullest to create meaningful stories and impact. We nurture a love for story in everything we do. 

OUR PLEDGE TO THE CUSTOMER:
We approach each project as if it were our first and last chance to impress the customer and, especially, the viewer.

HOW WE WORK:
Our creative craft is comprised of film and photography. We offer a comprehensive production service from scriptwriting to the finished film or a selection of images. Our project-based teams are hand-picked and scaled from among the best people in the field to maximize value for the customer. We work across genres, from branded content to fiction.

Name: Fresno Films
Description:
In Fresno Films we focus on developing and producing international fiction projects for film, TV and digital platforms. 

Our aim is to produce movies characterized by their high quality and diversity, encouraging particularly European and Latin American productions.

Name: Streax Studios
Description:
Streax Studios stands as a premier destination for those seeking unparalleled excellence in visual media. Specializing in high-quality video editing, 3D video editing, video game trailers, and a myriad of advertisement videos, our craftsmanship is unmatched in the industry. What sets us apart is our unique capability to meticulously replicate any video provided by our clients, ensuring precision and uncompromising quality in every frame.

With a rich portfolio adorned by esteemed clientele including Tokyo 2923, Hyper Ordinals, Unity Academy, and ongoing collaborations with distinguished names like Top Tier Signals, Canna Case, and Beyond, Streax Studios has cemented its reputation as a trailblazer in the realm of visual storytelling.

Our approach is simple yet profound – we tailor our services to meet the exacting needs of our clients, crafting high-impact, engaging videos that resonate with their audience on a profound level. Take, for instance, our recent collaboration with Top Tier Signals, where our advertisement video catapulted their engagement to new heights, leaving an indelible mark on their brand identity.

At Streax Studios, we understand that each client is unique, with distinct visions and objectives. Hence, when reaching out to potential partners, we emphasize our expertise in delivering bespoke solutions that not only meet but exceed their expectations. We invite them to join us in a conversation to explore their current video content needs, where we can illuminate the possibilities and showcase how Streax Studios can elevate their visual media strategy to unprecedented levels of success.

Clients can connect with us seamlessly through various channels, be it phone, email, Discord, or Telegram. We stand ready to accommodate their preferences, scheduling calls or meetings at their convenience, because at Streax Studios, client satisfaction reigns supreme.

Name: Red Egg Entertainment
Description:
With advertisers abandoning traditional 30 second TV ads or expensive marketing campaigns that get skipped and blocked on social platforms and browsers, our vision for the future of ‘pimetime’ is brand-driven storytelling. It's not enough to have a logo strategically placed anymore, or a scripted ad that breaks the experience for the viewer. Branded Storytelling is a tightrope walk that requires a steadfast commitment to one’s core values. Whether it’s a TV show, a YouTube channel or an ad campaign, we believe as content creators we need to be authentic and transparent when working with brands – because integrity is all we have.

Red Egg Entertainment was founded in 2010 by Sacha Sewhdat and Aaron Porteous. Together they produced 'believers', a feature length educational documentary about religion. 'believers' debuted internationally in 2013 at the Spirit Enlightened Online Film Festival.

Why Red Egg?
While driving around Toronto shooting for believers in a Toyota Echo hatchback, Aaron and Sacha were tossing ideas around for a name for the production company. Sacha’s red Echo became a topic of discussion and Aaron teased that it resembled an egg. Red Egg Entertainment was born. Years later, Aaron came across a peculiar Orthodox icon of St. Mary Magdalene holding a red egg, and discovered what would become a hidden double-ententre for the believers documentarians.

Name: wepost.
Description: Post produzione Audio-Video

Name: Graded Films
Description: Graded Films is a film, television, and commercial production company based in West Sussex. Our focus is simple: bold storytelling, strong creative vision, and production values that match the ambition of every project. From scripted development to high-end commercial campaigns, we bring ideas to the screen with clarity and craft.

Name: Gravi Films
Description:
Na Gravi Films, combinamos criatividade, experiência técnica e paixão pela narrativa para criar vídeos que não apenas informam, mas também inspiram e emocionam. Desde vídeos corporativos que destacam a missão e os valores de uma empresa até videoclipes que dão vida à música, nossa equipe dedicada trabalha em estreita colaboração com cada cliente para garantir que sua visão seja realizada de forma autêntica e impactante.

Com um compromisso inabalável com a qualidade, excelência técnica e inovação criativa, a Gravi Films é sua parceira confiável para todas as suas necessidades de produção de vídeo. Junte-se a nós enquanto exploramos novas possibilidades e elevamos suas histórias ao próximo nível.

Name: AZK
Description: AZK Produtora was founded in 2018 by Az, with the purpose of creating the best audiovisual narrative for its clients, combining its knowledge in different artistic areas and promoting development according to the needs of each person, with a unique and individual approach so that each project is unique. Production of tutorials, event coverage, institutional videos, video lessons, animations, artistic, advertising, documentary, institutional and journalistic videos, vignettes or any other video content. Video production, including agenda, recording plan, and image authorization; internal project management, with the creation of the schedule and monitoring of the creation processes; internal organization and equipment management, including the management of equipment tables, use and repairs; and contact with clients to schedule recording or meetings to agree on content details. Filming and editing, animation, image creation (drawing, photography, modeling clay, paper or computer graphics), operation of filming equipment, recording, lighting, editing and photography, adaptation or creation of scripts, as well as recording, mixing or editing of soundtracks. Transforming ideas into reality, whether for a large corporation or for artistic projects.

Name: tiedtke.
Description:
𝗦𝘁𝗲𝗽 𝟭: Videography.

Composition, color, branding, light, shapes etc. Shooting video and images are so much more than just pointing a camera at the subject and press record. If you truly want to succeed with video content you need to know everything there is about film and video. That's what I've decided to dedicate my life to. Research, shoot, edit, publish and analyse. Over and over and over again. It's a never ending process.

𝗦𝘁𝗲𝗽 𝟮: Content Distribution.

Creating a dope video is only 50% of the work. What's the point of having the greatest video of all time if no one watches it? Luckily I've invested tons of time learning how to reach an audience in an age of digital clusters of content.

I use multiple tools for achieving this including brand building, paid social campaigns, SEO & optimisation, growth hacking, social media management and more.

For this I use experience from hundreds of projects and up-to-date insider information from Facebook, Youtube and TikTok to help videos and projects lift of the ground and reach the audience it deserves.

𝗦𝘁𝗲𝗽 𝟯: Education.

When I started out with Videography and Digital Distribution many years ago I knew nothing about it. Almost everything I know today I've found out myself through articles, A/B testing, research, online courses, thousands of hours in the Adobe Creative Suite, in forums, troubleshooting etc.

For my fellow content creators I've started collecting everything I know in the tiedtke. academy - a digital building ground for tutorials, must-know-tips, troubleshooting and more. Free for everyone to learn.

Name: Eastern Neighbours Film Festival NL
Description:
Eastern Neighbours Film Festival brings to The Netherlands exciting, relevant cinema from East and Southeast Europe. 

The Festival is not just an event with high-quality cinema. It is much more than that. We have especially designed the entire festival to initiate networking and new partnerships and create unforgettable moments for every participant and cinema goer. 

Most of the selected films have their Dutch premiere, after being successfully screened at many film festivals worldwide. 

Next to films, we also provide masterclasses, film debates, and special get-together gatherings with drinks and snacks from Eastern Europe.

Name: CHROMATICA
Description:
Chromatica is a visual effects studio founded in 2009 with a long-standing association with art-house cinema.
Over the years Chromatica has participated in the production of numerous films such as Paolo Sorrentino's La grande bellezza (Oscar for Best Foreign Language Film 2014), Alice Rohrwacher's trilogy (La Chimera, Lazzaro felice and Le Meraviglie), Marco Bellocchio's Il Traditore and Rapito, Nanni Moretti's Il sol dell'avvenire and Tre piani, Mario Martone's Capri-Revolution, Il giovane favoloso and Nostalgia, Felix van Groeningen & Charlotte Vandermeersch's Le Otto Montagne, Matteo Garrone's Pinocchio and Dogman.
Chromatica provided digital effects for numerous series, including Valeria Golino's The Art of Joy, Bille August's The Count of Monte Cristo, Tom Shankland's The Leopard.
Chromatica won three David di Donatello Awards for best digital effects with Il Divo, La grande bellezza and Pinocchio.

Name: Vagalume Filmes
Description:
A Vagalume Filmes atua no mercado nacional desde 2008. Foram muitas produções de publicidade, branding Content, storitellyng e Cinema. Nossa Expertise é produzir conteúdos criativos, com alta qualidade de captação e pós produção que engajam e geram resultados com o menor custo possível. Diferente de outras produtoras contamos com um parque de equipamentos de câmera e luz além de ilhas de edição e finalização. 
Atendemos clientes como Acrilex, Europa, Elgin, Master Chef, ESPN, Centauro e tantos outros. Na área de Vídeos Institucionais produzimos filmes diferenciados para grupos nacionais e internacionais como Maxion, Energisa, Teadit, novelis e mais. Já produzimos na , México, africa 
Para cinema e tv, um longa-metragem para o grupo HBO, chamado Holocausto Brasileiro, e outros documentários de média e curta metragem. 
Contamos com uma equipe criativa de diretores, fotógrafos, roteiristas, editores e coloristas. Da produção executiva a entrega final, dominamos todo o processo.

Name: Andrew Wilson Agency, LLC

Name: Primo Filmes
Description: For twelve years PRIMO FILMES has been dedicated to creating content and telling stories that make a difference, giving priority to cinematic language and quality. The result is an award-winning and innovative portfolio in various formats and genres. Feature films produced by Primo have received awards for best film at all major Brazilian festivals, as well as being screened at major international festivals such as Toronto, Cannes, IDFA, Sundance and Berlin.

Name: Frog Music Licensing
Description: Frog Music Licensing provides excellent indie music for use in your film, TV show, commercial, or video game. We're small but selective - more like an indie label than a massive music licensing company. Our background is in music supervision & indie music journalism. We administer 100% of synch & master rights for every song in our catalog.

Name: ELIWOOD STUDIO
Description: Eliwood Studio est une structure cinématographique, de prestation d’émissions de télé-réalité, de divertissements, de documentaires, de films institutionnels, de films animations de films éducatif, de long métrage, de séries...

Name: Rosso Films International
Description:
Stefano Da Frè & Laura Pellegrini are the President & Vice President of Rosso Films International. 

Rosso Films is a global film production company with offices in New York City, New York & Montreal, Canada. Their collaborations include NBC Universal, MSNBC, Peacock.com as well as numerous advertising clients.

RFI produces narrative films and social documentaries that have been BAFTA + Oscar-Qualified. 

Their most notable documentary, “The Girl Who Cannot Speak,” screened at the Meet-The-Press Film Festival (in collaboration with AFI). It earned the Top 5 ‘Coup De Foudre’ recognition at the Cannes Film Festival, and went on to screen at two prestigious Oscar-Qualifiers: the St. Louis International Film Festival & Festival REGARD. 

The film has won a Platinum REMI Award at WorldFest-Houston International Film Festival and “Best Documentary” at the Switzerland International Film Festival.

Their latest documentary "The Day I Had To Grow Up" is about Youth Activism in America. The film showcases 6 activists & the events that shaped their political lives. It explores how modern children have had to cope with school shootings, climate crises, and national tragedies. 

"The Day I Had To Grow Up" has been featured on numerous networks such as: NBCLX, FOX NEWS, CBS NEWS, and ABC NEWS. 

Rosso Films International's company motto is: "Arthouse films that inspire a human connection."

Name: Acme Pictures
Description: ACME Pictures delivers the highest quality imagery for both film and television. We take your toughest visual effects challenges and make your project look its very best. Regardless of size or scope, our team of seasoned professionals is dedicated to delivering beyond expectations. Our fully customizable pipeline ensures that we will meet your creative and budgetary needs making the creative process effortless and collaborative wherever you are in the world!

Name: Syracuse Studios
Description: Syracuse Studios is the premiere production and post-production services company in Central New York's best in the nation film tax incentive region. Offering over 100,000 sq. feet of offices, post production suites, sound stages and standing sets in addition to strategic partnerships with local and national vendors.

Name: Vital Productions
Description: Vital Productions est une entreprise québécoise de production pour le cinéma, la télévision et les plateformes numériques. Située à une heure de Montréal, dans les Laurentides, et fondée en 2009 par deux professionnels de l’industrie, Serge Desrosiers et Sandrine Béchade, la société développe, produit et distribue des films qui touchent par leur contenu riche et leur esthétique léchée. Humanité, innovation et créativité définissent les projets signés Vital Productions.

Name: Smart Casual
Description:
We are a production studio, founded by Rūta Petronytė and Justinas Pocius.

For us Smart Casual is not only a name, it is a way of doing things – carefully, thoroughly, and undoubtedly professionally but not without occasional confetti.

Even though extremely precise on the action in the frame and beyond, we do not limit ourselves with particular genres, lengths, geographies, or topics. No matter the shape, it is all about the substance – becoming a trusted partner for both young and experienced creators, exploring relevant, new, brave and eye-opening ideas.

Name: P+S TECHNIK Cine Optics GmbH
Description:
A passion for innovation and exceptional pictures - that's the mission of P+S TECHNIK, Munich-based manufacturer of high-end professional cine equipment and optics.

The TECHNOVISION Classic and the Evolution 2X anamorphic lenses are developed with the creative and ambitious cinematographer in mind (who is focused on exceptional images).

P+S TECHNIK offers the widest range of lens rehousings for vintage and full format lenses and is an expert for lens restauration, lens service and spare parts. 

Specialized lens systems, optical adapters and interchangeable lens mounts solutions round off the portfolio in optics. 

Some of the award-winning P+S TECHNIK products: Skater Scope, Skater Mini dolly, T-Rex, SI-2K, Weisscam, Pro35.

Name: Arkenstone Studio
Description:
Bienvenue sur mon profil LinkedIn ! 

Je suis un vidéaste passionné, un créateur d'histoires visuelles, et j'aime capturer la beauté du monde à travers l'objectif de ma caméra. Mon objectif est de donner vie aux idées et de créer des expériences visuelles captivantes qui laissent une empreinte durable sur le cœur de mon public.

Je suis un artisan du storytelling, et je sais que chaque projet est unique. Que ce soit pour des vidéos promotionnelles percutantes, des documentaires inspirants ou des vidéos artistiques immersives, je mets mon cœur et mon âme dans chaque détail pour livrer des résultats qui dépassent les attentes.

Doté d'une solide expérience technique et d'une vision artistique audacieuse, je suis capable de gérer tout le processus de production vidéo, de la conception à la réalisation, en passant par le montage et la post-production. Je suis également ouvert aux collaborations et aux défis créatifs qui me permettent de repousser mes limites et d'explorer de nouvelles perspectives.

Ma satisfaction ultime réside dans la capacité de mes vidéos à toucher les émotions, à transmettre des messages puissants et à créer des liens authentiques avec le public. Je suis convaincu que chaque histoire mérite d'être racontée de manière unique et je m'efforce de donner une voix visuelle à chaque projet.

En tant que vidéaste, je suis constamment à la recherche de nouvelles inspirations et je suis ouvert aux opportunités de collaboration avec des entreprises, des marques et des individus partageant les mêmes valeurs créatives. Si vous recherchez un partenaire qui apportera de la passion, de l'engagement et un regard neuf à votre prochain projet, n'hésitez pas à me contacter !

Rejoignez-moi dans cette aventure visuelle, où l'imagination et la réalité se rejoignent pour créer des moments magiques en mouvement. Ensemble, nous pouvons raconter des histoires qui laisseront une empreinte durable et inspireront le monde.

Name: Di Factory
Description:
DI FACTORY is a company with many years of experience in digital image processing for feature films, which guarantees the highest standards of quality during the entire postproduction process, including on-set services (DI Set), coordination, digital intermediates, advanced color grading, editing, VFX, DCP mastering and archiving.

Since it was established in 2013, DI Factory has embraced the latest technological trends in the film industry. Apart from playing a crucial role in postproduction for “Ida”, the 2015 Oscar winner for Best Foreign Language Film directed by Paweł Pawlikowski, the company has done digital intermediates for more than 150 feature films and documentaries, both Polish and international. Some notable recent postproduction includes: “Cold War” directed by Paweł Pawlikowski – the winner of Best Director Award at Cannes Film Festival 2018, and Oscar nomination; “Corpus Christi” directed by Jan Komasa which has been nominated for Oscar 2020 in the International Feature Film category; “The Harvesters” by Etienne Kallos selected for Un Certain Regard of Cannes Film Festival 2018, “Mug” by Małgośka Szumowska the winner of the Silver Bear – Grand Jury Award at Berlinale Film Festival 2018; “Loving Vincent”, directed by Dorota Kobiela, Hugh Welchman – an Academy Award Nominee for Animated Feature in 2018; “Communion”, directed by Anna Zamecka – the 2017 European Film Award for Best Documentary.

DI Factory also handles comprehensive postproduction for TV shows for Canal+, HBO, and Netflix. (including “1983”, “Blinded by the lights”, “Raven – So Dark in Here”, “Pact” or “Pact 2”). 

Together with its partner company reKINO, DI Factory specializes in digital restoration and has already restored more than 50 titles, including the feature films of great Polish directors including Andrzej Wajda, Krzysztof Kieślowski, Krzysztof Zanussi and Wojciech Jerzy Has as well as numerous animated films and documentaries.

--
Clube Português de Cinematografia – Cineclube do Porto (Porto Film Society) was established in 1945, being the eldest active Portuguese Film Society. With regular activity, Cineclube do Porto screens fortnightly at Batalha Centro de Cinema and also organizes special programmes, film-concerts, workshops, exhibitions and publications. Since 2010, Cineclube do Porto has also offered an internationalisation programme of Portuguese Cinema, having curated the programmes: Aula Aberta, Portuguese Abroad, Portuguese Enigma, Queer Shorts, etc.

Name: Ish Entertainment, LLC
Description:
Ish Entertainment is a full-service production company developing and producing premium documentary and non-scripted series and films and scripted television. It has delivered projects to a wide variety of networks and platforms, including HBO, Showtime, Netflix, Hulu, Starz, Comedy Central, Lifetime, VH1, WE, MTV, Logo, Sundance, Oxygen, Freeform and many more.

Ish’s latest documentary, "Kill Chain: The Cyber War on America’s Elections" (currently streaming on HBO), was lauded by Time Magazine as an “unnervingly persuasive documentary [that shows] just how fragile our democracy really is.” Ish is currently producing a series for Comedy Central called "This Week at the Comedy Cellar", and is producing documentaries on Iran, the afterlife of champion boxer Gary Balletto, and a high-school marching band in South Africa. Ish's last documentary, the critically acclaimed GRINGO, premiered at Toronto before airing on Showtime. 

Multi-Emmy award-winning founder and CEO Michael Hirschorn is the former head of programming at VH1, where he doubled ratings and tripled revenue for the network, while also launching a documentary skein that produced dozens of award-winning projects. He has been a columnist for The Atlantic and a contributor to multiple publications, including the Wall Street Journal, the New York Times, and New York Magazine, and is a founder of The People Pac, which creates low-cost videos and develops social media distribution strategies for progressive candidates around the country. He is also a founder of GreenlightGo (www.greenlightgo.tv), a new platform designed to provide sharing economy solutions for video producers.

Description:
Versus Entertainment is a production/distribution company based in Madrid and Barcelona (Spain). Specialized in genre and art-house films, its major activity is based on feature-length films production and distribution of genre and arthouse pics. Our target is to produce a quality genre and author movies with worldwide economic relevance. We work in tight collaboration with its authors and directors, in order to establish long-lasting relationships and develop more ambitious and international projects.

Among the participation on films, Alejandro Miranda has been involved in films such us Guest ( Dir. Jose Luis Guerin) and BURIED ( Ryan Reynolds) as an executive producer. Also he has participated as an investor on Emergo, apartment 143 ( Carlos Torrents) and Red Lights ( Robert Deniro, Sigourney Weaver). Versus latest production is Boi, a feature film directed by Jorge M. Fontana.

Some of Versus’ most significant distributions include  Perfect Sense  (David Mackenzie),  Submarine  (Richard Ayoade), and  Woody Allen: A Documentary  (Robert B. Weide). Recently, Versus has brought internationally celebrated films to Spain such as Colossal  (Nacho Vigalondo), Columbus  (Kogonada).I Am Not A Witch  (Rungano Nyoni), Nico 1998  (Susanna Nicchiarelli) or First Reformed (Paul Schrader). Versus latest release is La Suite Nupcial, a feature film directed by Carlos Iglesias.

It is precisely the desire for growth, change and experimentation that has brought together Italian and foreign talents, esteemed professionals in the Visual Effects and Post-Production world.

With numerous years in the design industry, our experience includes motion design, brand & identity development, print design, traditional advertising, online advertising and interactive design. Our experience comes from working with clients ranging in size from small startups to fortune 500’s, including Mercedes-Benz, Shaw, Minnesota Zoo, TV Land Canada, Dell, Disney, AT&T Wireless, Rolex, Bell Canada and Travel Alberta.

Creativity, collaboration, fresh air, mountain biking, snowboarding, video games, movies, music and photography; these are the ingredients and influences that find their way into our work and the studio on a daily basis. We take on projects that challenge us creatively, and we believe that our best work comes from an environment that allows us to have fun with our ideas.

Name: DIKDAK
Description:
DikDak : qu’est-ce que c’est ?
Un animal préhistorique ?
Un courant d’art post-moderne ?
Un peu des deux en fait !
 
Dikdak est une agence de création de contenus audiovisuels multicanal innovants, didactiques et formateurs qui accompagne grâce à son storytelling les différentes étapes de la vie des entreprises, leurs innovations et leur vision.
 
Dikdak accompagne toutes les organisations dans leur communication audiovisuelle : 
: dans les énergies renouvelables, les télécoms, la culture, la santé, la formation...Dikdak propose le media le plus adapté au public ciblé : interactif ou non, réel ou virtuel, en série ... ou pas.

Dikdak a rejoint ECOPROD, pour rendre ses productions plus respectueuses de l'environnement et replante des coraux en Nouvelle-Calédonie via l'association Reef Protect.

Il paraît qu’on n’est pas sérieux quand on a 17 ans, nous ça fait pourtant 17 ans qu’on est là pour vous ! Et là on est archi sérieux…

Name: Women Over 50 Film Festival
Description:
Women Over 50 Film Festival (WOFFF) champions and showcases the work of older women on screen and behind the camera with an annual short film festival and year-round events and film screenings.

Our biggest and ultimate goal is to achieve equality and parity for older women in film. We do this by spotlighting women over 50 who are making film and championing all filmmakers who are centring women over 50 in their work.

We address the ageism and sexism many women face in the film industry. We screen films celebrating older women on both sides of the camera. We believe inclusive spaces to watch films together and conversations between generations of women can help make older and younger women feel less isolated and feel more connected.

Everyone is welcome at WOFFF. Anyone can submit a film to WOFFF or attend our events: there’s no upper age limit and all genders are invited to submit films and come to our festival.

WOFFF aims to showcase outstanding work of older women on screen and behind the camera; create a film community centred around older women and help combat isolation and loneliness in older women.

At WOFFF we always aim to be accessible, age-Positive, collaborative, empowering, knowledgeable and welcoming.

Description:
LITERARY IMAGE est une structure indépendante proposant une offre de service globale et sur mesure, à destination des auteurs ou de leurs ayants-droits, des éditeurs, des producteurs indépendants, et plus généralement des acheteurs de droits et de contenus issus d’adaptations littéraires. Les clients, selon leur statut et l’étendue de la prestation souhaitée, ont ainsi l’opportunité :
- de bénéficier d’une sélection de romans présentant du potentiel, best-sellers ou non ;
- de trouver le bon producteur pour l’adaptation ou le bon projet pour le producteur et l’acheteur de contenus ;
- de bénéficier de conseils en formats adaptés pour l’œuvre; 
- d’être accompagnés, sous l'égide de la fondatrice Elisabeth Haïk, par des juristes spécialisés dans la propriété intellectuelle, le droit d'auteur et la négociation des droits audiovisuels, avec une bonne connaissance de l'écosystème et de l'industrie cinématographique et audiovisuelle ainsi que des plateformes SVOD. 
LITERARY IMAGE apporte une intermédiation neutre entre l’ensemble des acteurs de la chaîne et contribue à sécuriser le développement de chaque projet d’adaptation et tout au long du parcours de création de l’œuvre. 

L'EQUIPE: 
Un pool de scouts littéraires constitué de lecteurs et lectrices passionnés, sélectionne les romans présentant de belles potentialités d'adaptation. 

La fondatrice Elisabeth Haïk met à profit son parcours d'avocat, d'écrivain et de titulaire d'un Master 2 en droit, économie et gestion de l'audiovisuel pour accompagner les auteurs dans le processus de cession des droits.

Des consultants externes, notamment avocats spécialisés en propriété intellectuelle et en droit du travail, travaillent de façon privilégiée avec LITERARY IMAGE pour le compte de ses clients. 
En un mot: LITERARY IMAGE intervient comme un facilitateur de la fluidité des relations entre les auteurs/éditeurs et producteurs, pour réaliser l’objectif commun de donner naissance à une œuvre audiovisuelle.

Name: Zimbabwe International Film & Festival Trust (ZIFFT)

“A society that enjoys and celebrates a dynamic Pan African film culture”.
