To achieve its mission, ZIFFT will:

·        Produce world-class sustainable events and programmes that will contribute to the long-term development of film in Zimbabwe.

·        Implement programmes and activities that encourage and support the conception, production, distribution, consumption, and celebration of quality film.

·        Encourage the participation of film industry stakeholders and the public.

·        Give a voice and exposure to issues that are relevant to our communities.

·        Foster a social issues discourse through film.

·        Increase the profile of contemporary African films and filmmakers.

·        Provide a unique way for companies to show their support for communities and the arts.

·        Create a forum where unconnected networks can be leveraged to increase positive exposure, contribute to the creative and professional development of participants and expand the brand recognition of all parties.

Tēnā koutou katoa!

He aha te mea nui o te ao

What is the most important thing in the world?
It is the people, it is the people, it is the people

===

Our ethos at The Granary Studios revolves around fostering people and their innate creativity. Stories are fundamental to the human experience and through them we share our joys, our hardships and our passions. Stories allow us to understand ourselves and others, they bend time and bridge divides. They allow us to momentarily walk a thousand miles in the shoes of others and then soar like an eagle the next. 

Our goal at The Granary Studios is to foster this creativity and by embracing emerging technologies and not being afraid to shoot for the stars, we empower our artists to dream big and tell the audacious stories that can connect with audiences across the globe.

The Granary is a Creative Tech R&D IP Development Studio who specialises in Virtual Production, Real-Time Animation, Live Action and Creative Technologies. We are World Builders!

Name: Realness Institute
Description: Our mission is to unearth the wealth of African stories – stories from the continent, told with an honest and unapologetic point of view by African filmmakers. Our first programe, the Realness Residency, which started in 2015, has gone on to launch 30 film projects across 16 African countries in only five years. The critical success of brave films such as The Wound, Rafiki, Akasha, I Am Not A Witch, Difret and This is Not a Burial It’s a Resurrection are a testament to the artistic and creative contribution that African filmmakers can make to the industry. In 2019, we launched our second programme, Creative Producer Indaba. This ambitious initiative has been designed, in collaboration with international partners, to catalyse Producers across the continent, and in doing so help transform the landscape of African and international independent cinema by training them to become ecosystem builders. In June 2020, we launched our third and fourth programmes, Episodic Lab and Development Executive Traineeship (DET) in partnership with Netflix and in 2021 we started our fifth program, the Souther Africa Locarno Industry Academy that is focused on the marketing, sales, and distribution side of the business. In 2022 we launched our sixth program, Authentic Africa which is our first 54-country episodic call. If your are interested in learning more please visit: realness.institute

Name: Jonathan Roumie
Description:
Picture this: a world on the brink of chaos, where the stakes are higher than ever. In the midst of turmoil, a hero rises—not just any hero, but one forged in the fires of adversity. He’s rugged, relentless, and driven by a fierce sense of justice. With every battle, he faces not only external foes but also the demons of his own past.

As the story unfolds, we’re thrust into a whirlwind of action and emotion. The landscape is gritty, the characters are complex, and the dialogue crackles with raw intensity. There are moments of heart-stopping suspense, punctuated by flashes of humor that remind us of our shared humanity. 

But it’s not just about the fights and the glory; it’s about sacrifice, redemption, and the unbreakable bonds that tie us together. As our hero navigates through betrayal and loss, he learns that true strength lies not in brute force, but in the courage to stand up for what’s right, even when the odds are stacked against him.

In the end, it’s a tale of resilience—a testament to the indomitable spirit that resides within us all. It’s a story that will leave you breathless, questioning your own limits, and cheering for the triumph of the human spirit against all odds.

Name: Screen Directors Guild of Ireland
Description:
Established in 2000, the Screen Directors Guild of Ireland (SDGI) is the representative body for Directors involved in the Irish and international audiovisual industry. These include Directors of feature films, fiction, animation documentary, television drama, short films, video art and commericals.

The guild has a number of core objectives designed to support Irish screen directors and promote Irish directors on a national and international scale. These can be described as follows:

1. To promote the economic and creative rights of the screen director and awareness of their role and status as artists.
2. To represent the Screen Directors of Ireland nationally and internationally, promote awareness of their work and create a comprehensive resource, information and contact infrastructure.
3. To encourage dialogue in the spirit of fairness, co-operation and clarity between film and arts organisations to encourage creative quality and diversity within audio-visual culture.

On behalf of its members, SDGI seeks to improve the working environment for directors which boosts productivity in the industry. SDGI represents the views of its members to relevant bodies in the audiovisual industry on a number of issues effecting directors and the independent film, television and animation sector.
Location: Dublin 2., Curved Street South, Temple Bar

Name: About People
Description:

Unsere Philosophie basiert auf der Kraft der Dramaturgie und Echtheit, die den Zuschauer auf eine bewegende Reise führt und ein unvergessliches Erlebnis schafft.

Dadurch verbinden wir Informationen und Emotionen auf kunstvolle Weise, schaffen tiefgründige Erinnerungen und hinterlassen ein nachhaltig prägendes Bild im Kopf des Zuschauers.


Unsere einzigartige Methodik wurde vierfach bei den renommierten Cannes Corporate Media & TV Awards gewürdigt.

Name: La Barraca de Cine
Description: Una experiencia cinéfila de principio a fin. Somos un espacio de cine móvil itinerante que ofrece una cuidada selección de cortometrajes y largometrajes tanto independientes como de actualidad. Nacemos de la necesidad de llevar el cine a las zonas más despobladas y ofrecerles una ventana abierta al mundo a través de la magia del cine. Te llevamos un cine dotado de tecnología al lugar que quieras, donde además nuestros acomodadores también harán de maestros de ceremonias y te presentarán la película o cortometrajes que hayáis elegido, haciéndote partícipe de una experiencia exclusiva.

Name: Visioni dal Mondo
Description:
The International Documentary Festival Visioni dal Mondo wants to promote the documentary genre as the best cinematic art to report and narrate the people , events and stories that shape the world.
The International Documentary Festival Visioni dal Mondo wants to foster the documentary not only as a current affair reporter but also as an original story teller, as the cinema of Reality.
The International Documentary Festival Visioni dal Mondo wants to investigate and report on the most important events of our contemporaneity, understand its changes and give a vision of our future.
The International Documentary Festival Visioni dal Mondo mission is to promote the quality but also the social and economic values of the Italian documentary cinema.
The International Documentary Festival Visioni dal Mondo is organized by the Production Co. Frankie Show Biz srl. Additional support is provided by other public and private Institutions, and by private Sponsors.

Name: ARF-FDS
Description: Der ARF/FDS ist der Zusammenschluss der schweizerischen Filmemacherinnen und Filmemacher (Filmautoren, Drehbuchautoren, Regisseure, Autoren- bzw. Regisseur-Produzenten) und vertritt die Interessen des freien Films in der Schweiz. Der Verband setzt sich für die Entwicklung eines eigenständigen schweizerischen Films, für eine vielfältige Filmkultur in der Schweiz und für die künstlerischen und beruflichen Interessen seiner Mitglieder ein. Er wurde 1962 von Alain Tanner, Claude Goretta, Henry Brandt, Walter Marti, Herbert E. Meyer, François Bardet und Jean-Jacques Lagrange gegründet. Zu ihnen stiess bald auch Alexander J. Seiler. Aktuell zählt der Verband rund 300 Mitglieder aus der ganzen Schweiz.

Name: International Christian Visual Media (ICVM)
Description:
“To be a supportive Christian community for those involved in the production and distribution of visual media; encouraging and networking to communicate Christ to the world.”

ICVM is a community of Christians involved in bringing the message of Christ to the world through the use of media. As an organization, we are committed to bringing together like-minded individuals with the same passion, and helping our members multiply their effectiveness through every possible opportunity.

ICVM started with the advent of the Christian film industry.  Many companies formed to meet the demand of more and better quality dramatic movies with a spiritual emphasis. Children’s videos started to proliferate as more and more parents became frustrated with what was coming out of Hollywood. 

Today ICVM is a consortium of producers and distributors making a difference in the world through visual media. The ICVM membership family includes media organizations and media missionaries as well as individual video producers, independent writers, directors, actors and even some individuals who are simply interested in supporting Christian films and filmmakers.

Whatever your niche, we ask you to prayerfully consider joining this group who will encourage you to fulfill God’s call for your life.

Name: WantAD GmbH
Description:
Die WantAD GmbH ist Ihre Full-Service-Creative-Production Company aus Leverkusen, spezialisiert auf strategische, positiv irritierende und technische Filmproduktionen/Kampagnen für Mittelstand und Konzerne. 

Mit über 10 Jahren Erfahrung kombinieren wir maximale Professionalität in der Produktion mit kreativen und strategischen Konzepten, die den entscheidenden WOW-Effekt liefern – die 1 % mehr, die den Unterschied machen. 

Wir leben unseren Claim: „Hollywood für den Mittelstand“. 

Unsere Arbeit ist data-driven – wir analysieren datenbasiert, welche Ansätze die besten Ergebnisse für Ihr Unternehmen erzielen , und setzen gezielt Maßnahmen um, die Ihre Marke nachhaltig stärken. 
Durch unser Netzwerk von 2000+ Influencern sind wir zudem in der Lage, maßgeschneiderte Influencer-Kampagnen anzubieten, die Ihre Botschaft effektiv in relevanten Zielgruppen verbreiten. 

Wir produzieren Social Media ADS, KI Spots, Werbespots, Branding/Workshops, Social-Media-Kampagnen und Firmen-Branding-Workshops, um Ihre Marke mit beeindruckender Qualität und strategischer Präzision sichtbar zu machen. 

Unternehmen kämpfen mit fehlender Sichtbarkeit, komplexen Botschaften und mangelndem Vertrauen – Filme schaffen Klarheit, Emotionen und Präsenz. 

Mit uns setzen Sie auf einen Partner, der kreative Visionen und strategische Expertise vereint, um messbare Erfolge für Ihr Unternehmen zu erzielen.

Name: Story House
Description:
At Story House, Inc., we’re building more than properties, we’re building platforms for storytelling, community, and cultural impact.

We are a vertically integrated company operating at the intersection of real estate development and entertainment. From thoughtfully designed live-work-play communities to full-scale production campuses, Story House brings visionary spaces and stories to life across the Mountain West.

Our business verticals include:

-Story House Village (Sheridan, WY): A 240+ acre live-work-play community designed for multi-generational living, sustainability, and economic impact in Wyoming.

-Story House Montana (Missoula, MT): A 47-acre commercial film studio and commercial leasing campus transforming a former lumber mill into Montana’s premier hub for Film & TV production and creative industry.

-Story House Partners: Our in-house film and TV production arm, creating original content filmed in our studios and across the country.

-Story House Film Institute: A vocational and educational initiative preparing the next generation of filmmakers in partnership with local schools and institutions.

-Story House Land & Livestock: Our agriculture and land stewardship division, managing equestrian operations and agricultural parcels within our communities.

We are a real estate-backed media company committed to designing places with purpose and producing stories that matter. By fusing sustainable infrastructure, creative opportunity, and long-term economic development, Story House is shaping the future of both real estate and entertainment in the American West.

Start Your Story With Us.

Name: CASCADIA International Women's Film Festival
Description:
CASCADIA is a multi-day annual curated film festival celebrating exceptional films directed by women from around the world. Our 2022 festival is scheduled online and live May 12-15. The festival spans all film genres: narrative, live-action, animation, documentary, and experimental films of all lengths. 

We are based in Bellingham, WA, a city of approximately 83,000 people on the shores of Puget Sound. It’s located about halfway between the film centers of Seattle, WA, and Vancouver, BC. The city enjoys strong local and regional support for the arts. It is also a destination for hikers, kayakers, climbers, sailors and other outdoor enthusiasts. Increasingly, filmmakers, too, are finding Bellingham, attracted to its proximity to urban and rural environments, as well as the ocean, lakes, rivers and mountains. It is also home to Western Washington University, with a 15,000 undergraduates and graduate enrollment, including the well regarded College of Fine and Performing Arts.

CASCADIA is an IRS-registered non profit 501(c )(3) organization.

Name: Subterranea Films S.R.L
Description:
Subterranea Films was created in 2002 by Christoph Behl, Esteban Perroud and Julieta Barrientos, with the main purpose of establishing a platform to produce their own projects while offering production and post production services to other companies and filmmakers.

In these ten years, Subterranea Films has produced feature and documentary films. Their films, both as work in progress and finished projects, have participated in numerous film festivals, such as Berlinale, San Sebastián, Mar del Plata and BAFICI.

Their products for television include works for local and foreign networks.

Today, Subterranea Films is the bridge for many independent productions to become a reality.

//

Subterránea Films fue creada en el año 2002 con el principal objetivo de establecer una plataforma que permitiera producir proyectos propios y al mismo tiempo ofrecer servicios de producción y post-producción a terceros. 

En diez años, Subterránea Films ha producido cine de ficción y documental. Sus películas en desarrollo y terminadas han participado en numerosos festivales de cine, como la Berlinale, el Festival de San Sebastián, el Festival de Cine de Mar del Plata y el Festival de Cine Independiente de Buenos Aires.

Sus productos para televisión incluyen trabajos para canales locales y cadenas extranjeras.

Hoy en día, Subterránea Films es el puente para que muchas producciones independientes puedan volverse realidad.

Name: ACS FRANCE - Aerial Camera System France
Description:
Expertise in aerial filming and specialist shots.
By working with us, we will put everything in place to offer you the best solutions tailored as best as possible to your artistic needs, with safety and with our state of the art materials. Our crew and equipment are available 24/7, anywhere in the world.  Our challenge: to optimize you time and budget.

- Dual Lens set-up Shotover K1:
An adapted version of the Shotover K1 which has been developed by our technicians. Fitted with two broadcast cameras, the single operator can switch between a wide lens and a tight lens at the flick of a switch.
 
- The Shotover U1 drone:
The Shotover U1 is the first professional drone dedicated to film and broadcast. It fits with the new generation of cameras and zoom lens setups eg: Red, Alexa Mini, Sony F55, Phantom Flex4K & Canon 17-120mm, Fuji 85-300 or Optimo 28-76mm.
 
- The remote head U1g:
The gimbal itself U1g is de-mountable and can be used on its own as a stabilised head on vehicles, cables or rails.

- The Shotover F1:
Smaller than the K1, but punching above its weight, the Shotover F1 is incredibly adaptable.

Thanks to its compact size, the F1 adapts to all sorts of vehicle - helicopter, car, cable, boat, and rail for all sorts of formats - most modern cameras fit, with a wide range of lens options available.

- The Microcable:
A horizontal cable travelling system which is easier to rig and more affordable than our Cablecam technology.

T-Port is an innovative non-profit online platform aimed at promoting emerging talent and facilitating the distribution of short films within the professional film industry. As an industry tool, T-Port is restricted for professional use – i.e. festival programmers, TV buyers, VOD services, sales agents and distributors that are scouting for short films and talent, as well as producers and talent agencies searching for their next big discovery. Name: TrustNordisk ApS
Description:
TrustNordisk came to be in 2008, when film and production company, Zentropa (est. 1991), and the oldest production company in the world, Nordisk Film (est. 1908), merged their sales arms Trust Film Sales and Nordisk Film International Sales.

Based in Denmark, TrustNordisk is one of the leading sales agents in Europe with a diverse catalogue and decades of experience and close familiarity with the film business, including some of the most seminal Scandinavian auteurs and film makers, such as Lars von Trier, Thomas Vinterberg, May El-Toukhy, Anders Thomas Jensen, Amanda Kernell and Hans Petter Moland. Furthermore, we offer comprehensive knowledge of the profiles and specific preferences of A-list festivals.

We are a creative partner for both the producer and distributor, and depending on your needs we offer to be actively involved already from the early script stages and all the way to when the film has completed its run in cinemas, on streaming platforms, VOD and so forth.

Besides sales, our expertise includes project development, in depth knowledge of the demand in territories worldwide, targeted positioning and tailored marketing plans, press relations and more.

We take great pride in being the sales representative of established and world-known filmmakers from Scandinavia as well as new talent. We recognize that a small-budget film by a debuting director can travel wide and far at festivals and in cinemas worldwide as long as the talent is there. Though our profile mainly consists of Scandinavian cinema we do not let geography limit us in our search for new projects.

Honesty and transparency are virtues we hold dear and strive to comply. We are a close-knit team who highly value a personal connection to our business partners, and when working with us, you will cross paths with the entire team of TrustNordisk from our assistants to our managing director.

Name: Untold Storytelling
Description:
We are not a video production vendor; we are a strategic partner for the story-driven leader.

Most brands today are stuck in a content trap. They treat storytelling as a commodity, prioritizing volume over value and interrupting their audience with noise. They wonder why trust is at an all-time low, but they keep running the same playbook.

We don't do that. At Untold, we don't make content. We engineer belief.

We operate as narrative architects for enterprise leaders who know that Art is a Business Metric. We build Narrative Infrastructure to bridge the gap between what a brand sells and what a human actually feels.

HOW WE WORK

We solve business problems by combining three specific disciplines on every project:

1. Journalism (Authenticity) We don't use scripts; we excavate. Rooted in the discipline of journalism, we go to the factory floor to find the unvarnished reality of your culture. We are not looking for the PR version of your brand. We trace the thread back to the human—asking: How does this actually change someone's Tuesday morning? Audiences do not argue with authenticity.

2. Science (Strategy) We respect the biology of the brain. We structure narrative to trigger specific neuro-chemical responses like Oxytocin and Dopamine, engineering the story to ensure the audience cannot look away.

3. Art (Signal) Information is cheap, but experience is expensive. We use high-fidelity cinematic craft to signal value. If the story looks expensive, the brand feels valuable. We treat every delivery like a premiere.

THE ECONOMIC ARGUMENT

We move beyond vanity metrics to measure what actually matters: Efficiency and Retention.

The Short Game: We found that when elite storytelling is the first touchpoint, Customer Acquisition Cost drops by up to 52%.

The Long Game: In a TikTok world, we see 60% retention on 15-minute documentaries. Attention spans aren't short; tolerance for boring content is short.

OUR PROMISE

If you are looking for a vendor to shoot a video,

Iconic Pictures International is the first company to specialize in developing comedy movies for global audiences. As an early-stage company, IPI partners with some of the most established companies in the industry.

Hollywood has struggled to earn foreign sales from comedy movies since sound was invented in 1927. A line of dialogue that’s funny in America isn’t always funny in China, Germany, or Brazil. 

The result?... $3 billion left on the table annually (that’s just from Box Office sales!).

Iconic Pictures International uses a proprietary formula for developing comedy films that translate across cultures. Through partnerships with established international brands, we adjust risk and maximize returns for investors.

Iconic offers a distinct alternative investment for diversifying your portfolio. In contrast to lengthy returns with start-ups and average returns from real estate, you receive: 

Est. 3.2-4.8x returns 
Est. 40-56% IRR 
Majority of Returns in Under 3 yr.
100% Passive Income (No Fees or Maintenance Work)
Win-Win Digital Contracts (Compliant with Regulations)
Investor Friendly w/ Monthly Updates
Exciting Perks (inc. Celebrity Photo Opps, In-Person Events, and More)

Founder Kit Redding is a British-born, American-raised, and multi-cultural entrepreneur and filmmaker who studied film at NYU. Redding’s parents’ divorce, his step-father’s death from cancer, and his mother’s battle with anxiety taught him one thing early in life; humor is the best medicine. 

A 2x founder with 40% ROI, he loves dogs, nature activities, and world travel (he’s lived in 11 countries). As an advocate for mental health, he views comedy movies as a vehicle for improving our collective mood (and economy).

Get an estimated 3.2 - 4.8X returns with IPI.

Name: ZeynoFilm
Description: Zeynep Atakan’ın sektördeki 1987’den bu yana devam eden profesyonel çalışmaları ve ortağı olduğu şirketlerden bağımsız olarak uluslararası standartlarda yapımlar üretmek amacıyla 2007 yılında kurulmuştur. Kurulma tarihi öncesi gerçekleştirilen yapımları da bünyesine dahil eden Zeyno Film, yurtiçi ve yurtdışında, ulusararası standartlarda filmler üretmeyi ve pazarlamayı amaçlamaktadır. 2004 Yılından itibaren Nuri Bilge Ceylan’ın yönetmenliğindeki İklimler, Üç Maymun, Bir Zamanlar Anadolu’da, Kış Uykusu filmlerinin yapımcılığını üstlenmiş aynı zamanda bu filmlerin Uluslararası satışlarını gerçekleştirmiştir. 2010 Yılında YAPIM LABORATUVARI isimli bir platform oluşturmuş, bu platformda sinema alanında profesyonelleşmek isteyenlerle eğitim ve danışmanlık çalışmaları gerçekleştirmektedir. Türkiye’den uluslararası alanda başarılı olacak yapımların yanısıra, yeni yapımcıları sinema sektörüne kazandırarak üretimlerine devam etmektedir. Vizyon planında, film endüstrisindeki değişim ve dönüşüme uyum sağlayarak, film yapımında alternatif modeller konusunda yaratıcı yaklaşımlar geliştirmeyi ve bu konuya liderlik etmeyi planlamaktadır.

Name: Home Movies - Archivio Nazionale del Film di Famiglia
Description:
Home Movies - Archivio Nazionale del Film di Famiglia
È un archivio storico la cui missione è salvare le memorie filmiche private: le pellicole 9,5mm Pathé Baby, 16mm, 8mm e Super 8 girate principalmente in famiglia tra gli anni ’20 e ’80 del secolo scorso.
L’Archivio è la prima struttura italiana dedicata al recupero, alla conservazione e alla valorizzazione del cinema amatoriale, e l’unica organizzazione in Italia che svolge la sua attività di raccolta delle pellicole su tutto il territorio nazionale e garantisce la conservazione dei documenti audiovisivi originali in locali climatizzati.
L’Archivio, creato e gestito dall’Associazione Home Movies con il sostegno, la collaborazione e la tutela di istituzioni pubbliche e private, si rivolge ai possessori di pellicole amatoriali desiderosi di rivedere i propri film trasferiti in video digitale e di partecipare a un progetto culturale che ha ottenuto in questi anni numerosi riconoscimenti in Italia e all’estero.

Name: Variance Films
Description:
Founded in 2008, Variance Films has grown from a one-man operation to a leading independent theatrical distributor. Variance's model is to partner directly with filmmakers, producers, streamers, and even other distributors for innovative and amplified theatrical releases.

RECENT HIGHLIGHTS:

In 2021, Variance handled theatrical sales and distribution on Ryusuke Hamaguchi's DRIVE MY CAR for Sideshow/Janus Films, which grossed over $2.4 million in the US and received four Academy Award nominations (including Best Picture, Director, and Adapted Screenplay), and one win for Best International Feature.

In 2022, Variance conceived of and executed an innovative re-release of S.S. Rajamouli's Telugu blockbuster masterpiece RRR just ten weeks after its initial diaspora-centered release, kicking off an incredible wave of international appreciation that, after a campaign designed and managed by Variance, culminated in a historic Academy Award win for Best Original Song - India's first Academy Award for a feature film.

In 2023, Variance was selected by AMC Theatres to power the US theatrical release for the first film of  their new distribution division, TAYLOR SWIFT | THE ERAS TOUR.  After an incredible $92m debut weekend and $180m+ domestic gross, AMC tapped Variance again for its follow-up release, RENAISSANCE: A FILM BY BEYONCÉ.

In addition to partnering with companies, Variance scouts for emerging talent it can amplify, and has released the debut features from visionary filmmakers such as Terence Nance, Eliza Hittman and Damien Chazelle.

Recent Variance clients include AMC Theatres, MUBI, Janus Films/Sideshow, National Geographic Documentary Films, Apple Original Films, Samuel Goldwyn Films, Capstone Pictures, XYZ Films, The Avenue/Highland Film Group, Decal, Hidden Empire Film Group, AMC Networks/Shudder/RLJ Entertainment, and Universal Studios.

Name: Adult Swim and Street Carnage and TV CARNAGE
Filmhuis Lumen
Description:
Het Filmhuis van Delft bestaat al sinds 1974 en is opgericht 'om het filmklimaat in Delft en omgeving te verbeteren.' Die doelstelling is nog steeds de basis voor de stichting, die zonder winstoogmerk waardevolle films wil vertonen die niet of nauwelijks aan bod komen in het reguliere bioscoopcircuit. Sinds 1996 gebeurt dat onder de naam Filmhuis Lumen in een nieuw gebouw met prachtige zalen, die ontworpen zijn om films optimaal tot hun recht te laten komen. Lumen is dé plaats in Delft voor cinema uit alle mogelijke landen, met eigen verteltradities en beeldculturen.

Filmhuis Lumen krijgt als een van de weinige filmhuizen van deze schaal in Nederland, geen structurele financiële bijdrage van gemeente of rijksoverheid. In plaats daarvan werken er zo’n 120 vrijwilligers voor het Filmhuis. Zij dragen met veel enthousiasme en betrokkenheid zorg voor alle praktische zaken en de sfeer die nodig zijn voor een prettig bezoek aan onze filmvoorstellingen. Daarvoor verrichten zij alle werkzaamheden die nodig zijn om ons brede filmaanbod te kunnen vertonen; ongeveer 40 voorstellingen per week, zo’n 300 filmtitels per jaar, deels in bijzondere festivals en thema-programma’s. De afgelopen jaren bezochten gemiddeld veertigduizend mensen Filmhuis Lumen.

Name: Moonshot Initiative
Description:
Women's Weekend Film Challenge (WWFC) works for gender equity by creating opportunities for women to bring their leadership, talents, and stories to the forefront of the film industry. WWFC places professional filmmakers on crews to write, shoot and edit a short film in one weekend and provides top-of-the-line equipment, insurance and workshops. This career-building opportunity is free for participants.

Since its first challenge in January 2018, WWFC has worked with over 700 women to produce 30 short films, which have been accepted to more than 70 festivals. This grassroots, bi-coastal movement combats the gender imbalance of the film industry by providing an intensive networking experience and telling women's stories on screen.

As a response to COVID-19, WWFC launched a virtual workshop series to bring career development and networking opportunities to filmmakers around the world. Workshop guests have included Alma Har'el, Kasi Lemmons, Catherine Hardwicke, Elle Johnson, Stella Meghie, Lynn Shelton, Karyn Kusama and many more.

The Women’s Weekend Film Challenge was founded and is led by Katrina Medoff and Tracy Sayre.

Name: Malmo Arab Film Festival - MAFF
Description:
Malmö Arab Film Festival – MAFF, works as an intercultural platform for diversity and tolerance. As one of the largest film festivals with a focus on Arab cinema, outside of the Arab world, we offer a meeting ground for the Nordic and Arab film industries. MAFF has an annual structure with events and festivals all over Sweden with special projects and programs.

The festival was founded in 2011 by the general manager and artistic director Mouhamad Keblawi. Evolving from a grassroots movement the festival was initiated through a need, in Malmö and Sweden, for a space that would share and explore the Arab culture. MAFF is an intercultural meeting place, a place for discourse and bridge-building between people and cultures.

Around 80 features, short films, and documentaries from all over the world are screened during the festival. There are also competition sections, panoramas, retrospectives, special screenings, workshops, seminars, and celebrations. Parallel to the festival is the Malmö Industry Days, MID. The MID is an industry forum for collaboration between the Nordic and Arab industries.
The 11th edition of Malmö Arab Film Festival will be held April 6-11, 2021.

Name: Wim Wenders Foundation
Description:
The foundation brings together the lifework of Wim Wenders and supports young talents in the area of innovative cinematic narration.

“People around the globe have seen my films, many have been influenced by them, and some of these films have become classics or cult films. In this sense they no longer belong to me anyways, but instead to a collective memory of cinema-goers of every age and many nationalities. It has been my desire for many years that in the future my work might belong only to itself, and thus to everyone. There is now a realistic and unique opportunity for this dream to come true.” (Wim Wenders)

In the fall of 2012 this desire began to be fulfilled. The establishment of the Wim Wenders Foundation in Düsseldorf created a legally binding framework to bring together the cinematic, photographic, artistic and literary lifework of Wim Wenders in his native country and to make it permanently accessible to the general public worldwide. The non-profit foundation model ensures that the whole body of work remains beyond the reach of any form of private self-interest.

All proceeds will be used to finance the purpose of the foundation: the promotion of the arts and culture through the preservation, restoration, research and distribution of Wenders’ work on the one hand and through the support of young talents in the area of innovative cinematic narration on the other.

We buy a lucky cat every time we finish a project. Recently we have purchased a bigger book shelf to accommodate the collection of porcelain felines, and the good fortune they bring in.

Maneki Neko, as the figurine is known in Japan, is believed to summon wealth, health and happiness into the homes and business which display them.

The sculpture depicts a cat beckoning with an upright paw. Some of the sculptures are electric or battery-powered and have a slow-moving paw beckoning.

In the design of the sculptures, a raised right paw supposedly attracts money, while a raised left paw attracts customers. Creating memorable work is much like the Maneki Neko; it must attract, provoke and inspire people into your world.

Name: The Writers Lab
Description:
The Writers Lab was founded in 2015 to ignite the power of women and nonbinary screenwriters over 40 and activate the media industry to broaden the range of storytelling across visual platforms.

Our first year we offered a single script competition and retreat—solely for women screenwriters 40+ in the US and accepting only feature scripts—and received an incredible 3,500 submissions. We were on to something.

Ten years later we now offer labs, retreats, ongoing mentorship and programming in the US, UK, Europe, and Canada, as well as virtual programming for Australian and Nigerian writers.

Through the craft, career and community support provided by TWL, alumnae have gained representation; optioned their scripts; attached talent, directors, and producers; built creative and professional partnerships; been hired for writing and teaching jobs; won countless awards and accolades; and founded independent filmmaking organizations. Our international community has generated writing groups and career support networks.

Our intention is to reach even farther and empower the tens of thousands of marginalized women storytellers globally by drawing attention to their unique and powerful stories.

Description:

In 2020 sloegen het Nederlands Film Festival, NBF en FilmForward de handen ineen om gezamenlijk te werken aan een evenementenagenda voor de hele audiovisuele sector. Met de ontwikkeling van een algemene audiovisuele agenda bundelen de samenwerkingspartners alle afzonderlijke inspanningen. In de AV-Agenda vind je bijeenkomsten van de vakverenigingen, festival data, deadlines van fondsen en andere relevante evenementen.

Name: CINETIE
Description: CINETIE  is an OTT  platform. we offers online streaming  of films and television programs. .

Name: Rio Cinema
Description: Your Local Independent Community Cinema. Dalston. Hackney. London. 112 Years Old this year!

Description: TheStorytellers è una Casa di Produzione Innovativa e indipendente sul mercato italiano che sviluppa e produce progetti di nuova comunicazione di qualità cinematografica e pubblicitaria.

Name: Gofilex E-delivery & Live Events
Description:
Gofilex is a family company founded in 1938.

Traditionally working for and with major studios, independent distributors, cinemas & arthouses. After many, many years of all kinds of physical services for 35MM and merchandise, Gofilex created Digital Logistics, so called E-delivery, for any type of digital content.

We work with many (if not all) major & mini-major studios, as well as with more than 240 independent content-owners. We do this in many territories, E-delivering content into thousands of cinemas.

ia this highly secured network Gofilex operates their specialised Organised Digital Delivery systems (Gofilex ODD). These systems include a variety of additional digital services (eg. versioning, conversion, KDM).


Our business aim is to expand the terrestrial footprint worldwide, and to keep simplifying the workflow by innovating. We are committed to continuous innovation, for example by delivering our latest solution: Cinio.net.

Name: Bayt Cinema
Description: The cinema house "Audiovisual Production and Digital Marketing Center" primarily works on marketing the visual identity of Chefchaouen city and region to attract more tourists and engage young people in the field of audiovisual production and cinema.

Name: Casa productora Verdeespina Studios
Description:
Estudios en la Ciudad de México. 
Casa productora de cine, televisión y radio en México. 
Servicios de Pre-producción Producción y Posproducción. 
Amantes de la imagen.
Infraestructura propia de última generación.
Tecnología en constante renovación.
Producción eficiente, rápida y segura.
Creativos, innovadores y con muchas historias que contar.
Documentales, largometrajes, podcast, comerciales, series de TV, programas de radio, animación 2D y 3D, mesas redondas, product shots, sesiones fotográficas.

Name: SnowDog Studio
Description:
SnowDog Studio specializes in creating all types of visual effects for films, television series, commercials, and any other media projects. 

SnowDog Studio was founded in 2015 and since then has been participating in a huge number of film and television projects. Our team is constantly growing and developing, investing love and professionalism in every shot. Every project is a new challenge, a new opportunity to express ourselves, and a new chance to leave part of our talent and skills in history.

We love and are proud of our work.

Name: LITTLE GINGER
Description:
LITTLE GINGER is a full service film and video production company and creative collective.  A group of talented friends who pool their skills and experience to deliver high end film, animation and live streaming projects for cinema, broadcast, commercial and high end corporate clients.

We provide end to end production managing everything from concept to delivery, and also individual production services where we might provide specific crew and equipment and assist other production companies, and everything in between.

Name: Ritmo Visual
Description: A Ritmo Visual filmes traz soluções de comunicação e conteúdo em imagens de diferentes formatos com o foco na qualidade da produção audiovisual. Somos uma produtora premiada, inovadora e criativa com base em São Paulo. Nosso desejo é criar uma atmosfera alegre para os nossos clientes, onde a honestidade, criatividade, e paixão prosperem.

Name: Quirky Tales
Description: Quirky Tales is the new YouTube channel that offers captivating story time experiences for audiences of all ages, from kids to adults. Immerse yourself in a world of imagination and wonder as you listen to enchanting tales brought to life through engaging narration. Whether you're seeking a whimsical adventure or a heartwarming tale, this channel has a wide range of stories that will entertain and inspire. Let your imagination soar as you embark on unforgettable storytelling journeys that will leave you wanting more. Get ready to be transported to captivating worlds and embark on unforgettable adventures with this extraordinary story time channel.

Name: Ankara Film Evi
Description:
Sinema filmi, kısa film ve belgesel prodüksiyonlarının yanı sıra farklı sektörlerden, çeşitli markalara, şirketlere ve organizasyonlara marka yönetimi ve dijital dünyadaki her türlü ihtiyaç için fikir ve çözüm üreten, projelendiren ve uygulayan bir yapım şirketiyiz.
Ne söylendiği kadar nasıl anlatıldığının da önemli olduğunu düşünüyoruz. Anlatımın da özgünlüğüne ve görsel gücüne inanıyoruz. Doğru iletişim kurmayı, ilham vermeyi, harekete geçirmeyi ve değişim yaratmayı hedefliyoruz.


We are a production company that creates, projects and implements ideas and solutions for brand management and digital content needs for various brands, companies and organisations in different industries, as well as produces motion pictures, short films and documentaries. 
We believe that “It's not what you say, it's how you say it.”. We also believe in the authenticity and visual power of expression. We aim to establish effective communication, inspire, mobilize and create change.

Name: MARC PLATT PRODUCTIONS
Description: MARC PLATT PRODUCTIONS is a Universal Studios-based production company with a portfolio of content across film, television and theatre including many box office hits and award-winning projects.

Name: The UK Film Festival London
Description:
The UK Film Festival aims to champion great films but in particular is seeking work from those filmmakers who might not yet have had the chance for a prestigious public screening of their work.

We celebrate the cultural diversity of films made in the UK and welcome films from all over the World.

Name: Cinema Filmtheater Hilversum
Description:
Stichting Filmtheater Hilversum is een non-profitorganisatie met als statutair doel: het bevorderen van de filmkunst.

Het filmtheater is sinds 1978 de plaats voor de betere kwaliteitsfilm in de mediastad. Het is gehuisvest in een modern eigen gebouw met drie zalen in het centrum. Met dagelijks minimaal twaalf voorstellingen en meer dan 120.000 bezoekers per jaar heeft het filmtheater een stevige positie verworven. Naast het actuele aanbod van kwaliteitsfilms zijn er themaprogramma´s, extra (kinder)activiteiten en eens per jaar een Openluchtvoorstelling en het eigen Filmfestival Hilversum. De organisatie bestaat uit meer dan 120 vrijwilligers, een team van vijf vaste medewerkers en een bestuur.



Filmtheater Hilversum is volledig onafhankelijk in zijn programmatische keuzes. De financiële middelen om de stichting te laten bestaan komen voornamelijk uit de kaartverkoop en de baromzet. Daarnaast ontvangen wij subsidie van de Gemeente Hilversum (in 2015: € 50.000) en van Europa Cinemas (initiatief van de EU om Europese films te ondersteunen).

Name: Red Moons Studios
Description:
We produce Hiphop videos for artists & brands
We are a video production studio, with 3 creative directors, and are always looking for collabs with agency’s and brands.
Please check out our work @ https://www.youtube.com/@RedMoonsStudios

Name: Phenomena
Description:
henomena is a music-driven film agency, founded in 2019, with a
strong focus on culture and music. Specializing in high-end projects
such as branded content, commercials, and music videos,
Phenomena stands out by prioritizing the integration of music
production with visual storytelling that hit hard and linger long
after the screen fades.
We strongly believe that the combination of compelling visuals and
catchy music creates a deeper connection with audiences, ensuring
that both the music and visuals leave a lasting impact.

Name: A13 Studios UK
Description:
Studio space for film and photography on the outskirts of London. Contact us for rates & more info:

a13studiosuk@gmail.com

940 square feet Film & Photography Studio complete with infinity cove, corner set, two private dressing rooms, a make-up area and wardrobe space. 

We provide free parking and a fully furnished kitchen and dining area that is large enough to also accommodate extra crew, kit and performers. There are also toilets and showers. 

5 minute drive from Purfleet Station (or a 30 minute walk)
45 minute drive from Central London

Name: Mostra Cine
Description:
En el corazón de Buenos Aires, en el año 2018, nació MOSTRA CINE, una productora impulsada por la pasión y el compromiso de sus fundadores: Valeria Bistagnino y Tomás Eloy Muñoz. Desde su lanzamiento, este equipo ha tenido una misión clara: utilizar el cine como una poderosa herramienta de impacto social, amplificando voces que a menudo son silenciadas.
En MOSTRA CINE, seleccionamos meticulosamente cada historia a contar para abordar temáticas relevantes y conmovedoras. 
Nuestro compromiso va más allá de las pantallas; se extiende a los vínculos que forjamos con las comunidades que tocamos. Trabajamos en equipo, impulsando un entorno donde la colaboración y el respeto son fundamentales. Para nosotros, el cine no es solo un medio de expresión, sino una vía de empoderamiento. A través de nuestras películas, series y documentales, buscamos no solo entretener, sino también inspirar y transformar conciencias.
Entre nuestras últimas producciones se encuentra “El aroma del pasto recién cortado” de Celina Murga con producción ejecutiva de Martin Scorsese y ganadora del premio al mejor guión en el festival de Tribeca; “La Virgen de la Tosquera” estrenada mundialmente en el festival internacional de Sundance y ganadora del premio mayor en el BAFICI 2025  y “La mujer de la fila” de Benjamín Ávila producida en asociación con Netflix.
Location: Buenos Aires, Ciudad autónoma de Buenos Aires

Name: Illes Balears Film Commission
Description:
Illes Balears Film Commission és una oficina de serveis creada pel Govern de les Illes Balears amb l'objectiu principal de facilitar a les productores nacionals i internacionals tota la informació que precisin per a la realització de rodatges a qualsevol lloc del territori de la comunitat autònoma.
Cal afegir que la IBFC ofereix els seus serveis sense ànim de lucre, com també promociona Mallorca, Menorca, Eivissa i Formentera com a localitzacions idònies. La sensibilització de les administracions, institucions i particulars sobre els avantatges que la producció audiovisual reporta al conjunt de la comunitat és fonamental.

Illes Balears Film Commission es una oficina de servicios creada por el Gobierno de las Islas Baleares con el objetivo principal de facilitar a las productoras nacionales e internacionales toda la información que precisen para la realización de rodajes en cualquier lugar del territorio de la comunidad autónoma.
Hay que añadir que la IBFC ofrece sus servicios sin ánimo de lucro, como también promociona Mallorca, Menorca, Ibiza y Formentera como localizaciones idóneas. La sensibilización de las administraciones, instituciones y particulares sobre las ventajas que la producción audiovisual reporta al conjunto de la comunidad es fundamental.

The Illes Balears Film Commission is a services office created by the Government of the Balearic Islands with the main aim of providing national and international production companies with all the information they might need for filming anywhere in the Balearic Islands.
The IBFC provides its services as a not-for-profit organisation. It promotes Mallorca, Menorca, Ibiza and Formentera as ideal locations for filming audiovisual productions, as well as stimulating and strengthening the Balearic Islands audiovisual industry. This process begins by raising awareness among public administrations, institutions and private organisations of the advantages that audiovisual products bring to the region as a whole.

Name: HistoryFix
Description:
HistoryFix is a streaming video platform dedicated to helping history buffs and fans of good stories enjoy an escape by offering a wide range of historical content all in one place. Whether it's a movie, short film, documentary, or how-to - find it all at HistoryFix.

Subscriptions are available on both a monthly and yearly basis. All new viewers can enjoy a 7-day free trial and new content is added weekly.

Name: Toboga Post
Description:
Toboga deals with video editing and postproduction, graphic realization of the audiovisual sector. 
A working group composed of professionals with specialized skills to meet the needs of customers in terms of realization and creative.We guarantee assistance and advice at various stages of project implementation for audiovisual communication. Through continuous research in the field of technology and creativity, we are able to offer customers a classical approach to the projects realization   but also a more flexible way of working that achieves equivalent qualitative results also adapting to smaller budgets.

Name: Atypicalfilms
Description:
With the march through time, Atypical has always evolved and moulded our practices to be ahead of the curve; In technology, tastes and trends.
The constant is our DNA of being creatively fearless, being endlessly inspired, and treating collaborators and clients with deep humanity and respect.
We have consistently punched above our weight and produced massive and memorable campaign films for brands and government entities. From the Singapore Navy, Airforce, EDB, STB, MCI to Global brands like Nike, Apple, Samsung, Huawei, Unilever and much more. 
We are proud of having been a springboard and enabler of creative talents and Directors over the years; Launching careers and inspiring younger filmmakers. It’s part of who we are; Build a sustainable film industry and creating work that clients and creatives are proud of.
And we like coffee. A lot.

Name: NorthStar Studios
Description: NorthStar Studios is committed to creating films that will inspire, educate and entertain a new generation of documentary viewers. We’re working around the world, from the United States to Europe, the Middle East and Africa to find the very best stories to tell. Our focus is highlighting people who are making a difference in the world today, as well as bringing people from history to life.

W RDBmedia. tworzymy zapis obrazu, któremu nadajemy kształt i wydźwięk. Interesuje nas to co chcesz przekazać, ponieważ przygotowujemy i realizujemy każdą produkcję w oparciu o Twoje oczekiwania i cele.

Description:
Creativity, flexibility and adapting capability have characterized the dynamics of Passaro Films’ structure. The Comnpany’s policy is to prioritize and invest in quality screenplay development to produce new feature films and documentaries, which may express the creativity of new authors and directors.
Due to it’s true experience in the international market, Passaro Films is fully qualified to make international co-productions come true.  Finally, Passaro Films offers an Executive Production structure in Brazil, which can be contracted on a project-basis

Name: Emperor Motion Pictures
Description: Emperor Motion Pictures is a motion pictures and film company based out of Hong Kong.

Name: Nepatogus kinas | Inconvenient Films
Description:
„Nepatogus kinas“ – tarptautinis žmogaus teisių dokumentinių filmų festivalis, vienas iš trijų didžiausių kino festivalių Lietuvoje, kurio drąsus turinys ir veiklos reflektuoja svarbiausias viešojo diskurso temas ir daro reikšmingą pokytį visuomenėje. Tai yra nekomercinis renginys, kuriantis erdvę žmogaus teisių, demokratijos ir pilietiškumo, socialinės atsakomybės, tvarumo temoms, siekiantis supažindinti visuomenę su pasaulinėmis aktualijomis, skatintis būti sąmoningiems ir kritiškiems.

Ne tik filmai

Įkvepiantys susitikimai su kino kūrėjais ir filmų herojais iš viso pasaulio. 
Aktualios diskusijos apie tai, kas svarbu čia ir dabar. 
Svarbūs pokalbiai su žmogaus teisių aktyvistais ir įvairių sričių ekspertais. 
Renginiai kino industrijos profesionalams. 
Edukacinės programos moksleiviams. 
Drąsūs renginių formatai: kinas alternatyviose erdvėse, VR sesijos, parodos, performansai, vakarėliai.

Name: Smiz and Pixel
Description: Producimos cine y contenidos desde el año 2006.

Name: Australian International Movie Convention
Description: The Australian International Movie Convention (AIMC) Powered by Vista Group (27 – 30 October 2025) is the only event on the Australian film industry calendar to provide opportunities to network with local and international executives from Cinema Exhibition, Distribution, the Filmmaking Community, and Technology & Cinema Equipment Suppliers under one roof.  Attracting delegates from Australia, New Zealand, Asia, the US and Europe, the AIMC provides an invaluable opportunity to preview upcoming product from major and independent studios; learn about local and international trends from guest presenters; discuss latest technologies and cinema fit outs with trade exhibitors; and network with colleagues and senior industry executives.

Name: Velvet Films
Description:
Velvet Films focalizes on the development and the production of international feature films and perceives itself as a hub of exchange between talents and cultures.

Velvet Films was created in 2011 under the name ED Productions by Franz Esterházy von Galantha. The company produced, as Belgian delegate producer, the films  « The Girl with Nine Wigs » by Marc Rothemund and « Me & Kaminski » by Wolfgang Becker. In 2016 the company is bought up by Sebastian Schelenz, producer and Christophe Jouret, Entrepreneur, and Velvet Films is born. In May 2017 André Sommerlatte joins the team as producer.

Name: Dogana Filmes Boutique Digital
Description:
A DOGANA FILMES BOUTIQUE DIGITAL iniciou suas atividades em fevereiro de 2020 com uma proposta diferenciada e criativa de trabalho - entregas personalizadas e customizadas no formato de boutique digital. Um coletivo de profissionais do mercado de produção audiovisual e de publicidade se reuniu na DOGANA - assim, para cada demanda, buscamos dentro do conjunto, o perfil desejado e específico para a produção. Situada em Brasília, Distrito Federal é uma empresa voltada para a produção de filmes publicitários, vídeos digitais e conteúdos on-line e off-line.
 
Em pouco mais de 4 anos, a DOGANA já é responsável por peças e materiais para grandes agências de publicidade de todo o país, emissoras de TV, atendendo clientes de diferentes segmentos - empresas privadas e públicas da administração direta e indireta.

Name: Les Archimèdes
Description:
Nous sommes trois amis d’enfance réunis par une passion commune : l’image.
Enfants des années 90, bercés par les films, les séries et les publicités marquantes, nous avons transformé cet héritage en métier.


Avec des parcours complémentaires – journalisme, audiovisuel et communication visuelle – nous créons aujourd’hui des vidéos, des identités graphiques et des supports d’édition pour des clients allant des grandes entreprises aux associations locales.


Notre force : une amitié intacte, qui apporte à chaque projet complicité, réactivité et créativité.

Name: Ciné St-Leu
Description: Cinéma Art & Essai à Amiens (80) • On y va les yeux fermés !

Name: Sukudo Media
Description:
Sukudo Media is a creative production house specializing in short-form dramas and high-impact advertising content.

From concept to final delivery, we produce compelling stories designed for digital platforms, brands, and modern audiences. Our in-house creative teams collaborate with directors, writers, and production talent to deliver visually striking, culturally relevant content at scale.

We help brands and platforms connect, engage, and convert through storytelling that’s concise, cinematic, and built for today’s fast-moving media landscape.

Name: Productions Spectrum
Description: Opportunities for Autism in media production.

Name: Moana Films
Description: MOANA FILMS SAS is a motion pictures and film company based out of 18 BD MONTMARTRE, Paris, Îledefrance, France.

Name: GALAXIA
Description:
GALAXIA is an agency specialised in the following sectors: cinematographic, audio-visual and events’ organisation. Started by Antonella Perrucci in 2003 in Gorizia, Galaxia works on national and international level.

GALAXIA offers proficiently and in a professional manner the following services for cinema, television, commercial and advertising, fashion, events:
•	Actors casting
•	Extras casting
•	Hostess and stewards casting
•	Fashion casting
•	Minors casting
•	Managing paperwork for minors
•	Mob scenes organisation
•	Production
•	Location scouting and managing
•	Events’ organisation
 
Thanks to the long casting experience, Galaxia is the ideal partner for: television and cinema productions, casting directors, directors, fashion designers and photographers, advertising agency, communication agencies an events’ organisers. 

GALAXIA is formed by a group of professional collaborators who can reach requirements and needs of the clients.

GALAXIA deals with scouting and selection of actors, models, extras and minors for advertising (commercials, photo session), television and cinema.

Name: Pinky Promise
Description: We produce films with heart, creativity and a bit of magic. Our team provides the experience, tools, and financing to make a storyteller's vision come to life.

Name: Tourne-Films Festival Lausanne (TFFL)
Description:
Le Tourne-Films Festival Lausanne, ou TFFL, est une manifestation culturelle annuelle célébrant les liens entre cinéma et musique. Le festival a pour but de faire découvrir à un large public la beauté de ces deux arts entremêlés, à travers un programme riche et varié : projection de longs-métrages en plein air, concerts live, sélection de courts-métrages et clips musicaux, conférences, tables rondes et afters. L’accès au festival est en majeure partie gratuit.

Le TFFL est organisé par l’Association à but non-lucratif Tourne-Films, basée à Lausanne. Celle-ci est composée de jeunes professionnel·le·s passionné·e·s de cinéma et de musique, qui ont pour objectif d’offrir à un public large la possibilité de profiter gratuitement d’événements consacrés à la rencontre de ces deux arts. Les membres de l’association sont entièrement bénévoles.

Name: Horned Melon Productions
Description: Color Grading that helps your film stand out (so you can win awards at the next film festival).

Name: Clean Plate FX
Description: Clean Plate effects is a boutique visual effects studio located in Los Angeles. We specialize in beauty for episodic tv and streaming networks, as well as objective VFX and production fixes.

Name: CHARBON STUDIO
Description:
Charbon Studio et Charbon Cinéma, c’est 2 salles d’étalonnages en projection 4K et 2K sous DaVinci Resolve en Wallonie et à Bruxelles, ainsi qu’une offre de services de post-production et laboratoires numériques.

Tous nos services sont consultables sur notre site : https://charbon.studio/

Name: BÂILL
Description: We are a creative production hôuse (and future production company) - aka your friendly neighborhood full service film production. Stay tuned for more.

Name: JHR Films
Description:
JHR Films est une société de distribution de films, créée par Jane Roger, en association avec Arnaud Dommerc (Andolfi), Jean-Baptiste Legrand (Centrale Electrique), Gaëlle Bayssière et Didier Creste (Everybody On Deck) en juillet 2014.
La volonté de JHR Films est d'apporter au public des films engagés.

Name: NuOlhar
Description:
NuOlhar é uma produtora de conteúdo. Usamos a comunicação humanizada para contar histórias e inspirar novos olhares. 
---
Fazemos vídeos, documentários e minidocs para várias plataformas.

Name: Lykta
Description:
Vi är en schysst design- och produktionsstudio

Lykta är ett kreativt team som kombinerar strategi, visuell design, webbdesign, foto och video för att skapa skräddarsydda digitala upplevelser. Med empati, nyfikenhet och en passion för detaljer hjälper vi företag att växa och sticka ut online.

Name: Andana Films
Description:
ndanaFilms is a documentary film distribution company based in France.
 
 It proposes a catalogue composed of French and foreign films, organised around several themes: Society/Politics - History - Art/Culture as well as feature films and creative short documentaries. In addition to its sales activity, AndanaFilms participates in the search for funding for projects initiated by producers whose editorial line it shares. Each year the catalogue is enriched with about twenty new films.

Name: Happy Sisyphus Productions
Description: Happy Sisyphus Productions is a forward-thinking studio that specializes in creating immersive narratives. Whether it's XR, AI, film, video games, or immersive theater, we are dedicated to pushing the boundaries of storytelling and technology, offering unparalleled experiences that blurs the lines between reality and fiction.

Name: Criamos!
Description:
Quando você tem um grande desafio, precisa de talentos que o ajudem a ter sucesso. Somos nós que CRIAMOS o que você precisa. Conte com a gente pra fazer suas ideias acontecerem.
Aqui, trabalhamos com especialistas em desenvolver soluções audiovisuais, didáticas e estruturadas para o seu projeto, seja ele qual for.

Name: Lookman
Description:
LOOKMAN is a young vibrant creative force in the independent film and television industry. We believe audiences are looking for new challenges that arouse their curiosity, to counterbalance a world, which is increasingly becoming convergent and monotonous. We seek to enliven popular entertainment by escaping sameness. 

We are also involved in publishing novels with an anthropological flavour that challenges retrogressive norms and fallacies. Writing and visual media has often led this cause, but at late it has drawn back at a time at a time when society needs most to evolve, or it will fall back to revisit the hidden horrors of the past. By better understanding the present and past, we believe illumination is achievable. We have a great reservoir of material to draw upon.  
Currently, we wish to talk to post-production partners and broadcasters about two animated children's television series concepts we have at the pilot stage. http://goo.gl/chh6x5

We are also involved in development of a slate of films including “Dolphin”, “Henrietta’s Odyssey” and “Quest for Mihte Lugh” (animation trilogy). Currently, we are undertaking historical research for “The Shadow Prince,” alternative history genre.

Name: Punta Fina Factoría de Contenidos
Description:
Somos una manada de soñadores, amantes de las historias.

Por alguna razón, que aún no entendemos, escuchamos claramente las voces de nuestros personajes. Lloramos, reímos, nos abrazamos a la vida y a la muerte, desde la insensata seguridad de estar detrás de nuestras computadoras. Tratamos siempre de que nuestro guión sea un documento inspirador para los directores, actores, artistas y productores que harán de nuestras letras una obra audiovisual. Nuestro único enemigo es el ego.

Pensamos en equipo, trabajamos en equipo, lo que no hacemos en equipo es ir al baño, porque nos da vergüenza. Tenemos la ilusión de hablarle al mundo a través de nuestras historias, por eso nos encanta cuando vemos una producción excelentemente realizada. Eso nos motiva a hacer lo que hacemos y a trabajar las horas que trabajamos del día y de la noche.

Name: CGR St Saturnin

Name: Outside the Club GmbH
Description: Outside the Club is a young film production company with visual effects studio from Northrhine-Westphalia, Germany. Our formats are strongly defined by innovative ideas, novel production methods and a strong attention to a high-quality audiovisual realization at the pulse of time.

Name: Whitelens

Name: Concorto Film Festival
Description:
International Short Film Festival
22nd Edition
19-26 August 2023
Pontenure_Piacenza - Italy


Concorto Film Festival was born in 2002 in Pontenure, a tiny village nearby Piacenza.
The festival immediately arouses interest at national level and in a few years becomes a landmark in the short film festival panorama turning into a fully established event.

From its first edition, Concorto has seen submissions increase from 72 to over 3.500, and the call for submissions is now open to short films from all over the world.



Concorto’s identity evolved over the years, the festival grew international and more and more committed to research and to select the best short films around the world.

Every year, at the end of August, the festival is held in a beautiful open-air park arena, where the audience can meet authors, and a professional jury (critics, directors, photographers, actors) awards the first prize (Asino d’Oro) to the winner of the main competition.



Concorto is also part of the Italian team at the world most prestigious short films meeting (Clermont-Ferrand) and has tied partnerships with a number of international festivals (Internationales Kurzfilm Festival Hamburg, Interfilm Berlin, Short Waves Poznan).

Concorto had the honour to host in its main competition the work of many directors such as Denis Villeneuve, Werner Herzog, Pippo Delbono, Ben Rivers, Ruben Ostlund, James Franco, Ariane Labed, Chloe Sevigny, Laura Bispuri, Antonio Piazza, and Fabio Grassadonia. Notable members of past juries include Daniele Ciprì, Maya Vitkova, Teho Teardo, photographers Jacopo Benassi, Monika Bulaj and Tano D’Amico, and film critic Neil Young.

Name: La Bocina Sonido
Description:
En La Bocina realizamos todos los procesos de postproducción de sonido para cualquier producto audiovisual. 

Nuestra fórmula se basa en la experiencia, la creatividad y la seriedad de un extraordinario equipo de profesionales.

La Bocina nace en Madrid en el año 2001 con el propósito de ofrecer servicios de postproducción de sonido para cine, televisión, teatro y publicidad, agrupando a reconocidos profesionales del mundo del sonido. 

En estos trece años de andadura profesional La Bocina ha sonorizado más de doscientas películas, trabajando para directores como Pedro Almodóvar (“La piel que habito”, “Los abrazos rotos”), Fernando Trueba (“Chico y Rita”), Enrique Urbizu (“No  habrá paz para los malvados”), Emilio Martínez Lázaro (“Ocho apellidos vasco”), Carlos Vermut (“Magical Girl”), Alberto Rodríguez (“La isla mínima”), Icíar Bollaín (“Te doy mis ojos”, “También la lluvia”), Borja Cobeaga (“Pagafantas”), Paco León (“Carmina o revienta”) o David Trueba (“Vivir es fácil con los ojos cerrados”). 
La Bocina también ha participado en la postproducción de sonido de series de televisión (“La que se avecina”, "Crematorio", “Fenómenos”), musicales y obras de teatro (“Hoy no me puedo levantar”, “Más de cien mentiras”) y numerosas publicidades y eventos.

Los trabajos de La Bocina han recibido numerosos reconocimientos. La empresa cuenta en su haber un Premio Goya al mejor sonido por “No habrá paz para los malvados”, además de varias nominaciones. También hemos sido reconocidos en los Golden Reel Awards, los premios Gaudí, Ariel o Platino entre otros.

Name: yeahsure.
Description:
In 2019 the average time spent consuming media from the internet officially overtook the time spent consuming media from TV. 

We expect this to continue, especially as social platforms evolve out of single-channel ‘friend-trends’, and into offering everything from e-commerce & news updates to video on demand. The way in which we search for, access and purchase content is growing more complex, and it’s now possible to reach consumers at every stage of their journey through social channels.
Founded by Jack & Pat (after hitting it off backstage at Splendour In The Grass 2015), the pair noted a growing niche between full scale production houses and the need for digital content and decided to take the plunge, launching yeahsure. With a team all under 30, we’ve grown up consuming & creating content, finding those digital sweet spots that have shaped the advertising landscape. 

In its fifth year, yeahsure. is now a full service digital content studio where creatives of all types come together to deliver purposeful content.
 Living in this digital age of unlimited choice, it’s crucial now more than ever for brands to delight consumers and build trust.

Daarnaast vindt u in ons programma met regelmaat de beste documentaires, korte films en archieffilms. Slieker werkt samen met partners als COC Friesland en 4hetLeven. Slieker is locatie voor het Noordelijk Film Festival in november én toont gedurende het jaar festivalfilms. Het is mogelijk om een filmzaal te huren voor bijvoorbeeld schoolvoorstellingen en privé voorstellingen. Slieker Film is aangesloten bij Europa Cinemas, het netwerk ter bevordering van de Europese cinema.

Slieker Film wordt het hele jaar door gerund door een klein team van zeven vaste medewerkers en een grote groep van ongeveer 100 vrijwilligers.
Slieker is onderdeel van Stichting Film in Friesland waar ook het Noordelijk Film Festival en het Fries Film Archief onder vallen.

The Commercial Video on Demand (VOD) platform compares with business-to-business (B2B) Netflix, Hulu, Comcast or Amazon Prime for movie theaters. The Company intends to leverage its .99 cents a month Over The Top (OTT) subscription-based web platform where “Everyone’s a Star” and can register to be featured in an upcoming Movie Studio. motion picture as a core value proposition.

Company Profile Can Be Found At: https://themoviestudio.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/08/The-Movie-Studio-Company-Profile-2020-UPDATED.pdf

The Commercial VOD (Video on Demand) technology now owned by The Movie Studio is a far more efficient means of distribution, with the goal of increasing overall revenues for all parties in the motion picture production and distribution channels. It breaks away from the physical copy’s distribution format, DVDs or hard drive files, and eliminates piracy, revenue loss from copying and video manipulation. It will eliminate the theft of content and increases revenues for producers and the related companies and could create future revenue generation for MVES.

The Company is in pre-production on its next film “Cause & Effect,” a Miami street movie about the seedy under belly of South Florida night life, and has also begun pre-production on “PEGASUS” a family movie about a young girl and a horse and is planned to be “signature film.” The Movie Studio, Inc. sets it self apart from other studios by being the only major independent studio located in South Florida and by managing its own in-house marketing & distribution department.

Name: TANDEM Productions - a STUDIOCANAL company
Description:
Since 1999, TANDEM has been a leading producer of high quality drama television series. Company CEO / Partner and creative executive producer, Rola Bauer, was recently named among ‘The 20 Most Powerful Women in Global TV 2015’ by The Hollywood Reporter, for the third time.

In 2012, a new chapter in TANDEM’s history began with STUDIOCANAL taking a majority stake in the company. This enabled TANDEM to strengthen its one-hour series strategy, leading to TANDEM’s production of the one-hour procedural crime series, Crossing Lines, which wrapped production on its third season and is currently rolling out launches in territories worldwide. Spotless, a CANAL+ Création Originale, a one-hour drama series, completed production on 10 episodes that premiered last Fall on NBCUniversal Cable’s Esquire Network in the U.S.

TANDEM develops, finances and produces primetime programs for the worldwide market, exclusively distributed by STUDIOCANAL. Emmy & Gemini Award-winning and Golden Globe-nominated, The Pillars of the Earth and World Without End, adapted from the novels of internationally bestselling author Ken Follett, are just two examples of TANDEM’s award-winning and critically acclaimed productions. TANDEM has optioned Follett’s Code to Zero, marking their third collaboration with the author.

TANDEM Productions based in Munich, Germany, was founded by CEO Rola Bauer and COO Tim Halkin, both company Partners. Jonas Bauer became a partner in the company in 2007.

Name: Agência - Portuguese Short Film Agency
Description:
Agência – Portuguese Short Film Agency was created in 1999 by Curtas Metragens CRL, which is the same entity that organizes the Curtas Vila do Conde - International Film Festival, the Solar – Cinematic Art Gallery and the ANIMAR. Agência is also the entity responsible for The Short Film Day in Portugal.

The Portuguese Film Institute decided to support the project since the beginning, so that the Agency's mission could be carried out completely and at no cost to Portuguese producers.

Headquartered in Vila do Conde (Portugal), Agência develops a work of promotion and distribution of Portuguese short films around the world. A work grounded on a strong public service component where the dissemination of Portuguese culture is done through an extremely creative and innovative cinematographic format: the short film.

This work, carried out with the intention of representing all the commitment and dedication for the diffusion of Portuguese short films, is based essentially on three vectors of action: promotion, programming and distribution.

All the activity undertaken by Agência has the goal of increasing the circulation of Portuguese short films in Portugal and abroad, of creating new audiences and helping the decentralization of cinematographic exhibition, through the development of an alternative circuit to commercial theatres, not overlooking the financial income for the work’s right holders. A systematized strategic work is established through a vigorous network of exhibitors, distributors, and buyers, enhancing the discovery of our films, giving Portuguese authors a greater visibility, and attracting many thousands of viewers through festivals, exhibitions, DVD editions, and TV broadcasts all over the world.

Cosa significa SIDEREUS? Letteralmente significa stella.

Era una parola di buon auspicio utilizzata dagli antichi romani quando, all’alba, era tempo di rimettersi in viaggio.

Da lei deriva la parola desiderio: de-sidus, smettiamo di guardare le stelle e mettiamoci in cammino per raggiungerle.

Ogni tuo desiderio... è un video per noi!

En parallèle des projections classiques, des événements spéciaux et une Projection Insolite offre au public l'opportunité de vivre une expérience cinématographique  différente !


Tout en nous rappelant les grands réalisateurs d’hier à travers sa Rétrospective, le festival Nouveaux Regards nous connecte au cinéma d’aujourd’hui et de demain, qui prend possession des nouvelles possibilités que lui offrent la révolution numérique et les nouvelles technologies pour faire vivre au spectateur des émotions uniques à travers une sélection d’œuvres en 3D et en réalité virtuelle.

A travers des Master Classes, Nouveaux Regards, accompagne également les auteurs dans l’exploration de nouvelles formes d’écriture et de modes de diffusion alternatifs, liés à l’apparition des nouveaux médias.

Seguiremos avanzando para conseguir la mejor unión posible entre películas, cineastas, festivales y espectadores.

Nuestros servicios más destacados:

  Cineastas: Envíen sus películas a festivales de cine y suban sus películas a nuestro canal de VOD gratis!

https://filmmakers.festhome.com

  Festivales: Reciban películas para sus festivales y creen fácilmente la versión online de sus festivales fácilmente.

https://festivals.festhome.com

  Espectadores: Vean cine independiente  / Festivales Online.

https://tv.festhome.com/

We will keep moving forward to get the best possible union between films, filmmakers, festivals and audiences.

https://festivals.festhome.com
