Name: Game Theory Films
Description:
Game Theory Films is a boutique feature film distribution company based in Toronto, Ontario, established in 2018. Game Theory is committed to the strategic release of theatrical feature films within the Canadian marketplace. 
Our aim is to partner with diverse emerging new voices to ensure their work receives a targeted and dynamic release strategy. With a small passionate staff, we offer a personal touch, and are available to our partners throughout the life of their films from development through release.

Name: UNESCO CITY OF FILM POTSDAM
Description:
Seit dem 30. Oktober 2019 gehört Potsdam zum globalen Netzwerk der nunmehr 350 UNESCO Kreativstädte. Das Netzwerk hat das Ziel, die Kooperation zwischen Städten zu stärken, die Kreativität als strategischen Faktor der nachhaltigen wirtschaftlichen, sozialen, kulturellen und umweltorientierten Entwicklung anzusehen. Städte können sich in sieben Kreativbereichen (Film, Musik, Literatur, Gastronomie, Kunsthandwerk, Medienkunst und Design) bewerben. In Deutschland gibt es derzeit sieben UNESCO Kreativstädte: Hannover und Mannheim (Musik), Heidelberg und Bremen (Literatur), Berlin (Design), Karlsruhe (Medienkunst) und Potsdam als einzige Filmstadt. Das 2004 gegründete Netzwerk umfasst aktuell 26 Filmstädte.

Seit 2020 koordiniert das Büro der UNESCO CITY OF FILM POTSDAM, mit Sitz an der Filmuniversität Babelsberg KONRAD WOLF, die Aktivitäten innerhalb des lokalen, nationalen und internationalen Netzwerks.

Name: Shabu Hachi Restaurant
Description: Shabu Hachi Restaurant is a motion pictures and film company based out of 11680 W Olympic Blvd, Los Angeles, California, United States.

Name: Dr. Stress | Thriller Psicológico em São Paulo
Description:
Série brasileira em desenvolvimento para streamings, criada e protagonizada por Tony Cotta.
O protagonista é um anti-herói que usa hipnose para resolver uma crise enquanto sua vida desmorona.

Piloto registrado | Em busca de coprodutoras/distribuidoras.

Name: VJUS
Description:
VJUS hjelper både små og store bedrifter med produksjon av film til alle typer prosjekter - hovedsaklig for nett. 

Vi er et filmselskap i Oslo sentrum som tilbyr foto og videoproduksjon, samt utleie av filmstudio og filmutstyr.

Har du noe du vil fortelle? La oss fortelle det sammen.

Name: PICTOR
Description:
PICTOR est une société de production de films, fondée par Adrien Bretet, récompensé en 2020 par le Cesar du meilleur court-métrage. 

La société produit des courts, des longs-métrages, des films publicitaires et des films institutionnels.

PICTOR est un nom tiré du latin ‘pictura’ qui désigne la peinture. 

Notre ligne éditoriale s'inscrit autour de deux axes : le récit et le réel. 

Ce qui nous anime dans le choix des projets que nous choisissons, c'est la narration. Pour nous, il est important de raconter et de faire vivre une histoire. Nous aimons le voyage émotionnel et initiatique que parcourt le personnage principal. Nous sommes des passionnés de l’intrigue, de l’action dramatique, du rythme, des enjeux organiques du récit. Nous souhaitons que le public se plonge ainsi au cœur de l’histoire. 

Nous constatons aussi que la démarche de la creative non-fiction nous guide souvent. Ce courant littéraire et journalistique s’empare d’un fait réel, connu ou ignoré, contemporain ou historique, dont l’auteur explore les ressorts sous la forme d’une enquête en étant présent dans la narration. Ce type de lien avec le réel nous inspire. 

A la croisée de ces deux idées, nous avons ainsi le désir de défendre un cinéma narratif de qualité et de soutenir le regard d’une autrice ou d’un auteur qui affirme, dans une forme picturale vivante et proche du réel, son regard unique sur notre monde contemporain.

Name: Capsula Films
Description: A Cápsula é uma produtora de filmes com ampla experiência em publicidade, vídeo clipes e curtas-metragens. Também desenvolve projetos de séries de animação.

Name: Movie&Art
Description:
We’re a powerhouse in the Brazilian production industry with a pedigree that stretches back 35 years.

Located in an area of 2,500 m² within the urban perimeter of São Paulo, our headquarters features two studios, camera department (35 mm, 16mm, Arri 418, Super 8 Bolex and digital cameras), fully equipped electrical department, rooms for make-up, VIP rooms, production, cafeteria, carpentry, four editing rooms, after effects and post-production facilities.

Our passion is to entertain audiences, whenever they are.

Name: Limbic
Description:
Bem-vindo à Limbic, o estúdio criativo que traz emoção à vida através da fotografia e videografia. Somos diferentes porque entendemos que as emoções são fundamentias em nossas vidas, e por isso, acreditamos que elas também são importantes em nossas entregas.

Com a Limbic, cada projeto é uma obra de arte que é entregue ao cliente com o objetivo de causar uma emoção. Queremos que nossos clientes sintam algo quando veem as fotos ou assistem aos vídeos que criamos.

Nosso foco principal é capturar a essência de cada momento e transformá-lo em uma experiência emocionante que seja perene.

Name: Raspbotics Film
Description:
Ich begleite Sie von Beginn an bei Ihrem Filmprojekt. Gemeinsam mit Ihnen entwickle ich ein Konzept und übernehme die Planung des Produktionsablaufs und der weiteren Schritte während der gesamten Filmproduktion.
Je nach Bedarf verwende ich das entsprechende technische Equipment wie Kameras, Licht, Mikrofone, Gimbal, Slider, Drohne, Steadicam und vieles mehr, damit das Bildmaterial Ihrer Wünsche eingefangen werden kann.
Detaillierte Nachbearbeitung von Bild und Ton sowie Voiceover bzw. die passende Musik inkl. lebenslanger Lizenz rücken Ihren Film ins richtige Licht.
Egal ob Imagefilm, Werbevideo oder Dokumentation – Raspbotics Film sorgt mit einem maßgeschneiderten Gesamtpaket für einen zeitgemäßen Auftritt Ihres Unternehmens.

Kostenloses Angebot: film.raspbotics.at

Name: Digital Cinema United
Description:
Delivering stories to screens seamlessly—across the globe.

With operations worldwide, we support content owners, distributors, and studios at every stage of the digital content supply chain. From theatrical DCP delivery to home entertainment authoring and global VOD servicing, we simplify complex workflows and ensure your content reaches audiences everywhere, on time and to spec.

Trusted by industry leaders and indie creators alike, DCU delivers thousands of titles each year to 5,000+ cinemas in 50+ countries and major digital platforms worldwide.

Built for scale. Driven by service. Powered by people who love films as much as you do.

Name: Baltic Film Services
Description: Baltic Film Services provides production services to the film and television industries.  Our team has managed productions for such clients as Warner Bros, Apple TV, Sony, Showtime, BBC, Working Title, Universal, Discovery, HBO, Paramount, Constantin TV, Netflix, Sky,  and many others.

Name: Curious Film
Description: Curious Film is a full-service production company that prides itself on creating top quality work. Founded fifteen years ago we still love the craft and believe in the power of great storytelling.

Name: Scuola di cinema e fotografia Pigrecoemme
Description:
I corsi di regia, sceneggiatura e montaggio della Scuola di Cinema e Televisione Pigrecoemme, insieme ai corsi di fotografia, di scenografia, di critica cinematografica ed a quelli sulla televisione e sulla sulla recitazione cinematografica e teatrale sono dal 2000  il punto di riferimento a Napoli per tutti coloro che vogliano approfondire le dinamiche teoriche e pratiche del linguaggio dell'audiovisivo, della produzione cinematografica e televisiva, sia per scopi professionali, sia per arricchirsi di uno strumento culturale essenziale. 

Imparare per realizzare, incontrarsi per fare squadra: da sempre con questo metodo formiamo montatori, registi, sceneggiatori, attori e videomaker a cui forniamo, con i nostri corsi, tutti gli strumenti culturali, linguistici e tecnici per affrontare consapevolmente il mondo della produzione audiovisiva.

La Scuola di Cinema e Televisione Pigrecoemme gode del patrocinio della Regione Campania, della Provincia di Napoli, di quello del Comune di Napoli e di convenzioni con l'Università degli Studi l'Orientale di Napoli, con l'Università degli Studi Suor Orsola Benincasa di Napoli, con l'Universita degli Studi di Bologna, e con numerosi enti ed aziende del settore culturale.

Name: WY Productions
Description: WY PRODUCTIONS is a motion pictures and film company based out of 14 RUE DE BERRI, PARIS, France.

Name: Big Mouth
Description:
Somar em projetos além do agregador, mas sim
como um todo. Uma ferramenta de expansão
para novas ideias, visando um horizonte de
possibilidades e projetos desafiadores, contando
com a qualidade, craft e olhar refinado que cada
obra merece, aliado as maiores agências do
Brasil e grandes marcas do mercado.

Nosso casting de diretores conta com talentos em
ascensão do mercado audiovisual, trazendo em
sua visão seus toques peculiares, sensíveis e
coerentes ao mundo atual, questões sociológicas,
mercadológicas e percepções necessárias aos
dias de hoje. Norteados criatividade, atendimento
a necessidade e coesão ao tempo que vivemos.

TODA HISTÓRIA PODE SER MAIS. E É ISSO QUE EXPANSÃO PROPORCIONA.

Name: New Europe Film Sales
Description:
Warsaw-based boutique world sales company selling quality feature films and shorts from all over the world. The company’s catalogue includes such arthouse hits, as Lamb (Cannes Un Certain Regard 2021), Corpus Christi (Oscar nomination 2020), Rams (Prix Un Certain Regard in Cannes 2015), Summer 1993 (Berlinale Best Debut 2017), Godland (Cannes Un Certain Regard 2022) and the upcoming new movie from the makers of the Oscar-nominated Loving Vincent – The Peasants (coming in 2023). New Europe also has a slate of family animations and picks up 1-2 animations per year. The company is also active in development and financing of projects, as well as nurturing talents.

In late 2018 New Europe became part of NEM Corp – a creative collaboration hub which includes the companies of Ewa Puszczyńska (producer of Ida and Cold War) and Klaudia Śmieja (producer of Claire Denis' High Life and Agnieszka Holland's Mr. Jones).

We work very closely with our filmmakers and buyers and only acquire films (animation, live action) that we like and believe in.

Our aim is to promote amazing films worldwide and work in the filmmakers’ best interest.

Name: ALCINE Film Festival
Description: ALCINE, the Alcalá de Henares / Community of Madrid Film Festival (ALCINE), with more than 50 years of existence, is the oldest festival in the Community of Madrid and one of the must-see events for short films and new filmmakers /ace. For years, it has been a qualifying festival for the Hollywood Oscars in the categories of short animation and fiction.
Location: Alcalá de Henares, Community of Madrid

Name: Apple Film Production
Description:
Apple Film is a prominent Polish production company, renowned for its features, documentaries and drama series, as well as for its successful collaborations with international partners. 

The company was founded almost thirty years ago by the CEO, Dariusz Jablonski, producer, director and scriptwriter, as one of the very first independent Polish production companies. He was joined a few years later by Violetta Kaminska; producer and Head of Production, who is also the Managing Director of ScripTeast, and by Izabela Wojcik; producer, Head of Development, and Managing Director of the Polish Film Academy. This team works closely together on every project, jointly deciding on their selection, the execution of the productions, as well as the distribution plans and foreign sales.

Thus far, Apple Film Production has produced and co--produced more than 30 features, and the same number of full-length documentaries and drama series, gaining over 200 international and national awards. It has cooperated with the many of the top producers and broadcasters from all over Europe; from Sweden to Israel and from UK to Russia, as well as with the US and Canada. Currently, the company is producing “The Pleasure Principle”, an international drama series which is the co--production between Poland, Ukraine and the Czech Rep. The latest films completed by Apple Film are two films directed by Alexey German Jr.: The Russian--Polish--Serbian co--production “Dovlatov” (Silver Bear Award for  Outstanding Artistic Contribution at Berlinale 2018) and the Russian--Polish title “Under Electric Clouds” (Silver Bear Award for Outstanding Artistic Contribution Berlinale 2016). The producers were also involved in the Ukrainian--Polish--Macedonian film, “When The Trees Fall”, the debut feature film by Marysia Nikitiuk (Berlinale Panorama 2018). In high--end drama credits, Apple Film has co-produced two series sold worldwide by BBCW; “The Passing Bells” and “Spies in Warsaw” for BBC 1 and Polish TVP 1.

Name: Just Like You Films
Description:
Just Like You Films is a Mid-American Emmy award winning and Oscar qualified 501(c)(3) nonprofit film production company and our mission is to raise a global generation of kids who because of their knowledge and understanding are more empathetic and compassionate people. 
Our completed projects available for viewing our listed below;
Just Like You - Anxiety and Depression.  
Just Like You - Diabetes in partnership with JDRF and starring hall of fame baseball player, George Brett and 1999 Miss America, Nicole Johnson.  
Just Like You - Facial Anomalies received theatrical distribution through AMC Theatres in over 200 theaters nationwide in a bundle with the feature film, Wonder, qualifying it for an Oscar.  
Just Like You - Down Syndrome
Just Like You - Cancer
Just Like You- Autism
And our original film Just Like You- Burns

COMING SOON
"May Contain" Collection that dives deep into the lives of individuals and families affected by food alergies. 
"Rise and Shine" A groundbreaking new film is currently in production, shedding light on the inspiring and often overlooked world of individuals living with Cerebral Palsy
"Grief" a poignant and thought-provoking film centered around the universal theme of grief.

Our films have been viewed on the Just Like You Films' youtube channel over a million times in 275 different countries.  We were honored to be awarded 2 Mid-America Emmys, the Tash Positive Images in Media Award, the National Down Syndrome Congress’ Education Award, The KC Jewish Film Festival’s Trailblazer Award, the AMC Cares Award and the Autism Society of the Heartland’s Making A Difference Award. We were nominated for the The Golden Door International Film Festival’s Autism Award, Best Editing Award and won the Raising Awareness Award for our Down syndrome film.

We at Storm recognize that we exist as an extension of   our clients professional image; hence, we acknowledge that our employees appearance, competence , performance and commitment levels are of infinite importance allowing us to measure our success by the satisfaction of our clients.

Name: Youhug Media 上海耀客传媒股份有限公司
Description: 上海耀客传媒股份有限公司是一家具有前瞻性部署、专业化运作和规模化经营的影视剧制作公司，办公地点分布上海、北京，业务涉及影视剧创作、制作、艺人经纪等多方领域。公司拥有一支年轻而富有创造力的核心团队，开发制作了电视剧《人不彪悍枉少年》、《红蔷薇》、《泡沫之夏》、《鬼吹灯之黄皮子坟》、《幻城》、《女不强大天不容》、《三个奶爸》、《千金女贼》、《离婚律师》、《敢爱》、《兰陵王》、《宝贝》、《心术》、《神话》、《金枝玉叶》等影视作品，未来还将继续推出《白发王妃》、《大宋北斗司》、《人民的财产》、《卖房子的人》等精品剧目，取得了优异的收视成绩及良好的社会反响；已有签约艺人张萌、麦迪娜、徐可、田雷、贾景晖、陈欣予、书亚信、逯子、王艺哲、黄德毅、王嵛、代露娃、孙佳雨等。耀客人以锐意求新、勇者先行的姿态突破传统类型剧的固定框架，不断寻求跨界合作和形式创新，使国产剧焕发别样的迷人风采，成为影视产业的探路者。耀客坚持认为最好的作品，应该努力追求艺术与科学的结合，电视剧最终呈现怎样的精神、气象和格局，取决于创作的认知高度，这正是文化产业的意义体现。用认知推动社会的前行，这也是耀客在作品上一贯融入的创作理念。
Location: 上海/北京, 上海/北京

Name: FAMILY PRODUCTION
Description:
FAMILY Production is a business founded by a family of hereditary filmmakers. Our genetic love for film is older than half a century. We combine our family heritage with personal experience and a passion for our work. Today Family is among the five premier production houses in Ukraine, specializing in TV commercial production. Our current priority is production services for foreign companies. We have all the means to guarantee the highest level of service: from in-house casting to unique location scouting; the most demanding locations are accessible to us due to existing relationships built up over the course of our company’s history.

We provide full service production including directors & DoPs, english-speaking crews, location scouting & management, special permits, studios, multilingual casting services, celebrity negotiations, camera/lighting/grip equipment, special effects, accommodations, film processing, music licensing negotiations, audio and visual post-production services.

Description: A Cinemais é uma rede brasileira de cinemas, com sede na cidade de Uberlândia, conta com 12 complexos em três estados do país, localizados nas regiões Centro-Oeste e Sudeste.

Name: Cornelius Films
Description: Based in Barcelona, Cornelius Films develops and produces fiction, documentary and animation projects, with the aim of supporting a committed and personal cinema connected with its time.

Name: Avitel Post Studioz Ltd.
Description:
The journey of Avitel Group transcends from being the first post-production studio in India, to one of the biggest conglomerates operating successfully in the Indian & Gulf, visual entertainment & multimedia arena. 

With a rich heritage of close to four decades, Avitel is counted among the worlds leading and most creative, integrated end to end post production and visual effects service companies that offers a comprehensive spectrum of services in the areas of commercial films, advertising films & television; ranging from visual effects, animation, digital film lab (digital intermediate, high resolution film scanning and film recording), telecine, editing, and motion control to high definition productions. 


SUMMARY OF ACHIEVEMENTS:

•1972: First Indian company to manufacture & provide B/W telecine facility in India,
•1975: First to manufacture 100% indigenous Audio Cassettes,
•1976: First to introduce television Special Effects,
•1980: First to introduce color telecine facility in India,
•1980: First to introduce fully automated manufacturing of VHS video cassettes in India,
•1982: Indias first private corporation to use low band U-Matic technology for post production,
•1990: First to introduce reverse telecine in India,
•1992: Avitel introduces Digital post production services.
•1995: VCD pre-mastering is introduced by Avitel,
•1996: Avitel establishes almost 90% of total post production studios in the country along with 
prominent broad casting channels.
•1998: Avitel establishes Indias first fully equipped Film Restoration & archiving facility.
•2002: Indias first DVD authoring services are offered by Avitel,
•2004: Avitel was one among introducing the Digital Intermediate (DI) facility to India.
•2007: Established APS FZ LLC, the largest studio facility for restoration & archiving in entire 
middle east. 
•2008: Indias first animation based Content Architecture & Development (CAD) Company established by Avitel.

Name: The Picture House Regional Film Center
Description: The Picture House Regional Film Center (TPH) is a 20-year-old mission-driven nonprofit delivering film and education programs in schools and community groups across Westchester as well as in the organization’s two 1920s era movie theaters in Bronxville and Pelham, NY. Name: Central Partnership
Description:
Major Russian film distribution and production company founded in 1995. 
Today, Central Partnership is the largest TV distributor and independent film distributor.
Apart from feature films Central Partnership also produces TV series (‘Master & Margarita’, ‘Doctor Zhivago’, ‘The Golden Calf’, ‘The Brothers Karamazov’, ‘Isaev: The Greatest Soviet Spy’ and ‘Liquidation’).
Central Partnership is actively promoting the Russian titles overseas.
Currently, Central Partnership owns the rights for more than 1,400 titles and 4,000 hours of TV series. 
In January 2009 Central Partnership became an official distributor of Paramount Pictures lineup in Russia and CIS (Ukraine excluded). The titles released by Paramount Pictures and Central Partnership steadily drive high box office. 
As of 2012, Central Partnership has been an exclusive distributor of all the Summit titles in the CIS.

Name: CASA KAFKA PICTURES
Description:
Casa Kafka Pictures, filiale de la RTBF et de sa régie publicitaire RMB, a été créée en 2005 avec un double objectif :
- Soutenir la croissance et la structuration de la production audiovisuelle belge.
- Offrir un produit d’investissement sécurisé aux entreprises belges intéressées par le Tax Shelter. 

Forte de sa philosophie unique, Casa Kafka Pictures occupe aujourd’hui une position majeure sur le marché de l’intermédiation Tax Shelter et offre à ses investisseurs une dimension additionnelle – visible, valorisante et durable – celle de la création audiovisuelle belge. 

Depuis l'extension du Tax Shelter aux œuvres scéniques début 2017, Casa Kafka soutient avec force le secteur des Arts de la scène . 

Convaincue par nos résultats, notre éthique et notre expertise, Belfius Banque nous accorde, depuis 2009, sa confiance sous forme d’une étroite collaboration commerciale en faveur des entreprises clientes de Belfius Banque.

Casa Kafka Pictures, een filiaal van de RTBF en de reclameregie RMB, werd in 2005 opgericht met twee doelstellingen:
- Het ondersteunen van de groei en de structurering van de Belgische audiovisuele productie.
- Het aanbieden van een veilig investerings- product aan Belgische bedrijven die interesse hebben voor Tax Shelter.

Gesterkt door haar unieke waarden en aanpak, neemt Casa Kafka Pictures vandaag een belangrijke plaats in op de markt voor Tax Shelter intermediatie. Zij zorgt bovendien voor een – zichtbare, waardevolle en duurzame – bijkomende dimensie voor de investeerders, namelijk die van de Belgische en Vlaamse audiovisuele creatie.

Sinds de uitbreiding van de Tax Shelter naar de podiumwerken begin 2017, ondersteunt Casa Kafka met kracht de sector van de Podiumkunsten.

Overtuigd door onze resultaten, onze ethiek en onze expertise, schenkt Belfius Bank ons sinds 2009 haar vertrouwen, onder de vorm van een nauwe commerciële samenwerking in het voordeel van de bedrijven die klant zijn bij Belfius Bank.

Name: New Reality Co.
Description:
Co-founded by Milica Zec and Winslow Porter, New Reality Co. is a creative studio dedicated to synthesizing storytelling, art and technology into groundbreaking and emotional projects. In 2018 New Reality Company was awarded two Telly Gold Awards, the Hot Docs DocX Audience Award, a Lumiere Award for Best VR Location Based Short and the Webby People’s Voice Award for Best VR: Interactive, Game or Real-Time for their project Tree. New Reality utilizes virtual, augmented, mixed and actual reality to tap into positive social change and explore the human experience, with a goal to invigorate viewers whether in a large-scale experiential installation or an intimate at-home viewing. 

For two years, New Reality was a member of NEW INC, the New Museum’s design incubator program. Milica and Winslow are Robert Rauschenberg Fellows, alumni of the Sundance New Frontier Lab, and have been named Artists-in-Residence at R/GA, Technicolor Experience Center, creative agency Droga5 and A/D/O, a creative space in Brooklyn exploring boundaries in design. Together they were named to Adweek’s Top 100 Creatives as Digital Innovators. 

At the 2016 Sundance New Frontier festival, New Reality premiered “Giant,” a VR film portraying an American family in an active war zone. “Giant” is one of the first VR projects to combine semi-volumetric live action video with game engine software. “Tree,” an experiential piece in which the viewer takes on the body of a growing tree, premiered at 2017 Sundance New Frontier and continued its run at Tribeca Film Festival’s Virtual Arcade, TED2017, Hot Docs Toronto, Phi Centre Montreal, NAB Show Vegas and CPH:DOX Copenhagen. “Tree” was also written up in numerous articles globally, including a recommendation from the New York Times as a must-see experience at Sundance. 

Following Giant and Tree, the socially connected experience “Breathe” represents the final leg of New Reality’s VR trilogy and is now in pre-production.

Mais les Sofica SOFITVCINE, c'est aussi le financement de nombreux programmes TV comme ZONE BLANCHE, UN VILLAGE FRANCAIS mais aussi des séries d'animation à succès comme OGGY ET LES CAFARDS et SIMON.
ATTENTION
Le "succès" des investissements des précédentes Sofica SOFITVCINE ne présage en rien de la performance future pour les investissements des Sofica SOFITVCINE. L’investissement dans une SOFICA ne bénéficie d’aucune garantie ou protection du capital investit. Avant de souscrire, il est impératif de prendre connaissance des conditions générales et des notices d’informations visés par l’AMF dans le Prospectus propre à chaque SOFICA SOFITVCINE.

Name: Filmhuis Breda
Description:
Filmhuis Breda is een gezellig en eigenzinnig filmhuis én filmcafé gelegen in Breda Botanique, in het centrum van Breda. Een culturele ontmoetingsplek met arthouse films en een selectie kwaliteitsfilms en waar je ook kunt genieten van een lunch, diner of gewoon een kop koffie of borrel en bites. Ervaar onze persoonlijke service van ons enthousiaste vrijwilligersteam in een bourgondische omgeving. Onze kok Pol 

Naast de reguliere filmvertoningen organiseren we meerdere speciale events per maand, waarbij we de film aanvullen met een interessante inleiding, live muziek, een heerlijke lunch of diner. Denk aan de Ladies' Lunch, De Aanschuiftafel + Film of een optreden van een singer-songwriter of operazangeres passend bij de muziekfilm. Ook brengen we geregeld klassiekers terug op het grote doek, die je zo kunt herbeleven in een sfeervolle omgeving.

In ons filmcafé kun je - of je nu naar de film gaat of niet - terecht kunt voor een bakkie koffie, een borrel(plank), en lekkere lunch of een smakelijk diner. En zodra de zon schijnt, kun je ook plaatsnemen op ons zonnige terras (we hebben het gecheckt: hier schijnt in Breda het langst de zon!).

Filmhuis Breda is ook een perfecte locatie voor een zakelijke bijeenkomst, cursus of vergadering in het centrum van Breda. Of wil je een privé filmvertoning voor vrienden, collega's of familie in een écht filmhuis organiseren? Bij Filmhuis Breda zit je goed! Onze twee filmzalen en ons filmcafé zijn voor verhuur beschikbaar.

Je vindt ons in Breda Botanique (de voormalige Chassé Kazerne). Een pand met een rijke geschiedenis, dat onlangs nieuw leven is ingeblazen. Is opgebloeid, letterlijk. In de botanische binnentuin ervaar je ook bij minder weer tóch dat heerlijke buitengevoel.

Aunque en una primera fase nos especializamos en el lenguaje documental, nos hemos ido abriendo a distintos ámbitos y lenguajes: largos de ficción, cortometrajes, transmedia, etc. Nuestros proyectos abordan temáticas y miradas muy diversas, desde los temas históricos y sociales, pasando por la ciencia, la cultura, la aventura y la música. Nuestros trabajos se dirigen tanto a las salas de cine como a las cadenas de televisión o las pantallas de ordenador y de móvil. Nos gusta dar voz a quienes no la tienen habitualmente.
 
En estos años de vida, nuestros trabajos han sido reconocidos con algunos de los principales galardones cinematográficos como el Goya, el Gaudí, las Biznagas del Festival de Málaga y un largo etcétera, tanto en España como en Francia, México, USA, Argentina, Alemania, Irlanda, etc... hasta sumar cerca de 50 galardones nacionales e internacionales.

Name: Brothers After War
Description: From Executive Producer Gary Sinise, in Brothers After War, Filmmaker Jake Rademacher reconnects with his brothers and elite soldiers he embedded with during the Iraq war.  Intercutting footage past and present creates a unique “then and now” journey into the toll of war, and a never before seen look at warfighters, and the veterans they become.

Name: OREADIS PRODUCTIONS
Description:
Bienvenue chez OREADIS Productions ! 

Découvrez l'univers captivant du cinéma engagé avec notre société de production basée à Issy-les-Moulineaux. 

Chez OREADIS Productions, nous sommes passionnés par la création de films à impact, inspirants et pédagogiques. Notre mission ? Partager des histoires qui captivent, éduquent et inspirent le public, tout en valorisant le riche patrimoine culturel de notre région. 

Avec une approche éco-socio-responsable, nous collaborons avec des partenaires locaux engagés pour produire des œuvres authentiques et impactantes. Chaque projet que nous entreprenons est le fruit d'une réflexion minutieuse, nourrie par notre amour pour le cinéma et notre engagement envers la préservation de l'histoire régionale. 

De la conception à la post-production et la promotion, nous vous accompagnons à chaque étape du processus de création pour garantir un résultat exceptionnel. 

Que vous soyez un cinéphile avide de découvertes, un investisseur souhaitant soutenir des projets éthiques ou un partenaire désireux de collaborer à une aventure cinématographique unique, OREADIS Productions est là pour vous offrir une expérience inoubliable. Rejoignez-nous dans cette aventure extraordinaire où chaque film raconte une histoire et chaque histoire change le monde. 

Explorez notre univers cinématographique dès aujourd'hui et plongez dans un monde de créativité, d'émotion et d'inspiration. Ensemble, faisons briller les étoiles du septième art et écrivons ensemble les prochaines pages de l'histoire du cinéma. 

Bienvenue chez OREADIS Productions, où chaque film est une invitation à rêver, à réfléchir et à agir pour un monde meilleur. 

#CinémaEngagé #Culture #Innovation #Art #Sensibilisation #PatrimoineCulturel #Créativité #Inspiration #ImpactSocial #Envir

Name: RINK GmbH
Description:
FILM ohne Strategie ist nur Zufall.
Wir bei RINK Media denken Film anders: nicht als schönes Beiwerk, sondern als strategisches Werkzeug für Unternehmen, die Wirkung erzielen wollen.

Unsere Haltung: Strategie ist kein Add-on – sie ist unser Fundament.
Jeder Film entsteht bei uns aus einer klaren Planung, durchdachten Dramaturgie und kreativer Exzellenz. So verwandeln wir komplexe Botschaften in Filme, die nicht nur beeindrucken, sondern Business-Ziele messbar unterstützen.

 Für unsere Kunden im B2B-Bereich bedeutet das: weniger Streuverlust, mehr Relevanz, maximale Wirkung.
 Für uns heißt es: Wir produzieren keine Filme von der Stange – wir schaffen visuelle Strategien, die Märkte bewegen.

Wenn Sie Film nicht nur sehen, sondern strategisch nutzen wollen: Willkommen bei RINK Media.

Name: Seen Films
Description:
عن أفلام س
شركة مصرية تعمل على تطوير وإنتاج وتوزيع وتوفير خدمات إنتاجية للأعمال السينمائية المستقلة. بالإضافة إلى تنظيم ورش تدريبية وفاعليات لتحفيز صناعة السينما المستقلة وتوفير فرص تعلم للسينمائيين. 

Seen Films is a Cairo-based film house that produces and supports authentic and innovative film and media works. Seen Films also organizes several film industry and development activities, offer creative and production services.
Lastly, we believe in the innate nature of stories—whether real or imagined—to the moving image. Cinema is the art of the visual story, as these stories progress with and by the audience, we reach a common experience, making and screening films, as part of a whole society.

Name: T A P E Collective
Description:
T A P E was founded in 2015 as a response to the lack of representation on screen. We decided to bring exciting screenings to audiences who hadn't seen seen themselves on the big screen, championing the forgotten could-be cult films of the festival circuit with a focus on programmes of women of colour both behind and in front of the camera.

Over the years we've curated a number of well rounded screenings bringing together film, art, music, talks and more into one space and event with a focus on representation, identity, heritage and stories from diasporas.

Since starting with an unlicensed film in a community cafe, T A P E has expanded to include content writing, talks, consultation, curating, and production.

Founders Angie Moneke and Isra Al Kassi were joined by Nellie Alston in 2017 in curating, developing partnerships and delivering interesting events which platform both short and feature films.

Please e-mail us on info@tapecollective.co.uk to collaborate, or if you're looking for consultants to support you with your community / exhibition / production project.

Name: DIAVIVA
Description:
Diaviva serve il mercato pubblicitario Italiano e internazionale da oltre trent’anni e lo fa seguendo alcuni valori fondamentali: collaborazione, originalità, passione.

Il nostro obiettivo è quello di crescere insieme ai clienti e alle agenzie che serviamo.
Siamo convinti che ogni cliente abbia una storia, dei valori e una visione da raccontare.
Proprio per questo ogni progetto è unico e diverso dal precedente portandoci ad
approcciare il nostro lavoro in maniera originale ed esclusiva.

Diaviva si occupa di tutte le fasi del processo produttivo: pre produzione, ricerca e proposte regia, produzione e post-produzione.
Ogni fase di questo processo è seguita e curata dai migliori professionisti del settore con l’ottica di ottenere il massimo rapporto tra qualità del prodotto e efficienza del processo produttivo.

Description: CC&C is a film production company from Mediawan, specialised in historical and contemporary documentary programs. CC&C is known worldwide for its expertise in archive-based films, thanks to its unique savoir faire in restoration, colouring and soundtrack remastering.

Name: This One Is On Us
Description:
This One Is On Us is a not-for-profit fan-driven DVD project documenting the Nine Inch Nails live experience.

On 5th May, 2008, Nine Inch Nails released their latest album, The Slip, free, online, as a gift to their fans. Or as Trent Reznor put it: "This one's on me".

On December 13th, 2008, dozens of Nine Inch Nails fans recorded the last show in the Lights In The Sky tour at Planet Hollywood, Las Vegas.

On January 7th, 2009, over 400Gb of video from the Victoria, Portland and Sacramento shows was unofficially released by the band.

By working together, the Nine Inch Nails fan community created "Another Version of the Truth" - a 3 disc release bringing together numerous editors, designers, and web programmers to create a professional digital film, followed by a physical release created by fans for fans. 

Several side projects have sprung from this venture, including a DVD of the first-ever performance of the band's landmark The Downward Spiral (more info: http://theninhotline.net/features/TDSlive/) and a concentrated effort to document the band's final 3-hour show at the Wiltern Theatre in Los Angeles.  This One Is On Us is eager to promote other like-minded projects, and has lent its support to films from locations including Mountain View, Toronto, London, Australia, Kentucky, and Chile.

To date, the group has received attention from media such as USA Today, Rolling Stone and Pitchfork TV, and holds the support of both the band and its fan community.

This one is on us. Our time. Our effort.  Our Gift to all NIN fans.

Name: Moxy_postproduction
Description:
Operating from Brussels, Moxy is a video content and post-production agency that adds an astonishing finishing touch to moving pictures, film, video and commercials for the TV and advertising industry.

Our tight and talented team of FX and editing professionals gives creative images from renowned directors the post-production and finishing touch they deserve. 

There’s no ‘passive’ in our dictionary. Next to brilliant execution, we are proud to generate creative added value by providing bright ideas from a post-production point of view. 

Good ideas and outstanding images only blossom in the right biotope. That’s why we created a stimulating, comfortable atmosphere in the Moxy loft.

We provide services from editing, to special effects, motion graphics, animation and even graphic design for your video. Even small productions or packshots in our studio are among the possibilities.

We just love film and video, so challenge us with your project

Name: BRICK
Description:
Rio e São Paulo. Da vontade de ser mais do que uma produtora limitada a executar ideias prontas, surge a Brick. Somos uma empresa de criação e desenvolvimento de projetos originais. Mais do que só apertar o “REC”, a gente gosta de ir do zero: do roteiro a finalização, da ideia rabiscada a um produto consolidado. Isso é o que chamamos de Creative Filmmaking. A nossa maneira de fazer filmes.

O nosso negócio é criar – e criar junto – todo tipo de conteúdo audiovisual para todo tipo de plataforma.

Name: Filmpark
Description:
Filmpark is an Istanbul-based film production company with hundreds of tv commercials and and an award-winning feature under its belt. 

Filmpark hosts a well-educated crew led by cutting-edge producers and directors who put quality, competitive pricing and imagination above all. We have been voted several times the best production company of the year at the Crystal Apple Awards of Turkey.

Since 2004 Filmpark has served the needs of various national and international brands including Turkish Airlines, Cocacola, Ford, Volkswagen, Vodafone and many others.

Name: Arcadia Entertainment
Description:
Arcadia Entertainment is a television production company in Halifax, Nova Scotia, Canada with a special interest in ocean related documentary programs.
Arcadia have produced specials and series for Discovery Channel, National Geographic, History, Vision, CBC, Life, IFC, Historia and Z TV. Our programs have been broadcast in over 140 countries in 26 languages.

Name: Bildwerk Basel
Description:
Die Welt lebt von guten Geschichten. 
Worte hinterlassen bleibende Erinnerungen, aber Bilder wecken Faszination und Emotionen. Bei Bildwerk übersetzen wir Ihre Geschichte in bewegende Bilder und transportieren Ihre besten Botschaften und Werte zu Ihren Kunden. 
Wir sind ein Team von Video-Enthusiasten, die in der Welt der Medien und Agenturen aufgewachsen sind. Bewegende Geschichten faszinieren uns, und unsere DNA ist geprägt von Innovation, Qualitätsbewusstsein und Umsetzungsstärke. 
Von der ersten Idee bis zum fertigen Werk begleiten wir Sie durch den gesamten Produktionsprozess und unterstützen Sie bei der Verbreitung Ihrer Geschichten.

Name: BootVFX
Description:
Founded by VFX Supervisor Landon Bootsma, BOOTVFX is a compact visual effects studio based in the Okanagan BC, focused primarily on compositing for Feature Film, Episodic TV and Commercial Advertising.

We are a team of highly accomplished, award winning compositors who pride ourselves on the ability to achieve success in facilitating large projects under very tight deadlines.

Our passion is to provide smart solutions to enrich your shots, making them not only look perfect, but believable and coherent with your storytelling.

We collaborate to develop and deliver the highest level of quality on-time and on-budget, with the outstanding service you expect from a world-class company.
